The content has been processed where line numbers have been added.

<usage_guidelines>
- This file should be treated as read-only. Any changes should be made to the
  original repository files, not this packed version.
- When processing this file, use the file path to distinguish
  between different files in the repository.
- Be aware that this file may contain sensitive information. Handle it with

- Pay special attention to the Repository Description. These contain important context and guidelines specific to this project.
</usage_guidelines>

<notes>
- Some files may have been excluded based on .gitignore rules and Repomix's configuration
- Binary files are not included in this packed representation. Please refer to the Repository Structure section for a complete list of file paths, including binary files
- Only files matching these patterns are included: index.html, css/**, js/**
- Files matching these patterns are excluded: repomix-output.txt
- Files matching patterns in .gitignore are excluded
- Files matching default ignore patterns are excluded
- Line numbers have been added to the beginning of each line
- Files are sorted by Git change count (files with more changes are at the bottom)
</notes>

17:     earth:    { color: '#69d83a', symbol: '▲', img: 'images/mountainsymbol.png' },
18:     water:    { color: '#5894f4', symbol: '◯', img: 'images/watersymbol.png'    },
19:     fire:     { color: '#ed1b43', symbol: '♦', img: 'images/firesymbol.png'     },
20:     wind:     { color: '#ffce00', symbol: '≋', img: 'images/windsymbol.png'     },
21:     void:     { color: '#9458f4', symbol: '✺', img: 'images/voidsymbol.png'     },
22:     catacomb: { color: '#8b4513', symbol: '✦', img: 'images/Catacomb.png'       }
23: };
24:

26:     green: '#69d83a',
27:     blue: '#5894f4',
28:     red: '#ed1b43',
29:     yellow: '#ffce00',
30:     purple: '#9458f4'
31: };
32: 
33: // Elemental source pool - stones available from shrines (max 25 each)
34: const sourcePool = { earth: 20, water: 20, fire: 20, wind: 20, void: 20 };
35: const sourcePoolCapacity = { earth: 25, water: 25, fire: 25, wind: 25, void: 25 };
36: const playerPoolCapacity = { earth: 5, water: 5, fire: 5, wind: 5, void: 5 };
37: const stoneCapacity = playerPoolCapacity;
38: 
39: // Helper function to convert numbers to roman numerals
40: function toRoman(num) {
41:     const map = { 1: 'I', 2: 'II', 3: 'III', 4: 'IV', 5: 'V' };
42:     return map[num] || num;
43: }
</file>

<file path="js/cosmetics-system.js">
  1: // ============================================================
  2: // COSMETICS SYSTEM  (js/cosmetics-system.js)
  3: // Currently: name colours only.  No XP impact.
  4: //
  5: // Public API: window.cosmeticsSystem
  6: // ============================================================
  7: 
  8: (function () {
  9:     'use strict';
 10: 
 11:     const NAME_COLORS = [
 12:         { id: 'name_gold',    name: 'Gold',         cost: 50,  value: '#FFD700' },
 13:         { id: 'name_crimson', name: 'Crimson',       cost: 50,  value: '#ff3355' },
 14:         { id: 'name_blue',    name: 'Electric Blue', cost: 50,  value: '#00aaff' },
 15:         { id: 'name_emerald', name: 'Emerald',       cost: 50,  value: '#00ee88' },
 16:         { id: 'name_purple',  name: 'Royal Purple',  cost: 75,  value: '#cc44ff' },
 17:         { id: 'name_rainbow', name: 'Rainbow',       cost: 200, value: 'rainbow' },
 18:     ];
 19: 
 20:     // ── Storage ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 21: 
 22:     function getUserId() { return window.gami?.userId || null; }
 23: 
 24:     function storageKey() {
 25:         const uid = getUserId();
 26:         return uid ? `godaigo_cosmetics_${uid}` : null;
 27:     }
 28: 
 29:     function loadData() {
 30:         const key = storageKey();
 31:         if (!key) return { owned: [], equipped: {} };
 32:         try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key) || '{"owned":[],"equipped":{}}'); }
 33:         catch { return { owned: [], equipped: {} }; }
 34:     }
 35: 
 36:     function saveData(data) {
 37:         const key = storageKey();
 38:         if (key) localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(data));
 39:     }
 40: 
 41:     function getEquipped(catKey) { return loadData().equipped[catKey] || null; }
 42:     function getEquippedAll()    { return loadData().equipped || {}; }
 43: 
 44:     // ── Purchase / equip ──────────────────────────────────────
 45: 
 46:     async function purchaseItem(id) {
 47:         const item = NAME_COLORS.find(i => i.id === id);
 48:         if (!item) return { ok: false, msg: 'Item not found' };
 49: 
 50:         const data = loadData();
 51:         if (data.owned.includes(id)) return { ok: false, msg: 'Already owned' };
 52: 
 53:         const userId = getUserId();
 54:         if (!userId) return { ok: false, msg: 'Not logged in' };
 55: 
 56:         const gold = window.gami?.profile?.gold || 0;
 57:         if (gold < item.cost) return { ok: false, msg: `Need ${item.cost}g (you have ${gold}g)` };
 58: 
 59:         const { error } = await supabase.rpc('award_gold', {
 60:             p_user_id:     userId,
 61:             p_gold_amount: -item.cost,
 62:             p_description: `Name colour: ${item.name}`
 63:         });
 64:         if (error) return { ok: false, msg: 'Purchase failed' };
 65: 
 66:         if (window.gami?.profile) window.gami.profile.gold -= item.cost;
 67:         data.owned.push(id);
 68:         saveData(data);
 69:         return { ok: true };
 70:     }
 71: 
 72:     function equipItem(id) {
 73:         const data = loadData();
 74:         if (!data.owned.includes(id)) return;
 75:         data.equipped.namecolor = (data.equipped.namecolor === id) ? null : id;
 76:         if (!data.equipped.namecolor) delete data.equipped.namecolor;
 77:         saveData(data);
 78:     }
 79: 
 80:     // ── Name color helper ─────────────────────────────────────
 81: 
 82:     function getNameColorStyle(equippedId) {
 83:         const nc   = equippedId || getEquipped('namecolor');
 84:         const item = NAME_COLORS.find(i => i.id === nc);
 85:         if (!item) return '';
 86:         if (item.value === 'rainbow') {
 87:             return [
 88:                 'background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f00,#f70,#ff0,#0f0,#00f,#80f,#f00)',
 89:                 'background-size:200%',
 90:                 '-webkit-background-clip:text',
 91:                 '-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent',
 92:                 'background-clip:text',
 93:                 'animation:nameRainbow 3s linear infinite',
 94:             ].join(';') + ';';
 95:         }
 96:         return `color:${item.value};`;
 97:     }
 98: 
 99:     // ── Panel UI ──────────────────────────────────────────────
100: 
101:     let panelEl = null;
102:     let isPanelOpen = false;
103: 
104:     function buildPanel() {
105:         if (panelEl) return;
106:         panelEl = document.createElement('div');
107:         panelEl.id = 'cosmetics-panel';
108:         panelEl.innerHTML = `
109:             <div class="cos-header">
110:                 <span class="cos-title">Name Colours</span>
111:                 <button class="cos-close" onclick="window.cosmeticsSystem.closePanel()">✕</button>
112:             </div>
113:             <div class="cos-gold-bar"><span id="cos-gold-amt">—</span>g</div>
114:             <div class="cos-body" id="cos-body"></div>
115:         `;
116:         document.body.appendChild(panelEl);
117:     }
118: 
119:     function renderPanel() {
120:         const data     = loadData();
121:         const equipped = data.equipped.namecolor;
122:         const gold     = window.gami?.profile?.gold || 0;
123: 
124:         const goldEl = document.getElementById('cos-gold-amt');
125:         if (goldEl) goldEl.textContent = window.gami?.profile?.gold ?? '—';
126: 
127:         const body = document.getElementById('cos-body');
128:         if (!body) return;
129: 
130:         body.innerHTML = NAME_COLORS.map(item => {
131:             const owned      = data.owned.includes(item.id);
132:             const isEquipped = equipped === item.id;
133:             const canAfford  = gold >= item.cost;
134: 
135:             const previewStyle = item.value === 'rainbow'
136:                 ? 'background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f00,#f70,#ff0,#0f0,#00f,#80f);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;background-size:200%;animation:nameRainbow 3s linear infinite;'
137:                 : `color:${item.value};`;
138: 
139:             let actionHTML;
140:             if (owned) {
141:                 actionHTML = `<button class="cos-btn ${isEquipped ? 'cos-equipped-btn' : 'cos-equip-btn'}"
142:                     onclick="window.cosmeticsSystem.handleEquip('${item.id}')">
143:                     ${isEquipped ? '✓ On' : 'Equip'}
144:                 </button>`;
145:             } else {
146:                 actionHTML = `<button class="cos-btn cos-buy-btn ${canAfford ? '' : 'cos-cant-afford'}"
147:                     onclick="window.cosmeticsSystem.handleBuy('${item.id}')">
148:                     ${item.cost}g
149:                 </button>`;
150:             }
151: 
152:             return `
153:                 <div class="cos-item ${isEquipped ? 'cos-item-equipped' : ''}">
154:                     <div class="cos-preview">
155:                         <span style="${previewStyle}font-weight:bold;font-size:15px;line-height:36px;">Aa</span>
156:                     </div>
157:                     <div class="cos-info">
158:                         <div class="cos-name">${item.name}</div>
159:                     </div>
160:                     <div class="cos-action">${actionHTML}</div>
161:                 </div>
162:             `;
163:         }).join('');
164:     }
165: 
166:     // ── Public API ────────────────────────────────────────────
167: 
168:     window.cosmeticsSystem = {
169:         togglePanel() { isPanelOpen ? this.closePanel() : this.openPanel(); },
170: 
171:         openPanel() {
172:             buildPanel();
173:             renderPanel();
174:             panelEl.classList.add('open');
175:             isPanelOpen = true;
176:         },
177: 
178:         closePanel() {
179:             panelEl?.classList.remove('open');
180:             isPanelOpen = false;
181:         },
182: 
183:         async handleBuy(id) {
184:             const result = await purchaseItem(id);
185:             renderPanel();
186:             window.gami?.notify(result.ok ? 'Purchased!' : result.msg, 0, 'gold');
187:         },
188: 
189:         handleEquip(id) {
190:             equipItem(id);
191:             renderPanel();
192:         },
193: 
194:         getEquippedAll,
195:         getEquipped,
196:         getNameColorStyle,
197:         getItems() { return NAME_COLORS; },
198:         getData:    loadData,
199:     };
200: 
201: })();
</file>

<file path="js/emoji-system.js">
  1: // ============================================================
  2: // EMOJI SYSTEM — Godaigo Elements
  3: // Players purchase emojis with gold and display them over their
  4: // pawn during gameplay.  Emojis broadcast to all clients so
  5: // everyone sees the reaction.
  6: // ============================================================
  7:

115:         { id: 'E79', tier: 1, cost: 400, display: 'POG',   name: 'Play of the Game',       isText: true },
116:         { id: 'E80', tier: 1, cost: 400, display: 'GOAT',  name: 'Greatest of All Time',   isText: true },
117:         { id: 'E81', tier: 1, cost: 400, display: 'LFG',   name: "Let's Freaking Go",      isText: true },
118:         { id: 'E82', tier: 1, cost: 400, display: 'PB',    name: 'Personal Best',          isText: true },
119:         { id: 'E83', tier: 1, cost: 400, display: 'OP',    name: 'Overpowered',            isText: true },
120:     ];
121: 
122:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
123:     // STATE
124:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
125: 
126:     let emojiInventoryIds = new Set();
127:     let isPanelOpen       = false;
128:     let currentView       = 'inventory'; // 'inventory' | 'shop'
129:     let emojiCooldown     = false;
130:     let emojiCooldownTimer = null;
131: 
132:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
133:     // STORAGE — localStorage keyed by user ID so purchases persist
134:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
135: 
136:     function storageKey() {
137:         const uid = window.gami?.userId || 'local';
138:         return 'godaigo_emojis_' + uid;
139:     }
140: 
141:     function loadInventory() {
142:         try {
143:             const saved = localStorage.getItem(storageKey());
144:             emojiInventoryIds = saved ? new Set(JSON.parse(saved)) : new Set();
145:         } catch (e) {
146:             emojiInventoryIds = new Set();
147:         }
148:     }
149: 
150:     function saveInventory() {
151:         try {
152:             localStorage.setItem(storageKey(), JSON.stringify([...emojiInventoryIds]));
153:         } catch (e) {}
154:     }
155: 
156:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
157:     // PANEL OPEN / CLOSE
158:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
159: 
160:     function togglePanel() {
161:         isPanelOpen ? closePanel() : openPanel();
162:     }
163: 
164:     function openPanel() {
165:         isPanelOpen = true;
166:         loadInventory();
167:         const panel = document.getElementById('emoji-panel');
168:         if (panel) panel.classList.add('open');
169:         const btn = document.getElementById('emoji-panel-btn');
170:         if (btn) btn.classList.add('active');
171:         // Sync gold display then render
172:         renderCurrentView();
173:     }
174: 
175:     function closePanel() {
176:         isPanelOpen = false;
177:         const panel = document.getElementById('emoji-panel');
178:         if (panel) panel.classList.remove('open');
179:         const btn = document.getElementById('emoji-panel-btn');
180:         if (btn) btn.classList.remove('active');
181:     }
182: 
183:     function switchView(view) {
184:         currentView = view;
185:         document.querySelectorAll('.emoji-tab-btn').forEach(b => {
186:             b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.view === view);
187:         });
188:         renderCurrentView();
189:     }
190: 
191:     function renderCurrentView() {
192:         const content = document.getElementById('emoji-panel-content');
193:         if (!content) return;
194:         currentView === 'shop' ? renderShop(content) : renderInventory(content);
195:     }
196: 
197:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
198:     // RENDER — My Emojis (inventory)
199:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
200: 
201:     function renderInventory(container) {
202:         const owned = EMOJI_ITEMS.filter(e => emojiInventoryIds.has(e.id));
203:         const inGame = isInGame();
204: 
205:         if (owned.length === 0) {
206:             container.innerHTML = `
207:               <div class="emoji-empty-state">
208:                 <div style="font-size:42px;margin-bottom:10px;"></div>
209:                 <div style="color:#ccc;font-weight:bold;">No emojis yet!</div>
210:                 <div style="font-size:12px;color:#888;margin-top:6px;">Head to the Shop tab to get started.</div>
211:               </div>`;
212:             return;
213:         }
214: 
215:         let html = '<div class="emoji-grid">';
216:         for (const item of owned) {
217:             const isText = item.isText;
218:             const cls = 'emoji-btn' + (isText ? ' text-emoji' : '');
219:             if (inGame) {
220:                 html += `<button class="${cls}" onclick="window.emojiSystem.useEmoji('${item.id}')" title="${_esc(item.name)}">${_esc(item.display)}</button>`;
221:             } else {
222:                 html += `<div class="${cls} emoji-btn-inactive" title="${_esc(item.name)} (join a game to use)">${_esc(item.display)}</div>`;
223:             }
224:         }
225:         html += '</div>';
226: 
227:         if (!inGame) {
228:             html += '<p class="emoji-no-game-note">Join a game to use emojis</p>';
229:         }
230: 
231:         container.innerHTML = html;
232:     }
233: 
234:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
235:     // RENDER — Shop
236:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
237: 
238:     function renderShop(container) {
239:         // Pull cached gold — refreshed when gami is ready
240:         const gold = (window.gami?.profile?.gold != null) ? window.gami.profile.gold : '…';
241: 
242:         let html = `<div class="shop-gold-display">${gold}g</div>`;
243: 
244:         for (const tier of EMOJI_TIERS) {
245:             const items = EMOJI_ITEMS.filter(e => e.tier === tier.id);
246:             html += `
247:               <div class="shop-tier-section">
248:                 <div class="shop-tier-header" style="border-left-color:${tier.color}">
249:                   <span style="color:${tier.color};font-weight:bold;font-size:12px;">${tier.badge}</span>
250:                   <span class="shop-tier-name">${tier.name}</span>
251:                   <span class="shop-tier-cost" style="color:${tier.color}">${tier.cost}g</span>
252:                 </div>
253:                 <div class="emoji-shop-grid">`;
254: 
255:             for (const item of items) {
256:                 const owned = emojiInventoryIds.has(item.id);
257:                 const btnCls = 'shop-emoji-btn' + (item.isText ? ' text-emoji' : '');
258: 
259:                 if (owned) {
260:                     html += `
261:                       <div class="shop-item owned" title="${_esc(item.name)} (owned)">
262:                         <span class="${btnCls}">${_esc(item.display)}</span>
263:                         <div class="shop-item-name">${_esc(item.name)}</div>
264:                         <div class="owned-badge">✓ Owned</div>
265:                       </div>`;
266:                 } else {
267:                     html += `
268:                       <div class="shop-item" title="${_esc(item.name)} — ${item.cost}g">
269:                         <button class="${btnCls}" onclick="window.emojiSystem.purchaseEmoji('${item.id}')">${_esc(item.display)}</button>
270:                         <div class="shop-item-name">${_esc(item.name)}</div>
271:                         <button class="shop-buy-btn" style="border-color:${tier.color};color:${tier.color}" onclick="window.emojiSystem.purchaseEmoji('${item.id}')">${item.cost}g</button>
272:                       </div>`;
273:                 }
274:             }
275: 
276:             html += '</div></div>';
277:         }
278: 
279:         container.innerHTML = html;
280:     }
281: 
282:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
283:     // PURCHASE
284:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
285: 
286:     async function purchaseEmoji(emojiId) {
287:         const item = EMOJI_ITEMS.find(e => e.id === emojiId);
288:         if (!item) return;
289:         if (emojiInventoryIds.has(emojiId)) return; // already owned
290: 
291:         if (!window.gami?.userId) {
292:             alert('Please sign in to purchase emojis.');
293:             return;
294:         }
295: 
296:         // Refresh gold from cache
297:         const profile = window.gami.profile;
298:         const currentGold = profile?.gold ?? 0;
299: 
300:         if (currentGold < item.cost) {
301:             if (window.gami.notify) {
302:                 window.gami.notify(`Need ${item.cost}g — you have ${currentGold}g`, null, 'gold');
303:             } else {
304:                 alert(`Not enough gold! Need ${item.cost}g but you have ${currentGold}g.`);
305:             }
306:             return;
307:         }
308: 
309:         const confirmed = await new Promise(resolve => {
310:             const overlay = document.createElement('div');
311:             overlay.className = 'retro-dlg-overlay';
312:             overlay.innerHTML = `
313:               <div class="retro-dlg-box">
314:                 <div class="retro-dlg-title">Confirm Purchase</div>
315:                 <div class="retro-dlg-body">
316:                   <div class="retro-dlg-line">${item.display}  ${item.name}</div>
317:                   <div class="retro-dlg-line">Cost: ${item.cost}g</div>
318:                 </div>
319:                 <div class="retro-dlg-btns">
320:                   <button class="retro-dlg-btn ok" id="rdlg-ok">Buy</button>
321:                   <button class="retro-dlg-btn cancel" id="rdlg-cancel">Cancel</button>
322:                 </div>
323:               </div>`;
324:             document.body.appendChild(overlay);
325:             overlay.querySelector('#rdlg-ok').onclick = () => { overlay.remove(); resolve(true); };
326:             overlay.querySelector('#rdlg-cancel').onclick = () => { overlay.remove(); resolve(false); };
327:         });
328:         if (!confirmed) return;
329: 
330:         try {
331:             // Deduct gold atomically via the existing RPC
332:             const { error } = await supabase.rpc('award_gold', {
333:                 p_user_id:    window.gami.userId,
334:                 p_gold_amount: -item.cost,
335:                 p_description: 'Emoji purchase: ' + item.name
336:             });
337: 
338:             if (error) throw error;
339: 
340:             // Optimistically update local cache
341:             if (window.gami.profile) {
342:                 window.gami.profile.gold = Math.max(0, (window.gami.profile.gold || 0) - item.cost);
343:             }
344: 
345:             // Persist to inventory
346:             emojiInventoryIds.add(emojiId);
347:             saveInventory();
348: 
349:             // Toast notification
350:             if (window.gami.notify) {
351:                 window.gami.notify(`${item.display}  ${item.name} unlocked!`, item.cost, 'gold');
352:             }
353: 
354:             // Re-render to reflect new state
355:             renderCurrentView();
356: 
357:         } catch (err) {
358:             console.error('Emoji purchase failed:', err);
359:             alert('Purchase failed: ' + (err.message || 'Unknown error'));
360:         }
361:     }
362: 
363:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
364:     // USE EMOJI — show locally + broadcast to other players
365:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
366: 
367:     function useEmoji(emojiId) {
368:         if (!isInGame()) return;
369: 
370:         const item = EMOJI_ITEMS.find(e => e.id === emojiId);
371:         if (!item) return;
372: 
373:         // Per-user cooldown to prevent spam (2 s)
374:         if (emojiCooldown) return;
375:         emojiCooldown = true;
376:         clearTimeout(emojiCooldownTimer);
377:         emojiCooldownTimer = setTimeout(() => { emojiCooldown = false; }, 2000);
378: 
379:         const myIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined') ? myPlayerIndex : 0;
380: 
381:         // Show over my own pawn
382:         showEmojiOverPawn(myIdx, item.display, item.isText);
383: 
384:         // Broadcast to all other players
385:         if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer &&
386:             typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
387:             broadcastGameAction('emoji', {
388:                 playerIndex: myIdx,
389:                 display: item.display,
390:                 isText: !!item.isText
391:             });
392:         }
393: 
394:         // Close panel for clean UX
395:         closePanel();
396:     }
397: 
398:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
399:     // SHOW EMOJI OVER PAWN  (called locally + by broadcast receiver)
400:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
401: 
402:     function showEmojiOverPawn(playerIndex, display, isText) {
403:         if (typeof playerPositions === 'undefined') return;
404:         const player = playerPositions[playerIndex];
405:         if (!player?.element) return;
406: 
407:         const rect = player.element.getBoundingClientRect();
408:         if (!rect || (rect.width === 0 && rect.height === 0)) return;
409: 
410:         // Centre horizontally on pawn, anchor just above it
411:         const cx = rect.left + rect.width  / 2;
412:         const cy = rect.top  + rect.height / 2;
413: 
414:         const el = document.createElement('div');
415:         el.className = 'emoji-float' + (isText ? ' emoji-float-text' : '');
416:         el.textContent = display;
417:         el.style.left = cx + 'px';
418:         el.style.top  = cy + 'px';
419: 
420:         document.body.appendChild(el);
421: 
422:         // Remove once CSS animation finishes (5.5 s to let fade complete)
423:         setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 5500);
424:     }
425: 
426:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
427:     // HELPERS
428:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
429: 
430:     function isInGame() {
431:         const gl = document.getElementById('game-layout');
432:         return !!(gl && gl.classList.contains('active'));
433:     }
434: 
435:     function _esc(str) {
436:         return String(str)
437:             .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
438:             .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
439:             .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
440:             .replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
441:     }
442: 
443:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
444:     // PANEL DOM — injected once on init
445:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
446: 
447:     function createPanelDOM() {
448:         const panel = document.createElement('div');
449:         panel.id = 'emoji-panel';
450:         panel.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Emoji panel');
451:         panel.innerHTML = `
452:           <div class="emoji-panel-header">
453:             <div class="emoji-panel-tabs">
454:               <button class="emoji-tab-btn active" data-view="inventory"
455:                       onclick="window.emojiSystem.switchView('inventory')">My Emojis</button>
456:               <button class="emoji-tab-btn" data-view="shop"
457:                       onclick="window.emojiSystem.switchView('shop')">Shop</button>
458:             </div>
459:             <button class="emoji-panel-close" onclick="window.emojiSystem.closePanel()" title="Close">✕</button>
460:           </div>
461:           <div id="emoji-panel-content" class="emoji-panel-body"></div>
462:         `;
463:         document.body.appendChild(panel);
464: 
465:         // Close on click outside
466:         document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
467:             if (!isPanelOpen) return;
468:             const p = document.getElementById('emoji-panel');
469:             const b = document.getElementById('emoji-panel-btn');
470:             const lb = document.getElementById('emoji-lobby-btn');
471:             if (p && !p.contains(e.target) &&
472:                 b  && !b.contains(e.target)  &&
473:                 (!lb || !lb.contains(e.target))) {
474:                 closePanel();
475:             }
476:         });
477:     }
478: 
479:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
480:     // INIT (called after DOM ready)
481:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
482: 
483:     function init() {
484:         createPanelDOM();
485:         loadInventory();
486:         renderCurrentView();
487:         console.log('✅ Emoji system ready —', EMOJI_ITEMS.length, 'emojis in', EMOJI_TIERS.length, 'tiers');
488:     }
489: 
490:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
491:     // PUBLIC API
492:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
493: 
494:     window.emojiSystem = {
495:         init,
496:         togglePanel,
497:         openPanel,
498:         closePanel,
499:         switchView,
500:         purchaseEmoji,
501:         useEmoji,
502:         showEmojiOverPawn,
503:         reloadInventory: loadInventory,
504:         getItems()     { return EMOJI_ITEMS; },
505:         getTiers()     { return EMOJI_TIERS; },
506:         getInventory() { return new Set(emojiInventoryIds); },
507:     };
508: 
509:     // Auto-init when DOM is ready
510:     if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
511:         document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
512:     } else {
513:         init();
514:     }
515: 
516: })();
</file>

<file path="js/gamification.js">
  1: // ============================================================
  2: // GAMIFICATION SERVICE  (js/gamification.js)
  3: // Adapted from Gamify/gamification_service.js for Godaigo.
  4: //
  5: // Uses the global `supabase` client (config.js).
  6: // Exposes window.gami for lobby.js / game-core.js to call.
  7: //
  8: // XP rewards:
  9: //   game_complete     : 20 + (numPlayers-1)×10  (loss)
 10: //   game_win          : 75 + (numPlayers-1)×25  (win)
 11: //
 12: // Gold rewards (no leaderboard impact):
 13: //   daily_login       : +20 gold (once per calendar day)
 14: //   level_up          : +50 gold per level (handled in DB function)
 15: // ============================================================
 16: 
 17: window.gami = (function () {
 18: 
 19:     // ── Internal state ────────────────────────────────────────
 20:     let _userId  = null;
 21:     let _profile = null;   // cached user_profiles row
 22: 
 23:     // ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 24: 
 25:     function _log(...args) {
 26:         console.log('[gami]', ...args);
 27:     }
 28: 
 29:     /** Fire-and-forget INSERT into user_activities */
 30:     function _logActivity(activityType, xpAwarded, goldAwarded, description, metadata) {
 31:         if (!_userId) return;
 32:         supabase.from('user_activities').insert({
 33:             user_id:       _userId,
 34:             activity_type: activityType,
 35:             xp_awarded:    xpAwarded    || 0,
 36:             gold_awarded:  goldAwarded  || 0,
 37:             description:   description  || activityType,
 38:             metadata:      metadata     || {}
 39:         }).then(({ error }) => {
 40:             if (error) console.error('[gami] activity log error:', error);
 41:         });
 42:     }
 43: 
 44:     /** Update a subset of profile.stats in the DB (fire-and-forget) */
 45:     function _patchStats(patch) {
 46:         if (!_userId || !_profile) return;
 47:         const stats = Object.assign({}, _profile.stats || {}, patch);
 48:         _profile.stats = stats;
 49:         supabase.from('user_profiles')
 50:             .update({ stats, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
 51:             .eq('user_id', _userId)
 52:             .then(({ error }) => {
 53:                 if (error) console.error('[gami] stats patch error:', error);
 54:             });
 55:     }
 56: 
 57:     // ── Public API ────────────────────────────────────────────
 58: 
 59:     const api = {
 60: 
 61:         // Expose userId for UI (read-only intent)
 62:         get userId() { return _userId; },
 63:         get profile() { return _profile; },
 64: 
 65:         /**
 66:          * init(userId, displayName)
 67:          * Called from onAuthSuccess in lobby.js.
 68:          * Gets or creates the user_profiles row.
 69:          */
 70:         async init(userId, displayName) {
 71:             _userId = userId;
 72: 
 73:             let { data: profile, error } = await supabase
 74:                 .from('user_profiles')
 75:                 .select('*')
 76:                 .eq('user_id', userId)
 77:                 .single();
 78: 
 79:             if (error && error.code === 'PGRST116') {
 80:                 // Profile doesn't exist yet — create it
 81:                 const { data: newProfile, error: createErr } = await supabase
 82:                     .from('user_profiles')
 83:                     .insert({
 84:                         user_id:      userId,
 85:                         display_name: displayName || 'Player',
 86:                         total_xp:     0,
 87:                         current_level: 1,
 88:                         gold:         0,
 89:                         badges_earned: [],
 90:                         inventory:    [],
 91:                         stats: {
 92:                             games_played:      0,
 93:                             games_won:         0,
 94:                             scrolls_cast:      0,
 95:                             elements_activated: 0,
 96:                             streak:            0,
 97:                             last_active:       null
 98:                         }
 99:                     })
100:                     .select()
101:                     .single();
102: 
103:                 if (createErr) {
104:                     console.error('[gami] profile create error:', createErr);
105:                     return;
106:                 }
107:                 profile = newProfile;
108:                 _log('new profile created for', displayName);
109:             } else if (error) {
110:                 console.error('[gami] profile fetch error:', error);
111:                 return;
112:             }
113: 
114:             _profile = profile;
115:             _log('init complete — level', profile.current_level, 'xp', profile.total_xp);
116:         },
117: 
118:         /**
119:          * onDailyLogin()
120:          * Awards 20 gold once per calendar day.
121:          * Does NOT award XP (login is not a meaningful game action).
122:          */
123:         async onDailyLogin() {
124:             if (!_userId || !_profile) return;
125: 
126:             const today     = new Date().toDateString();
127:             const lastActive = _profile.stats?.last_active;
128:             if (lastActive === today) return; // Already collected today
129: 
130:             const { error } = await supabase.rpc('award_gold', {
131:                 p_user_id:     _userId,
132:                 p_gold_amount: 20,
133:                 p_description: 'Daily login reward'
134:             });
135:             if (error) { console.error('[gami] daily login gold error:', error); return; }
136: 
137:             // Log a daily_login activity so the "Dedicated" badge can count it
138:             _logActivity('daily_login', 0, 20, 'Daily login');
139: 
140:             // Update streak and last_active in stats
141:             const yesterday = new Date(Date.now() - 86_400_000).toDateString();
142:             const streak    = (lastActive === yesterday)
143:                 ? (_profile.stats?.streak || 0) + 1
144:                 : 1;
145: 
146:             _patchStats({ last_active: today, streak });
147:             if (_profile) _profile.gold = (_profile.gold || 0) + 20;
148: 
149:             api.notify('Daily reward! +20', 20, 'gold');
150:             _log('daily login gold awarded');
151:         },
152: 
153:         /**
154:          * onScrollCast(scrollName, element)
155:          * Called via window.logScrollEvent (already fired from game-core.js).
156:          * Tracks count for badge purposes only — no XP.
157:          */
158:         onScrollCast(scrollName, element) {
159:             if (!_userId) return;
160:             // Fire-and-forget
161:             _logActivity('scroll_cast', 0, 0, `Cast ${scrollName || element || 'scroll'}`);
162:             _patchStats({ scrolls_cast: (_profile?.stats?.scrolls_cast || 0) + 1 });
163:         },
164: 
165:         /**
166:          * onElementActivated(element, allActivated)
167:          * Tracks activations for badge purposes only — no XP.
168:          */
169:         onElementActivated(element, allActivated) {
170:             if (!_userId) return;
171:             _logActivity('element_activated', 0, 0, `Activated ${element}`, { element });
172:             _patchStats({ elements_activated: (_profile?.stats?.elements_activated || 0) + 1 });
173:         },
174: 
175:         /**
176:          * onGameComplete(isWinner, numPlayers)
177:          * XP scales with player count:
178:          *   Loss: 20 + (n-1)*10   →  2p=30, 3p=40, 4p=50, 5p=60
179:          *   Win:  75 + (n-1)*25   →  2p=100, 3p=125, 4p=150, 5p=175
180:          */
181:         async onGameComplete(isWinner, numPlayers) {
182:             _log(`onGameComplete called — userId=${_userId}, isWinner=${isWinner}, numPlayers=${numPlayers}`);
183:             if (!_userId) { console.warn('[gami] onGameComplete: no userId, XP skipped'); return; }
184:             if (!isWinner) { _log('no XP awarded — only winners earn XP'); return; }
185:             const n   = Math.max(2, numPlayers || 2);
186:             const xp  = 75 + (n - 1) * 25;
187: 
188:             _log(`awarding ${xp} XP (isWinner=${isWinner}, n=${n})`);
189:             try {
190:                 // Award XP
191:                 const { data: xpData, error: xpErr } = await supabase.rpc('update_user_xp', {
192:                     p_user_id:     _userId,
193:                     p_xp_points:   xp,
194:                     p_description: isWinner
195:                         ? `Game win (${n} players)`
196:                         : `Game complete — ${n} players`
197:                 });
198:                 if (xpErr) { console.error('[gami] update_user_xp RPC error:', xpErr); return; }
199:                 _log('update_user_xp success, result:', xpData);
200: 
201:                 // Log game_complete (badge: First Steps, Veteran)
202:                 _logActivity('game_complete', xp, 0,
203:                     `Completed game with ${n} players`, { num_players: n, won: isWinner });
204: 
205:                 // Log game_win (badge: First Victory, Champion, Master)
206:                 if (isWinner) {
207:                     _logActivity('game_win', 0, 0,
208:                         `Won game with ${n} players`, { num_players: n });
209:                 }
210: 
211:                 // Update stats
212:                 const stats = Object.assign({}, _profile?.stats || {});
213:                 stats.games_played = (stats.games_played || 0) + 1;
214:                 if (isWinner) stats.games_won = (stats.games_won || 0) + 1;
215:                 _patchStats(stats);
216:                 if (_profile) _profile.total_xp = (_profile.total_xp || 0) + xp;
217: 
218:                 const msg = `Victory! +${xp} XP`;
219:                 api.notify(msg, xp, 'xp');
220:                 _log('game complete —', msg);
221:             } catch (err) {
222:                 console.error('[gami] onGameComplete error:', err);
223:             }
224:         },
225: 
226:         /** Fetch a fresh profile from the DB */
227:         async getProfile() {
228:             if (!_userId) return null;
229:             const { data, error } = await supabase
230:                 .from('user_profiles')
231:                 .select('*')
232:                 .eq('user_id', _userId)
233:                 .single();
234:             if (error) { console.error('[gami] getProfile error:', error); return _profile; }
235:             _profile = data;
236:             return data;
237:         },
238: 
239:         /** Top N players ordered by total XP */
240:         async getLeaderboard(limit) {
241:             const { data, error } = await supabase
242:                 .from('user_profiles')
243:                 .select('display_name, total_xp, current_level, user_id')
244:                 .order('total_xp', { ascending: false })
245:                 .limit(limit || 10);
246:             if (error) { console.error('[gami] leaderboard error:', error); return []; }
247:             return data || [];
248:         },
249: 
250:         /** All badges merged with the current user's earned status */
251:         async getBadgesWithStatus() {
252:             const { data: badges, error } = await supabase
253:                 .from('badges')
254:                 .select('*')
255:                 .eq('is_active', true)
256:                 .order('xp_reward', { ascending: true });
257:             if (error) { console.error('[gami] badges error:', error); return []; }
258: 
259:             const earnedIds = _profile?.badges_earned || [];
260:             return (badges || []).map(b => ({
261:                 ...b,
262:                 earned: earnedIds.includes(b.id)
263:             }));
264:         },
265: 
266:         /**
267:          * Show a slide-in toast at the bottom-right.
268:          * type: 'xp' | 'gold'
269:          */
270:         notify(message, amount, type) {
271:             const toast = document.createElement('div');
272:             toast.className = 'gami-toast';
273:             toast.innerHTML =
274:                 `<span class="gami-toast-icon">${type === 'gold' ? '[G]' : '[XP]'}</span>${message}`;
275:             document.body.appendChild(toast);
276: 
277:             requestAnimationFrame(() => toast.classList.add('gami-toast-show'));
278: 
279:             setTimeout(() => {
280:                 toast.classList.remove('gami-toast-show');
281:                 setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 400);
282:             }, 3000);
283:         }
284:     };
285: 
286:     return api;
287: })();
288: 
289: // ── Hook into window.logScrollEvent (already called by game-core.js executeSpell) ──
290: // This intercepts scroll casts with zero changes to game-core.js.
291: window.logScrollEvent = function (eventType, data) {
292:     if (eventType === 'cast_execute' && window.gami?.userId) {
293:         window.gami.onScrollCast(data?.scrollName, data?.element);
294:     }
295: };
</file>

<file path="js/multiplayer-state.js">
  1: // ========================================
  2: // SUPABASE MULTIPLAYER SETUP
  3: // ========================================
  4: const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://lovybwpypkaarstnvkbz.supabase.co';
  5: const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imxvdnlid3B5cGthYXJzdG52a2J6Iiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NjkwMzI4NTgsImV4cCI6MjA4NDYwODg1OH0.lqobDTaopRJ5sA0yZQvzDwudq2x4zz9HMtTkSuJulFU';
  6: 
  7: const supabase = window.supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
  8: 
  9: // Multiplayer state
 10: let myPlayerId = null;
 11: let myPlayerIndex = null;
 12: let totalPlayers = 0; // Total number of players in the game
 13: let playerTilesPlaced = new Set(); // Track which player indices have placed tiles
 14: let isPlacementPhase = false;
 15: // Mobile deck initial state is set later after isMobile is computed
 16: let allPlayersData = []; // Store all player data from database (id, player_index, color, username)
 17: 
 18: // Multi-room state
 19: let currentGameId = null;    // ID of the game_room row we have joined
 20: let currentJoinCode = null;  // 6-char code for private rooms, null for public games
 21: 
 22: // Turn synchronization
 23: let currentTurnNumber = 0; // Increments with each turn change (for desync detection)
 24: let lastReceivedTurnNumber = 0; // Last turn number received from broadcast
 25: 
 26: // Helper function to get player display name (Username (Color))
 27: function getPlayerColorName(playerIndex) {
 28:     const colorNames = {
 29:         'purple': 'Purple',
 30:         'yellow': 'Yellow',
 31:         'red': 'Red',
 32:         'blue': 'Blue',
 33:         'green': 'Green'
 34:     };
 35: 
 36:     let username = null;
 37:     let colorName = null;
 38: 
 39:     // Try to get from database player data first
 40:     if (allPlayersData.length > 0) {
 41:         const player = allPlayersData.find(p => p.player_index === playerIndex);
 42:         if (player) {
 43:             username = player.username;
 44:             if (player.color) {
 45:                 colorName = colorNames[player.color] || player.color;
 46:             }
 47:         }
 48:     }
 49: 
 50:     // Fallback to playerPositions if player tile is placed
 51:     if (!colorName && typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[playerIndex]) {
 52:         const hexColorNames = {
 53:             '#9458f4': 'Purple',
 54:             '#ffce00': 'Yellow',
 55:             '#ed1b43': 'Red',
 56:             '#5894f4': 'Blue',
 57:             '#69d83a': 'Green'
 58:         };
 59:         colorName = hexColorNames[playerPositions[playerIndex].color] || 'Player ' + (playerIndex + 1);
 60:     }
 61: 
 62:     // Build display name: "Username (Color)" or just "Color" or "Player X"
 63:     if (username && colorName) {
 64:         return username + ' (' + colorName + ')';
 65:     } else if (colorName) {
 66:         return colorName;
 67:     } else if (username) {
 68:         return username;
 69:     } else {
 70:         return 'Player ' + (playerIndex + 1);
 71:     }
 72: }
 73: 
 74: // Check if it's the current player's turn (for multiplayer)
 75: // This is for GAME ACTIONS (moving, placing stones, etc), NOT tile placement
 76: function isMyTurn() {
 77:     if (!isMultiplayer) return true; // In local mode, always allow actions
 78:     if (isPlacementPhase) return false; // During placement phase, no game actions allowed
 79:     return myPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex;
 80: }
 81: 
 82: // Show/hide End Turn button based on whose turn it is
 83: function updateEndTurnButtonVisibility() {
 84:     const btn = document.getElementById('end-turn');
 85:     if (!btn) return;
 86: 
 87:     // Always show the button, but disable when not your turn
 88:     btn.style.display = '';
 89:     if (!isMultiplayer) {
 90:         btn.disabled = false;
 91:         btn.style.opacity = '';
 92:         btn.style.cursor = '';
 93:         return;
 94:     }
 95: 
 96:     const canEnd = isMyTurn();
 97:     btn.disabled = !canEnd;
 98:     btn.style.opacity = canEnd ? '' : '0.5';
 99:     btn.style.cursor = canEnd ? '' : 'not-allowed';
100: }
101: 
102: // Hide deck indicators during play (keep deck panel for stones/player pool)
103: function updateDeckIndicatorVisibility() {
104:     const gameContainer = document.querySelector('.game-container');
105:     const inGame = gameContainer && gameContainer.style.display !== 'none';
106:     const hide = inGame && !isPlacementPhase; // hide during main play
107: 
108:     const tileDeckHeader = document.getElementById('tile-deck-header');
109:     const tileDeckContainer = document.getElementById('tile-deck-container');
110:     const playerTilesHeader = document.getElementById('player-tiles-header');
111: 
112:     if (tileDeckHeader) tileDeckHeader.style.display = hide ? 'none' : '';
113:     if (tileDeckContainer) tileDeckContainer.style.display = hide ? 'none' : '';
114:     if (playerTilesHeader) playerTilesHeader.style.display = hide ? 'none' : '';
115: }
116: 
117: // Inventory panel toggle (unified for desktop + mobile)
118: let isInventoryOpen = false;
119: 
120: function setInventoryOpen(open) {
121:     isInventoryOpen = !!open;
122:     const gameContainer = document.querySelector('.game-container');
123:     if (!gameContainer) return;
124: 
125:     gameContainer.classList.toggle('inventory-open', isInventoryOpen);
126:     gameContainer.classList.toggle('inventory-collapsed', !isInventoryOpen);
127: 
128:     const btn = document.getElementById('inventory-toggle');
129:     if (btn) {
130:         btn.textContent = isInventoryOpen ? '🎒 Inventory (hide)' : '🎒 Inventory';
131:     }
132: }
133: 
134: function toggleInventory() {
135:     setInventoryOpen(!isInventoryOpen);
136: }
137: 
138: // Close button inside inventory (useful on mobile where bottom controls may be off-screen)
139: document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
140:     const closeBtn = document.getElementById('inventory-close');
141:     if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => setInventoryOpen(false));
142: 
143:     // Listen for scroll-resolved events from response window system
144:     window.addEventListener('scroll-resolved', (event) => {
145:         const entry = event.detail;
146:         if (entry && entry.scrollData) {
147:             // Apply the scroll effects for scrolls that resolved from the response stack
148:             if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined') {
149:                 const scrollName = entry.scrollData.name;
150:                 // Resolve scrollDef: may be stored as .definition, .spell, or looked up from patterns
151:                 const scrollDef = entry.scrollData.definition
152:                     || entry.scrollData.spell
153:                     || spellSystem.patterns[scrollName];
154:                 const fromCommonArea = entry.fromCommonArea ?? entry.scrollData?.fromCommonArea ?? false;
155: 
156:                 // For response scrolls (like Unbidden Lamplight / Reflect / Sigh of Recollection),
157:                 // pass the triggering scroll context
158:                 if (entry.result === 'response-resolved' && entry.triggeringScroll) {
159:                     console.log(`Applying response scroll effects: ${scrollName} (triggered by ${entry.triggeringScroll.name})`);
160: 
161:                     // In multiplayer, only execute the response effect on the responder's own client.
162:                     // The caster's client resolves the stack but shouldn't modify another player's pools.
163:                     // Non-caster/non-responder clients receive the effect via the 'response-resolved' broadcast.
164:                     const isLocalPlayer = !isMultiplayer || (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex === entry.casterIndex);
165: 
166:                     if (isLocalPlayer && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
167:                         const effect = spellSystem.scrollEffects.getEffect(scrollName);
168:                         if (effect) {
169:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.execute(scrollName, entry.casterIndex, {
170:                                 spell: scrollDef,
171:                                 triggeringScroll: entry.triggeringScroll
172:                             });
173: 
174:                             // Track activated element(s) for win condition (response scrolls count too!)
175:                             spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(entry.casterIndex);
176:                             if (scrollDef.element === 'catacomb' && scrollDef.patterns && scrollDef.patterns[0]) {
177:                                 // Catacomb scrolls activate each component element
178:                                 const elements = new Set(scrollDef.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type));
179:                                 elements.forEach(el => spellSystem.playerScrolls[entry.casterIndex].activated.add(el));
180:                             } else {
181:                                 spellSystem.playerScrolls[entry.casterIndex].activated.add(scrollDef.element);
182:                             }
183:                             if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
184:                                 updatePlayerElementSymbols(entry.casterIndex);
185:                             }
186: 
187:                             // Broadcast the activation in multiplayer
188:                             if (isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
189:                                 const activatedElements = (scrollDef.element === 'catacomb' && scrollDef.patterns && scrollDef.patterns[0])
190:                                     ? [...new Set(scrollDef.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type))]
191:                                     : [scrollDef.element];
192:                                 broadcastGameAction('scroll-effect', {
193:                                     playerIndex: entry.casterIndex,
194:                                     scrollName: scrollName,
195:                                     effectName: effect.name,
196:                                     element: scrollDef.element,
197:                                     activatedElements: activatedElements
198:                                 });
199:                             }
200:                         }
201:                     } else {
202:                         console.log(`Skipping response effect execution for ${scrollName} (responder is player ${entry.casterIndex}, I am ${myPlayerIndex})`);
203:                     }
204: 
205:                     // Handle scroll disposition for the response scroll
206:                     spellSystem.handleScrollDisposition(scrollName, fromCommonArea);
207:                 } else if (entry.result === 'resolved' && entry.isOriginal) {
208:                     // Original scroll resolved (after response window) - apply its full effect
209:                     console.log(`Original scroll resolved: ${scrollName} - applying effects`);
210:                     spellSystem.applyScrollEffects(scrollName, scrollDef, fromCommonArea);
211:                 } else if (entry.result === 'resolved' && !entry.isOriginal) {
212:                     // Regular resolved scroll (non-original)
213:                     console.log(`Applying resolved scroll effects: ${scrollName}`);
214:                     spellSystem.applyScrollEffects(scrollName, scrollDef);
215:                 } else if (entry.result === 'countered') {
216:                     // Original scroll was countered - do NOT apply its effects
217:                     console.log(`Original scroll countered: ${scrollName} - skipping execution`);
218:                     // Still handle scroll disposition (remove from active scrolls, etc.)
219:                     spellSystem.handleScrollDisposition(scrollName, fromCommonArea);
220:                 } else if (entry.result === 'countered-original') {
221:                     // Counter scroll was cast - execute its effect (e.g. Psychic stores the stolen scroll)
222:                     const counterCasterIdx = entry.casterIndex;
223:                     console.log(`Counter scroll resolved: ${scrollName}, counter-caster: ${counterCasterIdx}`);
224:                     if (spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
225:                         const effect = spellSystem.scrollEffects.getEffect(scrollName);
226:                         if (effect) {
227:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.execute(scrollName, counterCasterIdx, {
228:                                 spell: scrollDef,
229:                                 scrollName: scrollName,
230:                                 triggeringScroll: entry.triggeringScroll
231:                             });
232: 
233:                             // Track activated element(s) for win condition (counter scrolls count too!)
234:                             spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(counterCasterIdx);
235:                             if (scrollDef.element === 'catacomb' && scrollDef.patterns && scrollDef.patterns[0]) {
236:                                 // Catacomb scrolls activate each component element
237:                                 const elements = new Set(scrollDef.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type));
238:                                 elements.forEach(el => spellSystem.playerScrolls[counterCasterIdx].activated.add(el));
239:                             } else {
240:                                 spellSystem.playerScrolls[counterCasterIdx].activated.add(scrollDef.element);
241:                             }
242:                             if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
243:                                 updatePlayerElementSymbols(counterCasterIdx);
244:                             }
245: 
246:                             // Broadcast the activation in multiplayer
247:                             if (isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
248:                                 const activatedElements = (scrollDef.element === 'catacomb' && scrollDef.patterns && scrollDef.patterns[0])
249:                                     ? [...new Set(scrollDef.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type))]
250:                                     : [scrollDef.element];
251:                                 broadcastGameAction('scroll-effect', {
252:                                     playerIndex: counterCasterIdx,
253:                                     scrollName: scrollName,
254:                                     effectName: effect.name,
255:                                     element: scrollDef.element,
256:                                     activatedElements: activatedElements
257:                                 });
258:                             }
259: 
260:                             // Win-condition check for the counter-caster (e.g. Iron Stance is
261:                             // Player B's 5th scroll). The caster's client (which runs resolveResponseStack)
262:                             // doesn't receive its own scroll-effect broadcast (self: false), so we must
263:                             // check here. The receiving client also checks via the scroll-effect handler.
264:                             if (spellSystem.playerScrolls[counterCasterIdx].activated.size === 5) {
265:                                 console.log(`🏆 Win condition met for counter-caster player ${counterCasterIdx} (Iron Stance / counter scroll)`);
266:                                 if (typeof spellSystem.showLevelComplete === 'function') {
267:                                     spellSystem.showLevelComplete(counterCasterIdx);
268:                                 }
269:                                 if (typeof handleGameOver === 'function') {
270:                                     handleGameOver(counterCasterIdx);
271:                                 }
272:                             }
273:                         }
274:                     }
275:                     // Check if the effect flagged this scroll to go to common area (e.g. Psychic)
276:                     const forceCommon = spellSystem.scrollEffects?.pendingForceCommonArea;
277:                     const shouldForceCommon = forceCommon && forceCommon.scrollName === scrollName;
278:                     if (shouldForceCommon) {
279:                         delete spellSystem.scrollEffects.pendingForceCommonArea;
280:                     }
281:                     // Handle disposition using the COUNTER-CASTER's scrolls (not the
282:                     // active player's, since the counter scroll belongs to the responder)
283:                     spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(counterCasterIdx);
284:                     const counterScrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[counterCasterIdx];
285:                     if (shouldForceCommon) {
286:                         // Guard: only discard if scroll is still in active — Lamplight may have
287:                         // already redirected it to hand, in which case we must not override.
288:                         if (counterScrolls.active.has(scrollName)) {
289:                             counterScrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
290:                             spellSystem.discardToCommonArea(scrollName);
291:                         }
292:                     }
293:                     spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
294:                     if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
295:                 }
296:             }
297:         }
298:     });
299: });
300: 
301: 
302: 
303: // Check if current player can place their tile during placement phase
304: // This is ONLY for player tile placement
305: function canPlaceTile() {
306:     if (!isMultiplayer) return true;
307:     if (!isPlacementPhase) return false; // Player tiles can only be placed during placement phase
308:     // During placement phase, only the active player can place their tile
309:     return myPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex && !playerTilesPlaced.has(myPlayerIndex);
310: }
311: 
312: // Check if player can take actions (turn AND no pending cascade)
313: function canTakeAction() {
314:     if (!isMyTurn()) return false;
315:     // Check for pending cascade
316:     const playerIdx = isMultiplayer ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
317:     if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.hasPendingCascade(playerIdx)) {
318:         return false;
319:     }
320:     return true;
321: }
322: 
323: // Show "not your turn" or "cascade pending" message
324: function notYourTurn() {
325:     // First check for pending cascade
326:     const playerIdx = isMultiplayer ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
327:     if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.hasPendingCascade(playerIdx)) {
328:         updateStatus(`You must cascade a scroll before taking other actions!`);
329:         // Re-show the cascade prompt
330:         spellSystem.showPendingCascadePrompt(playerIdx);
331:         return;
332:     }
333: 
334:     if (isPlacementPhase) {
335:         const activeColor = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
336:         updateStatus(`Waiting for ${activeColor} to place their tile... (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers})`);
337:     } else {
338:         const activeColor = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
339:         updateStatus(`Not your turn. Waiting for ${activeColor}...`);
340:     }
341: }
342: 
343: // Update turn display when turn changes
344: function updateTurnDisplay() {
345:     if (!isMultiplayer) return;
346: 
347:     updateEndTurnButtonVisibility();
348:     updateDeckIndicatorVisibility();
349: 
350:     const myColorName     = getPlayerColorName(myPlayerIndex);
351:     const activeColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
352:     const myTurn          = isMyTurn();
353: 
354:     console.log(`[turn] updateTurnDisplay: myPlayerIndex=${myPlayerIndex} activePlayerIndex=${activePlayerIndex} isMyTurn=${myTurn} isPlacementPhase=${isPlacementPhase}`);
355: 
356:     // Update HUD player name + dot immediately (don't wait for render loop)
357:     const hudPlayerName = document.getElementById('hud-player-name');
358:     const hudPlayerDot  = document.getElementById('hud-player-dot');
359:     const hudPlayer     = hudPlayerName?.closest('.hud-player');
360:     if (hudPlayerName) {
361:         hudPlayerName.textContent = myTurn ? 'Your Turn' : `${activeColorName}'s Turn`;
362:     }
363:     if (hudPlayer) {
364:         hudPlayer.classList.toggle('your-turn', myTurn);
365:     }
366:     // Sync dot color to active player
367:     if (hudPlayerDot && typeof allPlayersData !== 'undefined') {
368:         const colorMap = { purple:'#9458f4', yellow:'#ffce00', red:'#ed1b43', blue:'#5894f4', green:'#69d83a' };
369:         const activeData = allPlayersData.find(p => p.player_index === activePlayerIndex);
370:         const key = activeData?.color;
371:         if (key && colorMap[key]) hudPlayerDot.style.background = colorMap[key];
372:     }
373: 
374:     if (myTurn) {
375:         updateStatus(`Your turn!`);
376:         console.log('My turn now!');
377:     } else {
378:         updateStatus(`Waiting for ${activeColorName}...`);
379:         console.log(`Waiting for player ${activePlayerIndex + 1}`);
380:     }
381: 
382:     // Note: Each player always sees their own inventory (stones/scrolls/AP)
383:     // We don't update inventory here - it stays showing the local player's resources
384: }
385: 
386: let isMultiplayer = false;
387: let gameRoomSubscription = null;
388: let playersSubscription = null;
389: let gameStateSubscription = null;
</file>

<file path="js/parallax.js">
  1: // ── Parallax Background ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  2: // Injects a layered animated background into every .board-area element.
  3: // Layers (back to front):
  4: //   1. Truebackground.png   — static deep-space base
  5: //   2. secondlayer...png    — oversized, slow diagonal drift (space pan)
  6: //   3. smallcloud 1–4       — organic floating movement, each unique path
  7: 
  8: (function initParallax() {
  9:     // Inject keyframe animations
 10:     const style = document.createElement('style');
 11:     style.textContent = `
 12:         #parallax-bg {
 13:             position: absolute;
 14:             inset: 0;
 15:             z-index: 0;
 16:             overflow: hidden;
 17:             pointer-events: none;
 18:         }
 19:         .parallax-base {
 20:             position: absolute;
 21:             inset: 0;
 22:             background: url('images/Background/background/Truebackground.png') center / cover no-repeat;
 23:         }
 24:         .parallax-space {
 25:             position: absolute;
 26:             width: 140%;
 27:             height: 140%;
 28:             top: -20%;
 29:             left: -20%;
 30:             object-fit: cover;
 31:             opacity: 0.65;
 32:             animation: space-drift 160s ease-in-out infinite;
 33:             will-change: transform;
 34:         }
 35:         .parallax-cloud {
 36:             position: absolute;
 37:             object-fit: contain;
 38:             will-change: transform;
 39:         }
 40:         @keyframes space-drift {
 41:             0%   { transform: translate(0%,    0%)   scale(1);    }
 42:             20%  { transform: translate(-4%,  -3%)   scale(1.02); }
 43:             45%  { transform: translate(-8%,   2%)   scale(1);    }
 44:             70%  { transform: translate(-3%,   6%)   scale(1.01); }
 45:             100% { transform: translate(0%,    0%)   scale(1);    }
 46:         }
 47:         @keyframes cloud-a {
 48:             0%   { transform: translate(0px,   0px);  }
 49:             20%  { transform: translate(28px, -18px); }
 50:             50%  { transform: translate(60px,  12px); }
 51:             75%  { transform: translate(35px,  32px); }
 52:             100% { transform: translate(0px,   0px);  }
 53:         }
 54:         @keyframes cloud-b {
 55:             0%   { transform: translate(0px,   0px);  }
 56:             30%  { transform: translate(-38px, 22px); }
 57:             65%  { transform: translate(-18px,-28px); }
 58:             100% { transform: translate(0px,   0px);  }
 59:         }
 60:         @keyframes cloud-c {
 61:             0%   { transform: translate(0px,   0px);  }
 62:             25%  { transform: translate(45px,  20px); }
 63:             55%  { transform: translate(22px, -22px); }
 64:             80%  { transform: translate(-28px, 14px); }
 65:             100% { transform: translate(0px,   0px);  }
 66:         }
 67:         @keyframes cloud-d {
 68:             0%   { transform: translate(0px,   0px);  }
 69:             35%  { transform: translate(-22px,-30px); }
 70:             65%  { transform: translate(18px, -18px); }
 71:             100% { transform: translate(0px,   0px);  }
 72:         }
 73:     `;
 74:     document.head.appendChild(style);
 75: 
 76:     const BASE      = 'images/Background/background/';
 77:     const CLOUDS = [
 78:         {
 79:             src:    BASE + 'smallcloud.png',
 80:             style:  'width:38%;top:4%;left:-6%;opacity:0.38;',
 81:             anim:   'cloud-a 58s ease-in-out infinite',
 82:             delay:  '0s'
 83:         },
 84:         {
 85:             src:    BASE + 'smallcloud2.png',
 86:             style:  'width:30%;top:55%;left:68%;opacity:0.32;',
 87:             anim:   'cloud-b 74s ease-in-out infinite',
 88:             delay:  '-20s'
 89:         },
 90:         {
 91:             src:    BASE + 'smallcloud3.png',
 92:             style:  'width:42%;top:28%;left:52%;opacity:0.28;',
 93:             anim:   'cloud-c 90s ease-in-out infinite',
 94:             delay:  '-35s'
 95:         },
 96:         {
 97:             src:    BASE + 'smallcloud4.png',
 98:             style:  'width:26%;top:72%;left:8%;opacity:0.36;',
 99:             anim:   'cloud-d 48s ease-in-out infinite',
100:             delay:  '-12s'
101:         },
102:     ];
103: 
104:     function buildParallax(boardArea) {
105:         if (boardArea.querySelector('#parallax-bg')) return; // Already injected
106: 
107:         // Ensure the board-area is a positioning context
108:         const computed = getComputedStyle(boardArea).position;
109:         if (computed === 'static') boardArea.style.position = 'relative';
110: 
111:         const bg = document.createElement('div');
112:         bg.id = 'parallax-bg';
113: 
114:         // Layer 1: static base
115:         const base = document.createElement('div');
116:         base.className = 'parallax-base';
117:         bg.appendChild(base);
118: 
119:         // Layer 2: slow-drifting space layer
120:         const space = document.createElement('img');
121:         space.className = 'parallax-space';
122:         space.src = BASE + 'secondlayermuchbiggerthantrue.png';
123:         space.alt = '';
124:         space.style.animationDelay = '-40s'; // start mid-drift so it's already moving
125:         bg.appendChild(space);
126: 
127:         // Layer 3–6: clouds
128:         CLOUDS.forEach(c => {
129:             const img = document.createElement('img');
130:             img.className = 'parallax-cloud';
131:             img.src = c.src;
132:             img.alt = '';
133:             img.style.cssText += c.style + `animation:${c.anim};animation-delay:${c.delay};`;
134:             bg.appendChild(img);
135:         });
136: 
137:         // Insert before everything else in the board-area
138:         boardArea.insertBefore(bg, boardArea.firstChild);
139: 
140:         // Ensure board content sits above the parallax layer
141:         boardArea.querySelectorAll(':scope > :not(#parallax-bg)').forEach(el => {
142:             if (getComputedStyle(el).position === 'static') el.style.position = 'relative';
143:             el.style.zIndex = '1';
144:         });
145:     }
146: 
147:     // Run on DOMContentLoaded (or immediately if DOM is already ready)
148:     function run() {
149:         document.querySelectorAll('.board-area').forEach(buildParallax);
150:     }
151: 
152:     if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
153:         document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', run);
154:     } else {
155:         run();
156:     }
157: })();
</file>

<file path="js/scrolls/effects/scroll-effects.js">
   1: /**
   2:  * Scroll Effects System
   3:  *
   4:  * This file contains the effect definitions and execution logic for all scrolls.
   5:  * Each scroll has an execute() function that performs its effect.
   6:  */
   7: 
   8: const ScrollEffects = {
   9:     // Active buffs that persist during a turn
  10:     activeBuffs: {},
  11: 
  12:     // Current selection mode state
  13:     selectionMode: null,
  14: 
  15:     // Initialize the effects system
  16:     init(spellSystem) {
  17:         this.spellSystem = spellSystem;
  18:         this.activeBuffs = {};
  19:         this.selectionMode = null;
  20:         console.log('📜 Scroll Effects system initialized');
  21:     },
  22: 
  23:     // Clear turn-based buffs (called on End Turn)
  24:     clearTurnBuffs() {
  25:         Object.keys(this.activeBuffs).forEach(key => {
  26:             if (this.activeBuffs[key]?.expiresThisTurn) {
  27:                 if (key === 'controlTheCurrent' && this.selectionMode?.type === 'water-transform') {
  28:                     this.selectionMode.cleanup();
  29:                     this.selectionMode = null;
  30:                 }
  31:                 if (key === 'respirateWind') {
  32:                     const buff = this.activeBuffs.respirateWind;
  33:                     const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.playerPools);
  34:                     const source = typeof stonePools !== 'undefined' ? stonePools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.stonePools);
  35:                     const capacity = typeof sourcePoolCapacity !== 'undefined'
  36:                         ? sourcePoolCapacity
  37:                         : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.sourcePoolCapacity);
  38:                     if (buff && pools && source) {
  39:                         const pool = pools[buff.playerIndex];
  40:                         if (pool && typeof pool.wind === 'number' && pool.wind > 0) {
  41:                             const amount = pool.wind;
  42:                             pool.wind = 0;
  43:                             if (capacity && typeof capacity.wind === 'number') {
  44:                                 source.wind = Math.min(capacity.wind, (source.wind || 0) + amount);
  45:                             } else {
  46:                                 source.wind = (source.wind || 0) + amount;
  47:                             }
  48:                             if (typeof updateStoneCount === 'function') {
  49:                                 updateStoneCount('wind');
  50:                             }
  51:                             if (typeof updateStatus === 'function') {
  52:                                 updateStatus('Respirate: returned all wind stones to the source pool.');
  53:                             }
  54:                             console.log(`🌬️ Respirate returned ${amount} wind stones to source`);
  55:                         }
  56:                     }
  57:                 }
  58:                 delete this.activeBuffs[key];
  59:                 console.log(`📜 Cleared buff: ${key}`);
  60:             }
  61:         });
  62:     },
  63: 
  64:     // Clear Freedom buff for a player when their next turn starts
  65:     clearFreedomForPlayer(playerIndex) {
  66:         const buff = this.activeBuffs.freedom;
  67:         if (!buff || buff.playerIndex !== playerIndex) return;
  68:         delete this.activeBuffs.freedom;
  69:         if (typeof updateCatacombIndicators === 'function') {
  70:             updateCatacombIndicators();
  71:         }
  72:     },
  73: 
  74:     // Clear Quick Reflexes buff for a player when their next turn starts
  75:     clearQuickReflexesForPlayer(playerIndex) {
  76:         const buff = this.activeBuffs.quickReflexes;
  77:         if (!buff || buff.playerIndex !== playerIndex) return;
  78:         delete this.activeBuffs.quickReflexes;
  79:     },
  80: 
  81:     // Cancel any active selection mode
  82:     cancelSelectionMode() {
  83:         if (this.selectionMode) {
  84:             if (typeof this.selectionMode.cleanup === 'function') {
  85:                 this.selectionMode.cleanup();
  86:             } else if (this.selectionMode.cancelBtn && this.selectionMode.cancelBtn.parentNode) {
  87:                 this.selectionMode.cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(this.selectionMode.cancelBtn);
  88:             }
  89:             this.selectionMode = null;
  90:             updateStatus('Selection cancelled.');
  91:         }
  92: 
  93:         // Safety: remove any orphaned cancel button
  94:         const cancelEl = document.getElementById('scroll-cancel-btn');
  95:         if (cancelEl && cancelEl.parentNode) {
  96:             cancelEl.parentNode.removeChild(cancelEl);
  97:         }
  98:     },
  99: 
 100:     // Get the effect handler for a scroll
 101:     getEffect(scrollName) {
 102:         return this.effects[scrollName] || null;
 103:     },
 104: 
 105:     // Execute a scroll's effect
 106:     execute(scrollName, casterIndex, context = {}) {
 107:         const effect = this.getEffect(scrollName);
 108:         if (!effect) {
 109:             console.warn(`No effect defined for scroll: ${scrollName}`);
 110:             return { success: false, reason: 'No effect defined' };
 111:         }
 112: 
 113:         try {
 114:             return effect.execute(casterIndex, context, this);
 115:         } catch (err) {
 116:             console.error(`Error executing scroll effect ${scrollName}:`, err);
 117:             return { success: false, reason: err.message };
 118:         }
 119:     },
 120:

 122:     effects: {
