 287:         // ============================================
 288:         // WATER SCROLLS
 289:         // ============================================
 290: 
 291:         /**
 292:          * Water Scroll I - Reflect
 293:          * Duplicate the effect of the scroll that was last cast this turn.
 294:          */
 295:         WATER_SCROLL_1: {
 296:             name: 'Reflect',
 297:             description: 'Duplicate the effect of the scroll that was last cast this turn.',
 298:             isCounter: false,
 299:             priority: 1,
 300: 
 301:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 302:                 console.log(`🪞 Reflect activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 303: 
 304:                 // When cast as a response: defer effect to beginning of caster's next turn
 305:                 const triggeringScroll = context?.triggeringScroll;
 306:                 if (triggeringScroll && triggeringScroll.name) {
 307:                     if (triggeringScroll.name === 'WATER_SCROLL_1') {
 308:                         updateStatus('Reflect failed: Cannot reflect Reflect!');
 309:                         return { success: false, reason: 'Cannot reflect Reflect' };
 310:                     }
 311:                     // Initialize array if needed, then push this reflect to the stack
 312:                     if (!Array.isArray(system.activeBuffs.reflectPending)) {
 313:                         system.activeBuffs.reflectPending = [];
 314:                     }
 315:                     system.activeBuffs.reflectPending.push({
 316:                         playerIndex: casterIndex,
 317:                         scrollName: triggeringScroll.name,
 318:                         definition: triggeringScroll.definition
 319:                     });
 320:                     updateStatus(`Reflect: At the beginning of your next turn, you will activate ${triggeringScroll.definition?.name || triggeringScroll.name}.`);
 321: 
 322:                     // Broadcast Reflect buff in multiplayer
 323:                     if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
 324:                         broadcastGameAction('reflect-buff-applied', {
 325:                             playerIndex: casterIndex,
 326:                             scrollName: triggeringScroll.name,
 327:                             scrollDefinition: triggeringScroll.definition
 328:                         });
 329:                     }
 330: 
 331:                     return { success: true, deferred: true };
 332:                 }
 333: 
 334:                 // Get the last scroll cast this turn (main-phase Reflect)
 335:                 const lastScroll = system.lastScrollCastThisTurn;
 336:                 if (!lastScroll || !lastScroll.name) {
 337:                     updateStatus('Reflect failed: No scroll was cast this turn!');
 338:                     return { success: false, reason: 'No scroll cast this turn' };
 339:                 }
 340: 
 341:                 // Cannot reflect itself
 342:                 if (lastScroll.name === 'WATER_SCROLL_1') {
 343:                     updateStatus('Reflect failed: Cannot reflect Reflect!');
 344:                     return { success: false, reason: 'Cannot reflect Reflect' };
 345:                 }
 346: 
 347:                 const scrollDef = lastScroll.definition;
 348:                 const scrollName = lastScroll.name;
 349: 
 350:                 // Execute the reflected scroll's effect
 351:                 const displayName = scrollDef?.name || scrollName;
 352:                 updateStatus(`Reflecting ${displayName}!`);
 353: 
 354:                 // Check if the reflected scroll has a special effect
 355:                 const effect = system.getEffect(scrollName);
 356:                 if (effect) {
 357:                     console.log(`🪞 Reflecting special effect: ${effect.name}`);
 358:                     // Determine if we are the Reflect caster on this client.
 359:                     // If not, interactive scrolls should skip their UI (same as Psychic remote client behavior).
 360:                     const isReflectCaster = (typeof myPlayerIndex === 'undefined' || myPlayerIndex === null || myPlayerIndex === casterIndex);
 361:                     // Execute the reflected scroll's special effect
 362:                     const result = system.execute(scrollName, casterIndex, {
 363:                         ...context,
 364:                         psychicRemoteClient: context?.psychicRemoteClient || !isReflectCaster
 365:                     });
 366:                     return {
 367:                         success: true,
 368:                         reflected: scrollName,
 369:                         message: `Reflected ${displayName}!`,
 370:                         ...result
 371:                     };
 372:                 }
 373: 
 374:                 // No special effect - give base stone rewards
 375:                 if (scrollDef) {
 376:                     const level = scrollDef.level || 1;
 377:                     const element = scrollDef.element;
 378: 
 379:                     if (element && element !== 'catacomb') {
 380:                         // Give stones based on scroll level
 381:                         if (typeof stonePools !== 'undefined') {
 382:                             const currentPlayerStones = typeof playerStoneCounts !== 'undefined'
 383:                                 ? playerStoneCounts[casterIndex]
 384:                                 : null;
 385: 
 386:                             if (currentPlayerStones) {
 387:                                 currentPlayerStones[element] = (currentPlayerStones[element] || 0) + level;
 388:                                 updateStatus(`Reflect! Gained +${level} ${element} stones from ${displayName}!`);
 389: 
 390:                                 // Update UI
 391:                                 if (typeof updateStoneCountsUI === 'function') {
 392:                                     updateStoneCountsUI();
 393:                                 }
 394:                             }
 395:                         }
 396:                     } else if (element === 'catacomb' && scrollDef.patterns && scrollDef.patterns[0]) {
 397:                         // Catacomb scroll - give +2 of each element in pattern
 398:                         const elementCounts = {};
 399:                         scrollDef.patterns[0].forEach(pos => {
 400:                             elementCounts[pos.type] = (elementCounts[pos.type] || 0) + 1;
 401:                         });
 402: 
 403:                         const currentPlayerStones = typeof playerStoneCounts !== 'undefined'
 404:                             ? playerStoneCounts[casterIndex]
 405:                             : null;
 406: 
 407:                         if (currentPlayerStones) {
 408:                             Object.entries(elementCounts).forEach(([elem, count]) => {
 409:                                 currentPlayerStones[elem] = (currentPlayerStones[elem] || 0) + 2;
 410:                             });
 411:                             updateStatus(`Reflect! Gained catacomb scroll stones from ${displayName}!`);
 412: 
 413:                             if (typeof updateStoneCountsUI === 'function') {
 414:                                 updateStoneCountsUI();
 415:                             }
 416:                         }
 417:                     }
 418:                 }
 419: 
 420:                 return {
 421:                     success: true,
 422:                     reflected: scrollName,
 423:                     message: `Reflected ${displayName}!`
 424:                 };
 425:             }
 426:         },
 427: 
 428:         /**
 429:          * Water Scroll II - Refreshing Thought
 430:          * Draw a Catacomb scroll.
 431:          */
 432:         WATER_SCROLL_2: {
 433:             name: 'Refreshing Thought',
 434:             description: 'Draw a Catacomb scroll.',
 435:             isCounter: false,
 436:             priority: 2,
 437: 
 438:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 439:                 console.log(`💧 Refreshing Thought activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 440: 
 441:                 // Draw a catacomb scroll from the catacomb deck
 442:                 let drawnScroll = null;
 443:                 if (system.spellSystem && typeof system.spellSystem.drawFromDeck === 'function') {
 444:                     drawnScroll = system.spellSystem.drawFromDeck('catacomb');
 445:                 }
 446: 
 447:                 if (drawnScroll) {
 448:                     system.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(casterIndex);
 449:                     system.spellSystem.playerScrolls[casterIndex].hand.add(drawnScroll);
 450:                     system.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
 451: 
 452:                     const drawnDef = system.spellSystem.patterns?.[drawnScroll];
 453:                     const drawnName = drawnDef?.name || drawnScroll;
 454:                     console.log(`💧 Refreshing Thought: drew ${drawnName} from catacomb deck`);
 455: 
 456:                     // Broadcast in multiplayer so other clients update their deck/hand state
 457:                     if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
 458:                         broadcastGameAction('scroll-collected', {
 459:                             playerIndex: casterIndex,
 460:                             scrollName: drawnScroll,
 461:                             shrineType: 'catacomb'
 462:                         });
 463:                     }
 464: 
 465:                     if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') {
 466:                         try { updateScrollDeckUI(); } catch (e) {}
 467:                     }
 468: 
 469:                     updateStatus(`Drew a Catacomb scroll: ${drawnName}!`);
 470:                 } else {
 471:                     console.log(`💧 Refreshing Thought: no catacomb scrolls left in deck`);
 472:                     updateStatus('No Catacomb scrolls left in deck!');
 473:                 }
 474: 
 475:                 return {
 476:                     success: true,
 477:                     requiresSelection: false,
 478:                     message: drawnScroll ? `Drew a Catacomb scroll!` : 'No Catacomb scrolls left in deck.'
 479:                 };
 480:             }
 481:         },
 482: 
 483:         /**
 484:          * Water Scroll III - Inspiring Draught
 485:          * Draw 2 scrolls from any decks, put 1 back and shuffle.
 486:          */
 487:         WATER_SCROLL_3: {
 488:             name: 'Inspiring Draught',
 489:             description: 'Draw 2 scrolls from any decks, then put 1 back and shuffle that deck.',
 490:             isCounter: false,
 491:             priority: 3,
 492: 
 493:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 494:                 console.log(`🍵 Inspiring Draught activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 495: 
 496:                 // In multiplayer, only open the modal for the casting player

 498:                     if (myPlayerIndex !== casterIndex) {
 499:                         return { success: true, message: 'Inspiring Draught resolved for remote player.' };
 500:                     }

 585:         // ============================================
 586:         // FIRE SCROLLS
 587:         // ============================================
 588: 
 589:         /**
 590:          * Fire Scroll I - Unbidden Lamplight
 591:          * Response scroll - when opponent casts a scroll, send it to common area.
 592:          * This is a response scroll (like Iron Stance) but doesn't cancel the scroll.
 593:          */
 594:         FIRE_SCROLL_1: {
 595:             name: 'Unbidden Lamplight',
 596:             description: 'Response: Send the triggering scroll to the common area (scroll still resolves).',
 597:             isCounter: false, // Doesn't cancel the scroll, just redirects it
 598:             isResponseOnly: true, // Can only be cast as a response
 599:             priority: 1,
 600: 
 601:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 602:                 console.log(`🕯️ Unbidden Lamplight activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 603: 
 604:                 // The context should contain the triggering scroll info
 605:                 const triggeringScroll = context?.triggeringScroll;
 606: 
 607:                 if (triggeringScroll) {
 608:                     // Mark the triggering scroll to go to lamplight caster's hand
 609:                     system.pendingHandRedirect = {
 610:                         scrollName: triggeringScroll.name,
 611:                         originalCasterIndex: triggeringScroll.casterIndex,
 612:                         redirectToPlayerIndex: casterIndex
 613:                     };
 614: 
 615:                     const scrollDef = system.spellSystem?.patterns?.[triggeringScroll.name];
 616:                     const scrollDisplayName = scrollDef?.name || triggeringScroll.name;
 617:                     const message = `Unbidden Lamplight! ${scrollDisplayName} will go to your hand after resolving.`;
 618:                     updateStatus(message);
 619: 
 620:                     // Count as activating fire for win-condition indicator on player tile
 621:                     if (system.spellSystem) {
 622:                         system.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(casterIndex);
 623:                         system.spellSystem.playerScrolls[casterIndex].activated.add('fire');
 624:                         if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
 625:                             updatePlayerElementSymbols(casterIndex);
 626:                         }
 627:                     }
 628: 
 629:                     return {
 630:                         success: true,
 631:                         redirectToHand: triggeringScroll.name,
 632:                         message: message
 633:                     };
 634:                 }
 635: 
 636:                 // Fallback if no triggering scroll (shouldn't happen in normal play)
 637:                 const message = 'Unbidden Lamplight activated!';
 638:                 updateStatus(message);
 639:                 if (system.spellSystem) {
 640:                     system.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(casterIndex);
 641:                     system.spellSystem.playerScrolls[casterIndex].activated.add('fire');
 642:                     if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
 643:                         updatePlayerElementSymbols(casterIndex);
 644:                     }
 645:                 }
 646:                 return {
 647:                     success: true,
 648:                     message: message
 649:                 };
 650:             }
 651:         },
 652: 
 653:         /**
 654:          * Fire Scroll II - Burning Motivation
 655:          * Until end of turn, gain 2 AP for each stone you place. Stacks if activated multiple times.
 656:          */
 657:         FIRE_SCROLL_2: {
 658:             name: 'Burning Motivation',
 659:             description: 'Until end of turn, gain 2 AP for each stone you place. Stacks if activated multiple times.',
 660:             isCounter: false,
 661:             priority: 2,
 662: 
 663:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 664:                 console.log(`🔥 Burning Motivation activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 665: 
 666:                 const existing = system.activeBuffs.burningMotivation;
 667:                 if (existing && existing.playerIndex === casterIndex) {
 668:                     existing.stacks = (existing.stacks || 1) + 1;
 669:                     updateStatus(`Burning Motivation! Stacks to ${existing.stacks} (gain ${existing.stacks * 2} AP per stone placed this turn).`);
 670:                 } else {
 671:                     system.activeBuffs.burningMotivation = {
 672:                         playerIndex: casterIndex,
 673:                         stacks: 1,
 674:                         expiresThisTurn: true
 675:                     };
 676:                     updateStatus('Burning Motivation! Gain 2 AP for each stone you place until end of turn (stacks if activated again).');
 677:                 }
 678: 
 679:                 return {
 680:                     success: true,
 681:                     message: 'Burning Motivation active until end of turn.'
 682:                 };
 683:             }
 684:         },
 685: 
 686:         /**
 687:          * Fire Scroll III - Sacrificial Pyre
 688:          * Activate any scroll in hand ignoring pattern.
 689:          */
 690:         FIRE_SCROLL_3: {
 691:             name: 'Sacrificial Pyre',
 692:             description: 'Activate any scroll in your hand (ignoring pattern). The scroll goes to the common area.',
 693:             isCounter: false,
 694:             priority: 3,
 695: 
 696:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 697:                 console.log(`🔥 Sacrificial Pyre activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 698: 
 699:                 // If triggered via Psychic on a non-caster client, skip interactive UI
 700:                 if (context?.psychicRemoteClient) {
 701:                     console.log(`🔥 Sacrificial Pyre: skipping sacrifice UI on non-caster remote client`);
 702:                     return { success: true, requiresSelection: true, message: 'Skipped on remote client' };
 703:                 }
 704: 
 705:                 // Check if player has any scrolls in hand to sacrifice
 706:                 const playerScrolls = system.spellSystem
 707:                     ? system.spellSystem.playerScrolls?.[casterIndex]
 708:                     : null;
 709:                 if (!playerScrolls || playerScrolls.hand.size === 0) {
 710:                     console.log(`🔥 Sacrificial Pyre: no scrolls in hand — cancelling`);
 711:                     if (typeof updateStatus === 'function') updateStatus('No scrolls in hand to sacrifice!');
 712:                     // cancelled: true prevents win-condition tracking in applyScrollEffects
 713:                     return { success: false, requiresSelection: false, cancelled: true, message: 'No scrolls to sacrifice!' };
 714:                 }
 715: 
 716:                 // Enter scroll selection mode for sacrificial activation
 717:                 system.enterScrollSacrificeMode(casterIndex);
 718: 
 719:                 return {
 720:                     success: true,
 721:                     requiresSelection: true,
 722:                     message: 'Select a scroll to sacrifice and activate...'
 723:                 };
 724:             }
 725:         },
 726: 
 727:         /**
 728:          * Fire Scroll IV - Transmute
 729:          * Discard stones or scrolls to regain AP.
 730:          */
 731:         FIRE_SCROLL_4: {
 732:             name: 'Transmute',
 733:             description: 'Discard any number of stones or scrolls to regain 2 AP each.',
 734:             isCounter: false,
 735:             priority: 4,
 736: 
 737:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 738:                 console.log(`🔥 Transmute activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 739: 
 740:                 // Only the caster should run Transmute UI/effects (avoid remote clients)
 741:                 if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer) {
 742:                     if (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null && myPlayerIndex !== casterIndex) {
 743:                         return { success: true, message: 'Transmute resolved for remote player.' };
 744:                     }
 745:                 }
 746: 
 747:                 // Belt-and-suspenders: track the fire element win condition HERE, before opening the
 748:                 // modal, so it registers even if enterTransmuteMode encounters an error.
 749:                 // applyScrollEffects will also do this tracking after execute() returns, which is
 750:                 // idempotent (Set.add is safe to call twice). This early tracking ensures the symbol
 751:                 // appears on the shrine tile regardless of what happens inside the modal.
 752:                 system.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(casterIndex);
 753:                 system.spellSystem.playerScrolls[casterIndex].activated.add('fire');
 754:                 if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof window.updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
 755:                     window.updatePlayerElementSymbols(casterIndex);
 756:                 }
 757: 
 758:                 // Suppress void AP auto-sync while Transmute is open
 759:                 system.activeBuffs.suppressVoidAPSync = {
 760:                     playerIndex: casterIndex
 761:                 };
 762: 
 763:                 system.enterTransmuteMode(casterIndex);
 764: 
 765:                 return {
 766:                     success: true,
 767:                     message: 'Select stones or scrolls to transmute into AP.'
 768:                 };
 769:             }
 770:         },
 771: 
 772:         /**
 773:          * Fire Scroll V - Arson
 774:          * Destroy a stone from opponent's pool.
 775:          */
 776:         FIRE_SCROLL_5: {
 777:             name: 'Arson',
 778:             description: "Destroy one elemental stone from an opponent's pool. Move Arson to the common area.",
 779:             isCounter: false,
 780:             priority: 5,
 781: 
 782:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 783:                 console.log(`🔥 Arson activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 784:

 787:                     console.log(`🔥 Arson: skipping arson UI on non-caster remote client`);
 788:                     return { success: true, requiresSelection: true, message: 'Skipped on remote client' };
 789:                 }
 790: 
 791:                 // Enter opponent pool selection mode with completion payload
 792:                 system.enterArsonMode(casterIndex, {
 793:                     scrollName: context?.scrollName || 'FIRE_SCROLL_5',
 794:                     effectName: 'Arson',
 795:                     spell: context?.spell
 796:                 });
 797: 
 798:                 return {
 799:                     success: true,
 800:                     requiresSelection: true,

 802:                 };
 803:             }
 804:         },
 805: 
 806:         // ============================================
 807:         // WIND SCROLLS
 808:         // ============================================
 809: 
 810:         /**
 811:          * Wind Scroll I - Sigh of Recollection
 812:          * Draw a scroll and a stone of the type that was just activated.
 813:          * Draw one stone of each element if it was a Catacomb scroll.
 814:          */
 815:         WIND_SCROLL_1: {
 816:             name: 'Sigh of Recollection',
 817:             description: 'Draw a scroll and a stone of the type that was just activated, if available. Draw one stone of each if it was a Catacomb scroll.',
 818:             isCounter: false,
 819:             priority: 1,
 820: 
 821:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 822:                 console.log(`🌬️ Sigh of Recollection activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 823: 
 824:                 // Determine the "activated" scroll:
 825:                 // - Response mode: use the triggering scroll
 826:                 // - Main phase: use the last scroll cast this turn
 827:                 let activatedName = null;
 828:                 let activatedDef = null;
 829: 
 830:                 const triggeringScroll = context?.triggeringScroll;
 831:                 const scrollName = context?.scrollName || 'WIND_SCROLL_1';
 832: 
 833:                 if (triggeringScroll && triggeringScroll.name) {
 834:                     // Response mode: use the scroll that triggered this response
 835:                     activatedName = triggeringScroll.name;
 836:                     activatedDef = triggeringScroll.definition
 837:                         || system.spellSystem?.patterns?.[triggeringScroll.name];
 838:                     console.log(`🌬️ Using triggering scroll: ${activatedName}`);
 839:                 } else if (context?.previousScrollCast && context.previousScrollCast.name !== scrollName) {
 840:                     // Main phase: use the scroll cast before this one (not ourselves)
 841:                     activatedName = context.previousScrollCast.name;
 842:                     activatedDef = context.previousScrollCast.definition
 843:                         || system.spellSystem?.patterns?.[context.previousScrollCast.name];
 844:                     console.log(`🌬️ Using previous scroll cast this turn: ${activatedName}`);
 845:                 } else if (system.lastScrollCastThisTurn && system.lastScrollCastThisTurn.name !== scrollName) {
 846:                     // Fallback: use lastScrollCastThisTurn (only if it's not this scroll itself)
 847:                     activatedName = system.lastScrollCastThisTurn.name;
 848:                     activatedDef = system.lastScrollCastThisTurn.definition
 849:                         || system.spellSystem?.patterns?.[system.lastScrollCastThisTurn.name];
 850:                     console.log(`🌬️ Using lastScrollCastThisTurn fallback: ${activatedName}`);
 851:                 }
 852: 
 853:                 if (!activatedName || !activatedDef) {
 854:                     console.log(`🌬️ No valid scroll to recall (previousScrollCast=${context?.previousScrollCast?.name || 'none'}, lastScrollCast=${system.lastScrollCastThisTurn?.name || 'none'}, self=${scrollName})`);
 855:                     updateStatus('Sigh of Recollection: No other scroll was activated to recall!');
 856:                     return { success: false, reason: 'No scroll activated this turn' };
 857:                 }
 858: 
 859:                 const activatedElement = activatedDef.element;
 860:                 const displayName = activatedDef.name || activatedName;
 861:                 console.log(`🌬️ Recalling: ${displayName} (element: ${activatedElement})`);
 862: 
 863:                 // --- Draw a scroll from the activated element's deck ---
 864:                 let drawnScrollName = null;
 865:                 const deckElement = activatedElement === 'catacomb' ? 'catacomb' : activatedElement;
 866:                 if (system.spellSystem && typeof system.spellSystem.drawFromDeck === 'function') {
 867:                     drawnScrollName = system.spellSystem.drawFromDeck(deckElement);
 868:                 }
 869: 
 870:                 if (drawnScrollName) {
 871:                     // Add to caster's hand
 872:                     system.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(casterIndex);
 873:                     system.spellSystem.playerScrolls[casterIndex].hand.add(drawnScrollName);
 874:                     system.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
 875: 
 876:                     const drawnDef = system.spellSystem.patterns?.[drawnScrollName];
 877:                     console.log(`🌬️ Drew scroll: ${drawnDef?.name || drawnScrollName} from ${deckElement} deck`);
 878: 
 879:                     // Broadcast in multiplayer
 880:                     if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
 881:                         broadcastGameAction('scroll-collected', {
 882:                             playerIndex: casterIndex,
 883:                             scrollName: drawnScrollName,
 884:                             shrineType: deckElement
 885:                         });
 886:                     }
 887: 
 888:                     // Update scroll deck UI
 889:                     if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') {
 890:                         try { updateScrollDeckUI(); } catch (e) {}
 891:                     }
 892:                 } else {
 893:                     console.log(`🌬️ No scrolls left in ${deckElement} deck to draw`);
 894:                 }
 895: 
 896:                 // --- Draw stone(s) based on activated element ---
 897:                 let stonesDrawn = {};
 898:                 if (activatedElement === 'catacomb' && activatedDef.patterns?.[0]) {
 899:                     // Catacomb: draw 1 stone of each unique element in the pattern
 900:                     const uniqueElements = [...new Set(activatedDef.patterns[0].map(p => p.type))];
 901:                     uniqueElements.forEach(el => {
 902:                         const drawn = system.drawStonesToPool(el, 1, casterIndex);
 903:                         if (drawn > 0) stonesDrawn[el] = drawn;
 904:                     });
 905:                 } else if (activatedElement) {
 906:                     // Regular element: draw 1 stone of that type
 907:                     const drawn = system.drawStonesToPool(activatedElement, 1, casterIndex);
 908:                     if (drawn > 0) stonesDrawn[activatedElement] = drawn;
 909:                 }
 910: 
 911:                 // Build status message
 912:                 const parts = [];
 913:                 if (drawnScrollName) {
 914:                     const drawnDef = system.spellSystem?.patterns?.[drawnScrollName];
 915:                     parts.push(`drew ${drawnDef?.name || drawnScrollName}`);
 916:                 }
 917:                 const stoneList = Object.entries(stonesDrawn).map(([el, n]) => `${n} ${el}`).join(', ');
 918:                 if (stoneList) {
 919:                     parts.push(`+${stoneList} stone${Object.values(stonesDrawn).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) > 1 ? 's' : ''}`);
 920:                 }
 921:                 if (parts.length === 0) {
 922:                     parts.push('nothing available to draw');
 923:                 }
 924: 
 925:                 const message = `Sigh of Recollection (${displayName}): ${parts.join(', ')}!`;
 926:                 updateStatus(message);
 927: 
 928:                 return {
 929:                     success: true,
 930:                     scrollDrawn: drawnScrollName,
 931:                     stonesDrawn: stonesDrawn,
 932:                     message: message
 933:                 };
 934:             }
 935:         },
 936:         /**
 937:          * Wind Scroll II - Respirate
 938:          * Draw two wind stones. At end of turn, return all wind stones to the source.
 939:          */
 940:         WIND_SCROLL_2: {
 941:             name: 'Respirate',
 942:             description: 'Draw 2 wind stones. At end of turn, return all your wind stones to the source pool.',
 943:             isCounter: false,
 944:             priority: 2,
 945:

 954:

 956:                 updateStatus(message);
 957:

 959:                     success: true,
 960:                     stonesDrawn: drawn,
 961:                     message: message
 962:                 };

1170:         VOID_SCROLL_1: {
1171:             name: 'Psychic',
1172:             description: 'Counter the previous scroll, then play it during your turn. Move Psychic to the common area.',
1173:             isCounter: true,
1174:             priority: 1,
1175: 
1176:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
1177:                 console.log(`🔮 Psychic activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
1178: 
1179:                 // When used as a counter in the response window, context.triggeringScroll
1180:                 // contains the scroll that was cancelled.
1181:                 const triggeringScroll = context?.triggeringScroll;
1182: 
1183:                 if (triggeringScroll && triggeringScroll.name) {
1184:                     // Cannot psychic yourself (edge case)
1185:                     if (triggeringScroll.name === 'VOID_SCROLL_1') {
1186:                         updateStatus('Psychic failed: Cannot psychic Psychic!');
1187:                         return { success: false, reason: 'Cannot psychic Psychic' };
1188:                     }
1189: 
1190:                     // Store the countered scroll to be played at the beginning of
1191:                     // the caster's next turn. Initialize array if needed, then push.
1192:                     if (!Array.isArray(system.activeBuffs.psychicPending)) {
1193:                         system.activeBuffs.psychicPending = [];
1194:                     }
1195:                     system.activeBuffs.psychicPending.push({
1196:                         playerIndex: casterIndex,
1197:                         scrollName: triggeringScroll.name,
1198:                         definition: triggeringScroll.definition
1199:                     });
1200: 
1201:                     // Broadcast Psychic buff in multiplayer
1202:                     if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
1203:                         broadcastGameAction('psychic-buff-applied', {
1204:                             playerIndex: casterIndex,
1205:                             scrollName: triggeringScroll.name,
1206:                             scrollDefinition: triggeringScroll.definition
1207:                         });
1208:                     }
1209: 
1210:                     // Mark Psychic itself to go to common area.
1211:                     // The disposition handler in multiplayer-state.js handles
1212:                     // "countered-original" entries; we set a flag so it knows
1213:                     // to force-common-area on the next handleScrollDisposition call.
1214:                     system.pendingForceCommonArea = {
1215:                         scrollName: context?.scrollName || 'VOID_SCROLL_1',
1216:                         playerIndex: casterIndex
1217:                     };
1218: 
1219:                     const displayName = triggeringScroll.definition?.name || triggeringScroll.name;
1220:                     updateStatus(`Psychic! Countered ${displayName}. You will play it at the start of your next turn.`);
1221: 
1222:                     return {
1223:                         success: true,
1224:                         isCounter: true,
1225:                         message: `Psychic countered ${displayName}!`
1226:                     };
1227:                 }
1228: 
1229:                 // Fallback: main-phase cast (no triggering scroll — just acts as counter signal)
1230:                 return {
1231:                     success: true,
1232:                     isCounter: true,
1233:                     message: 'Psychic counters the scroll!'
1234:                 };
1235:             }
1236:         },

1239:         // CATACOMB SCROLL EFFECTS
1240:         // ========================================
1241: 
1242:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_2: {
1243:             name: 'Mine',
1244:             description: 'If the center of this pattern is an elemental shrine, that shrine produces twice as many stones this turn (cannot exceed 5).',
1245:             isCounter: false,
1246:             priority: 2,
1247:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
1248:                 console.log(`⛏️ Mine activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
1249: 
1250:                 // Check if the caster is standing on an elemental shrine
1251:                 const playerPos = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[casterIndex])
1252:                     ? playerPositions[casterIndex] : null;
1253: 
1254:                 if (!playerPos) {
1255:                     updateStatus('Mine: no player position found.');
1256:                     return { success: true, message: 'Mine: no player position found.' };
1257:                 }
1258: 
1259:                 const shrine = (typeof findShrineAtPosition === 'function')
1260:                     ? findShrineAtPosition(playerPos.x, playerPos.y) : null;
1261: 
1262:                 const elementalTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
1263:                 if (shrine && elementalTypes.includes(shrine.shrineType)) {
1264:                     system.activeBuffs.mine = {
1265:                         expiresThisTurn: true,
1266:                         playerIndex: casterIndex,
1267:                         shrineType: shrine.shrineType
1268:                     };
1269:                     const message = `Mine: ${shrine.shrineType} shrine will produce double stones this turn!`;
1270:                     updateStatus(message);
1271:                     return { success: true, message: message };
1272:                 } else {
1273:                     const message = 'Mine: pattern center is not on an elemental shrine. No bonus applied.';
1274:                     updateStatus(message);
1275:                     return { success: true, message: message };
1276:                 }
1277:             }
1278:         },
1279:

1353:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_7: {
1354:             name: 'Reflecting Pool',
1355:             description: 'Regain 2 AP for each different stone type within 5 spaces of you. This can be used once per turn.',
1356:             isCounter: false,
1357:             priority: 7,
1358:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
1359:                 console.log(`💧 Reflecting Pool activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
1360: 
1361:                 // Once per turn guard
1362:                 const existing = system.activeBuffs.reflectingPool;
1363:                 if (existing && existing.playerIndex === casterIndex) {
1364:                     const msg = 'Reflecting Pool already used this turn.';
1365:                     updateStatus(msg);
1366:                     return { success: false, message: msg };
1367:                 }
1368: 
1369:                 const playerPos = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[casterIndex])
1370:                     ? playerPositions[casterIndex] : null;
1371:                 if (!playerPos || typeof pixelToHex !== 'function') {
1372:                     const msg = 'Reflecting Pool failed: player position not found.';
1373:                     updateStatus(msg);
1374:                     return { success: false, message: msg };
1375:                 }
1376: 
1377:                 const playerHex = pixelToHex(playerPos.x, playerPos.y, TILE_SIZE);
1378:                 const types = new Set();
1379:                 if (Array.isArray(placedStones)) {
1380:                     placedStones.forEach(stone => {
1381:                         const stoneHex = pixelToHex(stone.x, stone.y, TILE_SIZE);
1382:                         const dq = Math.abs(playerHex.q - stoneHex.q);
1383:                         const dr = Math.abs(playerHex.r - stoneHex.r);
1384:                         const ds = Math.abs((-playerHex.q - playerHex.r) - (-stoneHex.q - stoneHex.r));
1385:                         const hexDistance = Math.max(dq, dr, ds);
1386:                         if (hexDistance <= 5) types.add(stone.type);
1387:                     });
1388:                 }
1389: 
1390:                 const apGain = types.size * 2;
1391:                 if (typeof addAP === 'function') {
1392:                     addAP(apGain);
1393:                 }
1394: 
1395:                 system.activeBuffs.reflectingPool = {
1396:                     expiresThisTurn: true,
1397:                     playerIndex: casterIndex
1398:                 };
1399: 
1400:                 const message = `Reflecting Pool: regained ${apGain} AP.`;
1401:                 updateStatus(message);
1402: 
1403:                 return { success: true, message: message, apGained: apGain };
1404:             }
1405:         },

1561:     // ============================================
1562:     // TELEKINESIS MODE (Void Scroll III)
1563:     // ============================================
1564: 
1565:     enterTelekinesisMode(casterIndex, completionPayload) {
1566:         const self = this;
1567:         const MAX_MOVES = 1;
1568: 
1569:         console.log(`🔮 Entering Telekinesis mode for player ${casterIndex}`);
1570: 
1571:         // Set up the telekinesis state so game-core/game-ui know about the rules
1572:         window.telekinesisState = {
1573:             active: true,
1574:             movesLeft: MAX_MOVES,
1575:             maxMoves: MAX_MOVES,
1576:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
1577:             movedTiles: []
1578:         };
1579: 
1580:         // Enable tile dragging
1581:         window.tileMoveMode = true;
1582: 
1583:         // Finish handler — turn off tile move mode and clean up
1584:         const finishTelekinesis = () => {
1585:             window.tileMoveMode = false;
1586:             const movesDone = MAX_MOVES - (window.telekinesisState?.movesLeft ?? 0);
1587:             window.telekinesisState = null;
1588: 
1589:             // Remove buttons
1590:             const doneEl = document.getElementById('telekinesis-done-btn');
1591:             if (doneEl && doneEl.parentNode) doneEl.parentNode.removeChild(doneEl);
1592:             const cancelEl = document.getElementById('scroll-cancel-btn');
1593:             if (cancelEl && cancelEl.parentNode) cancelEl.parentNode.removeChild(cancelEl);
1594: 
1595:             self.selectionMode = null;
1596: 
1597:             updateStatus(`Telekinesis complete! Moved ${movesDone} tile${movesDone === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
1598: 
1599:             // Signal that selection effect is complete
1600:             if (completionPayload && self.spellSystem && typeof self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
1601:                 self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
1602:             }
1603:         };
1604: 
1605:         // Expose so the tile-drop handler in game-ui can call it when moves run out
1606:         window.finishTelekinesis = finishTelekinesis;
1607: 
1608:         // Create cancel button
1609:         const cancelBtn = this.createCancelButton('Cancel', () => {
1610:             window.tileMoveMode = false;
1611:             window.telekinesisState = null;
1612:             window.finishTelekinesis = null;
1613:             const doneEl = document.getElementById('telekinesis-done-btn');
1614:             if (doneEl && doneEl.parentNode) doneEl.parentNode.removeChild(doneEl);
1615:             self.cancelSelectionMode();
1616:         });
1617: 
1618:         // Create done button
1619:         const doneBtn = document.createElement('button');
1620:         doneBtn.id = 'telekinesis-done-btn';
1621:         doneBtn.textContent = `Done (0/${MAX_MOVES})`;
1622:         Object.assign(doneBtn.style, {
1623:             position: 'fixed',
1624:             bottom: '60px',
1625:             left: '50%',
1626:             transform: 'translateX(-50%)',
1627:             zIndex: '2001',
1628:             padding: '10px 24px',
1629:             backgroundColor: '#27ae60',
1630:             color: 'white',
1631:             border: 'none',
1632:             borderRadius: '8px',
1633:             cursor: 'pointer',
1634:             fontSize: '16px',
1635:             fontWeight: 'bold',
1636:             boxShadow: '0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'
1637:         });
1638:         doneBtn.onclick = () => finishTelekinesis();
1639:         document.body.appendChild(doneBtn);
1640: 
1641:         // Minimal selection mode — just for cleanup if cancelSelectionMode is called
1642:         this.selectionMode = {
1643:             type: 'telekinesis',
1644:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
1645:             completionPayload: completionPayload,
1646:             cleanup() {
1647:                 window.tileMoveMode = false;
1648:                 window.telekinesisState = null;
1649:                 window.finishTelekinesis = null;
1650:                 const d = document.getElementById('telekinesis-done-btn');
1651:                 if (d && d.parentNode) d.parentNode.removeChild(d);
1652:                 const c = document.getElementById('scroll-cancel-btn');
1653:                 if (c && c.parentNode) c.parentNode.removeChild(c);
1654:             }
1655:         };
1656: 
1657:         updateStatus(`Telekinesis: drag tiles to move them (0/${MAX_MOVES}). Tiles must touch 2+ other tiles.`);
1658:     },
1659: 
1660:     // ============================================
1661:     // SCHOLAR'S INSIGHT MODE (Void Scroll II)
1662:     // ============================================
1663: 
1664:     enterScholarsInsightMode(casterIndex, completionPayload) {
1665:         const self = this;
1666:         const STONE_TYPES_LOCAL = {
1667:             earth: { color: '#69d83a', symbol: '▲' },
1668:             water: { color: '#5894f4', symbol: '◯' },
1669:             fire: { color: '#ed1b43', symbol: '♦' },
1670:             wind: { color: '#ffce00', symbol: '≋' },
1671:             void: { color: '#9458f4', symbol: '✺' }
1672:         };
1673: 
1674:         // Step 1: Show deck picker (which element deck to search)
1675:         const showDeckPicker = () => {
1676:             const existing = document.getElementById('scholars-insight-modal');
1677:             if (existing) existing.remove();
1678: 
1679:             const overlay = document.createElement('div');
1680:             overlay.id = 'scholars-insight-modal';
1681:             Object.assign(overlay.style, {
1682:                 position: 'fixed',
1683:                 top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
1684:                 backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
1685:                 zIndex: '3000',
1686:                 display: 'flex',
1687:                 justifyContent: 'center',
1688:                 alignItems: 'center'
1689:             });
1690: 
1691:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
1692:             Object.assign(modal.style, {
1693:                 backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
1694:                 border: '2px solid #9458f4',
1695:                 borderRadius: '10px',
1696:                 padding: '20px',
1697:                 color: 'white',
1698:                 minWidth: '250px',
1699:                 maxWidth: '350px'
1700:             });
1701: 
1702:             const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
1703:             titleEl.textContent = "Scholar's Insight: Choose a Deck";
1704:             titleEl.style.marginBottom = '15px';
1705:             titleEl.style.textAlign = 'center';
1706:             titleEl.style.color = '#9458f4';
1707:             modal.appendChild(titleEl);
1708: 
1709:             const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
1710:             subtitle.textContent = 'Select an element deck to search through.';
1711:             subtitle.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
1712:             subtitle.style.fontSize = '13px';
1713:             subtitle.style.marginBottom = '15px';
1714:             subtitle.style.textAlign = 'center';
1715:             modal.appendChild(subtitle);
1716: 
1717:             ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].forEach(element => {
1718:                 const deck = self.spellSystem?.scrollDecks?.[element];
1719:                 const deckSize = deck ? deck.length : 0;
1720:                 const info = STONE_TYPES_LOCAL[element];
1721: 
1722:                 const btn = document.createElement('button');
1723:                 btn.textContent = `${info.symbol} ${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} (${deckSize} scrolls)`;
1724:                 Object.assign(btn.style, {
1725:                     display: 'block',
1726:                     width: '100%',
1727:                     padding: '10px',
1728:                     margin: '5px 0',
1729:                     backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
1730:                     color: info.color,
1731:                     border: `1px solid ${info.color}`,
1732:                     borderRadius: '5px',
1733:                     cursor: deckSize > 0 ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed',
1734:                     fontSize: '14px',
1735:                     fontWeight: 'bold',
1736:                     opacity: deckSize > 0 ? '1' : '0.4'
1737:                 });
1738:                 if (deckSize > 0) {
1739:                     btn.onmouseenter = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#3d3d55';
1740:                     btn.onmouseleave = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
1741:                     btn.onclick = () => {
1742:                         overlay.remove();
1743:                         showDeckBrowser(element);
1744:                     };
1745:                 }
1746:                 modal.appendChild(btn);
1747:             });
1748: 
1749:             // Cancel button
1750:             const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
1751:             cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
1752:             Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
1753:                 display: 'block',
1754:                 width: '100%',
1755:                 padding: '10px',
1756:                 margin: '10px 0 0 0',
1757:                 backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
1758:                 color: 'white',
1759:                 border: 'none',
1760:                 borderRadius: '5px',
1761:                 cursor: 'pointer',
1762:                 fontSize: '14px'
1763:             });
1764:             cancelBtn.onclick = () => {
1765:                 overlay.remove();
1766:                 self.cancelSelectionMode();
1767:             };
1768:             modal.appendChild(cancelBtn);
1769: 
1770:             overlay.appendChild(modal);
1771:             document.body.appendChild(overlay);
1772:         };
1773: 
1774:         // Step 2: Show scrolls in chosen deck for selection
1775:         const showDeckBrowser = (element) => {
1776:             const deck = self.spellSystem?.scrollDecks?.[element];
1777:             if (!deck || deck.length === 0) {
1778:                 updateStatus(`The ${element} scroll deck is empty!`);
1779:                 self.cancelSelectionMode();
1780:                 return;
1781:             }
1782: 
1783:             const info = STONE_TYPES_LOCAL[element];
1784:             const existing = document.getElementById('scholars-insight-modal');
1785:             if (existing) existing.remove();
1786: 
1787:             const overlay = document.createElement('div');
1788:             overlay.id = 'scholars-insight-modal';
1789:             Object.assign(overlay.style, {
1790:                 position: 'fixed',
1791:                 top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
1792:                 backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
1793:                 zIndex: '3000',
1794:                 display: 'flex',
1795:                 justifyContent: 'center',
1796:                 alignItems: 'center'
1797:             });
1798: 
1799:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
1800:             Object.assign(modal.style, {
1801:                 backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
1802:                 border: `2px solid ${info.color}`,
1803:                 borderRadius: '10px',
1804:                 padding: '20px',
1805:                 color: 'white',
1806:                 minWidth: '300px',
1807:                 maxWidth: '450px',
1808:                 maxHeight: '80vh',
1809:                 overflowY: 'auto'
1810:             });
1811: 
1812:             const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
1813:             titleEl.textContent = `${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} Deck (${deck.length} scrolls)`;
1814:             titleEl.style.marginBottom = '5px';
1815:             titleEl.style.textAlign = 'center';
1816:             titleEl.style.color = info.color;
1817:             modal.appendChild(titleEl);
1818: 
1819:             const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
1820:             subtitle.textContent = 'Click a scroll to add it to your hand.';
1821:             subtitle.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
1822:             subtitle.style.fontSize = '13px';
1823:             subtitle.style.marginBottom = '15px';
1824:             subtitle.style.textAlign = 'center';
1825:             modal.appendChild(subtitle);
1826: 
1827:             deck.forEach((scrollName, index) => {
1828:                 const scrollInfo = self.spellSystem?.patterns?.[scrollName];
1829:                 if (!scrollInfo) return;
1830: 
1831:                 const card = document.createElement('div');
1832:                 Object.assign(card.style, {
1833:                     backgroundColor: '#34495e',
1834:                     border: '1px solid #555',
1835:                     borderRadius: '8px',
1836:                     padding: '12px',
1837:                     marginBottom: '8px',
1838:                     cursor: 'pointer',
1839:                     transition: 'border-color 0.15s'
1840:                 });
1841:                 card.onmouseenter = () => card.style.borderColor = info.color;
1842:                 card.onmouseleave = () => card.style.borderColor = '#555';
1843: 
1844:                 const nameEl = document.createElement('div');
1845:                 nameEl.textContent = scrollInfo.name || scrollName;
1846:                 nameEl.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
1847:                 nameEl.style.color = info.color;
1848:                 nameEl.style.marginBottom = '4px';
1849:                 card.appendChild(nameEl);
1850: 
1851:                 const descEl = document.createElement('div');
1852:                 descEl.textContent = scrollInfo.description || 'No description';
1853:                 descEl.style.fontSize = '12px';
1854:                 descEl.style.color = '#95a5a6';
1855:                 card.appendChild(descEl);
1856: 
1857:                 const levelEl = document.createElement('div');
1858:                 levelEl.textContent = `Level ${scrollInfo.level || '?'}`;
1859:                 levelEl.style.fontSize = '11px';
1860:                 levelEl.style.color = '#7f8c8d';
1861:                 levelEl.style.marginTop = '4px';
1862:                 card.appendChild(levelEl);
1863: 
1864:                 card.onclick = () => {
1865:                     overlay.remove();
1866:                     selectScroll(element, scrollName, index);
1867:                 };
1868: 
1869:                 modal.appendChild(card);
1870:             });
1871: 
1872:             // Back button
1873:             const backBtn = document.createElement('button');
1874:             backBtn.textContent = '← Back to Decks';
1875:             Object.assign(backBtn.style, {
1876:                 display: 'inline-block',
1877:                 padding: '8px 14px',
1878:                 margin: '10px 8px 0 0',
1879:                 backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
1880:                 color: 'white',
1881:                 border: '1px solid #555',
1882:                 borderRadius: '5px',
1883:                 cursor: 'pointer',
1884:                 fontSize: '13px'
1885:             });
1886:             backBtn.onclick = () => {
1887:                 overlay.remove();
1888:                 showDeckPicker();
1889:             };
1890:             modal.appendChild(backBtn);
1891: 
1892:             // Cancel button
1893:             const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
1894:             cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
1895:             Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
1896:                 display: 'inline-block',
1897:                 padding: '8px 14px',
1898:                 margin: '10px 0 0 0',
1899:                 backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
1900:                 color: 'white',
1901:                 border: 'none',
1902:                 borderRadius: '5px',
1903:                 cursor: 'pointer',
1904:                 fontSize: '13px'
1905:             });
1906:             cancelBtn.onclick = () => {
1907:                 overlay.remove();
1908:                 self.cancelSelectionMode();
1909:             };
1910:             modal.appendChild(cancelBtn);
1911: 
1912:             overlay.appendChild(modal);
1913:             document.body.appendChild(overlay);
1914:         };
1915: 
1916:         // Step 3: Handle selection — add to hand (or trigger cascade), shuffle deck, broadcast
1917:         const selectScroll = (element, scrollName, index) => {
1918:             const sp = self.spellSystem;
1919:             const deck = sp.scrollDecks[element];
1920:             if (!deck) return;
1921: 
1922:             // Remove chosen scroll from deck
1923:             deck.splice(index, 1);
1924: 
1925:             // Shuffle the deck afterwards
1926:             if (sp.shuffleDeck) {
1927:                 sp.shuffleDeck(deck);
1928:                 console.log(`🔮 Scholar's Insight: ${element} deck shuffled after search`);
1929:             }
1930: 
1931:             const scrolls = sp.getPlayerScrolls(false);
1932:             const scrollInfo = sp.patterns?.[scrollName];
1933: 
1934:             if (scrolls.hand.size >= sp.MAX_HAND_SIZE) {
1935:                 // Hand full — trigger cascade system
1936:                 const canCascadeToActive = scrolls.active.size < sp.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE;
1937:                 sp.showCascadePrompt(scrollName, scrollInfo, element, canCascadeToActive);
1938:             } else {
1939:                 // Hand has room — add directly
1940:                 scrolls.hand.add(scrollName);
1941:                 sp.updateScrollCount();
1942:             }
1943: 
1944:             if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
1945:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
1946: 
1947:             const displayName = scrollInfo?.name || scrollName;
1948:             updateStatus(`Scholar's Insight: added "${displayName}" to your hand!`);
1949: 
1950:             // Broadcast in multiplayer
1951:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
1952:                 broadcastGameAction('scholars-insight', {
1953:                     playerIndex: casterIndex,
1954:                     element: element,
1955:                     scrollName: scrollName
1956:                 });
1957:             }
1958: 
1959:             // Clean up selection mode
1960:             self.selectionMode = null;
1961:         };
1962: 
1963:         // Set selection mode (allows cancellation)
1964:         this.selectionMode = {
1965:             type: 'scholars-insight',
1966:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
1967:             cleanup: () => {
1968:                 const modal = document.getElementById('scholars-insight-modal');
1969:                 if (modal) modal.remove();
1970:             }
1971:         };
1972: 
1973:         // Start by showing the deck picker
1974:         showDeckPicker();
1975:     },
