2102: 
2103:     // ============================================
2104:     // TILE SWAP MODE (Earth Scroll II)
2105:     // ============================================
2106: 
2107:     enterTileSwapMode(casterIndex, completionPayload) {
2108:         const self = this;
2109:         console.log(`🔀 Entering tile swap mode for player ${casterIndex}`);
2110: 
2111:         // Get eligible tiles (no stones, no players, not player tiles)
2112:         const eligibleTiles = this.getEligibleTilesForSwap();
2113:         console.log(`   Found ${eligibleTiles.length} eligible tiles for swap`);
2114: 
2115:         if (eligibleTiles.length < 2) {
2116:             updateStatus('Not enough eligible tiles to swap!');
2117:             return;
2118:         }
2119: 
2120:         // Highlight eligible tiles
2121:         this.highlightTiles(eligibleTiles, '#69d83a');
2122: 
2123:         // Create cancel button
2124:         const cancelBtn = this.createCancelButton('Cancel Swap', () => {
2125:             self.cancelSelectionMode();
2126:         });
2127: 
2128:         // Track selected tiles
2129:         let selectedTiles = [];
2130: 
2131:         // Store selection mode state (completionPayload: { scrollName, spell, effectName } for onSelectionEffectComplete)
2132:         this.selectionMode = {
2133:             type: 'tile-swap',
2134:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
2135:             eligibleTiles: eligibleTiles,
2136:             selectedTiles: selectedTiles,
2137:             cancelBtn: cancelBtn,
2138:             completionPayload: completionPayload || null,
2139: 
2140:             handleTileClick(tile) {
2141:                 console.log(`🔀 Tile clicked for swap: ${tile.id}`);
2142: 
2143:                 // Re-validate: tile must be unoccupied (no stones, no players) at click time
2144:                 if (self.tileHasStones(tile) || self.tileHasPlayers(tile)) {
2145:                     console.log(`   Tile ${tile.id} has stones or players - cannot swap`);
2146:                     updateStatus('Cannot swap: tile has stones or players on it.');
2147:                     return;
2148:                 }
2149: 
2150:                 // Must also be in initial eligible set (e.g. not a player tile)
2151:                 if (!eligibleTiles.find(t => t.id === tile.id)) {
2152:                     console.log(`   Tile ${tile.id} is NOT eligible`);
2153:                     updateStatus('Cannot swap: tile has stones or players on it.');
2154:                     return;
2155:                 }
2156: 
2157:                 // Check if already selected
2158:                 const existingIndex = selectedTiles.findIndex(t => t.id === tile.id);
2159:                 if (existingIndex >= 0) {
2160:                     // Deselect
2161:                     selectedTiles.splice(existingIndex, 1);
2162:                     self.unhighlightTile(tile);
2163:                     self.highlightTile(tile, '#69d83a'); // Back to eligible highlight
2164:                     updateStatus(`Deselected tile. Select ${2 - selectedTiles.length} more.`);
2165:                     return;
2166:                 }
2167: 
2168:                 // Select tile
2169:                 selectedTiles.push(tile);
2170:                 self.highlightTile(tile, '#2ecc71', 4); // Selected highlight
2171:                 console.log(`   Tile ${tile.id} selected. Total selected: ${selectedTiles.length}`);
2172: 
2173:                 if (selectedTiles.length === 1) {
2174:                     updateStatus('First tile selected. Select second tile to swap.');
2175:                 } else if (selectedTiles.length === 2) {
2176:                     // Re-validate both tiles before swapping (state may have changed)
2177:                     const t1 = selectedTiles[0], t2 = selectedTiles[1];
2178:                     if (self.tileHasStones(t1) || self.tileHasPlayers(t1)) {
2179:                         updateStatus('Cannot swap: first tile now has stones or players on it.');
2180:                         selectedTiles.length = 0;
2181:                         self.selectionMode.cleanup();
2182:                         self.selectionMode = null;
2183:                         return;
2184:                     }
2185:                     if (self.tileHasStones(t2) || self.tileHasPlayers(t2)) {
2186:                         updateStatus('Cannot swap: second tile now has stones or players on it.');
2187:                         selectedTiles.length = 0;
2188:                         self.selectionMode.cleanup();
2189:                         self.selectionMode = null;
2190:                         return;
2191:                     }
2192:                     // Capture payload and cleanup FIRST (remove highlights while tile refs are still valid)
2193:                     const payload = self.selectionMode.completionPayload;
2194:                     self.selectionMode.cleanup();
2195:                     self.selectionMode = null;
2196: 
2197:                     // Then perform swap (no DOM re-use of tile elements; highlights already cleared)
2198:                     console.log(`   Performing swap between ${t1.id} and ${t2.id}`);
2199:                     self.performTileSwap(t1, t2);
2200: 
2201:                     // Signal that selection effect is complete so game exits "waiting for tiles" phase
2202:                     if (payload && self.spellSystem && typeof self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
2203:                         self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(payload.scrollName, payload.effectName, payload.spell);
2204:                     }
2205:                 }
2206:             },
2207: 
2208:             cleanup() {
2209:                 // Remove highlights
2210:                 eligibleTiles.forEach(tile => self.unhighlightTile(tile));
2211:                 // Remove cancel button
2212:                 if (cancelBtn && cancelBtn.parentNode) {
2213:                     cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(cancelBtn);
2214:                 }
2215:             }
2216:         };
2217: 
2218:         updateStatus('Select two tiles to swap (any distance).');
2219:     },
2220: 
2221:     performTileSwap(tile1, tile2) {
2222:         // Only swap unoccupied tiles (no stones, no players)
2223:         if (this.tileHasStones(tile1) || this.tileHasPlayers(tile1)) {
2224:             updateStatus('Cannot swap: tile has stones or players on it.');
2225:             return;
2226:         }
2227:         if (this.tileHasStones(tile2) || this.tileHasPlayers(tile2)) {
2228:             updateStatus('Cannot swap: tile has stones or players on it.');
2229:             return;
2230:         }
2231: 
2232:         // Swap positions
2233:         const tempX = tile1.x;
2234:         const tempY = tile1.y;
2235: 
2236:         tile1.x = tile2.x;
2237:         tile1.y = tile2.y;
2238:         tile2.x = tempX;
2239:         tile2.y = tempY;
2240: 
2241:         // Update visual transforms
2242:         if (tile1.element) {
2243:             tile1.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile1.x}, ${tile1.y}) rotate(${tile1.rotation || 0})`);
2244:         }
2245:         if (tile2.element) {
2246:             tile2.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile2.x}, ${tile2.y}) rotate(${tile2.rotation || 0})`);
2247:         }
2248: 
2249:         // Broadcast in multiplayer
2250:         if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2251:             broadcastGameAction('tile-swap', {
2252:                 tile1Id: tile1.id,
2253:                 tile2Id: tile2.id,
2254:                 tile1NewPos: { x: tile1.x, y: tile1.y },
2255:                 tile2NewPos: { x: tile2.x, y: tile2.y }
2256:             });
2257:         }
2258: 
2259:         // Ensure pulse is cleared on the two swapped tiles
2260:         this.unhighlightTile(tile1);
2261:         this.unhighlightTile(tile2);
2262: 
2263:         updateStatus('Tiles swapped!');
2264:         console.log(`🔀 Swapped tiles: ${tile1.id} <-> ${tile2.id}`);
2265:     },
2266: 
2267:     // ============================================
2268:     // TILE FLIP MODE (Earth Scroll IV)
2269:     // ============================================
2270: 
2271:     enterTileFlipMode(casterIndex, completionPayload, onComplete) {
2272:         const self = this;
2273: 
2274:         // Get eligible tiles (no stones, no players, not player tiles)
2275:         const eligibleTiles = this.getEligibleTilesForFlip();
2276: 
2277:         if (eligibleTiles.length === 0) {
2278:             updateStatus('No eligible tiles to flip!');
2279:             // Still signal completion so the next queued Psychic scroll can run
2280:             if (typeof onComplete === 'function') onComplete();
2281:             else if (completionPayload && self.spellSystem?.onSelectionEffectComplete) {
2282:                 self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
2283:             }
2284:             return;
2285:         }
2286: 
2287:         // Highlight eligible tiles
2288:         this.highlightTiles(eligibleTiles, '#69d83a');
2289: 
2290:         // Create cancel button
2291:         const cancelBtn = this.createCancelButton('Cancel Flip', () => {
2292:             self.cancelSelectionMode();
2293:             if (typeof onComplete === 'function') onComplete();
2294:         });
2295: 
2296:         // Store selection mode state
2297:         this.selectionMode = {
2298:             type: 'tile-flip',
2299:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
2300:             eligibleTiles: eligibleTiles,
2301:             cancelBtn: cancelBtn,
2302: 
2303:             handleTileClick(tile) {
2304:                 // Check if tile is eligible
2305:                 if (!eligibleTiles.find(t => t.id === tile.id)) {
2306:                     updateStatus('Cannot flip: tile has stones or players on it.');
2307:                     return;
2308:                 }
2309: 
2310:                 // Perform flip
2311:                 self.performTileFlip(tile, casterIndex);
2312:                 self.selectionMode.cleanup();
2313:                 self.selectionMode = null;
2314: 
2315:                 // Signal completion (for normal casts via onSelectionEffectComplete,
2316:                 // or for Psychic-chained casts via the onComplete callback)
2317:                 if (typeof onComplete === 'function') {
2318:                     onComplete();
2319:                 } else if (completionPayload && self.spellSystem?.onSelectionEffectComplete) {
2320:                     self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
2321:                 }
2322:             },
2323: 
2324:             cleanup() {
2325:                 // Remove highlights
2326:                 eligibleTiles.forEach(tile => self.unhighlightTile(tile));
2327:                 // Remove cancel button
2328:                 if (cancelBtn && cancelBtn.parentNode) {
2329:                     cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(cancelBtn);
2330:                 }
2331:             }
2332:         };
2333: 
2334:         updateStatus('Select a tile to flip (reveal/hide).');
2335:     },
2336: 
2337:     performTileFlip(tile, casterIndex) {
2338:         if (tile.flipped) {
2339:             // Currently hidden -> reveal it
2340:             if (typeof revealTile === 'function') {
2341:                 revealTile(tile.id);
2342:                 // revealTile() sets its own status (including AP bonus message for catacomb tiles)
2343:             } else {
2344:                 // Manual reveal
2345:                 tile.flipped = false;
2346:                 // The revealTile function should handle scroll drawing
2347:                 console.log(`👣 Revealed tile: ${tile.id} (${tile.shrineType})`);
2348:             }
2349:         } else {
2350:             // Currently revealed -> hide it
2351:             tile.flipped = true;
2352: 
2353:             // Update visual - need to recreate as flipped
2354:             if (typeof recreateTileAsFlipped === 'function') {
2355:                 recreateTileAsFlipped(tile);
2356:             }
2357: 
2358:             // Broadcast
2359:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2360:                 broadcastGameAction('tile-hide', {
2361:                     tileId: tile.id
2362:                 });
2363:             }
2364: 
2365:             updateStatus(`Hid ${tile.shrineType} shrine tile.`);
2366:             console.log(`👣 Hid tile: ${tile.id}`);
2367:         }
2368:     },
2369: 
2370:     // ============================================
2371:     // HELPER FUNCTIONS
2372:     // ============================================
2373: 
2374:     getEligibleTilesForSwap() {
2375:         if (typeof placedTiles === 'undefined') return [];
2376: 
2377:         return placedTiles.filter(tile => {
2378:             // Not a player tile
2379:             if (tile.isPlayerTile) return false;
2380: 
2381:             // No stones on tile
2382:             if (this.tileHasStones(tile)) return false;
2383: 
2384:             // No players on tile
2385:             if (this.tileHasPlayers(tile)) return false;
2386: 
2387:             return true;
2388:         });
2389:     },
2390: 
2391:     getEligibleTilesForFlip() {
2392:         // Same criteria as swap
2393:         return this.getEligibleTilesForSwap();
2394:     },
2395: 
2396:     // Wandering River: any non-player tile (revealed or unrevealed) can be transformed
2397:     getEligibleTilesForWanderingRiver() {
2398:         if (typeof placedTiles === 'undefined') return [];
2399:         return placedTiles.filter(tile => {
2400:             if (tile.isPlayerTile || tile.shrineType === 'player') return false;
2401:             return true;
2402:         });
2403:     },
2404: 
2405:     tileHasStones(tile) {
2406:         if (typeof placedStones === 'undefined') return false;
2407: 
2408:         // Use same radius as findTileAtPosition (game-core): TILE_SIZE * 4 covers full tile
2409:         // TILE_SIZE * 2.5 was too small and missed stones on outer hexes
2410:         const tileRadius = typeof TILE_SIZE !== 'undefined' ? TILE_SIZE * 4 : 80;
2411: 
2412:         return placedStones.some(stone => {
2413:             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - tile.y, 2));
2414:             return dist < tileRadius;
2415:         });
2416:     },
2417: 
2418:     tileHasPlayers(tile) {
2419:         if (typeof playerPositions === 'undefined') return false;
2420: 
2421:         // Match tileHasStones / findTileAtPosition radius
2422:         const tileRadius = typeof TILE_SIZE !== 'undefined' ? TILE_SIZE * 4 : 80;
2423: 
2424:         return playerPositions.some(pos => {
2425:             if (!pos) return false;
2426:             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(pos.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(pos.y - tile.y, 2));
2427:             return dist < tileRadius;
2428:         });
2429:     },
2430: 
2431:     highlightTiles(tiles, color) {
2432:         tiles.forEach(tile => this.highlightTile(tile, color));
2433:     },
2434: 
2435:     highlightTile(tile, color, strokeWidth = 3) {
2436:         if (!tile.element) return;
2437: 
2438:         // Try multiple selectors to find hex elements
2439:         let hexes = tile.element.querySelectorAll('.hex-tile');
2440:         if (hexes.length === 0) {
2441:             hexes = tile.element.querySelectorAll('polygon');
2442:         }
2443: 
2444:         hexes.forEach(hex => {
2445:             hex.setAttribute('data-original-stroke', hex.getAttribute('stroke') || 'none');
2446:             hex.setAttribute('data-original-stroke-width', hex.getAttribute('stroke-width') || '1');
2447:             hex.setAttribute('stroke', color);
2448:             hex.setAttribute('stroke-width', strokeWidth);
2449:         });
2450: 
2451:         // Also add a pulsing animation
2452:         tile.element.style.animation = 'tilePulse 1s ease-in-out infinite';
2453: 
2454:         // Add pulse animation if not already in DOM
2455:         if (!document.getElementById('tile-pulse-style')) {
2456:             const style = document.createElement('style');
2457:             style.id = 'tile-pulse-style';
2458:             style.textContent = `
2459:                 @keyframes tilePulse {
2460:                     0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
2461:                     50% { opacity: 0.7; }
2462:                 }
2463:             `;
2464:             document.head.appendChild(style);
2465:         }
2466:     },
2467: 
2468:     unhighlightTile(tile) {
2469:         if (!tile.element) return;
2470: 
2471:         let hexes = tile.element.querySelectorAll('.hex-tile');
2472:         if (hexes.length === 0) {
2473:             hexes = tile.element.querySelectorAll('polygon');
2474:         }
2475: 
2476:         hexes.forEach(hex => {
2477:             const origStroke = hex.getAttribute('data-original-stroke') || 'none';
2478:             const origWidth = hex.getAttribute('data-original-stroke-width') || '1';
2479:             hex.setAttribute('stroke', origStroke);
2480:             hex.setAttribute('stroke-width', origWidth);
2481:         });
2482: 
2483:         tile.element.style.animation = '';
2484:     },
2485: 
2486:     createCancelButton(text, onClick) {
2487:         const btn = document.createElement('button');
2488:         btn.textContent = text;
2489:         btn.id = 'scroll-cancel-btn';
2490:         Object.assign(btn.style, {
2491:             position: 'fixed',
2492:             bottom: '20px',
2493:             left: '50%',
2494:             transform: 'translateX(-50%)',
2495:             padding: '10px 20px',
2496:             backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
2497:             color: 'white',
2498:             border: 'none',
2499:             borderRadius: '5px',
2500:             cursor: 'pointer',
2501:             fontSize: '16px',
2502:             fontWeight: 'bold',
2503:             zIndex: '1000'
2504:         });
2505:         btn.onclick = onClick;
2506:         document.body.appendChild(btn);
2507:         return btn;
2508:     },
2509: 
2510:     drawStonesToPool(stoneType, count, playerIndex) {
2511:         // Draw stones from source pool to player pool
2512:         if (typeof stonePools === 'undefined') {
2513:             console.warn('Stone pools not available');
2514:             return 0;
2515:         }
2516: 
2517:         // Determine the target player pool.
2518:         // If an explicit playerIndex is given, use playerPools[playerIndex] directly
2519:         // so that response scrolls (cast by a non-active player) modify the correct pool.
2520:         let targetPool = null;
2521:         const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.playerPools);
2522:         if (playerIndex !== undefined && playerIndex !== null && pools && pools[playerIndex]) {
2523:             targetPool = pools[playerIndex];
2524:         } else if (typeof stoneCounts !== 'undefined') {
2525:             targetPool = stoneCounts;
2526:         }
2527: 
2528:         if (!targetPool) {
2529:             console.warn('No target player pool available');
2530:             return 0;
2531:         }
2532: 
2533:         // Get player pool capacity (default 5)
2534:         const capacity = (typeof playerPoolCapacity !== 'undefined' && playerPoolCapacity[stoneType])
2535:             ? playerPoolCapacity[stoneType]
2536:             : 5;
2537:         const currentCount = targetPool[stoneType] || 0;
2538:         const roomInPool = capacity - currentCount;
2539: 
2540:         // Can only draw up to: min(requested, available in source, room in player pool)
2541:         const sourceAvailable = stonePools[stoneType] || 0;
2542:         const toDraw = Math.min(count, sourceAvailable, roomInPool);
2543: 
2544:         if (toDraw > 0) {
2545:             stonePools[stoneType] -= toDraw;
2546:             targetPool[stoneType] += toDraw;
2547: 
2548:             // Update UI
2549:             if (typeof updateStoneCount === 'function') {
2550:                 updateStoneCount(stoneType);
2551:             }
2552: 
2553:             console.log(`📜 Drew ${toDraw} ${stoneType} stones to player ${playerIndex ?? 'active'} pool (had ${currentCount}/${capacity})`);
2554:         } else if (roomInPool <= 0) {
2555:             console.log(`📜 Cannot draw ${stoneType} stones - pool is full (${currentCount}/${capacity})`);
2556:         }
2557: 
2558:         return toDraw;
2559:     },
2560: 
2561:     // Quick Reflexes: search for a level 1 scroll, add to hand, draw 2 stones of that type
2562:     enterQuickReflexesMode(casterIndex, completionPayload) {
2563:         const self = this;
2564:         const STONE_TYPES_LOCAL = {
2565:             earth: { color: '#69d83a', symbol: '▲' },
2566:             water: { color: '#5894f4', symbol: '◯' },
2567:             fire: { color: '#ed1b43', symbol: '♦' },
2568:             wind: { color: '#ffce00', symbol: '≋' },
2569:             void: { color: '#9458f4', symbol: '✺' }
2570:         };
2571: 
2572:         const sp = self.spellSystem;
2573: 
2574:         // Collect all available level-1 scrolls across elemental decks (catacomb excluded)
2575:         const level1Elements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
2576:         const available = []; // [{ element, scrollName, index }]
2577:         level1Elements.forEach(element => {
2578:             const deck = sp?.scrollDecks?.[element];
2579:             if (!deck) return;
2580:             deck.forEach((scrollName, index) => {
2581:                 const def = sp?.patterns?.[scrollName];
2582:                 if (def && def.level === 1) {
2583:                     available.push({ element, scrollName, index });
2584:                 }
2585:             });
2586:         });
2587: 
2588:         if (available.length === 0) {
2589:             if (typeof updateStatus === 'function') {
2590:                 updateStatus('Quick Reflexes: no level 1 scrolls available in any deck!');
2591:             }
2592:             self.selectionMode = null;
2593:             return;
2594:         }
2595: 
2596:         // Build and show modal
2597:         const showPicker = () => {
2598:             const existing = document.getElementById('quick-reflexes-modal');
2599:             if (existing) existing.remove();
2600: 
2601:             const overlay = document.createElement('div');
2602:             overlay.id = 'quick-reflexes-modal';
2603:             Object.assign(overlay.style, {
2604:                 position: 'fixed',
2605:                 top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
2606:                 backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
2607:                 zIndex: '3000',
2608:                 display: 'flex',
2609:                 justifyContent: 'center',
2610:                 alignItems: 'center'
2611:             });
2612: 
2613:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
2614:             Object.assign(modal.style, {
2615:                 backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
2616:                 border: '2px solid #ffce00',
2617:                 borderRadius: '10px',
2618:                 padding: '20px',
2619:                 color: 'white',
2620:                 minWidth: '300px',
2621:                 maxWidth: '420px',
2622:                 maxHeight: '80vh',
2623:                 overflowY: 'auto'
2624:             });
2625: 
2626:             const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
2627:             titleEl.textContent = '⚡ Quick Reflexes: Choose a Level 1 Scroll';
2628:             titleEl.style.marginBottom = '5px';
2629:             titleEl.style.textAlign = 'center';
2630:             titleEl.style.color = '#ffce00';
2631:             modal.appendChild(titleEl);
2632: 
2633:             const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
2634:             subtitle.textContent = 'Add it to your hand and draw 2 stones of its type.';
2635:             subtitle.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
2636:             subtitle.style.fontSize = '13px';
2637:             subtitle.style.marginBottom = '15px';
2638:             subtitle.style.textAlign = 'center';
2639:             modal.appendChild(subtitle);
2640: 
2641:             available.forEach(({ element, scrollName, index }) => {
2642:                 const scrollInfo = sp?.patterns?.[scrollName];
2643:                 if (!scrollInfo) return;
2644:                 const info = STONE_TYPES_LOCAL[element] || { color: '#fff', symbol: '?' };
2645: 
2646:                 const card = document.createElement('div');
2647:                 Object.assign(card.style, {
2648:                     backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
2649:                     border: `1px solid ${info.color}`,
2650:                     borderRadius: '8px',
2651:                     padding: '12px',
2652:                     marginBottom: '8px',
2653:                     cursor: 'pointer',
2654:                     transition: 'border-color 0.15s, background-color 0.15s'
2655:                 });
2656:                 card.onmouseenter = () => card.style.backgroundColor = '#3d3d55';
2657:                 card.onmouseleave = () => card.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
2658: 
2659:                 const nameEl = document.createElement('div');
2660:                 nameEl.textContent = `${info.symbol} ${scrollInfo.name || scrollName}`;
2661:                 nameEl.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
2662:                 nameEl.style.color = info.color;
2663:                 nameEl.style.marginBottom = '4px';
2664:                 card.appendChild(nameEl);
2665: 
2666:                 const descEl = document.createElement('div');
2667:                 descEl.textContent = scrollInfo.description || 'No description';
2668:                 descEl.style.fontSize = '12px';
2669:                 descEl.style.color = '#95a5a6';
2670:                 card.appendChild(descEl);
2671: 
2672:                 const bonusEl = document.createElement('div');
2673:                 bonusEl.textContent = `Draws 2 ${element} stones`;
2674:                 bonusEl.style.fontSize = '11px';
2675:                 bonusEl.style.color = info.color;
2676:                 bonusEl.style.marginTop = '4px';
2677:                 bonusEl.style.fontStyle = 'italic';
2678:                 card.appendChild(bonusEl);
2679: 
2680:                 card.onclick = () => {
2681:                     overlay.remove();
2682:                     selectScroll(element, scrollName, index);
2683:                 };
2684: 
2685:                 modal.appendChild(card);
2686:             });
2687: 
2688:             // Cancel button
2689:             const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
2690:             cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
2691:             Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
2692:                 display: 'block',
2693:                 width: '100%',
2694:                 padding: '10px',
2695:                 margin: '10px 0 0 0',
2696:                 backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
2697:                 color: 'white',
2698:                 border: 'none',
2699:                 borderRadius: '5px',
2700:                 cursor: 'pointer',
2701:                 fontSize: '14px'
2702:             });
2703:             cancelBtn.onclick = () => {
2704:                 overlay.remove();
2705:                 self.cancelSelectionMode();
2706:             };
2707:             modal.appendChild(cancelBtn);
2708: 
2709:             overlay.appendChild(modal);
2710:             document.body.appendChild(overlay);
2711:         };
2712: 
2713:         // Handle scroll selection
2714:         const selectScroll = (element, scrollName, deckIndex) => {
2715:             const deck = sp.scrollDecks[element];
2716:             if (!deck) return;
2717: 
2718:             // Remove from deck and shuffle
2719:             deck.splice(deckIndex, 1);
2720:             if (sp.shuffleDeck) {
2721:                 sp.shuffleDeck(deck);
2722:                 console.log(`⚡ Quick Reflexes: ${element} deck shuffled after search`);
2723:             }
2724: 
2725:             // Add scroll to hand (or cascade if full)
2726:             const scrolls = sp.getPlayerScrolls(false);
2727:             const scrollInfo = sp.patterns?.[scrollName];
2728:             if (scrolls.hand.size >= sp.MAX_HAND_SIZE) {
2729:                 const canCascadeToActive = scrolls.active.size < sp.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE;
2730:                 sp.showCascadePrompt(scrollName, scrollInfo, element, canCascadeToActive);
2731:             } else {
2732:                 scrolls.hand.add(scrollName);
2733:                 sp.updateScrollCount();
2734:             }
2735: 
2736:             // Draw 2 stones of the scroll's element type
2737:             const drawn = self.drawStonesToPool(element, 2, casterIndex);
2738: 
2739:             if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2740:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
2741:             if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
2742: 
2743:             const displayName = scrollInfo?.name || scrollName;
2744:             if (typeof updateStatus === 'function') {
2745:                 updateStatus(`⚡ Quick Reflexes: added "${displayName}" to hand, drew ${drawn} ${element} stone${drawn === 1 ? '' : 's'}. Level 1 scrolls cost 0 AP this turn.`);
2746:             }
2747: 
2748:             // Multiplayer broadcast — includes buffActive flag so the remote client
2749:             // can set activeBuffs.quickReflexes and correctly price level-1 scrolls
2750:             // in the response window affordability check.
2751:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2752:                 broadcastGameAction('quick-reflexes-search', {
2753:                     playerIndex: casterIndex,
2754:                     element: element,
2755:                     scrollName: scrollName,
2756:                     stonesDrawn: drawn,
2757:                     buffActive: true
2758:                 });
2759:             }
2760: 
2761:             self.selectionMode = null;
2762:         };
2763: 
2764:         // Register selection mode for cancellation support
2765:         this.selectionMode = {
2766:             type: 'quick-reflexes',
2767:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
2768:             cleanup: () => {
2769:                 const modal = document.getElementById('quick-reflexes-modal');
2770:                 if (modal) modal.remove();
2771:             }
2772:         };
2773: 
2774:         showPicker();
2775:     },
2776: 
2777:     // Check if extended placement is active for a stone type
2778:     hasExtendedPlacement(stoneType, playerIndex) {
2779:         // Earth extended placement (5 hex range for earth stones)
2780:         if (stoneType === 'earth' && this.activeBuffs.earthExtendedPlacement) {
2781:             const buff = this.activeBuffs.earthExtendedPlacement;
2782:             if (buff.playerIndex === playerIndex) {
2783:                 return { active: true, range: buff.range };
2784:             }
2785:         }
2786:         return { active: false, range: 1 };
2787:     },
2788: 
2789:     // Check if global placement is active
2790:     hasGlobalPlacement(playerIndex) {
2791:         if (this.activeBuffs.globalPlacement) {
2792:             return this.activeBuffs.globalPlacement.playerIndex === playerIndex;
2793:         }
2794:         return false;
2795:     },
2796: 
2797:     // Check if Breath of Power allows moving stones this turn
2798:     hasWindStoneMove(playerIndex) {
2799:         if (this.activeBuffs.breathOfPower) {
2800:             return this.activeBuffs.breathOfPower.playerIndex === playerIndex;
2801:         }
2802:         return false;
2803:     },
2804: 
2805:     // Check if Freedom is active for a specific player
2806:     hasFreedomActive(playerIndex) {
2807:         return this.activeBuffs.freedom?.playerIndex === playerIndex;
2808:     },
2809: 
2810:     // Track last scroll cast this turn (for Reflect)
2811:     lastScrollCastThisTurn: null,
2812:     stonesPlacedThisTurn: 0,
2813: 
2814:     // Called when a scroll is cast - track it for Reflect
2815:     recordScrollCast(scrollName, scrollDefinition) {
2816:         this.lastScrollCastThisTurn = {
2817:             name: scrollName,
2818:             definition: scrollDefinition
2819:         };
2820:     },
2821: 
2822:     // Called when a stone is placed - track for Burning Motivation
2823:     recordStonePlaced() {
2824:         this.stonesPlacedThisTurn++;
2825:     },
2826: 
2827:     // Clear turn tracking (called on End Turn)
2828:     clearTurnTracking() {
2829:         this.lastScrollCastThisTurn = null;
2830:         this.stonesPlacedThisTurn = 0;
2831:     },
2832: 
2833:     // At start of a player's turn: if they have pending Reflects, run all stored scrolls and count as water activation.
2834:     // Returns array of { triggered: true, playerIndex, scrollName, definition } for all reflects processed so caller can broadcast.
2835:     // Interactive scrolls (requiresSelection) are chained sequentially via onComplete callbacks.
2836:     // onAllComplete: optional callback fired after the last reflect fully resolves.
2837:     // Use this to chain processPsychicPending after all reflects finish.
2838:     processReflectPending(playerIndex, onAllComplete) {
2839:         const pendingArray = this.activeBuffs.reflectPending;
2840:         if (!Array.isArray(pendingArray) || pendingArray.length === 0) {
2841:             if (typeof onAllComplete === 'function') onAllComplete();
2842:             return null;
2843:         }
2844: 
2845:         // Filter to only this player's reflects
2846:         const myReflects = pendingArray.filter(p => p.playerIndex === playerIndex);
2847:         if (myReflects.length === 0) {
2848:             if (typeof onAllComplete === 'function') onAllComplete();
2849:             return null;
2850:         }
2851: 
2852:         console.log(`🪞 processReflectPending for player ${playerIndex}: ${myReflects.length} reflects queued:`, myReflects.map(r => r.scrollName));
2853: 
2854:         // Remove this player's reflects from the array
2855:         this.activeBuffs.reflectPending = pendingArray.filter(p => p.playerIndex !== playerIndex);
2856: 
2857:         const results = [];
2858:         let waterActivated = false;
2859:         const self = this;
2860: 
2861:         // Store original active player so we can restore it after interactive selections
2862:         const originalActivePlayer = (typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') ? activePlayerIndex : null;
2863: 
2864:         // Run each pending reflect one at a time. Interactive scrolls (requiresSelection) chain
2865:         // via onComplete so they fully resolve before the next one starts.
2866:         // When all are done, calls onAllComplete so Psychic (or other follow-up) can begin.
2867:         const runNext = (index) => {
2868:             if (index >= myReflects.length) {
2869:                 // All reflects finished — fire the completion callback (starts Psychic, etc.)
2870:                 if (typeof onAllComplete === 'function') onAllComplete();
2871:                 return;
2872:             }
2873: 
2874:             const pending = myReflects[index];
2875:             console.log(`🪞 Processing reflect #${index + 1}/${myReflects.length}: ${pending.scrollName}`);
2876:             const scrollName = pending.scrollName;
2877:             const definition = pending.definition;
2878:             const displayName = definition?.name || scrollName;
2879:             updateStatus(`Reflect triggers: activating ${displayName}!`);
2880: 
2881:             // Broadcast reflect-triggered for this scroll immediately before executing,
2882:             // so remote clients receive them in order and can queue them sequentially.
2883:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2884:                 const fullDef = definition?.element ? definition : (self.spellSystem?.patterns?.[scrollName] || definition);
2885:                 broadcastGameAction('reflect-triggered', {
2886:                     playerIndex: playerIndex,
2887:                     scrollName: scrollName,
2888:                     element: fullDef?.element,
2889:                     elements: fullDef?.element === 'catacomb' ? fullDef?.patterns?.[0]?.map(p => p.type) : null,
2890:                     isCatacomb: fullDef?.element === 'catacomb'
2891:                 });
2892:             }
2893: 
2894:             // Run the reflected scroll's ability with full context.
2895:             // On non-caster clients, pass psychicRemoteClient=true so interactive scrolls
2896:             // (e.g. Shifting Sands tile-swap) skip their UI — the caster's client handles
2897:             // selection and syncs state via broadcast.
2898:             const isReflectCaster = (typeof myPlayerIndex === 'undefined' || myPlayerIndex === null || myPlayerIndex === playerIndex);
2899:             const result = self.execute(scrollName, playerIndex, {
2900:                 spell: definition,
2901:                 scrollName,
2902:                 psychicRemoteClient: !isReflectCaster,
2903:                 onComplete: () => {
2904:                     // Restore activePlayerIndex after interactive selection resolves
2905:                     if (originalActivePlayer !== null && typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') {
2906:                         activePlayerIndex = originalActivePlayer;
2907:                     }
2908:                     if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
2909:                     runNext(index + 1);
2910:                 }
2911:             });
2912: 
2913:             // Restore activePlayerIndex immediately for non-interactive scrolls
2914:             if (!result?.requiresSelection) {
2915:                 if (originalActivePlayer !== null && typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') {
2916:                     activePlayerIndex = originalActivePlayer;
2917:                 }
2918:             }
2919: 
2920:             // Only mark water as activated ONCE (even if multiple reflects trigger)
2921:             if (result.success && self.spellSystem && !waterActivated) {
2922:                 self.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2923:                 const activated = self.spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].activated;
2924:                 activated.add('water');
2925:                 waterActivated = true;
2926:                 console.log(`🪞 processReflectPending activated water for player ${playerIndex}:`, Array.from(activated));
2927:                 if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
2928:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex);
2929:                 }
2930:             }
2931: 
2932:             const fullDef = definition?.element ? definition : (self.spellSystem?.patterns?.[scrollName] || definition);
2933:             results.push({ triggered: true, playerIndex, scrollName, definition: fullDef });
2934: 
2935:             // For non-interactive scrolls, immediately advance to the next
2936:             if (!result?.requiresSelection) {
2937:                 if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
2938:                 runNext(index + 1);
2939:             }
2940:             // Interactive scrolls will call runNext via onComplete when the player finishes
2941:         };
2942: 
2943:         runNext(0);
2944: 
2945:         return results.length > 0 ? results : null;
2946:     },
2947: 
2948:     // At start of a player's turn: if they have pending Psychics, run all stolen scrolls and count as void activation.
2949:     // Returns array of { triggered: true, playerIndex, scrollName, definition } for all psychics processed so caller can broadcast.
2950:     // Interactive scrolls (requiresSelection) are chained sequentially via onComplete callbacks.
2951:     processPsychicPending(playerIndex) {
2952:         const pendingArray = this.activeBuffs.psychicPending;
2953:         if (!Array.isArray(pendingArray) || pendingArray.length === 0) return null;
2954: 
2955:         // Filter to only this player's psychics
2956:         const myPsychics = pendingArray.filter(p => p.playerIndex === playerIndex);
2957:         if (myPsychics.length === 0) return null;
2958: 
2959:         console.log(`🔮 processPsychicPending for player ${playerIndex}: ${myPsychics.length} psychics queued:`, myPsychics.map(r => r.scrollName));
2960: 
2961:         // Remove this player's psychics from the array
2962:         this.activeBuffs.psychicPending = pendingArray.filter(p => p.playerIndex !== playerIndex);
2963: 
2964:         const results = [];
2965:         let voidActivated = false;
2966:         const self = this;
2967: 
2968:         // Run each pending psychic scroll one at a time. If the scroll is interactive
2969:         // (requiresSelection), the next one only starts after the player finishes the
2970:         // selection (via the onComplete callback). Non-interactive scrolls run immediately
2971:         // and advance to the next in the same tick.
2972:         const runNext = (index) => {
2973:             if (index >= myPsychics.length) return; // All done
2974: 
2975:             const pending = myPsychics[index];
2976:             console.log(`🔮 Processing psychic #${index + 1}/${myPsychics.length}: ${pending.scrollName}`);
2977:             const scrollName = pending.scrollName;
2978:             const definition = pending.definition;
2979:             const displayName = definition?.name || scrollName;
2980:             updateStatus(`Psychic triggers: activating ${displayName}!`);
2981: 
2982:             const fullDef = definition?.element ? definition : (self.spellSystem?.patterns?.[scrollName] || definition);
2983: 
2984:             // Broadcast this trigger to remote clients immediately (before interactive selection starts)
2985:             // so they can queue it on their side. This replaces the broadcast loop in game-ui.js.
2986:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2987:                 broadcastGameAction('psychic-triggered', {
2988:                     playerIndex,
2989:                     scrollName,
2990:                     element: fullDef?.element,
2991:                     elements: fullDef?.element === 'catacomb' ? fullDef?.patterns?.[0]?.map(p => p.type) : null,
2992:                     isCatacomb: fullDef?.element === 'catacomb'
2993:                 });
2994:             }
2995: 
2996:             // CRITICAL: Temporarily set activePlayerIndex to the Psychic caster
2997:             // so the stolen scroll executes with the correct player context
2998:             const originalActivePlayer = typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined' ? activePlayerIndex : null;
2999:             if (typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') {
3000:                 activePlayerIndex = playerIndex;
3001:             }
3002: 
3003:             // Run the stolen scroll's ability (with flag to prevent marking its elements as activated)
3004:             // Pass onComplete so interactive scrolls (e.g. Heavy Stomp) can chain the next one
3005:             const result = self.execute(scrollName, playerIndex, {
3006:                 spell: definition,
3007:                 scrollName,
3008:                 skipActivationTracking: true,  // Only void counts toward win condition
3009:                 onComplete: () => {
3010:                     // Restore activePlayerIndex after interactive selection resolves
3011:                     if (originalActivePlayer !== null && typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') {
3012:                         activePlayerIndex = originalActivePlayer;
3013:                     }
3014:                     if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
3015:                     runNext(index + 1);
3016:                 }
3017:             });
3018: 
3019:             // Restore activePlayerIndex immediately for non-interactive scrolls
3020:             // (interactive ones restore it inside the onComplete callback above)
3021:             if (!result?.requiresSelection) {
3022:                 if (originalActivePlayer !== null && typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') {
3023:                     activePlayerIndex = originalActivePlayer;
3024:                 }
3025:             }
3026: 
3027:             // Only mark void as activated ONCE (even if multiple psychics trigger)
3028:             if (result.success && self.spellSystem && !voidActivated) {
3029:                 self.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
3030:                 const activated = self.spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].activated;
3031:                 activated.add('void');
3032:                 voidActivated = true;
3033:                 console.log(`🔮 processPsychicPending activated void for player ${playerIndex}:`, Array.from(activated));
3034:                 if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
3035:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex);
3036:                 }
3037:             }
3038: 
3039:             results.push({ triggered: true, playerIndex, scrollName, definition: fullDef });
3040: 
3041:             // For non-interactive scrolls, immediately advance to the next
3042:             if (!result?.requiresSelection) {
3043:                 if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
3044:                 runNext(index + 1);
3045:             }
3046:             // Interactive scrolls will call runNext via onComplete when the player finishes
3047:         };
3048: 
3049:         runNext(0);
3050: 
3051:         return results.length > 0 ? results : null;
3052:     },
3053: 
3054:     // ============================================
3055:     // WATER SCROLL MODES
3056:     // ============================================
3057: 
3058:     // Water V - Control the Current: This turn, transform water stones that are adjacent to you (no Done button; eligibility updates when you move)
3059:     enterWaterTransformMode(casterIndex, completionPayload) {
3060:         const self = this;
3061: 
3062:         const playerPos = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions[casterIndex] : (typeof playerPosition !== 'undefined' ? playerPosition : null);
3063:         if (!playerPos) {
3064:             updateStatus('Cannot find player position!');
3065:             return;
3066:         }
3067: 
3068:         const initialAdjacent = this.getAdjacentWaterStones(playerPos, casterIndex);
3069:         this.highlightStones(initialAdjacent, '#5894f4');
3070: 
3071:         this.selectionMode = {
3072:             type: 'water-transform',
3073:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
3074:             highlightedStones: initialAdjacent,
3075:             completionPayload: completionPayload || null,
3076: 
3077:             handleStoneClick(stone) {
3078:                 if (stone.type !== 'water') {
3079:                     updateStatus('Only water stones can be transformed.');
3080:                     return;
3081:                 }
3082:                 const pos = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions[self.selectionMode.casterIndex] : (typeof playerPosition !== 'undefined' ? playerPosition : null);
3083:                 if (!pos) return;
3084:                 if (!self.isStoneAdjacentToPosition(stone.x, stone.y, pos.x, pos.y)) {
3085:                     updateStatus('That water stone is not adjacent to you. Move next to it to transform it.');
3086:                     return;
3087:                 }
3088:                 self.showWaterTransformPopup(stone, self.selectionMode.casterIndex, () => {
3089:                     self.refreshWaterTransformHighlights();
3090:                 });
3091:             },
3092: 
3093:             cleanup() {
3094:                 if (self.selectionMode && self.selectionMode.highlightedStones) {
3095:                     self.selectionMode.highlightedStones.forEach(s => self.unhighlightStone(s));
3096:                 }
3097:             }
3098:         };
3099: 
3100:         updateStatus('Control the Current: transform adjacent water stones this turn. Move next to water stones to transform them.');
3101:     },
3102: 
3103:     // Update which stones are highlighted based on current player position (call after move or after a transform)
3104:     refreshWaterTransformHighlights() {
3105:         if (!this.selectionMode || this.selectionMode.type !== 'water-transform') return;
3106:         const casterIndex = this.selectionMode.casterIndex;
3107:         const playerPos = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions[casterIndex] : (typeof playerPosition !== 'undefined' ? playerPosition : null);
3108:         if (!playerPos) return;
3109:         const prev = this.selectionMode.highlightedStones || [];
3110:         prev.forEach(s => this.unhighlightStone(s));
3111:         const next = this.getAdjacentWaterStones(playerPos, casterIndex);
3112:         this.highlightStones(next, '#5894f4');
3113:         this.selectionMode.highlightedStones = next;
3114:     },
3115: 
3116:     // Get water stones adjacent to player (same rule as break/place: exactly one hex step away)
3117:     getAdjacentWaterStones(playerPos, playerIndex) {
3118:         if (typeof placedStones === 'undefined') return [];
3119: 
3120:         return placedStones.filter(stone => {
3121:             if (stone.type !== 'water') return false;
3122:             return this.isStoneAdjacentToPosition(stone.x, stone.y, playerPos.x, playerPos.y);
3123:         });
3124:     },
3125: 
3126:     // Same hex-adjacency logic as game-core isAdjacentToPlayer (one hex step only)
3127:     isStoneAdjacentToPosition(stoneX, stoneY, playerX, playerY) {
3128:         const tileSize = typeof TILE_SIZE !== 'undefined' ? TILE_SIZE : 20;
3129:         const playerHex = this.pixelToHex(playerX, playerY, tileSize);
3130:         const targetHex = this.pixelToHex(stoneX, stoneY, tileSize);
3131:         const dq = Math.abs(playerHex.q - targetHex.q);
3132:         const dr = Math.abs(playerHex.r - targetHex.r);
3133:         const ds = Math.abs((-playerHex.q - playerHex.r) - (-targetHex.q - targetHex.r));
3134:         const hexDistance = Math.max(dq, dr, ds);
3135:         return hexDistance === 1;
3136:     },
3137: 
3138:     pixelToHex(x, y, s) {
3139:         const q = (x * Math.sqrt(3) / 3 - y / 3) / s;
3140:         const r = (y * 2 / 3) / s;
3141:         return this.hexRound(q, r);
3142:     },
3143: 
3144:     hexRound(q, r) {
3145:         const s = -q - r;
3146:         let rq = Math.round(q);
3147:         let rr = Math.round(r);
3148:         const rs = Math.round(s);
3149:         const qDiff = Math.abs(rq - q);
3150:         const rDiff = Math.abs(rr - r);
3151:         const sDiff = Math.abs(rs - s);
3152:         if (qDiff > rDiff && qDiff > sDiff) rq = -rr - rs;
3153:         else if (rDiff > sDiff) rr = -rq - rs;
3154:         return { q: rq, r: rr };
3155:     },
3156: 
3157:     // Show popup to transform water stone
3158:     showWaterTransformPopup(stone, casterIndex, onComplete) {
3159:         const existing = document.getElementById('water-transform-modal');
3160:         if (existing) existing.remove();
3161:

3163:         overlay.id = 'water-transform-modal';
3164:         Object.assign(overlay.style, {
3165:             position: 'fixed',
3166:             top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
3167:             backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
3168:             zIndex: '3000',
3169:             display: 'flex',
3170:             justifyContent: 'center',
3171:             alignItems: 'center'
3172:         });
3173:

3175:         Object.assign(modal.style, {
3176:             backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',

3185:         titleEl.textContent = 'Transform Water Stone';
3186:         titleEl.style.marginBottom = '10px';

3194:         descEl.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
3195:         modal.appendChild(descEl);
3196:

3198:         const elementColors = {
3199:             earth: '#69d83a',
3200:             fire: '#ed1b43',
3201:             wind: '#ffce00',

3210:             btn.textContent = `${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} (${available} available)`;
3211:             btn.disabled = available <= 0;
3212:             Object.assign(btn.style, {
3213:                 display: 'block',

3215:                 padding: '12px',
3216:                 margin: '8px 0',
3217:                 backgroundColor: available > 0 ? '#2d2d44' : '#1a1a1a',
3218:                 color: available > 0 ? elementColors[element] : '#555',
3219:                 border: `2px solid ${available > 0 ? elementColors[element] : '#333'}`,
3220:                 borderRadius: '5px',
3221:                 cursor: available > 0 ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed',
3222:                 fontSize: '14px',
3223:                 fontWeight: 'bold'
3224:             });
3225: 
3226:             if (available > 0) {
3227:                 btn.onmouseenter = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#3d3d54';
3228:                 btn.onmouseleave = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
3229:                 btn.onclick = () => {
3230:                     overlay.remove();

3232:                     if (onComplete) onComplete();
3233:                 };
3234:             }
3235:             modal.appendChild(btn);
3236:         });
3237:

3239:         cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
3240:         Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {

3249:         });
3250:         cancelBtn.onclick = () => overlay.remove();

3256: 
3257:     // Transform a water stone into another element
3258:     transformWaterStone(stone, newElement, casterIndex) {
3259:         // Return water stone to source pool
3260:         if (typeof stonePools !== 'undefined') {
3261:             stonePools.water = (stonePools.water || 0) + 1;
3262:         }
3263: 
3264:         // Take stone from new element's source pool
3265:         if (typeof stonePools !== 'undefined') {
3266:             stonePools[newElement] = (stonePools[newElement] || 0) - 1;
3267:         }
3268: 
3269:         // Update the stone's type and visual
3270:         stone.type = newElement;
3271: 
3272:         // Remove any water stone indicators (mimicry/chain rings) before transformation
3273:         if (stone.element) {
3274:             const mimicryIndicator = stone.element.querySelector('.mimicry-indicator');
3275:             if (mimicryIndicator) {
3276:                 mimicryIndicator.remove();
3277:             }
3278:             const chainIndicator = stone.element.querySelector('.chain-indicator');
3279:             if (chainIndicator) {
3280:                 chainIndicator.remove();
3281:             }
3282:         }
3283: 
3284:         // Update the stone's visual appearance - both color and symbol
3285:         if (stone.element && typeof STONE_TYPES !== 'undefined' && STONE_TYPES[newElement]) {
3286:             const circle = stone.element.querySelector('circle');
3287:             const text = stone.element.querySelector('text');
3288: 
3289:             if (circle) {
3290:                 circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[newElement].color);
3291:             }
3292: 
3293:             if (text) {
3294:                 text.textContent = STONE_TYPES[newElement].symbol;
3295:             }
3296:         }
3297: 
3298:         updateStatus(`Transformed water stone into ${newElement}!`);
3299: 
3300:         // Broadcast in multiplayer
3301:         if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
3302:             broadcastGameAction('water-stone-transformed', {
3303:                 stoneX: stone.x,
3304:                 stoneY: stone.y,
3305:                 newElement: newElement
3306:             });
3307:         }
3308: 
3309:         // Signal completion to trigger win condition broadcast
3310:         // Note: Control the Current allows multiple transforms per turn, so we call this after each transform
3311:         // The win condition is only activated once (when the scroll is first cast), but we need to broadcast it
3312:         if (this.selectionMode && this.selectionMode.completionPayload) {
3313:             const payload = this.selectionMode.completionPayload;
3314:             if (this.spellSystem && typeof this.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
3315:                 this.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(payload.scrollName, payload.effectName, payload.spell);
3316:             }
3317:         }
3318:     },
3319: 
3320:     // Highlight stones with click handlers
3321:     highlightStones(stones, color) {
3322:         stones.forEach(stone => this.highlightStone(stone, color));
3323:     },
3324: 
3325:     highlightStone(stone, color) {
3326:         if (!stone.element) return;
3327:         const circle = stone.element.querySelector('circle');
3328:         if (circle) {
3329:             circle.setAttribute('data-original-stroke', circle.getAttribute('stroke') || 'none');
3330:             circle.setAttribute('data-original-stroke-width', circle.getAttribute('stroke-width') || '0');
3331:             circle.setAttribute('stroke', color);
3332:             circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '4');
3333: 
3334:             // Add pulsing animation class
3335:             circle.style.animation = 'stonePulse 1s ease-in-out infinite';
3336: 
3337:             // Make clickable with cursor change
3338:             stone.element.style.cursor = 'pointer';
3339:             stone.element.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
3340: 
3341:             // Add direct click handler to stone element for more reliable clicking
3342:             const self = this;
3343:             stone._clickHandler = function(e) {
3344:                 e.preventDefault();
3345:                 e.stopPropagation();
3346:                 if (self.selectionMode && self.selectionMode.handleStoneClick) {
3347:                     self.selectionMode.handleStoneClick(stone);
3348:                 }
3349:             };
3350:             stone.element.addEventListener('click', stone._clickHandler);
3351: 
3352:             // Also handle touch for mobile
3353:             stone._touchHandler = function(e) {
3354:                 e.preventDefault();
3355:                 if (self.selectionMode && self.selectionMode.handleStoneClick) {
3356:                     self.selectionMode.handleStoneClick(stone);
3357:                 }
3358:             };
3359:             stone.element.addEventListener('touchend', stone._touchHandler);
3360:         }
3361: 
3362:         // Add pulse animation if not already in DOM
3363:         if (!document.getElementById('stone-pulse-style')) {
3364:             const style = document.createElement('style');
3365:             style.id = 'stone-pulse-style';
3366:             style.textContent = `
3367:                 @keyframes stonePulse {
3368:                     0%, 100% { stroke-width: 4px; opacity: 1; }
3369:                     50% { stroke-width: 6px; opacity: 0.8; }
3370:                 }
3371:             `;
3372:             document.head.appendChild(style);
3373:         }
3374:     },
3375: 
3376:     unhighlightStone(stone) {
3377:         if (!stone.element) return;
3378:         const circle = stone.element.querySelector('circle');
3379:         if (circle) {
3380:             const origStroke = circle.getAttribute('data-original-stroke') || 'none';
3381:             const origWidth = circle.getAttribute('data-original-stroke-width') || '0';
3382:             circle.setAttribute('stroke', origStroke);
3383:             circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', origWidth);
3384:             circle.style.animation = '';
3385:         }
3386: 
3387:         // Remove click handlers
3388:         if (stone._clickHandler) {
3389:             stone.element.removeEventListener('click', stone._clickHandler);
3390:             delete stone._clickHandler;
3391:         }
3392:         if (stone._touchHandler) {
3393:             stone.element.removeEventListener('touchend', stone._touchHandler);
3394:             delete stone._touchHandler;
3395:         }
3396: 
3397:         // Reset cursor
3398:         stone.element.style.cursor = '';
3399:         stone.element.style.pointerEvents = '';
3400:     },
3401: 
3402:     // Water III - Inspiring Draught: Select 1 deck, draw 2 from it, add to hand, then show ALL scrolls
3403:     // of that element and player chooses one to put back; that deck is then shuffled.
3404:     enterInspiringDraughtMode(casterIndex) {
3405:         const self = this;
3406:         const spellSystem = this.spellSystem;
3407:         if (!spellSystem) return;
3408: 
3409:         this.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(casterIndex);
3410:         const playerScrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[casterIndex];
3411:         if (!playerScrolls) return;
3412: 
3413:         // Step 1: Select ONE deck to draw from
3414:         this.showDeckSelectionModal(1, (selectedDecks) => {
3415:             if (!selectedDecks || selectedDecks.length === 0) {
3416:                 updateStatus('No deck selected.');
3417:                 return;
3418:             }
3419:             const deckType = selectedDecks[0];
3420:             const deck = spellSystem.scrollDecks?.[deckType];
3421:             if (!deck || deck.length === 0) {
3422:                 updateStatus('That deck has no scrolls!');
3423:                 return;
3424:             }
3425: 
3426:             // Step 2: Draw up to 2 scrolls from that deck (add to hand immediately)
3427:             const drawnScrolls = [];
3428:             for (let i = 0; i < 2 && deck.length > 0; i++) {
3429:                 const scroll = deck.pop();
3430:                 drawnScrolls.push(scroll);
3431:                 playerScrolls.hand.add(scroll);
3432:             }
3433: 
3434:             if (drawnScrolls.length === 0) {
3435:                 updateStatus('No scrolls available to draw!');
3436:                 return;
3437:             }
3438: 
3439:             // Step 3: Collect ALL scrolls the player has of this element (hand + active)
3440:             const getScrollElement = spellSystem.getScrollElement.bind(spellSystem);
3441:             const handOfType = [...playerScrolls.hand].filter(name => getScrollElement(name) === deckType);
3442:             const activeOfType = [...(playerScrolls.active || [])].filter(name => getScrollElement(name) === deckType);
3443:             const allOfElement = [...new Set([...handOfType, ...activeOfType])];
3444: 
3445:             if (allOfElement.length === 0) {
3446:                 updateStatus('No scrolls of that element to put back.');
3447:                 if (spellSystem.updateScrollCount) spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
3448:                 return;
3449:             }
3450: 
3451:             const elementName = deckType.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + deckType.slice(1);
3452: 
3453:             // Step 4: Show modal - choose one scroll to put back; deck will be shuffled
3454:             this.showScrollSelectionModal(
3455:                 allOfElement,
3456:                 `Choose one scroll to put back into the ${elementName} deck (deck will be shuffled):`,
3457:                 (selectedToReturn) => {
3458:                     // Remove from hand or active
3459:                     playerScrolls.hand.delete(selectedToReturn);
3460:                     playerScrolls.active.delete(selectedToReturn);
3461:                     // Put back into deck and shuffle
3462:                     spellSystem.scrollDecks[deckType].push(selectedToReturn);
3463:                     this.shuffleDeck(spellSystem.scrollDecks[deckType]);
3464:                     updateStatus(`Put 1 scroll back into the ${elementName} deck and shuffled.`);
3465:                     if (spellSystem.updateScrollCount) spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
3466:                 }
3467:             );
3468:         });
3469:     },
3470: 
3471:     ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex) {
3472:         if (this.spellSystem && typeof this.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure === 'function') {
3473:             this.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
3474:         }
3475:     },
3476: 
3477:     // Generic deck draw mode (e.g. other effects: select N decks, draw 1 from each)
3478:     enterDeckDrawMode(casterIndex, drawCount) {
3479:         const self = this;
3480:         const drawnScrolls = [];
3481:         const deckSources = [];
3482: 
3483:         this.showDeckSelectionModal(drawCount, (selectedDecks) => {
3484:             selectedDecks.forEach(deckType => {
3485:                 if (this.spellSystem?.scrollDecks?.[deckType]?.length > 0) {
3486:                     const scroll = this.spellSystem.scrollDecks[deckType].pop();
3487:                     drawnScrolls.push({ scroll, deckType });
3488:                 }
3489:             });
3490: 
3491:             if (drawnScrolls.length === 0) {
3492:                 updateStatus('No scrolls available to draw!');
3493:                 return;
3494:             }
3495: 
3496:             if (drawnScrolls.length === 1) {
3497:                 const playerScrolls = this.spellSystem?.playerScrolls?.[casterIndex];
3498:                 if (playerScrolls) {
3499:                     this.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(casterIndex);
3500:                     playerScrolls.hand.add(drawnScrolls[0].scroll);
3501:                 }
3502:                 updateStatus(`Drew 1 scroll (kept it).`);
3503:                 if (this.spellSystem?.updateScrollCount) this.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
3504:                 return;
3505:             }
3506: 
3507:             this.showScrollSelectionModal(
3508:                 drawnScrolls.map(d => d.scroll),
3509:                 'Select one scroll to put back:',
3510:                 (selectedToReturn) => {
3511:                     const playerScrolls = this.spellSystem?.playerScrolls?.[casterIndex];
3512:                     drawnScrolls.forEach(({ scroll, deckType }) => {
3513:                         if (scroll === selectedToReturn) {
3514:                             this.spellSystem.scrollDecks[deckType].push(scroll);
3515:                             this.shuffleDeck(this.spellSystem.scrollDecks[deckType]);
3516:                         } else {
3517:                             if (playerScrolls) playerScrolls.hand.add(scroll);
3518:                         }
3519:                     });
3520:                     updateStatus('Drew 2 scrolls, put 1 back.');
3521:                     if (this.spellSystem?.updateScrollCount) this.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
3522:                 }
3523:             );
3524:         });
3525:     },
3526: 
3527:     // Water IV - Wandering River: Change tile element (any non-player tile)
3528:     enterTileElementChangeMode(casterIndex) {
3529:         const self = this;
3530: 
3531:         // Any tile except player tiles
3532:         const eligibleTiles = this.getEligibleTilesForWanderingRiver();
3533: 
3534:         if (eligibleTiles.length === 0) {
3535:             updateStatus('No tiles to modify!');
3536:             return;
3537:         }
3538:

3549:             cancelBtn: cancelBtn,

3551:             handleTileClick(tile) {
3552:                 if (!eligibleTiles.find(t => t.id === tile.id)) {
3553:                     updateStatus('Cannot modify this tile.');
3554:                     return;
3555:                 }
3556:

3562:                         tileId: tile.id,

3565:                         expiresNextTurn: true,
3566:                         playerIndex: casterIndex
3567:                     };

3569:

3571:                     self.applyWanderingRiverIndicator(tile, selectedElement);

3574:                     if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
3575:                         broadcastGameAction('wandering-river-apply', {
3576:                             tileId: tile.id,
3577:                             newElement: selectedElement,
3578:                             playerIndex: casterIndex
3579:                         });
3580:                     }
3581: 
3582:                     updateStatus(`Tile now counts as ${selectedElement} until your next turn!`);
3583:                     self.selectionMode.cleanup();
3584:                     self.selectionMode = null;
3585:                 });
3586:             },
3587: 
3588:             cleanup() {
3589:                 eligibleTiles.forEach(tile => self.unhighlightTile(tile));
3590:                 if (cancelBtn && cancelBtn.parentNode) {
3591:                     cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(cancelBtn);
3592:                 }
3593:             }
3594:         };
3595:

3597:     },

3599:     // Effective tile element for game logic (Wandering River override)
3600:     getEffectiveTileElement(tile) {
3601:         if (!tile || !this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver || !Array.isArray(this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver)) return tile ? tile.shrineType : null;
3602:         const id = Number(tile.id);
3603:         const entry = this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver.find(e => Number(e.tileId) === id);
3604:         return entry ? entry.newElement : (tile.shrineType || null);
3605:     },
3606: 
3607:     // Add visual indicator: tile looks like the chosen element (symbol image + color)
3608:     applyWanderingRiverIndicator(tile, newElement) {
3609:         if (!tile || !tile.element) return;
3610:         const stoneTypes = (typeof STONE_TYPES !== 'undefined') ? STONE_TYPES : {};
3611:         const info = stoneTypes[newElement] || { color: '#888', img: null };
3612:         tile.element.classList.add('wandering-river-transformed', 'wandering-river-' + newElement);
3613:         tile.element.setAttribute('data-wandering-river-element', newElement);
3614:         // Also update data-shrine so the elemental hover tint applies
3615:         tile.element.setAttribute('data-shrine', newElement);
3616: 
3617:         let label = tile.element.querySelector('.wandering-river-label');
3618:         if (label) label.remove();
3619: 
3620:         // Use the updated stone symbol image instead of a text character
3621:         const imgSrc = info.img || null;
3622:         if (imgSrc) {
3623:             label = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
3624:             label.setAttribute('class', 'wandering-river-label');
3625:             // Circular background in element color
3626:             const bg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
3627:             bg.setAttribute('cx', '0'); bg.setAttribute('cy', '-8');
3628:             bg.setAttribute('r', '9');
3629:             bg.setAttribute('fill', info.color);
3630:             bg.setAttribute('opacity', '0.7');
3631:             bg.setAttribute('stroke', '#000'); bg.setAttribute('stroke-width', '1');
3632:             label.appendChild(bg);
3633:             const img = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'image');
3634:             img.setAttribute('href', imgSrc);
3635:             img.setAttribute('x', '-9'); img.setAttribute('y', '-17');
3636:             img.setAttribute('width', '18'); img.setAttribute('height', '18');
3637:             img.style.mixBlendMode = newElement === 'catacomb' ? 'normal' : 'screen';
3638:             label.appendChild(img);
3639:         } else {
3640:             // Fallback: text symbol
3641:             label = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
3642:             label.setAttribute('class', 'wandering-river-label');
3643:             label.setAttribute('x', 0); label.setAttribute('y', -8);
3644:             label.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
3645:             label.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
3646:             label.setAttribute('fill', info.color);
3647:             label.setAttribute('font-size', '16'); label.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
3648:             label.setAttribute('stroke', '#000'); label.setAttribute('stroke-width', '1');
3649:             label.textContent = newElement.charAt(0).toUpperCase();
3650:         }
3651:         tile.element.appendChild(label);
3652:     },
3653: 
3654:     // Remove Wandering River indicator when buff expires
3655:     removeWanderingRiverIndicator(tile) {
3656:         if (!tile || !tile.element) return;
3657:         const el = tile.element.getAttribute('data-wandering-river-element');
3658:         if (el) tile.element.classList.remove('wandering-river-' + el);
3659:         tile.element.classList.remove('wandering-river-transformed');
3660:         tile.element.removeAttribute('data-wandering-river-element');
3661:         const label = tile.element.querySelector('.wandering-river-label');
3662:         if (label) label.remove();
3663:         // Restore data-shrine to the tile's actual element
3664:         if (tile.shrineType && tile.shrineType !== 'player') {
3665:             tile.element.setAttribute('data-shrine', tile.shrineType);
3666:         } else {
3667:             tile.element.removeAttribute('data-shrine');
3668:         }
3669:     },
3670: 
3671:     // Clear Wandering River buffs for a player when their next turn starts
3672:     clearWanderingRiverForPlayer(playerIndex) {
3673:         if (!this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver || !Array.isArray(this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver)) return;
3674:         const removed = this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver.filter(e => e.playerIndex === playerIndex);
3675:         this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver = this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver.filter(e => e.playerIndex !== playerIndex);
3676:         if (typeof placedTiles !== 'undefined') {
3677:             removed.forEach(e => {
3678:                 const tid = Number(e.tileId);
3679:                 const tile = placedTiles.find(t => Number(t.id) === tid);
3680:                 if (tile) this.removeWanderingRiverIndicator(tile);
3681:             });
3682:         }
3683:     },
