3686:     // FIRE SCROLL MODES
3687:     // ============================================
3688: 
3689:     // Fire III - Sacrificial Pyre: Activate scroll from hand ignoring pattern
3690:     enterScrollSacrificeMode(casterIndex) {
3691:         const self = this;
3692: 
3693:         // Get player's scrolls
3694:         const playerScrolls = this.spellSystem?.playerScrolls?.[casterIndex];
3695:         if (!playerScrolls || playerScrolls.hand.size === 0) {
3696:             updateStatus('No scrolls to sacrifice!');
3697:             return;
3698:         }
3699: 
3700:         // Only show the modal on the caster's client (in multiplayer)
3701:         const isMultiplayer = typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.isMultiplayer;
3702:         const myPlayerIndex = typeof window !== 'undefined' ? window.myPlayerIndex : null;
3703:         if (isMultiplayer && myPlayerIndex !== null && casterIndex !== myPlayerIndex) {
3704:             console.log(`🔥 Sacrificial Pyre: Skipping modal for non-local player ${casterIndex} (I am player ${myPlayerIndex})`);
3705:             return;
3706:         }
3707: 
3708:         const scrollArray = Array.from(playerScrolls.hand);
3709:         this.showScrollSelectionModal(scrollArray, 'Select a scroll to sacrifice and activate:', (selectedScroll) => {
3710:             // Remove from hand
3711:             playerScrolls.hand.delete(selectedScroll);
3712: 
3713:             // Add to common area (not discard) using proper method
3714:             if (this.spellSystem.discardToCommonArea) {
3715:                 this.spellSystem.discardToCommonArea(selectedScroll);
3716:             }
3717: 
3718:             // Get the scroll definition
3719:             const scrollDef = this.spellSystem?.patterns?.[selectedScroll];
3720:             if (!scrollDef) {
3721:                 updateStatus(`Error: Could not find scroll definition for ${selectedScroll}`);
3722:                 return;
3723:             }
3724: 
3725:             // Activate the scroll: add stones to pool and track element
3726:             if (scrollDef.element === 'catacomb') {
3727:                 // Catacomb scrolls: count how many of each element and add stones
3728:                 const elementCounts = {};
3729:                 if (scrollDef.patterns && scrollDef.patterns[0]) {
3730:                     scrollDef.patterns[0].forEach(pos => {
3731:                         elementCounts[pos.type] = (elementCounts[pos.type] || 0) + 1;
3732:                     });
3733:                 }
3734: 
3735:                 const rewards = [];
3736:                 Object.entries(elementCounts).forEach(([element, count]) => {
3737:                     const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : [];
3738:                     const poolCaps = typeof playerPoolCapacity !== 'undefined' ? playerPoolCapacity : {};
3739:                     if (pools[casterIndex] && poolCaps) {
3740:                         pools[casterIndex][element] = Math.min(
3741:                             poolCaps[element] || 5,
3742:                             (pools[casterIndex][element] || 0) + count
3743:                         );
3744:                         rewards.push(`+${count} ${element}`);
3745:                     }
3746:                     if (typeof updateStoneCount === 'function') updateStoneCount(element);
3747:                 });
3748:                 updateStatus(`Sacrificed ${scrollDef.name}! Added ${rewards.join(', ')} stones!`);
3749:             } else {
3750:                 // Regular element scrolls: add stones based on level
3751:                 const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : [];
3752:                 const poolCaps = typeof playerPoolCapacity !== 'undefined' ? playerPoolCapacity : {};
3753:                 if (pools[casterIndex] && poolCaps) {
3754:                     pools[casterIndex][scrollDef.element] = Math.min(
3755:                         poolCaps[scrollDef.element] || 5,
3756:                         (pools[casterIndex][scrollDef.element] || 0) + scrollDef.level
3757:                     );
3758:                 }
3759:                 if (typeof updateStoneCount === 'function') updateStoneCount(scrollDef.element);
3760: 
3761:                 updateStatus(`Sacrificed ${scrollDef.name}! Added +${scrollDef.level} ${scrollDef.element} stones!`);
3762:             }
3763: 
3764:             // NOTE: Only FIRE is marked as activated (from casting Sacrificial Pyre itself)
3765:             // The sacrificed scroll's elements do NOT count toward win condition
3766:             // Fire activation is already handled by the normal executeSpell flow for FIRE_SCROLL_3
3767: 
3768:             // If the scroll has a special effect, execute it too
3769:             const effect = self.getEffect(selectedScroll);
3770:             if (effect) {
3771:                 self.execute(selectedScroll, casterIndex, {});
3772:             }
3773: 
3774:             // Broadcast stone gains to other players (for resource tracking only, not win condition)
3775:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') {
3776:                 syncPlayerState();
3777:             }
3778: 
3779:             if (this.spellSystem?.updateScrollCount) {
3780:                 this.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
3781:             }
3782:             if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') {
3783:                 updateCommonAreaUI();
3784:             }
3785:         });
3786:     },
3787: 
3788:         // Fire IV - Combust: Destroy stones on a tile
3789:     enterScorchedEarthMode(casterIndex) {
3790:         const self = this;
3791: 
3792:         // Get tiles that have stones on them (but not player tiles)
3793:         const tilesWithStones = (typeof placedTiles !== 'undefined' ? placedTiles : []).filter(tile => {
3794:             if (tile.isPlayerTile) return false;
3795:             return this.tileHasStones(tile);
3796:         });
3797: 
3798:         if (tilesWithStones.length === 0) {
3799:             updateStatus('No tiles with stones to combust!');
3800:             return;
3801:         }
3802: 
3803:         this.highlightTiles(tilesWithStones, '#ed1b43');
3804: 
3805:         const cancelBtn = this.createCancelButton('Cancel', () => {
3806:             self.cancelSelectionMode();
3807:         });
3808: 
3809:         this.selectionMode = {
3810:             type: 'scorched-earth',
3811:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
3812:             eligibleTiles: tilesWithStones,
3813:             cancelBtn: cancelBtn,
3814: 
3815:             handleTileClick(tile) {
3816:                 if (!tilesWithStones.find(t => t.id === tile.id)) {
3817:                     updateStatus('No stones on this tile to destroy.');
3818:                     return;
3819:                 }
3820:

3822:                 self.destroyStonesOnTile(tile);
3823:                 updateStatus('Combust! All stones on the tile destroyed.');
3824:

3826:                 self.selectionMode = null;
3827:             },
3828:

3830:                 tilesWithStones.forEach(tile => self.unhighlightTile(tile));
3831:                 if (cancelBtn && cancelBtn.parentNode) {
3832:                     cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(cancelBtn);
3833:                 }
3834:             }
3835:         };
3836: 
3837:         updateStatus('Select a tile to destroy all stones on it.');
3838:     },
3839: 
3840:     // Fire IV - Transmute: discard stones/scrolls for AP
3841:     enterTransmuteMode(casterIndex) {
3842:         const self = this;
3843:         const overlayId = 'transmute-modal';
3844:         const existing = document.getElementById(overlayId);
3845:         if (existing) existing.remove();
3846: 
3847:         const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.playerPools);
3848:         const source = typeof stonePools !== 'undefined' ? stonePools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.stonePools);
3849:         const sourceCap = typeof sourcePoolCapacity !== 'undefined' ? sourcePoolCapacity : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.sourcePoolCapacity);
3850: 
3851:         const playerScrolls = this.spellSystem?.playerScrolls?.[casterIndex];
3852:         if (!playerScrolls) {
3853:             updateStatus('Transmute failed: no scroll data for player.');
3854:             return;
3855:         }
3856: 
3857:         let totalGained = 0;
3858:         const getMaxTotalAP = () => {
3859:             const voidCap = pools?.[casterIndex]?.void || 0;
3860:             return 5 + voidCap;
3861:         };
3862:         const getCurrentTotalAP = () => {
3863:             return (typeof currentAP !== 'undefined' ? currentAP : 0) + (typeof voidAP !== 'undefined' ? voidAP : 0);
3864:         };
3865:         const clampVoidAPToPool = () => {
3866:             if (typeof voidAP === 'undefined' || !pools?.[casterIndex]) return;
3867:             const maxVoid = pools[casterIndex].void || 0;
3868:             const oldVoid = voidAP;
3869:             voidAP = Math.min(voidAP, maxVoid);
3870:             if (oldVoid !== voidAP) {
3871:                 const display = document.getElementById('void-ap-display');
3872:                 if (display) {
3873:                     if (voidAP > 0) {
3874:                         display.textContent = `(+${voidAP} Void AP)`;
3875:                         display.style.display = 'inline';
3876:                     } else {
3877:                         display.style.display = 'none';
3878:                     }
3879:                 }
3880:             }
3881:         };
3882: 
3883:         const gainAPCapped = (amount) => {
3884:             const maxTotal = getMaxTotalAP();
3885:             const currentTotal = getCurrentTotalAP();
3886:             const room = Math.max(0, maxTotal - currentTotal);
3887:             const gain = Math.min(amount, room);
3888:             if (gain <= 0) {
3889:                 updateStatus('Transmute: AP is already at max.');
3890:                 return 0;
3891:             }
3892:             if (typeof addAP === 'function') addAP(gain);
3893:             return gain;
3894:         };
3895:         const atMaxAP = () => getCurrentTotalAP() >= getMaxTotalAP();
3896: 
3897:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
3898:         overlay.id = overlayId;
3899:         Object.assign(overlay.style, {
3900:             position: 'fixed',
3901:             top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
3902:             backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
3903:             zIndex: '3000',
3904:             display: 'flex',
3905:             justifyContent: 'center',
3906:             alignItems: 'center'
3907:         });
3908: 
3909:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
3910:         Object.assign(modal.style, {
3911:             backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
3912:             border: '2px solid #ed1b43',
3913:             borderRadius: '10px',
3914:             padding: '20px',
3915:             color: 'white',
3916:             minWidth: '320px',
3917:             maxWidth: '420px'
3918:         });
3919: 
3920:         const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
3921:         titleEl.textContent = 'Transmute';
3922:         titleEl.style.marginBottom = '10px';
3923:         titleEl.style.textAlign = 'center';
3924:         titleEl.style.color = '#ed1b43';
3925:         modal.appendChild(titleEl);
3926: 
3927:         const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
3928:         subtitle.textContent = 'Discard stones or scrolls to gain 2 AP each.';
3929:         subtitle.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
3930:         subtitle.style.fontSize = '13px';
3931:         subtitle.style.marginBottom = '10px';
3932:         subtitle.style.textAlign = 'center';
3933:         modal.appendChild(subtitle);
3934: 
3935:         const gainedEl = document.createElement('div');
3936:         gainedEl.textContent = 'AP gained: 0';
3937:         gainedEl.style.textAlign = 'center';
3938:         gainedEl.style.marginBottom = '10px';
3939:         modal.appendChild(gainedEl);
3940: 
3941:         const clearSuppress = () => {
3942:             const sup = self.activeBuffs.suppressVoidAPSync;
3943:             if (sup && sup.playerIndex === casterIndex) {
3944:                 delete self.activeBuffs.suppressVoidAPSync;
3945:             }
3946:         };
3947: 
3948:         const updateGained = () => {
3949:             gainedEl.textContent = `AP gained: ${totalGained}`;
3950:         };
3951: 
3952:         const sectionHeader = (text) => {
3953:             const h = document.createElement('div');
3954:             h.textContent = text;
3955:             h.style.marginTop = '10px';
3956:             h.style.marginBottom = '6px';
3957:             h.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
3958:             h.style.color = '#f39c12';
3959:             return h;
3960:         };
3961: 
3962:         // Stones
3963:         modal.appendChild(sectionHeader('Stones'));
3964:         const stoneTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
3965:         stoneTypes.forEach(type => {
3966:             const count = pools?.[casterIndex]?.[type] || 0;
3967:             const btn = document.createElement('button');
3968:             btn.textContent = `Discard 1 ${type} (${count})`;
3969:             Object.assign(btn.style, {
3970:                 display: 'block',
3971:                 width: '100%',
3972:                 padding: '8px',
3973:                 margin: '4px 0',
3974:                 backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
3975:                 color: 'white',
3976:                 border: '1px solid #444',
3977:                 borderRadius: '5px',
3978:                 cursor: count > 0 ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed',
3979:                 opacity: count > 0 ? '1' : '0.4'
3980:             });
3981:             btn.onclick = () => {
3982:                 const available = pools?.[casterIndex]?.[type] || 0;
3983:                 if (atMaxAP()) {
3984:                     updateStatus('Transmute: AP is already at max.');
3985:                     return;
3986:                 }
3987:                 if (available <= 0) return;
3988:                 pools[casterIndex][type] = available - 1;
3989:                 if (source && sourceCap && typeof source[type] === 'number') {
3990:                     source[type] = Math.min(sourceCap[type], source[type] + 1);
3991:                 }
3992:                 if (typeof updateStoneCount === 'function') updateStoneCount(type);
3993:                 if (type === 'void') clampVoidAPToPool();
3994:                 const gained = gainAPCapped(2);
3995:                 totalGained += gained;
3996:                 btn.textContent = `Discard 1 ${type} (${pools[casterIndex][type]})`;
3997:                 updateGained();
3998:                 if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
3999:             };
4000:             modal.appendChild(btn);
4001:         });
4002: 
4003:         // Scrolls
4004:         modal.appendChild(sectionHeader('Scrolls'));
4005:         const renderScrollButtons = (label, scrollSet) => {
4006:             const arr = Array.from(scrollSet || []);
4007:             if (arr.length === 0) {
4008:                 const empty = document.createElement('div');
4009:                 empty.textContent = `No ${label} scrolls`;
4010:                 empty.style.color = '#7f8c8d';
4011:                 empty.style.fontSize = '12px';
4012:                 empty.style.marginBottom = '4px';
4013:                 modal.appendChild(empty);
4014:                 return;
4015:             }
4016:             arr.forEach(scrollName => {
4017:                 const def = self.spellSystem?.patterns?.[scrollName];
4018:                 const btn = document.createElement('button');
4019:                 btn.textContent = `Discard ${def?.name || scrollName} (${label})`;
4020:                 Object.assign(btn.style, {
4021:                     display: 'block',
4022:                     width: '100%',
4023:                     padding: '8px',
4024:                     margin: '4px 0',
4025:                     backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
4026:                     color: 'white',
4027:                     border: '1px solid #444',
4028:                     borderRadius: '5px',
4029:                     cursor: 'pointer'
4030:                 });
4031:                 btn.onclick = () => {
4032:                     if (atMaxAP()) {
4033:                         updateStatus('Transmute: AP is already at max.');
4034:                         return;
4035:                     }
4036:                     if (label === 'hand') playerScrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
4037:                     if (label === 'active') playerScrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
4038:                     if (self.spellSystem?.discardToCommonArea) {
4039:                         self.spellSystem.discardToCommonArea(scrollName);
4040:                     }
4041:                     if (self.spellSystem?.updateScrollCount) self.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
4042:                     if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
4043:                     const gained = gainAPCapped(2);
4044:                     totalGained += gained;
4045:                     btn.disabled = true;
4046:                     btn.style.opacity = '0.5';
4047:                     updateGained();
4048:                     if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
4049:                 };
4050:                 modal.appendChild(btn);
4051:             });
4052:         };
4053: 
4054:         renderScrollButtons('hand', playerScrolls.hand);
4055:         renderScrollButtons('active', playerScrolls.active);
4056: 
4057:         // Done button
4058:         const doneBtn = document.createElement('button');
4059:         doneBtn.textContent = 'Done';
4060:         Object.assign(doneBtn.style, {
4061:             display: 'block',
4062:             width: '100%',
4063:             padding: '10px',
4064:             margin: '10px 0 0 0',
4065:             backgroundColor: '#27ae60',
4066:             color: 'white',
4067:             border: 'none',
4068:             borderRadius: '5px',
4069:             cursor: 'pointer',
4070:             fontSize: '14px'
4071:         });
4072:         // Helper: close the scroll inventory popup (if open) and reopen it to reflect Transmute changes
4073:         const refreshInventoryPopup = () => {
4074:             const openInv = document.getElementById('scroll-inventory-popup');
4075:             if (openInv && self.spellSystem?.showInventory) {
4076:                 openInv.remove();
4077:                 self.spellSystem.showInventory();
4078:             }
4079:         };
4080: 
4081:         doneBtn.onclick = () => {
4082:             overlay.remove();
4083:             // Refresh inventory popup so discarded scrolls no longer appear in hand/active lists
4084:             refreshInventoryPopup();
4085:         };
4086:         modal.appendChild(doneBtn);
4087: 
4088:         // Cancel button
4089:         const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
4090:         cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
4091:         Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
4092:             display: 'block',
4093:             width: '100%',
4094:             padding: '10px',
4095:             margin: '8px 0 0 0',
4096:             backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
4097:             color: 'white',
4098:             border: 'none',
4099:             borderRadius: '5px',
4100:             cursor: 'pointer',
4101:             fontSize: '14px'
4102:         });
4103:         cancelBtn.onclick = () => {
4104:             overlay.remove();
4105:             // Refresh inventory even on Cancel — some items may have been discarded before cancelling
4106:             refreshInventoryPopup();
4107:         };
4108:         modal.appendChild(cancelBtn);
4109: 
4110:         overlay.appendChild(modal);
4111:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
4112: 
4113:         // Cleanup suppress flag when modal closes (Done or Cancel)
4114:         const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
4115:             if (!document.body.contains(overlay)) {
4116:                 observer.disconnect();
4117:                 clearSuppress();
4118:             }
4119:         });
4120:         observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
4121:     },
4122: 
4123:     // Wind IV - Take Flight: Teleport any player to an unoccupied hex of your choice
4124:     enterTakeFlightMode(casterIndex, completionPayload) {
4125:         const self = this;
4126:         const numPlayers = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions.length : 1;
4127: 
4128:         // Build list of all players (including self, but exclude Excavate-immune opponents)
4129:         const allPlayers = [];
4130:         for (let i = 0; i < numPlayers; i++) {
4131:             // Allow self-targeting, but skip immune opponents
4132:             if (i !== casterIndex && this.hasExcavateImmunity(i)) continue;
4133:             allPlayers.push(i);
4134:         }
4135: 
4136:         if (allPlayers.length === 0) {
4137:             updateStatus('No players to target!');
4138:             return;
4139:         }
4140: 
4141:         // Step 1: Select target player
4142:         const showPlayerModal = () => {
4143:             const existing = document.getElementById('take-flight-player-modal');
4144:             if (existing) existing.remove();
4145: 
4146:             const overlay = document.createElement('div');
4147:             overlay.id = 'take-flight-player-modal';
4148:             Object.assign(overlay.style, {
4149:                 position: 'fixed',
4150:                 top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
4151:                 backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
4152:                 zIndex: '3000',
4153:                 display: 'flex',
4154:                 justifyContent: 'center',
4155:                 alignItems: 'center'
4156:             });
4157: 
4158:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
4159:             Object.assign(modal.style, {
4160:                 backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
4161:                 border: '2px solid #ffce00',
4162:                 borderRadius: '10px',
4163:                 padding: '20px',
4164:                 color: 'white',
4165:                 minWidth: '200px'
4166:             });
4167: 
4168:             const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
4169:             titleEl.textContent = 'Take Flight: Select a player to teleport';
4170:             titleEl.style.marginBottom = '15px';
4171:             modal.appendChild(titleEl);
4172: 
4173:             allPlayers.forEach(playerIdx => {
4174:                 const name = (typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function')
4175:                     ? getPlayerColorName(playerIdx)
4176:                     : `Player ${playerIdx + 1}`;
4177: 
4178:                 const btn = document.createElement('button');
4179:                 btn.textContent = playerIdx === casterIndex ? `${name} (you)` : name;
4180:                 Object.assign(btn.style, {
4181:                     display: 'block',
4182:                     width: '100%',
4183:                     padding: '10px',
4184:                     margin: '5px 0',
4185:                     backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
4186:                     color: 'white',
4187:                     border: 'none',
4188:                     borderRadius: '5px',
4189:                     cursor: 'pointer',
4190:                     fontSize: '14px'
4191:                 });
4192:                 btn.onclick = () => {
4193:                     overlay.remove();
4194:                     enterHexSelectionForPlayer(playerIdx);
4195:                 };
4196:                 modal.appendChild(btn);
4197:             });
4198: 
4199:             // Cancel button
4200:             const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
4201:             cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
4202:             Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
4203:                 display: 'block',
4204:                 width: '100%',
4205:                 padding: '10px',
4206:                 margin: '10px 0 0 0',
4207:                 backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
4208:                 color: 'white',
4209:                 border: 'none',
4210:                 borderRadius: '5px',
4211:                 cursor: 'pointer',
4212:                 fontSize: '14px'
4213:             });
4214:             cancelBtn.onclick = () => {
4215:                 overlay.remove();
4216:                 self.cancelSelectionMode();
4217:             };
4218:             modal.appendChild(cancelBtn);
4219: 
4220:             overlay.appendChild(modal);
4221:             document.body.appendChild(overlay);
4222:         };
4223: 
4224:         // Step 2: Drag the target pawn to an unoccupied hex
4225:         const enterHexSelectionForPlayer = (targetPlayerIndex) => {
4226:             const cancelBtn = self.createCancelButton('Cancel Take Flight', () => {
4227:                 if (window.takeFlightState?.onCancel) {
4228:                     window.takeFlightState.onCancel();
4229:                 }
4230:                 self.cancelSelectionMode();
4231:             });
4232: 
4233:             const targetPlayer = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined') ? playerPositions[targetPlayerIndex] : null;
4234:             if (!targetPlayer) {
4235:                 updateStatus('Take Flight: target player not found.');
4236:                 if (cancelBtn && cancelBtn.parentNode) cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(cancelBtn);
4237:                 return;
4238:             }
4239: 
4240:             const cleanup = () => {
4241:                 if (cancelBtn && cancelBtn.parentNode) {
4242:                     cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(cancelBtn);
4243:                 }
4244:                 if (window.takeFlightState) {
4245:                     window.takeFlightState.active = false;
4246:                     window.takeFlightState = null;
4247:                 }
4248:                 self.selectionMode = null;
4249:             };
4250: 
4251:             const onComplete = (destX, destY) => {
4252:                 const targetName = (typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function')
4253:                     ? getPlayerColorName(targetPlayerIndex)
4254:                     : `Player ${targetPlayerIndex + 1}`;
4255:                 updateStatus(`Take Flight! Teleported ${targetName} to a new location.`);
4256:                 console.log(`🌬️ Take Flight: player ${targetPlayerIndex} teleported to (${destX.toFixed(1)}, ${destY.toFixed(1)})`);
4257: 
4258:                 // Broadcast teleport in multiplayer
4259:                 if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
4260:                     broadcastGameAction('take-flight', {
4261:                         targetPlayerIndex: targetPlayerIndex,
4262:                         x: destX,
4263:                         y: destY
4264:                     });
4265:                 }
4266: 
4267:                 // Disposition: goes to opponent's hand if targeting another player, stays in active area if self
4268:                 if (self.spellSystem) {
4269:                     const scrollName = completionPayload?.scrollName || 'WIND_SCROLL_4';
4270:                     if (targetPlayerIndex !== casterIndex) {
4271:                         // Remove from caster's active area and add to target's hand
4272:                         const casterScrolls = self.spellSystem.playerScrolls[casterIndex];
4273:                         if (casterScrolls?.active.has(scrollName)) {
4274:                             casterScrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
4275:                         }
4276:                         self.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(targetPlayerIndex);
4277:                         self.spellSystem.playerScrolls[targetPlayerIndex].hand.add(scrollName);
4278:                         self.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
4279:                         updateCommonAreaUI();
4280:                     }
4281:                     // If self-targeting, scroll stays in active area — no action needed
4282:                 }
4283: 
4284:                 // Signal completion
4285:                 if (completionPayload && self.spellSystem && typeof self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
4286:                     self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
4287:                 }
4288: 
4289:                 cleanup();
4290:             };
4291: 
4292:             const onCancel = () => {
4293:                 updateStatus('Take Flight cancelled.');
4294:                 cleanup();
4295:             };
4296: 
4297:             window.takeFlightState = {
4298:                 active: true,
4299:                 casterIndex,
4300:                 targetPlayerIndex,
4301:                 startPos: { x: targetPlayer.x, y: targetPlayer.y },
4302:                 onComplete,
4303:                 onCancel
4304:             };
4305: 
4306:             self.selectionMode = {
4307:                 type: 'take-flight-drag',
4308:                 casterIndex,
4309:                 targetPlayerIndex,
4310:                 cancelBtn,
4311:                 cleanup
4312:             };
4313: 
4314:             const targetName = (typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function')
4315:                 ? getPlayerColorName(targetPlayerIndex)
4316:                 : `Player ${targetPlayerIndex + 1}`;
4317:             updateStatus(`Take Flight: Drag ${targetName} to an unoccupied hex.`);
4318:         };
4319: 
4320:         showPlayerModal();
4321:     },
4322: 
4323:     // Fire V - Arson: Destroy stone from opponent pool
4324:     enterArsonMode(casterIndex, completionPayload = null) {
4325:         const self = this;
4326: 
4327:         // Get opponents (exclude Excavate-immune players)
4328:         const numPlayers = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions.length : 1;
4329:         const opponents = [];
4330:         for (let i = 0; i < numPlayers; i++) {
4331:             if (i !== casterIndex && !this.hasExcavateImmunity(i)) {
4332:                 opponents.push(i);
4333:             }
4334:         }
4335: 
4336:         if (opponents.length === 0) {
4337:             updateStatus('No opponents to target!');
4338:             return;
4339:         }
4340: 
4341:         // Show opponent selection modal
4342:         this.showOpponentSelectionModal(opponents, (selectedOpponent) => {
4343:             // Get the stone types this opponent actually has (playerPools is per-player pool from game-core)
4344:             const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.playerPools);
4345:             const opponentStones = pools && pools[selectedOpponent] ? pools[selectedOpponent] : null;
4346:             if (!opponentStones) {
4347:                 updateStatus('Cannot access opponent stone pool!');
4348:                 return;
4349:             }
4350: 
4351:             // Filter to only elements the opponent has > 0 stones
4352:             const availableElements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].filter(element =>
4353:                 opponentStones[element] && opponentStones[element] > 0
4354:             );
4355: 
4356:             if (availableElements.length === 0) {
4357:                 const name = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[selectedOpponent]?.username)
4358:                     ? playerPositions[selectedOpponent].username
4359:                     : `Player ${selectedOpponent + 1}`;
4360:                 updateStatus(`${name} has no stones in their pool to destroy!`);
4361:                 return;
4362:             }
4363: 
4364:             // Show element selection with only available elements
4365:             self.showArsonElementModal(availableElements, opponentStones, (selectedElement) => {
4366:                 // Destroy one stone from opponent's pool
4367:                 self.destroyOpponentStone(selectedOpponent, selectedElement, completionPayload);
4368:             });
4369:         });
4370:     },
4371:

4428:                 fontWeight: 'bold'
4429:             });

4431:             btn.onmouseleave = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
4432:             btn.onclick = () => {
4433:                 overlay.remove();
4434:                 onSelect(element);
4435:             };
4436:             modal.appendChild(btn);
4437:         });
4438:

4440:         cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
4441:         Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {

4536:     showDeckSelectionModal(count, onSelect) {
4537:         const existing = document.getElementById('deck-select-modal');
4538:         if (existing) existing.remove();
4539: 
4540:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
4541:         overlay.id = 'deck-select-modal';
4542:         Object.assign(overlay.style, {
4543:             position: 'fixed',
4544:             top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
4545:             backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
4546:             zIndex: '3000',
4547:             display: 'flex',
4548:             justifyContent: 'center',
4549:             alignItems: 'center'
4550:         });
4551: 
4552:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
4553:         Object.assign(modal.style, {
4554:             backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
4555:             border: '2px solid #5894f4',
4556:             borderRadius: '10px',
4557:             padding: '20px',
4558:             color: 'white'
4559:         });
4560: 
4561:         const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
4562:         titleEl.textContent = count === 1
4563:             ? 'Select 1 deck to draw 2 scrolls from:'
4564:             : `Select ${count} deck(s) to draw from:`;
4565:         titleEl.style.marginBottom = '15px';
4566:         modal.appendChild(titleEl);
4567: 
4568:         const selected = [];
4569:         const elements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
4570:         const elementColors = {
4571:             earth: '#69d83a',
4572:             water: '#5894f4',
4573:             fire: '#ed1b43',
4574:             wind: '#ffce00',
4575:             void: '#9458f4'
4576:         };
4577: 
4578:         elements.forEach(element => {
4579:             const deckSize = this.spellSystem?.scrollDecks?.[element]?.length || 0;
4580:             const btn = document.createElement('button');
4581:             btn.textContent = `${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} (${deckSize} left)`;
4582:             btn.disabled = deckSize === 0;
4583:             Object.assign(btn.style, {
4584:                 display: 'block',
4585:                 width: '100%',
4586:                 padding: '10px',
4587:                 margin: '5px 0',
4588:                 backgroundColor: deckSize > 0 ? '#2d2d44' : '#1a1a1a',
4589:                 color: deckSize > 0 ? elementColors[element] : '#555',
4590:                 border: 'none',
4591:                 borderRadius: '5px',
4592:                 cursor: deckSize > 0 ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed'
4593:             });
4594: 
4595:             if (deckSize > 0) {
4596:                 btn.onclick = () => {
4597:                     if (selected.includes(element)) {
4598:                         selected.splice(selected.indexOf(element), 1);
4599:                         btn.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
4600:                     } else if (selected.length < count) {
4601:                         selected.push(element);
4602:                         btn.style.backgroundColor = '#3d5a3d';
4603:                     }
4604:                 };
4605:             }
4606:             modal.appendChild(btn);
4607:         });
4608: 
4609:         const confirmBtn = document.createElement('button');
4610:         confirmBtn.textContent = 'Confirm';
4611:         Object.assign(confirmBtn.style, {
4612:             marginTop: '15px',
4613:             padding: '10px 20px',
4614:             backgroundColor: '#27ae60',
4615:             color: 'white',
4616:             border: 'none',
4617:             borderRadius: '5px',
4618:             cursor: 'pointer'
4619:         });
4620:         confirmBtn.onclick = () => {
4621:             overlay.remove();
4622:             onSelect(selected);
4623:         };
4624:         modal.appendChild(confirmBtn);
4625: 
4626:         overlay.appendChild(modal);
4627:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
4628:     },
4629:

4660:         const elements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
4661:         const elementColors = {
4662:             earth: '#69d83a',
4663:             water: '#5894f4',
4664:             fire: '#ed1b43',
4665:             wind: '#ffce00',
4666:             void: '#9458f4'
4667:         };
4668: 
4669:         elements.forEach(element => {
4670:             const btn = document.createElement('button');
4671:             btn.textContent = element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1);
4672:             Object.assign(btn.style, {
4673:                 display: 'block',
4674:                 width: '100%',
4675:                 padding: '10px',
4676:                 margin: '5px 0',
4677:                 backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
4678:                 color: elementColors[element],
4679:                 border: `2px solid ${elementColors[element]}`,
4680:                 borderRadius: '5px',
4681:                 cursor: 'pointer'
4682:             });
4683:             btn.onclick = () => {
4684:                 overlay.remove();
4685:                 onSelect(element);
4686:             };
4687:             modal.appendChild(btn);
4688:         });
4689: 
4690:         overlay.appendChild(modal);
4691:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
4692:     },
4693: 
4694:     showOpponentSelectionModal(opponents, onSelect) {
4695:         const existing = document.getElementById('opponent-select-modal');
4696:         if (existing) existing.remove();
4697:

4699:         overlay.id = 'opponent-select-modal';
4700:         Object.assign(overlay.style, {
4701:             position: 'fixed',

4706:             justifyContent: 'center',

4708:         });

4732:                     : `Player ${opponentIndex + 1}`;

4736:                 ? playerPositions[opponentIndex].color

4751:                 fontSize: '14px',
4752:                 fontWeight: 'bold'
4753:             });

4756:             btn.onclick = () => {
4757:                 overlay.remove();

4759:             };

4766: 
4767:     // ============================================
4768:     // STONE DESTRUCTION HELPERS
4769:     // ============================================
4770: 
4771:     destroyStonesOnTile(tile) {
4772:         if (typeof placedStones === 'undefined') return;
4773: 
4774:         // Use same radius as tileHasStones and findTileAtPosition: TILE_SIZE * 4
4775:         const tileRadius = typeof TILE_SIZE !== 'undefined' ? TILE_SIZE * 4 : 80;
4776: 
4777:         // Track which stones we're removing for multiplayer sync
4778:         const removedStoneIds = [];
4779: 
4780:         // Find and remove ALL stones on this tile (iterate backwards for safe splice)
4781:         for (let i = placedStones.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
4782:             const stone = placedStones[i];
4783:             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - tile.y, 2));
4784:             if (dist < tileRadius) {
4785:                 // Track stone ID for broadcast
4786:                 removedStoneIds.push(stone.id);
4787: 
4788:                 // Remove stone from DOM
4789:                 if (stone.element && stone.element.parentNode) {
4790:                     stone.element.parentNode.removeChild(stone.element);
4791:                 }
4792:                 // Remove from array
4793:                 placedStones.splice(i, 1);
4794:             }
4795:         }
4796: 
4797:         // Broadcast in multiplayer
4798:         if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
4799:             broadcastGameAction('stones-destroyed', {
4800:                 tileId: tile.id,
4801:                 stoneIds: removedStoneIds
4802:             });
4803:         }
4804:     },
4805: 
4806:     destroyOpponentStone(opponentIndex, stoneType, completionPayload = null) {
4807:         const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.playerPools);
4808:         const opponentStones = pools && pools[opponentIndex] ? pools[opponentIndex] : null;
4809:         if (!opponentStones) {
4810:             updateStatus('Cannot access opponent stone pools.');
4811:             return;
4812:         }
4813:         if (opponentStones[stoneType] > 0) {
4814:             opponentStones[stoneType]--;
4815:             const name = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[opponentIndex]?.username)
4816:                 ? playerPositions[opponentIndex].username
4817:                 : `Player ${opponentIndex + 1}`;
4818:             updateStatus(`Arson! Destroyed 1 ${stoneType} stone from ${name}'s pool.`);
4819: 
4820:             if (typeof updateOpponentPanel === 'function') updateOpponentPanel();
4821: 
4822:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
4823:                 broadcastGameAction('opponent-stone-destroyed', {
4824:                     opponentIndex,
4825:                     stoneType
4826:                 });
4827:             }
4828: 
4829:             // Send Arson to common area after use
4830:             if (completionPayload && this.spellSystem) {
4831:                 const scrollName = completionPayload.scrollName || 'FIRE_SCROLL_5';
4832:                 this.spellSystem.handleScrollDisposition(scrollName, false, true);
4833:             }
4834: 
4835:             // Signal selection effect complete (triggers win check, broadcast)
4836:             if (completionPayload && this.spellSystem && typeof this.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
4837:                 this.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
4838:             }
4839:         } else {
4840:             updateStatus(`${stoneType} pool is empty!`);
4841:         }
4842:     },
4843: 
4844:     // Catacomb Scroll 8 - Plunder: Discard a target player's active scroll to common area
4845:     enterPlunderMode(casterIndex, completionPayload = null) {
4846:         const self = this;
4847:         // The scroll currently being cast — exclude it from plunderable lists
4848:         // (it's still in the caster's active set until handleScrollDisposition runs)
4849:         const castingScrollName = completionPayload?.scrollName || null;
4850: 
4851:         // Get all players (including self, but exclude Excavate-immune opponents)
4852:         const numPlayers = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions.length : 1;
4853:         const targets = [];
4854:         for (let i = 0; i < numPlayers; i++) {
4855:             // Allow self-targeting, but skip immune opponents
4856:             if (i !== casterIndex && this.hasExcavateImmunity(i)) continue;
4857:             targets.push(i);
4858:         }
4859: 
4860:         if (targets.length === 0) {
4861:             updateStatus('No players to target!');
4862:             return;
4863:         }
4864: 
4865:         // Step 1: Select target player
4866:         this.showPlunderPlayerModal(targets, casterIndex, castingScrollName, (targetPlayerIndex) => {
4867:             // Step 2: Get target's active scrolls
4868:             if (!self.spellSystem) {
4869:                 updateStatus('Plunder: spell system unavailable.');
4870:                 return;
4871:             }
4872:             self.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(targetPlayerIndex);
4873:             const targetScrolls = self.spellSystem.playerScrolls[targetPlayerIndex];
4874: 
4875:             // Build plunderable list, excluding the scroll being cast if targeting self
4876:             let activeScrollArray = targetScrolls ? Array.from(targetScrolls.active) : [];
4877:             if (targetPlayerIndex === casterIndex && castingScrollName) {
4878:                 activeScrollArray = activeScrollArray.filter(s => s !== castingScrollName);
4879:             }
4880: 
4881:             if (activeScrollArray.length === 0) {
4882:                 const name = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[targetPlayerIndex]?.username)
4883:                     ? playerPositions[targetPlayerIndex].username
4884:                     : `Player ${targetPlayerIndex + 1}`;
4885:                 updateStatus(`${name} has no active scrolls to plunder!`);
4886:                 // Still signal completion so scroll disposition happens
4887:                 if (completionPayload && self.spellSystem && typeof self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
4888:                     self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
4889:                 }
4890:                 return;
4891:             }
4892: 
4893:             // Step 3: Show target's active scrolls for caster to choose
4894:             self.showScrollSelectionModal(activeScrollArray, 'Select an active scroll to plunder:', (selectedScroll) => {
4895:                 // Remove from target's active area
4896:                 targetScrolls.active.delete(selectedScroll);
4897: 
4898:                 // Discard to common area
4899:                 if (self.spellSystem.discardToCommonArea) {
4900:                     self.spellSystem.discardToCommonArea(selectedScroll);
4901:                 }
4902: 
4903:                 const scrollDef = self.spellSystem?.patterns?.[selectedScroll];
4904:                 const scrollDisplayName = scrollDef?.name || selectedScroll;
4905:                 const targetName = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[targetPlayerIndex]?.username)
4906:                     ? playerPositions[targetPlayerIndex].username
4907:                     : `Player ${targetPlayerIndex + 1}`;
4908:                 updateStatus(`Plunder! Sent ${scrollDisplayName} from ${targetName}'s active area to the common area.`);
4909:                 console.log(`🏴‍☠️ Plunder: moved ${selectedScroll} from player ${targetPlayerIndex}'s active to common area`);
4910: 
4911:                 // Update UI
4912:                 if (self.spellSystem?.updateScrollCount) {
4913:                     self.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
4914:                 }
4915:                 if (typeof updateOpponentPanel === 'function') updateOpponentPanel();
4916: 
4917:                 // Broadcast in multiplayer
4918:                 if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
4919:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-plundered', {
4920:                         casterIndex: casterIndex,
4921:                         targetIndex: targetPlayerIndex,
4922:                         scrollName: selectedScroll
4923:                     });
4924:                 }
4925: 
4926:                 if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
4927: 
4928:                 // Signal selection effect complete
4929:                 if (completionPayload && self.spellSystem && typeof self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
4930:                     self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
4931:                 }
4932:             });
4933:         });
4934:     },
4935: 
4936:     // Plunder: player selection modal (allows targeting any player including self)
4937:     showPlunderPlayerModal(targets, casterIndex, castingScrollName, onSelect) {
4938:         const existing = document.getElementById('plunder-player-modal');
4939:         if (existing) existing.remove();
4940: 
4941:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
4942:         overlay.id = 'plunder-player-modal';
4943:         Object.assign(overlay.style, {
4944:             position: 'fixed',
4945:             top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
4946:             backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
4947:             zIndex: '3000',
4948:             display: 'flex',
4949:             justifyContent: 'center',
4950:             alignItems: 'center'
4951:         });
4952: 
4953:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
4954:         Object.assign(modal.style, {
4955:             backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
4956:             border: '2px solid #ff8c00',
4957:             borderRadius: '10px',
4958:             padding: '20px',
4959:             color: 'white',
4960:             minWidth: '200px'
4961:         });
4962: 
4963:         const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
4964:         titleEl.textContent = 'Plunder: Select a target player';
4965:         titleEl.style.marginBottom = '15px';
4966:         titleEl.style.color = '#ff8c00';
4967:         modal.appendChild(titleEl);
4968: 
4969:         targets.forEach(playerIdx => {
4970:             const name = (typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function')
4971:                 ? getPlayerColorName(playerIdx)
4972:                 : (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[playerIdx]?.username)
4973:                     ? playerPositions[playerIdx].username
4974:                     : `Player ${playerIdx + 1}`;
4975: 
4976:             // Get the player's hex color for styling
4977:             const playerHexColor = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[playerIdx]?.color)
4978:                 ? playerPositions[playerIdx].color
4979:                 : '#ffffff';
4980: 
4981:             // Check if this player has plunderable active scrolls
4982:             // Exclude the scroll being cast if this is the caster
4983:             const sp = this.spellSystem;
4984:             let activeCount = 0;
4985:             if (sp) {
4986:                 sp.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIdx);
4987:                 const activeSet = sp.playerScrolls[playerIdx]?.active;
4988:                 if (activeSet) {
4989:                     activeCount = activeSet.size;
4990:                     if (playerIdx === casterIndex && castingScrollName && activeSet.has(castingScrollName)) {
4991:                         activeCount--;
4992:                     }
4993:                 }
4994:             }
4995: 
4996:             const btn = document.createElement('button');
4997:             btn.textContent = playerIdx === casterIndex ? `${name} (you) - ${activeCount} active` : `${name} - ${activeCount} active`;
4998:             Object.assign(btn.style, {
4999:                 display: 'block',
5000:                 width: '100%',
5001:                 padding: '12px',
5002:                 margin: '6px 0',
5003:                 backgroundColor: activeCount > 0 ? '#2d2d44' : '#1a1a22',
5004:                 color: activeCount > 0 ? playerHexColor : '#666',
5005:                 border: activeCount > 0 ? `1px solid ${playerHexColor}` : '1px solid #333',
5006:                 borderRadius: '5px',
5007:                 cursor: activeCount > 0 ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed',
5008:                 opacity: activeCount > 0 ? '1' : '0.5',
5009:                 fontSize: '14px',
5010:                 fontWeight: 'bold'
5011:             });
5012:             if (activeCount > 0) {
5013:                 btn.onmouseenter = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#3d3d54';
5014:                 btn.onmouseleave = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
5015:                 btn.onclick = () => {
5016:                     overlay.remove();
5017:                     onSelect(playerIdx);
5018:                 };
5019:             }
5020:             modal.appendChild(btn);
5021:         });
5022: 
5023:         const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
5024:         cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
5025:         Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
5026:             marginTop: '15px',
5027:             padding: '10px 20px',
5028:             backgroundColor: '#7f8c8d',
5029:             color: 'white',
5030:             border: 'none',
5031:             borderRadius: '5px',
5032:             cursor: 'pointer',
5033:             width: '100%'
5034:         });
5035:         cancelBtn.onclick = () => overlay.remove();
5036:         modal.appendChild(cancelBtn);
5037: 
5038:         overlay.appendChild(modal);
5039:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
5040:     },
5041: 
5042:     shuffleDeck(deck) {
5043:         for (let i = deck.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
5044:             const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
5045:             [deck[i], deck[j]] = [deck[j], deck[i]];
5046:         }
5047:     },
5048: 
5049:     // Check if water transformation buff is active (for Water V)
5050:     hasWaterTransformation(playerIndex) {
5051:         return this.activeBuffs.waterTransformation?.playerIndex === playerIndex;
5052:     },
5053: 
5054:     // Check if Unbidden Lamplight is active (for Fire I)
5055:     hasUnbiddenLamplight(casterIndex) {
5056:         // Returns true if any OTHER player has lamplight active
5057:         if (this.activeBuffs.unbiddenLamplight) {
5058:             return this.activeBuffs.unbiddenLamplight.playerIndex !== casterIndex;
5059:         }
5060:         return false;
5061:     },
5062: 
5063:     // Check if a player has Excavate immunity (cannot be targeted by scrolls)
5064:     hasExcavateImmunity(playerIndex) {
5065:         const buff = this.activeBuffs.excavate;
5066:         return buff && buff.playerIndex === playerIndex;
5067:     },
5068: 
5069:     // Clear Excavate immunity and trigger teleport option when a player's turn starts
5070:     clearExcavateForPlayer(playerIndex) {
5071:         const buff = this.activeBuffs.excavate;
5072:         if (buff && buff.playerIndex === playerIndex) {
5073:             delete this.activeBuffs.excavate;
5074:             console.log(`⛏️ Excavate immunity cleared for player ${playerIndex}`);
5075:         }
5076:     },
5077: 
5078:     // Process Excavate teleport at start of turn (returns true if teleport is pending)
5079:     processExcavateTeleport(playerIndex) {
5080:         const buff = this.activeBuffs.excavateTeleport;
5081:         if (!buff || buff.playerIndex !== playerIndex) return false;
5082: 
5083:         // Only trigger for the local player in multiplayer
5084:         const localPlayer = (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined')
5085:             ? myPlayerIndex : (typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined' ? activePlayerIndex : -1);
5086:         if (playerIndex !== localPlayer) {
5087:             // Not the local player — just clear the buff silently
5088:             delete this.activeBuffs.excavateTeleport;
5089:             return false;
5090:         }
5091: 
5092:         delete this.activeBuffs.excavateTeleport;
5093:         console.log(`⛏️ Excavate teleport available for player ${playerIndex}`);
5094: 
5095:         // Show teleport prompt modal
5096:         this.showExcavateTeleportModal(playerIndex);
5097:         return true;
5098:     },
5099:
