371: // ── Settings tab ─────────────────────────────────────────────
372: 
373: function _renderSettings(content) {
374:     const uiSound   = localStorage.getItem('godaigo_ui_sound')   !== 'false';
375:     const gameSound = localStorage.getItem('godaigo_game_sound') !== 'false';
376:     const crt = window.crtOverlay ? window.crtOverlay.getOptions()
377:                                   : { scanlines: true, vignette: true, grain: true, flicker: true };
378: 
379:     content.innerHTML = `
380:         <div class="gami-settings-list">
381:             <div class="gami-settings-section-label">— Audio —</div>
382:             <div class="gami-settings-row">
383:                 <div class="gami-settings-label">
384:                     <div class="gami-settings-name">UI Sounds</div>
385:                     <div class="gami-settings-desc">Button click sound effects</div>
386:                 </div>
387:                 <button class="gami-toggle ${uiSound ? 'on' : 'off'}"
388:                         onclick="_gami_toggleSetting('ui_sound', this)">${uiSound ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}</button>
389:             </div>
390:             <div class="gami-settings-row">
391:                 <div class="gami-settings-label">
392:                     <div class="gami-settings-name">Game Sounds</div>
393:                     <div class="gami-settings-desc">In-game audio effects</div>
394:                 </div>
395:                 <button class="gami-toggle ${gameSound ? 'on' : 'off'}"
396:                         onclick="_gami_toggleSetting('game_sound', this)">${gameSound ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}</button>
397:             </div>
398:             <div class="gami-settings-section-label">— Display —</div>
399:             <div class="gami-settings-row">
400:                 <div class="gami-settings-label">
401:                     <div class="gami-settings-name">Scanlines</div>
402:                     <div class="gami-settings-desc">Horizontal CRT scan-line overlay</div>
403:                 </div>
404:                 <button class="gami-toggle ${crt.scanlines ? 'on' : 'off'}"
405:                         onclick="_gami_toggleCrt('scanlines', this)">${crt.scanlines ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}</button>
406:             </div>
407:             <div class="gami-settings-row">
408:                 <div class="gami-settings-label">
409:                     <div class="gami-settings-name">Vignette</div>
410:                     <div class="gami-settings-desc">Dark edges around the screen</div>
411:                 </div>
412:                 <button class="gami-toggle ${crt.vignette ? 'on' : 'off'}"
413:                         onclick="_gami_toggleCrt('vignette', this)">${crt.vignette ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}</button>
414:             </div>
415:             <div class="gami-settings-row">
416:                 <div class="gami-settings-label">
417:                     <div class="gami-settings-name">Film Grain</div>
418:                     <div class="gami-settings-desc">Animated noise texture</div>
419:                 </div>
420:                 <button class="gami-toggle ${crt.grain ? 'on' : 'off'}"
421:                         onclick="_gami_toggleCrt('grain', this)">${crt.grain ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}</button>
422:             </div>
423:             <div class="gami-settings-row">
424:                 <div class="gami-settings-label">
425:                     <div class="gami-settings-name">Flicker</div>
426:                     <div class="gami-settings-desc">Subtle screen brightness variation</div>
427:                 </div>
428:                 <button class="gami-toggle ${crt.flicker ? 'on' : 'off'}"
429:                         onclick="_gami_toggleCrt('flicker', this)">${crt.flicker ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}</button>
430:             </div>
431: 
432:             <div class="gami-settings-section-label">— Keyboard Controls —</div>
433:             <div class="gami-keybind-guide">
434:                 <div class="gami-keybind-group">
435:                     <div class="gami-keybind-group-title">Board Actions</div>
436:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>X</kbd><span>End turn</span></div>
437:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>Enter</kbd><span>Place tile or move pawn (start / confirm)</span></div>
438:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>1</kbd><span>Void stone preview</span></div>
439:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>2</kbd><span>Wind stone preview</span></div>
440:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>3</kbd><span>Fire stone preview</span></div>
441:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>4</kbd><span>Water stone preview</span></div>
442:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>5</kbd><span>Earth stone preview</span></div>
443:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>T</kbd><span>Catacomb teleport preview (T again to confirm)</span></div>
444:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>← →</kbd><span>Cycle positions or scroll cards</span></div>
445:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>Esc</kbd><span>Cancel any active preview or navigation</span></div>
446:                 </div>
447:                 <div class="gami-keybind-group">
448:                     <div class="gami-keybind-group-title">Panel Toggles</div>
449:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>H</kbd><span>Toggle Hand panel</span></div>
450:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>A</kbd><span>Toggle Active panel</span></div>
451:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>C</kbd><span>Toggle Common panel</span></div>
452:                 </div>
453:                 <div class="gami-keybind-group">
454:                     <div class="gami-keybind-group-title">Scroll Navigation</div>
455:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>Q</kbd><span>Navigate Hand scrolls</span></div>
456:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>W</kbd><span>Navigate Active scrolls</span></div>
457:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>E</kbd><span>Navigate Common scrolls</span></div>
458:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>← →</kbd><span>Cycle cards while in nav mode</span></div>
459:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>Enter</kbd><span>Move Hand card → Active</span></div>
460:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>Tab</kbd><span>Move card → Common Area</span></div>
461:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>Space</kbd><span>Cast selected scroll</span></div>
462:                     <div class="gami-keybind-row"><kbd>Esc</kbd><span>Exit navigation</span></div>
463:                 </div>
464:             </div>
465:         </div>
466:     `;
467: }
468: 
469: function _gami_toggleCrt(key, btn) {
470:     if (!window.crtOverlay) return;
471:     const newVal = !window.crtOverlay.getOptions()[key];
472:     window.crtOverlay.setOption(key, newVal);
473:     window.crtOverlay.saveForUser(window.gami?.userId || null);
474:     btn.textContent = newVal ? 'ON' : 'OFF';
475:     btn.className   = `gami-toggle ${newVal ? 'on' : 'off'}`;
476: }
477: 
478: function _gami_toggleSetting(key, btn) {
479:     const current = localStorage.getItem(`godaigo_${key}`) !== 'false';
480:     const newVal  = !current;
481:     localStorage.setItem(`godaigo_${key}`, newVal ? 'true' : 'false');
482:     if (key === 'ui_sound')   window.uiSoundEnabled   = newVal;
483:     if (key === 'game_sound') window.gameSoundEnabled = newVal;
484:     btn.textContent = newVal ? 'ON' : 'OFF';
485:     btn.className   = `gami-toggle ${newVal ? 'on' : 'off'}`;
486: }
487: 
488: // ── Utility ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
489: 
490: function _esc(str) {
491:     if (!str) return '';
492:     return String(str)
493:         .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
494:         .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
495:         .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
496:         .replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
497: }
</file>

<file path="js/scroll-panels.js">
  1: // ============================================
  2: // FLOATING SCROLL PANELS
  3: // ============================================
  4: // Three independently floating panels: Hand | Active | Common
  5: // Each is draggable, resizable, and collapsible.
  6: // Replaces spellSystem.showInventory() modal.
  7: // Triggered by #scroll-inventory dock button.
  8: // ============================================
  9: 
 10: const ScrollPanelSystem = (() => {
 11:     'use strict';
 12: 
 13:     // ---- Config ----
 14:     const CAPACITY    = { hand: 2, active: 2, common: 5 };
 15:     const STORAGE_KEY = 'godaigo_scroll_panels_v5';  // bumped for stacked buttons + taller panels
 16:     const EL_COLORS   = {
 17:         earth: '#69d83a', water: '#5894f4', fire: '#ed1b43',
 18:         wind: '#ffce00', void: '#9458f4', catacomb: '#9b59b6'
 19:     };
 20: 
 21:     // Default positions — horizontal card layout (wide + short)
 22:     const DEFAULTS = {
 23:         hand:   { x: 20,  y: 100, w: 520, h: 420, collapsed: false },
 24:         active: { x: 20,  y: 540, w: 520, h: 420, collapsed: false },
 25:         common: { x: 20,  y: 980, w: 760, h: 420, collapsed: false }
 26:     };
 27: 
 28:     const panels = {};      // { id → { el, state, open } }
 29:     let initialized = false;
 30: 
 31:     // ---- Persistence ----
 32:     function loadStored() {
 33:         try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY)) || {}; } catch { return {}; }
 34:     }
 35:     function saveState() {
 36:         const out = {};
 37:         Object.keys(panels).forEach(id => { out[id] = { ...panels[id].state }; });
 38:         try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(out)); } catch {}
 39:     }
 40: 
 41:     // ---- Panel creation ----
 42:     function createPanel(id, title) {
 43:         const stored = loadStored()[id] || {};
 44:         const state  = { ...DEFAULTS[id], ...stored };
 45:         panels[id]   = { el: null, state, open: false };
 46: 
 47:         const el = document.createElement('div');
 48:         el.className    = 'fsp';
 49:         el.id           = 'fsp-' + id;
 50:         el.dataset.panel = id;
 51:         el.style.cssText = `left:${state.x}px; top:${state.y}px; width:${state.w}px;`;
 52:         if (!state.collapsed) el.style.height = state.h + 'px';
 53: 
 54:         el.innerHTML = `
 55:             <div class="fsp-header" data-drag-handle>
 56:                 <span class="fsp-title">${title}</span>
 57:                 <span class="fsp-badge" id="fsp-badge-${id}">0/0</span>
 58:                 <button class="fsp-btn fsp-collapse-btn" title="Collapse / expand">−</button>
 59:                 <button class="fsp-btn fsp-close-btn"    title="Close">✕</button>
 60:             </div>
 61:             <div class="fsp-body" id="fsp-body-${id}"></div>
 62:             <div class="fsp-resize-handle" title="Drag to resize"></div>
 63:         `;
 64: 
 65:         document.body.appendChild(el);
 66:         panels[id].el = el;
 67: 
 68:         // Apply saved collapsed state
 69:         if (state.collapsed) _applyCollapsed(id, true);
 70: 
 71:         // Wire buttons
 72:         el.querySelector('.fsp-close-btn').addEventListener('click', e => { e.stopPropagation(); closePanel(id); });
 73:         el.querySelector('.fsp-collapse-btn').addEventListener('click', e => { e.stopPropagation(); toggleCollapse(id); });
 74: 
 75:         // Drag & resize
 76:         _makeDraggable(el, el.querySelector('[data-drag-handle]'), id);
 77:         _makeResizable(el, el.querySelector('.fsp-resize-handle'), id);
 78: 
 79:         return el;
 80:     }
 81: 
 82:     // ---- Drag ----
 83:     function _makeDraggable(panel, handle, id) {
 84:         let ox, oy, ol, ot, active = false;
 85: 
 86:         handle.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
 87:             if (e.button !== 0) return;
 88:             if (e.target.classList.contains('fsp-btn')) return;
 89:             active = true;
 90:             ox = e.clientX; oy = e.clientY;
 91:             ol = parseInt(panel.style.left) || 0;
 92:             ot = parseInt(panel.style.top)  || 0;
 93:             panel.style.transition = 'none';
 94:             document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
 95:             e.preventDefault();
 96:         });
 97: 
 98:         const onMove = e => {
 99:             if (!active) return;
100:             const nx = Math.max(0, Math.min(window.innerWidth  - 60, ol + (e.clientX - ox)));
101:             const ny = Math.max(0, Math.min(window.innerHeight - 40, ot + (e.clientY - oy)));
102:             panel.style.left = nx + 'px';
103:             panel.style.top  = ny + 'px';
104:         };
105:         const onUp = () => {
106:             if (!active) return;
107:             active = false;
108:             document.body.style.userSelect = '';
109:             panels[id].state.x = parseInt(panel.style.left);
110:             panels[id].state.y = parseInt(panel.style.top);
111:             saveState();
112:         };
113: 
114:         document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
115:         document.addEventListener('mouseup',   onUp);
116:     }
117: 
118:     // ---- Resize ----
119:     function _makeResizable(panel, handle, id) {
120:         let sx, sy, sw, sh, active = false;
121: 
122:         handle.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
123:             e.stopPropagation();
124:             active = true;
125:             sx = e.clientX; sy = e.clientY;
126:             sw = panel.offsetWidth; sh = panel.offsetHeight;
127:             panel.style.transition = 'none';
128:             document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
129:             e.preventDefault();
130:         });
131: 
132:         const onMove = e => {
133:             if (!active) return;
134:             const w = Math.max(180, sw + (e.clientX - sx));
135:             const h = Math.max(100, sh + (e.clientY - sy));
136:             panel.style.width  = w + 'px';
137:             panel.style.height = h + 'px';
138:         };
139:         const onUp = () => {
140:             if (!active) return;
141:             active = false;
142:             document.body.style.userSelect = '';
143:             panels[id].state.w = panel.offsetWidth;
144:             panels[id].state.h = panel.offsetHeight;
145:             saveState();
146:         };
147: 
148:         document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
149:         document.addEventListener('mouseup',   onUp);
150:     }
151: 
152:     // ---- Collapse ----
153:     function _applyCollapsed(id, collapsed) {
154:         const { el, state } = panels[id];
155:         state.collapsed = collapsed;
156:         const body   = document.getElementById('fsp-body-' + id);
157:         const handle = el.querySelector('.fsp-resize-handle');
158:         const btn    = el.querySelector('.fsp-collapse-btn');
159:         if (collapsed) {
160:             if (body)   body.style.display   = 'none';
161:             if (handle) handle.style.display = 'none';
162:             if (btn)    btn.textContent       = '+';
163:             el.style.height = '';
164:         } else {
165:             if (body)   body.style.display   = '';
166:             if (handle) handle.style.display = '';
167:             if (btn)    btn.textContent       = '−';
168:             if (state.h) el.style.height = state.h + 'px';
169:         }
170:     }
171:     function toggleCollapse(id) {
172:         _applyCollapsed(id, !panels[id].state.collapsed);
173:         saveState();
174:     }
175: 
176:     // ---- Open / close ----
177:     function openPanel(id) {
178:         const p = panels[id];
179:         if (!p) return;
180:         p.open = true;
181:         p.el.style.display = 'flex';
182:         renderPanel(id);
183:     }
184: 
185:     function closePanel(id) {
186:         const p = panels[id];
187:         if (!p) return;
188:         p.open = false;
189:         p.el.style.display = 'none';
190:     }
191: 
192:     function toggle() {
193:         const anyOpen = Object.values(panels).some(p => p.open);
194:         if (anyOpen) {
195:             Object.keys(panels).forEach(closePanel);
196:         } else {
197:             Object.keys(panels).forEach(openPanel);
198:         }
199:     }
200: 
201:     // ---- Capacity badge + glow ----
202:     function _updateBadge(id, current, max) {
203:         const badge = document.getElementById('fsp-badge-' + id);
204:         if (badge) badge.textContent = current + '/' + max;
205:         const header = panels[id]?.el?.querySelector('.fsp-header');
206:         if (header) header.classList.toggle('fsp-over-capacity', current > max);
207:     }
208: 
209:     // ---- Scroll card builder ----
210:     const ROMAN = ['', 'I', 'II', 'III', 'IV', 'V'];
211: 
212:     function _buildCard(scrollName, area) {
213:         const sp = window.spellSystem;
214:         if (!sp) return null;
215: 
216:         const def = sp.patterns?.[scrollName] || window.SCROLL_DEFINITIONS?.[scrollName];
217:         if (!def) return null;
218: 
219:         const element  = typeof sp.getScrollElement === 'function'
220:             ? sp.getScrollElement(scrollName) : 'earth';
221:         const color    = EL_COLORS[element] || '#aaa';
222:         const iconSrc  = window.STONE_TYPES?.[element]?.img || '';
223:         const elLabel  = element ? element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1) : '';
224:         const lvLabel  = def.level ? 'Lv. ' + (ROMAN[def.level] || def.level) : '';
225: 
226:         const canModify = (typeof isMultiplayer === 'undefined' || !isMultiplayer)
227:             || (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined'
228:                 && myPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex);
229: 
230:         const card = document.createElement('div');
231:         card.className = 'fsp-card';
232:         card.dataset.scrollName = scrollName;
233:         card.dataset.area = area;
234:         card.style.setProperty('--el-color', color);
235: 
236:         // ── Header: icon · name · level · tag ──────────────────────────
237:         const hdr = document.createElement('div');
238:         hdr.className = 'fsp-card-header';
239: 
240:         if (iconSrc) {
241:             const icon = document.createElement('img');
242:             icon.src = iconSrc;
243:             icon.className = 'fsp-card-icon';
244:             icon.alt = element;
245:             hdr.appendChild(icon);
246:         }
247: 
248:         const titleWrap = document.createElement('div');
249:         titleWrap.className = 'fsp-card-title';
250: 
251:         const nameEl = document.createElement('span');
252:         nameEl.className = 'fsp-card-name';
253:         nameEl.textContent = def.name || scrollName;
254:         titleWrap.appendChild(nameEl);
255: 
256:         const metaEl = document.createElement('span');
257:         metaEl.className = 'fsp-card-meta';
258:         metaEl.textContent = [elLabel, lvLabel].filter(Boolean).join(' · ');
259:         titleWrap.appendChild(metaEl);
260: 
261:         hdr.appendChild(titleWrap);
262: 
263:         if (def.isCounter) {
264:             const tag = document.createElement('span');
265:             tag.className = 'fsp-card-tag fsp-tag-counter';
266:             tag.textContent = 'COUNTER';
267:             hdr.appendChild(tag);
268:         } else if (def.isResponse) {
269:             const tag = document.createElement('span');
270:             tag.className = 'fsp-card-tag fsp-tag-response';
271:             tag.textContent = 'RESPONSE';
272:             hdr.appendChild(tag);
273:         }
274: 
275:         card.appendChild(hdr);
276: 
277:         // ── Description ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
278:         if (def.description) {
279:             const desc = document.createElement('div');
280:             desc.className = 'fsp-card-desc';
281:             desc.textContent = def.description;
282:             card.appendChild(desc);
283:         }
284: 
285:         // ── Stone pattern visual (scaled-down hex grid) ─────────────────
286:         if (def.patterns && typeof sp.createPatternVisual === 'function') {
287:             const patWrap = document.createElement('div');
288:             patWrap.className = 'fsp-card-pattern';
289:             try {
290:                 const visual = sp.createPatternVisual(def, element);
291:                 patWrap.appendChild(visual);
292:             } catch (e) { /* pattern rendering failed — skip */ }
293:             card.appendChild(patWrap);
294:         }
295: 
296:         // ── Action buttons ───────────────────────────────────────────────
297:         if (canModify) {
298:             const acts = document.createElement('div');
299:             acts.className = 'fsp-card-actions';
300: 
301:             if (area === 'hand') {
302:                 // Hand → move to Active Area
303:                 const toActive = document.createElement('button');
304:                 toActive.className = 'fsp-card-btn';
305:                 toActive.textContent = 'Move to Active Area';
306:                 toActive.addEventListener('click', e => {
307:                     e.stopPropagation();
308:                     const dest = document.getElementById('fsp-active');
309:                     if (dest) animateCardMove(card, dest);
310:                     if (window.isTutorialMode && window.TutorialMode?.onScrollMoved) {
311:                         window.TutorialMode.onScrollMoved(scrollName, 'hand', 'active');
312:                     }
313:                     setTimeout(() => { sp.moveToActive(scrollName); refresh(); }, 60);
314:                 });
315:                 acts.appendChild(toActive);
316: 
317:                 // Hand → move to Common Area
318:                 const toCommon = document.createElement('button');
319:                 toCommon.className = 'fsp-card-btn fsp-card-btn-alt';
320:                 toCommon.textContent = 'Move to Common Area';
321:                 toCommon.addEventListener('click', e => {
322:                     e.stopPropagation();
323:                     const dest = document.getElementById('fsp-common');
324:                     if (dest) animateCardMove(card, dest);
325:                     if (window.isTutorialMode && window.TutorialMode?.onScrollMoved) {
326:                         window.TutorialMode.onScrollMoved(scrollName, 'hand', 'common');
327:                     }
328:                     setTimeout(() => { sp.discardScroll(scrollName); refresh(); }, 60);
329:                 });
330:                 acts.appendChild(toCommon);
331:             }
332: 
333:             if (area === 'active') {
334:                 // Active → move to Common Area
335:                 const toCommon = document.createElement('button');
336:                 toCommon.className = 'fsp-card-btn fsp-card-btn-alt';
337:                 toCommon.textContent = 'Move to Common Area';
338:                 toCommon.addEventListener('click', e => {
339:                     e.stopPropagation();
340:                     const dest = document.getElementById('fsp-common');
341:                     if (dest) animateCardMove(card, dest);
342:                     if (window.isTutorialMode && window.TutorialMode?.onScrollMoved) {
343:                         window.TutorialMode.onScrollMoved(scrollName, 'active', 'common');
344:                     }
345:                     setTimeout(() => { sp.discardScroll(scrollName); refresh(); }, 60);
346:                 });
347:                 acts.appendChild(toCommon);
348: 
349:                 // Active → Cast (shown when pattern matches board)
350:                 const patternMatches = typeof sp.checkPattern === 'function' && sp.checkPattern(scrollName);
351:                 const castBtn = document.createElement('button');
352:                 castBtn.className = 'fsp-card-btn fsp-card-btn-cast' + (patternMatches ? ' fsp-cast-ready' : ' fsp-cast-dim');
353:                 castBtn.textContent = patternMatches ? 'Cast ✦' : 'Cast';
354:                 castBtn.title = patternMatches ? 'Pattern matches — ready to cast!' : 'Place stones in the required pattern first';
355:                 castBtn.addEventListener('click', e => {
356:                     e.stopPropagation();
357:                     sp.castSpell();
358:                 });
359:                 acts.appendChild(castBtn);
360:             }
361: 
362:             if (area === 'common') {
363:                 // Common → Cast (shown when pattern matches board)
364:                 const patternMatches = typeof sp.checkPattern === 'function' && sp.checkPattern(scrollName);
365:                 const castBtn = document.createElement('button');
366:                 castBtn.className = 'fsp-card-btn fsp-card-btn-cast' + (patternMatches ? ' fsp-cast-ready' : ' fsp-cast-dim');
367:                 castBtn.textContent = patternMatches ? 'Cast ✦' : 'Cast';
368:                 castBtn.title = patternMatches ? 'Pattern matches — ready to cast!' : 'Place stones in the required pattern first';
369:                 castBtn.addEventListener('click', e => {
370:                     e.stopPropagation();
371:                     sp.castSpell();
372:                 });
373:                 acts.appendChild(castBtn);
374:             }
375: 
376:             if (acts.children.length) card.appendChild(acts);
377:         }
378: 
379:         // Click header area → open detail popup
380:         hdr.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
381:             if (e.target.closest('.fsp-card-btn')) return;
382:             if (typeof window.showScrollInfoPopup === 'function') {
383:                 window.showScrollInfoPopup(scrollName, def, element);
384:             }
385:         });
386: 
387:         return card;
388:     }
389: 
390:     // ---- Render ----
391:     function renderPanel(id) {
392:         const sp   = window.spellSystem;
393:         const body = document.getElementById('fsp-body-' + id);
394:         if (!body || !sp) return;
395: 
396:         body.innerHTML = '';
397:         const frag = document.createDocumentFragment();
398: 
399:         if (id === 'hand') {
400:             const scrolls = [...(sp.handScrolls || [])];
401:             _updateBadge('hand', scrolls.length, CAPACITY.hand);
402:             if (!scrolls.length) {
403:                 body.innerHTML = '<div class="fsp-empty">Hand is empty</div>';
404:                 return;
405:             }
406:             scrolls.forEach(n => { const c = _buildCard(n, 'hand');   if (c) frag.appendChild(c); });
407: 
408:         } else if (id === 'active') {
409:             const scrolls = [...(sp.activeScrolls || [])];
410:             _updateBadge('active', scrolls.length, CAPACITY.active);
411:             if (!scrolls.length) {
412:                 body.innerHTML = '<div class="fsp-empty">No active scrolls</div>';
413:                 return;
414:             }
415:             scrolls.forEach(n => { const c = _buildCard(n, 'active'); if (c) frag.appendChild(c); });
416: 
417:         } else if (id === 'common') {
418:             const scrolls = typeof sp.getCommonAreaScrolls === 'function' ? sp.getCommonAreaScrolls() : [];
419:             _updateBadge('common', scrolls.length, CAPACITY.common);
420:             if (!scrolls.length) {
421:                 body.innerHTML = '<div class="fsp-empty">Common area is empty</div>';
422:                 return;
423:             }
424:             scrolls.forEach(n => { const c = _buildCard(n, 'common'); if (c) frag.appendChild(c); });
425:         }
426: 
427:         body.appendChild(frag);
428:     }
429: 
430:     function refresh() {
431:         Object.keys(panels).forEach(id => { if (panels[id].open) renderPanel(id); });
432:         _updateDockBtn();
433:     }
434: 
435:     function _updateDockBtn() {
436:         const sp = window.spellSystem;
437:         if (!sp) return;
438:         const handN   = sp.handScrolls?.size   || 0;
439:         const activeN = sp.activeScrolls?.size  || 0;
440:         const hSpan = document.getElementById('hand-count');
441:         const aSpan = document.getElementById('active-count');
442:         if (hSpan) hSpan.textContent = handN;
443:         if (aSpan) aSpan.textContent = activeN;
444: 
445:         // Light up panel buttons when their panel is open
446:         ['hand', 'active', 'common'].forEach(id => {
447:             const btn = document.getElementById('panel-btn-' + id);
448:             if (btn) btn.classList.toggle('fsp-dock-btn-open', !!(panels[id]?.open));
449:         });
450:     }
451: 
452:     // ---- Animation: card flies from source element to destination panel ----
453:     function animateCardMove(srcEl, destPanelEl) {
454:         if (!srcEl || !destPanelEl) return;
455: 
456:         const fromRect = srcEl.getBoundingClientRect();
457:         const destBody = destPanelEl.querySelector('.fsp-body');
458:         const toRect   = (destBody || destPanelEl).getBoundingClientRect();
459: 
460:         // Build ghost
461:         const ghost = srcEl.cloneNode(true);
462:         Object.assign(ghost.style, {
463:             position:      'fixed',
464:             left:          fromRect.left + 'px',
465:             top:           fromRect.top  + 'px',
466:             width:         fromRect.width + 'px',
467:             height:        fromRect.height + 'px',
468:             zIndex:        '9000',
469:             pointerEvents: 'none',
470:             margin:        '0',
471:             transition:    'none',
472:             opacity:       '1',
473:             boxShadow:     '0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)',
474:             borderRadius:  '4px'
475:         });
476:         document.body.appendChild(ghost);
477: 
478:         // Double-RAF ensures the initial position paints before the transition starts
479:         requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(() => {
480:             ghost.style.transition = [
481:                 'left 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94)',
482:                 'top  0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94)',
483:                 'opacity 0.25s ease',
484:                 'transform 0.3s ease'
485:             ].join(', ');
486:             ghost.style.left      = (toRect.left + 8)  + 'px';
487:             ghost.style.top       = (toRect.top  + 8)  + 'px';
488:             ghost.style.opacity   = '0';
489:             ghost.style.transform = 'scale(0.72)';
490:             setTimeout(() => ghost.remove(), 340);
491:         }));
492:     }
493: 
494:     // Animation: card falls to deck (called when a common-area scroll is displaced)
495:     function animateCardToDeck(srcEl) {
496:         if (!srcEl) return;
497:         const rect = srcEl.getBoundingClientRect();
498:         const ghost = srcEl.cloneNode(true);
499:         Object.assign(ghost.style, {
500:             position: 'fixed', left: rect.left + 'px', top: rect.top + 'px',
501:             width: rect.width + 'px', height: rect.height + 'px',
502:             zIndex: '9000', pointerEvents: 'none', margin: '0',
503:             transition: 'none', opacity: '1'
504:         });
505:         document.body.appendChild(ghost);
506:         requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(() => {
507:             ghost.style.transition = 'top 0.38s ease-in, opacity 0.3s ease, transform 0.38s ease';
508:             ghost.style.top       = (window.innerHeight + 60) + 'px';
509:             ghost.style.opacity   = '0';
510:             ghost.style.transform = 'scale(0.55) rotate(8deg)';
511:             setTimeout(() => ghost.remove(), 420);
512:         }));
513:     }
514: 
515:     // ---- Init ----
516:     function init() {
517:         if (initialized) return;
518:         initialized = true;
519: 
520:         createPanel('hand',   'Hand');
521:         createPanel('active', 'Active');
522:         createPanel('common', 'Common');
523: 
524:         // Wire the three dock panel buttons
525:         ['hand', 'active', 'common'].forEach(id => {
526:             const btn = document.getElementById('panel-btn-' + id);
527:             if (btn) btn.addEventListener('click', e => {
528:                 e.preventDefault();
529:                 if (panels[id].open) { closePanel(id); } else { openPanel(id); }
530:                 _updateDockBtn();
531:             });
532:         });
533: 
534:         // Override spellSystem.showInventory so Transmute and other callers use panels
535:         const hookSpell = () => {
536:             if (!window.spellSystem) return false;
537:             window.spellSystem.showInventory = () => {
538:                 Object.keys(panels).forEach(id => { if (!panels[id].open) openPanel(id); });
539:                 refresh();
540:             };
541:             return true;
542:         };
543: 
544:         if (!hookSpell()) {
545:             const t = setInterval(() => { if (hookSpell()) clearInterval(t); }, 400);
546:         }
547: 
548:         // ── Hover preview: enlarged card that floats outside the panel ──────
549:         _initCardHoverPreview();
550: 
551:         // Expose globally
552:         window.ScrollPanelSystem = { toggle, refresh, openPanel, closePanel, animateCardMove, animateCardToDeck };
553:     }
554: 
555:     // ---- Hover preview panel ----
556:     function _initCardHoverPreview() {
557:         const preview = document.createElement('div');
558:         preview.className = 'fsp-card-preview';
559:         preview.style.display = 'none';
560:         document.body.appendChild(preview);
561: 
562:         let hideTimer = null;
563:         let showTimer = null;
564:         let throbberEl = null;
565: 
566:         function clearThrobber() {
567:             if (throbberEl) { throbberEl.remove(); throbberEl = null; }
568:         }
569: 
570:         function showPreview(card) {
571:             clearTimeout(hideTimer);
572:             clearTimeout(showTimer);
573:             clearThrobber();
574: 
575:             // Show a small spinner on the card for 500ms before the preview appears
576:             const elColor = card.style.getPropertyValue('--el-color') || '#888';
577:             const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
578:             const dot = document.createElement('div');
579:             dot.style.cssText = `
580:                 position: fixed;
581:                 left: ${cardRect.right - 18}px;
582:                 top: ${cardRect.top + 6}px;
583:                 width: 12px; height: 12px;
584:                 border: 2px solid ${elColor}55;
585:                 border-top-color: ${elColor};
586:                 border-radius: 50%;
587:                 animation: scroll-popup-spin 0.5s linear infinite;
588:                 pointer-events: none;
589:                 z-index: 9999;
590:             `;
591:             document.body.appendChild(dot);
592:             throbberEl = dot;
593: 
594:             showTimer = setTimeout(() => {
595:                 clearThrobber();
596: 
597:             // Clone the card DOM (fast) then replace the pattern with a fresh
598:             // animated instance — cloneNode gives a static snapshot, not live animation
599:             const clone = card.cloneNode(true);
600:             clone.querySelector('.fsp-card-actions')?.remove();
601:             const elColor = card.style.getPropertyValue('--el-color');
602:             if (elColor) clone.style.setProperty('--el-color', elColor);
603: 
604:             // Rebuild pattern visual so cycling animations run properly
605:             const scrollName = card.dataset.scrollName;
606:             const sp = window.spellSystem;
607:             if (scrollName && sp) {
608:                 const def = sp.patterns?.[scrollName] || window.SCROLL_DEFINITIONS?.[scrollName];
609:                 const element = typeof sp.getScrollElement === 'function'
610:                     ? sp.getScrollElement(scrollName) : 'earth';
611:                 const patWrap = clone.querySelector('.fsp-card-pattern');
612:                 if (patWrap && def?.patterns && typeof sp.createPatternVisual === 'function') {
613:                     patWrap.innerHTML = '';
614:                     try {
615:                         const freshVisual = sp.createPatternVisual(def, element);
616:                         patWrap.appendChild(freshVisual);
617:                     } catch (e) {}
618:                 }
619:             }
620: 
621:             preview.innerHTML = '';
622:             preview.appendChild(clone);
623:             preview.style.display = 'block';
624:             preview.style.setProperty('--el-color', elColor || '#888');
625: 
626:             // Position: prefer to the right of the parent panel; fall back to left
627:             const cardRect  = card.getBoundingClientRect();
628:             const panelEl   = card.closest('.fsp');
629:             const panelRect = panelEl ? panelEl.getBoundingClientRect() : cardRect;
630: 
631:             const previewW = 480;
632:             const gap      = 14;
633:             let left = panelRect.right + gap;
634:             if (left + previewW > window.innerWidth - 8) {
635:                 left = panelRect.left - previewW - gap;
636:             }
637:             let top = cardRect.top;
638:             // Keep preview within viewport vertically
639:             const maxTop = window.innerHeight - preview.offsetHeight - 8;
640:             if (top > maxTop) top = Math.max(8, maxTop);
641: 
642:             preview.style.left = left + 'px';
643:             preview.style.top  = top  + 'px';
644:             }, 500); // 500ms hover delay
645:         }
646: 
647:         function hidePreview() {
648:             clearTimeout(showTimer);
649:             clearThrobber();
650:             hideTimer = setTimeout(() => { preview.style.display = 'none'; }, 80);
651:         }
652: 
653:         // Delegation — works for dynamically rendered cards
654:         document.addEventListener('mouseover', e => {
655:             const card = e.target.closest('.fsp-card');
656:             if (card && card.closest('.fsp')) {   // only cards inside a panel (not the preview itself)
657:                 showPreview(card);
658:             }
659:         });
660:         document.addEventListener('mouseout', e => {
661:             const card = e.target.closest('.fsp-card');
662:             if (card && card.closest('.fsp')) {
663:                 hidePreview();
664:             }
665:         });
666:         // Keep preview alive while the mouse is over it
667:         preview.addEventListener('mouseover', () => clearTimeout(hideTimer));
668:         preview.addEventListener('mouseout',  hidePreview);
669:     }
670: 
671:     // Boot after DOM ready
672:     if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
673:         document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
674:     } else {
675:         // DOMContentLoaded already fired; wait a tick for game-ui.js to set onclick
676:         setTimeout(init, 0);
677:     }
678: 
679:     return { init, toggle, refresh, openPanel, closePanel, animateCardMove, animateCardToDeck };
680: })();
</file>

238:         <div style="display: flex; gap: 15px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;">

601:     <script>
602:     (function() {
603:         const _clickSnd = new Audio('minecraft-click-cropped.mp3');
604:         _clickSnd.volume = 0.25;
605:         window.uiSoundEnabled   = localStorage.getItem('godaigo_ui_sound')   !== 'false';
606:         window.gameSoundEnabled = localStorage.getItem('godaigo_game_sound') !== 'false';
607:         document.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
608:             if (window.uiSoundEnabled && e.target.closest('button')) {
609:                 _clickSnd.currentTime = 0;
610:                 _clickSnd.play().catch(() => {});
611:             }
612:         });
613:     })();
614:     </script>
615: 
616:     <script>
617:     function showStoneInfoPopup() {
618:         const existing = document.getElementById('stone-info-overlay');
619:         if (existing) { existing.remove(); return; }
620: 
621:         const v = window.IMG_V || '';
622:         const stones = [
623:             {
624:                 name: 'Earth', color: '#69d83a', darkColor: '#3a7820',
625:                 rank: 5, cost: 5,
626:                 img: 'images/mountainsymbol.png' + v,
627:                 ability: 'Cannot be walked through.',
628:                 interaction: null
629:             },
630:             {
631:                 name: 'Water', color: '#5894f4', darkColor: '#315286',
632:                 rank: 4, cost: 4,
633:                 img: 'images/watersymbol.png' + v,
634:                 ability: 'Adopts the ability of an adjacent Earth or Wind stone.',
635:                 interaction: null
636:             },
637:             {
638:                 name: 'Fire', color: '#ed1b43', darkColor: '#830f25',
639:                 rank: 3, cost: 3,
640:                 img: 'images/firesymbol.png' + v,
641:                 ability: 'Stones other than Void or Fire are destroyed if adjacent to them.',
642:                 interaction: 'Countered by: Void stones'
643:             },
644:             {
645:                 name: 'Wind', color: '#ffce00', darkColor: '#8e7300',
646:                 rank: 2, cost: 2,
647:                 img: 'images/windsymbol.png' + v,
648:                 ability: 'Costs zero AP to walk through.',
649:                 interaction: null
650:             },
651:             {
652:                 name: 'Void', color: '#9458f4', darkColor: '#533186',
653:                 rank: 1, cost: 1,
654:                 img: 'images/voidsymbol.png' + v,
655:                 ability: 'Nullifies the effects of adjacent stones. Can be spent as action points from your inventory.',
656:                 interaction: 'Counters: adjacent stone effects'
657:             }
658:         ];
659: 
660:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
661:         overlay.id = 'stone-info-overlay';
662:         overlay.className = 'retro-dlg-overlay';
663:         overlay.style.zIndex = '3000';
664:         overlay.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); });
665: 
666:         const box = document.createElement('div');
667:         box.className = 'retro-dlg-box wide';
668:         box.style.cssText = 'max-width: 480px; padding: 0; overflow: hidden;';
669: 
670:         // Header
671:         const header = document.createElement('div');
672:         header.style.cssText = `
673:             padding: 14px 18px 12px;
674:             border-bottom: 1px solid #333;
675:             display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
676:         `;
677:         const titleEl = document.createElement('div');
678:         titleEl.textContent = 'Elemental Reference';
679:         titleEl.style.cssText = `font-family: var(--font-pixel); font-size: 12px; color: #e8dcc8; letter-spacing: 1px;`;
680:         const closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
681:         closeBtn.textContent = '×';
682:         closeBtn.className = 'retro-dlg-btn';
683:         closeBtn.style.cssText = 'padding: 1px 10px; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1;';
684:         closeBtn.onclick = () => overlay.remove();
685:         header.appendChild(titleEl);
686:         header.appendChild(closeBtn);
687:         box.appendChild(header);
688: 
689:         // Stone rows
690:         const list = document.createElement('div');
691:         list.style.cssText = 'padding: 10px 16px 16px;';
692: 
693:         stones.forEach((s, i) => {
694:             const row = document.createElement('div');
695:             row.style.cssText = `
696:                 display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: flex-start;
697:                 padding: 12px 0;
698:                 ${i < stones.length - 1 ? 'border-bottom: 1px solid #222;' : ''}
699:             `;
700: 
701:             // Stone circle visual (matches board rendering)
702:             const circle = document.createElement('div');
703:             circle.style.cssText = `
704:                 width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
705:                 background: ${s.darkColor};
706:                 border: 2px solid ${s.color};
707:                 box-shadow: 0 0 10px ${s.color}44;
708:                 display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
709:                 overflow: hidden; position: relative;
710:             `;
711:             const img = document.createElement('img');
712:             img.src = s.img;
713:             img.alt = s.name;
714:             img.style.cssText = 'width: 38px; height: 38px; object-fit: contain;';
715:             circle.appendChild(img);
716: 
717:             // Text block
718:             const info = document.createElement('div');
719:             info.style.cssText = 'flex: 1;';
720: 
721:             const nameRow = document.createElement('div');
722:             nameRow.style.cssText = 'display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 4px;';
723: 
724:             const name = document.createElement('span');
725:             name.textContent = s.name;
726:             name.style.cssText = `font-family: var(--font-terminal); font-size: 20px; color: ${s.color};`;
727: 
728:             const rank = document.createElement('span');
729:             rank.textContent = `Rank ${s.rank}  ·  ${s.cost} AP`;
730:             rank.style.cssText = `font-family: var(--font-pixel); font-size: 8px; color: #ccc; letter-spacing: 1px;`;
731: 
732:             nameRow.appendChild(name);
733:             nameRow.appendChild(rank);
734:             info.appendChild(nameRow);
735: 
736:             const desc = document.createElement('div');
737:             desc.textContent = s.ability;
738:             desc.style.cssText = `font-family: var(--font-terminal); font-size: 15px; color: #bbb; line-height: 1.45;`;
739:             info.appendChild(desc);
740: 
741:             if (s.interaction) {
742:                 const note = document.createElement('div');
743:                 note.textContent = s.interaction;
744:                 note.style.cssText = `
745:                     font-family: var(--font-pixel); font-size: 8px;
746:                     color: ${s.color}99; margin-top: 5px; letter-spacing: 1px;
747:                 `;
748:                 info.appendChild(note);
749:             }
750: 
751:             row.appendChild(circle);
752:             row.appendChild(info);
753:             list.appendChild(row);
754:         });
755: 
756:         box.appendChild(list);
757:         overlay.appendChild(box);
758:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
759:     }
760:     </script>
761: </body>
762: </html>
</file>

<file path="js/lobby.js">
   1: // ========================================
   2:         // AUTH SYSTEM (Supabase Auth)
   3:         // ========================================
   4: 
   5:         // On page load: restore an existing session so the user doesn't have to log in again
   6:         async function checkAuthSession() {
   7:             const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();
   8:             if (session) {
   9:                 onAuthSuccess(session.user);
  10:             }
  11:         }
  12: 
  13:         async function authLogin() {
  14:             const username = document.getElementById('auth-username').value.trim();
  15:             const password = document.getElementById('auth-password').value;
  16:             if (!username || !password) { showAuthError('Please enter a username and password.'); return; }
  17: 
  18:             setAuthLoading(true);
  19:             const email = username.toLowerCase() + '@godaigo.game';
  20:             const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({ email, password });
  21:             setAuthLoading(false);
  22: 
  23:             if (error) { showAuthError(error.message); return; }
  24:             onAuthSuccess(data.user);
  25:         }
  26: 
  27:         async function authRegister() {
  28:             const username = document.getElementById('auth-username').value.trim();
  29:             const password = document.getElementById('auth-password').value;
  30:             if (!username) { showAuthError('Please enter a username.'); return; }
  31:             if (password.length < 6) { showAuthError('Password must be at least 6 characters.'); return; }
  32:             if (!/^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]+$/.test(username)) {
  33:                 showAuthError('Username may only contain letters, numbers, _, -, .');
  34:                 return;
  35:             }
  36: 
  37:             setAuthLoading(true);
  38:             const email = username.toLowerCase() + '@godaigo.game';
  39:             const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signUp({
  40:                 email,
  41:                 password,
  42:                 options: { data: { username } }
  43:             });
  44:             setAuthLoading(false);
  45: 
  46:             if (error) {
  47:                 // Replace the internal fake email with just the username in error messages
  48:                 showAuthError(error.message.replace(email, username));
  49:                 return;
  50:             }
  51:             if (data.session) {
  52:                 onAuthSuccess(data.user);
  53:             } else {
  54:                 // Email confirmation is still enabled in Supabase dashboard
  55:                 showAuthError('Registration failed: email confirmation is required. Please disable it in your Supabase Authentication settings.');
  56:             }
  57:         }
  58: 
  59:         async function authSignOut() {
  60:             await supabase.auth.signOut();
  61:             if (window.crtOverlay) window.crtOverlay.loadForUser(null);
  62:             document.getElementById('multiplayer-lobby').style.display = 'none';
  63:             document.getElementById('auth-screen').style.display = 'block';
  64:             document.getElementById('auth-bar').style.display = 'none';
  65:             // Stop browser auto-refresh and hide panels so the next user starts fresh
  66:             stopBrowserRefresh();
  67:             const browserPanel = document.getElementById('game-browser-panel');
  68:             const waitingPanel = document.getElementById('waiting-room-panel');
  69:             if (browserPanel) browserPanel.style.display = 'none';
  70:             if (waitingPanel) waitingPanel.style.display = 'none';
  71:             const readyControls = document.getElementById('ready-controls');
  72:             if (readyControls) readyControls.style.display = 'none';
  73:             document.getElementById('auth-password').value = '';
  74:             document.getElementById('auth-error').style.display = 'none';
  75:         }
  76: 
  77:         function onAuthSuccess(user) {
  78:             // Derive display username from metadata (set on register) or from synthetic email
  79:             const username = user.user_metadata?.username
  80:                 || user.email?.replace('@godaigo.game', '')
  81:                 || 'Player';
  82: 
  83:             // Store globally so all lobby functions use it without reading the DOM
  84:             lobbyUsername = username;
  85: 
  86:             // Keep the hidden input in sync (some code paths still read it as a fallback)
  87:             const usernameInput = document.getElementById('username-input');
  88:             if (usernameInput) usernameInput.value = username;
  89: 
  90:             // Show signed-in bar inside the lobby
  91:             const authBar = document.getElementById('auth-bar');
  92:             const authBarName = document.getElementById('auth-bar-name');
  93:             if (authBarName) authBarName.textContent = `Signed in as ${username}`;
  94:             if (authBar) authBar.style.display = 'flex';
  95: 
  96:             // Swap screens
  97:             document.getElementById('auth-screen').style.display = 'none';
  98:             document.getElementById('multiplayer-lobby').style.display = 'block';
  99: 
 100:             // Show the game browser (Panel A)
 101:             showGameBrowser();
 102: 
 103:             // Initialise gamification profile and award daily login gold
 104:             if (window.gami) {
 105:                 window.gami.init(user.id, username).then(() => {
 106:                     window.gami.onDailyLogin();
 107:                     window.loadMainLeaderboard?.();
 108:                 });
 109:             }
 110: 
 111:             // Load CRT settings for this user
 112:             if (window.crtOverlay) {
 113:                 window.crtOverlay.loadForUser(user.id);
 114:             }
 115:         }
 116: 
 117:         function showAuthError(msg) {
 118:             const el = document.getElementById('auth-error');
 119:             if (!el) return;
 120:             el.textContent = msg;
 121:             el.style.display = 'block';
 122:         }
 123: 
 124:         function setAuthLoading(on) {
 125:             const loading = document.getElementById('auth-loading');
 126:             const loginBtn = document.getElementById('auth-login-btn');
 127:             const regBtn = document.getElementById('auth-register-btn');
 128:             if (loading) loading.style.display = on ? 'block' : 'none';
 129:             if (loginBtn) loginBtn.disabled = on;
 130:             if (regBtn) regBtn.disabled = on;
 131:         }

 137:         let isHost = false; // Track if this player is the host
 138: 
 139:         let isJoining = false; // Prevent double-joins
 140: 
 141:         let lobbyUsername = ''; // Username from auth — set in onAuthSuccess, read everywhere instead of the hidden input
 142:         let localReadyState = false; // Tracked locally to avoid re-reading from DB in toggleReady
 143:

 145:         // GAME BROWSER & ROOM MANAGEMENT

 148:         // --- Panel toggle helpers ---
 149: 
 150:         function showGameBrowser() {
 151:             const browserPanel = document.getElementById('game-browser-panel');
 152:             const waitingPanel = document.getElementById('waiting-room-panel');
 153:             if (browserPanel) browserPanel.style.display = 'block';
 154:             if (waitingPanel) waitingPanel.style.display = 'none';
 155:             // Unlock + clear room-name-input so the player can choose a fresh name next time
 156:             const roomNameInput = document.getElementById('room-name-input');
 157:             if (roomNameInput) {
 158:                 roomNameInput.disabled = false;
 159:                 roomNameInput.style.opacity = '';
 160:                 roomNameInput.value = '';
 161:             }
 162:             refreshGameBrowser();
 163:             startBrowserRefresh(); // auto-refresh every 5 seconds
 164:         }
 165: 
 166:         function showWaitingRoom(gameId, joinCode, isPrivate, roomName) {
 167:             currentGameId = gameId;
 168:             currentJoinCode = joinCode || null;
 169:             const browserPanel = document.getElementById('game-browser-panel');
 170:             const waitingPanel = document.getElementById('waiting-room-panel');
 171:             if (browserPanel) browserPanel.style.display = 'none';
 172:             if (waitingPanel) waitingPanel.style.display = 'block';
 173:             // Display the room name (static — set once at creation)
 174:             const roomNameValue = document.getElementById('room-name-value');
 175:             if (roomNameValue) roomNameValue.textContent = roomName || 'Game Room';
 176:             // Show/hide room code section
 177:             const codeDisplay = document.getElementById('room-code-display');
 178:             if (isPrivate && joinCode) {
 179:                 codeDisplay.style.display = 'block';
 180:                 document.getElementById('room-code-value').textContent = joinCode;
 181:             } else {
 182:                 if (codeDisplay) codeDisplay.style.display = 'none';
 183:             }
 184:             // Update badge
 185:             const badge = document.getElementById('room-type-badge');
 186:             if (badge) badge.textContent = isPrivate ? 'PRIVATE' : 'PUBLIC';
 187:             stopBrowserRefresh();
 188:         }
 189: 
 190:         function copyRoomCode() {
 191:             if (currentJoinCode) navigator.clipboard?.writeText(currentJoinCode);
 192:             updateStatus('Room code copied!');
 193:         }
 194: 
 195:         function setBrowserStatus(msg) {
 196:             const el = document.getElementById('browser-status');
 197:             if (el) el.textContent = msg;
 198:         }
 199: 
 200:         // --- Create room ---
 201: 
 202:         async function hostPublicGame()    { await createRoom(false); }
 203:         async function createPrivateRoom() { await createRoom(true);  }
 204: 
 205:         async function createRoom(isPrivate) {
 206:             const username = lobbyUsername;
 207:             if (!username) { alert('Not signed in — please sign in first'); return; }
 208: 
 209:             // Read custom room name; fall back to "<username>'s Game" if left blank
 210:             const roomNameRaw = document.getElementById('room-name-input')?.value.trim();
 211:             const roomName = roomNameRaw || (username + "'s Game");
 212: 
 213:             // --- Auto-clean stale player entries for this username ---
 214:             const twoMinutesAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 2 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
 215:             const { data: existingPlayers } = await supabase
 216:                 .from('players')
 217:                 .select('id, game_id, created_at')
 218:                 .eq('username', username);
 219:             if (existingPlayers?.length) {
 220:                 const gameIds = existingPlayers.map(p => p.game_id).filter(Boolean);
 221:                 if (gameIds.length) {
 222:                     const { data: waitingRooms } = await supabase
 223:                         .from('game_room')
 224:                         .select('id')
 225:                         .in('id', gameIds)
 226:                         .eq('status', 'waiting');
 227:                     if (waitingRooms?.length) {
 228:                         // Only auto-clean entries older than 2 minutes (stale sessions)
 229:                         const staleIds = existingPlayers
 230:                             .filter(p => p.created_at < twoMinutesAgo)
 231:                             .map(p => p.id);
 232:                         if (staleIds.length) {
 233:                             await supabase.rpc('remove_players', { p_player_ids: staleIds });
 234:                             console.log('🧹 Auto-cleaned stale player entries:', staleIds);
 235:                         } else {
 236:                             setBrowserStatus('You\'re already in a waiting room. Leave it first before creating a new one.');
 237:                             return;
 238:                         }
 239:                     }
 240:                 }
 241:             }
 242: 
 243:             setBrowserStatus('Creating room…');
 244:             await supabase.rpc('cleanup_stale_rooms');
 245:             const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('create_game_room',
 246:                 { p_is_private: isPrivate, p_host_name: roomName });
 247:             if (error || !data?.length) {
 248:                 console.error('❌ create_game_room RPC failed:', error);
 249:                 setBrowserStatus('Error creating room: ' + (error?.message || 'no data returned — see Supabase SQL Editor'));
 250:                 return;
 251:             }
 252:             const { room_id, join_code } = data[0];
 253: 
 254:             // Lock the room-name input — can't rename mid-game; unlocked again on leaveRoom()
 255:             const roomNameInput = document.getElementById('room-name-input');
 256:             if (roomNameInput) {
 257:                 roomNameInput.disabled = true;
 258:                 roomNameInput.style.opacity = '0.5';
 259:             }
 260: 
 261:             const ok = await joinRoomAsPlayer(room_id, username);
 262:             if (!ok) return;
 263:             isHost = true;
 264:             showWaitingRoom(room_id, join_code, isPrivate, roomName);
 265:         }
 266: 
 267:         // --- Join by code ---
 268: 
 269:         async function joinByCode() {
 270:             const code = document.getElementById('join-code-input').value.trim().toUpperCase();
 271:             if (code.length !== 6) { setBrowserStatus('Enter a 6-character room code'); return; }
 272:             setBrowserStatus('Looking up room…');
 273:             const { data: room } = await supabase
 274:                 .from('game_room')
 275:                 .select('id,status,is_private,join_code,host_name')
 276:                 .eq('join_code', code)
 277:                 .single();
 278:             if (!room) { setBrowserStatus('Room not found — check the code and try again'); return; }
 279:             if (room.status !== 'waiting') { setBrowserStatus('That game has already started'); return; }
 280:             const username = lobbyUsername;
 281:             if (!username) { alert('Not signed in — please sign in first'); return; }
 282:             const ok = await joinRoomAsPlayer(room.id, username);
 283:             if (!ok) return;
 284:             showWaitingRoom(room.id, room.join_code, room.is_private, room.host_name);
 285:         }
 286: 
 287:         // --- Join a public game from browser ---
 288: 
 289:         async function joinPublicGame(gameId) {
 290:             const username = lobbyUsername;
 291:             if (!username) { alert('Not signed in — please sign in first'); return; }
 292:             const { data: room } = await supabase
 293:                 .from('game_room')
 294:                 .select('id,status,is_private,join_code,host_name')
 295:                 .eq('id', gameId)
 296:                 .single();
 297:             if (!room || room.status !== 'waiting') { refreshGameBrowser(); return; }
 298:             const ok = await joinRoomAsPlayer(gameId, username);
 299:             if (!ok) return;
 300:             showWaitingRoom(gameId, null, false, room.host_name);
 301:         }
 302: 
 303:         // --- Shared join helper ---
 304: 
 305:         async function joinRoomAsPlayer(gameId, username) {
 306:             // Auto-clean stale entries for this username; block only if last_seen is recent (active session)
 307:             // A player is considered active if their heartbeat fired within the last 90 seconds.
 308:             // last_seen may be NULL for a brand-new row that hasn't heartbeated yet — treat NULL as stale
 309:             // unless the row was created within the last 30 seconds (to avoid stomping a fresh join).
 310:             const ninetySecondsAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 90 * 1000).toISOString();
 311:             const thirtySecondsAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 1000).toISOString();
 312:             const { data: existing } = await supabase
 313:                 .from('players')
 314:                 .select('id, username, created_at, last_seen')
 315:                 .eq('game_id', gameId);
 316:             const match = existing?.filter(p => p.username === username) || [];
 317:             if (match.length) {
 318:                 const stale = match.filter(p => {
 319:                     // Active = last_seen is recent, OR row is brand-new (< 30s) with no last_seen yet
 320:                     if (p.last_seen && p.last_seen > ninetySecondsAgo) return false; // active
 321:                     if (!p.last_seen && p.created_at > thirtySecondsAgo) return false; // brand-new
 322:                     return true; // stale
 323:                 });
 324:                 const active = match.filter(p => !stale.includes(p));
 325:                 if (stale.length) {
 326:                     await supabase.rpc('remove_players', { p_player_ids: stale.map(p => p.id) });
 327:                     console.log('🧹 Auto-cleaned stale entry for', username);
 328:                 }
 329:                 if (active.length) {
 330:                     setBrowserStatus('That username is already in this room');
 331:                     return false;
 332:                 }
 333:             }
 334:             const { data, error } = await supabase
 335:                 .from('players')
 336:                 .insert([{ username, is_ready: false, game_id: gameId }])
 337:                 .select()
 338:                 .single();
 339:             if (error) { setBrowserStatus('Could not join: ' + error.message); return false; }
 340:             myPlayerId = data.id;
 341:             localReadyState = false;
 342:             updateReadyButton(false);
 343:             currentGameId = gameId;  // must be set BEFORE subscribeToLobby so filters use the correct room ID
 344:             isMultiplayer = true;
 345:             // Determine host: first player by creation time
 346:             const { data: all } = await supabase
 347:                 .from('players')
 348:                 .select('*')
 349:                 .eq('game_id', gameId)
 350:                 .order('created_at', { ascending: true });
 351:             isHost = all?.[0]?.id === myPlayerId;
 352:             // Host is implicitly ready — their action is clicking Start, not toggling ready
 353:             if (isHost) {
 354:                 localReadyState = true;
 355:                 await supabase.from('players').update({ is_ready: true }).eq('id', myPlayerId);
 356:             }
 357:             document.getElementById('ready-controls').style.display = 'block';
 358:             updateReadyButton(localReadyState);
 359:             subscribeToLobby();
 360:             updateHeartbeat();
 361:             startLobbyPoll();
 362:             updatePlayerList();
 363:             console.log('✅ Joined room', gameId, 'as', username, isHost ? '(HOST)' : '');
 364:             return true;
 365:         }
 366: 
 367:         // --- Leave room (return to game browser) ---
 368: 
 369:         async function leaveRoom() {
 370:             const leavingRoomId = currentGameId; // capture before we null it out
 371:             const leavingAsHost = isHost;
 372: 
 373:             // If we're mid-game, reset game state first before returning to lobby
 374:             const gameContainer = document.querySelector('.game-container');
 375:             const inGame = gameContainer && gameContainer.style.display !== 'none';
 376:             if (inGame && typeof resetToLobby === 'function') {
 377:                 resetToLobby();
 378:             }
 379: 
 380:             if (myPlayerId) {
 381:                 await supabase.rpc('remove_player', { p_player_id: myPlayerId });
 382:             }
 383: 
 384:             // If the host leaves, delete the game_room entirely so it disappears from
 385:             // other players' browser lists immediately rather than lingering as an empty room.
 386:             if (leavingAsHost && leavingRoomId) {
 387:                 const { error: roomDeleteErr } = await supabase
 388:                     .from('game_room')
 389:                     .delete()
 390:                     .eq('id', leavingRoomId);
 391:                 if (roomDeleteErr) {
 392:                     console.warn('⚠️ Could not delete game_room on host leave:', roomDeleteErr.message);
 393:                 } else {
 394:                     console.log('🗑️ Deleted game_room', leavingRoomId, '(host left waiting room)');
 395:                 }
 396:             }
 397: 
 398:             myPlayerId = null;
 399:             currentGameId = null;
 400:             currentJoinCode = null;
 401:             isHost = false;
 402:             isMultiplayer = false;
 403:             isJoining = false;
 404:             stopLobbyPoll();
 405:             if (playersSubscription) { playersSubscription.unsubscribe(); playersSubscription = null; }
 406:             if (gameRoomSubscription) { gameRoomSubscription.unsubscribe(); gameRoomSubscription = null; }
 407:             if (gameChannel) { gameChannel.unsubscribe(); gameChannel = null; }
 408:             document.getElementById('ready-controls').style.display = 'none';
 409:             showGameBrowser();
 410:         }
 411: 
 412:         // --- Public game browser ---
 413: 
 414:         let browserRefreshInterval = null;
 415: 
 416:         async function refreshGameBrowser() {
 417:             const refreshBtn = document.getElementById('refresh-browser-btn');
 418:             if (refreshBtn) refreshBtn.textContent = '…';
 419: 
 420:             // Sweep stale players via server-side RPC (client DELETE is blocked by RLS)
 421:             await supabase.rpc('cleanup_inactive_players');
 422: 
 423:             const { data: rooms } = await supabase
 424:                 .from('game_room')
 425:                 .select('id,host_name,created_at')
 426:                 .eq('status', 'waiting')
 427:                 .eq('is_private', false)
 428:                 .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
 429: 
 430:             if (refreshBtn) refreshBtn.textContent = 'Refresh';
 431: 
 432:             const list = document.getElementById('public-games-list');
 433:             if (!list) return;
 434: 
 435:             if (!rooms?.length) {
 436:                 list.innerHTML = '<p style="color:#ccc;font-style:italic;text-align:center;padding:20px 0;margin:0;">No public games open. Host one!</p>';
 437:                 return;
 438:             }
 439: 
 440:             // Fetch player counts for each room in one query
 441:             const ids = rooms.map(r => r.id);
 442:             const { data: players } = await supabase
 443:                 .from('players')
 444:                 .select('game_id')
 445:                 .in('game_id', ids);
 446:             const counts = {};
 447:             (players || []).forEach(p => { counts[p.game_id] = (counts[p.game_id] || 0) + 1; });
 448: 
 449:             // Auto-delete ghost rooms via RPC (client DELETE blocked by RLS)
 450:             supabase.rpc('cleanup_ghost_rooms').then(() => {
 451:                 const ghostCount = rooms.filter(r => !counts[r.id]).length;
 452:                 if (ghostCount) console.log('🗑️ Cleaned up', ghostCount, 'empty ghost room(s)');
 453:             });
 454: 
 455:             // Only show rooms that actually have players in them
 456:             const liveRooms = rooms.filter(r => (counts[r.id] || 0) > 0);
 457:             if (!liveRooms.length) {
 458:                 list.innerHTML = '<p style="color:#ccc;font-style:italic;text-align:center;padding:20px 0;margin:0;">No public games open. Host one!</p>';
 459:                 return;
 460:             }
 461: 
 462:             list.innerHTML = liveRooms.map(r => `
 463:                 <div class="game-room-card" onclick="joinPublicGame(${r.id})">
 464:                     <div class="game-room-host">${_esc(r.host_name || 'Unnamed Game')}</div>
 465:                     <div class="game-room-count">${counts[r.id]} / 5</div>
 466:                     <button class="game-room-join-btn">Join</button>
 467:                 </div>`).join('');
 468:         }
 469: 
 470:         function startBrowserRefresh() {
 471:             stopBrowserRefresh();
 472:             browserRefreshInterval = setInterval(refreshGameBrowser, 5000);
 473:         }
 474:         function stopBrowserRefresh() {
 475:             clearInterval(browserRefreshInterval);
 476:             browserRefreshInterval = null;
 477:         }
 478: 
 479:         // Simple HTML escape helper
 480:         function _esc(str) {
 481:             return String(str)
 482:                 .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
 483:                 .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
 484:                 .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
 485:                 .replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
 486:         }
 487: 
 488:         // ── Retro dialog helpers ──────────────────────────────────
 489:         /**
 490:          * Show a retro-styled confirm dialog.
 491:          * onOk is called if the player clicks OK; nothing happens on Cancel.
 492:          */
 493:         function showRetroConfirm(title, lines, onOk) {
 494:             const id = 'retro-confirm-overlay';
 495:             if (document.getElementById(id)) return; // prevent duplicates
 496: 
 497:             const bodyLines = lines.map(l => `<div class="retro-dlg-line">${l}</div>`).join('');
 498:             const el = document.createElement('div');
 499:             el.id        = id;
 500:             el.className = 'retro-dlg-overlay';
 501:             el.innerHTML = `
 502:                 <div class="retro-dlg-box">
 503:                     <div class="retro-dlg-title">${title}</div>
 504:                     <div class="retro-dlg-body">${bodyLines}</div>
 505:                     <div class="retro-dlg-btns">
 506:                         <button class="retro-dlg-btn ok"     id="retro-confirm-ok">OK</button>
 507:                         <button class="retro-dlg-btn cancel" id="retro-confirm-cancel">Cancel</button>
 508:                     </div>
 509:                 </div>`;
 510: 
 511:             document.body.appendChild(el);
 512: 
 513:             document.getElementById('retro-confirm-ok').onclick = () => {
 514:                 el.remove();
 515:                 onOk();
 516:             };
 517:             document.getElementById('retro-confirm-cancel').onclick = () => el.remove();
 518:         }
 519: 
 520:         // ========================================
 521:         // END GAME BROWSER & ROOM MANAGEMENT
 522:         // ========================================
 523: 
 524:         // Sequence tracking for detecting out-of-order messages and deduplication
 525:         let scrollEventSequence = 0;
 526:         const receivedSequences = new Set();
 527: 
 528:         // Periodically clean old sequence IDs (keep last 1000 to prevent memory leak)
 529:         setInterval(() => {
 530:             if (receivedSequences.size > 1000) {
 531:                 const arr = Array.from(receivedSequences);
 532:                 receivedSequences.clear();
 533:                 // Keep most recent 500
 534:                 arr.slice(-500).forEach(id => receivedSequences.add(id));
 535:                 console.log('🧹 Cleaned old event IDs from deduplication cache');
 536:             }
 537:         }, 30000); // Every 30 seconds
 538: 
 539:         // Join the lobby
 540:         async function joinLobby() {
 541:             // Prevent double-joins
 542:             if (isJoining) {
 543:                 console.log('Already joining, please wait...');
 544:                 return;
 545:             }
 546: 
 547:             const username = lobbyUsername;
 548: 
 549:             if (!username) {
 550:                 alert('Not signed in — please sign in first');
 551:                 return;
 552:             }
 553: 
 554:             // Disable input and button, show loading spinner
 555:             isJoining = true;
 556:             const joinButton = document.getElementById('join-button');
 557:             const loadingDiv = document.getElementById('join-loading');
 558:             joinButton.disabled = true;
 559:             usernameInput.disabled = true;
 560:             loadingDiv.style.display = 'block';
 561: 
 562:             try {
 563:                 // First, clean up any stale players (older than 10 minutes)
 564:                 // Increased timeout for development - players won't be kicked while debugging
 565:                 await supabase
 566:                     .from('players')
 567:                     .delete()
 568:                     .lt('last_seen', new Date(Date.now() - 600000).toISOString());
 569: 
 570:                 // Check game room status — only reset if truly abandoned (no players left)
 571:                 const { data: room } = await supabase
 572:                     .from('game_room')
 573:                     .select('status')
 574:                     .eq('id', 1)
 575:                     .single();
 576: 
 577:                 if (room && (room.status === 'playing' || room.status === 'finished')) {
 578:                     // Count how many players are still in the DB
 579:                     const { data: activePlayers } = await supabase
 580:                         .from('players')
 581:                         .select('id');
 582: 
 583:                     if (activePlayers && activePlayers.length > 0) {
 584:                         // Game is in progress with real players — don't nuke it
 585:                         alert('A game is currently in progress with other players.\n\nPlease wait for it to finish, or use "Reset Lobby" to force-clear.');
 586:                         isJoining = false;
 587:                         joinButton.disabled = false;
 588:                         usernameInput.disabled = false;
 589:                         loadingDiv.style.display = 'none';
 590:                         return;
 591:                     }
 592: 
 593:                     // No players left — safe to reset this abandoned game
 594:                     await supabase
 595:                         .from('game_room')
 596:                         .update({ status: 'waiting', current_turn_index: 0 })
 597:                         .eq('id', 1);
 598:                 }
 599: 
 600:                 // Check if username is already taken
 601:                 const { data: existingPlayers } = await supabase
 602:                     .from('players')
 603:                     .select('*')
 604:                     .order('created_at', { ascending: true });
 605: 
 606:                 const usernameTaken = existingPlayers && existingPlayers.some(p => p.username === username);
 607:                 if (usernameTaken) {
 608:                     alert('Username already taken! Please choose a different name.');
 609:                     // Re-enable inputs
 610:                     isJoining = false;
 611:                     joinButton.disabled = false;
 612:                     usernameInput.disabled = false;
 613:                     loadingDiv.style.display = 'none';
 614:                     return;
 615:                 }
 616: 
 617:                 // Insert player into database
 618:                 const { data, error } = await supabase
 619:                     .from('players')
 620:                     .insert([{ username, is_ready: false }])
 621:                     .select()
 622:                     .single();
 623: 
 624:                 if (error) throw error;
 625: 
 626:                 myPlayerId = data.id;
 627:                 isMultiplayer = true;
 628:                 localReadyState = false;
 629:                 updateReadyButton(false);
 630: 
 631:                 // After insertion, check if we're the first player (host)
 632:                 // The host is simply the player with the oldest created_at timestamp
 633:                 const { data: allPlayersAfterInsert } = await supabase
 634:                     .from('players')
 635:                     .select('*')
 636:                     .order('created_at', { ascending: true });
 637: 
 638:                 // We're host if we're the first player (by creation time)
 639:                 isHost = allPlayersAfterInsert && allPlayersAfterInsert[0].id === myPlayerId;
 640:
