 641:                 // Host is implicitly ready — their action is clicking Start, not toggling ready
 642:                 if (isHost) {
 643:                     localReadyState = true;
 644:                     await supabase.from('players').update({ is_ready: true }).eq('id', myPlayerId);
 645:                 }
 646: 
 647:                 console.log('✅ Joined lobby as:', username, 'ID:', myPlayerId, isHost ? '(HOST)' : '');
 648: 
 649:                 // Hide join form, show ready controls
 650:                 document.getElementById('join-form').style.display = 'none';
 651:                 document.getElementById('ready-controls').style.display = 'block';
 652:                 updateReadyButton(localReadyState);
 653: 
 654:                 // Start listening for updates
 655:                 subscribeToLobby();
 656:                 updateHeartbeat();
 657:                 startLobbyPoll(); // Auto-refresh player list every 10s while in lobby
 658:                 updatePlayerList(); // Initial update to show host controls
 659: 
 660:             } catch (error) {
 661:                 console.error('Error joining lobby:', error);
 662:                 alert('Failed to join lobby: ' + error.message);
 663: 
 664:                 // Re-enable inputs on error
 665:                 isJoining = false;
 666:                 joinButton.disabled = false;
 667:                 usernameInput.disabled = false;
 668:                 loadingDiv.style.display = 'none';
 669:             }
 670:         }
 671: 
 672:         // Leave the current game
 673:         function leaveGame() {
 674:             if (!myPlayerId) return;
 675: 
 676:             showRetroConfirm(
 677:                 'Leave Game?',
 678:                 ['You will be removed from this game', 'and cannot rejoin.'],
 679:                 _doLeaveGame
 680:             );
 681:         }
 682: 
 683:         async function _doLeaveGame() {
 684:             try {
 685:                 console.log('👋 Leaving game...');
 686: 
 687:                 // Delete myself from players table via RPC (direct DELETE blocked by RLS)
 688:                 const { error } = await supabase
 689:                     .rpc('remove_player', { p_player_id: myPlayerId });
 690: 
 691:                 if (error) throw error;
 692: 
 693:                 // Reset local state
 694:                 myPlayerId = null;
 695:                 myPlayerIndex = null;
 696:                 isHost = false;
 697:                 isMultiplayer = false;
 698: 
 699:                 // Stop polling and subscriptions
 700:                 stopLobbyPoll();
 701:                 stopLastManStandingPoll();
 702: 
 703:                 // Unsubscribe from channels
 704:                 if (playersSubscription) {
 705:                     playersSubscription.unsubscribe();
 706:                     playersSubscription = null;
 707:                 }
 708:                 if (gameRoomSubscription) {
 709:                     gameRoomSubscription.unsubscribe();
 710:                     gameRoomSubscription = null;
 711:                 }
 712:                 if (gameChannel) {
 713:                     gameChannel.unsubscribe();
 714:                     gameChannel = null;
 715:                 }
 716: 
 717:                 // Reset UI state
 718:                 const readyCtrl = document.getElementById('ready-controls');
 719:                 if (readyCtrl) readyCtrl.style.display = 'none';
 720:                 currentGameId = null;
 721:                 currentJoinCode = null;
 722: 
 723:                 // resetToLobby handles: clearBoard, stopTurnTimerMonitoring,
 724:                 // hiding game-layout, showing lobby-wrapper, hiding leave/end-turn buttons
 725:                 resetToLobby();
 726: 
 727:                 // Return to game browser panel
 728:                 showGameBrowser();
 729: 
 730:                 console.log('✅ Left game successfully');
 731: 
 732:             } catch (error) {
 733:                 console.error('Error leaving game:', error);
 734:                 showRetroConfirm('Leave Failed', [error.message], () => {});
 735:             }
 736:         }
 737: 
 738:         // Reset the entire lobby (clear all players and reset game room)
 739:         function resetLobby() {
 740:             showRetroConfirm(
 741:                 'Reset Lobby?',
 742:                 ['Remove all players', 'Reset room to waiting state', 'Clear the board'],
 743:                 _doResetLobby
 744:             );
 745:         }
 746: 
 747:         async function _doResetLobby() {
 748:             try {
 749:                 console.log('📄 Resetting lobby...');
 750: 
 751:                 // Delete all players in the current room
 752:                 const { data: allPlayers } = await supabase
 753:                     .from('players')
 754:                     .select('id')
 755:                     .eq('game_id', currentGameId);
 756: 
 757:                 if (allPlayers && allPlayers.length > 0) {
 758:                     const { error: playersError } = await supabase
 759:                         .from('players')
 760:                         .delete()
 761:                         .in('id', allPlayers.map(p => p.id));
 762: 
 763:                     if (playersError) throw playersError;
 764:                 }
 765: 
 766:                 // Reset game room status
 767:                 const { error: roomError } = await supabase
 768:                     .from('game_room')
 769:                     .update({ status: 'waiting', current_turn_index: 0 })
 770:                     .eq('id', currentGameId);
 771: 
 772:                 if (roomError) throw roomError;
 773: 
 774:                 // Reset local state
 775:                 myPlayerId = null;
 776:                 currentGameId = null;
 777:                 currentJoinCode = null;
 778:                 isHost = false;
 779:                 isJoining = false;
 780:                 isMultiplayer = false;
 781: 
 782:                 // Stop lobby polling
 783:                 stopLobbyPoll();
 784: 
 785:                 // Unsubscribe from channels
 786:                 if (playersSubscription) {
 787:                     playersSubscription.unsubscribe();
 788:                     playersSubscription = null;
 789:                 }
 790:                 if (gameRoomSubscription) {
 791:                     gameRoomSubscription.unsubscribe();
 792:                     gameRoomSubscription = null;
 793:                 }
 794: 
 795:                 // Reset UI — return to game browser
 796:                 document.getElementById('ready-controls').style.display = 'none';
 797: 
 798:                 // Hide game, show lobby
 799:                 document.querySelector('.game-container').style.display = 'none';
 800:                 document.getElementById('multiplayer-lobby').style.display = 'block';
 801: 
 802:                 // Clear the board if it was started
 803:                 clearBoard(true);
 804: 
 805:                 // Return to the game browser
 806:                 showGameBrowser();
 807: 
 808:                 console.log('✅ Lobby reset complete!');
 809:                 alert('Lobby has been reset! You can now host or join again.');
 810: 
 811:             } catch (error) {
 812:                 console.error('Error resetting lobby:', error);
 813:                 alert('Failed to reset lobby: ' + error.message);
 814:             }
 815:         }
 816: 
 817:         // Guard: XP is awarded once per game session — prevents double-award from
 818:         // multiple handleGameOver calls (game-core direct + broadcast echo + DB subscription)
 819:         let _gameOverXpAwarded = false;
 820: 
 821:         // Handle game over - mark game as finished and show win screen
 822:         async function handleGameOver(winnerPlayerIndex, winType = 'scrolls') {
 823:             if (!isMultiplayer) return;
 824: 
 825:             try {
 826:                 console.log('🏆 Game Over! Winner:', winnerPlayerIndex, 'Type:', winType);
 827:                 stopLastManStandingPoll();
 828: 
 829:                 // Award gamification XP FIRST — before showing the overlay — so the async RPC
 830:                 // completes before any page reload triggered by "Return to Lobby" can cancel it
 831:                 if (!_gameOverXpAwarded) {
 832:                     _gameOverXpAwarded = true;
 833:                     const isWinner = (winnerPlayerIndex === myPlayerIndex);
 834:                     console.log(`[XP] Attempting to award XP — isWinner=${isWinner}, userId=${window.gami?.userId}, totalPlayers=${totalPlayers}`);
 835:                     if (window.gami?.userId) {
 836:                         await window.gami.onGameComplete(isWinner, totalPlayers);
 837:                     } else {
 838:                         console.warn('[XP] gami.userId not set — XP skipped. gami object:', window.gami);
 839:                     }
 840:                 } else {
 841:                     console.log('[XP] handleGameOver called again — XP already awarded this session, skipping.');
 842:                 }
 843: 
 844:                 // Show win screen after XP is secured
 845:                 showGameOverToAll(winnerPlayerIndex, winType);
 846: 
 847:                 // Broadcast win type so other clients show the correct message
 848:                 broadcastGameAction('game-over', { winnerIndex: winnerPlayerIndex, winType });
 849: 
 850:                 // Update game room status to 'finished' and store winner index
 851:                 const { error } = await supabase
 852:                     .from('game_room')
 853:                     .update({
 854:                         status: 'finished',
 855:                         current_turn_index: winnerPlayerIndex
 856:                     })
 857:                     .eq('id', currentGameId);
 858: 
 859:                 if (error) {
 860:                     console.error('Error updating game over state:', error);
 861:                 }
 862:             } catch (error) {
 863:                 console.error('Error handling game over:', error);
 864:             }
 865:         }
 866: 
 867:         // Show game over notification to all players
 868:         function showGameOverToAll(winnerPlayerIndex, winType = 'scrolls') {
 869:             console.log('Game over for winner index:', winnerPlayerIndex, 'Type:', winType);
 870: 
 871:             // Check if notification already exists
 872:             const existingNotification = document.getElementById('game-over-notification');
 873:             if (existingNotification) {
 874:                 return; // Don't show duplicate
 875:             }
 876: 
 877:             const overlay = document.createElement('div');
 878:             overlay.id = 'game-over-notification';
 879:             overlay.className = 'game-over-overlay';
 880: 
 881:             const box = document.createElement('div');
 882:             box.className = 'game-over-box';
 883: 
 884:             const title = document.createElement('div');
 885:             title.textContent = 'GAME OVER';
 886:             title.className = 'game-over-title';
 887:             box.appendChild(title);
 888: 
 889:             const winnerName = getPlayerColorName(winnerPlayerIndex);
 890:             const playerName = document.createElement('div');
 891:             playerName.textContent = `${winnerName} wins!`;
 892:             playerName.className = 'game-over-winner';
 893:             playerName.style.color = '#d9b08c';
 894:             box.appendChild(playerName);
 895: 
 896:             const msg = document.createElement('div');
 897:             msg.textContent = winType === 'last_standing'
 898:                 ? 'Every other player left. You win!'
 899:                 : 'All five elements have been mastered!';
 900:             msg.className = 'game-over-msg';
 901:             box.appendChild(msg);
 902: 
 903:             if (winType === 'scrolls') {
 904:                 const elements = document.createElement('div');
 905:                 elements.className = 'game-over-elements';
 906:                 elements.innerHTML = ['earth','water','fire','wind','void'].map(el =>
 907:                     `<img src="images/${el === 'earth' ? 'mountainsymbol' : el === 'water' ? 'watersymbol' : el === 'fire' ? 'firesymbol' : el === 'wind' ? 'windsymbol' : 'voidsymbol'}.png" class="element-icon-sm" alt="${el}">`
 908:                 ).join(' ');
 909:                 box.appendChild(elements);
 910:             }
 911: 
 912:             const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
 913:             subtitle.textContent = 'The path of balance is complete.';
 914:             subtitle.className = 'game-over-subtitle';
 915:             box.appendChild(subtitle);
 916: 
 917:             // XP reward line — shown after onGameComplete resolves
 918:             const xpLine = document.createElement('div');
 919:             xpLine.id = 'game-over-xp-line';
 920:             xpLine.style.cssText = `
 921:                 font-family: var(--font-pixel, monospace); font-size: 9px;
 922:                 color: #f0c040; letter-spacing: 1px; margin: 8px 0 4px;
 923:                 min-height: 16px;
 924:             `;
 925:             const isWinner = (winnerPlayerIndex === myPlayerIndex);
 926:             const n = Math.max(2, totalPlayers || 2);
 927:             const xpAmt = isWinner ? 75 + (n - 1) * 25 : 20 + (n - 1) * 10;
 928:             xpLine.textContent = isWinner ? `+${xpAmt} XP  —  VICTORY` : `+${xpAmt} XP  —  GAME COMPLETE`;
 929:             box.appendChild(xpLine);
 930: 
 931:             const lobbyBtn = document.createElement('button');
 932:             lobbyBtn.textContent = 'Return to Lobby';
 933:             lobbyBtn.className = 'retro-dlg-btn ok';
 934:             lobbyBtn.onclick = async () => {
 935:                 try {
 936:                     const roomId = currentGameId;
 937:                     if (roomId) {
 938:                         const { data: allP } = await supabase.from('players').select('id').eq('game_id', roomId);
 939:                         if (allP && allP.length > 0) {
 940:                             await supabase.rpc('remove_players', { p_player_ids: allP.map(p => p.id) });
 941:                         }
 942:                         await supabase.from('game_room').update({ status: 'waiting', current_turn_index: 0 }).eq('id', roomId);
 943:                     }
 944:                 } catch (err) {
 945:                     console.error('Post-game cleanup error:', err);
 946:                 }
 947:                 window.location.reload();
 948:             };
 949:             box.appendChild(lobbyBtn);
 950: 
 951:             overlay.appendChild(box);
 952:             document.body.appendChild(overlay);
 953:         }
 954: 
 955:         // Update the ready button to reflect current state clearly
 956:         function updateReadyButton(isReady) {
 957:             const readyButton = document.getElementById('ready-button');
 958:             if (!readyButton) return;
 959:             // The host's action is starting the game, not toggling ready — hide it for them
 960:             if (isHost) {
 961:                 readyButton.style.display = 'none';
 962:                 return;
 963:             }
 964:             readyButton.style.display = '';
 965:             if (isReady) {
 966:                 readyButton.textContent = '✓ Ready';
 967:                 readyButton.style.background = '#4CAF50';
 968:                 readyButton.title = 'Click to cancel ready';
 969:             } else {
 970:                 readyButton.textContent = 'Not Ready';
 971:                 readyButton.style.background = '#f44336';
 972:                 readyButton.title = 'Click to mark yourself ready';
 973:             }
 974:         }
 975: 
 976:         // Toggle ready status
 977:         async function toggleReady() {
 978:             if (!myPlayerId) return;
 979: 
 980:             try {
 981:                 const newReadyState = !localReadyState;
 982: 
 983:                 // Update ready state
 984:                 const { error } = await supabase
 985:                     .from('players')
 986:                     .update({ is_ready: newReadyState })
 987:                     .eq('id', myPlayerId);
 988: 
 989:                 if (error) throw error;
 990: 
 991:                 localReadyState = newReadyState;
 992:                 updateReadyButton(newReadyState);
 993: 
 994:             } catch (error) {
 995:                 console.error('Error toggling ready:', error);
 996:             }
 997:         }
 998: 
 999:         // Subscribe to lobby updates
1000:         function subscribeToLobby() {
1001:             // Unsubscribe from any existing channels first
1002:             if (playersSubscription) {
1003:                 playersSubscription.unsubscribe();
1004:             }
1005:             if (gameRoomSubscription) {
1006:                 gameRoomSubscription.unsubscribe();
1007:             }
1008:             
1009:             // Subscribe to players table (scoped to this room)
1010:             playersSubscription = supabase
1011:                 .channel('players-' + currentGameId + '-' + Math.random())
1012:                 .on('postgres_changes',
1013:                     { event: '*', schema: 'public', table: 'players',
1014:                       filter: `game_id=eq.${currentGameId}` },
1015:                     async (payload) => {
1016:                         console.log('Players update:', payload);
1017: 
1018:                         // Handle our own player being deleted (kicked or lobby reset)
1019:                         if (payload.eventType === 'DELETE' && payload.old.id === myPlayerId) {
1020:                             console.log('📄 You were removed from the lobby (kicked or reset detected)');
1021: 
1022:                             // Check if we're in a game - if so, need to reset game state first
1023:                             const gameContainer = document.querySelector('.game-container');
1024:                             const inGame = gameContainer && gameContainer.style.display !== 'none';
1025: 
1026:                             if (inGame) {
1027:                                 console.log('⏰ Kicked during game - resetting to lobby');
1028:                                 // Call resetToLobby to properly clean up game state
1029:                                 if (typeof resetToLobby === 'function') {
1030:                                     resetToLobby();
1031:                                 }
1032:                             }
1033: 
1034:                             // Reset local state
1035:                             myPlayerId = null;
1036:                             myPlayerIndex = null;
1037:                             isHost = false;
1038:                             isMultiplayer = false;
1039: 
1040:                             // Unsubscribe from channels
1041:                             if (playersSubscription) {
1042:                                 playersSubscription.unsubscribe();
1043:                                 playersSubscription = null;
1044:                             }
1045:                             if (gameRoomSubscription) {
1046:                                 gameRoomSubscription.unsubscribe();
1047:                                 gameRoomSubscription = null;
1048:                             }
1049:                             if (gameChannel) {
1050:                                 gameChannel.unsubscribe();
1051:                                 gameChannel = null;
1052:                             }
1053: 
1054:                             // Show alert and reload the page to fully reset
1055:                             alert('You were kicked from the game (timeout). The page will refresh.');
1056: 
1057:                             // Reload the page to return to a clean state
1058:                             setTimeout(() => {
1059:                                 window.location.reload();
1060:                             }, 500);
1061: 
1062:                             return; // Don't update player list since we're no longer in lobby
1063:                         }
1064: 
1065:                         // Handle other players leaving during game
1066:                         if (payload.eventType === 'DELETE' && payload.old.id !== myPlayerId) {
1067:                             console.log('👋 Another player left:', payload.old);
1068: 
1069:                             // Show notification if game is in progress
1070:                             const { data: room } = await supabase
1071:                                 .from('game_room')
1072:                                 .select('status')
1073:                                 .eq('id', currentGameId)
1074:                                 .single();
1075: 
1076:                             if (room && room.status === 'playing') {
1077:                                 const leftPlayer = allPlayersData.find(p => p.id === payload.old.id);
1078:                                 const playerName = leftPlayer ? getPlayerColorName(leftPlayer.player_index) : 'A player';
1079:                                 updateStatus(`${playerName} left the game`);
1080: 
1081:                                 // Check if I'm the only player left (scoped to this room)
1082:                             const { data: remainingPlayers } = await supabase
1083:                                 .from('players')
1084:                                 .select('id, username, player_index, color')
1085:                                 .eq('game_id', currentGameId);
1086: 
1087:                                 console.log('💥 Remaining players after deletion:', remainingPlayers);
1088:                                 console.log('📍 My player ID:', myPlayerId);
1089: 
1090:                                 if (remainingPlayers && remainingPlayers.length === 1 && remainingPlayers[0].id === myPlayerId) {
1091:                                     console.log('I am the last player remaining - win by default!');
1092:                                     console.log('My player index:', myPlayerIndex);
1093: 
1094:                                     // Mark game as finished with me as winner
1095:                                     if (myPlayerIndex !== null && myPlayerIndex !== undefined) {
1096:                                         console.log('Calling handleGameOver with index:', myPlayerIndex);
1097:                                         await handleGameOver(myPlayerIndex, 'last_standing');
1098:                                     } else {
1099:                                         console.error('Cannot win - myPlayerIndex is null/undefined');
1100:                                     }
1101:                                 } else {
1102:                                     console.log('Still', remainingPlayers?.length || 0, 'players in game');
1103:                                 }
1104: 
1105:                                 // Update placement-phase tracking if a player was kicked/left
1106:                                 if (remainingPlayers) {
1107:                                     totalPlayers = remainingPlayers.length;
1108:                                     allPlayersData = remainingPlayers;
1109: 
1110:                                     if (isPlacementPhase) {
1111:                                         const remainingIndices = new Set(
1112:                                             remainingPlayers
1113:                                                 .map(p => p.player_index)
1114:                                                 .filter(i => i !== null && i !== undefined)
1115:                                         );
1116: 
1117:                                         // Drop placements for players that left
1118:                                         playerTilesPlaced = new Set(
1119:                                             Array.from(playerTilesPlaced).filter(idx => remainingIndices.has(idx))
1120:                                         );
1121: 
1122:                                         // If all remaining players have placed, complete placement phase (host only)
1123:                                         if (isHost && playerTilesPlaced.size >= totalPlayers && totalPlayers > 0) {
1124:                                             isPlacementPhase = false;
1125:                                             const sorted = Array.from(remainingIndices).sort((a, b) => a - b);
1126:                                             activePlayerIndex = sorted[0];
1127:                                             const startedAt = Date.now();
1128:                                             turnStartedAtMs = startedAt;
1129:                                             broadcastGameAction('placement-complete', {
1130:                                                 playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1131:                                                 turnStartedAt: startedAt
1132:                                             });
1133:                                             updateTurnDisplay();
1134:                                         }
1135:                                     }
1136:                                 }
1137:                             }
1138:                         }
1139: 
1140:                         // Update our local isHost status when players change
1141:                         // Check if we're now the first player (host) within this room
1142:                         if (myPlayerId) {
1143:                             const { data: allPlayers } = await supabase
1144:                                 .from('players')
1145:                                 .select('*')
1146:                                 .eq('game_id', currentGameId)
1147:                                 .order('created_at', { ascending: true });
1148: 
1149:                             if (allPlayers && allPlayers.length > 0) {
1150:                                 const wasHost = isHost;
1151:                                 isHost = allPlayers[0].id === myPlayerId;
1152: 
1153:                                 // Notify if we became host
1154:                                 if (!wasHost && isHost) {
1155:                                     console.log('You are now the host.');
1156:                                     startDisconnectMonitor();
1157:                                 }
1158:                             }
1159:                         }
1160: 
1161:                         updatePlayerList();
1162:                     }
1163:                 )
1164:                 .subscribe();
1165:             
1166:             // Subscribe to game_room table (scoped to this room)
1167:             gameRoomSubscription = supabase
1168:                 .channel('game-room-sub-' + currentGameId + '-' + Math.random())
1169:                 .on('postgres_changes',
1170:                     { event: '*', schema: 'public', table: 'game_room',
1171:                       filter: `id=eq.${currentGameId}` },
1172:                     (payload) => {
1173:                         console.log('Game room update:', payload);
1174:                         if (payload.new && payload.new.status === 'playing') {
1175:                             handleGameStart();
1176:                         } else if (payload.new && payload.new.status === 'finished') {
1177:                             // Game ended - show win screen to all players who didn't trigger it themselves
1178:                             console.log('🏁 Game finished!');
1179:                             const winnerIndex = payload.new.current_turn_index ?? 0;
1180:                             // Only show if we're not the winner (winner already saw it via handleGameOver)
1181:                             if (winnerIndex !== myPlayerIndex) {
1182:                                 showGameOverToAll(winnerIndex, 'scrolls');
1183:                             }
1184:                         }
1185:                     }
1186:                 )
1187:                 .subscribe();
1188: 
1189:             // Initial update
1190:             updatePlayerList();
1191: 
1192:             // Fallback: poll once after subscription is established in case we missed
1193:             // the status='playing' update while the Realtime channel was connecting
1194:             setTimeout(async () => {
1195:                 if (!currentGameId) return;
1196:                 if (document.getElementById('game-layout')?.classList.contains('active')) return;
1197:                 const { data: room } = await supabase
1198:                     .from('game_room')
1199:                     .select('status')
1200:                     .eq('id', currentGameId)
1201:                     .single();
1202:                 if (room?.status === 'playing') {
1203:                     console.log('🔄 Fallback poll: detected game already started — joining now');
1204:                     handleGameStart();
1205:                 }
1206:             }, 2000);
1207:         }
1208: 
1209:         // Update player list display
1210:         async function updatePlayerList() {
1211:             if (!currentGameId) return; // Not in a room yet
1212:             try {
1213:                 const { data: players, error } = await supabase
1214:                     .from('players')
1215:                     .select('*')
1216:                     .eq('game_id', currentGameId)
1217:                     .order('created_at', { ascending: true });
1218: 
1219:                 if (error) throw error;
1220: 
1221:                 const container = document.getElementById('players-container');
1222:                 if (!players || players.length === 0) {
1223:                     container.innerHTML = '<p style="color: #999; font-style: italic;">No players yet...</p>';
1224:                     return;
1225:                 }
1226: 
1227:                 container.innerHTML = players.map((p, index) => {
1228:                     const isMe = p.id === myPlayerId;
1229:                     const readyIcon = p.is_ready ? '✓' : '○';
1230:                     const readyColor = p.is_ready ? '#4CAF50' : '#999';
1231:                     const meLabel = isMe ? ' <span style="color: #ffd700;">(You)</span>' : '';
1232:                     // First player in the list (index 0) is the host
1233:                     const hostLabel = index === 0 ? ' <span style="color: #FF9800;">Host</span>' : '';
1234:                     // Apply local player's equipped name colour; other players keep default
1235:                     const nameStyle = isMe
1236:                         ? (window.cosmeticsSystem?.getNameColorStyle() || '')
1237:                         : '';
1238: 
1239:                     return `
1240:                         <div style="padding: 10px; margin: 5px 0; background: ${isMe ? '#444' : '#3a3a3a'}; border-radius: 5px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
1241:                             <span style="${nameStyle}">${p.username}${hostLabel}${meLabel}</span>
1242:                             <span style="color: ${readyColor}; font-size: 20px;">${readyIcon}</span>
1243:                         </div>
1244:                     `;
1245:                 }).join('');
1246: 
1247:                 // Update room player count in the info bar
1248:                 const playerCountEl = document.getElementById('room-player-count');
1249:                 if (playerCountEl) playerCountEl.textContent = `${players.length} / 5`;
1250: 
1251:                 // Show/hide host settings panel
1252:                 const hostSettings = document.getElementById('host-settings');
1253:                 const totalCount = players.length;
1254: 
1255:                 // Host settings (and Start button) appear as soon as there are enough players
1256:                 if (isHost && totalCount >= 2 && totalCount <= 5) {
1257:                     hostSettings.style.display = 'block';
1258:                 } else {
1259:                     hostSettings.style.display = 'none';
1260:                 }
1261: 
1262:                 // Update status
1263:                 const statusDiv = document.getElementById('lobby-status');
1264: 
1265:                 if (totalCount < 2) {
1266:                     statusDiv.textContent = 'Waiting for more players... (need at least 2)';
1267:                     statusDiv.style.color = '#999';
1268:                 } else if (totalCount > 5) {
1269:                     statusDiv.textContent = 'Too many players! Maximum is 5.';
1270:                     statusDiv.style.color = '#f44336';
1271:                 } else if (isHost) {
1272:                     statusDiv.textContent = `${totalCount} players in lobby. Ready to start!`;
1273:                     statusDiv.style.color = '#4CAF50';
1274:                 } else {
1275:                     statusDiv.textContent = `${totalCount} players in lobby. Waiting for host to start...`;
1276:                     statusDiv.style.color = '#4CAF50';
1277:                 }
1278:                 
1279:             } catch (error) {
1280:                 console.error('Error updating player list:', error);
1281:             }
1282:         }
1283: 
1284:         // Host starts the game manually
1285:         async function hostStartGame() {
1286:             if (!isHost) {
1287:                 alert('Only the host can start the game!');
1288:                 return;
1289:             }
1290: 
1291:             // Disable the button immediately to prevent double-clicks
1292:             const startBtn = document.getElementById('host-start-button');
1293:             if (startBtn) startBtn.disabled = true;
1294: 
1295:             try {
1296:                 const { data: players, error } = await supabase
1297:                     .from('players')
1298:                     .select('*')
1299:                     .eq('game_id', currentGameId);
1300: 
1301:                 if (error) throw error;
1302: 
1303:                 // Validate player count
1304:                 if (players.length < 2) {
1305:                     if (startBtn) startBtn.disabled = false;
1306:                     alert('Need at least 2 players to start!');
1307:                     return;
1308:                 }
1309: 
1310:                 if (players.length > 5) {
1311:                     if (startBtn) startBtn.disabled = false;
1312:                     alert('Too many players! Maximum is 5.');
1313:                     return;
1314:                 }
1315: 
1316:                 console.log('🎮 Host starting game with', players.length, 'players...');
1317: 
1318:                 // Get turn timer settings
1319:                 const timeoutSelect = document.getElementById('timeout-setting');
1320:                 const turnTimeLimit = parseInt(timeoutSelect.value, 10) * 1000; // seconds -> ms
1321:                 const kickCheckbox = document.getElementById('kick-on-timeout');
1322:                 const kickMode = !!(kickCheckbox && kickCheckbox.checked);
1323: 
1324:                 console.log('⚠️ Turn time limit set to:', turnTimeLimit / 1000, 'seconds');
1325:                 console.log('👢 Kick on turn timeout:', kickMode);
1326: 
1327:                 // Randomly assign player indices and colors
1328:                 const colorRankOrder = ['purple', 'yellow', 'red', 'blue', 'green'];
1329:                 const shuffledIndices = [...Array(players.length).keys()].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
1330: 
1331:                 // Update game room status to trigger game start and store turn-timer settings
1332:                 const startedAtIso = new Date().toISOString();
1333: 
1334:                 // Try writing extended fields; if the DB schema doesn't have them, fall back gracefully.
1335:                 let { error: roomError } = await supabase
1336:                     .from('game_room')
1337:                     .update({
1338:                         status: 'playing',
1339:                         current_turn_index: 0,
1340:                         inactivity_timeout: turnTimeLimit,        // reused as turn time limit (ms)
1341:                         kick_on_turn_timeout: kickMode,
1342:                         turn_started_at: startedAtIso
1343:                     })
1344:                     .eq('id', currentGameId);
1345: 
1346:                 if (roomError) {
1347:                     console.warn('⚠️ Failed to write extended turn timer fields to game_room. Trying without optional fields...', roomError);
1348:                     // Try without kick_on_turn_timeout and turn_started_at
1349:                     let fallback = await supabase
1350:                         .from('game_room')
1351:                         .update({
1352:                             status: 'playing',
1353:                             current_turn_index: 0,
1354:                             inactivity_timeout: turnTimeLimit
1355:                         })
1356:                         .eq('id', currentGameId);
1357: 
1358:                     if (fallback.error) {
1359:                         console.warn('⚠️ Second fallback failed, trying minimal update...', fallback.error);
1360:                         // Minimal fallback - just status and turn index
1361:                         fallback = await supabase
1362:                             .from('game_room')
1363:                             .update({
1364:                                 status: 'playing',
1365:                                 current_turn_index: 0
1366:                             })
1367:                             .eq('id', currentGameId);
1368:                     }
1369: 
1370:                     roomError = fallback.error;
1371:                 }
1372: 
1373:                 if (roomError) throw roomError;
1374: 
1375:                 // Also set local host timer baseline immediately
1376:                 gameInactivityTimeout = turnTimeLimit;
1377:                 kickOnTurnTimeout = kickMode;
1378:                 turnStartedAtMs = Date.now();
1379: 
1380:                 // Assign colors and indices to players
1381:                 for (let i = 0; i < players.length; i++) {
1382:                     const player = players[i];
1383:                     const assignedIndex = shuffledIndices[i];
1384:                     const assignedColor = colorRankOrder[assignedIndex];
1385: 
1386:                     await supabase
1387:                         .from('players')
1388:                         .update({
1389:                             player_index: assignedIndex,
1390:                             color: assignedColor
1391:                         })
1392:                         .eq('id', player.id);
1393:                 }
1394: 
1395:                 console.log('✅ Game started by host!');
1396: 
1397:                 // Host transitions immediately; non-host players receive the trigger via Realtime
1398:                 await handleGameStart();
1399: 
1400:             } catch (error) {
1401:                 console.error('Error starting game:', error);
1402:                 if (startBtn) startBtn.disabled = false; // allow retry
1403:                 alert('Failed to start game: ' + error.message);
1404:             }
1405:         }
1406: 
1407:         // Handle game start
1408:         async function handleGameStart() {
1409:             // Guard against duplicate calls (host's direct call + Realtime subscription racing)
1410:             if (document.getElementById('game-layout').classList.contains('active')) {
1411:                 console.log('🔁 handleGameStart: game already active — skipping duplicate call');
1412:                 return;
1413:             }
1414:             try {
1415:                 // Wait for player_index to be assigned (retry up to 10 times)
1416:                 let myPlayer = null;
1417:                 let attempts = 0;
1418:                 
1419:                 while (attempts < 10) {
1420:                     const { data, error } = await supabase
1421:                         .from('players')
1422:                         .select('*')
1423:                         .eq('id', myPlayerId)
1424:                         .single();
1425:                     
1426:                     if (error) throw error;
1427:                     
1428:                     if (data.player_index !== null && data.player_index !== undefined) {
1429:                         myPlayer = data;
1430:                         break;
1431:                     }
1432:                     
1433:                     console.log(`⏳ Waiting for player index assignment (attempt ${attempts + 1}/10)...`);
1434:                     await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 300));
1435:                     attempts++;
1436:                 }
1437:                 
1438:                 if (!myPlayer || myPlayer.player_index === null) {
1439:                     throw new Error('Player index was not assigned');
1440:                 }
1441:                 
1442:                 myPlayerIndex = myPlayer.player_index;
1443:                 
1444:                 // Get all players in this room
1445:                 const { data: allPlayers } = await supabase
1446:                     .from('players')
1447:                     .select('*')
1448:                     .eq('game_id', currentGameId)
1449:                     .order('player_index', { ascending: true });
1450:                 
1451:                 console.log('🎮 Starting multiplayer game!');
1452:                 console.log('My index:', myPlayerIndex);
1453:                 console.log('My color:', myPlayer.color);
1454:                 console.log('All players:', allPlayers);
1455:                 
1456:                 // Get game room settings (turn timer)
1457:                 // We select '*' for forward/backward compatibility if columns are missing.
1458:                 const { data: room } = await supabase
1459:                     .from('game_room')
1460:                     .select('*')
1461:                     .eq('id', currentGameId)
1462:                     .single();
1463: 
1464:                 if (room && room.inactivity_timeout !== null && room.inactivity_timeout !== undefined) {
1465:                     gameInactivityTimeout = room.inactivity_timeout; // reused as turn time limit (ms)
1466:                     console.log('⚠️ Loaded turn time limit:', gameInactivityTimeout / 1000, 'seconds');
1467:                 }
1468: 
1469:                 if (room && room.kick_on_turn_timeout !== null && room.kick_on_turn_timeout !== undefined) {
1470:                     kickOnTurnTimeout = !!room.kick_on_turn_timeout;
1471:                     console.log('👢 kickOnTurnTimeout:', kickOnTurnTimeout);
1472:                 }
1473: 
1474:                 // Set turn started time
1475:                 if (room && room.turn_started_at) {
1476:                     const ts = new Date(room.turn_started_at).getTime();
1477:                     if (!Number.isNaN(ts)) {
1478:                         turnStartedAtMs = ts;
1479:                     } else {
1480:                         turnStartedAtMs = Date.now();
1481:                     }
1482:                 } else {
1483:                     turnStartedAtMs = Date.now();
1484:                 }
1485: 
1486:                 // Derive deck seed from player IDs - this is deterministic and shared
1487:                 // Sort player IDs and hash them to get a consistent seed
1488:                 const sortedPlayerIds = allPlayers.map(p => p.id).sort().join('');
1489:                 let gameDeckSeed = 0;
1490:                 for (let i = 0; i < sortedPlayerIds.length; i++) {
1491:                     gameDeckSeed = ((gameDeckSeed << 5) - gameDeckSeed + sortedPlayerIds.charCodeAt(i)) | 0;
1492:                 }
1493:                 gameDeckSeed = Math.abs(gameDeckSeed);
1494:                 console.log('🎴 Derived deck seed from player IDs:', gameDeckSeed);
1495: 
1496:                 // Hide lobby, show new game layout
1497:                 document.getElementById('lobby-wrapper').style.display = 'none';
1498:                 document.getElementById('game-layout').classList.add('active');
1499:                 updateDeckIndicatorVisibility();
1500: 
1501:                 // Show leave game and end turn buttons in multiplayer
1502:                 document.getElementById('leave-game').style.display = 'inline-block';
1503:                 document.getElementById('end-turn').style.display = 'inline-block';
1504: 
1505:                 // Show timer HUD element
1506:                 document.getElementById('hud-timer').style.display = 'flex';
1507: 
1508:                 // Initialize new UI elements
1509:                 initializeNewUI();
1510: 
1511:                 // Start turn timer monitoring (turn-based timeout)
1512:                 startTurnTimerMonitoring();
1513: 
1514:                 // Host monitors for disconnected players (stale last_seen)
1515:                 if (isHost) startDisconnectMonitor();
1516: 
1517:                 // All players poll every 5 s — bulletproof fallback for last-man-standing
1518:                 startLastManStandingPoll();
1519: 
1520:                 // Initialize game with multiplayer players and shared deck seed
1521:                 startMultiplayerGame(allPlayers, gameDeckSeed);
1522:                 
1523:             } catch (error) {
1524:                 console.error('Error handling game start:', error);
1525:                 alert('Failed to start game: ' + error.message);
1526:             }
1527:         }
1528: 
1529:         // Update heartbeat — keeps last_seen current in both lobby and active game
1530:         let _heartbeatInterval = null;
1531:         function updateHeartbeat() {
1532:             if (!myPlayerId) return;
1533:             if (_heartbeatInterval) clearInterval(_heartbeatInterval);
1534:             const beat = async () => {
1535:                 if (!myPlayerId) { clearInterval(_heartbeatInterval); return; }
1536:                 try {
1537:                     await supabase
1538:                         .from('players')
1539:                         .update({ last_seen: new Date().toISOString() })
1540:                         .eq('id', myPlayerId);
1541:                 } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
1542:             };
1543:             beat(); // Fire immediately so last_seen is never NULL
1544:             _heartbeatInterval = setInterval(beat, 15000); // Every 15 seconds
1545:         }
1546: 
1547:         // Host-only: periodically sweep disconnected players (stale last_seen).
1548:         // Deletion triggers the existing players DELETE handler on all clients,
1549:         // which shows "player left" notifications and handles turn skipping.
1550:         let _disconnectMonitorInterval = null;
1551:         function startDisconnectMonitor() {
1552:             if (_disconnectMonitorInterval) clearInterval(_disconnectMonitorInterval);
1553:             _disconnectMonitorInterval = setInterval(async () => {
1554:                 if (!isHost || !currentGameId) return;
1555:                 const staleThreshold = new Date(Date.now() - 45 * 1000).toISOString();
1556:                 try {
1557:                     const { data: allPlayers } = await supabase
1558:                         .from('players')
1559:                         .select('id, username, last_seen, created_at')
1560:                         .eq('game_id', currentGameId)
1561:                         .neq('id', myPlayerId); // never self-evict
1562:                     const stalePlayers = (allPlayers || []).filter(p => {
1563:                         // Use last_seen if available, fall back to created_at
1564:                         const ref = p.last_seen || p.created_at;
1565:                         return ref < staleThreshold;
1566:                     });
1567:                     for (const p of stalePlayers) {
1568:                         console.log(`⚠️ Disconnect: ${p.username} (last_seen=${p.last_seen}) — removing`);
1569:                         await supabase.rpc('remove_player', { p_player_id: p.id });
1570:                     }
1571:                 } catch (e) { /* ignore network errors */ }
1572:             }, 15000); // Check every 15 seconds
1573:         }
1574:         function stopDisconnectMonitor() {
1575:             if (_disconnectMonitorInterval) {
1576:                 clearInterval(_disconnectMonitorInterval);
1577:                 _disconnectMonitorInterval = null;
1578:             }
1579:         }
1580: 
1581:         // Clean up on page unload — call remove_player RPC (direct DELETE is blocked by RLS)
1582:         window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {
1583:             if (!myPlayerId) return;
1584:             fetch(`${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/rpc/remove_player`, {
1585:                 method: 'POST',
1586:                 headers: {
1587:                     'apikey': SUPABASE_ANON_KEY,
1588:                     'Authorization': `Bearer ${SUPABASE_ANON_KEY}`,
1589:                     'Content-Type': 'application/json'
1590:                 },
1591:                 body: JSON.stringify({ p_player_id: myPlayerId }),
1592:                 keepalive: true
1593:             });
1594:         });
1595: 
1596:         // Auto-refresh player list when tab becomes visible again
1597:         // (catches missed real-time events while tab was in background)
1598:         document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
1599:             if (document.visibilityState === 'visible' && myPlayerId) {
1600:                 console.log('🔄 Tab visible — refreshing player list');
1601:                 updatePlayerList();
1602:             }
1603:         });
1604: 
1605:         // Periodic lobby poll — re-fetch player list every 10s while in lobby (not in-game)
1606:         let lobbyPollInterval = null;
1607: 
1608:         function startLobbyPoll() {
1609:             stopLobbyPoll(); // Clear any existing interval
1610:             lobbyPollInterval = setInterval(() => {
1611:                 if (!myPlayerId) {
1612:                     stopLobbyPoll();
1613:                     return;
1614:                 }
1615:                 // Only poll while in lobby phase (not during an active game)
1616:                 const lobbyVisible = document.getElementById('multiplayer-lobby').style.display !== 'none';
1617:                 if (lobbyVisible) {
1618:                     updatePlayerList();
1619:                 } else {
1620:                     // Game started — stop polling
1621:                     stopLobbyPoll();
1622:                 }
1623:             }, 10000);
1624:         }
1625: 
1626:         function stopLobbyPoll() {
1627:             if (lobbyPollInterval) {
1628:                 clearInterval(lobbyPollInterval);
1629:                 lobbyPollInterval = null;
1630:             }
1631:         }
1632: 
1633: 
1634:         // Secret keyboard sequence "reset" to reveal the Reset Lobby button
1635:         (function() {
1636:             const SECRET = 'reset';
1637:             let buffer = '';
1638:             document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
1639:                 // Only listen while lobby is visible
1640:                 const lobbyEl = document.getElementById('multiplayer-lobby');
1641:                 if (!lobbyEl || lobbyEl.style.display === 'none') return;
1642:                 // Ignore if user is typing in an input field
1643:                 if (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') return;
1644: 
1645:                 buffer += e.key.toLowerCase();
1646:                 // Keep only the last N characters
1647:                 if (buffer.length > SECRET.length) {
1648:                     buffer = buffer.slice(-SECRET.length);
1649:                 }
1650:                 if (buffer === SECRET) {
1651:                     const btn = document.getElementById('reset-lobby-btn');
1652:                     if (btn) {
1653:                         btn.style.display = btn.style.display === 'none' ? '' : 'none';
1654:                         buffer = '';
1655:                     }
1656:                 }
1657:             });
1658:         })();
1659: 
1660:         let gameChannel = null; // Global reference to the game broadcast channel
1661: 
1662:         // Set up broadcast channel for real-time game synchronization
1663:         function setupGameBroadcast() {
1664:             if (gameChannel) {
1665:                 gameChannel.unsubscribe();
1666:             }
1667: 
1668:             // Create a channel scoped to this specific game room
1669:             gameChannel = supabase.channel('game-room-' + currentGameId, {
1670:                 config: {
1671:                     broadcast: { self: false } // Don't receive our own broadcasts
1672:                 }
1673:             });
1674: 
1675:             // Listen for tile flip events
1676:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'tile-flip' }, ({ payload }) => {
1677:                 console.log('📄 Received tile flip broadcast:', payload);
1678:                 const { tileId, shrineType } = payload;
1679:                 // Find the tile and flip it
1680:                 const tile = document.querySelector(`[data-tile-id="${tileId}"]`);
1681:                 if (tile) {
1682:                     console.log(`✅ Found tile ${tileId}, flipping to ${shrineType}`);
1683:                     flipTileVisually(tile, shrineType);
1684:                     // Re-apply Wandering River indicator if this tile was transformed (flip replaced the element)
1685:                     if (typeof placedTiles !== 'undefined' && spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
1686:                         const tileObj = placedTiles.find(t => Number(t.id) === Number(tileId));
1687:                         const wr = spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver;
1688:                         const entry = Array.isArray(wr) ? wr.find(e => Number(e.tileId) === Number(tileId)) : null;
1689:                         if (tileObj && entry && entry.newElement) {
1690:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.applyWanderingRiverIndicator(tileObj, entry.newElement);
1691:                         }
1692:                     }
1693:                 } else {
1694:                     console.error(`❌ Could not find tile with id ${tileId} in DOM`);
1695:                 }
1696:             });
1697: 
1698:             // Wandering River: other players see and are affected by the transformation (clear at caster's next turn)
1699:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'wandering-river-apply' }, ({ payload }) => {
1700:                 console.log('📄 Received wandering-river-apply:', payload);
1701:                 const { tileId, newElement, playerIndex } = payload;
1702:                 if (!spellSystem || !spellSystem.scrollEffects) return;
1703:                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver = spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver || [];
1704:                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver.push({
1705:                     tileId: tileId,
1706:                     newElement: newElement,
1707:                     playerIndex: playerIndex,
1708:                     expiresNextTurn: true
1709:                 });
1710:                 if (typeof placedTiles !== 'undefined') {
1711:                     const tile = placedTiles.find(t => Number(t.id) === Number(tileId));
1712:                     if (tile && tile.element) {
1713:                         spellSystem.scrollEffects.applyWanderingRiverIndicator(tile, newElement);
1714:                     }
1715:                 }
1716:             });
1717: 
1718:             // Take Flight (Wind IV): teleport a player to a new position
1719:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'take-flight' }, ({ payload }) => {
1720:                 console.log('📄 Received take-flight:', payload);
1721:                 const { targetPlayerIndex, x, y } = payload;
1722:                 if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
1723:                     movePlayerVisually(targetPlayerIndex, x, y, 0);
1724:                 } else {
1725:                     // Fallback
1726:                     const target = playerPositions[targetPlayerIndex];
1727:                     if (target) {
1728:                         target.x = x;
1729:                         target.y = y;
1730:                         if (target.element) {
1731:                             target.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
1732:                         }
1733:                     }
1734:                 }
1735:                 console.log(`🌬️ Take Flight: player ${targetPlayerIndex} teleported to (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)})`);
1736:             });
1737: 
1738:             // Catacomb/Freedom teleport: sync shrine teleports
1739:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'catacomb-teleport' }, ({ payload }) => {
1740:                 console.log('📄 Received catacomb-teleport:', payload);
1741:                 const { playerIndex, x, y } = payload;
1742:                 if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
1743:                     movePlayerVisually(playerIndex, x, y, 0);
1744:                 } else {
1745:                     const target = playerPositions[playerIndex];
1746:                     if (target) {
1747:                         target.x = x;
1748:                         target.y = y;
1749:                         if (target.element) {
1750:                             target.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
1751:                         }
1752:                     }
1753:                 }
1754:                 console.log(`🔅 Catacomb teleport: player ${playerIndex} to (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)})`);
1755:             });
1756: 
1757:             // Freedom (Wind III): other players receive the buff so shrine teleport works for everyone
1758:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'freedom-apply' }, ({ payload }) => {
1759:                 console.log('📄 Received freedom-apply:', payload);
1760:                 const { playerIndex } = payload;
1761:                 if (!spellSystem || !spellSystem.scrollEffects) return;
1762:                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.freedom = {
1763:                     playerIndex: playerIndex,
1764:                     expiresNextTurn: true
1765:                 };
1766:                 if (typeof updateCatacombIndicators === 'function') {
1767:                     updateCatacombIndicators();
1768:                 }
1769:             });
1770: 
1771:             // Listen for stone placement events
1772:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'stone-place' }, ({ payload }) => {
1773:                 console.log('📄 Received stone placement:', payload);
1774:                 const { x, y, stoneType } = payload;
1775:                 placeStoneVisually(x, y, stoneType);
1776:             });
1777: 
1778:             // Listen for stone move events
1779:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'stone-move' }, ({ payload }) => {
1780:                 console.log('📄 Received stone move:', payload);
1781:                 const { stoneId, x, y, stoneType } = payload;
1782:                 moveStoneVisually(stoneId, x, y, stoneType);
1783:             });
1784: 
1785:             // Listen for stone break events
1786:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'stone-break' }, ({ payload }) => {
1787:                 console.log('📄 Received stone break:', payload);
1788:                 const { stoneId } = payload;
1789:                 breakStoneVisually(stoneId);
1790:             });
1791: 
1792:             // Listen for player tile placement events
1793:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'player-tile-place' }, ({ payload }) => {
1794:                 console.log('📄 Received player tile placement:', payload);
1795:                 const { x, y, playerIndex, color, cosmetics } = payload;
1796:                 placePlayerTileVisually(x, y, playerIndex, color, cosmetics || null);
1797:             });
1798: 
1799:             // Listen for player movement events
1800:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'player-move' }, ({ payload }) => {
1801:                 console.log('📄 Received player movement:', payload);
1802:                 const { playerIndex, x, y, apSpent, cosmetics } = payload;
1803:                 // Cache remote cosmetics so movePlayerVisually can apply landing effects
1804:                 if (cosmetics) {
1805:                     window._remotePlayerCosmetics = window._remotePlayerCosmetics || {};
1806:                     window._remotePlayerCosmetics[playerIndex] = cosmetics;
1807:                 }
1808:                 movePlayerVisually(playerIndex, x, y, apSpent);
1809:                 // Defensively flip any hidden tiles at the destination.
1810:                 // This ensures tile reveals are visible even if the tile-flip broadcast
1811:                 // arrives out of order or is lost. Uses the shared deck state to determine
1812:                 // shrine type (both clients drew from the same seed, so shrineType matches).
1813:                 if (typeof getAllHexagonPositions === 'function' && typeof placedTiles !== 'undefined') {
1814:                     const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
1815:                     let nearestHex = null;
1816:                     let nearestDist = Infinity;
1817:                     allHexes.forEach(hexPos => {
1818:                         const d = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hexPos.x - x, 2) + Math.pow(hexPos.y - y, 2));
1819:                         if (d < nearestDist) { nearestDist = d; nearestHex = hexPos; }
1820:                     });
1821:                     if (nearestHex && nearestDist < 5 && nearestHex.tiles) {
1822:                         nearestHex.tiles
1823:                             .filter(t => t.flipped && !t.isPlayerTile)
1824:                             .forEach(t => {
1825:                                 const el = document.querySelector(`[data-tile-id="${t.id}"]`);
1826:                                 if (el && typeof flipTileVisually === 'function') {
1827:                                     console.log(`🔄 Proactively flipping tile ${t.id} at received player position`);
1828:                                     flipTileVisually(el, t.shrineType);
1829:                                 }
1830:                             });
1831:                     }
1832:                 }
1833:             });
1834: 
1835:             // Listen for turn change events
1836:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'turn-change' }, ({ payload }) => {
1837:                 console.log('📄 Received turn-change:', payload.playerIndex, 'turnNumber:', payload.turnNumber, 'myPlayerIndex:', myPlayerIndex, 'isPlacementPhase:', isPlacementPhase);
1838: 
1839:                 // Validate turn number for desync detection
1840:                 if (typeof payload.turnNumber === 'number') {
1841:                     const expectedTurn = lastReceivedTurnNumber + 1;
1842: 
1843:                     if (payload.turnNumber > expectedTurn) {
1844:                         // We missed some turns! Log warning
1845:                         console.warn(`⚠️ DESYNC DETECTED: Expected turn ${expectedTurn}, received turn ${payload.turnNumber}. Missed ${payload.turnNumber - expectedTurn} turn(s).`);
1846:                         updateStatus(`Turn sync issue detected - auto-correcting...`);
1847:                     } else if (payload.turnNumber < lastReceivedTurnNumber) {
1848:                         // Received an old turn? Ignore it
1849:                         console.warn(`⚠️ Received outdated turn ${payload.turnNumber} (current: ${lastReceivedTurnNumber}). Ignoring.`);
1850:                         return;
1851:                     }
1852: 
1853:                     lastReceivedTurnNumber = payload.turnNumber;
1854:                 }
1855: 
1856:                 activePlayerIndex = payload.playerIndex;
1857:                 if (payload.turnStartedAt) {
1858:                     turnStartedAtMs = payload.turnStartedAt;
1859:                 } else {
1860:                     turnStartedAtMs = Date.now();
1861:                 }
1862:                 // Wandering River clears at the beginning of the caster's next turn
1863:                 if (spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects && spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearWanderingRiverForPlayer) {
1864:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearWanderingRiverForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
1865:                 }
1866:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearFreedomForPlayer) {
1867:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearFreedomForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
1868:                 }
1869:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearQuickReflexesForPlayer) {
1870:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearQuickReflexesForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
1871:                 }
1872:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearExcavateForPlayer) {
1873:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearExcavateForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
1874:                 }
1875:                 // Clear all turn-based buffs (expiresThisTurn) on every client when the turn changes.
1876:                 // This is a defensive cleanup: reflect-triggered / psychic-triggered execute() on
1877:                 // ALL clients, so non-caster clients can end up with stale activeBuffs entries
1878:                 // (e.g. steamVents set for the reflect caster). Without this call those entries
1879:                 // linger until the next time clearTurnBuffs() fires on that client.
1880:                 // Safe to call multiple times — idempotent (no-op if already cleared).
1881:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearTurnBuffs) {
1882:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearTurnBuffs();
1883:                 }
1884:                 // Excavate teleport: if it's my turn and I have a pending teleport, trigger it
1885:                 if (activePlayerIndex === myPlayerIndex && spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processExcavateTeleport) {
1886:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.processExcavateTeleport(activePlayerIndex);
1887:                 }
1888: 
1889:                 // AP resets at the start of the new player's turn
1890:                 if (activePlayerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
1891:                     currentAP = 5;
1892:                     document.getElementById('ap-count').textContent = currentAP;
1893:                     if (typeof refreshVoidAP === 'function') refreshVoidAP();
1894:                     if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
1895:                 }
1896: 
1897:                 updateEndTurnButtonVisibility();
1898:             updateDeckIndicatorVisibility();
1899:                 updateOpponentPanel(); // Update opponent panel on turn change
1900: 
1901:                 if (isPlacementPhase) {
1902:                     // During placement, update status for tile placement
1903:                     if (canPlaceTile()) {
1904:                         updateStatus(`Your turn! Place your player tile (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers} placed)`);
1905:                         setInventoryOpen(true);
1906:                         console.log(`✅ My turn to place tile`);
1907:                     } else {
1908:                         const nextColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
1909:                         updateStatus(`Waiting for ${nextColorName} to place their tile... (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers})`);
1910:                         console.log(`⏳ Waiting for player ${activePlayerIndex} to place`);
1911:                     }
1912:                 } else {
1913:                     // Normal gameplay turn display
1914:                     updateTurnDisplay();
1915:                 }
1916:             });
1917: 
1918:             // Listen for player tile placement during placement phase
1919:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'player-tile-placed' }, ({ payload }) => {
1920:                 console.log('📄 Player tile placed:', payload);
1921:                 const { playerIndex } = payload;
1922:                 playerTilesPlaced.add(playerIndex);
1923: 
1924:                 // Don't check completion here - let placement-complete event handle it
1925:                 if (isPlacementPhase && playerTilesPlaced.size < totalPlayers) {
1926:                     // Update status during placement phase
1927:                     if (canPlaceTile()) {
1928:                         updateStatus(`Your turn! Place your player tile (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers} placed)`);
1929:                         setInventoryOpen(true);
1930:                     } else {
1931:                         const nextColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
1932:                         updateStatus(`Waiting for ${nextColorName} to place their tile... (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers})`);
1933:                     }
1934:                 }
1935:             });
1936: 
1937:             // Listen for placement phase completion
1938:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'placement-complete' }, ({ payload }) => {
1939:                 console.log('📄 Placement phase complete');
1940:                 isPlacementPhase = false;
1941:                 activePlayerIndex = payload.playerIndex; // Set to first player
1942:                 if (payload.turnStartedAt) {
1943:                     turnStartedAtMs = payload.turnStartedAt;
1944:                 } else {
1945:                     turnStartedAtMs = Date.now();
1946:                 }
1947: 
1948:                 if (isMyTurn()) {
1949:                     updateStatus(`All tiles placed! It's your turn!`);
1950:                 } else {
1951:                     const firstPlayerColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
1952:                     updateStatus(`All tiles placed! Waiting for ${firstPlayerColorName}'s turn...`);
1953:                 }
1954: 
1955:                 // Ensure standard turn UI becomes visible after placement phase
1956:                 updateTurnDisplay();
1957:                 updateDeckIndicatorVisibility();
1958: 
1959:             });
1960: 
1961:             // Listen for spell cast events
1962:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'spell-cast' }, ({ payload }) => {
1963:                 console.log('📄 Received spell cast:', payload);
1964:                 const { playerIndex, spellName, element, elements, level, isCatacomb } = payload;
1965: 
1966:                 // Update that player's activated elements display
1967:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
1968:                 const playerScrollData = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
1969: 
1970:                 if (isCatacomb) {
1971:                     // Catacomb activates multiple elements
1972:                     elements.forEach(el => {
1973:                         playerScrollData.activated.add(el);
1974:                     });
1975:                 } else {
1976:                     // Regular spell activates one element
1977:                     playerScrollData.activated.add(element);
1978:                 }
1979: 
1980:                 // Update the element symbols display for that player
1981:                 updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex);
1982: 
1983:                 // Show notification
1984:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
1985:                 if (isCatacomb) {
1986:                     updateStatus(`${playerName} cast ${spellName}! Activated: ${elements.join(', ')}`);
1987:                 } else {
1988:                     updateStatus(`${playerName} cast ${spellName}! Activated ${element} (level ${level})`);
1989:                 }
1990:             });
1991: 
1992:             // Listen for scroll effect broadcasts (for scrolls with special effects)
1993:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-effect' }, ({ payload }) => {
1994:                 console.log('📄 Received scroll-effect:', payload);
1995:                 const { playerIndex, scrollName, effectName, element, activatedElements } = payload;
1996: 
1997:                 // Update that player's activated elements
1998:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
1999:                 const playerScrollData = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
2000: 
2001:                 if (activatedElements && Array.isArray(activatedElements)) {
2002:                     // Add all activated elements (for catacomb scrolls or multi-element effects)
2003:                     activatedElements.forEach(el => {
2004:                         playerScrollData.activated.add(el);
2005:                     });
2006:                 } else if (element) {
2007:                     // Single element activation
2008:                     playerScrollData.activated.add(element);
2009:                 }
2010: 
2011:                 // Update the element symbols display for that player
2012:                 updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex);
2013: 
2014:                 // Show notification
2015:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2016:                 const activatedStr = activatedElements ? activatedElements.join(', ') : element;
2017:                 updateStatus(`${playerName} used ${effectName}! Activated: ${activatedStr}`);
2018: 
2019:                 // Check win condition — all 5 elements activated
2020:                 if (spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].activated.size === 5) {
2021:                     console.log(`🏆 Win condition met for player ${playerIndex} (detected via scroll-effect broadcast)`);
2022:                     // For the winner's own echo: showLevelComplete already ran locally and
2023:                     // showGameOverToAll is guarded by #game-over-notification. Safe to call again.
2024:                     // For observers: handleGameOver → showGameOverToAll shows the win screen.
2025:                     handleGameOver(playerIndex);
2026:                 }
2027:             });
2028: 
2029:             // Simplify applied by opponent
2030:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'simplify-applied' }, ({ payload }) => {
2031:                 const { playerIndex } = payload;
2032:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects) {
2033:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.simplify = { expiresThisTurn: true, playerIndex };
2034:                 }
2035:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2036:                 updateStatus(`Simplify: ${playerName}'s scrolls cost 1 AP to cast until their next turn.`);
2037:             });
2038: 
2039:             // Reflect triggered at start of turn: run the reflected scroll's effect and update activated elements.
2040:             // Multiple reflect-triggered events for the same player are queued and processed one at a time
2041:             // so that interactive scrolls fully resolve before the next one starts.
2042:             {
2043:                 const reflectQueue = []; // pending { playerIndex, scrollName } entries
2044:                 let reflectRunning = false;
2045: 
2046:                 const runNextReflectTrigger = () => {
2047:                     if (reflectRunning || reflectQueue.length === 0) return;
2048:                     const { playerIndex, scrollName } = reflectQueue.shift();
2049:                     reflectRunning = true;
2050: 
2051:                     const advance = () => {
2052:                         reflectRunning = false;
2053:                         runNextReflectTrigger();
2054:                     };
2055: 
2056:                     // Execute the reflected scroll's effect on this client.
2057:                     // Interactive scrolls (requiresSelection) should only run on the Reflect caster's
2058:                     // own client (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex). On other clients, skip execute() —
2059:                     // the caster's client handles the UI selection and syncs state via syncPlayerState.
2060:                     let wasInteractive = false;
2061:                     if (spellSystem.scrollEffects && scrollName) {
2062:                         const definition = spellSystem.patterns?.[scrollName];
2063:                         if (definition) {
2064:                             const isCaster = (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex);
2065:                             console.log(`🪞 Running reflected scroll effect locally: ${scrollName} for player ${playerIndex} (isCaster=${isCaster})`);
2066:                             const result = spellSystem.scrollEffects.execute(scrollName, playerIndex, {
2067:                                 spell: definition,
2068:                                 scrollName: scrollName,
2069:                                 onComplete: advance,
2070:                                 // Flag so interactive scroll effects skip UI on non-caster clients
2071:                                 psychicRemoteClient: !isCaster
2072:                             });
2073:                             wasInteractive = !!(result?.requiresSelection);
2074:                             if (wasInteractive && !isCaster) {
2075:                                 console.log(`🪞 Interactive scroll on non-caster client — advancing queue immediately`);
2076:                                 wasInteractive = false;
2077:                             }
2078:                         }
2079:                     }
2080: 
2081:                     // Update activated elements (Reflect only counts as water, not the reflected scroll's elements)
2082:                     spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2083:                     const activated = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].activated;
2084:                     activated.add('water');
2085:                     console.log(`🪞 Reflect activated water for player ${playerIndex}:`, Array.from(activated));
2086:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex);
2087: 
2088:                     if (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2089:                         Object.keys(stoneCounts).forEach(updateStoneCount);
2090:                     }
2091: 
2092:                     const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2093:                     const displayName = scrollName ? (scrollName.replace(/_/g, ' ').toLowerCase()) : 'scroll';
2094:                     updateStatus(`🪞 ${playerName}'s Reflect triggered: activated ${displayName} (counts as water only).`);
2095: 
2096:                     if (activated.size === 5 && playerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2097:                         spellSystem.showLevelComplete(playerIndex);
2098:                         if (typeof handleGameOver === 'function') {
2099:                             handleGameOver(playerIndex);
2100:                         }
2101:                     }
2102: 
2103:                     // For non-interactive scrolls, advance the queue immediately
