2104:                     if (!wasInteractive) advance();
2105:                 };
2106: 
2107:                 gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'reflect-triggered' }, ({ payload }) => {
2108:                     console.log('📄 Received reflect-triggered:', payload);
2109:                     const { playerIndex, scrollName } = payload;
2110:                     if (typeof spellSystem === 'undefined') return;
2111: 
2112:                     // Enqueue and start processing if not already running
2113:                     reflectQueue.push({ playerIndex, scrollName });
2114:                     runNextReflectTrigger();
2115:                 });
2116:             }
2117: 
2118:             // Psychic triggered at start of turn: run the stolen scroll's effect and update activated elements.
2119:             // Multiple psychic-triggered events for the same player are queued and processed one at a time
2120:             // so that interactive scrolls (e.g. Heavy Stomp) fully resolve before the next one starts.
2121:             {
2122:                 const psychicQueue = []; // pending { playerIndex, scrollName } entries
2123:                 let psychicRunning = false;
2124: 
2125:                 const runNextPsychicTrigger = () => {
2126:                     if (psychicRunning || psychicQueue.length === 0) return;
2127:                     const { playerIndex, scrollName } = psychicQueue.shift();
2128:                     psychicRunning = true;
2129: 
2130:                     const advance = () => {
2131:                         psychicRunning = false;
2132:                         runNextPsychicTrigger();
2133:                     };
2134: 
2135:                     // Execute the stolen scroll's effect on this client.
2136:                     // Interactive scrolls (requiresSelection) should only run on the Psychic caster's
2137:                     // own client (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex). On other clients, skip execute() —
2138:                     // the caster's client handles the UI selection and broadcasts state changes via syncPlayerState.
2139:                     let wasInteractive = false;
2140:                     if (spellSystem.scrollEffects && scrollName) {
2141:                         const definition = spellSystem.patterns?.[scrollName];
2142:                         if (definition) {
2143:                             const isCaster = (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex);
2144:                             console.log(`🔮 Running psychic scroll effect locally: ${scrollName} for player ${playerIndex} (isCaster=${isCaster})`);
2145:                             const result = spellSystem.scrollEffects.execute(scrollName, playerIndex, {
2146:                                 spell: definition,
2147:                                 scrollName: scrollName,
2148:                                 // onComplete advances the queue when interactive effects finish
2149:                                 onComplete: advance,
2150:                                 // Flag so interactive scroll effects can skip UI on non-caster clients
2151:                                 psychicRemoteClient: !isCaster
2152:                             });
2153:                             wasInteractive = !!(result?.requiresSelection);
2154:                             // If the scroll is interactive but we're not the caster, the execute()
2155:                             // should have returned early (due to psychicRemoteClient flag) without
2156:                             // opening any UI. Treat as non-interactive so the queue advances immediately.
2157:                             if (wasInteractive && !isCaster) {
2158:                                 console.log(`🔮 Interactive scroll on non-caster client — advancing queue immediately (state synced via syncPlayerState)`);
2159:                                 wasInteractive = false;
2160:                             }
2161:                         }
2162:                     }
2163: 
2164:                     // Update activated elements (Psychic only counts as void, not the stolen scroll's elements)
2165:                     spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2166:                     const activated = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].activated;
2167:                     activated.add('void');
2168:                     console.log(`🔮 Psychic activated void for player ${playerIndex}:`, Array.from(activated));
2169:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex);
2170: 
2171:                     if (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2172:                         Object.keys(stoneCounts).forEach(updateStoneCount);
2173:                     }
2174: 
2175:                     const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2176:                     const displayName = scrollName ? (scrollName.replace(/_/g, ' ').toLowerCase()) : 'scroll';
2177:                     updateStatus(`🔮 ${playerName}'s Psychic triggered: activated ${displayName} (counts as void only).`);
2178: 
2179:                     if (activated.size === 5 && playerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2180:                         spellSystem.showLevelComplete(playerIndex);
2181:                         if (typeof handleGameOver === 'function') {
2182:                             handleGameOver(playerIndex);
2183:                         }
2184:                     }
2185: 
2186:                     // For non-interactive scrolls, advance the queue immediately
2187:                     if (!wasInteractive) advance();
2188:                 };
2189: 
2190:                 gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'psychic-triggered' }, ({ payload }) => {
2191:                     console.log('📄 Received psychic-triggered:', payload);
2192:                     const { playerIndex, scrollName } = payload;
2193:                     if (typeof spellSystem === 'undefined') return;
2194: 
2195:                     // Enqueue and start processing if not already running
2196:                     psychicQueue.push({ playerIndex, scrollName });
2197:                     runNextPsychicTrigger();
2198:                 });
2199:             }
2200: 
2201:             // Listen for undo move events
2202:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'undo-move' }, ({ payload }) => {
2203:                 console.log('📄 Received undo move:', payload);
2204:                 const { playerIndex, x, y, apRestored } = payload;
2205: 
2206:                 // Visually move the player back
2207:                 movePlayerVisually(playerIndex, x, y, -apRestored); // Negative to show AP restored
2208: 
2209:                 // Note: AP update will come via player-state-update broadcast (from syncPlayerState)
2210:                 // which is sent right after the undo-move broadcast
2211: 
2212:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2213:                 updateStatus(`⟲ ${playerName} undid their move (restored ${apRestored} AP)`);
2214:             });
2215: 
2216:             // Listen for player state updates (AP and resources)
2217:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'player-state-update' }, ({ payload }) => {
2218:                 console.log('📄 Received player state update:', payload);
2219:                 const { playerIndex, currentAP, voidAP, resources } = payload;
2220: 
2221:                 // Update tracked state for this player
2222:                 if (!playerAPs[playerIndex]) {
2223:                     playerAPs[playerIndex] = { currentAP: 5, voidAP: 0 };
2224:                 }
2225:                 playerAPs[playerIndex].currentAP = currentAP;
2226:                 playerAPs[playerIndex].voidAP = voidAP;
2227: 
2228:                 // Update resources only when provided (null means sender is not the
2229:                 // active player and should not overwrite our own pool values)
2230:                 if (resources != null) {
2231:                     if (!playerPools[playerIndex]) {
2232:                         playerPools[playerIndex] = { earth: 0, water: 0, fire: 0, wind: 0, void: 0 };
2233:                     }
2234:                     Object.assign(playerPools[playerIndex], resources);
2235:                 }
2236:                 updateOpponentPanel(); // Update opponent panel when player state changes
2237:             });
2238: 
2239:             // Listen for scroll collection events (with deduplication)
2240:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-collected' }, ({ payload }) => {
2241:                 console.log('📄 Received scroll collection:', payload);
2242:                 const { playerIndex, scrollName, shrineType, _seq, _timestamp } = payload;
2243: 
2244:                 // DEDUPLICATION: Check if we've already processed this event
2245:                 const eventId = `scroll-collected-${playerIndex}-${scrollName}-${_timestamp || Date.now()}`;
2246:                 if (receivedSequences.has(eventId)) {
2247:                     console.warn('⚠️  Duplicate scroll-collected event ignored:', eventId);
2248:                     return;
2249:                 }
2250:                 receivedSequences.add(eventId);
2251: 
2252:                 // Check if scroll is already in player's hand (idempotency check)
2253:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2254:                 if (spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].hand.has(scrollName)) {
2255:                     console.warn('⚠️  Scroll already in hand, skipping:', scrollName);
2256:                     return;
2257:                 }
2258: 
2259:                 // Remove from the deck (scroll was drawn by the other player)
2260:                 const deckIndex = spellSystem.scrollDecks[shrineType]?.indexOf(scrollName);
2261:                 if (deckIndex > -1) {
2262:                     spellSystem.scrollDecks[shrineType].splice(deckIndex, 1);
2263:                 } else {
2264:                     console.warn(`⚠️  Scroll ${scrollName} not found in ${shrineType} deck (might have been removed already)`);
2265:                 }
2266: 
2267:                 // Add to that player's hand
2268:                 spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].hand.add(scrollName);
2269:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2270:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2271: 
2272:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2273:                 updateStatus(`${playerName} collected a ${shrineType} scroll!`);
2274:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2275:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2276:             });
2277: 
2278:             // Listen for Scholar's Insight (Void II) — remote player searched a deck
2279:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scholars-insight' }, ({ payload }) => {
2280:                 console.log("📄 Received Scholar's Insight:", payload);
2281:                 const { playerIndex, element, scrollName } = payload;
2282: 
2283:                 // Remove chosen scroll from the deck
2284:                 const deck = spellSystem.scrollDecks[element];
2285:                 if (deck) {
2286:                     const idx = deck.indexOf(scrollName);
2287:                     if (idx > -1) {
2288:                         deck.splice(idx, 1);
2289:                     }
2290:                     // Shuffle the deck (same as the caster did)
2291:                     if (spellSystem.shuffleDeck) {
2292:                         spellSystem.shuffleDeck(deck);
2293:                     }
2294:                 }
2295: 
2296:                 // Add to that player's hand
2297:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2298:                 spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].hand.add(scrollName);
2299:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2300:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2301: 
2302:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2303:                 updateStatus(`${playerName} used Scholar's Insight to search the ${element} deck!`);
2304:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2305:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2306:             });
2307: 
2308:             // Listen for Create (Void V) — remote player drew stones
2309:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'create-stones' }, ({ payload }) => {
2310:                 console.log('📄 Received Create stones:', payload);
2311:                 const { playerIndex, element, count } = payload;
2312: 
2313:                 // Update source pool (stones were drawn from source)
2314:                 if (typeof stonePools !== 'undefined' && stonePools[element] !== undefined) {
2315:                     stonePools[element] = Math.max(0, stonePools[element] - count);
2316:                 }
2317: 
2318:                 // If this is OUR player, the stones are already drawn locally
2319:                 // For remote players, update their pool display
2320:                 if (playerIndex !== myPlayerIndex) {
2321:                     const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2322:                     updateStatus(`${playerName} used Create to draw ${count} ${element} stone${count === 1 ? '' : 's'}!`);
2323:                 } else {
2324:                     // Our action — already handled locally, just sync source pool
2325:                 }
2326: 
2327:                 if (typeof updateSourcePoolDisplay === 'function') updateSourcePoolDisplay();
2328:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2329:             });
2330: 
2331:             // Listen for Quick Reflexes deck search — remote player found a level 1 scroll
2332:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'quick-reflexes-search' }, ({ payload }) => {
2333:                 console.log('📄 Received Quick Reflexes search:', payload);
2334:                 const { playerIndex, element, scrollName, stonesDrawn, buffActive } = payload;
2335: 
2336:                 // Remove chosen scroll from that element's deck and shuffle
2337:                 const deck = spellSystem.scrollDecks?.[element];
2338:                 if (deck) {
2339:                     const idx = deck.indexOf(scrollName);
2340:                     if (idx > -1) deck.splice(idx, 1);
2341:                     if (spellSystem.shuffleDeck) spellSystem.shuffleDeck(deck);
2342:                 }
2343: 
2344:                 // Add scroll to that player's hand
2345:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2346:                 spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].hand.add(scrollName);
2347:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2348:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2349: 
2350:                 // Update source pool (stones were drawn from it)
2351:                 if (typeof stonePools !== 'undefined' && stonePools[element] !== undefined) {
2352:                     stonePools[element] = Math.max(0, stonePools[element] - (stonesDrawn || 0));
2353:                 }
2354: 
2355:                 // Update remote player's stone pool display
2356:                 if (playerIndex !== myPlayerIndex) {
2357:                     if (!playerPools[playerIndex]) playerPools[playerIndex] = { earth: 0, water: 0, fire: 0, wind: 0, void: 0 };
2358:                     playerPools[playerIndex][element] = Math.min(5, (playerPools[playerIndex][element] || 0) + (stonesDrawn || 0));
2359:                 }
2360: 
2361:                 // Apply the quickReflexes buff on this client so that getSpellCost()
2362:                 // correctly prices level-1 scrolls at 0 AP during affordability checks
2363:                 // in the response window (canAnyPlayerRespond / canPlayerRespond).
2364:                 if (buffActive && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
2365:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.quickReflexes = {
2366:                         playerIndex: playerIndex
2367:                     };
2368:                     console.log(`⚡ Applied quickReflexes buff for player ${playerIndex} on remote client`);
2369:                 }
2370: 
2371:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2372:                 const scrollDef = spellSystem.patterns?.[scrollName];
2373:                 const displayName = scrollDef?.name || scrollName;
2374:                 updateStatus(`⚡ ${playerName} used Quick Reflexes: found "${displayName}", drew ${stonesDrawn || 0} ${element} stone${stonesDrawn === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
2375: 
2376:                 if (typeof updateSourcePoolDisplay === 'function') updateSourcePoolDisplay();
2377:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2378:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2379:             });
2380: 
2381:             // Listen for scroll move events (hand <-> active)
2382:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-move' }, ({ payload }) => {
2383:                 console.log('📄 Received scroll move:', payload);
2384:                 const { playerIndex, scrollName, toLocation } = payload;
2385: 
2386:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2387:                 const scrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
2388:                 if (toLocation === 'active') {
2389:                     scrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
2390:                     scrolls.active.add(scrollName);
2391:                     console.log(`📜 ${getPlayerColorName(playerIndex)} moved ${scrollName} to active area`);
2392:                 } else {
2393:                     scrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
2394:                     scrolls.hand.add(scrollName);
2395:                     console.log(`📜 ${getPlayerColorName(playerIndex)} moved ${scrollName} back to hand`);
2396:                 }
2397:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2398:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2399:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2400:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2401:             });
2402:

2404:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-discard' }, ({ payload }) => {

2407: 
2408:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2409:                 const scrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
2410:                 scrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
2411:                 scrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
2412:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2413:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2414:                 console.log(`📜 ${getPlayerColorName(playerIndex)} discarded ${scrollName}`);
2415:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2416:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2417:             });
2418: 
2419:             // Listen for common area updates
2420:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'common-area-update' }, ({ payload }) => {
2421:                 console.log('📄 Received common area update:', payload);
2422:                 const { element, scrollName, replacedScroll, _timestamp } = payload;
2423: 
2424:                 // DEDUPLICATION: Check if we've already processed this event
2425:                 const eventId = `common-area-${element}-${scrollName}-${_timestamp || Date.now()}`;
2426:                 if (receivedSequences.has(eventId)) {
2427:                     console.warn('⚠️  Duplicate common-area-update event ignored:', eventId);
2428:                     return;
2429:                 }
2430:                 receivedSequences.add(eventId);
2431: 
2432:                 // IDEMPOTENCY: Check if common area already has this scroll
2433:                 if (spellSystem.commonArea[element] === scrollName) {
2434:                     console.warn('⚠️  Common area already has this scroll, skipping update');
2435:                     return;
2436:                 }
2437: 
2438:                 // If there was a scroll being replaced, put it back in the deck
2439:                 if (replacedScroll) {
2440:                     // Check if it's not already in the deck (avoid duplicates)
2441:                     if (!spellSystem.scrollDecks[element]?.includes(replacedScroll)) {
2442:                         spellSystem.scrollDecks[element].push(replacedScroll);
2443:                         console.log(`📜 Common area: ${replacedScroll} returned to deck`);
2444:                     } else {
2445:                         console.warn(`⚠️  ${replacedScroll} already in deck, not adding again`);
2446:                     }
2447:                 }
2448: 
2449:                 spellSystem.commonArea[element] = scrollName;
2450:                 console.log(`📜 Common area: ${scrollName} now in ${element} slot`);
2451:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2452:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2453: 
2454:                 if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
2455:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2456:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2457:             });
2458: 
2459:             // Response window events for scroll responses
2460:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'response-window-opened' }, ({ payload }) => {
2461:                 console.log('📄 Received response window opened:', payload);
2462:                 const { scrollName, casterIndex, commonArea: commonAreaSnapshot } = payload;
2463: 
2464:                 // Only show response window if I'm NOT the caster
2465:                 if (myPlayerIndex !== casterIndex && spellSystem.responseWindow) {
2466:                     // Apply the common area snapshot from the caster's client before
2467:                     // checking canPlayerRespond — prevents a race condition where a
2468:                     // preceding common-area-update (e.g. Psychic moving there) hasn't
2469:                     // arrived yet, causing the response check to miss available scrolls.
2470:                     if (commonAreaSnapshot) {
2471:                         const elements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'];
2472:                         elements.forEach(el => {
2473:                             const incomingScroll = commonAreaSnapshot[el] ?? null;
2474:                             if (spellSystem.commonArea[el] !== incomingScroll) {
2475:                                 console.log(`📜 Applying common area snapshot: ${el} = ${incomingScroll}`);
2476:                                 spellSystem.commonArea[el] = incomingScroll;
2477:                             }
2478:                         });
2479:                     }
2480: 
2481:                     const scrollDef = spellSystem.patterns[scrollName];
2482:                     const scrollData = { name: scrollName, spell: scrollDef };
2483: 
2484:                     // Show the response window for this player
2485:                     spellSystem.responseWindow.showResponseModalForOtherPlayer(scrollData, casterIndex);
2486:                 }
2487:             });
2488: 
2489:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'response-pass' }, ({ payload }) => {
2490:                 console.log('📄 Received response pass:', payload);
2491:                 const { playerIndex } = payload;
2492: 
2493:                 // Update response window state
2494:                 if (spellSystem.responseWindow) {
2495:                     spellSystem.responseWindow.handleRemotePass(playerIndex);
2496:                 }
2497:             });
2498: 
2499:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-response' }, ({ payload }) => {
2500:                 console.log('📄 Received scroll response:', payload);
2501:                 const { scrollName, playerIndex, isCounter } = payload;
2502: 
2503:                 // Update response window state
2504:                 if (spellSystem.responseWindow) {
2505:                     spellSystem.responseWindow.handleRemoteResponse(scrollName, playerIndex, isCounter);
2506:                 }
2507:             });
2508: 
2509:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-countered' }, ({ payload }) => {
2510:                 console.log('📄 Received scroll countered:', payload);
2511:                 const { scrollName, casterIndex } = payload;
2512:                 updateStatus(`${getPlayerColorName(casterIndex)}'s scroll was countered!`);
2513:             });
2514: 
2515:             // Cascade forfeit: active player timed out with an unresolved scroll cascade
2516:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'cascade-forfeit' }, ({ payload }) => {
2517:                 console.log('📄 Received cascade-forfeit:', payload);
2518:                 const { playerIndex } = payload;
2519:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2520:                 updateStatus(`⏰ ${playerName} ran out of time with an unresolved scroll cascade — they forfeit!`);
2521:             });
2522: 
2523:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'response-resolved' }, ({ payload }) => {
2524:                 console.log('📄 Received response resolved:', payload);
2525:                 // Close the response window on this client
2526:                 if (spellSystem.responseWindow) {
2527:                     spellSystem.responseWindow.handleRemoteResolved();
2528:                 }
2529: 
2530:                 // Process response scroll effects (like Unbidden Lamplight / Reflect)
2531:                 if (payload.results && payload.triggeringScroll) {
2532:                     for (const result of payload.results) {
2533:                         if (result.result === 'response-resolved' && result.isResponse) {
2534:                             console.log(`ℹ️ Processing remote response scroll: ${result.scrollName}`);
2535:                             // Only execute the response scroll effect on the RESPONDER's client.
2536:                             // The responder's client owns the pools/decks that need modifying.
2537:                             if (spellSystem.scrollEffects && result.casterIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2538:                                 const scrollDef = spellSystem.patterns?.[result.scrollName];
2539:                                 // Ensure triggeringScroll has its definition (resolve from
2540:                                 // broadcast payload or local patterns)
2541:                                 const trigScroll = { ...payload.triggeringScroll };
2542:                                 if (!trigScroll.definition && trigScroll.name) {
2543:                                     trigScroll.definition = spellSystem.patterns?.[trigScroll.name];
2544:                                 }
2545:                                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.execute(result.scrollName, result.casterIndex, {
2546:                                     spell: scrollDef,
2547:                                     triggeringScroll: trigScroll
2548:                                 });
2549: 
2550:                                 // Track activated element for win condition (response scrolls count too!)
2551:                                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(result.casterIndex);
2552:                                 const activatedEls = (scrollDef?.element === 'catacomb' && scrollDef?.patterns?.[0])
2553:                                     ? [...new Set(scrollDef.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type))]
2554:                                     : scrollDef?.element ? [scrollDef.element] : [];
2555:                                 activatedEls.forEach(el => {
2556:                                     spellSystem.playerScrolls[result.casterIndex].activated.add(el);
2557:                                 });
2558:                                 if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
2559:                                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(result.casterIndex);
2560:                                 }
2561: 
2562:                                 // Broadcast activation so the caster's client (and any others)
2563:                                 // updates this player's shrine win-condition symbols
2564:                                 if (activatedEls.length > 0 && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2565:                                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-effect', {
2566:                                         playerIndex: result.casterIndex,
2567:                                         scrollName: result.scrollName,
2568:                                         effectName: scrollDef?.name || result.scrollName,
2569:                                         element: scrollDef?.element,
2570:                                         activatedElements: activatedEls
2571:                                     });
2572:                                 }
2573:                             } else {
2574:                                 console.log(`ℹ️ Skipping response effect for ${result.scrollName} (responder is player ${result.casterIndex}, I am ${myPlayerIndex})`);
2575:                             }
2576:                         } else if (result.result === 'countered-original') {
2577:                             // Counter scroll (like Psychic or Iron Stance) resolved on the non-caster client.
2578:                             //
2579:                             // DO NOT re-execute the counter scroll's effect here.
2580:                             // The flow is:
2581:                             //   1. Caster's client runs resolveResponseStack() → fires scroll-resolved event
2582:                             //   2. multiplayer-state.js listener executes the counter effect (e.g. Psychic)
2583:                             //      and broadcasts psychic-buff-applied / scroll-effect
2584:                             //   3. Non-caster clients receive those broadcasts and apply state (psychicPending, etc.)
2585:                             //
2586:                             // Re-executing here caused a double psychicPending entry for the counter-caster,
2587:                             // which made the stolen scroll fire TWICE on the counter-caster's next turn —
2588:                             // appearing as if the original caster's scroll ability was still activating.
2589:                             console.log(`ℹ️ Processing remote counter scroll: ${result.scrollName}, counter-caster: ${result.casterIndex}`);
2590: 
2591:                             // If this is MY counter scroll, remove it from my active scrolls.
2592:                             // Psychic goes to common area (arrives via common-area-update broadcast from caster).
2593:                             // Iron Stance stays in active (nothing to remove).
2594:                             if (result.casterIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2595:                                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(myPlayerIndex);
2596:                                 const myScrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[myPlayerIndex];
2597:                                 if (myScrolls.active.has(result.scrollName)) {
2598:                                     myScrolls.active.delete(result.scrollName);
2599:                                     console.log(`📜 Removed ${result.scrollName} from my active scrolls (counter sent to common area)`);
2600:                                 }
2601:                                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2602:                             }
2603:                         }
2604:                     }
2605:                 }
2606:             });
2607: 
2608:             // Listen for tile swap events (Shifting Sands scroll effect)
2609:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'tile-swap' }, ({ payload }) => {
2610:                 console.log('📄 Received tile swap:', payload);
2611:                 const { tile1Id, tile2Id, tile1NewPos, tile2NewPos } = payload;
2612: 
2613:                 const tile1 = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tile1Id);
2614:                 const tile2 = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tile2Id);
2615: 
2616:                 if (tile1 && tile2) {
2617:                     // Update positions
2618:                     tile1.x = tile1NewPos.x;
2619:                     tile1.y = tile1NewPos.y;
2620:                     tile2.x = tile2NewPos.x;
2621:                     tile2.y = tile2NewPos.y;
2622: 
2623:                     // Update visuals
2624:                     if (tile1.element) {
2625:                         tile1.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile1.x}, ${tile1.y}) rotate(${tile1.rotation || 0})`);
2626:                     }
2627:                     if (tile2.element) {
2628:                         tile2.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile2.x}, ${tile2.y}) rotate(${tile2.rotation || 0})`);
2629:                     }
2630: 
2631:                     // Safety: clear any stuck tile-swap selectionMode on this client —
2632:                     // the authoritative swap just arrived via broadcast, so no local selection needed.
2633:                     if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.selectionMode?.type === 'tile-swap') {
2634:                         spellSystem.scrollEffects.selectionMode.cleanup?.();
2635:                         spellSystem.scrollEffects.selectionMode = null;
2636:                     }
2637: 
2638:                     updateStatus('Tiles were swapped by Shifting Sands!');
2639:                 }
2640:             });
2641: 
2642:             // Listen for Telekinesis tile moves (Void III)
2643:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'telekinesis-move' }, ({ payload }) => {
2644:                 console.log('📄 Received telekinesis move:', payload);
2645:                 const { tileId, newPos, movedPlayers } = payload;
2646: 
2647:                 const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
2648:                 if (tile) {
2649:                     tile.x = newPos.x;
2650:                     tile.y = newPos.y;
2651:                     if (tile.element) {
2652:                         tile.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${newPos.x}, ${newPos.y}) rotate(${tile.rotation || 0})`);
2653:                     }
2654:                 }
2655: 
2656:                 // Move players that were on the tile
2657:                 if (movedPlayers && movedPlayers.length > 0) {
2658:                     movedPlayers.forEach(mp => {
2659:                         if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
2660:                             movePlayerVisually(mp.playerIndex, mp.newX, mp.newY, 0);
2661:                         } else if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof window.movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
2662:                             window.movePlayerVisually(mp.playerIndex, mp.newX, mp.newY, 0);
2663:                         }
2664:                     });
2665:                 }
2666: 
2667:                 // Refresh catacomb indicators in case shrine positions changed
2668:                 if (typeof updateCatacombIndicators === 'function') {
2669:                     updateCatacombIndicators();
2670:                 }
2671: 
2672:                 updateStatus('A tile was moved by Telekinesis!');
2673:             });
2674: 
2675:             // Listen for tile hide events (Heavy Stomp scroll effect)
2676:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'tile-hide' }, ({ payload }) => {
2677:                 console.log('📄 Received tile hide:', payload);
2678:                 const { tileId } = payload;
2679: 
2680:                 const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
2681:                 if (tile && !tile.flipped) {
2682:                     recreateTileAsFlipped(tile);
2683:                     updateStatus(`${tile.shrineType} shrine was hidden by Heavy Stomp!`);
2684:                 }
2685:             });
2686: 
2687:             // Note: scroll-effect handling (activated tracking, symbols, win check, status) is
2688:             // handled by the earlier scroll-effect listener above. No duplicate handler here.
2689: 
2690:             // Listen for Arson stone destruction on opponent's client
2691:             // Listen for Plunder scroll events (Catacomb Scroll 8)
2692:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-plundered' }, ({ payload }) => {
2693:                 console.log('📄 Received scroll-plundered:', payload);
2694:                 const { casterIndex, targetIndex, scrollName } = payload;
2695: 
2696:                 // Remove the scroll from the target's active area
2697:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(targetIndex);
2698:                 const targetScrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[targetIndex];
2699:                 if (targetScrolls) {
2700:                     targetScrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
2701:                 }
2702: 
2703:                 // Common area update is handled by the separate common-area-update broadcast
2704:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2705:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2706:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2707:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2708: 
2709:                 // If I'm the target, notify me
2710:                 if (targetIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2711:                     const scrollDef = SCROLL_DEFINITIONS?.[scrollName];
2712:                     const scrollDisplayName = scrollDef?.name || scrollName;
2713:                     const casterName = getPlayerColorName(casterIndex);
2714:                     updateStatus(`🏴‍☠️ ${casterName} used Plunder: sent your ${scrollDisplayName} to the common area!`);
2715:                     // Refresh my scroll UI
2716:                     Object.keys(stoneCounts).forEach(updateStoneCount);
2717:                 }
2718:             });
2719: 
2720:             // Listen for Excavate teleport events (Catacomb Scroll 4)
2721:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'excavate-teleport' }, ({ payload }) => {
2722:                 console.log('📄 Received excavate-teleport:', payload);
2723:                 const { playerIndex, x, y } = payload;
2724:                 if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
2725:                     movePlayerVisually(playerIndex, x, y, 0);
2726:                 } else {
2727:                     const target = playerPositions[playerIndex];
2728:                     if (target) {
2729:                         target.x = x;
2730:                         target.y = y;
2731:                         if (target.element) {
2732:                             target.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
2733:                         }
2734:                     }
2735:                 }
2736:                 console.log(`⛏️ Excavate teleport: player ${playerIndex} to (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)})`);
2737:             });
2738: 
2739:             // Listen for Excavate immunity buff (so other clients know player is immune)
2740:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'excavate-immunity' }, ({ payload }) => {
2741:                 console.log('📄 Received excavate-immunity:', payload);
2742:                 const { playerIndex } = payload;
2743:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects) {
2744:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.excavate = {
2745:                         playerIndex: playerIndex
2746:                     };
2747:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.excavateTeleport = {
2748:                         playerIndex: playerIndex
2749:                     };
2750:                 }
2751:             });
2752: 
2753:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'opponent-stone-destroyed' }, ({ payload }) => {
2754:                 console.log('📄 Received opponent-stone-destroyed:', payload);
2755:                 const { opponentIndex, stoneType } = payload;
2756: 
2757:                 // Update the local pool for the targeted player
2758:                 if (playerPools[opponentIndex] && playerPools[opponentIndex][stoneType] > 0) {
2759:                     playerPools[opponentIndex][stoneType]--;
2760:                 }
2761: 
2762:                 // If I'm the targeted opponent, refresh my stone UI
2763:                 if (opponentIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2764:                     Object.keys(stoneCounts).forEach(updateStoneCount);
2765:                     const casterName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
2766:                     updateStatus(`🔥 ${casterName} used Arson: destroyed 1 ${stoneType} stone from your pool!`);
2767:                 }
2768: 
2769:                 if (typeof updateOpponentPanel === 'function') updateOpponentPanel();
2770:             });
2771: 
2772:             // Listen for scroll-used: handles scroll disposition on remote clients
2773:             // Only handles forceToCommonArea=true (e.g. Arson forcing itself into the common area).
2774:             // fromCommonArea=true events are intentionally ignored — common area scrolls are permanent
2775:             // shared resources and stay after being cast; they're only replaced by a new scroll of the
2776:             // same element type being discarded to the common area.
2777:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-used' }, ({ payload }) => {
2778:                 const { playerIndex, scrollName, fromCommonArea, forceToCommonArea } = payload;
2779:                 if (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex) return; // Caster already handled it locally
2780: 
2781:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2782: 
2783:                 if (fromCommonArea) {
2784:                     // Common area scrolls persist after casting — nothing to clear
2785:                     return;
2786:                 }
2787: 
2788:                 if (!forceToCommonArea) return; // Nothing to do for normal active-area disposition
2789: 
2790:                 // forceToCommonArea=true: scroll pushed itself to common area (e.g. Arson)
2791:                 const playerScrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
2792:                 if (playerScrolls && playerScrolls.active.has(scrollName)) {
2793:                     playerScrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
2794:                     console.log(`📜 Remote scroll-used: moved ${scrollName} from player ${playerIndex}'s active to common area`);
2795:                 }
2796:                 spellSystem.discardToCommonArea(scrollName);
2797:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2798:                 if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
2799:             });
2800: 
2801:             // Listen for water stone transformation (Control the Current - Water V)
2802:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'water-stone-transformed' }, ({ payload }) => {
2803:                 console.log('📄 Received water-stone-transformed:', payload);
2804:                 const { stoneX, stoneY, newElement } = payload;
2805: 
2806:                 // Find the stone at this location
2807:                 if (typeof placedStones !== 'undefined' && typeof STONE_TYPES !== 'undefined') {
2808:                     const stone = placedStones.find(s =>
2809:                         Math.abs(s.x - stoneX) < 1 && Math.abs(s.y - stoneY) < 1
2810:                     );
2811: 
2812:                     if (stone && stone.element && STONE_TYPES[newElement]) {
2813:                         // Update stone type
2814:                         stone.type = newElement;
2815: 
2816:                         // Remove any water stone indicators (mimicry/chain rings) before transformation
2817:                         const mimicryIndicator = stone.element.querySelector('.mimicry-indicator');
2818:                         if (mimicryIndicator) {
2819:                             mimicryIndicator.remove();
2820:                         }
2821:                         const chainIndicator = stone.element.querySelector('.chain-indicator');
2822:                         if (chainIndicator) {
2823:                             chainIndicator.remove();
2824:                         }
2825: 
2826:                         // Update visual appearance - update both color and symbol
2827:                         const circle = stone.element.querySelector('circle');
2828:                         const text = stone.element.querySelector('text');
2829: 
2830:                         if (circle) {
2831:                             circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[newElement].color);
2832:                         }
2833: 
2834:                         if (text) {
2835:                             text.textContent = STONE_TYPES[newElement].symbol;
2836:                         }
2837: 
2838:                         console.log(`🌀 Transformed water stone at (${stoneX.toFixed(1)}, ${stoneY.toFixed(1)}) to ${newElement}`);
2839:                     } else {
2840:                         console.warn(`⚠️ Could not find stone at (${stoneX}, ${stoneY}) to transform`);
2841:                     }
2842:                 }
2843:             });
2844: 
2845:             // Listen for stones destroyed (Combust - Catacomb X)
2846:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'stones-destroyed' }, ({ payload }) => {
2847:                 console.log('📄 Received stones-destroyed:', payload);
2848:                 const { tileId, stoneIds } = payload;
2849: 
2850:                 // Remove the destroyed stones from the board
2851:                 if (typeof placedStones !== 'undefined' && stoneIds && stoneIds.length > 0) {
2852:                     stoneIds.forEach(stoneId => {
2853:                         const stoneIndex = placedStones.findIndex(s => s.id === stoneId);
2854:                         if (stoneIndex !== -1) {
2855:                             const stone = placedStones[stoneIndex];
2856: 
2857:                             // Remove visual element
2858:                             if (stone.element && stone.element.parentNode) {
2859:                                 stone.element.parentNode.removeChild(stone.element);
2860:                             }
2861: 
2862:                             // Remove from array
2863:                             placedStones.splice(stoneIndex, 1);
2864:                             console.log(`💥 Removed stone ${stoneId} from board`);
2865:                         }
2866:                     });
2867: 
2868:                     console.log(`🔥 Combust destroyed ${stoneIds.length} stone${stoneIds.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} on tile ${tileId}`);
2869:                 }
2870:             });
2871: 
2872:             // Listen for periodic turn sync from host (for desync recovery)
2873:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'turn-sync' }, ({ payload }) => {
2874:                 const { playerIndex, turnNumber, turnStartedAt } = payload;
2875: 
2876:                 // Check if we're desynced
2877:                 if (activePlayerIndex !== playerIndex) {
2878:                     console.warn(`⚠️ DESYNC CORRECTED: Local activePlayerIndex was ${activePlayerIndex}, host says ${playerIndex}`);
2879:                     activePlayerIndex = playerIndex;
2880:                     updateTurnDisplay();
2881:                 }
2882: 
2883:                 if (typeof turnNumber === 'number' && lastReceivedTurnNumber !== turnNumber) {
2884:                     console.warn(`⚠️ DESYNC CORRECTED: Local turn was ${lastReceivedTurnNumber}, host says ${turnNumber}`);
2885:                     lastReceivedTurnNumber = turnNumber;
2886: 
2887:                     // If it's now our turn, reset AP — the normal turn-change broadcast
2888:                     // that does this was missed due to the reconnect
2889:                     if (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2890:                         console.warn('⚠️ DESYNC: Resetting AP for recovered turn');
2891:                         currentAP = maxAP;
2892:                         if (typeof refreshVoidAP === 'function') refreshVoidAP();
2893:                         if (typeof updateAPDisplay === 'function') updateAPDisplay();
2894:                     }
2895:                 }
2896: 
2897:                 if (turnStartedAt && Math.abs(turnStartedAtMs - turnStartedAt) > 2000) {
2898:                     console.warn(`⚠️ Turn timer desync corrected (diff: ${Math.abs(turnStartedAtMs - turnStartedAt)}ms)`);
2899:                     turnStartedAtMs = turnStartedAt;
2900:                 }
2901:             });
2902: 
2903:             // Listen for periodic common area sync from host (for desync recovery)
2904:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'common-area-sync' }, ({ payload }) => {
2905:                 const { commonArea } = payload;
2906: 
2907:                 if (!commonArea || typeof spellSystem === 'undefined') return;
2908: 
2909:                 // Build a set of scrolls already in local play (hand or active).
2910:                 // If the host's broadcast still shows a scroll in the common area but we have
2911:                 // it in a player's hand/active, the host state is stale — do NOT restore it.
2912:                 const inLocalPlay = new Set();
2913:                 for (const p of spellSystem.playerScrolls) {
2914:                     if (!p) continue;
2915:                     p.hand.forEach(s => inLocalPlay.add(s));
2916:                     p.active.forEach(s => inLocalPlay.add(s));
2917:                 }
2918: 
2919:                 // Compare and auto-correct any differences
2920:                 let corrected = false;
2921:                 Object.keys(commonArea).forEach(element => {
2922:                     const hostScroll = commonArea[element];
2923:                     const localScroll = spellSystem.commonArea[element];
2924: 
2925:                     if (hostScroll !== localScroll) {
2926:                         // Don't restore a scroll that's already been drawn into play locally
2927:                         if (hostScroll && inLocalPlay.has(hostScroll)) {
2928:                             console.log(`[common-area-sync] Skipping restore of ${hostScroll} in ${element} — already in local play`);
2929:                             return;
2930:                         }
2931:                         console.warn(`⚠️ COMMON AREA DESYNC CORRECTED: ${element} slot was "${localScroll}", host says "${hostScroll}"`);
2932:                         spellSystem.commonArea[element] = hostScroll;
2933:                         corrected = true;
2934:                     }
2935:                 });
2936: 
2937:                 if (corrected) {
2938:                     // Update UI after corrections
2939:                     if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
2940:                     if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2941:                     spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2942:                     spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2943:                 }
2944:             });
2945: 
2946:             // Listen for Reflect buff applied (passive buff for next turn)
2947:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'reflect-buff-applied' }, ({ payload }) => {
2948:                 console.log('📄 Received reflect-buff-applied:', payload);
2949:                 const { playerIndex, scrollName, scrollDefinition } = payload;
2950: 
2951:                 // Apply the Reflect buff to the spell system (push to array)
2952:                 if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
2953:                     if (!Array.isArray(spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.reflectPending)) {
2954:                         spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.reflectPending = [];
2955:                     }
2956:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.reflectPending.push({
2957:                         playerIndex: playerIndex,
2958:                         scrollName: scrollName,
2959:                         definition: scrollDefinition
2960:                     });
2961:                     console.log(`🛡️ Reflect buff applied to player ${playerIndex}: will reflect "${scrollName}" on their next turn`);
2962:                 }
2963:             });
2964: 
2965:             // Listen for Psychic buff applied (passive buff for next turn)
2966:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'psychic-buff-applied' }, ({ payload }) => {
2967:                 console.log('📄 Received psychic-buff-applied:', payload);
2968:                 const { playerIndex, scrollName, scrollDefinition } = payload;
2969: 
2970:                 // Apply the Psychic buff to the spell system (push to array)
2971:                 if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
2972:                     if (!Array.isArray(spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.psychicPending)) {
2973:                         spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.psychicPending = [];
2974:                     }
2975:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.psychicPending.push({
2976:                         playerIndex: playerIndex,
2977:                         scrollName: scrollName,
2978:                         definition: scrollDefinition
2979:                     });
2980:                     console.log(`🔮 Psychic buff applied to player ${playerIndex}: will activate "${scrollName}" at start of their next turn`);
2981:                 }
2982:             });
2983: 
2984:             // Listen for scroll state sync from host (authoritative source)
2985:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-state-sync' }, ({ payload }) => {
2986:                 if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.applyScrollStateSnapshot) {
2987:                     const corrected = spellSystem.applyScrollStateSnapshot(payload.snapshot);
2988:                     // Only log if corrections were made
2989:                     if (corrected) {
2990:                         console.log('📊 Scroll state synchronized with host (corrections applied)');
2991:                     }
2992:                 }
2993:             });
2994: 
2995:             // Listen for scroll state sync requests (from clients who detected issues)
2996:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-state-sync-request' }, ({ payload }) => {
2997:                 // Only host responds to sync requests
2998:                 if (myPlayerIndex === 0 && typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined') {
2999:                     console.log(`⚠️  Sync request from player ${payload.playerIndex} - sending authoritative state`);
3000:                     const snapshot = spellSystem.getScrollStateSnapshot();
3001:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-state-sync', { snapshot });
3002:                 }
3003:             });
3004: 
3005:             // Aggressive scroll state validation and sync (every 3 seconds)
3006:             setInterval(() => {
3007:                 if (!isMultiplayer || !spellSystem) return;
3008: 
3009:                 // Validate current state (only logs if errors found)
3010:                 const hasErrors = spellSystem.validateScrollState();
3011: 
3012:                 // If I'm the host (player 0), broadcast authoritative state
3013:                 if (myPlayerIndex === 0) {
3014:                     const snapshot = spellSystem.getScrollStateSnapshot();
3015:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-state-sync', { snapshot });
3016:                 }
3017: 
3018:                 // If errors found and I'm not the host, immediately request sync
3019:                 if (hasErrors && myPlayerIndex !== 0) {
3020:                     console.warn('⚠️  Errors detected - immediately requesting sync from host');
3021:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-state-sync-request', { playerIndex: myPlayerIndex });
3022:                 }
3023:             }, 3000); // Every 3 seconds (more aggressive)
3024: 
3025:             // Listen for game reset (placement timeout or other critical errors)
3026:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'game-reset' }, ({ payload }) => {
3027:                 console.log('📄 Received game-reset:', payload);
3028:                 const { reason, kickedPlayerIndex } = payload;
3029: 
3030:                 // If I'm the kicked player, skip this - I'll handle it via DELETE event
3031:                 if (typeof kickedPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && kickedPlayerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
3032:                     console.log('⏰ I am the kicked player - waiting for DELETE event to handle reset');
3033:                     return;
3034:                 }
3035: 
3036:                 if (reason === 'placement-timeout') {
3037:                     const kickedPlayerName = typeof kickedPlayerIndex !== 'undefined'
3038:                         ? getPlayerColorName(kickedPlayerIndex)
3039:                         : 'A player';
3040:                     updateStatus(`⏰ ${kickedPlayerName} timed out during tile placement — returning to lobby`);
3041:                 } else {
3042:                     updateStatus('🔄 Game reset — returning to lobby');
3043:                 }
3044: 
3045:                 // Reset to lobby (for non-kicked players)
3046:                 if (typeof resetToLobby === 'function') {
3047:                     setTimeout(() => {
3048:                         resetToLobby();
3049:                         // Refresh player list to show updated lobby without the kicked player
3050:                         if (typeof refreshPlayerList === 'function') {
3051:                             refreshPlayerList();
3052:                         }
3053:                     }, 1000);
3054:                 }
3055:             });
3056: 
3057:             // ── Emoji reactions ──────────────────────────────────────────
3058:             // Received when another player fires an emoji.
3059:             // Show it floating above their pawn on every client except the sender
3060:             // (sender already called showEmojiOverPawn locally before broadcasting).
3061:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'emoji' }, ({ payload }) => {
3062:                 const { playerIndex, display, isText } = payload;
3063:                 if (typeof window.emojiSystem !== 'undefined') {
3064:                     window.emojiSystem.showEmojiOverPawn(playerIndex, display, !!isText);
3065:                 }
3066:             });
3067: 
3068:             // Game over broadcast — carries win type so non-winner clients show the correct message
3069:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'game-over' }, ({ payload }) => {
3070:                 showGameOverToAll(payload.winnerIndex, payload.winType || 'scrolls');
3071:             });
3072: 
3073:             // Presence: detect disconnects instantly via WebSocket leave events.
3074:             // More reliable than DB polling — fires as soon as the connection drops.
3075:             gameChannel.on('presence', { event: 'leave' }, ({ leftPresences }) => {
3076:                 if (!isMultiplayer || !currentGameId) return;
3077:                 leftPresences.forEach(p => {
3078:                     if (p.playerIndex === myPlayerIndex) return; // ignore our own leave echo
3079:                     const isOurGame = allPlayersData.some(ap => ap.player_index === p.playerIndex);
3080:                     if (!isOurGame) return;
3081:                     console.log('Presence: player', p.playerIndex, 'disconnected');
3082:                     const state = gameChannel.presenceState();
3083:                     const connectedIndices = Object.values(state).flat().map(s => s.playerIndex);
3084:                     const othersStillConnected = connectedIndices.filter(i => i !== myPlayerIndex);
3085:                     if (othersStillConnected.length === 0 && myPlayerIndex !== null && myPlayerIndex !== undefined) {
3086:                         handleGameOver(myPlayerIndex, 'last_standing');
3087:                     } else {
3088:                         const playerName = getPlayerColorName(p.playerIndex);
3089:                         updateStatus(`${playerName} disconnected`);
3090:                     }
3091:                 });
3092:             });
3093: 
3094:             // Subscribe to the channel, then announce our presence
3095:             gameChannel.subscribe((status) => {
3096:                 if (status === 'SUBSCRIBED') {
3097:                     console.log('Connected to game broadcast channel');
3098:                     gameChannel.track({ playerIndex: myPlayerIndex, playerId: myPlayerId });
3099:                 }
3100:             });
3101:         }
3102: 
3103:         // ----------------------------------------------------------------
3104:         // Last-man-standing poll — bulletproof fallback for disconnect win.
3105:         // Runs every 5 s for every player (not just host).
3106:         // Independent of Presence / Realtime subscription delivery.
3107:         // ----------------------------------------------------------------
3108:         let _lmsInterval = null;
3109: 
3110:         function startLastManStandingPoll() {
3111:             stopLastManStandingPoll();
3112:             _lmsInterval = setInterval(async () => {
3113:                 if (!isMultiplayer || !currentGameId || !myPlayerId) return;
3114:                 try {
3115:                     const { data: remaining } = await supabase
3116:                         .from('players')
3117:                         .select('id')
3118:                         .eq('game_id', currentGameId);
3119:                     if (!remaining) return;
3120:                     if (remaining.length === 1 && remaining[0].id === myPlayerId) {
3121:                         console.log('📊 Poll: I am the last player remaining — triggering win.');
3122:                         stopLastManStandingPoll();
3123:                         if (myPlayerIndex !== null && myPlayerIndex !== undefined) {
3124:                             await handleGameOver(myPlayerIndex, 'last_standing');
3125:                         }
3126:                     }
3127:                 } catch (e) { /* ignore transient network errors */ }
3128:             }, 5000);
3129:         }
3130: 
3131:         function stopLastManStandingPoll() {
3132:             if (_lmsInterval) { clearInterval(_lmsInterval); _lmsInterval = null; }
3133:         }
3134: 
3135:         // ----------------------------------------------------------------
3136:         // Multiplayer hooks called by game-core.js
3137:         // ----------------------------------------------------------------
3138: 
3139:         // Called by game-core.js executeMovement() after a successful move.
3140:         // game-ui.js drag/tap handlers broadcast directly, but game-core.js uses
3141:         // this function as a named hook so it is safe to define it once here.
3142:         function broadcastPlayerMovement(playerIndex, x, y, apSpent) {
3143:             broadcastGameAction('player-move', { playerIndex, x, y, apSpent });
3144:         }
3145: 
3146:         // Called by game-core.js executeMovement() after landing on a hex.
3147:         // Mirrors the tile-reveal logic in game-ui.js drag/tap handlers so that
3148:         // the game-core.js movement path also reveals hidden tiles correctly.
3149:         function handlePlayerLanding(x, y) {
3150:             if (typeof getAllHexagonPositions !== 'function' || typeof placedTiles === 'undefined') return;
3151:             const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
3152:             let nearestHex = null;
3153:             let nearestDist = Infinity;
3154:             allHexes.forEach(hexPos => {
3155:                 const d = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hexPos.x - x, 2) + Math.pow(hexPos.y - y, 2));
3156:                 if (d < nearestDist) { nearestDist = d; nearestHex = hexPos; }
3157:             });
3158:             if (nearestHex && nearestDist < 5 && nearestHex.tiles) {
3159:                 nearestHex.tiles
3160:                     .filter(t => t.flipped && !t.isPlayerTile)
3161:                     .forEach(t => {
3162:                         if (typeof revealTile === 'function') revealTile(t.id);
3163:                     });
3164:             }
3165:         }

3167:         // Reset game back to lobby (used for placement timeout or critical errors)
3168:         function resetToLobby() {
3169:             console.log('🔄 Resetting game back to lobby');
3170: 
3171:             // Close all floating scroll panels so they don't bleed into the lobby
3172:             if (typeof ScrollPanelSystem !== 'undefined') {
3173:                 ['hand', 'active', 'common'].forEach(id => ScrollPanelSystem.closePanel(id));
3174:             }
3175: 
3176:             // Remove self from DB and stop heartbeat — prevents ghost rooms
3177:             if (myPlayerId) {
3178:                 supabase.rpc('remove_player', { p_player_id: myPlayerId }).catch(() => {});
3179:                 myPlayerId = null;
3180:             }
3181: 
3182:             // Stop turn timer monitoring
3183:             if (typeof stopTurnTimerMonitoring === 'function') {
3184:                 stopTurnTimerMonitoring();
3185:             }
3186: 
3187:             stopDisconnectMonitor();
3188:             stopLastManStandingPoll();
3189: 
3190:             // Clear the board
3191:             if (typeof clearBoard === 'function') {
3192:                 clearBoard(true);
3193:             }
3194: 
3195:             // Reset viewport to default position
3196:             if (typeof viewportX !== 'undefined') viewportX = 0;
3197:             if (typeof viewportY !== 'undefined') viewportY = 0;
3198:             if (typeof viewportScale !== 'undefined') viewportScale = 1;
3199:             if (typeof updateViewport === 'function') {
3200:                 updateViewport();
3201:             }
3202: 
3203:             // Hide game, show lobby
3204:             document.getElementById('lobby-wrapper').style.display = 'block';
3205:             document.getElementById('game-layout').classList.remove('active');
3206: 
3207:             // Hide leave game and end turn buttons
3208:             const leaveBtn = document.getElementById('leave-game');
3209:             const endTurnBtn = document.getElementById('end-turn');
3210:             if (leaveBtn) leaveBtn.style.display = 'none';
3211:             if (endTurnBtn) endTurnBtn.style.display = 'none';
3212: 
3213:             // Hide timer HUD
3214:             const timerHud = document.getElementById('hud-timer');
3215:             if (timerHud) timerHud.style.display = 'none';
3216: 
3217:             // Reset game state variables
3218:             isPlacementPhase = false;
3219:             playerTilesPlaced.clear();
3220:             activePlayerIndex = 0;
3221:             currentTurnNumber = 0;
3222:             lastReceivedTurnNumber = 0;
3223: 
3224:             updateStatus('🏠 Returned to lobby');
3225: 
3226:             // Refresh player list to show updated lobby (e.g., without kicked player)
3227:             if (typeof refreshPlayerList === 'function') {
3228:                 setTimeout(() => refreshPlayerList(), 500);
3229:             }
3230:         }

3232:         // Broadcast a game action to all other players
3233:         function broadcastGameAction(event, payload) {
3234:             if (!gameChannel || !isMultiplayer) return;
3235: 
3236:             // Add sequence number for scroll-related events to detect out-of-order delivery
3237:             const isScrollEvent = event.includes('scroll') || event.includes('shrine') || event.includes('common-area');
3238:             if (isScrollEvent) {
3239:                 scrollEventSequence++;
3240:                 payload._seq = scrollEventSequence;
3241:                 payload._timestamp = Date.now();
3242:             }
3243: 
3244:             gameChannel.send({
3245:                 type: 'broadcast',
3246:                 event: event,
3247:                 payload: payload
3248:             });
3249:         }

3254:             if (typeof window.resetGameResources === 'function') {

3318:                 placeTile(pos.x, pos.y, 0, true); // Place as flipped (hidden)
3319:             });

3322:             fitBoardToView();

3327:             } else {

3338:         function startGame(numPlayers) {
3339:             // Clear the board first (skip confirmation — startGame is always intentional)
3340:             clearBoard(true);
3341: 
3342:             // Reset color assignments for this game
3343:             gameSessionColors.clear();
3344:             playerColor = null;
3345:             console.log(`🎨 Starting game with ${numPlayers} player(s). Colors will be assigned as player tiles are placed.`);

3348:             document.getElementById('lobby-wrapper').style.display = 'none';
3349:             document.getElementById('game-layout').classList.add('active');

3351: 
3352:             // Initialize new UI elements
3353:             initializeNewUI();

3355:             // Calculate number of tiles (6 per player)
3356:             const numTiles = numPlayers * 6;
3357: 
3358:             // Initialize
3359:             initializeDeck(numPlayers); // Shuffle the tile deck
3360:             initializePlayerTiles(numPlayers); // Create player tiles
3361:             Object.keys(stoneCounts).forEach(updateStoneCount);
3362:             updateVoidAP(); // Initialize void AP display
3363:             drawDeckTile();
3364:             updateViewport();
3365:             boardSvg.style.cursor = 'grab';
3366: 
3367:             // Place hidden tiles in spiral pattern
3368:             const spiralPositions = generateSpiralPositions(numTiles);
3369:             console.log(`Placing ${numTiles} tiles for ${numPlayers} player(s)`);
3370:             spiralPositions.forEach((pos, index) => {
3371:                 console.log(`Tile ${index + 1}: (${pos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${pos.y.toFixed(1)})`);
3372:                 placeTile(pos.x, pos.y, 0, true); // Place as flipped (hidden)
3373:             });
3374: 
3375:             // Center and fit the board to view
3376:             fitBoardToView();
3377: 
3378:             updateStatus(`Game started with ${numPlayers} player(s) (${numTiles} tiles). Drag a player tile from the Player Tiles deck to start.`);
3379:

3381:             updateIsMobile();
3382:             window.addEventListener('resize', updateIsMobile);
3383:             try { window.matchMedia('(max-width: 768px)').addEventListener('change', updateIsMobile); } catch (e) {}
3384:         }

3389:         // Mobile UI initialization and tab switching
3390:         function initializeMobileUI() {
3391:             const tabButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-tab-btn');
3392:             const tilesPanel = document.getElementById('mobile-tiles-panel');
3393:             const stonesPanel = document.getElementById('mobile-stones-panel');
3394:             let currentTab = 'tiles';
3395: 
3396:             // Tab switching logic
3397:             tabButtons.forEach(btn => {
3398:                 btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
3399:                     const tab = btn.dataset.tab;
3400: 
3401:                     // Update active tab button
3402:                     tabButtons.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
3403:                     btn.classList.add('active');
3404: 
3405:                     // Show/hide panels
3406:                     if (tab === 'tiles') {
3407:                         tilesPanel.classList.add('active');
3408:                         stonesPanel.classList.remove('active');
3409:                         currentTab = 'tiles';
3410:                         syncMobileTileDeck();
3411:                     } else {
3412:                         stonesPanel.classList.add('active');
3413:                         tilesPanel.classList.remove('active');
3414:                         currentTab = 'stones';
3415:                         syncMobileStoneDeck();
3416:                     }
3417:                 });
3418:             });
3419: 
3420:             // Swipe gesture for tab switching
3421:             let touchStartX = 0;
3422:             let touchEndX = 0;
3423: 
3424:             const mobileContainer = document.querySelector('.mobile-deck-container');
3425: 
3426:             mobileContainer.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
3427:                 touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;
3428:             }, { passive: true });
3429: 
3430:             mobileContainer.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
3431:                 touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;
3432:                 handleSwipe();
3433:             }, { passive: true });
3434: 
3435:             function handleSwipe() {
3436:                 const swipeThreshold = 50;
3437:                 const diff = touchStartX - touchEndX;
3438: 
3439:                 if (Math.abs(diff) > swipeThreshold) {
3440:                     if (diff > 0 && currentTab === 'tiles') {
3441:                         // Swiped left - switch to stones
3442:                         tabButtons[1].click();
3443:                     } else if (diff < 0 && currentTab === 'stones') {
3444:                         // Swiped right - switch to tiles
3445:                         tabButtons[0].click();
3446:                     }
3447:                 }
3448:             }
3449: 
3450:             // Initialize with tiles tab active
3451:             syncMobileTileDeck();
3452:             syncMobileStoneDeck();
3453:         }
3454: 
3455:         
3456:         // Programmatically open a mobile deck tab (tiles/stones)
3457:         function openMobileTab(tab) {
3458:             if (!isMobile) return;
3459:             const tabButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-tab-btn');
3460:             const tilesPanel = document.getElementById('mobile-tiles-panel');
3461:             const stonesPanel = document.getElementById('mobile-stones-panel');
3462: 
3463:             tabButtons.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
3464:             const btn = Array.from(tabButtons).find(b => b.dataset.tab === tab);
3465:             if (btn) btn.classList.add('active');
3466: 
3467:             if (tab === 'tiles') {
3468:                 tilesPanel.classList.add('active');
3469:                 stonesPanel.classList.remove('active');
3470:                 syncMobileTileDeck();
3471:             } else {
3472:                 stonesPanel.classList.add('active');
3473:                 tilesPanel.classList.remove('active');
3474:                 syncMobileStoneDeck();
3475:             }
3476:         }
3477:

3479:             const container = document.querySelector('.mobile-deck-container');
3480:             if (!container) return;
3481:             if (collapsed) container.classList.add('collapsed');
3482:             else container.classList.remove('collapsed');
3483:         }

3487:         function syncMobileTileDeck() {

3491:             mobileGrid.innerHTML = '';
3492:
