3494:             playerTileElements.forEach((tileElement, index) => {
3495:                 const clone = tileElement.cloneNode(true);
3496:                 clone.style.touchAction = 'none';
3497:                 clone.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
3498:                     if (playerTilesAvailable <= 0) return;
3499:                     if (isMultiplayer && isPlacementPhase && !canPlaceTile()) {
3500:                         notYourTurn();
3501:                         return;
3502:                     }
3503:                     e.preventDefault();
3504:                     startPlayerTileDrag(index, e);
3505:                 }, { passive: false });
3506: 
3507:                 mobileGrid.appendChild(clone);
3508:             });
3509: 
3510:             // Update count
3511:             document.getElementById('mobile-tile-count').textContent = playerTilesAvailable;
3512:         }
3513: 
3514:         // Sync mobile stone deck with desktop deck
3515:         function syncMobileStoneDeck() {
3516:             if (!isMobile) return;
3517: 
3518:             const mobileGrid = document.getElementById('mobile-stone-grid');
3519:             mobileGrid.innerHTML = '';
3520: 
3521:             ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].forEach(type => {
3522:                 const stoneItem = document.createElement('div');
3523:                 stoneItem.className = 'stone-deck-item';
3524:                 stoneItem.style.touchAction = 'none';
3525: 
3526:                 stoneItem.innerHTML = `
3527:                     <svg width="40" height="40">
3528:                         <circle cx="20" cy="20" r="12" fill="${STONE_TYPES[type].color}" class="stone-piece"/>
3529:                         <image href="${STONE_TYPES[type].img}" x="8" y="8" width="24" height="24" style="mix-blend-mode:screen"/>
3530:                     </svg>
3531:                     <div class="stone-count">${playerPool[type]}/${stoneCapacity}</div>
3532:                     <div class="source-count">${stoneCounts[type]}/25</div>
3533:                 `;
3534: 
3535:                 stoneItem.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
3536:                     if (stoneCounts[type] <= 0) return;
3537:                     e.preventDefault();
3538: 
3539:                     isDraggingFromDeck = true;
3540:                     isDraggingStone = true;
3541:                     draggedStoneId = null;
3542:                     draggedStoneType = type;
3543: 
3544:                     const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
3545:                     const coords = getEventCoords(e);
3546:                     const screenX = coords.x - rect.left;
3547:                     const screenY = coords.y - rect.top;
3548:                     const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
3549: 
3550:                     ghostStone = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
3551:                     ghostStone.setAttribute('class', 'stone stone-ghost');
3552:                     ghostStone.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
3553: 
3554:                     const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
3555:                     circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
3556:                     circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
3557:                     circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
3558:                     circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
3559:                     circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[type].color);
3560: 
3561:                     const ghostImg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'image');
3562:                     ghostImg.setAttribute('href', STONE_TYPES[type].img);
3563:                     ghostImg.setAttribute('x', -STONE_SIZE);
3564:                     ghostImg.setAttribute('y', -STONE_SIZE);
3565:                     ghostImg.setAttribute('width', STONE_SIZE * 2);
3566:                     ghostImg.setAttribute('height', STONE_SIZE * 2);
3567:                     ghostImg.style.mixBlendMode = 'screen';
3568: 
3569:                     ghostStone.appendChild(circle);
3570:                     ghostStone.appendChild(ghostImg);
3571:                     viewport.appendChild(ghostStone);
3572:                 }, { passive: false });
3573: 
3574:                 mobileGrid.appendChild(stoneItem);
3575:             });
3576:         }
3577: 
3578:         // Lock screen orientation to portrait on mobile (if supported)
3579:         if (isMobile && screen.orientation && screen.orientation.lock) {
3580:             screen.orientation.lock('portrait').catch(err => {

   2:         // GAME CONSTANTS
   3:         // ========================================
   4:         const TILE_SIZE = 20;
   5:         const SNAP_THRESHOLD = 40;
   6:         const STONE_SIZE = 12;
   7: 
   8:         // Cache-bust token for image assets — bump when replacing an image file
   9:         window.IMG_V = '?v=2';
  10:         const IMG_V = window.IMG_V;
  11: 
  12:         const STONE_TYPES = {
  13:             earth:    { color: '#69d83a', symbol: '▲', img: 'images/mountainsymbol.png' + IMG_V },
  14:             water:    { color: '#5894f4', symbol: '◯', img: 'images/watersymbol.png'    + IMG_V },
  15:             fire:     { color: '#ed1b43', symbol: '♦', img: 'images/firesymbol.png'     + IMG_V },
  16:             wind:     { color: '#ffce00', symbol: '≋', img: 'images/windsymbol.png'     + IMG_V },
  17:             void:     { color: '#9458f4', symbol: '✺', img: 'images/voidsymbol.png'     + IMG_V },
  18:             catacomb: { color: '#c8a870', symbol: '✦', img: 'images/Catacomb.png'       + IMG_V }
  19:         };
  20: 
  21:         // Spell System for pattern-based stone generation
  22:         class SpellSystem {
  23:             constructor() {
  24:                 this.SPELL_AP_COST = 2;
  25: 
  26:                 // Per-player scroll inventories: { hand: Set, active: Set, activated: Set }
  27:                 // hand = scrolls in player's hand (private, max 4)
  28:                 // active = scrolls in active area (visible to opponents: name + element only, max 2)
  29:                 // activated = elements that have been used for win condition tracking
  30:                 this.playerScrolls = [];
  31:                 this.MAX_HAND_SIZE = 2;
  32:                 this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE = 2;
  33: 
  34:                 // Common area - shared scrolls any player can activate
  35:                 // Max 1 scroll per element type. When a new scroll of same element enters,
  36:                 // the old one goes to bottom of deck
  37:                 this.commonArea = {
  38:                     earth: null,
  39:                     water: null,
  40:                     fire: null,
  41:                     wind: null,
  42:                     void: null,
  43:                     catacomb: null
  44:                 };
  45: 
  46:                 // Scroll decks - use external definitions if available, otherwise use defaults
  47:                 if (typeof SCROLL_DECKS !== 'undefined') {
  48:                     // Deep copy the external deck definitions
  49:                     this.scrollDecks = {};
  50:                     Object.keys(SCROLL_DECKS).forEach(element => {
  51:                         this.scrollDecks[element] = [...SCROLL_DECKS[element]];
  52:                     });
  53:                 } else {
  54:                     // Fallback to inline definitions
  55:                     this.scrollDecks = {
  56:                         earth: ['EARTH_SCROLL_1', 'EARTH_SCROLL_2', 'EARTH_SCROLL_3', 'EARTH_SCROLL_4', 'EARTH_SCROLL_5'],
  57:                         water: ['WATER_SCROLL_1', 'WATER_SCROLL_2', 'WATER_SCROLL_3', 'WATER_SCROLL_4', 'WATER_SCROLL_5'],
  58:                         fire: ['FIRE_SCROLL_1', 'FIRE_SCROLL_2', 'FIRE_SCROLL_3', 'FIRE_SCROLL_4', 'FIRE_SCROLL_5'],
  59:                         wind: ['WIND_SCROLL_1', 'WIND_SCROLL_2', 'WIND_SCROLL_3', 'WIND_SCROLL_4', 'WIND_SCROLL_5'],
  60:                         void: ['VOID_SCROLL_1', 'VOID_SCROLL_2', 'VOID_SCROLL_3', 'VOID_SCROLL_4', 'VOID_SCROLL_5'],
  61:                         catacomb: ['CATACOMB_SCROLL_1', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_2', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_3', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_4', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_5', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_6', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_7', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_8', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_9', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_10']
  62:                     };
  63:                 }
  64: 
  65:                 // Shuffle all decks at initialization
  66:                 this.shuffleAllDecks();
  67: 
  68:                 this.initializePatterns();
  69:                 this.updateScrollCount();
  70: 
  71:                 // Initialize response window system
  72:                 this.responseWindow = null;
  73:                 if (typeof ResponseWindowSystem !== 'undefined') {
  74:                     this.responseWindow = new ResponseWindowSystem(this);
  75:                     console.log('Response window system initialized');
  76:                 }
  77: 
  78:                 // Initialize scroll effects system (use window.ScrollEffects – set by scroll-effects.js)
  79:                 this.scrollEffects = null;
  80:                 const SE = (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.ScrollEffects) || (typeof ScrollEffects !== 'undefined' && ScrollEffects);
  81:                 if (SE) {
  82:                     SE.init(this);
  83:                     this.scrollEffects = SE;
  84:                     console.log('Scroll effects system initialized');
  85:                 }
  86: 
  87:                 // Pending cascade state - blocks all actions until resolved
  88:                 // Stored per player: { playerIndex: { scrollName, scrollInfo, shrineType, canCascadeToActive } }
  89:                 this.pendingCascades = {};
  90:             }
  91: 
  92:             // Check if a player has a pending cascade that must be resolved
  93:             hasPendingCascade(playerIndex) {
  94:                 return !!this.pendingCascades[playerIndex];
  95:             }
  96: 
  97:             // Get the pending cascade for a player
  98:             getPendingCascade(playerIndex) {
  99:                 return this.pendingCascades[playerIndex] || null;
 100:             }
 101: 
 102:             // Set a pending cascade for a player
 103:             setPendingCascade(playerIndex, cascadeData) {
 104:                 this.pendingCascades[playerIndex] = cascadeData;
 105:                 console.log(`📜 Pending cascade set for player ${playerIndex}:`, cascadeData?.scrollName);
 106:             }
 107: 
 108:             // Clear a pending cascade for a player
 109:             clearPendingCascade(playerIndex) {
 110:                 delete this.pendingCascades[playerIndex];
 111:                 console.log(`📜 Pending cascade cleared for player ${playerIndex}`);
 112:             }
 113: 
 114:             // Show the cascade prompt for a player (used when they try to take an action with pending cascade)
 115:             showPendingCascadePrompt(playerIndex) {
 116:                 const cascade = this.pendingCascades[playerIndex];
 117:                 if (!cascade) return false;
 118: 
 119:                 this.showCascadePrompt(
 120:                     cascade.scrollName,
 121:                     cascade.scrollInfo,
 122:                     cascade.shrineType,
 123:                     cascade.canCascadeToActive
 124:                 );
 125:                 return true;
 126:             }
 127: 
 128:             // Fisher-Yates shuffle algorithm
 129:             shuffleDeck(deck) {
 130:                 for (let i = deck.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
 131:                     const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
 132:                     [deck[i], deck[j]] = [deck[j], deck[i]];
 133:                 }
 134:                 return deck;
 135:             }
 136: 
 137:             shuffleAllDecks() {
 138:                 Object.keys(this.scrollDecks).forEach(element => {
 139:                     this.shuffleDeck(this.scrollDecks[element]);
 140:                 });
 141:                 console.log('🎴 All scroll decks shuffled');
 142:             }
 143: 
 144:             // Draw a scroll from the top of a specific element's deck
 145:             drawFromDeck(element) {
 146:                 if (!this.scrollDecks[element] || this.scrollDecks[element].length === 0) {
 147:                     return null;
 148:                 }
 149:                 return this.scrollDecks[element].shift(); // Remove and return first element
 150:             }
 151: 
 152:             // Discard a scroll to the common area
 153:             // If a scroll of the same element is already there, it goes to bottom of deck
 154:             discardToCommonArea(scrollName) {
 155:                 const element = this.getScrollElement(scrollName);
 156:                 if (!element) return;
 157: 
 158:                 let replacedScroll = null;
 159: 
 160:                 // If there's already a scroll of this element in common area, send it to deck
 161:                 // Guard: don't push to deck if it's the same scroll being discarded (avoids duplicates)
 162:                 if (this.commonArea[element] && this.commonArea[element] !== scrollName) {
 163:                     replacedScroll = this.commonArea[element];
 164:                     this.scrollDecks[element].push(replacedScroll); // Add old scroll to bottom of deck
 165:                     console.log(`📜 Common area: Replaced ${replacedScroll} with ${scrollName} (old scroll to deck)`);
 166:                 } else {
 167:                     console.log(`📜 Common area: Added ${scrollName}`);
 168:                 }
 169: 
 170:                 // Place new scroll in common area
 171:                 this.commonArea[element] = scrollName;
 172: 
 173:                 // Update the scroll deck UI
 174:                 try {
 175:                     if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
 176:                 } catch (e) {}
 177: 
 178:                 // Broadcast in multiplayer
 179:                 if (isMultiplayer) {
 180:                     broadcastGameAction('common-area-update', {
 181:                         element: element,
 182:                         scrollName: scrollName,
 183:                         replacedScroll: replacedScroll
 184:                     });
 185:                 }
 186:             }
 187: 
 188:             // Direct discard to deck (used internally, not for player discards)
 189:             discardToDeck(scrollName) {
 190:                 const element = this.getScrollElement(scrollName);
 191:                 if (element && this.scrollDecks[element]) {
 192:                     this.scrollDecks[element].push(scrollName); // Add to end of deck
 193:                     console.log(`📜 Discarded ${scrollName} to bottom of ${element} deck`);
 194: 
 195:                     // Update the scroll deck UI
 196:                     try {
 197:                         if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
 198:                     } catch (e) {}
 199:                 }
 200:             }
 201: 
 202:             // Get all scrolls in common area (returns array of scroll names)
 203:             getCommonAreaScrolls() {
 204:                 return Object.values(this.commonArea).filter(scroll => scroll !== null);
 205:             }
 206: 
 207:             // Get the element type from a scroll name
 208:             getScrollElement(scrollName) {
 209:                 if (scrollName.startsWith('EARTH')) return 'earth';
 210:                 if (scrollName.startsWith('WATER')) return 'water';
 211:                 if (scrollName.startsWith('FIRE')) return 'fire';
 212:                 if (scrollName.startsWith('WIND')) return 'wind';
 213:                 if (scrollName.startsWith('VOID')) return 'void';
 214:                 if (scrollName.startsWith('CATACOMB')) return 'catacomb';
 215:                 return null;
 216:             }
 217:             
 218:             // Get active player's scroll collection
 219:             // In multiplayer, show MY scrolls for display, but use activePlayerIndex for game logic
 220:             getPlayerScrolls(forDisplay = false) {
 221:                 // For display in multiplayer, show my own scrolls
 222:                 const displayIndex = (forDisplay && isMultiplayer && myPlayerIndex !== null) ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
 223: 
 224:                 this.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(displayIndex);
 225:                 return this.playerScrolls[displayIndex];
 226:             }
 227: 
 228:             // Reinforce scroll state: ensure hand/active/activated are Sets (prevents "disappearing" from bad state)
 229:             ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex) {
 230:                 if (playerIndex == null || playerIndex < 0) return;
 231:                 if (!this.playerScrolls[playerIndex]) {
 232:                     this.playerScrolls[playerIndex] = {
 233:                         hand: new Set(),
 234:                         active: new Set(),
 235:                         activated: new Set()
 236:                     };
 237:                     return;
 238:                 }
 239:                 const p = this.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
 240:                 if (!(p.hand instanceof Set)) p.hand = new Set(Array.isArray(p.hand) ? p.hand : []);
 241:                 if (!(p.active instanceof Set)) p.active = new Set(Array.isArray(p.active) ? p.active : []);
 242:                 if (!(p.activated instanceof Set)) p.activated = new Set(Array.isArray(p.activated) ? p.activated : []);
 243:             }
 244: 
 245:             // Validate scroll state and log warnings (helps catch sync bugs)
 246:             validateScrollState() {
 247:                 const n = typeof totalPlayers !== 'undefined' ? totalPlayers : Math.max(2, (this.playerScrolls && this.playerScrolls.length) || 0);
 248:                 for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
 249:                     this.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(i);
 250:                 }
 251:                 const inHand = new Map();
 252:                 const inActive = new Map();
 253:                 let errorsFound = false;
 254: 
 255:                 for (let i = 0; i < (this.playerScrolls && this.playerScrolls.length) || 0; i++) {
 256:                     const p = this.playerScrolls[i];
 257:                     if (!p || !p.hand || !p.active) continue;
 258:                     p.hand.forEach(name => {
 259:                         if (inHand.has(name)) {
 260:                             console.warn('[Scroll state] ⚠️ DUPLICATE:', name, 'in hand of both player', inHand.get(name), 'and', i);
 261:                             errorsFound = true;
 262:                         }
 263:                         inHand.set(name, i);
 264:                     });
 265:                     p.active.forEach(name => {
 266:                         if (inActive.has(name)) {
 267:                             console.warn('[Scroll state] ⚠️ DUPLICATE:', name, 'in active of both player', inActive.get(name), 'and', i);
 268:                             errorsFound = true;
 269:                         }
 270:                         if (inHand.has(name)) {
 271:                             console.warn('[Scroll state] ⚠️ DUPLICATE:', name, 'in both hand and active areas');
 272:                             errorsFound = true;
 273:                         }
 274:                         inActive.set(name, i);
 275:                     });
 276:                 }
 277:                 const commonElements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'];
 278:                 commonElements.forEach(element => {
 279:                     const name = this.commonArea[element];
 280:                     if (!name) return;
 281:                     if (inHand.has(name)) {
 282:                         console.warn('[Scroll state] ⚠️ DUPLICATE:', name, 'in common area (' + element + ') and in hand of player', inHand.get(name));
 283:                         errorsFound = true;
 284:                     }
 285:                     if (inActive.has(name)) {
 286:                         console.warn('[Scroll state] ⚠️ DUPLICATE:', name, 'in common area (' + element + ') and in active of player', inActive.get(name));
 287:                         errorsFound = true;
 288:                     }
 289:                 });
 290: 
 291:                 // If errors found in multiplayer and we're not the host, request sync
 292:                 if (errorsFound && typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer) {
 293:                     console.warn('⚠️ Scroll state errors detected! Requesting sync from host...');
 294:                     if (typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function' && typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== 0) {
 295:                         broadcastGameAction('scroll-state-sync-request', { playerIndex: myPlayerIndex });
 296:                     }
 297:                 }
 298: 
 299:                 return errorsFound;
 300:             }
 301: 
 302:             // Generate complete scroll state snapshot for syncing
 303:             getScrollStateSnapshot() {
 304:                 const snapshot = {
 305:                     players: [],
 306:                     commonArea: {},
 307:                     decks: {}
 308:                 };
 309: 
 310:                 // Capture each player's scrolls
 311:                 for (let i = 0; i < this.playerScrolls.length; i++) {
 312:                     const p = this.playerScrolls[i];
 313:                     if (!p) continue;
 314:                     snapshot.players[i] = {
 315:                         hand: Array.from(p.hand || []),
 316:                         active: Array.from(p.active || []),
 317:                         activated: Array.from(p.activated || [])
 318:                     };
 319:                 }
 320: 
 321:                 // Capture common area
 322:                 ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'].forEach(element => {
 323:                     snapshot.commonArea[element] = this.commonArea[element] || null;
 324:                 });
 325: 
 326:                 // Capture full decks (host is authoritative, clients should match exactly)
 327:                 Object.keys(this.scrollDecks || {}).forEach(element => {
 328:                     snapshot.decks[element] = [...(this.scrollDecks[element] || [])];
 329:                 });
 330: 
 331:                 return snapshot;
 332:             }
 333: 
 334:             // Apply scroll state snapshot from authoritative source
 335:             applyScrollStateSnapshot(snapshot) {
 336:                 let corrected = false;
 337:                 const activatedChangedPlayers = [];
 338: 
 339:                 // Apply player scrolls
 340:                 if (snapshot.players) {
 341:                     for (let i = 0; i < snapshot.players.length; i++) {
 342:                         if (!snapshot.players[i]) continue;
 343:                         this.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(i);
 344:                         const p = this.playerScrolls[i];
 345:                         const snap = snapshot.players[i];
 346: 
 347:                         // Sync hand
 348:                         const newHand = new Set(snap.hand || []);
 349:                         if (!this.setsEqual(p.hand, newHand)) {
 350:                             console.log(`🔄 Player ${i} hand corrected:`, Array.from(p.hand), '→', Array.from(newHand));
 351:                             p.hand = newHand;
 352:                             corrected = true;
 353:                         }
 354: 
 355:                         // Sync active
 356:                         const newActive = new Set(snap.active || []);
 357:                         if (!this.setsEqual(p.active, newActive)) {
 358:                             console.log(`🔄 Player ${i} active corrected:`, Array.from(p.active), '→', Array.from(newActive));
 359:                             p.active = newActive;
 360:                             corrected = true;
 361:                         }
 362: 
 363:                         // Sync activated (win condition tracking) - additive only.
 364:                         // Never remove locally-tracked activations: a non-host player may have
 365:                         // pre-tracked an element during an interactive scroll (e.g. Take Flight)
 366:                         // before the host's periodic sync fires, which would otherwise wipe it.
 367:                         const newActivated = new Set(snap.activated || []);
 368:                         const prevActivatedSize = p.activated.size;
 369:                         newActivated.forEach(el => p.activated.add(el));
 370:                         if (p.activated.size !== prevActivatedSize) {
 371:                             console.log(`🔄 Player ${i} activated updated (additive):`, Array.from(newActivated), '→', Array.from(p.activated));
 372:                             corrected = true;
 373:                             activatedChangedPlayers.push(i);
 374:                         }
 375:                     }
 376:                 }
 377: 
 378:                 // Apply common area
 379:                 if (snapshot.commonArea) {
 380:                     // Build a set of scrolls already in players' hands/active areas locally.
 381:                     // If a scroll is here, the player just drew/played it and the host's
 382:                     // periodic broadcast is stale — don't put it back in the common area.
 383:                     const inLocalPlay = new Set();
 384:                     for (const p of this.playerScrolls) {
 385:                         if (!p) continue;
 386:                         p.hand.forEach(s => inLocalPlay.add(s));
 387:                         p.active.forEach(s => inLocalPlay.add(s));
 388:                     }
 389: 
 390:                     ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'].forEach(element => {
 391:                         const newScroll = snapshot.commonArea[element] || null;
 392:                         if (newScroll && inLocalPlay.has(newScroll)) {
 393:                             // Host state is stale — this scroll was already drawn by a player
 394:                             console.log(`[sync] Skipping common area restore for ${element}: ${newScroll} is already in local play`);
 395:                             return;
 396:                         }
 397:                         if (this.commonArea[element] !== newScroll) {
 398:                             console.log(`🔄 Common area ${element} corrected:`, this.commonArea[element], '→', newScroll);
 399:                             this.commonArea[element] = newScroll;
 400:                             corrected = true;
 401:                         }
 402:                     });
 403:                 }
 404: 
 405:                 // Apply decks (sync full deck contents from host)
 406:                 if (snapshot.decks) {
 407:                     Object.keys(snapshot.decks).forEach(element => {
 408:                         const newDeck = snapshot.decks[element] || [];
 409:                         const currentDeck = this.scrollDecks[element] || [];
 410: 
 411:                         // Compare deck contents (order matters for deck draw)
 412:                         if (!this.arraysEqual(currentDeck, newDeck)) {
 413:                             console.log(`🔄 ${element} deck corrected: ${currentDeck.length} scrolls → ${newDeck.length} scrolls`);
 414:                             this.scrollDecks[element] = [...newDeck];
 415:                             corrected = true;
 416:                         }
 417:                     });
 418:                 }
 419: 
 420:                 if (corrected) {
 421:                     // Only update UI and validate, no console spam
 422:                     this.validateScrollState();
 423:                     this.updateScrollCount();
 424:                     if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
 425:                     if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
 426:                     // Refresh win-condition markers and check win condition for any player
 427:                     // whose activated set gained elements via this sync
 428:                     if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
 429:                         activatedChangedPlayers.forEach(playerIdx => {
 430:                             updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIdx);
 431:                             // Win condition: all 5 elements activated
 432:                             if (this.playerScrolls?.[playerIdx]?.activated?.size === 5) {
 433:                                 console.log(`🏆 Win condition met for player ${playerIdx} (detected via state sync)`);
 434:                                 this.showLevelComplete(playerIdx);
 435:                                 if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer &&
 436:                                     typeof handleGameOver === 'function') {
 437:                                     handleGameOver(playerIdx);
 438:                                 }
 439:                             }
 440:                         });
 441:                     }
 442:                 }
 443: 
 444:                 return corrected;
 445:             }
 446: 
 447:             // Helper: compare two sets for equality
 448:             setsEqual(set1, set2) {
 449:                 if (set1.size !== set2.size) return false;
 450:                 for (const item of set1) {
 451:                     if (!set2.has(item)) return false;
 452:                 }
 453:                 return true;
 454:             }
 455: 
 456:             // Helper: compare two arrays for equality (order matters)
 457:             arraysEqual(arr1, arr2) {
 458:                 if (arr1.length !== arr2.length) return false;
 459:                 for (let i = 0; i < arr1.length; i++) {
 460:                     if (arr1[i] !== arr2[i]) return false;
 461:                 }
 462:                 return true;
 463:             }
 464: 
 465:             // Comprehensive scroll audit - finds ALL scrolls and reports discrepancies
 466:             auditScrolls() {
 467:                 const allScrolls = new Map(); // scrollName -> locations[]
 468:                 const issues = [];
 469: 
 470:                 // Count scrolls in each location
 471:                 const countScroll = (scrollName, location) => {
 472:                     if (!scrollName) return;
 473:                     if (!allScrolls.has(scrollName)) {
 474:                         allScrolls.set(scrollName, []);
 475:                     }
 476:                     allScrolls.get(scrollName).push(location);
 477:                 };
 478: 
 479:                 // Check player hands and active areas
 480:                 for (let i = 0; i < (this.playerScrolls?.length || 0); i++) {
 481:                     const p = this.playerScrolls[i];
 482:                     if (!p) continue;
 483:                     const playerName = typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function' ? getPlayerColorName(i) : `Player ${i}`;
 484: 
 485:                     (p.hand || new Set()).forEach(scroll => countScroll(scroll, `${playerName} hand`));
 486:                     (p.active || new Set()).forEach(scroll => countScroll(scroll, `${playerName} active`));
 487:                 }
 488: 
 489:                 // Check common area
 490:                 ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'].forEach(element => {
 491:                     const scroll = this.commonArea[element];
 492:                     if (scroll) countScroll(scroll, `Common (${element})`);
 493:                 });
 494: 
 495:                 // Check decks
 496:                 Object.keys(this.scrollDecks || {}).forEach(element => {
 497:                     (this.scrollDecks[element] || []).forEach(scroll => {
 498:                         countScroll(scroll, `${element} deck`);
 499:                     });
 500:                 });
 501: 
 502:                 // Analyze results
 503:                 console.log('\n🔍 SCROLL AUDIT REPORT\n');
 504: 
 505:                 let duplicates = 0;
 506:                 allScrolls.forEach((locations, scrollName) => {
 507:                     if (locations.length > 1) {
 508:                         console.warn(`⚠️  DUPLICATE: ${scrollName} exists in ${locations.length} locations:`, locations);
 509:                         issues.push({ scroll: scrollName, issue: 'duplicate', locations });
 510:                         duplicates++;
 511:                     }
 512:                 });
 513: 
 514:                 if (duplicates === 0) {
 515:                     console.log('✅ No duplicates found');
 516:                 } else {
 517:                     console.warn(`⚠️  Found ${duplicates} duplicated scrolls!`);
 518:                 }
 519: 
 520:                 // Count total scrolls by element
 521:                 const elementCounts = { earth: 0, water: 0, fire: 0, wind: 0, void: 0, catacomb: 0 };
 522:                 allScrolls.forEach((locations, scrollName) => {
 523:                     const element = this.getScrollElement(scrollName);
 524:                     if (element && elementCounts.hasOwnProperty(element)) {
 525:                         elementCounts[element] += locations.length; // Count all instances (including duplicates)
 526:                     }
 527:                 });
 528: 
 529:                 console.log('\n📊 Total Scroll Counts (across all locations):');
 530:                 Object.entries(elementCounts).forEach(([element, count]) => {
 531:                     console.log(`  ${element}: ${count} scrolls found`);
 532:                 });
 533: 
 534:                 console.log('\n');
 535: 
 536:                 return { issues, elementCounts, allScrolls };
 537:             }
 538: 
 539:             // Compatibility getters for existing code
 540:             // collectedScrolls now returns both hand AND active scrolls combined
 541:             get collectedScrolls() {
 542:                 const scrolls = this.getPlayerScrolls(true);
 543:                 const combined = new Set([...scrolls.hand, ...scrolls.active]);
 544:                 return combined;
 545:             }
 546: 
 547:             get activatedScrollTypes() {
 548:                 return this.getPlayerScrolls(true).activated;
 549:             }
 550: 
 551:             // Get scrolls in hand only
 552:             get handScrolls() {
 553:                 return this.getPlayerScrolls(true).hand;
 554:             }
 555: 
 556:             // Get scrolls in active area only
 557:             get activeScrolls() {
 558:                 return this.getPlayerScrolls(true).active;
 559:             }
 560: 
 561:             // Move scroll from hand to active area (0 AP cost)
 562:             moveToActive(scrollName) {
 563:                 const scrolls = this.getPlayerScrolls(false); // Use active player for game logic
 564: 
 565:                 // Check active area limit
 566:                 if (scrolls.active.size >= this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE) {
 567:                     updateStatus(`Active area full! Max ${this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE} scrolls. Move one to hand or common area first.`);
 568:                     return false;
 569:                 }
 570: 
 571:                 if (scrolls.hand.has(scrollName)) {
 572:                     scrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
 573:                     scrolls.active.add(scrollName);
 574:                     console.log(`📜 Moved ${scrollName} to active area`);
 575:                     this.updateScrollCount();
 576: 
 577:                     // Broadcast in multiplayer
 578:                     if (isMultiplayer) {
 579:                         broadcastGameAction('scroll-move', {
 580:                             playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 581:                             scrollName: scrollName,
 582:                             toLocation: 'active'
 583:                         });
 584:                     }
 585:                     return true;
 586:                 }
 587:                 return false;
 588:             }
 589: 
 590:             // Move scroll from active area back to hand - DISABLED
 591:             // Scrolls cannot be returned to hand once placed in active area
 592:             moveToHand(scrollName) {
 593:                 // Per game rules, scrolls cannot be moved back to hand once in active area
 594:                 updateStatus(`Scrolls cannot be returned to hand! Discard to Common Area instead.`);
 595:                 return false;
 596:             }
 597: 
 598:             // Discard a scroll from hand or active area to common area
 599:             discardScroll(scrollName) {
 600:                 const scrolls = this.getPlayerScrolls(false);
 601:                 let removed = false;
 602: 
 603:                 if (scrolls.hand.has(scrollName)) {
 604:                     scrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
 605:                     removed = true;
 606:                 } else if (scrolls.active.has(scrollName)) {
 607:                     scrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
 608:                     removed = true;
 609:                 }
 610: 
 611:                 if (removed) {
 612:                     // Send to common area instead of deck
 613:                     this.discardToCommonArea(scrollName);
 614:                     this.updateScrollCount();
 615:                     try {
 616:                         if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
 617:                     } catch (e) {}
 618: 
 619:                     // Broadcast in multiplayer
 620:                     if (isMultiplayer) {
 621:                         broadcastGameAction('scroll-discard', {
 622:                             playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 623:                             scrollName: scrollName
 624:                         });
 625:                     }
 626:                     return true;
 627:                 }
 628:                 return false;
 629:             }
 630: 
 631:             initializePatterns() {
 632:                 // Use external scroll definitions if available
 633:                 if (typeof SCROLL_DEFINITIONS !== 'undefined') {
 634:                     this.patterns = SCROLL_DEFINITIONS;
 635:                     console.log('📜 Loaded scroll definitions from external file');
 636:                     return;
 637:                 }
 638: 
 639:                 // Fallback to inline definitions
 640:                 console.log('📜 Using inline scroll definitions (external file not loaded)');
 641: 
 642:                 // Corrected patterns from user's visual editor
 643:                 const level1Patterns = [
 644:                     [{ q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }],
 645:                     [{ q: 1, r: -1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 }],
 646:                     [{ q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: -1, r: 0 }]
 647:                 ];
 648: 
 649:                 const level2Patterns = [
 650:                     [{ q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }],
 651:                     [{ q: 1, r: -2 }, { q: -1, r: 2 }],
 652:                     [{ q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: -2, r: 1 }]
 653:                 ];
 654: 
 655:                 const level3Patterns = [
 656:                     [{ q: 1, r: -1 }, { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }],
 657:                     [{ q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: -1, r: 1 }]
 658:                 ];
 659: 
 660:                 const level4Patterns = [
 661:                     [{ q: 1, r: -2 }, { q: -2, r: 1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }],
 662:                     [{ q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: -1, r: 2 }]
 663:                 ];
 664: 
 665:                 const level5Patterns = [
 666:                     [{ q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: -2, r: 1 }],
 667:                     [{ q: 1, r: -1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }],
 668:                     [{ q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 1, r: -2 }, { q: -1, r: 2 }]
 669:                 ];
 670: 
 671:                 this.patterns = {};
 672:                 const elementTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
 673: 
 674:                 elementTypes.forEach(element => {
 675:                     [level1Patterns, level2Patterns, level3Patterns, level4Patterns, level5Patterns].forEach((patterns, level) => {
 676:                         const scrollName = `${element.toUpperCase()}_SCROLL_${level + 1}`;
 677:                         this.patterns[scrollName] = {
 678:                             name: `${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} Scroll ${toRoman(level + 1)}`,
 679:                             description: `Stand in pattern to gain +${level + 1} ${element} stones (2 AP)`,
 680:                             level: level + 1,
 681:                             element: element,
 682:                             patterns: patterns.map(pattern =>
 683:                                 pattern.map(pos => ({ ...pos, type: element }))
 684:                             ),
 685:                             // Earth II can counter any scroll
 686:                             canCounter: (element === 'earth' && level === 1) ? 'any' : null
 687:                         };
 688:                     });
 689:                 });
 690: 
 691:                 // Add catacomb scrolls (multi-element patterns)
 692:                 // Each gets 3 rotational variations like level 2 scrolls
 693:                 const catacombBase = {
 694:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_1: [
 695:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "water" },
 696:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "water" },
 697:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "earth" },
 698:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "earth" }
 699:                     ],
 700:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_2: [
 701:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "earth" },
 702:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "earth" },
 703:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "fire" },
 704:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "fire" }
 705:                     ],
 706:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_3: [
 707:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "wind" },
 708:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "wind" },
 709:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "earth" },
 710:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "earth" }
 711:                     ],
 712:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_4: [
 713:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "void" },
 714:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "void" },
 715:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "earth" },
 716:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "earth" }
 717:                     ],
 718:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_5: [
 719:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "water" },
 720:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "water" },
 721:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "fire" },
 722:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "fire" }
 723:                     ],
 724:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_6: [
 725:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "wind" },
 726:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "wind" },
 727:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "water" },
 728:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "water" }
 729:                     ],
 730:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_7: [
 731:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "void" },
 732:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "void" },
 733:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "water" },
 734:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "water" }
 735:                     ],
 736:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_8: [
 737:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "fire" },
 738:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "fire" },
 739:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "wind" },
 740:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "wind" }
 741:                     ],
 742:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_9: [
 743:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "void" },
 744:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "void" },
 745:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "wind" },
 746:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "wind" }
 747:                     ],
 748:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_10: [
 749:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "fire" },
 750:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "fire" },
 751:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "void" },
 752:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "void" }
 753:                     ]
 754:                 };
 755: 
 756:                 // Generate 3 rotational variations for each catacomb scroll
 757:                 Object.entries(catacombBase).forEach(([scrollName, basePattern]) => {
 758:                     const scrollNum = parseInt(scrollName.split('_')[2]);
 759: 
 760:                     // Helper function to rotate hex coordinate by 60 degrees
 761:                     const rotateHex = (q, r, steps) => {
 762:                         // Rotate counter-clockwise by steps * 60 degrees
 763:                         let nq = q, nr = r;
 764:                         for (let i = 0; i < steps; i++) {
 765:                             const tempQ = nq;
 766:                             nq = -nr;
 767:                             nr = -(-tempQ - nr);
 768:                         }
 769:                         return { q: nq, r: nr };
 770:                     };
 771: 
 772:                     // Create 3 rotational variations (0°, 120°, 240°)
 773:                     const variations = [
 774:                         basePattern, // 0° rotation
 775:                         basePattern.map(pos => ({ // 120° rotation (2 steps)
 776:                             ...rotateHex(pos.q, pos.r, 2),
 777:                             type: pos.type
 778:                         })),
 779:                         basePattern.map(pos => ({ // 240° rotation (4 steps)
 780:                             ...rotateHex(pos.q, pos.r, 4),
 781:                             type: pos.type
 782:                         }))
 783:                     ];
 784: 
 785:                     this.patterns[scrollName] = {
 786:                         name: `Catacomb Scroll ${scrollNum}`,
 787:                         description: `Multi-element pattern: gain +2 of each stone type (2 AP)`,
 788:                         level: 2,
 789:                         element: 'catacomb',
 790:                         patterns: variations
 791:                     };
 792:                 });
 793:             }
 794: 
 795:             onTileRevealed(shrineType) {
 796:                 if (shrineType === 'player') return null;
 797:                 if (!this.scrollDecks[shrineType] || this.scrollDecks[shrineType].length === 0) {
 798:                     return null;
 799:                 }
 800: 
 801:                 // Draw from top of the element's deck
 802:                 const selected = this.drawFromDeck(shrineType);
 803:                 if (!selected) return null;
 804: 
 805:                 const scrolls = this.getPlayerScrolls(false);
 806:                 const scrollInfo = this.patterns[selected];
 807: 
 808:                 // Always add to hand immediately so the player can still act this turn.
 809:                 // If the hand now exceeds the limit the end-of-turn overflow modal will
 810:                 // prompt for a cascade before the turn advances.
 811:                 scrolls.hand.add(selected);
 812:                 this.updateScrollCount();
 813: 
 814:                 // Broadcast scroll collection in multiplayer
 815:                 if (isMultiplayer) {
 816:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-collected', {
 817:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 818:                         scrollName: selected,
 819:                         shrineType: shrineType
 820:                     });
 821:                 }
 822: 
 823:                 if (scrolls.hand.size > this.MAX_HAND_SIZE) {
 824:                     // Over limit — remind the player they must cascade before ending their turn
 825:                     updateStatus(`Picked up "${scrollInfo?.name || selected}" — hand is over the limit. Cascade a scroll before ending your turn!`);
 826:                 } else {
 827:                     this.showScrollNotification(scrollInfo, shrineType, selected);
 828:                 }
 829: 
 830:                 return scrollInfo;
 831:             }
 832: 
 833:             // Show cascade prompt when hand is full
 834:             // canCascadeToActive: true = Active area has room, false = must go to Common Area
 835:             showCascadePrompt(newScrollName, newScrollInfo, shrineType, canCascadeToActive) {
 836:                 // Store as pending cascade so it blocks actions and can be re-shown
 837:                 const playerIdx = isMultiplayer ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
 838:                 this.setPendingCascade(playerIdx, {
 839:                     scrollName: newScrollName,
 840:                     scrollInfo: newScrollInfo,
 841:                     shrineType: shrineType,
 842:                     canCascadeToActive: canCascadeToActive
 843:                 });
 844: 
 845:                 // Create overlay backdrop (prevents clicking elsewhere)
 846:                 const overlay = document.createElement('div');
 847:                 overlay.id = 'cascade-overlay';
 848:                 Object.assign(overlay.style, {
 849:                     position: 'fixed',
 850:                     top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
 851:                     backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)',
 852:                     zIndex: '1001'
 853:                 });
 854: 
 855:                 const popup = document.createElement('div');
 856:                 popup.id = 'cascade-popup';
 857:                 Object.assign(popup.style, {
 858:                     position: 'fixed', left: '50%', top: '50%',
 859:                     transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)',
 860:                     backgroundColor: '#2c3e50', padding: '20px',
 861:                     borderRadius: '10px', boxShadow: '0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
 862:                     zIndex: '1002', minWidth: '400px', maxWidth: '600px',
 863:                     maxHeight: '80vh', overflowY: 'auto', color: 'white'
 864:                 });
 865: 
 866:                 const title = document.createElement('h2');
 867:                 title.textContent = canCascadeToActive
 868:                     ? 'Hand Full! Cascade a Scroll'
 869:                     : 'All Slots Full! Cascade to Common Area';
 870:                 title.style.textAlign = 'center';
 871:                 title.style.color = canCascadeToActive ? '#f39c12' : '#e74c3c';
 872:                 title.style.marginTop = '0';
 873:                 popup.appendChild(title);
 874: 
 875:                 const subtitle = document.createElement('p');
 876:                 if (canCascadeToActive) {
 877:                     subtitle.innerHTML = `You found "<strong>${newScrollInfo.name}</strong>" but your hand is full (${this.MAX_HAND_SIZE}/${this.MAX_HAND_SIZE}).<br>Choose a scroll to cascade to your <strong>Active Area</strong> or <strong>Common Area</strong>:`;
 878:                 } else {
 879:                     subtitle.innerHTML = `You found "<strong>${newScrollInfo.name}</strong>" but hand (${this.MAX_HAND_SIZE}/${this.MAX_HAND_SIZE}) and active (${this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE}/${this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE}) are full.<br>Choose a scroll to cascade to the <strong>Common Area</strong>:`;
 880:                 }
 881:                 subtitle.style.textAlign = 'center';
 882:                 subtitle.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
 883:                 popup.appendChild(subtitle);
 884: 
 885:                 const self = this;
 886:                 const scrolls = this.getPlayerScrolls(false);
 887: 
 888:                 // Create a card for each scroll in hand + active (if applicable) + the new scroll
 889:                 let allScrollOptions = [...scrolls.hand, newScrollName];
 890:                 if (!canCascadeToActive) {
 891:                     // When both are full, also include active scrolls as cascade options
 892:                     allScrollOptions = [...scrolls.hand, ...scrolls.active, newScrollName];
 893:                 }
 894: 
 895:                 allScrollOptions.forEach(scrollName => {
 896:                     const pattern = this.patterns[scrollName];
 897:                     const element = this.getScrollElement(scrollName);
 898:                     const isNew = scrollName === newScrollName;
 899:                     const isInActive = scrolls.active.has(scrollName);
 900:                     const elementColor = element === 'catacomb' ? '#9b59b6' : STONE_TYPES[element]?.color || '#666';
 901: 
 902:                     const card = document.createElement('div');
 903:                     Object.assign(card.style, {
 904:                         backgroundColor: isNew ? '#1a3a1a' : (isInActive ? '#3a2a1a' : '#34495e'),
 905:                         border: isNew ? '2px solid #27ae60' : (isInActive ? '2px solid #f39c12' : '1px solid #555'),
 906:                         borderRadius: '8px',
 907:                         padding: '12px',
 908:                         marginBottom: '10px',
 909:                         color: 'white'
 910:                     });
 911: 
 912:                     const header = document.createElement('div');
 913:                     header.style.display = 'flex';
 914:                     header.style.justifyContent = 'space-between';
 915:                     header.style.alignItems = 'center';
 916:                     header.style.marginBottom = '8px';
 917: 
 918:                     const nameSpan = document.createElement('span');
 919:                     let prefix = '';
 920:                     if (isNew) prefix = 'NEW: ';
 921:                     else if (isInActive) prefix = '⚡ ACTIVE: ';
 922:                     nameSpan.textContent = prefix + (pattern ? pattern.name : scrollName);
 923:                     nameSpan.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
 924:                     nameSpan.style.color = elementColor;
 925:                     header.appendChild(nameSpan);
 926:                     card.appendChild(header);
 927: 
 928:                     if (pattern) {
 929:                         const desc = document.createElement('div');
 930:                         desc.textContent = pattern.description;
 931:                         desc.style.fontSize = '12px';
 932:                         desc.style.color = '#95a5a6';
 933:                         desc.style.marginBottom = '10px';
 934:                         card.appendChild(desc);
 935:                     }
 936: 
 937:                     // Button container
 938:                     const buttonRow = document.createElement('div');
 939:                     buttonRow.style.display = 'flex';
 940:                     buttonRow.style.gap = '10px';
 941:                     buttonRow.style.justifyContent = 'flex-end';
 942: 
 943:                     // Cascade to Active button (only if active has room and scroll isn't already in active)
 944:                     if (canCascadeToActive && !isInActive) {
 945:                         const toActiveBtn = document.createElement('button');
 946:                         toActiveBtn.textContent = 'To Active';
 947:                         Object.assign(toActiveBtn.style, {
 948:                             backgroundColor: '#f39c12',
 949:                             color: 'white',
 950:                             border: 'none',
 951:                             padding: '8px 12px',
 952:                             borderRadius: '5px',
 953:                             cursor: 'pointer',
 954:                             fontWeight: 'bold'
 955:                         });
 956:                         toActiveBtn.onmouseenter = () => toActiveBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#e67e22';
 957:                         toActiveBtn.onmouseleave = () => toActiveBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#f39c12';
 958: 
 959:                         toActiveBtn.onclick = () => {
 960:                             if (scrollName === newScrollName) {
 961:                                 // Cascade new scroll directly to active
 962:                                 scrolls.active.add(newScrollName);
 963: 
 964:                                 if (isMultiplayer) {
 965:                                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-collected', {
 966:                                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 967:                                         scrollName: newScrollName,
 968:                                         shrineType: shrineType
 969:                                     });
 970:                                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-move', {
 971:                                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 972:                                         scrollName: newScrollName,
 973:                                         toLocation: 'active'
 974:                                     });
 975:                                 }
 976:                                 updateStatus(`Cascaded new scroll "${newScrollInfo.name}" to Active Area`);
 977:                             } else {
 978:                                 // Cascade existing scroll to active, add new to hand
 979:                                 scrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
 980:                                 scrolls.active.add(scrollName);
 981:                                 scrolls.hand.add(newScrollName);
 982: 
 983:                                 if (isMultiplayer) {
 984:                                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-move', {
 985:                                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 986:                                         scrollName: scrollName,
 987:                                         toLocation: 'active'
 988:                                     });
 989:                                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-collected', {
 990:                                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 991:                                         scrollName: newScrollName,
 992:                                         shrineType: shrineType
 993:                                     });
 994:                                 }
 995:                                 updateStatus(`Cascaded "${self.patterns[scrollName]?.name || scrollName}" to Active, kept "${newScrollInfo.name}" in hand`);
 996:                             }
 997: 
 998:                             self.updateScrollCount();
 999:                             self.clearPendingCascade(playerIdx);
1000:                             document.body.removeChild(overlay);
1001:                         };
1002:                         buttonRow.appendChild(toActiveBtn);
1003:                     }
1004: 
1005:                     // Cascade to Common Area button
1006:                     const toCommonBtn = document.createElement('button');
1007:                     toCommonBtn.textContent = 'To Common';
1008:                     Object.assign(toCommonBtn.style, {
1009:                         backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
1010:                         color: 'white',
1011:                         border: 'none',
1012:                         padding: '8px 12px',
1013:                         borderRadius: '5px',
1014:                         cursor: 'pointer',
1015:                         fontWeight: 'bold'
1016:                     });
1017:                     toCommonBtn.onmouseenter = () => toCommonBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#c0392b';
1018:                     toCommonBtn.onmouseleave = () => toCommonBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#e74c3c';
1019: 
1020:                     toCommonBtn.onclick = () => {
1021:                         if (scrollName === newScrollName) {
1022:                             // Cascade new scroll to common area
1023:                             self.discardToCommonArea(newScrollName);
1024:                             updateStatus(`Cascaded new scroll "${newScrollInfo.name}" to Common Area`);
1025:                         } else {
1026:                             // Cascade existing scroll to common, add new to hand
1027:                             if (isInActive) {
1028:                                 scrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
1029:                             } else {
1030:                                 scrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
1031:                             }
1032:                             self.discardToCommonArea(scrollName);
1033:                             scrolls.hand.add(newScrollName);
1034: 
1035:                             if (isMultiplayer) {
1036:                                 broadcastGameAction('scroll-discard', {
1037:                                     playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1038:                                     scrollName: scrollName
1039:                                 });
1040:                                 broadcastGameAction('scroll-collected', {
1041:                                     playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1042:                                     scrollName: newScrollName,
1043:                                     shrineType: shrineType
1044:                                 });
1045:                             }
1046:                             updateStatus(`Cascaded "${self.patterns[scrollName]?.name || scrollName}" to Common Area, kept "${newScrollInfo.name}"`);
1047:                         }
1048: 
1049:                         self.updateScrollCount();
1050:                         self.clearPendingCascade(playerIdx);
1051:                         document.body.removeChild(overlay);
1052:                     };
1053:                     buttonRow.appendChild(toCommonBtn);
1054: 
1055:                     card.appendChild(buttonRow);
1056:                     popup.appendChild(card);
1057:                 });
1058: 
1059:                 overlay.appendChild(popup);
1060:                 document.body.appendChild(overlay);
1061:             }
1062: 
1063:             // End-of-turn overflow: hand or active over capacity.
1064:             // Opens the Hand + Active panels and shows a top banner until resolved.
1065:             showEndTurnOverflowModal(onResolved) {
1066:                 const self = this;
1067: 
1068:                 // Open Hand + Active panels so the player can manage scrolls
1069:                 if (window.ScrollPanelSystem) {
1070:                     window.ScrollPanelSystem.openPanel('hand');
1071:                     window.ScrollPanelSystem.openPanel('active');
1072:                     window.ScrollPanelSystem.refresh();
1073:                 }
1074: 
1075:                 // Remove any stale banner from a previous call
1076:                 const old = document.getElementById('scroll-overflow-banner');
1077:                 if (old) old.remove();
1078: 
1079:                 // Build the banner
1080:                 const banner = document.createElement('div');
1081:                 banner.id = 'scroll-overflow-banner';
1082: 
1083:                 const statusEl = document.createElement('span');
1084:                 statusEl.className = 'overflow-banner-status';
1085:                 banner.appendChild(statusEl);
1086: 
1087:                 const endTurnBtn = document.createElement('button');
1088:                 endTurnBtn.className = 'overflow-banner-btn';
1089:                 endTurnBtn.textContent = 'End Turn';
1090:                 endTurnBtn.disabled = true;
1091:                 banner.appendChild(endTurnBtn);
1092: 
1093:                 document.body.appendChild(banner);
1094: 
1095:                 function updateBanner() {
1096:                     if (!document.getElementById('scroll-overflow-banner')) {
1097:                         clearInterval(pollInterval);
1098:                         return;
1099:                     }
1100:                     const scrolls = self.getPlayerScrolls(false);
1101:                     const handOver   = scrolls.hand.size   > self.MAX_HAND_SIZE;
1102:                     const activeOver = scrolls.active.size > self.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE;
1103:                     const stillOver  = handOver || activeOver;
1104: 
1105:                     if (stillOver) {
1106:                         let msg = `⚠ Scroll Overflow — `;
1107:                         if (handOver)   msg += `Hand: ${scrolls.hand.size}/${self.MAX_HAND_SIZE}  `;
1108:                         if (activeOver) msg += `Active: ${scrolls.active.size}/${self.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE}`;
1109:                         statusEl.textContent = msg.trimEnd();
1110:                         banner.classList.remove('overflow-resolved');
1111:                         endTurnBtn.disabled = true;
1112:                     } else {
1113:                         statusEl.textContent = `✓ Resolved — Hand: ${scrolls.hand.size}/${self.MAX_HAND_SIZE}  Active: ${scrolls.active.size}/${self.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE}`;
1114:                         banner.classList.add('overflow-resolved');
1115:                         endTurnBtn.disabled = false;
1116:                     }
1117: 
1118:                     if (window.ScrollPanelSystem) window.ScrollPanelSystem.refresh();
1119:                 }
1120: 
1121:                 endTurnBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
1122:                     const scrolls = self.getPlayerScrolls(false);
1123:                     const handOver   = scrolls.hand.size   > self.MAX_HAND_SIZE;
1124:                     const activeOver = scrolls.active.size > self.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE;
1125:                     if (handOver || activeOver) return;
1126:                     clearInterval(pollInterval);
1127:                     banner.remove();
1128:                     onResolved();
1129:                 });
1130: 
1131:                 updateBanner();
1132:                 const pollInterval = setInterval(updateBanner, 300);
1133:             }
1134: 
1135:             showScrollNotification(scrollInfo, elementType, scrollId) {
1136:                 const stoneType = STONE_TYPES[elementType];
1137:                 const color = stoneType ? stoneType.color : '#9458f4';
1138: 
1139:                 // Open the Hand panel so the player can see the new card
1140:                 if (window.ScrollPanelSystem) {
1141:                     window.ScrollPanelSystem.openPanel('hand');
1142:                     window.ScrollPanelSystem.refresh();
1143:                     // Briefly glow the new card after a short render delay
1144:                     if (scrollId) {
1145:                         setTimeout(() => {
1146:                             const body = document.getElementById('fsp-body-hand');
1147:                             if (body) {
1148:                                 const card = body.querySelector(`.fsp-card[data-scroll-name="${CSS.escape(scrollId)}"]`);
1149:                                 if (card) {
1150:                                     card.classList.add('fsp-card-new-glow');
1151:                                     setTimeout(() => card.classList.remove('fsp-card-new-glow'), 2500);
1152:                                 }
1153:                             }
1154:                         }, 120);
1155:                     }
1156:                 }
1157: 
1158:                 // Non-blocking toast at the bottom of the screen
1159:                 const iconHtml = stoneType
1160:                     ? `<img src="${stoneType.img}" style="width:16px;height:16px;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px;" alt="${elementType}">`
1161:                     : '✦ ';
1162: 
1163:                 const toast = document.createElement('div');
1164:                 toast.className = 'scroll-found-toast';
1165:                 toast.style.setProperty('--toast-color', color);
1166: 
1167:                 const msg = document.createElement('span');
1168:                 msg.className = 'scroll-found-toast-msg';
1169:                 msg.innerHTML = `${iconHtml}New Scroll: <strong>${scrollInfo?.name || scrollId}</strong>`;
1170:                 toast.appendChild(msg);
1171: 
1172:                 const closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
1173:                 closeBtn.textContent = 'Got it!';
1174:                 closeBtn.className = 'scroll-found-toast-btn';
1175:                 closeBtn.onclick = () => toast.remove();
1176:                 toast.appendChild(closeBtn);
1177: 
1178:                 document.body.appendChild(toast);
1179:                 // Auto-dismiss after 5 seconds
1180:                 setTimeout(() => { if (toast.parentNode) toast.remove(); }, 5000);
1181:             }
1182: 
1183:             checkPattern(patternName) {
1184:                 // Use the active player's position by default
1185:                 return this.checkPatternForPlayer(patternName, activePlayerIndex);
1186:             }
1187: 
1188:             // Check pattern for a specific player (used by response window)
1189:             checkPatternForPlayer(patternName, playerIndex) {
1190:                 const pattern = this.patterns[patternName];
1191:                 if (!pattern) return false;
1192: 
1193:                 // Get the player's position
1194:                 let pos;
1195:                 if (playerIndex === activePlayerIndex && playerPosition) {
1196:                     // Use global playerPosition for active player
1197:                     pos = playerPosition;
1198:                 } else if (playerPositions && playerPositions[playerIndex]) {
1199:                     // Use playerPositions array for other players
1200:                     pos = playerPositions[playerIndex];
1201:                 } else {
1202:                     return false;
1203:                 }
1204: 
1205:                 const playerHex = pixelToHex(pos.x, pos.y, TILE_SIZE);
1206: 
1207:                 console.log(`  Checking ${patternName} for player ${playerIndex}...`);
1208: 
1209:                 return pattern.patterns.some((patternVariant, variantIdx) => {
1210:                     const allMatch = patternVariant.every((req, reqIdx) => {
1211:                         const checkHex = hexToPixel(playerHex.q + req.q, playerHex.r + req.r, TILE_SIZE);
1212:                         const stone = placedStones.find(s => {
1213:                             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - checkHex.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - checkHex.y, 2));
1214:                             const matches = dist < 5 && s.type === req.type;
1215:                             if (matches) {
1216:                                 console.log(`    ✓ Found ${s.type} stone at (${req.q}, ${req.r})`);
1217:                             }
1218:                             return matches;
1219:                         });
1220:                         if (!stone) {
1221:                             console.log(`    ✗ Missing ${req.type} stone at (${req.q}, ${req.r})`);
1222:                         }
1223:                         return !!stone;
1224:                     });
1225: 
1226:                     if (allMatch) {
1227:                         console.log(`    ✓✓✓ PATTERN VARIANT ${variantIdx + 1} MATCHED!`);
1228:                     }
1229:                     return allMatch;
1230:                 });
1231:             }
1232: 
1233:             // Get current spell AP cost (may be reduced by buffs)
1234:             getSpellCost(spell = null, playerIndex = activePlayerIndex) {
1235:                 // Quick Reflexes: level 1 scrolls cost 0 until caster's next turn
1236:                 if (spell && spell.level === 1 && this.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.quickReflexes) {
1237:                     const qr = this.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.quickReflexes;
1238:                     if (qr.playerIndex === playerIndex) {
1239:                         return 0;
1240:                     }
1241:                 }
1242:                 // Simplify: scrolls cost 1 for the caster this turn
1243:                 if (this.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.simplify) {
1244:                     const buff = this.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.simplify;
1245:                     if (buff.playerIndex === playerIndex) {
1246:                         return 1;
1247:                     }
1248:                 }
1249:                 return this.SPELL_AP_COST;
1250:             }
1251: 
1252:             castSpell() {
1253:                 // Scrolls in Active Area OR Common Area can be activated
1254:                 const activeScrollsList = Array.from(this.getPlayerScrolls(false).active);
1255:                 const commonAreaScrolls = this.getCommonAreaScrolls();
1256:                 const allCastableScrolls = [...activeScrollsList, ...commonAreaScrolls];
1257:                 if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.logScrollEvent) {
1258:                     window.logScrollEvent('cast_attempt', {
1259:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1260:                         active: activeScrollsList,
1261:                         common: commonAreaScrolls
1262:                     });
1263:                 }
1264: 
1265:                 if (allCastableScrolls.length === 0) {
1266:                     updateStatus("No scrolls available! Move scrolls to Active Area or use Common Area scrolls.");
1267:                     return false;
1268:                 }
1269: 
1270:                 // Debug: Log player position and nearby stones (throttled)
1271:                 if (shouldDebugLog('castSpellDebug', 1000)) {
1272:                     console.log('✨ Attempting to cast spell...');
1273:                     console.log(`Player position: (${playerPosition.x.toFixed(1)}, ${playerPosition.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1274:                     console.log(`Active scrolls: ${activeScrollsList.join(', ')}`);
1275:                     console.log(`Common area scrolls: ${commonAreaScrolls.join(', ')}`);
1276: 
1277:                     if (playerPosition) {
1278:                         const playerHex = pixelToHex(playerPosition.x, playerPosition.y, TILE_SIZE);
1279:                         console.log(`Player hex: q=${playerHex.q}, r=${playerHex.r}`);
1280: 
1281:                         // Log nearby stones
1282:                         console.log('Nearby stones:');
1283:                         const nearbyStones = [];
1284:                         placedStones.forEach(stone => {
1285:                             const stoneHex = pixelToHex(stone.x, stone.y, TILE_SIZE);
1286:                             const relQ = stoneHex.q - playerHex.q;
1287:                             const relR = stoneHex.r - playerHex.r;
1288:                             nearbyStones.push({ type: stone.type, q: relQ, r: relR });
1289:                             console.log(`  ${stone.type} at relative (${relQ}, ${relR})`);
1290:                         });
1291: 
1292:                         // Check each castable scroll and show why it doesn't match
1293:                         console.log('\nChecking castable scrolls (Active + Common Area):');
1294:                         for (const scrollName of allCastableScrolls) {
1295:                             const pattern = this.patterns[scrollName];
1296:                             console.log(`\n${scrollName} requires:`);
1297:                             pattern.patterns.forEach((patternVariant, idx) => {
1298:                                 const coords = patternVariant.map(p => `(${p.q},${p.r}) ${p.type}`).join(' + ');
1299:                                 const matches = patternVariant.every(req => {
1300:                                     return nearbyStones.some(s => s.q === req.q && s.r === req.r && s.type === req.type);
1301:                                 });
1302:                                 console.log(`  Pattern ${idx + 1}: ${coords} - ${matches ? '✓ MATCH' : '✗ no match'}`);
1303:                             });
1304:                         }
1305:                     }
1306:                 }
1307: 
1308:                 const matchingSpells = [];
1309:                 // Check scrolls in Active Area AND Common Area
1310:                 for (const scrollName of allCastableScrolls) {
1311:                     if (this.checkPattern(scrollName)) {
1312:                         console.log(`\n✓ Pattern match found: ${scrollName}`);
1313:                         const isFromCommonArea = commonAreaScrolls.includes(scrollName);
1314:                         matchingSpells.push({ name: scrollName, spell: this.patterns[scrollName], fromCommonArea: isFromCommonArea });
1315:                     }
1316:                 }
1317: 
1318:                 if (matchingSpells.length === 0) {
1319:                     updateStatus("No valid spell pattern found! Check console for details.");
1320:                     console.log('\n✗ No matching patterns');
1321:                     return false;
1322:                 }
1323: 
1324:                 matchingSpells.sort((a, b) => b.spell.level - a.spell.level);
1325: 
1326:                 // Level 1 scrolls can only be used during the response window
1327:                 const mainPhaseSpells = matchingSpells.filter(s => s.spell.level !== 1);
1328:                 if (mainPhaseSpells.length === 0) {
1329:                     updateStatus('Level 1 scrolls can only be used as responses.');
1330:                     return false;
1331:                 }
1332: 
1333:                 // Filter by affordability based on each spell's actual cost
1334:                 const affordableSpells = mainPhaseSpells.filter(({ spell }) => {
1335:                     const cost = this.getSpellCost(spell, activePlayerIndex);
1336:                     return canAfford(cost);
1337:                 });
1338: 
1339:                 if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.logScrollEvent) {
1340:                     window.logScrollEvent('cast_matches', {
1341:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1342:                         matches: matchingSpells.map(m => ({ name: m.name, level: m.spell.level, element: m.spell.element })),
1343:                         affordable: affordableSpells.map(m => ({ name: m.name, level: m.spell.level, element: m.spell.element }))
1344:                     });
1345:                 }
1346: 
1347:                 if (affordableSpells.length === 0) {
1348:                     const minCost = Math.min(...matchingSpells.map(({ spell }) => this.getSpellCost(spell, activePlayerIndex)));
1349:                     updateStatus(`Not enough AP! Need ${minCost} AP to cast.`);
1350:                     return false;
1351:                 }
1352: 
1353:                 if (affordableSpells.length > 1) {
1354:                     // Always show selection when multiple scrolls match
1355:                     this.showSpellSelection(affordableSpells);
1356:                 } else {
