1357:                     this.executeSpell(affordableSpells[0]);
1358:                 }
1359:                 return true;
1360:             }
1361: 
1362:             showSpellSelection(spells) {
1363:                 const popup = document.createElement('div');
1364:                 Object.assign(popup.style, {
1365:                     position: 'fixed', left: '50%', top: '50%',
1366:                     transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)',
1367:                     backgroundColor: '#2c3e50', padding: '20px',
1368:                     borderRadius: '10px', boxShadow: '0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
1369:                     zIndex: '1000', color: 'white', minWidth: '300px'
1370:                 });
1371: 
1372:                 const header = document.createElement('div');
1373:                 header.style.display = 'flex';
1374:                 header.style.alignItems = 'center';
1375:                 header.style.justifyContent = 'space-between';
1376:                 header.style.marginBottom = '12px';
1377:                 const title = document.createElement('h3');
1378:                 title.textContent = 'Select Scroll to Cast';
1379:                 title.style.textAlign = 'center';
1380:                 title.style.margin = '0';
1381:                 title.style.flex = '1';
1382:                 header.appendChild(title);
1383:                 const closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
1384:                 closeBtn.textContent = '\u00D7';
1385:                 closeBtn.title = 'Close';
1386:                 closeBtn.style.cssText = 'background:none;border:none;color:white;font-size:24px;cursor:pointer;line-height:1;padding:0 8px;';
1387:                 closeBtn.onclick = () => document.body.removeChild(popup);
1388:                 header.appendChild(closeBtn);
1389:                 popup.appendChild(header);
1390: 
1391:                 spells.forEach(({name, spell, fromCommonArea}) => {
1392:                     const btn = document.createElement('button');
1393:                     const sourceLabel = fromCommonArea ? ' [Common]' : '';
1394:                     btn.textContent = `${spell.name} (+${spell.level} ${spell.element})${sourceLabel}`;
1395:                     btn.style.width = '100%';
1396:                     btn.style.marginBottom = '10px';
1397:                     if (fromCommonArea) {
1398:                         btn.style.borderLeft = '4px solid #9b59b6'; // Purple border for common area
1399:                     }
1400:                     btn.onclick = () => {
1401:                         document.body.removeChild(popup);
1402:                         this.executeSpell({name, spell, fromCommonArea});
1403:                     };
1404:                     popup.appendChild(btn);
1405:                 });
1406: 
1407:                 document.body.appendChild(popup);
1408:             }
1409: 
1410:             executeSpell({name, spell, fromCommonArea = false}) {
1411:                 const cost = this.getSpellCost(spell, activePlayerIndex);
1412:                 if (!canAfford(cost)) {
1413:                     updateStatus(`Not enough AP! Need ${cost} AP to cast.`);
1414:                     return false;
1415:                 }
1416:                 // Spend AP first (may be reduced by buffs)
1417:                 spendAP(cost);
1418:                 if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.logScrollEvent) {
1419:                     window.logScrollEvent('cast_execute', {
1420:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1421:                         scrollName: name,
1422:                         element: spell.element,
1423:                         level: spell.level,
1424:                         cost,
1425:                         fromCommonArea
1426:                     });
1427:                 }
1428: 
1429:                 // Tutorial hook — fires when a spell is successfully cast
1430:                 if (window.isTutorialMode && window.TutorialMode?.onSpellCast) {
1431:                     window.TutorialMode.onSpellCast(name);
1432:                 }
1433: 
1434:                 const scrollData = { name, spell, fromCommonArea, casterIndex: activePlayerIndex };
1435: 
1436:                 // Open response window when 2+ players so the react phase always runs (others can respond or pass)
1437:                 const numPlayers = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions.length : 0;
1438:                 if (this.responseWindow && numPlayers > 1) {
1439:                     console.log('Opening response window (react phase)');
1440:                     this.responseWindow.openResponseWindow(scrollData, activePlayerIndex, (result) => {
1441:                         this.handleResponseWindowComplete(scrollData, result);
1442:                     });
1443:                     return; // Don't apply effects yet
1444:                 }
1445: 
1446:                 // No response window needed - apply effects immediately
1447:                 console.log('Response window skipped - no valid responses available');
1448:                 this.applyScrollEffects(name, spell, fromCommonArea);
1449:             }
1450: 
1451:             // Handle the completion of response window
1452:             handleResponseWindowComplete(originalScrollData, result) {
1453:                 if (result.skipped) {
1454:                     // No responses - apply original scroll effects
1455:                     this.applyScrollEffects(originalScrollData.name, originalScrollData.spell, originalScrollData.fromCommonArea);
1456:                     return;
1457:                 }
1458: 
1459:                 // Process resolved scrolls from the stack
1460:                 // The response window already handles the LIFO resolution
1461:                 // We just need to check if the original scroll was countered
1462:                 const wasCountered = result.responses.some(r =>
1463:                     r.isOriginal && r.result === 'countered'
1464:                 );
1465: 
1466:                 if (wasCountered) {
1467:                     updateStatus(`Your ${originalScrollData.spell.name} was countered!`);
1468:                     // Broadcast the counter in multiplayer
1469:                     if (isMultiplayer) {
1470:                         broadcastGameAction('scroll-countered', {
1471:                             scrollName: originalScrollData.name,
1472:                             casterIndex: originalScrollData.casterIndex
1473:                         });
1474:                     }
1475:                     // Still need to handle scroll disposition for countered scroll
1476:                     this.handleScrollDisposition(originalScrollData.name, originalScrollData.fromCommonArea);
1477:                 } else {
1478:                     // Original not countered: already applied by scroll-resolved listener when event fired.
1479:                     // Nothing to do here (avoids double-apply).
1480:                 }
1481:             }
1482: 
1483:             // Apply the actual scroll effects (separated from executeSpell for response window support)
1484:             applyScrollEffects(name, spell, fromCommonArea = false) {
1485:                 // Handle scroll disposition (remove from player and decide where it goes)
1486:                 this.handleScrollDisposition(name, fromCommonArea);
1487: 
1488:                 // Save the previous scroll cast (before recording this one) for effects like Sigh of Recollection
1489:                 const previousScrollCast = this.scrollEffects ? this.scrollEffects.lastScrollCastThisTurn : null;
1490: 
1491:                 // Track this scroll for Reflect (Water I) effect
1492:                 if (this.scrollEffects) {
1493:                     this.scrollEffects.recordScrollCast(name, spell);
1494:                 }
1495: 
1496:                 // Check if this scroll has a special effect (Earth scrolls, etc.)
1497:                 // Lazy-init: get ScrollEffects from window or global (in case load order / scope hid it at construction)
1498:                 if (!this.scrollEffects) {
1499:                     const SE = (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.ScrollEffects) || (typeof ScrollEffects !== 'undefined' && ScrollEffects);
1500:                     if (SE) {
1501:                         SE.init(this);
1502:                         this.scrollEffects = SE;
1503:                         console.log('Scroll effects system initialized (lazy)');
1504:                     }
1505:                 }
1506:                 if (this.scrollEffects) {
1507:                     console.log(`📜 Looking up effect for: "${name}", effects keys:`, Object.keys(this.scrollEffects.effects));
1508:                     const effect = this.scrollEffects.getEffect(name);
1509:                     console.log(`📜 getEffect("${name}") returned:`, effect ? effect.name : null);
1510:                     if (effect) {
1511:                         console.log(`📜 Executing special effect for ${name}: ${effect.name}`);
1512:                         // Wrap execute in try/catch so win-condition tracking always runs even if the
1513:                         // effect throws (e.g. DOM error inside enterTransmuteMode or similar)
1514:                         let result = { success: false, requiresSelection: false };
1515:                         try {
1516:                             result = this.scrollEffects.execute(name, activePlayerIndex, { spell, scrollName: name, previousScrollCast }) || result;
1517:                         } catch (execErr) {
1518:                             console.error(`❌ Effect execute threw for "${name}":`, execErr);
1519:                             // Continue below to still track win condition and broadcast
1520:                         }
1521:                         if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.logScrollEvent) {
1522:                             window.logScrollEvent('effect_execute', {
1523:                                 playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1524:                                 scrollName: name,
1525:                                 effectName: effect.name,
1526:                                 success: result?.success,
1527:                                 requiresSelection: !!result?.requiresSelection,
1528:                                 message: result?.message
1529:                             });
1530:                         }
1531: 
1532:                         // Refresh all stone count UI after scroll effect (effects may modify pools)
1533:                         ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].forEach(t => updateStoneCount(t));
1534: 
1535:                         // Track activated element(s) for win condition regardless of effect result
1536:                         // (but skip if the effect was cancelled, e.g. Sacrificial Pyre with empty hand)
1537:                         if (result.cancelled) {
1538:                             console.log(`📜 Effect cancelled — skipping win-condition tracking for ${name}`);
1539:                             return;
1540:                         }
1541:                         if (spell.element === 'catacomb' && spell.patterns && spell.patterns[0]) {
1542:                             // Catacomb scrolls activate each component element
1543:                             const elements = new Set(spell.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type));
1544:                             elements.forEach(el => {
1545:                                 this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.add(el);
1546:                                 if (typeof window.gami?.onElementActivated === 'function') {
1547:                                     window.gami.onElementActivated(el, Array.from(this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated));
1548:                                 }
1549:                             });
1550:                         } else {
1551:                             // Source pool guard: if the shared element source pool is fully depleted,
1552:                             // the scroll fires but cannot count toward the win condition — there are
1553:                             // no remaining stones of this element for anyone to use.
1554:                             const elementSourcePool = window.stonePools?.[spell.element] ?? 1;
1555:                             if (elementSourcePool > 0) {
1556:                                 this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.add(spell.element);
1557:                                 if (typeof window.gami?.onElementActivated === 'function') {
1558:                                     window.gami.onElementActivated(spell.element, Array.from(this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated));
1559:                                 }
1560:                             } else {
1561:                                 updateStatus(`The ${spell.element} shrine source is depleted — scroll effect cast, but win condition not met.`);
1562:                                 console.warn(`📜 Win condition skipped for ${spell.element}: source pool is empty.`);
1563:                             }
1564:                         }
1565:                         updatePlayerElementSymbols(activePlayerIndex);
1566: 
1567:                         // If effect requires selection, don't continue with broadcast yet
1568:                         if (result.requiresSelection) {
1569:                             return; // Selection mode will call onSelectionEffectComplete when done
1570:                         }
1571: 
1572:                         // Broadcast the effect in multiplayer
1573:                         if (isMultiplayer) {
1574:                             // For catacomb scrolls, send component elements for win condition tracking
1575:                             const activatedElements = (spell.element === 'catacomb' && spell.patterns && spell.patterns[0])
1576:                                 ? [...new Set(spell.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type))]
1577:                                 : [spell.element];
1578:                             broadcastGameAction('scroll-effect', {
1579:                                 playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1580:                                 scrollName: name,
1581:                                 effectName: effect.name,
1582:                                 element: spell.element,
1583:                                 activatedElements: activatedElements
1584:                             });
1585:                             syncPlayerState();
1586:                         }
1587: 
1588:                         // Check win condition
1589:                         if (this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.size === 5) {
1590:                             this.showLevelComplete(activePlayerIndex);
1591:                             if (isMultiplayer) {
1592:                                 handleGameOver(activePlayerIndex);
1593:                             }
1594:                         }
1595:                         return;
1596:                     } else {
1597:                         console.warn(`📜 No effect defined for scroll "${name}" – using default (give stones). Add effect in scroll-effects.js for "${name}".`);
1598:                     }
1599:                 } else {
1600:                     console.warn('📜 Scroll effects not available – using default (give stones). Is js/scrolls/effects/scroll-effects.js loaded?');
1601:                 }
1602: 
1603:                 // Default behavior: give stones based on scroll level
1604:                 if (spell.element === 'catacomb') {
1605:                     // Catacomb scrolls give +2 of each element type in the pattern
1606:                     const elementCounts = {};
1607:                     spell.patterns[0].forEach(pos => {
1608:                         elementCounts[pos.type] = (elementCounts[pos.type] || 0) + 1;
1609:                     });
1610: 
1611:                     const rewards = [];
1612:                     Object.entries(elementCounts).forEach(([element, count]) => {
1613:                         playerPool[element] = Math.min(
1614:                             playerPoolCapacity[element],
1615:                             playerPool[element] + count
1616:                         );
1617:                         updateStoneCount(element);
1618: 
1619:                         // Track activated element for win condition (for active player)
1620:                         this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.add(element);
1621:                         rewards.push(`+${count} ${element}`);
1622:                     });
1623: 
1624:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(activePlayerIndex);
1625:                     updateStatus(`Catacomb spell cast! Added ${rewards.join(', ')} stones!`);
1626:                 } else {
1627:                     // Regular element scrolls
1628:                     playerPool[spell.element] = Math.min(
1629:                         playerPoolCapacity[spell.element],
1630:                         playerPool[spell.element] + spell.level
1631:                     );
1632:                     updateStoneCount(spell.element);
1633: 
1634:                     // Track activated element for win condition — source pool guard applies here too
1635:                     const elementSourcePoolDefault = window.stonePools?.[spell.element] ?? 1;
1636:                     if (elementSourcePoolDefault > 0) {
1637:                         this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.add(spell.element);
1638:                         updateStatus(`Spell cast! Added +${spell.level} ${spell.element} stones!`);
1639:                     } else {
1640:                         updateStatus(`The ${spell.element} shrine source is depleted — scroll effect cast, but win condition not met.`);
1641:                         console.warn(`📜 Win condition skipped for ${spell.element}: source pool is empty (default path).`);
1642:                     }
1643:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(activePlayerIndex);
1644:                 }
1645: 
1646:                 // Broadcast spell cast in multiplayer
1647:                 if (isMultiplayer) {
1648:                     if (spell.element === 'catacomb') {
1649:                         const elementCounts = {};
1650:                         spell.patterns[0].forEach(pos => {
1651:                             elementCounts[pos.type] = (elementCounts[pos.type] || 0) + 1;
1652:                         });
1653:                         broadcastGameAction('spell-cast', {
1654:                             playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1655:                             spellName: name,
1656:                             elements: Object.keys(elementCounts),
1657:                             isCatacomb: true
1658:                         });
1659:                     } else {
1660:                         broadcastGameAction('spell-cast', {
1661:                             playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1662:                             spellName: name,
1663:                             element: spell.element,
1664:                             level: spell.level,
1665:                             isCatacomb: false
1666:                         });
1667:                     }
1668: 
1669:                     // Sync resources after spell adds stones
1670:                     syncPlayerState();
1671:                 }
1672: 
1673:                 // Check if THIS player has won (activated all 5 elements)
1674:                 if (this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.size === 5) {
1675:                     this.showLevelComplete(activePlayerIndex);
1676: 
1677:                     // In multiplayer, mark game as finished in database
1678:                     if (isMultiplayer) {
1679:                         handleGameOver(activePlayerIndex);
1680:                     }
1681:                 }
1682:             }
1683: 
1684:             // Called by scroll effects when a selection-based effect (e.g. Shifting Sands) is completed
1685:             onSelectionEffectComplete(scrollName, effectName, spell) {
1686:                 // Update element symbols on player tile
1687:                 if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
1688:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(activePlayerIndex);
1689:                 }
1690: 
1691:                 // Gamification hook for element activation via interactive scroll
1692:                 if (typeof window.gami?.onElementActivated === 'function') {
1693:                     const activatedEl = (spell.element === 'catacomb' && spell.patterns && spell.patterns[0])
1694:                         ? [...new Set(spell.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type))]
1695:                         : [spell.element];
1696:                     activatedEl.forEach(el => {
1697:                         window.gami.onElementActivated(el, Array.from(this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated));
1698:                     });
1699:                 }
1700: 
1701:                 if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
1702:                     // Determine activated elements (for catacomb scrolls)
1703:                     const activatedElements = (spell.element === 'catacomb' && spell.patterns && spell.patterns[0])
1704:                         ? [...new Set(spell.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type))]
1705:                         : [spell.element];
1706: 
1707:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-effect', {
1708:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1709:                         scrollName: scrollName,
1710:                         effectName: effectName,
1711:                         element: spell.element,
1712:                         activatedElements: activatedElements
1713:                     });
1714:                     if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
1715:                 }
1716:                 if (this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.size === 5) {
1717:                     this.showLevelComplete(activePlayerIndex);
1718:                     if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof handleGameOver === 'function') {
1719:                         handleGameOver(activePlayerIndex);
1720:                     }
1721:                 }
1722:             }
1723: 
1724:             // Handle scroll disposition after casting
1725:             // Scrolls normally stay in active area after being cast
1726:             // If Unbidden Lamplight was used in response, the scroll goes to common area
1727:             handleScrollDisposition(scrollName, fromCommonArea = false, forceToCommonArea = false) {
1728:                 const scrolls = this.getPlayerScrolls(false);
1729: 
1730:                 // Common area scrolls are permanent shared resources — casting them does NOT
1731:                 // remove them from the common area. They only leave when replaced by a new scroll
1732:                 // of the same element type. So fromCommonArea=true requires no action here.
1733: 
1734:                 // Check if Unbidden Lamplight has marked this scroll to go to caster's hand
1735:                 const redirect = this.scrollEffects?.pendingHandRedirect;
1736:                 if (redirect && redirect.scrollName === scrollName) {
1737:                     // Remove from the ORIGINAL CASTER's active area
1738:                     const originalCasterIndex = redirect.originalCasterIndex;
1739:                     if (originalCasterIndex !== undefined && this.playerScrolls[originalCasterIndex]) {
1740:                         const originalCasterScrolls = this.playerScrolls[originalCasterIndex];
1741:                         if (originalCasterScrolls.active.has(scrollName)) {
1742:                             originalCasterScrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
1743:                         }
1744:                     } else if (scrolls.active.has(scrollName)) {
1745:                         scrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
1746:                     }
1747: 
1748:                     // Add to lamplight caster's hand — bypasses hand size limit intentionally
1749:                     const lamplightCasterIndex = redirect.redirectToPlayerIndex;
1750:                     this.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(lamplightCasterIndex);
1751:                     this.playerScrolls[lamplightCasterIndex].hand.add(scrollName);
1752: 
1753:                     // Clear the pending redirect
1754:                     this.scrollEffects.pendingHandRedirect = null;
1755: 
1756:                     // If hand is now over the limit, trigger cascade prompt so player resolves it
1757:                     const lamplightScrolls = this.playerScrolls[lamplightCasterIndex];
1758:                     if (lamplightScrolls.hand.size > this.MAX_HAND_SIZE) {
1759:                         const scrollInfo = this.getScrollInfo ? this.getScrollInfo(scrollName) : null;
1760:                         const canCascadeToActive = lamplightScrolls.active.size < this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE;
1761:                         updateStatus(`Unbidden Lamplight sent "${scrollName}" to your hand — hand is over the limit. Cascade a scroll before ending your turn!`);
1762:                         if (lamplightCasterIndex === (isMultiplayer ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex)) {
1763:                             this.showCascadePrompt(scrollName, scrollInfo, null, canCascadeToActive);
1764:                         }
1765:                     } else {
1766:                         updateStatus('Unbidden Lamplight sent the scroll to your hand!');
1767:                     }
1768:                 } else if (forceToCommonArea) {
1769:                     // Explicit request to send to common area.
1770:                     // Guard: only discard if the scroll is still in active — if Lamplight already
1771:                     // redirected it to hand, the scroll is gone from active and we must not override.
1772:                     if (scrolls.active.has(scrollName)) {
1773:                         scrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
1774:                         this.discardToCommonArea(scrollName);
1775:                     }
1776:                 }
1777:                 // Otherwise, scroll remains in player's active area - NO auto-discard!
1778: 
1779:                 // Update scroll UI
1780:                 this.updateScrollCount();
1781:                 updateCommonAreaUI();
1782: 
1783:                 // Broadcast in multiplayer
1784:                 if (isMultiplayer) {
1785:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-used', {
1786:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1787:                         scrollName: scrollName,
1788:                         fromCommonArea: fromCommonArea,
1789:                         forceToCommonArea: forceToCommonArea
1790:                     });
1791:                 }
1792:             }
1793: 
1794:             showLevelComplete(playerIndex) {
1795:                 // Guard: only one win overlay at a time
1796:                 if (document.querySelector('.game-over-overlay')) return;
1797: 
1798:                 const overlay = document.createElement('div');
1799:                 overlay.className = 'game-over-overlay';
1800: 
1801:                 const box = document.createElement('div');
1802:                 box.className = 'game-over-box';
1803: 
1804:                 const title = document.createElement('div');
1805:                 title.textContent = 'VICTORY';
1806:                 title.className = 'game-over-title';
1807:                 box.appendChild(title);
1808: 
1809:                 const playerColor = playerPositions[playerIndex]?.color;
1810:                 const colorNames = {
1811:                     '#9458f4': 'Purple wins!',
1812:                     '#ffce00': 'Yellow wins!',
1813:                     '#ed1b43': 'Red wins!',
1814:                     '#5894f4': 'Blue wins!',
1815:                     '#69d83a': 'Green wins!'
1816:                 };
1817:                 const playerName = document.createElement('div');
1818:                 playerName.textContent = colorNames[playerColor] || `Player ${playerIndex + 1} wins!`;
1819:                 playerName.className = 'game-over-winner';
1820:                 playerName.style.color = playerColor || '#d9b08c';
1821:                 box.appendChild(playerName);
1822: 
1823:                 const msg = document.createElement('div');
1824:                 msg.textContent = 'You have mastered all five elements!';
1825:                 msg.className = 'game-over-msg';
1826:                 box.appendChild(msg);
1827: 
1828:                 const elements = document.createElement('div');
1829:                 elements.className = 'game-over-elements';
1830:                 elements.innerHTML = ['earth','water','fire','wind','void'].map(el =>
1831:                     `<img src="images/${el === 'earth' ? 'mountainsymbol' : el === 'water' ? 'watersymbol' : el === 'fire' ? 'firesymbol' : el === 'wind' ? 'windsymbol' : 'voidsymbol'}.png" class="element-icon-sm" alt="${el}">`
1832:                 ).join(' ');
1833:                 box.appendChild(elements);
1834: 
1835:                 const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
1836:                 subtitle.textContent = 'The path of balance is complete.';
1837:                 subtitle.className = 'game-over-subtitle';
1838:                 box.appendChild(subtitle);
1839: 
1840:                 if (isMultiplayer) {
1841:                     const n = Math.max(2, (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions.length : 2));
1842:                     const xpAmt = 75 + (n - 1) * 25;
1843:                     const xpLine = document.createElement('div');
1844:                     xpLine.style.cssText = `font-family: var(--font-pixel, monospace); font-size: 9px;
1845:                         color: #f0c040; letter-spacing: 1px; margin: 8px 0 4px;`;
1846:                     xpLine.textContent = `+${xpAmt} XP  —  VICTORY`;
1847:                     box.appendChild(xpLine);
1848:                 }
1849: 
1850:                 const btnRow = document.createElement('div');
1851:                 btnRow.className = 'game-over-btns';
1852: 
1853:                 if (isMultiplayer) {
1854:                     const lobbyBtn = document.createElement('button');
1855:                     lobbyBtn.textContent = 'Return to Lobby';
1856:                     lobbyBtn.className = 'retro-dlg-btn ok';
1857:                     lobbyBtn.onclick = () => window.location.reload();
1858:                     btnRow.appendChild(lobbyBtn);
1859:                 } else {
1860:                     const closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
1861:                     closeBtn.textContent = 'Continue Playing';
1862:                     closeBtn.className = 'retro-dlg-btn cancel';
1863:                     closeBtn.onclick = () => overlay.remove();
1864:                     btnRow.appendChild(closeBtn);
1865:                 }
1866: 
1867:                 box.appendChild(btnRow);
1868:                 overlay.appendChild(box);
1869:                 document.body.appendChild(overlay);
1870:             }
1871: 
1872:             createPatternVisual(scroll, elementType) {
1873:                 const container = document.createElement('div');
1874:                 container.style.display = 'flex';
1875:                 container.style.justifyContent = 'center';
1876:                 container.style.alignItems = 'center';
1877:                 container.style.padding = '15px';
1878:                 container.style.backgroundColor = '#2c3e50';
1879:                 container.style.borderRadius = '5px';
1880:                 container.style.marginTop = '10px';
1881:                 container.style.position = 'relative';
1882: 
1883:                 // Create SVG
1884:                 const svg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'svg');
1885:                 svg.setAttribute('width', '200');
1886:                 svg.setAttribute('height', '200');
1887:                 svg.setAttribute('viewBox', '-100 -100 200 200');
1888: 
1889:                 const hexSize = 15;
1890: 
1891:                 // Helper to create hex points
1892:                 const createHexPoints = (cx, cy, size) => {
1893:                     const points = [];
1894:                     for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
1895:                         const angle = (Math.PI / 3) * i - Math.PI / 6;
1896:                         points.push(`${cx + size * Math.cos(angle)},${cy + size * Math.sin(angle)}`);
1897:                     }
1898:                     return points.join(' ');
1899:                 };
1900: 
1901:                 // Helper to convert axial to pixel
1902:                 const axialToPixel = (q, r) => {
1903:                     const x = hexSize * (Math.sqrt(3) * q + Math.sqrt(3)/2 * r);
1904:                     const y = hexSize * (3/2 * r);
1905:                     return { x, y };
1906:                 };
1907: 
1908:                 // Draw background hexes in a grid (static layer)
1909:                 const backgroundGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
1910:                 for (let q = -2; q <= 2; q++) {
1911:                     for (let r = -2; r <= 2; r++) {
1912:                         if (Math.abs(q + r) <= 2) {
1913:                             const pos = axialToPixel(q, r);
1914:                             const hex = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
1915:                             hex.setAttribute('points', createHexPoints(pos.x, pos.y, hexSize));
1916:                             hex.setAttribute('fill', '#34495e');
1917:                             hex.setAttribute('stroke', '#2c3e50');
1918:                             hex.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
1919:                             backgroundGroup.appendChild(hex);
1920:                         }
1921:                     }
1922:                 }
1923:                 svg.appendChild(backgroundGroup);
1924: 
1925:                 // Draw player hex (static layer)
1926:                 const playerHex = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
1927:                 playerHex.setAttribute('cx', '0');
1928:                 playerHex.setAttribute('cy', '0');
1929:                 playerHex.setAttribute('r', hexSize * 0.5);
1930:                 playerHex.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
1931:                 playerHex.setAttribute('stroke', '#333');
1932:                 playerHex.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
1933:                 svg.appendChild(playerHex);
1934: 
1935:                 // Create pattern groups for each variation (animated layers)
1936:                 const patternGroups = [];
1937:                 scroll.patterns.forEach((patternVariation, idx) => {
1938:                     const group = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
1939:                     group.style.opacity = idx === 0 ? '1' : '0';
1940:                     group.style.transition = 'opacity 0.5s ease-in-out';
1941: 
1942:                     patternVariation.forEach(pos => {
1943:                         const pixelPos = axialToPixel(pos.q, pos.r);
1944:                         const stoneHex = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
1945:                         stoneHex.setAttribute('points', createHexPoints(pixelPos.x, pixelPos.y, hexSize));
1946:                         // Use pos.type if available (for catacomb multi-element), otherwise use elementType
1947:                         const stoneType = pos.type || elementType;
1948:                         stoneHex.setAttribute('fill', darkenHex(STONE_TYPES[stoneType].color, 0.55));
1949:                         stoneHex.setAttribute('stroke', STONE_TYPES[stoneType].color);
1950:                         stoneHex.setAttribute('stroke-width', '1.5');
1951:                         group.appendChild(stoneHex);
1952: 
1953:                         // Add element image
1954:                         const symbol = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'image');
1955:                         symbol.setAttribute('href', STONE_TYPES[stoneType].img);
1956:                         symbol.setAttribute('x', pixelPos.x - hexSize);
1957:                         symbol.setAttribute('y', pixelPos.y - hexSize);
1958:                         symbol.setAttribute('width', hexSize * 2);
1959:                         symbol.setAttribute('height', hexSize * 2);
1960:                         // No opacity reduction — symbol renders at full strength
1961:                         group.appendChild(symbol);
1962:                     });
1963: 
1964:                     patternGroups.push(group);
1965:                     svg.appendChild(group);
1966:                 });
1967: 
1968:                 // Add pattern indicator text
1969:                 const indicatorText = document.createElement('div');
1970:                 indicatorText.style.position = 'absolute';
1971:                 indicatorText.style.bottom = '5px';
1972:                 indicatorText.style.right = '10px';
1973:                 indicatorText.style.fontSize = '11px';
1974:                 indicatorText.style.color = '#95a5a6';
1975:                 indicatorText.style.fontStyle = 'italic';
1976:                 indicatorText.textContent = `Pattern 1/${patternGroups.length}`;
1977:                 container.appendChild(indicatorText);
1978: 
1979:                 // Cycle through patterns
1980:                 let currentPatternIdx = 0;
1981:                 const cycleInterval = setInterval(() => {
1982:                     // Fade out current
1983:                     patternGroups[currentPatternIdx].style.opacity = '0';
1984:                     
1985:                     // Move to next
1986:                     currentPatternIdx = (currentPatternIdx + 1) % patternGroups.length;
1987:                     
1988:                     // Fade in next
1989:                     patternGroups[currentPatternIdx].style.opacity = '1';
1990:                     
1991:                     // Update indicator
1992:                     indicatorText.textContent = `Pattern ${currentPatternIdx + 1}/${patternGroups.length}`;
1993:                 }, 2500); // Change pattern every 2.5 seconds
1994: 
1995:                 // Store interval ID so we can clean it up if needed
1996:                 container.dataset.intervalId = cycleInterval;
1997: 
1998:                 container.appendChild(svg);
1999:                 return container;
2000:             }
2001: 
2002:             showInventory() {
2003:                 // Remove any existing inventory popup so we don't stack them
2004:                 const existingPopup = document.getElementById('scroll-inventory-popup');
2005:                 if (existingPopup) existingPopup.remove();
2006: 
2007:                 const popup = document.createElement('div');
2008:                 popup.id = 'scroll-inventory-popup'; // used by Transmute to refresh this popup
2009:                 Object.assign(popup.style, {
2010:                     position: 'fixed', left: '50%', top: '50%',
2011:                     transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)',
2012:                     zIndex: '1001', minWidth: '450px', maxWidth: '600px', maxHeight: '80vh',
2013:                     overflowY: 'auto'
2014:                 });
2015: 
2016:                 const title = document.createElement('h2');
2017:                 title.textContent = 'Scroll Inventory';
2018:                 title.className = 'si-title';
2019:                 title.style.color = '#3498db';
2020:                 popup.appendChild(title);
2021: 
2022:                 const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
2023:                 subtitle.textContent = `Hand: ${this.handScrolls.size}/${this.MAX_HAND_SIZE} | Active: ${this.activeScrolls.size}/${this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE}`;
2024:                 subtitle.className = 'si-subtitle';
2025:                 popup.appendChild(subtitle);
2026: 
2027:                 const closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
2028:                 closeBtn.textContent = '×';
2029:                 closeBtn.className = 'si-close';
2030:                 closeBtn.onclick = () => document.body.removeChild(popup);
2031:                 popup.appendChild(closeBtn);
2032: 
2033:                 const self = this;
2034: 
2035:                 // Helper to create a scroll card with move button
2036:                 const createScrollCard = (scrollName, scroll, element, location) => {
2037:                     const scrollDiv = document.createElement('div');
2038:                     scrollDiv.className = 'si-card' + (location === 'active' ? ' si-card-active' : '');
2039: 
2040:                     const headerRow = document.createElement('div');
2041:                     headerRow.className = 'si-card-header';
2042: 
2043:                     const nameDiv = document.createElement('div');
2044:                     nameDiv.textContent = scroll.name;
2045:                     nameDiv.className = 'si-card-name';
2046:                     headerRow.appendChild(nameDiv);
2047: 
2048:                     const canModify = !isMultiplayer || (myPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex);
2049:                     if (canModify) {
2050:                         if (location === 'hand') {
2051:                             const moveBtn = document.createElement('button');
2052:                             moveBtn.textContent = 'To Active';
2053:                             moveBtn.className = 'si-btn si-btn-active-area';
2054:                             moveBtn.onclick = () => {
2055:                                 self.moveToActive(scrollName);
2056:                                 document.body.removeChild(popup);
2057:                                 self.showInventory();
2058:                             };
2059:                             headerRow.appendChild(moveBtn);
2060:                         }
2061: 
2062:                         const discardBtn = document.createElement('button');
2063:                         discardBtn.textContent = 'To Common';
2064:                         discardBtn.className = 'si-btn si-btn-common';
2065:                         discardBtn.onclick = () => {
2066:                             self.discardScroll(scrollName);
2067:                             document.body.removeChild(popup);
2068:                             self.showInventory();
2069:                         };
2070:                         headerRow.appendChild(discardBtn);
2071:                     }
2072: 
2073:                     scrollDiv.appendChild(headerRow);
2074: 
2075:                     const scrollDesc = document.createElement('div');
2076:                     scrollDesc.textContent = scroll.description;
2077:                     scrollDesc.className = 'si-card-desc';
2078:                     scrollDiv.appendChild(scrollDesc);
2079: 
2080:                     const patternVisual = this.createPatternVisual(scroll, element);
2081:                     scrollDiv.appendChild(patternVisual);
2082: 
2083:                     const patternInfo = document.createElement('div');
2084:                     patternInfo.className = 'si-pattern-box';
2085: 
2086:                     const patternTitle = document.createElement('div');
2087:                     patternTitle.textContent = 'Required Pattern (one of these):';
2088:                     patternTitle.className = 'si-pattern-title';
2089:                     patternInfo.appendChild(patternTitle);
2090: 
2091:                     const isCatacomb = element === 'catacomb';
2092:                     scroll.patterns.slice(0, 3).forEach((pattern, idx) => {
2093:                         const patternLine = document.createElement('div');
2094:                         const coords = isCatacomb
2095:                             ? pattern.map(pos => `${pos.type.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}(${pos.q},${pos.r})`).join(' + ')
2096:                             : pattern.map(pos => `(${pos.q},${pos.r})`).join(' + ');
2097:                         patternLine.textContent = `${idx + 1}. Stones at: ${coords}`;
2098:                         patternLine.className = 'si-pattern-line';
2099:                         patternInfo.appendChild(patternLine);
2100:                     });
2101: 
2102:                     if (scroll.patterns.length > 3) {
2103:                         const moreText = document.createElement('div');
2104:                         moreText.textContent = `... and ${scroll.patterns.length - 3} more rotations`;
2105:                         moreText.className = 'si-pattern-more';
2106:                         patternInfo.appendChild(moreText);
2107:                     }
2108: 
2109:                     scrollDiv.appendChild(patternInfo);
2110:                     return scrollDiv;
2111:                 };
2112: 
2113:                 // ACTIVE AREA SECTION
2114:                 const activeSection = document.createElement('div');
2115:                 activeSection.className = 'si-section si-active';
2116: 
2117:                 const activeHeader = document.createElement('h3');
2118:                 activeHeader.textContent = `Active Area (${this.activeScrolls.size}/${this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE}) - Visible to opponents`;
2119:                 activeHeader.className = 'si-section-header';
2120:                 activeSection.appendChild(activeHeader);
2121: 
2122:                 const activeScrollsList = Array.from(this.activeScrolls);
2123:                 if (activeScrollsList.length === 0) {
2124:                     const emptyMsg = document.createElement('div');
2125:                     emptyMsg.textContent = 'No scrolls in active area. Move scrolls here to prepare for activation.';
2126:                     emptyMsg.className = 'si-empty';
2127:                     activeSection.appendChild(emptyMsg);
2128:                 } else {
2129:                     activeScrollsList.forEach(scrollName => {
2130:                         const scroll = this.patterns[scrollName];
2131:                         const element = this.getScrollElement(scrollName);
2132:                         activeSection.appendChild(createScrollCard(scrollName, scroll, element, 'active'));
2133:                     });
2134:                 }
2135:                 popup.appendChild(activeSection);
2136: 
2137:                 // COMMON AREA SECTION
2138:                 const commonSection = document.createElement('div');
2139:                 commonSection.className = 'si-section si-common';
2140: 
2141:                 const commonAreaScrolls = this.getCommonAreaScrolls();
2142:                 const commonHeader = document.createElement('h3');
2143:                 commonHeader.textContent = `Common Area (${commonAreaScrolls.length}/6) - Shared`;
2144:                 commonHeader.className = 'si-section-header';
2145:                 commonSection.appendChild(commonHeader);
2146: 
2147:                 const commonSubtitle = document.createElement('div');
2148:                 commonSubtitle.textContent = 'Discarded scrolls go here. Any player can activate these on their turn.';
2149:                 commonSubtitle.className = 'si-common-note';
2150:                 commonSection.appendChild(commonSubtitle);
2151: 
2152:                 if (commonAreaScrolls.length === 0) {
2153:                     const emptyMsg = document.createElement('div');
2154:                     emptyMsg.textContent = 'No scrolls in common area yet. Discarded scrolls will appear here.';
2155:                     emptyMsg.className = 'si-empty';
2156:                     commonSection.appendChild(emptyMsg);
2157:                 } else {
2158:                     const elementTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'];
2159:                     elementTypes.forEach(element => {
2160:                         if (this.commonArea[element]) {
2161:                             const scrollName = this.commonArea[element];
2162:                             const scroll = this.patterns[scrollName];
2163: 
2164:                             const scrollDiv = document.createElement('div');
2165:                             scrollDiv.className = 'si-common-item';
2166: 
2167:                             const color = element === 'catacomb' ? '#9b59b6' : STONE_TYPES[element].color;
2168:                             const iconHTML = `<img src="${STONE_TYPES[element].img}" class="element-icon-sm" alt="${element}" style="vertical-align:middle;">`;
2169: 
2170:                             const nameDiv = document.createElement('div');
2171:                             nameDiv.innerHTML = `<span style="color:${color}">${iconHTML}</span> ${scroll.name}`;
2172:                             nameDiv.className = 'si-common-item-name';
2173:                             scrollDiv.appendChild(nameDiv);
2174: 
2175:                             const descDiv = document.createElement('div');
2176:                             descDiv.textContent = scroll.description;
2177:                             descDiv.className = 'si-common-item-desc';
2178:                             scrollDiv.appendChild(descDiv);
2179: 
2180:                             if (scroll.patterns) {
2181:                                 const patternVisual = this.createPatternVisual(scroll, element);
2182:                                 scrollDiv.appendChild(patternVisual);
2183:                             }
2184: 
2185:                             commonSection.appendChild(scrollDiv);
2186:                         }
2187:                     });
2188:                 }
2189:                 popup.appendChild(commonSection);
2190: 
2191:                 // HAND SECTION
2192:                 const handSection = document.createElement('div');
2193:                 handSection.className = 'si-section si-hand';
2194: 
2195:                 const handHeader = document.createElement('h3');
2196:                 handHeader.textContent = `Hand (${this.handScrolls.size}/${this.MAX_HAND_SIZE}) - Private`;
2197:                 handHeader.className = 'si-section-header';
2198:                 handSection.appendChild(handHeader);
2199: 
2200:                 const handScrollsList = Array.from(this.handScrolls);
2201:                 if (handScrollsList.length === 0) {
2202:                     const emptyMsg = document.createElement('div');
2203:                     emptyMsg.textContent = 'No scrolls in hand. Reveal shrine tiles to collect scrolls!';
2204:                     emptyMsg.className = 'si-empty';
2205:                     handSection.appendChild(emptyMsg);
2206:                 } else {
2207:                     const elementTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'];
2208:                     elementTypes.forEach(element => {
2209:                         const elementScrolls = handScrollsList.filter(s => this.getScrollElement(s) === element);
2210:                         if (elementScrolls.length > 0) {
2211:                             const elementLabel = document.createElement('div');
2212:                             const color = element === 'catacomb' ? '#9b59b6' : STONE_TYPES[element].color;
2213:                             const iconHTML = `<img src="${STONE_TYPES[element].img}" class="element-icon-sm" alt="${element}" style="vertical-align:middle;">`;
2214:                             elementLabel.innerHTML = `<span style="color:${color}">${iconHTML} ${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)}</span>`;
2215:                             elementLabel.className = 'si-element-label';
2216:                             handSection.appendChild(elementLabel);
2217: 
2218:                             elementScrolls.forEach(scrollName => {
2219:                                 const scroll = this.patterns[scrollName];
2220:                                 handSection.appendChild(createScrollCard(scrollName, scroll, element, 'hand'));
2221:                             });
2222:                         }
2223:                     });
2224:                 }
2225:                 popup.appendChild(handSection);
2226: 
2227:                 const infoText = document.createElement('div');
2228:                 infoText.innerHTML = '<strong>Tip:</strong> Move scrolls from Hand to Active Area (0 AP) to prepare for casting. Scrolls in Active Area stay there after casting. Scrolls cannot be moved back to Hand — discard to Common Area instead. Common Area scrolls are shared (max 1 per element).';
2229:                 infoText.className = 'si-tip';
2230:                 popup.appendChild(infoText);
2231: 
2232:                 document.body.appendChild(popup);
2233:             }
2234: 
2235:             updateScrollCount() {
2236:                 const total = this.handScrolls.size + this.activeScrolls.size;
2237:                 const scrollCountEl = document.getElementById('scroll-count');
2238:                 if (scrollCountEl) scrollCountEl.textContent = total;
2239: 
2240:                 // Update HUD (safely - may not be ready during initialization)
2241:                 try {
2242:                     if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
2243:                 } catch (e) {
2244:                     // Ignore - HUD not ready yet
2245:                 }
2246: 
2247:                 // Update scroll deck UI (safely)
2248:                 try {

2362:         // Mobile detection and touch support

2364:         let mobileUIInitialized = false;
2365:         function computeIsMobile() {
2366:             return (/Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent)
2367:                 || window.matchMedia('(max-width: 768px)').matches
2368:                 || (navigator.maxTouchPoints && navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0)
2369:                 || window.matchMedia('(pointer: coarse)').matches);
2370:         }
2371:         function updateIsMobile() {
2372:             const next = computeIsMobile();
2373:             if (next === isMobile && mobileUIInitialized) return;
2374:             isMobile = next;

2376:             // Initialize mobile UI once when we enter mobile mode
2377:             if (isMobile && !mobileUIInitialized) {

2402:         // Helper function to get event coordinates (works for both mouse and touch)
2403:         function getEventCoords(e) {
2404:             if (e.touches && e.touches.length > 0) {
2405:                 return { x: e.touches[0].clientX, y: e.touches[0].clientY };
2406:             }
2407:             return { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY };
2408:         }
2409: 
2410:         // Calculate angle between two touch points
2411:         function getTouchAngle(touch1, touch2) {
2412:             const dx = touch2.clientX - touch1.clientX;
2413:             const dy = touch2.clientY - touch1.clientY;
2414:             return Math.atan2(dy, dx) * (180 / Math.PI);
2415:         }
2416: 
2417:         // Snap angle to nearest 60 degrees (6 positions for hexagon)
2418:         function snapToHexRotation(degrees) {
2419:             const step = 60;
2420:             return Math.round(degrees / step) % 6;
2421:         }

2423:         function updateVoidAP() {
2424:             // Void AP display only — does NOT increase voidAP beyond current value.
2425:             // New void stones load as "spent" so they don't grant extra AP mid-turn.
2426:             // voidAP can only decrease here (if stones were lost/broken).
2427:             const oldVoidAP = voidAP;
2428:             const poolVoid = playerPool.void;
2429:             if (voidAP > poolVoid) {
2430:                 // Stones were lost — clamp voidAP down
2431:                 voidAP = poolVoid;
2432:             }
2433:             // Otherwise leave voidAP as-is (new stones are "spent" until next turn)
2434:             console.log(`📄 updateVoidAP: ${oldVoidAP} → ${voidAP} (pool=${poolVoid})`);
2435:             const display = document.getElementById('void-ap-display');
2436:             if (display) {
2437:                 if (voidAP > 0) {
2438:                     display.textContent = `(+${voidAP} Void AP)`;
2439:                     display.style.display = 'inline';
2440:                 } else {
2441:                     display.style.display = 'none';
2442:                 }
2443:             }
2444: 
2445:             // Update HUD
2446:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
2447:         }
2448: 
2449:         // Refresh void AP to match pool — called only at turn start
2450:         function refreshVoidAP() {
2451:             voidAP = playerPool.void;
2452:             console.log(`🔄 refreshVoidAP: voidAP set to ${voidAP} (pool=${playerPool.void})`);
2453:             const display = document.getElementById('void-ap-display');
2454:             if (display) {
2455:                 if (voidAP > 0) {
2456:                     display.textContent = `(+${voidAP} Void AP)`;
2457:                     display.style.display = 'inline';
2458:                 } else {
2459:                     display.style.display = 'none';
2460:                 }
2461:             }
2462:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
2463:         }
2464: 
2465:         function getTotalAP() {
2466:             return currentAP + voidAP;
2467:         }
2468: 
2469:         function spendAP(cost) {
2470:             console.log(`⚡ spendAP called: cost=${cost}, before: voidAP=${voidAP}, currentAP=${currentAP}`);
2471:             // Spend void AP first, then regular AP
2472:             if (voidAP >= cost) {
2473:                 voidAP -= cost;
2474:             } else {
2475:                 const remainingCost = cost - voidAP;
2476:                 voidAP = 0;
2477:                 currentAP -= remainingCost;
2478:             }
2479:             console.log(`⚡ spendAP after: voidAP=${voidAP}, currentAP=${currentAP}, total=${getTotalAP()}`);
2480:             const apCountEl = document.getElementById('ap-count');
2481:             if (apCountEl) apCountEl.textContent = currentAP;
2482: 
2483:             // Update void AP display (but don't reset from pool - that would undo the spend!)
2484:             const display = document.getElementById('void-ap-display');
2485:             if (display) {
2486:                 if (voidAP > 0) {
2487:                     display.textContent = `(+${voidAP} Void AP)`;
2488:                     display.style.display = 'inline';
2489:                 } else {
2490:                     display.style.display = 'none';
2491:                 }
2492:             }
2493: 
2494:             // Update HUD
2495:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
2496: 
2497:             // Sync AP state in multiplayer
2498:             syncPlayerState();
2499: 
2500:             // Prompt to end turn if out of AP (only on active player's turn)
2501:             try {
2502:                 const canPrompt = (typeof isMyTurn === 'function') ? isMyTurn() : true;
2503:                 if (canPrompt && (typeof isPlacementPhase === 'undefined' || !isPlacementPhase) && getTotalAP() === 0) {
2504:                     if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof window.showEndTurnPrompt === 'function') {
2505:                         window.showEndTurnPrompt();
2506:                     }
2507:                 }
2508:             } catch (e) {}
2509:         }
2510: 
2511:         function addAP(amount) {
2512:             if (amount <= 0) return;
2513:             const maxAP = 5;
2514:             const roomInCurrent = maxAP - currentAP;
2515:             const addToCurrent = Math.min(amount, roomInCurrent);
2516:             currentAP += addToCurrent;
2517:             const overflow = amount - addToCurrent;
2518:             // Overflow can only recharge void AP if the player has void stones (void AP cap = playerPool.void)
2519:             if (overflow > 0 && typeof playerPool !== 'undefined' && playerPool.void > 0) {
2520:                 const maxVoidAP = playerPool.void;
2521:                 const addToVoid = Math.min(overflow, maxVoidAP - voidAP);
2522:                 if (addToVoid > 0) voidAP += addToVoid;
2523:             }
2524:             const apCountEl = document.getElementById('ap-count');
2525:             if (apCountEl) apCountEl.textContent = currentAP;
2526:             const voidDisplay = document.getElementById('void-ap-display');
2527:             if (voidDisplay) {
2528:                 if (voidAP > 0) {
2529:                     voidDisplay.textContent = `(+${voidAP} Void AP)`;
2530:                     voidDisplay.style.display = 'inline';
2531:                 } else {
2532:                     voidDisplay.style.display = 'none';
2533:                 }
2534:             }
2535:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
2536:             if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
2537:         }
2538:         if (typeof window !== 'undefined') window.addAP = addAP;
2539: 
2540:         function canAfford(cost) {
2541:             return getTotalAP() >= cost;
2542:         }
2543: 
2544:         function attemptBreakStone(stoneId) {
2545:             const stone = placedStones.find(s => s.id === stoneId);
2546:             if (!stone) {
2547:                 console.log('❌ Stone not found');
2548:                 return;
2549:             }
2550: 
2551:             console.log(`🔨 attemptBreakStone called for stone id=${stoneId}, type=${stone.type}, position=(${stone.x.toFixed(1)}, ${stone.y.toFixed(1)})`);
2552: 
2553:             // Check if stone is adjacent to player
2554:             if (!playerPosition) {
2555:                 updateStatus('No player on board!');
2556:                 console.log('❌ No player on board!');
2557:                 return;
2558:             }
2559: 
2560:             const isAdj = isAdjacentToPlayer(stone.x, stone.y);
2561:             console.log(`🔨 Adjacency check: ${isAdj}`);
2562:             
2563:             if (!isAdj) {
2564:                 updateStatus('Stone must be adjacent to player to break!');
2565:                 console.log('❌ Stone must be adjacent to player to break!');
2566:                 return;
2567:             }
2568: 
2569:             // Calculate break cost based on stone rank
2570:             const STONE_RANK = {
2571:                 'void': 1,
2572:                 'wind': 2,
2573:                 'fire': 3,
2574:                 'water': 4,
2575:                 'earth': 5
2576:             };
2577: 
2578:             const breakCost = STONE_RANK[stone.type];
2579: 
2580:             if (!canAfford(breakCost)) {
2581:                 updateStatus(`Not enough AP! Need ${breakCost} AP to break ${stone.type} stone (have ${getTotalAP()} AP)`);
2582:                 return;
2583:             }
2584: 
2585:             // Break the stone
2586:             spendAP(breakCost);
2587: 
2588:             // Broadcast stone break to other players
2589:             if (isMultiplayer) {
2590:                 broadcastGameAction('stone-break', {
2591:                     stoneId: stoneId
2592:                 });
2593:             }
2594: 
2595:             // Remove stone from board
2596:             const stoneElement = stone.element;
2597:             if (stoneElement && stoneElement.parentNode) {
2598:                 stoneElement.remove();
2599:             }
2600: 
2601:             // Remove from placedStones array
2602:             const index = placedStones.findIndex(s => s.id === stoneId);
2603:             if (index !== -1) {
2604:                 placedStones.splice(index, 1);
2605:             }
2606: 
2607:             // Tutorial hook — fires after stone confirmed removed
2608:             if (window.isTutorialMode && window.TutorialMode?.onStoneBroken) {
2609:                 window.TutorialMode.onStoneBroken(stone.type, stone.x, stone.y);
2610:             }
2611: 
2612:             // Return stone to source pool
2613:             returnStoneToPool(stone.type);
2614: 
2615:             // Update interactions since a stone was removed
2616:             updateTileClasses();
2617:             recheckAllStoneInteractions();
2618:             updateAllWaterStoneVisuals();
2619:             updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals();
2620: 
2621:             updateStatus(`Broke ${stone.type} stone! Cost: ${breakCost} AP (${getTotalAP()} AP remaining)`);
2622:             console.log(`🔨 Broke ${stone.type} stone (id=${stoneId}), cost=${breakCost} AP`);
2623:         }
2624: 
2625:         let isDraggingTile = false;
2626:         let isDraggingStone = false;
2627:         let draggedTileId = null;
2628:         let draggedTileRotation = 0;
2629:         let draggedTileFlipped = false;
2630:         let draggedTileShrineType = null;

2640: 
2641:         // Telekinesis state — set by Void Scroll III to track tile moves
2642:         // { active: true, movesLeft: 3, maxMoves: 3, casterIndex: N, movedTiles: [] }
2643:         window.telekinesisState = null;
