2645: 
2646:         // Tile deck - 4 of each shrine type (24 tiles total for 1 player)
2647:         let tileDeck = [];
2648:         let deckIndex = 0;
2649:         let deckSeed = null; // Shared seed for multiplayer deck synchronization
2650: 
2651:         // Player tile deck
2652:         let playerTilesAvailable = 0;
2653:         let playerTileElements = [];
2654: 
2655:         // Seeded random number generator (Mulberry32)
2656:         // This ensures all players get the same shuffle with the same seed
2657:         function seededRandom(seed) {
2658:             return function() {
2659:                 let t = seed += 0x6D2B79F5;
2660:                 t = Math.imul(t ^ t >>> 15, t | 1);
2661:                 t ^= t + Math.imul(t ^ t >>> 7, t | 61);
2662:                 return ((t ^ t >>> 14) >>> 0) / 4294967296;
2663:             };
2664:         }
2665: 
2666:         function initializeDeck(numPlayers = 1, seed = null) {
2667:             // Tutorial mode: use a fixed deck order so earth lands at the center position
2668:             if (window.tutorialDeckOverride) {
2669:                 tileDeck = [...window.tutorialDeckOverride];
2670:                 window.tutorialDeckOverride = null;
2671:                 deckIndex = 0;
2672:                 const countEl = document.getElementById('deck-count');
2673:                 if (countEl) countEl.textContent = `0/${tileDeck.length}`;
2674:                 console.log('🎓 Tutorial deck applied:', tileDeck.join(', '));
2675:                 return;
2676:             }
2677: 
2678:             const shrineTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'];
2679:             const tilesPerType = numPlayers; // 1 of each type per player
2680: 
2681:             tileDeck = [];
2682: 
2683:             shrineTypes.forEach(type => {
2684:                 for (let i = 0; i < tilesPerType; i++) {
2685:                     tileDeck.push(type);
2686:                 }
2687:             });
2688: 
2689:             // Use seeded shuffle if seed provided (multiplayer), otherwise random
2690:             if (seed !== null) {
2691:                 deckSeed = seed;
2692:                 const rng = seededRandom(seed);
2693:                 // Seeded Fisher-Yates shuffle
2694:                 for (let i = tileDeck.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
2695:                     const j = Math.floor(rng() * (i + 1));
2696:                     [tileDeck[i], tileDeck[j]] = [tileDeck[j], tileDeck[i]];
2697:                 }
2698:                 console.log(`🎴 Deck initialized with seed ${seed}:`, tileDeck.join(', '));
2699:             } else {
2700:                 // Random shuffle for single player
2701:                 for (let i = tileDeck.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
2702:                     const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
2703:                     [tileDeck[i], tileDeck[j]] = [tileDeck[j], tileDeck[i]];
2704:                 }
2705:                 console.log(`🎴 Deck initialized (random):`, tileDeck.join(', '));
2706:             }
2707: 
2708:             deckIndex = 0;
2709:         }
2710: 
2711:         function drawNextTileFromDeck() {
2712:             if (deckIndex >= tileDeck.length) {
2713:                 updateStatus('No more tiles in deck!');
2714:                 return null;
2715:             }
2716:             const shrineType = tileDeck[deckIndex];
2717:             deckIndex++;
2718:             document.getElementById('deck-count').textContent = `${deckIndex}/${tileDeck.length}`;
2719:             updateStatus(`Drew ${shrineType} tile (${deckIndex}/${tileDeck.length} used)`);
2720:             return shrineType;
2721:         }
2722: 
2723:         let viewportX = 0;
2724:         let viewportY = 0;
2725:         let viewportScale = 1;
2726:         let viewportRotation = 0;
2727:         let isPanning = false;
2728:         let panStartX = 0;
2729:         let panStartY = 0;
2730:         let lastPanX = 0;
2731:         let lastPanY = 0;
2732:         let isRotatingBoard = false;
2733:         let rotateStartX = 0;
2734:         let rotateStartRotation = 0;
2735:         let isRotatingTile = false;
2736:         let rotateTileStartX = 0;
2737:         let rotateTileStartRotation = 0;
2738:         let leftButtonDown = false;
2739:         let rightButtonDown = false;
2740: 
2741:         function updateViewport() {
2742:             const centerX = boardSvg.clientWidth / 2;
2743:             const centerY = boardSvg.clientHeight / 2;
2744:             viewport.setAttribute('transform',
2745:                 `translate(${centerX}, ${centerY}) rotate(${viewportRotation}) translate(${viewportX - centerX}, ${viewportY - centerY}) scale(${viewportScale})`);
2746:         }
2747: 
2748:         // Fit all placed tiles into view, centered
2749:         function fitBoardToView() {
2750:             if (placedTiles.length === 0) return;
2751: 
2752:             // Calculate bounding box of all tiles
2753:             let minX = Infinity, maxX = -Infinity;
2754:             let minY = Infinity, maxY = -Infinity;
2755: 
2756:             placedTiles.forEach(tile => {
2757:                 // Each tile is roughly TILE_SIZE * 2.5 in radius
2758:                 const tileRadius = TILE_SIZE * 2.5;
2759:                 minX = Math.min(minX, tile.x - tileRadius);
2760:                 maxX = Math.max(maxX, tile.x + tileRadius);
2761:                 minY = Math.min(minY, tile.y - tileRadius);
2762:                 maxY = Math.max(maxY, tile.y + tileRadius);
2763:             });
2764: 
2765:             const boardWidth = maxX - minX;
2766:             const boardHeight = maxY - minY;
2767:             const boardCenterX = (minX + maxX) / 2;
2768:             const boardCenterY = (minY + maxY) / 2;
2769: 
2770:             // Get available screen space
2771:             const svgRect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
2772:             const screenWidth = svgRect.width;
2773:             const screenHeight = svgRect.height;
2774: 
2775:             // Add padding (10% on each side)
2776:             const paddingFactor = 0.8;
2777:             const scaleX = (screenWidth * paddingFactor) / boardWidth;
2778:             const scaleY = (screenHeight * paddingFactor) / boardHeight;
2779:             const newScale = Math.min(scaleX, scaleY, 2); // Cap at 2x zoom
2780: 
2781:             // Center the board
2782:             const screenCenterX = screenWidth / 2;
2783:             const screenCenterY = screenHeight / 2;
2784: 
2785:             viewportScale = newScale;
2786:             viewportX = screenCenterX - boardCenterX * newScale;
2787:             viewportY = screenCenterY - boardCenterY * newScale;
2788: 
2789:             console.log(`📐 fitBoardToView: board=(${boardWidth.toFixed(0)}x${boardHeight.toFixed(0)}), screen=(${screenWidth.toFixed(0)}x${screenHeight.toFixed(0)}), scale=${newScale.toFixed(2)}`);
2790: 
2791:             updateViewport();
2792:         }
2793: 
2794:         function screenToWorld(screenX, screenY) {
2795:             const centerX = boardSvg.clientWidth / 2;
2796:             const centerY = boardSvg.clientHeight / 2;
2797:             let x = screenX - centerX;
2798:             let y = screenY - centerY;
2799:             const rad = -viewportRotation * Math.PI / 180;
2800:             const cos = Math.cos(rad);
2801:             const sin = Math.sin(rad);
2802:             const rotatedX = x * cos - y * sin;
2803:             const rotatedY = x * sin + y * cos;
2804:             const scaledX = rotatedX / viewportScale;
2805:             const scaledY = rotatedY / viewportScale;
2806:             const worldX = scaledX - (viewportX - centerX) / viewportScale;
2807:             const worldY = scaledY - (viewportY - centerY) / viewportScale;
2808:             return { x: worldX, y: worldY };
2809:         }
2810: 
2811:         function hexToPixel(q, r, s) {
2812:             const width = s * Math.sqrt(3);
2813:             const height = 2 * s;
2814:             const x = width * (q + r / 2);
2815:             const y = height * (3/4) * r;
2816:             return { x, y };
2817:         }
2818: 
2819:         function pixelToHex(x, y, s) {
2820:             const q = (x * Math.sqrt(3)/3 - y / 3) / s;
2821:             const r = (y * 2/3) / s;
2822:             return hexRound(q, r);
2823:         }
2824: 
2825:         function hexRound(q, r) {
2826:             let s = -q - r;
2827:             let rq = Math.round(q);
2828:             let rr = Math.round(r);
2829:             let rs = Math.round(s);
2830:             const qDiff = Math.abs(rq - q);
2831:             const rDiff = Math.abs(rr - r);
2832:             const sDiff = Math.abs(rs - s);
2833:             if (qDiff > rDiff && qDiff > sDiff) rq = -rr - rs;
2834:             else if (rDiff > sDiff) rr = -rq - rs;
2835:             return { q: rq, r: rr };
2836:         }
2837: 
2838:         function createHexagonPoints(cx, cy, s) {
2839:             const points = [];
2840:             for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
2841:                 const angle = (Math.PI / 3) * i - Math.PI / 6;
2842:                 const x = cx + s * Math.cos(angle);
2843:                 const y = cy + s * Math.sin(angle);
2844:                 points.push(`${x},${y}`);
2845:             }
2846:             return points.join(' ');
2847:         }
2848: 
2849:         function createTrapezoidPoints(cx, cy, s, direction) {
2850:             const hexVertices = [];
2851:             for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
2852:                 const angle = (Math.PI / 3) * i - Math.PI / 6;
2853:                 hexVertices.push({
2854:                     x: cx + s * Math.cos(angle),
2855:                     y: cy + s * Math.sin(angle)
2856:                 });
2857:             }
2858:             const indices = [
2859:                 [1, 2, 3, 4], [2, 3, 4, 5], [3, 4, 5, 0],
2860:                 [4, 5, 0, 1], [5, 0, 1, 2], [0, 1, 2, 3]
2861:             ][direction];
2862:             return indices.map(idx => `${hexVertices[idx].x},${hexVertices[idx].y}`).join(' ');
2863:         }
2864: 
2865:         function createTileGroup(s, rotation = 0, flipped = false) {
2866:             const g = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
2867:             g.setAttribute('transform', `rotate(${rotation * 60})`);
2868: 
2869:             if (flipped) {
2870:                 // Flipped side: only outer ring of hexagons + trapezoids (no center, no inner ring)
2871:                 const hexagons = [
2872:                     { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 2 },
2873:                     { q: -2, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -2 }
2874:                 ];
2875: 
2876:                 hexagons.forEach(hex => {
2877:                     const pos = hexToPixel(hex.q, hex.r, s);
2878:                     const points = createHexagonPoints(pos.x, pos.y, s);
2879:                     const polygon = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
2880:                     polygon.setAttribute('points', points);
2881:                     polygon.setAttribute('class', 'hex-tile flipped');
2882:                     g.appendChild(polygon);
2883:                 });
2884: 
2885:                 const trapezoids = [
2886:                     { q: 2, r: 0, dir: 1 }, { q: 0, r: 2, dir: 2 },
2887:                     { q: -2, r: 2, dir: 3 }, { q: -2, r: 0, dir: 4 },
2888:                     { q: 0, r: -2, dir: 5 }, { q: 2, r: -2, dir: 0 }
2889:                 ];
2890: 
2891:                 trapezoids.forEach(trap => {
2892:                     const pos = hexToPixel(trap.q, trap.r, s);
2893:                     const points = createTrapezoidPoints(pos.x, pos.y, s, trap.dir);
2894:                     const polygon = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
2895:                     polygon.setAttribute('points', points);
2896:                     polygon.setAttribute('class', 'hex-tile trapezoid flipped');
2897:                     g.appendChild(polygon);
2898:                 });
2899: 
2900:                 // Add empty center hex for visual reference (no fill)
2901:                 const centerPos = hexToPixel(0, 0, s);
2902:                 const centerPoints = createHexagonPoints(centerPos.x, centerPos.y, s);
2903:                 const centerPolygon = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
2904:                 centerPolygon.setAttribute('points', centerPoints);
2905:                 centerPolygon.setAttribute('class', 'hex-tile empty-center');
2906:                 g.appendChild(centerPolygon);
2907:             } else {
2908:                 // Normal side: all hexagons
2909:                 const hexagons = [
2910:                     { q: 0, r: 0, class: 'center-hex' },
2911:                     { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 },
2912:                     { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -1 },
2913:                     { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 2 },
2914:                     { q: -2, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -2 }
2915:                 ];
2916: 
2917:                 hexagons.forEach(hex => {
2918:                     const pos = hexToPixel(hex.q, hex.r, s);
2919:                     const points = createHexagonPoints(pos.x, pos.y, s);
2920:                     const polygon = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
2921:                     polygon.setAttribute('points', points);
2922:                     polygon.setAttribute('class', `hex-tile ${hex.class || ''}`);
2923:                     g.appendChild(polygon);
2924:                 });
2925: 
2926:                 const trapezoids = [
2927:                     { q: 2, r: 0, dir: 1 }, { q: 0, r: 2, dir: 2 },
2928:                     { q: -2, r: 2, dir: 3 }, { q: -2, r: 0, dir: 4 },
2929:                     { q: 0, r: -2, dir: 5 }, { q: 2, r: -2, dir: 0 }
2930:                 ];
2931: 
2932:                 trapezoids.forEach(trap => {
2933:                     const pos = hexToPixel(trap.q, trap.r, s);
2934:                     const points = createTrapezoidPoints(pos.x, pos.y, s, trap.dir);
2935:                     const polygon = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
2936:                     polygon.setAttribute('points', points);
2937:                     polygon.setAttribute('class', 'hex-tile trapezoid');
2938:                     g.appendChild(polygon);
2939:                 });
2940:             }
2941: 
2942:             return g;
2943:         }
2944: 
2945:         function drawDeckTile() {
2946:             deckTileSvg.innerHTML = '';
2947:             const tile = createTileGroup(6, currentRotation, currentFlipped);
2948:             tile.setAttribute('transform', 'translate(75, 75)');
2949:             deckTileSvg.appendChild(tile);
2950:         }

2952:         function initializePlayerTiles(numPlayers) {
2953:             const playerTileDeck = document.getElementById('new-player-tile-deck') || document.getElementById('player-tile-deck');
2954:             playerTileDeck.innerHTML = '';
2955:             playerTileElements = [];
2956:             playerTilesAvailable = numPlayers;
2957:             const countEl = document.getElementById('new-player-tile-count') || document.getElementById('player-tile-count');
2958:             if (countEl) countEl.textContent = numPlayers;
2959: 
2960:             for (let i = 0; i < numPlayers; i++) {
2961:                 const svg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'svg');
2962:                 svg.setAttribute('width', '150');
2963:                 svg.setAttribute('height', '150');
2964:                 svg.setAttribute('class', 'deck-tile player-tile-deck-item');
2965:                 svg.setAttribute('data-player-index', i);
2966: 
2967:                 const tile = createTileGroup(6, 0, false); // Player tiles are not flipped
2968:                 tile.setAttribute('transform', 'translate(75, 75)');
2969:                 svg.appendChild(tile);
2970: 
2971:                 playerTileDeck.appendChild(svg);
2972:                 playerTileElements.push(svg);
2973: 
2974:                 // Add mousedown event for dragging
2975:                 svg.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
2976:                     if (playerTilesAvailable <= 0) return;
2977:                     if (e.button === 0) {
2978:                         startPlayerTileDrag(i, e);
2979:                     }
2980:                 });
2981: 
2982:                 // Add touch support for mobile
2983:                 svg.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
2984:                     if (playerTilesAvailable <= 0) return;
2985:                     e.preventDefault();
2986:                     startPlayerTileDrag(i, e);
2987:                 }, { passive: false });
2988:             }
2989:             if (isMobile) syncMobileTileDeck();
2990: 
2991:         }

2993:         // Initialize a single player tile for multiplayer (only MY tile)
2994:         function initializeMyPlayerTile(playerIndex, color) {

2996:             playerTileDeck.innerHTML = '';
2997:             playerTileElements = [];

2999:             const countEl = document.getElementById('new-player-tile-count') || document.getElementById('player-tile-count');
3000:             if (countEl) countEl.textContent = '1';
3001: 
3002:             const svg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'svg');
3003:             svg.setAttribute('width', '150');
3004:             svg.setAttribute('height', '150');
3005:             svg.setAttribute('class', 'deck-tile player-tile-deck-item');
3006:             svg.setAttribute('data-player-index', playerIndex);
3007: 
3008:             const tile = createTileGroup(6, 0, false);
3009:             tile.setAttribute('transform', 'translate(75, 75)');
3010:             svg.appendChild(tile);
3011:

3014:             colorCircle.setAttribute('cx', '75');

3016:             colorCircle.setAttribute('r', '12');

3020:             svg.appendChild(colorCircle);
3021:

3023:             playerTileElements.push(svg);
3024:

3026:             svg.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
3027:                 if (playerTilesAvailable <= 0) return;
3028:                 // Placement tiles can only be dragged during the placement phase
3029:                 if (!isPlacementPhase) return;
3030:                 // In multiplayer, only allow drag if it's your turn to place
3031:                 if (isMultiplayer && !canPlaceTile()) {
3032:                     notYourTurn();
3033:                     return;
3034:                 }
3035:                 if (e.button === 0) {
3036:                     startPlayerTileDrag(playerIndex, e);
3037:                 }
3038:             });
3039: 
3040:             // Add touch support for mobile
3041:             svg.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
3042:                 if (playerTilesAvailable <= 0) return;
3043:                 if (!isPlacementPhase) return;
3044:                 if (isMultiplayer && !canPlaceTile()) {
3045:                     notYourTurn();
3046:                     return;
3047:                 }
3048:                 e.preventDefault();
3049:                 startPlayerTileDrag(playerIndex, e);
3050:             }, { passive: false });
3051:             if (isMobile) syncMobileTileDeck();
3052: 
3053:         }
3054: 
3055:         function startPlayerTileDrag(playerIndex, e) {
3056:             isDraggingTile = true;
3057:             draggedTileId = null;
3058:             draggedTileRotation = 0;
3059:             draggedTileFlipped = false;
3060:             draggedTileShrineType = 'player'; // Mark as player tile
3061:             draggedTileOriginalPos = null;
3062: 
3063:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
3064:             const coords = getEventCoords(e);
3065:             const screenX = coords.x - rect.left;
3066:             const screenY = coords.y - rect.top;
3067:             const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
3068: 
3069:             ghostTile = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
3070:             ghostTile.setAttribute('class', 'ghost-tile');
3071:             ghostTile.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
3072:             const tile = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, 0, false);
3073:             ghostTile.appendChild(tile);
3074:             viewport.appendChild(ghostTile);
3075:         }
3076: 
3077:         function getAllHexagonPositions() {
3078:             const positions = new Map();
3079:             const trapezoidMap = new Map();
3080: 
3081:             placedTiles.forEach(tile => {
3082:                 const s = TILE_SIZE;
3083: 
3084:                 // For flipped tiles, only include outer ring hexagons
3085:                 // For normal tiles and player tiles, include all hexagons
3086:                 // Player tiles look revealed but allow walking off them
3087:                 let hexagons;
3088:                 if (tile.flipped && !tile.isPlayerTile) {
3089:                     hexagons = [
3090:                         { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 2 },
3091:                         { q: -2, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -2 }
3092:                     ];
3093:                 } else {
3094:                     hexagons = [
3095:                         { q: 0, r: 0 },
3096:                         { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 },
3097:                         { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -1 },
3098:                         { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 2 },
3099:                         { q: -2, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -2 }
3100:                     ];
3101:                 }
3102: 
3103:                 hexagons.forEach(hex => {
3104:                     const localPos = hexToPixel(hex.q, hex.r, s);
3105:                     const globalX = tile.x + localPos.x;
3106:                     const globalY = tile.y + localPos.y;
3107:                     const roundedX = Math.round(globalX * 100) / 100;
3108:                     const roundedY = Math.round(globalY * 100) / 100;
3109:                     const key = `${roundedX},${roundedY}`;
3110:                     if (!positions.has(key)) {
3111:                         positions.set(key, { x: globalX, y: globalY, key, tiles: [tile] });
3112:                     } else {
3113:                         // Track which tiles contribute to this position
3114:                         const existing = positions.get(key);
3115:                         if (!existing.tiles.includes(tile)) {
3116:                             existing.tiles.push(tile);
3117:                         }
3118:                     }
3119:                 });
3120: 
3121:                 const trapezoids = [
3122:                     { q: 2, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 2 }, { q: -2, r: 2 },
3123:                     { q: -2, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: -2 }, { q: 2, r: -2 }
3124:                 ];
3125: 
3126:                 trapezoids.forEach(trap => {
3127:                     const localPos = hexToPixel(trap.q, trap.r, s);
3128:                     const globalX = tile.x + localPos.x;
3129:                     const globalY = tile.y + localPos.y;
3130:                     const roundedX = Math.round(globalX * 100) / 100;
3131:                     const roundedY = Math.round(globalY * 100) / 100;
3132:                     const key = `${roundedX},${roundedY}`;
3133:                     if (!trapezoidMap.has(key)) {
3134:                         trapezoidMap.set(key, { count: 1, x: globalX, y: globalY, key, tiles: [tile] });
3135:                     } else {
3136:                         const existing = trapezoidMap.get(key);
3137:                         existing.count += 1;
3138:                         if (!existing.tiles.includes(tile)) {
3139:                             existing.tiles.push(tile);
3140:                         }
3141:                         if (existing.count >= 2 && !positions.has(key)) {
3142:                             positions.set(key, { x: globalX, y: globalY, key, tiles: existing.tiles });
3143:                         }
3144:                     }
3145:                 });
3146:             });
3147: 
3148:             return Array.from(positions.values());
3149:         }
3150: 
3151:         function isPositionOnFlippedTile(x, y, hexPositions) {
3152:             // Find the hex position that matches this x,y
3153:             const matchingPos = hexPositions.find(pos => {
3154:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(pos.x - x, 2) + Math.pow(pos.y - y, 2));
3155:                 return dist < 5;
3156:             });
3157: 
3158:             if (!matchingPos || !matchingPos.tiles) return false;
3159: 
3160:             // Check if ANY of the tiles contributing to this position are flipped (and not player tile)
3161:             return matchingPos.tiles.some(tile => tile.flipped && !tile.isPlayerTile);
3162:         }
3163: 
3164:         function findValidStonePosition(x, y) {
3165:             const hexPositions = getAllHexagonPositions();
3166:             let nearest = null;
3167:             let minDist = Infinity;
3168: 
3169:             hexPositions.forEach(pos => {
3170:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(x - pos.x, 2) + Math.pow(y - pos.y, 2));
3171:                 if (dist < minDist) {
3172:                     minDist = dist;
3173:                     nearest = pos;
3174:                 }
3175:             });
3176: 
3177:             if (nearest && minDist < TILE_SIZE * 2) {
3178:                 const occupied = placedStones.some(stone => {
3179:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - nearest.x, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - nearest.y, 2));
3180:                     return dist < 5;
3181:                 });
3182: 
3183:                 // Block placement on any player (active or other players)
3184:                 let anyPlayerHere = false;
3185:                 if (playerPosition) {
3186:                     const d = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(playerPosition.x - nearest.x, 2) + Math.pow(playerPosition.y - nearest.y, 2));
3187:                     if (d < 5) anyPlayerHere = true;
3188:                 }
3189:                 if (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions.length) {
3190:                     playerPositions.forEach(pos => {
3191:                         if (pos && pos.x != null && pos.y != null) {
3192:                             const d = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(pos.x - nearest.x, 2) + Math.pow(pos.y - nearest.y, 2));
3193:                             if (d < 5) anyPlayerHere = true;
3194:                         }
3195:                     });
3196:                 }
3197: 
3198:                 const onFlippedTile = isPositionOnFlippedTile(nearest.x, nearest.y, hexPositions);
3199: 
3200:                 // Check if position is valid for placement based on active buffs
3201:                 const inPlacementRange = playerPosition && isInPlacementRange(nearest.x, nearest.y, draggedStoneType);
3202: 
3203:                 if (!occupied && !anyPlayerHere && !onFlippedTile && inPlacementRange) {
3204:                     return { x: nearest.x, y: nearest.y, valid: true };
3205:                 }
3206:             }
3207: 
3208:             return { x: x, y: y, valid: false };
3209:         }
3210: 
3211:         // Lightweight log throttling for noisy debug statements
3212:         const _debugLogTimes = {};
3213:         function shouldDebugLog(key, minIntervalMs = 250) {
3214:             if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.DEBUG_LOG_VERBOSE) return true;
3215:             const now = Date.now();
3216:             const last = _debugLogTimes[key] || 0;
3217:             if (now - last >= minIntervalMs) {
3218:                 _debugLogTimes[key] = now;
3219:                 return true;
3220:             }
3221:             return false;
3222:         }
3223:         if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
3224:             window.shouldDebugLog = shouldDebugLog;
3225:         }
3226: 
3227:         // Scroll event log buffer (low-noise timeline for debugging)
3228:         if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
3229:             window._scrollEventLog = window._scrollEventLog || [];
3230:             window.logScrollEvent = function logScrollEvent(type, details = {}) {
3231:                 const entry = {
3232:                     ts: new Date().toISOString(),
3233:                     type,
3234:                     details
3235:                 };
3236:                 window._scrollEventLog.push(entry);
3237:                 if (window._scrollEventLog.length > 200) {
3238:                     window._scrollEventLog.shift();
3239:                 }
3240:             };
3241:             window.dumpScrollEvents = function dumpScrollEvents() {
3242:                 const log = window._scrollEventLog || [];
3243:                 console.group(`📜 Scroll Event Log (${log.length} events)`);
3244:                 log.forEach((e, i) => {
3245:                     const time = new Date(e.ts).toLocaleTimeString();
3246:                     const type = e.type.padEnd(20);
3247:                     const details = JSON.stringify(e.details);
3248:                     console.log(`#${i + 1} [${time}] ${type} ${details}`);
3249:                 });
3250:                 console.groupEnd();
3251:             };
3252:

3256:                 console.log('📊 SCROLL DIAGNOSTICS');

3274:                         console.log(`  Active:  ${active.length ? active.join(', ') : '(empty)'}`);
3275:                         console.log(`  Win:     ${activated.length}/5 → ${activated.length ? activated.join(', ') : '(none)'}`);
3276:                     }
3277: 
3278:                     console.log('\n🏛️  COMMON AREA:\n');
3279:                     ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'].forEach(element => {
3280:                         const scrollName = spellSystem.commonArea?.[element];
3281:                         if (scrollName) {

3289:                         console.log(`  ${element}: ${count} scrolls remaining`);
3290:                     });
3291:                 }
3292:

3295:                 const recent = log.slice(-30);
3296: 
3297:                 console.log('\n📜 RECENT EVENTS (last 30):\n');
3298:                 recent.forEach((e) => {
3299:                     const time = new Date(e.ts).toLocaleTimeString();
3300:                     const icon = {
3301:                         'scroll_collected': '📥',

3310:                     }[e.type] || '•';

3450:                     const activeIdx  = typeof activePlayerIndex  !== 'undefined' ? activePlayerIndex  : null;
3451:                     const myIdx      = typeof myPlayerIndex      !== 'undefined' ? myPlayerIndex      : null;

3459:                         const p = ss.playerScrolls[idx];
3460:                         return {
3461:                             hand:      p.hand      ? Array.from(p.hand)      : [],
3462:                             active:    p.active    ? Array.from(p.active)    : [],
3463:                             activated: p.activated ? Array.from(p.activated) : []
3464:                         };
