3614:         function isAdjacentToPlayer(x, y) {
3615:             if (!playerPosition) return false;
3616: 
3617:             // Get hex coordinates for both positions
3618:             const playerHex = pixelToHex(playerPosition.x, playerPosition.y, TILE_SIZE);
3619:             const targetHex = pixelToHex(x, y, TILE_SIZE);
3620: 
3621:             // Calculate axial distance
3622:             const dq = Math.abs(playerHex.q - targetHex.q);
3623:             const dr = Math.abs(playerHex.r - targetHex.r);
3624:             const ds = Math.abs((-playerHex.q - playerHex.r) - (-targetHex.q - targetHex.r));
3625: 
3626:             // Adjacent means distance = 1 in hex coordinates
3627:             const hexDistance = Math.max(dq, dr, ds);
3628: 
3629:             const isAdj = hexDistance === 1;
3630:             if (shouldDebugLog('isAdjacentToPlayer', 500)) {
3631:                 console.log(`📍 isAdjacentToPlayer: player=(${playerHex.q},${playerHex.r}), target=(${targetHex.q},${targetHex.r}), distance=${hexDistance}, adjacent=${isAdj}`);
3632:             }
3633: 
3634:             return isAdj;
3635:         }
3636: 
3637:         // Check if a position is within valid stone placement range (considering buffs)
3638:         function isInPlacementRange(x, y, stoneType) {
3639:             if (!playerPosition) return false;
3640: 
3641:             // Get current player index (use activePlayerIndex in single player, myPlayerIndex in multiplayer)
3642:             const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null) ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
3643: 
3644:             // Check for global placement buff (Avalanche - any stone anywhere)
3645:             if (spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasGlobalPlacement(currentPlayerIdx)) {
3646:                 console.log(`ℹ️ Global placement active - allowing stone at any position`);
3647:                 return true;
3648:             }
3649: 
3650:             // Seed the Skies: allow water/wind stones anywhere this turn
3651:             if (stoneType && spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
3652:                 const buff = spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs?.waterWindGlobalPlacement;
3653:                 if (buff && buff.playerIndex === currentPlayerIdx && (stoneType === 'water' || stoneType === 'wind')) {
3654:                     console.log(`ℹ️ Seed the Skies active - allowing ${stoneType} stone at any position`);
3655:                     return true;
3656:                 }
3657:             }
3658: 
3659:             // Check for extended placement buff (Mason's Savvy - earth stones within 5 hexes)
3660:             if (stoneType && spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
3661:                 const extended = spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasExtendedPlacement(stoneType, currentPlayerIdx);
3662:                 if (extended.active) {
3663:                     // Calculate hex distance
3664:                     const playerHex = pixelToHex(playerPosition.x, playerPosition.y, TILE_SIZE);
3665:                     const targetHex = pixelToHex(x, y, TILE_SIZE);
3666: 
3667:                     const dq = Math.abs(playerHex.q - targetHex.q);
3668:                     const dr = Math.abs(playerHex.r - targetHex.r);
3669:                     const ds = Math.abs((-playerHex.q - playerHex.r) - (-targetHex.q - targetHex.r));
3670:                     const hexDistance = Math.max(dq, dr, ds);
3671: 
3672:                     if (hexDistance <= extended.range) {
3673:                         console.log(`🎯 Extended placement active - allowing ${stoneType} stone at distance ${hexDistance} (max ${extended.range})`);
3674:                         return true;
3675:                     }
3676:                 }
3677:             }
3678: 
3679:             // Default: must be adjacent to player
3680:             return isAdjacentToPlayer(x, y);
3681:         }
3682: 
3683:         function findNearestHexPosition(x, y) {
3684:             // Similar to findValidStonePosition, but doesn't care about stones/player
3685:             // Used for player movement pathfinding
3686:             const hexPositions = getAllHexagonPositions();
3687:             let nearest = null;
3688:             let minDist = Infinity;
3689: 
3690:             hexPositions.forEach(pos => {
3691:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(x - pos.x, 2) + Math.pow(y - pos.y, 2));
3692:                 if (dist < minDist) {
3693:                     minDist = dist;
3694:                     nearest = pos;
3695:                 }
3696:             });
3697: 
3698:             if (nearest && minDist < TILE_SIZE * 2) {
3699:                 return { x: nearest.x, y: nearest.y, valid: true };
3700:             }
3701: 
3702:             return { x: x, y: y, valid: false };
3703:         }
3704: 
3705:         function findNearestSnapPoint(x, y, isPlayerTile = false) {
3706:             const largeHexSize = TILE_SIZE * 4;
3707:             const hexCoords = pixelToHex(x, y, largeHexSize);
3708:             const snapPos = hexToPixel(hexCoords.q, hexCoords.r, largeHexSize);
3709:             const distance = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(x - snapPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(y - snapPos.y, 2));
3710: 
3711:             if (distance < SNAP_THRESHOLD) {
3712:                 // Check if a tile already exists at this position
3713:                 const tileExists = placedTiles.some(tile => {
3714:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(tile.x - snapPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(tile.y - snapPos.y, 2));
3715:                     return dist < TILE_SIZE; // Tiles are considered overlapping if centers are very close
3716:                 });
3717: 
3718:                 if (tileExists) {
3719:                     return { x: x, y: y, snapped: false }; // Don't snap if position is occupied
3720:                 }
3721: 
3722:                 // PLAYER TILE SPECIAL RULE: Must touch at least 2 unrevealed tiles
3723:                 if (isPlayerTile) {
3724:                     const touchingUnrevealedCount = countTouchingUnrevealedTiles(snapPos.x, snapPos.y);
3725:                     if (touchingUnrevealedCount < 2) {
3726:                         console.log(`❌ Player tile at (${snapPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${snapPos.y.toFixed(1)}) only touches ${touchingUnrevealedCount} unrevealed tile(s), need 2+`);
3727:                         return { x: x, y: y, snapped: false }; // Don't allow placement
3728:                     }
3729:                     console.log(`✅ Player tile at (${snapPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${snapPos.y.toFixed(1)}) touches ${touchingUnrevealedCount} unrevealed tiles`);
3730:                 }
3731: 
3732:                 // TELEKINESIS RULE: Must touch at least 1 other tile
3733:                 if (window.telekinesisState && window.telekinesisState.active) {
3734:                     const touchingCount = countTouchingTiles(snapPos.x, snapPos.y);
3735:                     if (touchingCount < 1) {
3736:                         console.log(`❌ Telekinesis: tile at (${snapPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${snapPos.y.toFixed(1)}) touches ${touchingCount} tile(s), need 1+`);
3737:                         return { x: x, y: y, snapped: false };
3738:                     }
3739:                     console.log(`✅ Telekinesis: tile at (${snapPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${snapPos.y.toFixed(1)}) touches ${touchingCount} tiles`);
3740:                 }
3741: 
3742:                 return { x: snapPos.x, y: snapPos.y, snapped: true };
3743:             }
3744:             return { x: x, y: y, snapped: false };
3745:         }
3746: 
3747:         function countTouchingUnrevealedTiles(tileX, tileY) {
3748:             // Get the 6 adjacent tile positions in the large hex grid
3749:             const largeHexSize = TILE_SIZE * 4;
3750:             const tileHex = pixelToHex(tileX, tileY, largeHexSize);
3751:             
3752:             const adjacentOffsets = [
3753:                 { q: 1, r: 0 },   // East
3754:                 { q: 0, r: 1 },   // Southeast
3755:                 { q: -1, r: 1 },  // Southwest
3756:                 { q: -1, r: 0 },  // West
3757:                 { q: 0, r: -1 },  // Northwest
3758:                 { q: 1, r: -1 }   // Northeast
3759:             ];
3760: 
3761:             let unrevealedCount = 0;
3762: 
3763:             adjacentOffsets.forEach(offset => {
3764:                 const adjQ = tileHex.q + offset.q;
3765:                 const adjR = tileHex.r + offset.r;
3766:                 const adjPos = hexToPixel(adjQ, adjR, largeHexSize);
3767: 
3768:                 // Check if there's an unrevealed (flipped) tile at this position
3769:                 const adjacentTile = placedTiles.find(tile => {
3770:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(tile.x - adjPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(tile.y - adjPos.y, 2));
3771:                     return dist < TILE_SIZE;
3772:                 });
3773: 
3774:                 if (adjacentTile && adjacentTile.flipped) {
3775:                     unrevealedCount++;
3776:                 }
3777:             });
3778: 
3779:             return unrevealedCount;
3780:         }
3781: 
3782:         // Count ALL adjacent tiles (revealed or unrevealed) — used by Telekinesis
3783:         function countTouchingTiles(tileX, tileY) {
3784:             const largeHexSize = TILE_SIZE * 4;
3785:             const tileHex = pixelToHex(tileX, tileY, largeHexSize);
3786:             const adjacentOffsets = [
3787:                 { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 },
3788:                 { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -1 }
3789:             ];
3790:             let count = 0;
3791:             adjacentOffsets.forEach(offset => {
3792:                 const adjPos = hexToPixel(tileHex.q + offset.q, tileHex.r + offset.r, largeHexSize);
3793:                 const found = placedTiles.find(t => {
3794:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(t.x - adjPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(t.y - adjPos.y, 2));
3795:                     return dist < TILE_SIZE;
3796:                 });
3797:                 if (found) count++;
3798:             });
3799:             return count;
3800:         }
3801: 
3802:         function tileHasStones(tileId) {
3803:             const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
3804:             if (!tile) return false;
3805: 
3806:             const s = TILE_SIZE;
3807:             const hexagons = [
3808:                 { q: 0, r: 0 },
3809:                 { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 },
3810:                 { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -1 },
3811:                 { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 2 },
3812:                 { q: -2, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -2 }
3813:             ];
3814: 
3815:             return hexagons.some(hex => {
3816:                 const localPos = hexToPixel(hex.q, hex.r, s);
3817:                 const globalX = tile.x + localPos.x;
3818:                 const globalY = tile.y + localPos.y;
3819: 
3820:                 return placedStones.some(stone => {
3821:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - globalX, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - globalY, 2));
3822:                     return dist < 5;
3823:                 });
3824:             });
3825:         }
3826: 
3827:         // Check if any player is standing on a tile (by tile id)
3828:         function tileHasPlayersById(tileId) {
3829:             const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
3830:             if (!tile || typeof playerPositions === 'undefined') return false;
3831:             const tileRadius = TILE_SIZE * 4;
3832:             return playerPositions.some(pos => {
3833:                 if (!pos) return false;
3834:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(pos.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(pos.y - tile.y, 2));
3835:                 return dist < tileRadius;
3836:             });
3837:         }
3838: 
3839:         // Bridge check: would removing this tile leave any of its neighbors with 0 neighbors?
3840:         // Used by Telekinesis to prevent stranding tiles (and players on them).
3841:         function tileIsBridge(tileId) {
3842:             const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
3843:             if (!tile) return false;
3844:             const largeHexSize = TILE_SIZE * 4;
3845:             const tileHex = pixelToHex(tile.x, tile.y, largeHexSize);
3846:             const adjacentOffsets = [
3847:                 { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 },
3848:                 { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -1 }
3849:             ];
3850: 
3851:             // Find all neighbors of this tile
3852:             const neighbors = [];
3853:             adjacentOffsets.forEach(offset => {
3854:                 const adjPos = hexToPixel(tileHex.q + offset.q, tileHex.r + offset.r, largeHexSize);
3855:                 const found = placedTiles.find(t => {
3856:                     if (t.id === tileId) return false; // exclude self
3857:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(t.x - adjPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(t.y - adjPos.y, 2));
3858:                     return dist < TILE_SIZE;
3859:                 });
3860:                 if (found) neighbors.push(found);
3861:             });
3862: 
3863:             // For each neighbor, count how many neighbors IT would have without this tile
3864:             for (const neighbor of neighbors) {
3865:                 const nHex = pixelToHex(neighbor.x, neighbor.y, largeHexSize);
3866:                 let otherNeighborCount = 0;
3867:                 adjacentOffsets.forEach(offset => {
3868:                     const adjPos = hexToPixel(nHex.q + offset.q, nHex.r + offset.r, largeHexSize);
3869:                     const found = placedTiles.find(t => {
3870:                         if (t.id === tileId) return false; // exclude the tile being removed
3871:                         if (t.id === neighbor.id) return false; // exclude self
3872:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(t.x - adjPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(t.y - adjPos.y, 2));
3873:                         return dist < TILE_SIZE;
3874:                     });
3875:                     if (found) otherNeighborCount++;
3876:                 });
3877:                 if (otherNeighborCount === 0) return true; // This neighbor would be stranded
3878:             }
3879:             return false;
3880:         }
3881: 
3882:         function updateTileClasses() {
3883:             placedTiles.forEach(tile => {
3884:                 if (tileHasStones(tile.id)) {
3885:                     tile.element.classList.add('has-stones');
3886:                 } else {
3887:                     tile.element.classList.remove('has-stones');
3888:                 }
3889:             });
3890:         }
3891: 
3892:         function createShrineMarker(shrineType) {
3893:             const g = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
3894:             g.setAttribute('class', 'shrine-marker');
3895: 
3896:             // Color mapping for shrine types
3897:             const shrineColors = {
3898:                 'earth': '#69d83a',
3899:                 'water': '#5894f4',
3900:                 'fire': '#ed1b43',
3901:                 'wind': '#ffce00',
3902:                 'void': '#9458f4',
3903:                 'catacomb': '#8b4513'
3904:             };
3905: 
3906:             // Create a circle background
3907:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
3908:             circle.setAttribute('cx', '0');
3909:             circle.setAttribute('cy', '0');
3910:             circle.setAttribute('r', '8');
3911:             circle.setAttribute('fill', shrineColors[shrineType]);
3912:             circle.setAttribute('opacity', '0.6');
3913:             circle.setAttribute('stroke', shrineColors[shrineType]);
3914:             circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
3915:             g.appendChild(circle);
3916: 
3917:             // Element image on shrine indicator
3918:             const shrineImg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'image');
3919:             shrineImg.setAttribute('href', STONE_TYPES[shrineType]?.img || '');
3920:             shrineImg.setAttribute('x', '-8');
3921:             shrineImg.setAttribute('y', '-8');
3922:             shrineImg.setAttribute('width', '16');
3923:             shrineImg.setAttribute('height', '16');
3924:             // Catacomb symbol is not bright enough for screen blend — use normal so it's visible
3925:             shrineImg.style.mixBlendMode = shrineType === 'catacomb' ? 'normal' : 'screen';
3926:             g.appendChild(shrineImg);
3927: 
3928:             return g;
3929:         }
3930: 
3931:         let nextTileId = 1; // Global counter for unique tile IDs
3932: 
3933:         function placeTile(x, y, rotation = 0, flipped = false, shrineType = null, isPlayerTile = false, skipMultiplayerLogic = false, forcedTileId = null) {
3934:             console.log(`   placeTile called: x=${x.toFixed(1)}, y=${y.toFixed(1)}, rotation=${rotation}, flipped=${flipped}, shrineType=${shrineType}, isPlayerTile=${isPlayerTile}, skipMP=${skipMultiplayerLogic}`);
3935:             const tileId = (forcedTileId !== null && forcedTileId !== undefined) ? forcedTileId : nextTileId++;
3936:             if (forcedTileId !== null && forcedTileId !== undefined) {
3937:                 nextTileId = Math.max(nextTileId, forcedTileId + 1);
3938:             }
3939:             console.log(`   Assigned tileId: ${tileId}`);
3940:             let tilePlayerIndex = null; // Will be set if this is a player tile
3941:             const tileGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
3942:             tileGroup.setAttribute('class', isPlayerTile ? 'placed-tile player-tile' : 'placed-tile');
3943:             tileGroup.setAttribute('data-tile-id', tileId);
3944:             tileGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
3945: 
3946:             const tile = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, rotation, flipped);
3947:             tileGroup.appendChild(tile);
3948: 
3949:             // Draw from deck if shrine type not provided
3950:             if (shrineType === null) {
3951:                 shrineType = drawNextTileFromDeck();
3952:                 if (shrineType === null) {
3953:                     // No more tiles in deck
3954:                     return null;
3955:                 }
3956:             }
3957: 
3958:             // Tag revealed tiles with shrine type so CSS hover matches element color.
3959:             // Hidden (flipped) tiles stay untagged — their element is unknown to the player.
3960:             if (!flipped && shrineType !== 'player') {
3961:                 tileGroup.setAttribute('data-shrine', shrineType);
3962:             }
3963: 
3964:             // Check if this is the player tile
3965:             if (shrineType === 'player') {
3966:                 isPlayerTile = true;
3967: 
3968:                 const playerIndex = playerPositions.length;
3969:                 let assignedColor;
3970: 
3971:                 // In multiplayer, use the pre-assigned playerColor
3972:                 // In local mode, assign colors in rank order
3973:                 // skipMultiplayerLogic = true means playerColor is already hex (from placePlayerTileVisually),
3974:                 // so skip the name→hex lookup to avoid PLAYER_COLORS[hexValue] = undefined.
3975:                 if (isMultiplayer && playerColor && !skipMultiplayerLogic) {
3976:                     assignedColor = PLAYER_COLORS[playerColor];
3977:                     playerColor = assignedColor; // Normalise to hex so placePlayer always gets a hex value
3978:                     console.log(`🎨 Multiplayer - Using assigned color: ${playerColor}`);
3979:                 } else if (isMultiplayer && playerColor && skipMultiplayerLogic) {
3980:                     assignedColor = playerColor; // already hex
3981:                     console.log(`🎨 Multiplayer (visual-only) - Color already hex: ${playerColor}`);
3982:                 } else {
3983:                     // Local game - assign next color in rank order
3984:                     const colorRankOrder = ['purple', 'yellow', 'red', 'blue', 'green'];
3985:                     if (playerIndex < 5) {
3986:                         const colorName = colorRankOrder[playerIndex];
3987:                         assignedColor = PLAYER_COLORS[colorName];
3988:                         gameSessionColors.add(colorName);
3989:                         playerColor = assignedColor;
3990:                         console.log(`🎨 Local game - Player ${playerIndex + 1} color assigned: ${colorName} (${assignedColor})`);
3991:                     } else {
3992:                         console.warn('⚠️ Maximum 5 players reached!');
3993:                         assignedColor = '#fff'; // Fallback to white
3994:                         playerColor = assignedColor;
3995:                     }
3996:                 }
3997: 
3998:                 // Add color tint overlay to player tile
3999:                 const tintOverlay = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
4000:                 tintOverlay.setAttribute('cx', 0);
4001:                 tintOverlay.setAttribute('cy', 0);
4002:                 tintOverlay.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 2); // Cover the whole tile
4003:                 tintOverlay.setAttribute('fill', assignedColor);
4004:                 tintOverlay.setAttribute('opacity', '0.15'); // Light tint
4005:                 tintOverlay.setAttribute('pointer-events', 'none'); // Don't interfere with clicks
4006:                 tileGroup.appendChild(tintOverlay);
4007: 
4008:                 // Store the player index for later use
4009:                 tilePlayerIndex = playerIndex;
4010:                 
4011:                 // Add a group for element symbols on the player tile
4012:                 const symbolsGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4013:                 symbolsGroup.setAttribute('class', 'player-tile-element-symbols');
4014:                 tileGroup.appendChild(symbolsGroup);
4015:             }
4016: 
4017:             // Only add shrine marker if NOT flipped and NOT player tile (revealed tiles show shrine)
4018:             if (!flipped && shrineType !== 'player') {
4019:                 const shrineMarker = createShrineMarker(shrineType);
4020:                 tileGroup.appendChild(shrineMarker);
4021:             }
4022: 
4023:             tileGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
4024:                 // Don't interfere with player dragging
4025:                 if (isDraggingPlayer) return;
4026: 
4027:             if (shouldDebugLog('tileClicked', 500)) {
4028:                 console.log(`🖱️ Tile clicked: tileId=${tileId}, position=(${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)}), shrine=${shrineType}, flipped=${flipped}, isPlayerTile=${isPlayerTile}, tileMoveMode=${tileMoveMode}`);
4029:             }
4030: 
4031:                 // Player tiles cannot be dragged once placed
4032:                 if (isPlayerTile) {
4033:                     console.log(`   ✗ Cannot drag: player tiles are locked in place`);
4034:                     return;
4035:                 }
4036: 
4037:                 // Only allow dragging placed tiles if tileMoveMode is enabled
4038:                 if (!tileMoveMode) {
4039:                     console.log(`   ✗ Cannot drag: tile move mode is OFF`);
4040:                     return;
4041:                 }
4042: 
4043:                 // During Telekinesis, also block tiles that have players on them or are bridges
4044:                 const tkActive = window.telekinesisState && window.telekinesisState.active;
4045:                 const tkBlockPlayer = tkActive && tileHasPlayersById(tileId);
4046:                 const tkBlockBridge = tkActive && tileIsBridge(tileId);
4047: 
4048:                 if (e.button === 0 && !tileHasStones(tileId) && !tkBlockPlayer && !tkBlockBridge && !isPanning && !isDraggingStone && !isDraggingPlayer) {
4049:                     console.log(`   ✓ Starting drag for tile ${tileId} at (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)})`);
4050:                     e.stopPropagation();
4051:                     e.preventDefault();
4052:                     startTileDrag(tileId, e);
4053:                 } else {
4054:                     if (tkBlockPlayer) {
4055:                         console.log(`   ✗ Cannot drag: tile has a player on it`);
4056:                         updateStatus('Cannot move a tile with a player on it!');
4057:                     } else if (tkBlockBridge) {
4058:                         console.log(`   ✗ Cannot drag: removing tile would strand a neighbor`);
4059:                         updateStatus('Cannot move this tile — it would strand an adjacent tile!');
4060:                     } else {
4061:                         console.log(`   ✗ Cannot drag: hasStones=${tileHasStones(tileId)}, isPanning=${isPanning}, isDraggingStone=${isDraggingStone}`);
4062:                     }
4063:                 }
4064:             });
4065: 
4066:             // Touch support: start tile drag on tap/drag
4067:             tileGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
4068:                 // Don't interfere with player dragging
4069:                 if (isDraggingPlayer) return;
4070:                 // Player tiles cannot be dragged once placed
4071:                 if (isPlayerTile) return;
4072:                 // Only allow dragging if tileMoveMode is enabled
4073:                 if (!tileMoveMode) return;
4074:                 if (tileHasStones(tileId) || isPanning || isDraggingStone || isDraggingPlayer) return;
4075:                 // During Telekinesis, block tiles that have players on them or are bridges
4076:                 if (window.telekinesisState && window.telekinesisState.active) {
4077:                     if (tileHasPlayersById(tileId) || tileIsBridge(tileId)) return;
4078:                 }
4079: 
4080:                 if (e.touches && e.touches.length === 1) {
4081:                     e.stopPropagation();
4082:                     e.preventDefault();
4083:                     const t = e.touches[0];
4084:                     startTileDrag(tileId, {
4085:                         clientX: t.clientX,
4086:                         clientY: t.clientY,
4087:                         button: 0,
4088:                         preventDefault: () => {},
4089:                         stopPropagation: () => {}
4090:                     });
4091:                 }
4092:             }, { passive: false });
4093: 
4094: 
4095:             viewport.insertBefore(tileGroup, snapIndicator);
4096: 
4097:             placedTiles.push({
4098:                 id: tileId,
4099:                 x: x,
4100:                 y: y,
4101:                 rotation: rotation,
4102:                 flipped: flipped,
4103:                 element: tileGroup,
4104:                 shrineType: shrineType,
4105:                 isPlayerTile: isPlayerTile,
4106:                 playerIndex: isPlayerTile ? tilePlayerIndex : null // Track which player owns this tile
4107:             });
4108: 
4109:             updateTileClasses();
4110: 
4111:             // Place player marker on player tile
4112:             if (isPlayerTile) {
4113:                 // Create new player pawn at this tile's position.
4114:                 // playerColor is always hex by this point (normalised above for both
4115:                 // multiplayer and local paths), so playerPositions stores hex values
4116:                 // and COLOR_RANK lookups in game-ui.js work correctly.
4117:                 placePlayer(x, y, playerColor);
4118: 
4119:                 // In multiplayer, ensure this player's pawn ends up at playerPositions[myPlayerIndex]
4120:                 // regardless of simultaneous placements by other players.  placePlayer() always
4121:                 // push()es to the end; if another player's broadcast arrived first, the index is wrong.
4122:                 if (isMultiplayer && !skipMultiplayerLogic &&
4123:                         myPlayerIndex !== null && myPlayerIndex !== undefined) {
4124:                     const placed = playerPositions.pop();
4125:                     if (placed) {
4126:                         placed.index = myPlayerIndex;
4127:                         while (playerPositions.length < myPlayerIndex) playerPositions.push(null);
4128:                         playerPositions[myPlayerIndex] = placed;
4129:                         console.log(`🔧 Relocated local pawn to playerPositions[${myPlayerIndex}]`);
4130:                     }
4131:                 }
4132: 
4133:                 // In multiplayer, broadcast tile placement and track placement phase
4134:                 // Skip this logic if we're just placing visually from a broadcast
4135:                 if (isMultiplayer && !skipMultiplayerLogic) {
4136:                     console.log(`🎮 Player ${tilePlayerIndex} placed tile. Before: activePlayerIndex=${activePlayerIndex}, placed=${Array.from(playerTilesPlaced)}`);
4137:                     playerTilesPlaced.add(tilePlayerIndex);
4138: 
4139:                     // Broadcast that this player placed their tile
4140:                     broadcastGameAction('player-tile-placed', {
4141:                         playerIndex: tilePlayerIndex
4142:                     });
4143: 
4144:                     // Check if all players have placed tiles
4145:                     if (playerTilesPlaced.size === totalPlayers) {
4146:                         isPlacementPhase = false;
4147:                         activePlayerIndex = 0; // Reset to first player for normal gameplay
4148:                         console.log('✅ All players have placed their tiles. Game begins!');
4149: 
4150:                         // Broadcast placement phase end and turn reset
4151:                         const startedAt = Date.now();
4152:                         turnStartedAtMs = startedAt;
4153:                         broadcastGameAction('placement-complete', {
4154:                             playerIndex: 0,
4155:                             turnStartedAt: startedAt
4156:                         });
4157: 
4158:                         if (isMyTurn()) {
4159:                             updateStatus(`All tiles placed! It's your turn!`);
4160:                         } else {
4161:                             const nextColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
4162:                             updateStatus(`All tiles placed! Waiting for ${nextColorName}'s turn...`);
4163:                         }
4164:                     } else {
4165:                         // Advance to next player in turn order
4166:                         const oldIndex = activePlayerIndex;
4167:                         activePlayerIndex = (activePlayerIndex + 1) % totalPlayers;
4168:                         console.log(`📄 Advancing turn: ${oldIndex} -> ${activePlayerIndex} (total: ${totalPlayers})`);
4169: 
4170:                         // Broadcast turn change during placement phase
4171:                         const startedAt = Date.now();
4172:                     turnStartedAtMs = startedAt;
4173:                     currentTurnNumber++;
4174:                     broadcastGameAction('turn-change', {
4175:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
4176:                         turnStartedAt: startedAt,
4177:                         turnNumber: currentTurnNumber
4178:                     });
4179:                         console.log(`📡 Broadcasted turn-change to player ${activePlayerIndex}`);
4180: 
4181:                         if (canPlaceTile()) {
4182:                             updateStatus(`Your turn! Place your player tile (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers} placed)`);
4183:                         setInventoryOpen(true);
4184:                             console.log(`✅ My turn to place (myPlayerIndex=${myPlayerIndex})`);
4185:                         } else {
4186:                             const nextColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
4187:                             updateStatus(`Waiting for ${nextColorName} to place their tile... (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers})`);
4188:                             console.log(`⏳ Waiting for player ${activePlayerIndex} (myPlayerIndex=${myPlayerIndex})`);
4189:                         }
4190:                     }
4191:                 } else {
4192:                     updateStatus(`Player ${tilePlayerIndex + 1} tile placed!`);
4193:                 }
4194: 
4195:                 // Tutorial hook: advance when the local player places their tile on the board
4196:                 if (!skipMultiplayerLogic &&
4197:                         window.isTutorialMode && window.TutorialMode?.onPlayerTilePlaced) {
4198:                     window.TutorialMode.onPlayerTilePlaced();
4199:                 }
4200:             }
4201: 
4202:             return tileId;
4203:         }
4204: 
4205:         // Find the tile at a given world position
4206:         function findTileAtPosition(worldX, worldY) {
4207:             // A tile covers 19 hexes; use a large radius so clicking anywhere on the tile counts
4208:             // TILE_SIZE * 5.5 ensures the whole tile (including edges) is clickable
4209:             const tileRadius = TILE_SIZE * 5.5;
4210:             let closestTile = null;
4211:             let closestDist = Infinity;
4212: 
4213:             for (const tile of placedTiles) {
4214:                 if (tile.isPlayerTile) continue; // Skip player tiles
4215:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(tile.x - worldX, 2) + Math.pow(tile.y - worldY, 2));
4216:                 if (dist < tileRadius && dist < closestDist) {
4217:                     closestTile = tile;
4218:                     closestDist = dist;
4219:                 }
4220:             }
4221:             return closestTile;
4222:         }
4223: 
4224:         // Handle board clicks when in selection mode (for scroll effects like tile swap/flip)
4225:         function handleSelectionModeClick(worldX, worldY) {
4226:             if (!spellSystem || !spellSystem.scrollEffects) return false;
4227:             const selectionMode = spellSystem.scrollEffects.selectionMode;
4228:             if (!selectionMode) return false;
4229: 
4230:             // Check if this is a stone selection mode (e.g., Water V - Control the Current)
4231:             if (selectionMode.handleStoneClick) {
4232:                 // Find the stone at the click position
4233:                 const stone = findStoneAtPosition(worldX, worldY);
4234:                 if (stone) {
4235:                     selectionMode.handleStoneClick(stone);
4236:                     return true; // Click was handled
4237:                 }
4238:             }
4239: 
4240:             // Check if this is a hex selection mode (e.g., Excavate teleport — any hex, not just tile center)
4241:             if (selectionMode.handleHexClick) {
4242:                 const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
4243:                 let closestHex = null;
4244:                 let minDist = Infinity;
4245:                 allHexes.forEach(hexPos => {
4246:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hexPos.x - worldX, 2) + Math.pow(hexPos.y - worldY, 2));
4247:                     if (dist < minDist) {
4248:                         minDist = dist;
4249:                         closestHex = hexPos;
4250:                     }
4251:                 });
4252:                 if (closestHex && minDist < TILE_SIZE * 1.5) {
4253:                     selectionMode.handleHexClick(closestHex);
4254:                 } else {
4255:                     updateStatus('No hex at that position.');
4256:                 }
4257:                 return true;
4258:             }
4259: 
4260:             // Check if this is a tile selection mode
4261:             if (selectionMode.handleTileClick) {
4262:                 // Find the tile at the click position
4263:                 const tile = findTileAtPosition(worldX, worldY);
4264:                 if (!tile) {
4265:                     updateStatus('No tile at that position.');
4266:                     return true; // Still consumed the click
4267:                 }
4268: 
4269:                 // Pass to selection mode handler
4270:                 selectionMode.handleTileClick(tile);
4271:             }
4272:             return true; // Click was handled
4273:         }
4274: 
4275:         // Find a stone at a world position
4276:         function findStoneAtPosition(worldX, worldY) {
4277:             if (typeof placedStones === 'undefined') return null;
4278: 
4279:             // Increased radius for more permissive stone clicking
4280:             const stoneRadius = typeof HEX_SIZE !== 'undefined' ? HEX_SIZE * 2.5 : 50;
4281:             let closestStone = null;
4282:             let closestDist = Infinity;
4283: 
4284:             for (const stone of placedStones) {
4285:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - worldX, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - worldY, 2));
4286:                 if (dist < stoneRadius && dist < closestDist) {
4287:                     closestStone = stone;
4288:                     closestDist = dist;
4289:                 }
4290:             }
4291:             return closestStone;
4292:         }
4293: 
4294:         // ── Tile Image Overlay System ─────────────────────────────────────────
4295:         // Per-element image overlays rendered as SVG <image> clipped to hex shape.
4296:         // Settings are stored in window.tileOverlaySettings and persist across reveals.
4297: 
4298:         window.tileOverlaySettings = window.tileOverlaySettings || {
4299:             earth:    { src: 'images/Tiles/pixelearth.png',    x: 0, y: 0,   rotation: 60,  scale: 1.05, opacity: 0.41, tintOpacity: 0.22 },
4300:             fire:     { src: 'images/Tiles/pixelfire.png',     x: 0, y: 0,   rotation: 0,   scale: 1.2,  opacity: 0.6,  tintOpacity: 0.22 },
4301:             water:    { src: 'images/Tiles/pixelwater.png',    x: 0, y: 0,   rotation: 233, scale: 1.25, opacity: 0.49, tintOpacity: 0.22 },
4302:             wind:     { src: 'images/Tiles/pixelwind.png',     x: 0, y: 0,   rotation: 0,   scale: 1.2,  opacity: 0.6,  tintOpacity: 0.22 },
4303:             void:     { src: 'images/Tiles/pixelvoid.png',     x: 0, y: 0,   rotation: 31,  scale: 1.2,  opacity: 0.6,  tintOpacity: 0.22 },
4304:             catacomb: { src: 'images/Tiles/pixelcatacomb.png', x: 3, y: -1,  rotation: 0,   scale: 1,    opacity: 0.6,  tintOpacity: 1.0 },
4305:         };
4306: 
4307:         const ELEMENT_TINTS = {
4308:             earth: '#4a8a2a', fire: '#cc2200', water: '#1a6ab5',
4309:             wind:  '#c8a800', void: '#6a30b0', catacomb: '#888888'
4310:         };
4311: 
4312:         function makeTileHexPoints(R) {
4313:             const pts = [];
4314:             for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
4315:                 const a = (Math.PI / 3) * i - Math.PI / 6;
4316:                 pts.push(`${(R * Math.cos(a)).toFixed(2)},${(R * Math.sin(a)).toFixed(2)}`);
4317:             }
4318:             return pts.join(' ');
4319:         }
4320: 
4321:         function addTileOverlay(tileGroup, shrineType) {
4322:             if (!shrineType || !window.tileOverlaySettings) return;
4323:             const settings = window.tileOverlaySettings[shrineType];
4324:             if (!settings || !settings.src) return;
4325: 
4326:             const tileId = tileGroup.getAttribute('data-tile-id');
4327:             const clipId = `tile-overlay-clip-${tileId}`;
4328:             const R = TILE_SIZE * 4.0; // 80 units — matches tile boundary for clean hex crop
4329: 
4330:             // Per-tile clipPath inside the tile group — coordinates are unambiguously tile-local
4331:             const defs = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'defs');
4332:             const clip = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'clipPath');
4333:             clip.setAttribute('id', clipId);
4334:             const clipHex = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
4335:             clipHex.setAttribute('points', makeTileHexPoints(R));
4336:             clip.appendChild(clipHex);
4337:             defs.appendChild(clip);
4338:             tileGroup.appendChild(defs);
4339: 
4340:             // Wrapper: clip acts as a fixed hex viewport; image moves freely inside it
4341:             const wrapper = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4342:             wrapper.setAttribute('class', 'tile-overlay');
4343:             wrapper.setAttribute('data-element', shrineType);
4344:             wrapper.setAttribute('clip-path', `url(#${clipId})`);
4345: 
4346:             // Elemental tint layer (colored hex fill behind the image)
4347:             if (ELEMENT_TINTS[shrineType]) {
4348:                 const tint = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
4349:                 tint.setAttribute('points', makeTileHexPoints(R));
4350:                 tint.setAttribute('fill', ELEMENT_TINTS[shrineType]);
4351:                 tint.setAttribute('opacity', settings.tintOpacity ?? 0.22);
4352:                 tint.setAttribute('stroke', 'none');
4353:                 wrapper.appendChild(tint);
4354:             }
4355: 
4356:             // Image layer — freely transforms within the clipped viewport
4357:             const img = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'image');
4358:             img.setAttributeNS('http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink', 'href', settings.src);
4359:             img.setAttribute('href', settings.src);
4360:             img.setAttribute('x', -R);
4361:             img.setAttribute('y', -R);
4362:             img.setAttribute('width', R * 2);
4363:             img.setAttribute('height', R * 2);
4364:             img.setAttribute('preserveAspectRatio', 'xMidYMid slice');
4365:             img.setAttribute('opacity', settings.opacity);
4366:             img.setAttribute('transform',
4367:                 `translate(${settings.x},${settings.y}) rotate(${settings.rotation}) scale(${settings.scale})`);
4368: 
4369:             wrapper.appendChild(img);
4370:             tileGroup.appendChild(wrapper);
4371:         }
4372: 
4373:         // Clone a tileGraphic group with fills removed — used to render hex lines on top of overlay
4374:         function createStrokeOnlyClone(tileGraphic) {
4375:             const clone = tileGraphic.cloneNode(true);
4376:             clone.setAttribute('class', 'tile-overlay-lines');
4377:             clone.querySelectorAll('polygon').forEach(p => {
4378:                 p.setAttribute('fill', 'none');
4379:                 p.style.fill = 'none';
4380:             });
4381:             return clone;
4382:         }
4383: 
4384:         function refreshAllTileOverlays() {
4385:             document.querySelectorAll('.tile-overlay, .tile-overlay-lines').forEach(el => el.remove());
4386:             document.querySelectorAll('[id^="tile-overlay-clip-"]').forEach(el => el.closest('defs')?.remove());
4387:             if (typeof placedTiles !== 'undefined') {
4388:                 placedTiles.forEach(tile => {
4389:                     if (!tile.flipped && tile.shrineType && tile.element) {
4390:                         const shrineMarker = tile.element.querySelector('.shrine-marker');
4391:                         const tileGraphic = tile.element.querySelector('g[transform^="rotate"]');
4392:                         // addTileOverlay appends to end; move overlay before shrineMarker to get correct order:
4393:                         // tileGraphic → overlay → strokeClone → shrineMarker
4394:                         addTileOverlay(tile.element, tile.shrineType);
4395:                         const overlay = tile.element.querySelector('.tile-overlay');
4396:                         if (overlay && shrineMarker) tile.element.insertBefore(overlay, shrineMarker);
4397:                         if (tileGraphic) {
4398:                             const strokeClone = createStrokeOnlyClone(tileGraphic);
4399:                             tile.element.insertBefore(strokeClone, shrineMarker);
4400:                         }
4401:                     }
4402:                 });
4403:             }
4404:         }
4405:         window.refreshAllTileOverlays = refreshAllTileOverlays;
4406:         window.addTileOverlay = addTileOverlay;
4407: 
4408:         function revealTile(tileId) {
4409:             const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
4410:             if (!tile || !tile.flipped) {
4411:                 console.log(`⚠️ revealTile called for tile ${tileId}, but tile is ${tile ? 'already revealed' : 'not found'}`);
4412:                 return; // Already revealed or doesn't exist
4413:             }
4414: 
4415:             console.log(`📡 Broadcasting tile flip: tileId=${tileId}, shrineType=${tile.shrineType}`);
4416:             // Broadcast tile flip to other players
4417:             broadcastGameAction('tile-flip', {
4418:                 tileId: tileId,
4419:                 shrineType: tile.shrineType
4420:             });
4421: 
4422:             // Tutorial pre-reveal hook: runs BEFORE the visual is built so the
4423:             // tutorial can override tile.shrineType and the visual + scroll both reflect it.
4424:             if (window.isTutorialMode && window.TutorialMode?.onTilePreReveal) {
4425:                 window.TutorialMode.onTilePreReveal(tile);
4426:             }
4427: 
4428:             // Remove the old tile element
4429:             tile.element.remove();
4430: 
4431:             // Create new revealed tile group
4432:             const tileGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4433:             tileGroup.setAttribute('class', 'placed-tile');
4434:             tileGroup.setAttribute('data-tile-id', tileId);
4435:             tileGroup.setAttribute('data-shrine', tile.shrineType);
4436:             tileGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile.x}, ${tile.y})`);
4437: 
4438:             const tileGraphic = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, tile.rotation, false);
4439:             tileGroup.appendChild(tileGraphic);
4440: 
4441:             // Layer order: base fills → overlay image → hex lines → shrine symbol
4442:             addTileOverlay(tileGroup, tile.shrineType);
4443:             tileGroup.appendChild(createStrokeOnlyClone(tileGraphic));
4444:             const shrineMarker = createShrineMarker(tile.shrineType);
4445:             tileGroup.appendChild(shrineMarker);
4446: 
4447:             tileGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
4448:                 if (!tileMoveMode) return;
4449:                 if (e.button === 0 && !tileHasStones(tileId) && !isPanning && !isDraggingStone) {
4450:                     e.stopPropagation();
4451:                     e.preventDefault();
4452:                     startTileDrag(tileId, e);
4453:                 }
4454:             });
4455: 
4456:             viewport.insertBefore(tileGroup, snapIndicator);
4457: 
4458:             // Update tile data
4459:             tile.flipped = false;
4460:             tile.element = tileGroup;
4461: 
4462:             // Catacomb tile reveal: refund 1 AP
4463:             const isCatacombReveal = tile.shrineType === 'catacomb';
4464:             if (isCatacombReveal) {
4465:                 console.log(`⚡ Catacomb tile revealed — refunding 1 AP`);
4466:                 addAP(1);
4467:             }
4468: 
4469:             // Tutorial hook: let tutorial pre-arrange the scroll deck before we draw
4470:             if (window.isTutorialMode && window.TutorialMode?.onTileRevealed) {
4471:                 window.TutorialMode.onTileRevealed(tile, spellSystem);
4472:             }
4473: 
4474:             // Scroll discovery: use effective element (Wandering River) so transformed tiles give the chosen element's scroll
4475:             const effectiveType = spellSystem.scrollEffects?.getEffectiveTileElement?.(tile) ?? tile.shrineType;
4476:             const scrollInfo = spellSystem.onTileRevealed(effectiveType);
4477: 
4478:             // Call to Adventure: immediately draw shrine stones when revealing a tile
4479:             const ctaBuff = spellSystem.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.callToAdventure;
4480:             const elementalTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
4481:             let ctaDrawn = 0;
4482:             if (ctaBuff && ctaBuff.playerIndex === activePlayerIndex && elementalTypes.includes(effectiveType)) {
4483:                 const STONE_RANK = { 'void': 1, 'wind': 2, 'fire': 3, 'water': 4, 'earth': 5 };
4484:                 const amount = STONE_RANK[effectiveType] || 0;
4485:                 ctaDrawn = spellSystem.scrollEffects.drawStonesToPool(effectiveType, amount, activePlayerIndex);
4486:                 if (ctaDrawn > 0) {
4487:                     syncPlayerState();
4488:                     console.log(`🗺️ Call to Adventure: drew ${ctaDrawn} ${effectiveType} stones on tile reveal`);
4489:                 }
4490:             }
4491: 
4492:             const apBonus = isCatacombReveal ? ' +1 AP!' : '';
4493:             if (scrollInfo && ctaDrawn > 0) {
4494:                 updateStatus(`Revealed ${effectiveType} shrine! Found ${scrollInfo.name}! Call to Adventure: +${ctaDrawn} ${effectiveType} stone${ctaDrawn > 1 ? 's' : ''}!${apBonus}`);
4495:             } else if (scrollInfo) {
4496:                 updateStatus(`Revealed ${effectiveType} shrine! Found ${scrollInfo.name}!${apBonus}`);
4497:             } else if (ctaDrawn > 0) {
4498:                 updateStatus(`Revealed ${effectiveType} shrine! Call to Adventure: +${ctaDrawn} ${effectiveType} stone${ctaDrawn > 1 ? 's' : ''}!${apBonus}`);
4499:             } else {
4500:                 updateStatus(`Revealed ${effectiveType} shrine!${apBonus}`);
4501:             }
4502: 
4503:             // Re-apply Wandering River indicator on the new element (reveal replaced tile.element)
4504:             const wr = spellSystem.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.wanderingRiver;
4505:             if (Array.isArray(wr)) {
4506:                 const entry = wr.find(e => Number(e.tileId) === Number(tile.id));
4507:                 if (entry && entry.newElement && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.applyWanderingRiverIndicator === 'function') {
4508:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.applyWanderingRiverIndicator(tile, entry.newElement);
4509:                 }
4510:             }
4511:         }
4512:

4514:         window.revealTile = revealTile;
4515:         // Expose placePlayer and movePlayerVisually for scroll effects (e.g. Take Flight)
4516:         window.placePlayer = placePlayer;
4517:         window.movePlayerVisually = movePlayerVisually;
4518:         // Expose placeTile and spellSystem for tutorial mode
4519:         window.placeTile  = placeTile;
4520:         window.spellSystem = spellSystem;
4521:         // Expose placeStoneVisually and placedStones for tutorial scripted AI trap sequence
4522:         window.placeStoneVisually = placeStoneVisually;

4524:         // Expose tileMoveMode for scroll effects (e.g. Telekinesis)

4526:             get() { return tileMoveMode; },
4527:             set(v) { tileMoveMode = v; },
4528:             configurable: true
4529:         });

4531:         // Visual-only tile flip (called when receiving broadcast from other players)
4532:         function flipTileVisually(tileElement, shrineType) {
4533:             const tileId = parseInt(tileElement.getAttribute('data-tile-id'));
4534:             const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
4535:             if (!tile || !tile.flipped) return;
4536: 
4537:             // Same visual logic as revealTile but without broadcasting
4538:             tile.element.remove();
4539: 
4540:             const tileGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4541:             tileGroup.setAttribute('class', 'placed-tile');
4542:             tileGroup.setAttribute('data-tile-id', tileId);
4543:             tileGroup.setAttribute('data-shrine', shrineType);
4544:             tileGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile.x}, ${tile.y})`);
4545: 
4546:             const tileGraphic = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, tile.rotation, false);
4547:             tileGroup.appendChild(tileGraphic);
4548: 
4549:             // Layer order: base fills → overlay image → hex lines → shrine symbol
4550:             addTileOverlay(tileGroup, shrineType);
4551:             tileGroup.appendChild(createStrokeOnlyClone(tileGraphic));
4552:             const shrineMarker = createShrineMarker(shrineType);
4553:             tileGroup.appendChild(shrineMarker);
4554: 
4555:             tileGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
4556:                 if (!tileMoveMode) return;
4557:                 if (e.button === 0 && !tileHasStones(tileId) && !isPanning && !isDraggingStone) {
4558:                     e.stopPropagation();
4559:                     e.preventDefault();
4560:                     startTileDrag(tileId, e);
4561:                 }
4562:             });
4563: 
4564:             viewport.insertBefore(tileGroup, snapIndicator);
4565: 
4566:             tile.flipped = false;
4567:             tile.element = tileGroup;
4568:             tile.shrineType = shrineType; // Update the tile's shrine type to match the revealed type
4569:             console.log(`📄 flipTileVisually: Updated tile ${tileId} shrineType to ${shrineType}`);
4570:         }
4571: 
4572:         // Recreate a revealed tile as flipped (hidden) - used by Heavy Stomp scroll effect
4573:         function recreateTileAsFlipped(tile) {
4574:             if (!tile || tile.flipped) return; // Already flipped
4575: 
4576:             const tileId = tile.id;
4577:             console.log(`🙈 recreateTileAsFlipped: Hiding tile ${tileId} (${tile.shrineType})`);
4578: 
4579:             // Remove old tile element
4580:             if (tile.element) {
4581:                 tile.element.remove();
4582:             }
4583: 
4584:             // Create new flipped tile group
4585:             const tileGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4586:             tileGroup.setAttribute('class', 'placed-tile');
4587:             tileGroup.setAttribute('data-tile-id', tileId);
4588:             tileGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile.x}, ${tile.y})`);
4589: 
4590:             // Create flipped (hidden) tile graphic
4591:             const tileGraphic = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, tile.rotation, true);
4592:             tileGroup.appendChild(tileGraphic);
4593: 
4594:             // Add mousedown handler for tile dragging
4595:             tileGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
4596:                 if (e.button === 0 && !tileHasStones(tileId) && !isPanning && !isDraggingStone) {
4597:                     e.stopPropagation();
4598:                     e.preventDefault();
4599:                     startTileDrag(tileId, e);
4600:                 }
4601:             });
4602: 
4603:             viewport.insertBefore(tileGroup, snapIndicator);
4604: 
4605:             // Update tile data
4606:             tile.flipped = true;
4607:             tile.element = tileGroup;
4608:         }
4609: 
4610:         // Make it available globally for scroll effects
4611:         window.recreateTileAsFlipped = recreateTileAsFlipped;
4612: 
4613:         function startTileDrag(tileId, e) {
4614:             if (tileHasStones(tileId)) return;
4615:             isDraggingTile = true;
4616:             draggedTileId = tileId;
4617:             draggedTileShrineType = null;
4618:             draggedTileOriginalPos = null;
4619:             const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
4620:             if (tile) {
4621:                 draggedTileRotation = tile.rotation;
4622:                 draggedTileFlipped = tile.flipped || false;
4623:                 draggedTileShrineType = tile.shrineType; // Preserve shrine type
4624:                 draggedTileOriginalPos = { x: tile.x, y: tile.y }; // Store original position
4625:                 tile.element.remove();
4626:                 placedTiles = placedTiles.filter(t => t.id !== tileId);
4627:             }
4628: 
4629:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
4630:             const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
4631:             const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
4632:             const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
4633: 
4634:             ghostTile = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4635:             ghostTile.setAttribute('class', 'ghost-tile');
4636:             ghostTile.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
4637:             const tileContent = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped);
4638:             ghostTile.appendChild(tileContent);
4639:             viewport.appendChild(ghostTile);
4640:         }
4641: 
4642:         let isDraggingPlayer = false;
4643:         let ghostPlayer = null;
4644:         let playerPath = [];
4645:         let pathLine = null;
4646:         let pathCostLabels = [];
4647: 
4648:         
4649:         // Finalize a pawn move based on the currently drawn playerPath (used by touch + mouse).
4650:         function movePlayerAlongPath() {
4651:             if (!isDraggingPlayer || !ghostPlayer || playerPath.length < 2) return;
4652: 
4653:             const activePlayer = playerPositions[activePlayerIndex];
4654:             if (!activePlayer) return;
4655: 
4656:             const finalPos = playerPath[playerPath.length - 1];
4657: 
4658:             // Basic legality check for destination (revealed/unrevealed rules are enforced in canPlayerMoveToHex)
4659:             const canMoveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(finalPos.x, finalPos.y, true);
4660:             if (!canMoveCheck.canMove) {
4661:                 console.log(`❌ Invalid move end: ${canMoveCheck.reason || 'cannot move there'}`);
4662:                 // cleanup happens below
4663:             } else {
4664:                 // Total cost for the selected path (Steam Vents discount applied inside)
4665:                 const totalCost = calculatePathCost();
4666: 
4667:                 // Make sure player has enough AP
4668:                 const availableAP = getCurrentAP ? getCurrentAP() : currentAP;
4669:                 if (totalCost > availableAP) {
4670:                     console.log(`❌ Not enough AP: need ${totalCost}, have ${availableAP}`);
4671:                 } else {
4672:                     // Update Steam Vents alternation state before spending AP
4673:                     commitSteamVentsState(playerPath);
4674:                     // Spend AP and apply the move
4675:                     if (typeof spendAP === 'function') spendAP(totalCost);
4676: 
4677:                     // Move pawn visually + state
4678:                     activePlayer.x = finalPos.x;
4679:                     activePlayer.y = finalPos.y;
4680:                     activePlayer.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${finalPos.x}, ${finalPos.y})`);
4681:                     if (ghostPlayer) ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${finalPos.x}, ${finalPos.y})`);
4682: 
4683:                     console.log(`✅ Movement successful: ${playerPath.length - 1} hexes, cost ${totalCost} AP`);
4684: 
4685:                     // Record activity + broadcast movement (multiplayer)
4686:                     try {
4687:                         recordActivity && recordActivity('move', { x: finalPos.x, y: finalPos.y, apSpent: totalCost });
4688:                     } catch (e) {}
4689: 
4690:                     if (typeof broadcastPlayerMovement === 'function' && !isSpectator) {
4691:                         try {
4692:                             broadcastPlayerMovement(activePlayerIndex, finalPos.x, finalPos.y, totalCost);
4693:                         } catch (e) {}
4694:                     }
4695: 
4696:                     // Tile reveal / shrine resolution (reuse existing landing handler if present)
4697:                     try {
4698:                         if (typeof handlePlayerLanding === 'function') {
4699:                             handlePlayerLanding(finalPos.x, finalPos.y);
4700:                         } else if (typeof checkTileRevealsAtPosition === 'function') {
4701:                             checkTileRevealsAtPosition(finalPos.x, finalPos.y);
4702:                         }
4703:                     } catch (e) {
4704:                         console.warn('Landing/reveal handler error:', e);
4705:                     }
4706:                 }
4707:             }
4708: 
4709:             // Cleanup (match mouseup behavior)
4710:             isDraggingPlayer = false;
4711:             clearPlayerPath();
4712:             if (ghostPlayer) {
4713:                 ghostPlayer.remove();
4714:                 ghostPlayer = null;
4715:             }
4716:         }
4717: 
4718: function clearPlayerPath() {
4719:             // Remove polyline
4720:             if (pathLine) {
4721:                 pathLine.remove();
4722:                 pathLine = null;
4723:             }
4724:             // Remove step/cost labels
4725:             if (pathCostLabels && pathCostLabels.length) {
4726:                 pathCostLabels.forEach(label => {
4727:                     try { label.remove(); } catch (e) {}
4728:                 });
4729:             }
4730:             pathCostLabels = [];
4731:             playerPath = [];
4732:             snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
4733:         }
4734: 
4735: 
4736:         function placePlayer(x, y, color = null) {
4737:             if (color) {
4738:                 // Creating a NEW player pawn with this color
4739:                 console.log(`🎨 Creating new player ${playerPositions.length + 1} at (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)}) with color ${color}`);
4740: 
4741:                 const playerGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4742:                 playerGroup.setAttribute('class', 'player');
4743:                 playerGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
4744:                 playerGroup.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
4745:                 playerGroup.style.touchAction = 'none';
4746: 
4747:                 // Invisible larger hit area for easier touch targeting
4748:                 const hitArea = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
4749:                 hitArea.setAttribute('cx', 0);
4750:                 hitArea.setAttribute('cy', 0);
4751:                 hitArea.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.8); // Much larger touch target
4752:                 hitArea.setAttribute('fill', 'transparent');
4753:                 hitArea.setAttribute('stroke', 'none');
4754:                 hitArea.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
4755:                 playerGroup.appendChild(hitArea);
4756: 
4757:                 const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
4758:                 circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
4759:                 circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
4760:                 circle.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.4);
4761:                 circle.setAttribute('class', 'player-marker');
4762:                 circle.setAttribute('fill', color);
4763:                 circle.setAttribute('stroke', '#000');
4764:                 circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
4765: 
4766:                 playerGroup.appendChild(circle);
4767: 
4768:                 // Store the player index for this group
4769:                 const playerIndex = playerPositions.length;
4770: 
4771:                 // Add drag handler
4772:                 playerGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
4773:                     // Only draggable if this is the active player (check dynamically)
4774:                     const thisPlayerIndex = playerPositions.findIndex(p => p && p.element === playerGroup);
4775:                     const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
4776:                     if (tf && tf.active && tf.targetPlayerIndex === thisPlayerIndex) {
4777:                         e.stopPropagation();
4778:                         e.preventDefault();
4779:                         startPlayerDrag(e, { playerIndex: thisPlayerIndex, ignoreTurnCheck: true, isTakeFlight: true });
4780:                         return;
4781:                     }
4782:                     if (thisPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex) {
4783:                         e.stopPropagation();
4784:                         e.preventDefault();
4785:                         startPlayerDrag(e);
4786:                     }
4787:                 });
4788: 
4789:             // Touch support: start player drag on tap/drag
4790: 	            playerGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
4791: 	                console.log('👆 Player pawn touchstart detected!', {touches: e.touches?.length, target: e.target});
4792: 	                if (!(e.touches && e.touches.length === 1)) return;
4793: 	                // Mirror mousedown behavior: only the active player pawn can be dragged
4794: 	                const thisPlayerIndex = playerPositions.findIndex(p => p && p.element === playerGroup);
4795: 	                console.log(`   thisPlayerIndex=${thisPlayerIndex}, activePlayerIndex=${activePlayerIndex}`);
4796:                     const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
4797:                     if (tf && tf.active && tf.targetPlayerIndex === thisPlayerIndex) {
4798:                         // Set flag IMMEDIATELY to prevent other handlers from interfering
4799:                         isDraggingPlayer = true;
4800:                         e.stopPropagation();
4801:                         e.preventDefault();
4802:                         const t = e.touches[0];
4803:                         console.log('   ✅ Starting take-flight drag from touch');
4804:                         startPlayerDrag({
4805:                             clientX: t.clientX,
4806:                             clientY: t.clientY,
4807:                             button: 0,
4808:                             preventDefault: () => {},
4809:                             stopPropagation: () => {}
4810:                         }, { playerIndex: thisPlayerIndex, ignoreTurnCheck: true, isTakeFlight: true });
4811:                         return;
4812:                     }
4813: 	                if (thisPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex) {
4814:                     // Set flag IMMEDIATELY to prevent other handlers from interfering
4815:                     isDraggingPlayer = true;
4816:                     e.stopPropagation();
4817:                     e.preventDefault();
4818:                     const t = e.touches[0];
4819:                     console.log('   ✅ Starting player drag from touch');
4820:                     startPlayerDrag({
4821:                         clientX: t.clientX,
4822:                         clientY: t.clientY,
4823:                         button: 0,
4824:                         preventDefault: () => {},
4825:                         stopPropagation: () => {}
4826:                     });
4827:                 } else {
4828:                     console.log('   ❌ Not active player, ignoring touch');
4829:                 }
4830:             }, { passive: false });
4831: 
4832:                 playerGroup.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
4833:                     e.stopPropagation();
4834:                 });
4835: 
4836:                 playerGroup.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
4837:                     e.stopPropagation();
4838:                 });
4839: 
4840:                 viewport.appendChild(playerGroup);
4841:                 playerPositions.push({ x, y, element: playerGroup, color, index: playerIndex });
4842: 
4843:             } else {
4844:                 // Moving the ACTIVE player
4845:                 const activePlayer = playerPositions[activePlayerIndex];
4846:                 if (!activePlayer) {
4847:                     console.error('No active player to move!');
4848:                     return;
4849:                 }
4850:                 
4851:                 activePlayer.element.remove();
4852: 
4853:                 const playerGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4854:                 playerGroup.setAttribute('class', 'player');
4855:                 playerGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
4856:                 playerGroup.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
4857:                 playerGroup.style.touchAction = 'none';
4858: 
4859:                 // Invisible larger hit area for easier touch targeting
4860:                 const hitArea = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
4861:                 hitArea.setAttribute('cx', 0);
4862:                 hitArea.setAttribute('cy', 0);
4863:                 hitArea.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.8);
4864:                 hitArea.setAttribute('fill', 'transparent');
4865:                 hitArea.setAttribute('stroke', 'none');
4866:                 hitArea.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
4867:                 playerGroup.appendChild(hitArea);
4868: 
4869:                 const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
4870:                 circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
4871:                 circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
4872:                 circle.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.4);
4873:                 circle.setAttribute('class', 'player-marker');
4874:                 circle.setAttribute('fill', activePlayer.color);
4875:                 circle.setAttribute('stroke', '#000');
4876:                 circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
4877: 
4878:                 playerGroup.appendChild(circle);
4879: 
4880:                 // Store the player index for event handlers
4881:                 const thisPlayerIdx = activePlayerIndex;
4882: 
4883:                 playerGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
4884:                     // Only draggable if this is the active player
4885:                     const currentIdx = playerPositions.findIndex(p => p && p.element === playerGroup);
4886:                     if (currentIdx === activePlayerIndex) {
4887:                         e.stopPropagation();
4888:                         e.preventDefault();
4889:                         startPlayerDrag(e);
4890:                     }
4891:                 });
4892: 
4893: 	            // Touch support: start player drag on tap/drag
4894: 	            playerGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
4895: 	                console.log('👆 Player pawn touchstart (path2) detected!', {touches: e.touches?.length});
4896: 	                if (!(e.touches && e.touches.length === 1)) return;
4897: 	                // Mirror mousedown behavior: only active player can be dragged
4898: 	                const currentIdx = playerPositions.findIndex(p => p && p.element === playerGroup);
4899: 	                console.log(`   currentIdx=${currentIdx}, activePlayerIndex=${activePlayerIndex}`);
4900: 	                if (currentIdx === activePlayerIndex) {
4901:                     // Set flag IMMEDIATELY to prevent other handlers from interfering
4902:                     isDraggingPlayer = true;
4903:                     e.stopPropagation();
4904:                     e.preventDefault();
4905:                     const t = e.touches[0];
4906:                     console.log('   ✅ Starting player drag from touch (path2)');
4907:                     startPlayerDrag({
4908:                         clientX: t.clientX,
4909:                         clientY: t.clientY,
4910:                         button: 0,
4911:                         preventDefault: () => {},
4912:                         stopPropagation: () => {}
4913:                     });
4914:                 } else {
4915:                     console.log('   ❌ Not active player, ignoring touch (path2)');
4916:                 }
4917:             }, { passive: false });

4920:                     e.stopPropagation();
4921:                 });

4924:                     e.stopPropagation();
4925:                 });

4934:                 if (spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.refreshWaterTransformHighlights === 'function') {
4935:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.refreshWaterTransformHighlights();

4940:             updateCatacombIndicators();

4943:         // Visual-only player tile placement (called when receiving broadcast from other players)
4944:         function placePlayerTileVisually(x, y, playerIndex, colorName, cosmetics) {
4945:             // Normalize to hex so COLOR_RANK lookups never get a string name like 'purple'
4946:             const hexColor = colorName?.startsWith('#') ? colorName : (PLAYER_COLORS[colorName] || colorName);
4947:             console.log(`📄 Placing other player's tile: player ${playerIndex}, color ${hexColor}, at (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)})`);
4948: 
4949:             // Temporarily set playerColor to the other player's color
4950:             const originalColor = playerColor;
4951:             playerColor = hexColor;
4952: 
4953:             // Place the player tile - skip multiplayer logic since this is visual-only
4954:             placeTile(x, y, 0, false, 'player', true, true);
4955: 
4956:             // Relocate the newly pushed pawn from the end of playerPositions to the
4957:             // correct slot.  placeTile → placePlayer always push()es, so simultaneous
4958:             // local placement means index .length is wrong.
4959:             const placed = playerPositions.pop();
4960:             if (placed) {
4961:                 placed.index = playerIndex;
4962:                 while (playerPositions.length < playerIndex) playerPositions.push(null);
4963:                 playerPositions[playerIndex] = placed;
4964:                 console.log(`🔧 Relocated remote pawn to playerPositions[${playerIndex}]`);
4965:             }
4966: 
4967:             // Fix placedTiles entry — placeTile captured playerPositions.length (wrong for
4968:             // remote tiles); patch it to the correct playerIndex so tooltips are right.
4969:             const lastTile = placedTiles[placedTiles.length - 1];
4970:             if (lastTile && lastTile.isPlayerTile) {
4971:                 lastTile.playerIndex = playerIndex;
4972:             }
4973: 
4974:             // Restore our color
4975:             playerColor = originalColor;
4976: 
4977:             console.log(`✅ Other player's tile placed successfully (visual only)`);
4978:         }

4980:         // Visual-only player movement (called when receiving broadcast from other players)
4981:         function movePlayerVisually(playerIndex, x, y, apSpent) {
4982:             const player = playerPositions[playerIndex];
4983:             if (!player) {
4984:                 console.error(`Cannot move player ${playerIndex} - not found`);
4985:                 return;
4986:             }
4987: 
4988:             // Remove old player element
4989:             player.element.remove();
4990: 
4991:             // Create new player element at new position
4992:             const playerGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4993:             playerGroup.setAttribute('class', 'player');
4994:             playerGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
4995:             playerGroup.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
4996:             playerGroup.style.touchAction = 'none';
4997: 
4998:             // Invisible larger hit area for easier touch targeting
4999:             const hitArea = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
5000:             hitArea.setAttribute('cx', 0);
5001:             hitArea.setAttribute('cy', 0);
5002:             hitArea.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.8);
5003:             hitArea.setAttribute('fill', 'transparent');
5004:             hitArea.setAttribute('stroke', 'none');
5005:             hitArea.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
5006:             playerGroup.appendChild(hitArea);
5007: 
5008:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
5009:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
5010:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
5011:             circle.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.4);
5012:             circle.setAttribute('class', 'player-marker');
5013:             circle.setAttribute('fill', player.color);
5014:             circle.setAttribute('stroke', '#000');
5015:             circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
5016: 
5017:             playerGroup.appendChild(circle);
5018: 
5019:             playerGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
5020:                 const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
5021:                 if (tf && tf.active && tf.targetPlayerIndex === playerIndex) {
5022:                     e.stopPropagation();
5023:                     e.preventDefault();
5024:                     startPlayerDrag(e, { playerIndex, ignoreTurnCheck: true, isTakeFlight: true });
5025:                     return;
5026:                 }
5027:                 if (activePlayerIndex === playerIndex) {
5028:                     e.stopPropagation();
5029:                     e.preventDefault();
5030:                     startPlayerDrag(e);
5031:                 }
5032:             });
5033: 
5034: 	            // Touch support: start player drag on tap/drag
5035: 	            playerGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
5036: 	                console.log('👆 Player pawn touchstart (path3) detected!', {touches: e.touches?.length, playerIndex});
5037: 	                if (!(e.touches && e.touches.length === 1)) return;
5038:                     const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
5039:                     if (tf && tf.active && tf.targetPlayerIndex === playerIndex) {
5040:                         // Set flag IMMEDIATELY to prevent other handlers from interfering
5041:                         isDraggingPlayer = true;
5042:                         e.stopPropagation();
5043:                         e.preventDefault();
5044:                         const t = e.touches[0];
5045:                         console.log('   ✅ Starting take-flight drag from touch (path3)');
5046:                         startPlayerDrag({
5047:                             clientX: t.clientX,
5048:                             clientY: t.clientY,
5049:                             button: 0,
5050:                             preventDefault: () => {},
5051:                             stopPropagation: () => {}
5052:                         }, { playerIndex, ignoreTurnCheck: true, isTakeFlight: true });
5053:                         return;
5054:                     }
5055: 	                // Mirror mousedown behavior: only active player can be dragged
5056: 	                console.log(`   playerIndex=${playerIndex}, activePlayerIndex=${activePlayerIndex}`);
5057: 	                if (activePlayerIndex === playerIndex) {
5058:                     // Set flag IMMEDIATELY to prevent other handlers from interfering
