5086:         // Visual-only stone break (called when receiving broadcast from other players)
5087:         function breakStoneVisually(stoneId) {
5088:             const stone = placedStones.find(s => s.id === stoneId);
5089:             if (!stone) {
5090:                 console.log(`⚠️ Cannot break stone ${stoneId} - not found`);
5091:                 return;
5092:             }
5093: 
5094:             console.log(`🔨 Breaking stone visually: id=${stoneId}, type=${stone.type}`);
5095: 
5096:             // Remove stone from board
5097:             const stoneElement = stone.element;
5098:             if (stoneElement && stoneElement.parentNode) {
5099:                 stoneElement.remove();
5100:             }
5101: 
5102:             // Remove from placedStones array
5103:             const index = placedStones.findIndex(s => s.id === stoneId);
5104:             if (index !== -1) {
5105:                 placedStones.splice(index, 1);
5106:             }
5107: 
5108:             // Return stone to source pool
5109:             returnStoneToPool(stone.type);
5110: 
5111:             // Update interactions since a stone was removed
5112:             updateTileClasses();
5113:             recheckAllStoneInteractions();
5114:             updateAllWaterStoneVisuals();
5115:             updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals();
5116: 
5117:             console.log(`✅ Stone ${stoneId} broken visually`);
5118:         }
5119: 
5120:         // Record player activity (kept for analytics/debug; NOT used for kicking)
5121:         function recordActivity() {
5122:             if (!myPlayerId) return;
5123:             myLastActivity = Date.now();
5124:             playerLastActivity[myPlayerId] = myLastActivity;
5125:             // Turn timeout is based on turn start time, not activity.
5126:             console.log('📡 Activity recorded locally');
5127:         }
5128: 
5129: 
5130:         // Update turn timer display (shared by everyone; enforced by host)
5131:         function updateTimerDisplay() {
5132:             const timerElement = document.getElementById('inactivity-timer');
5133:             const hudTimer = document.getElementById('hud-timer');
5134:             const hudTimerValue = document.getElementById('hud-timer-value');
5135: 
5136:             if (!gameInactivityTimeout || gameInactivityTimeout === 0) {
5137:                 if (timerElement) timerElement.style.display = 'none';
5138:                 if (hudTimer) hudTimer.style.display = 'none';
5139:                 return;
5140:             }
5141: 
5142:             // Only show timer when it's my turn (during placement phase, this means "canPlaceTile()")
5143:             const isMyActiveTurn = isPlacementPhase ? canPlaceTile() : isMyTurn();
5144:             if (!isMyActiveTurn) {
5145:                 if (timerElement) timerElement.style.display = 'none';
5146:                 // Keep HUD timer visible but show waiting state
5147:                 if (hudTimerValue) hudTimerValue.textContent = '--:--';
5148:                 if (hudTimer) hudTimer.classList.remove('warning');
5149:                 return;
5150:             }
5151: 
5152:             const now = Date.now();
5153:             const elapsed = now - (turnStartedAtMs || now);
5154:             const timeRemaining = gameInactivityTimeout - elapsed;
5155: 
5156:             if (timeRemaining <= 0) {
5157:                 if (timerElement) timerElement.style.display = 'none';
5158:                 if (hudTimerValue) hudTimerValue.textContent = '0:00';
5159:                 return;
5160:             }
5161: 
5162:             // Show timer
5163:             if (timerElement) timerElement.style.display = 'inline-block';
5164: 
5165:             // Calculate percentage remaining
5166:             const percentRemaining = (timeRemaining / gameInactivityTimeout) * 100;
5167: 
5168:             // Format time
5169:             const secondsRemaining = Math.ceil(timeRemaining / 1000);
5170:             const minutes = Math.floor(secondsRemaining / 60);
5171:             const seconds = secondsRemaining % 60;
5172:             const timeText = minutes > 0 ? `${minutes}:${seconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}` : `${seconds}s`;
5173: 
5174:             // Update HUD timer
5175:             if (hudTimerValue) hudTimerValue.textContent = timeText;
5176:             if (hudTimer) {
5177:                 if (percentRemaining <= 25) {
5178:                     hudTimer.classList.add('warning');
5179:                 } else {
5180:                     hudTimer.classList.remove('warning');
5181:                 }
5182:             }
5183: 
5184:             // Color-code old timer based on time remaining
5185:             let color, bgColor, label;
5186:             if (percentRemaining > 75) {
5187:                 color = '#fff';
5188:                 bgColor = '#4CAF50';
5189:                 label = '⚠️';
5190:             } else if (percentRemaining > 50) {
5191:                 color = '#000';
5192:                 bgColor = '#FFEB3B';
5193:                 label = '⚠️';
5194:             } else if (percentRemaining > 25) {
5195:                 color = '#fff';
5196:                 bgColor = '#FF9800';
5197:                 label = '⚠️';
5198:             } else {
5199:                 color = '#fff';
5200:                 bgColor = '#f44336';
5201:                 label = '💎';
5202:             }
5203: 
5204:             if (timerElement) {
5205:                 timerElement.style.backgroundColor = bgColor;
5206:                 timerElement.style.color = color;
5207:                 timerElement.textContent = `${label} ${timeText}`;
5208:             }
5209:         }
5210: 
5211:         // Start timer display updates
5212:         function startTimerDisplay() {
5213:             // Clear any existing interval
5214:             if (timerDisplayInterval) {
5215:                 clearInterval(timerDisplayInterval);
5216:             }
5217: 
5218:             // Update display every second
5219:             timerDisplayInterval = setInterval(updateTimerDisplay, 1000);
5220:             updateTimerDisplay(); // Initial update
5221:         }
5222: 
5223:         // Stop timer display
5224:         function stopTimerDisplay() {
5225:             if (timerDisplayInterval) {
5226:                 clearInterval(timerDisplayInterval);
5227:                 timerDisplayInterval = null;
5228:             }
5229:             const timerElement = document.getElementById('inactivity-timer');
5230:             if (timerElement) {
5231:                 timerElement.style.display = 'none';
5232:             }
5233:         }
5234: 
5235:         // Turn timeout enforcement (host only)
5236:         async function checkTurnTimeout() {
5237:             if (!isMultiplayer) return;
5238:             if (!isHost) return;
5239:             if (!gameInactivityTimeout || gameInactivityTimeout === 0) return; // disabled
5240: 
5241:             // Only enforce during active game
5242:             const { data: room, error: roomErr } = await supabase
5243:                 .from('game_room')
5244:                 .select('status')
5245:                 .eq('id', currentGameId)
5246:                 .single();
5247: 
5248:             if (roomErr) {
5249:                 console.warn('⚠️ Turn timeout: failed to read room status', roomErr);
5250:                 return;
5251:             }
5252: 
5253:             if (!room || room.status !== 'playing') return;
5254: 
5255:             const now = Date.now();
5256:             const elapsed = now - (turnStartedAtMs || now);
5257:             if (elapsed < gameInactivityTimeout) return;
5258: 
5259:             // Time is up — either kick active player or auto-advance
5260:             console.log('⏰ Turn timer expired. kickOnTurnTimeout:', kickOnTurnTimeout, 'activePlayerIndex:', activePlayerIndex, 'isPlacementPhase:', isPlacementPhase);
5261: 
5262:             // SPECIAL CASE: During placement phase, timeout should kick all players back to lobby
5263:             if (isPlacementPhase) {
5264:                 console.log('⏰ Turn timeout during placement phase — resetting game to lobby');
5265:                 updateStatus('⏰ Player tile placement timed out — returning all players to lobby');
5266: 
5267:                 // First, kick the AFK player from the lobby
5268:                 const { data: allPlayers } = await supabase
5269:                     .from('players')
5270:                     .select('id, username, player_index');
5271: 
5272:                 const afkPlayer = allPlayers?.find(p => p.player_index === activePlayerIndex);
5273: 
5274:                 if (afkPlayer) {
5275:                     console.log(`👢 Kicking AFK player: ${afkPlayer.username} (index ${afkPlayer.player_index})`);
5276:                     const { error: kickErr } = await supabase
5277:                         .from('players')
5278:                         .delete()
5279:                         .eq('id', afkPlayer.id);
5280: 
5281:                     if (kickErr) {
5282:                         console.error('❌ Failed to kick AFK player:', kickErr);
5283:                     } else {
5284:                         console.log(`✅ AFK player ${afkPlayer.username} removed from lobby`);
5285:                     }
5286:                 }
5287: 
5288:                 // Reset game room to waiting status
5289:                 const { error: resetErr } = await supabase
5290:                     .from('game_room')
5291:                     .update({ status: 'waiting' })
5292:                     .eq('id', currentGameId);
5293: 
5294:                 if (resetErr) {
5295:                     console.error('❌ Failed to reset game room:', resetErr);
5296:                 }
5297: 
5298:                 // Wait a moment for DELETE event to propagate to all clients
5299:                 await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
5300: 
5301:                 // Broadcast game-reset event to all players
5302:                 if (typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
5303:                     broadcastGameAction('game-reset', {
5304:                         reason: 'placement-timeout',
5305:                         kickedPlayerIndex: activePlayerIndex
5306:                     });
5307:                 }
5308: 
5309:                 // Reset local game state (host)
5310:                 if (typeof resetToLobby === 'function') {
5311:                     resetToLobby();
5312:                 }
5313:                 return;
5314:             }
5315: 
5316:             // SPECIAL CASE: If the active player has an unresolved scroll cascade, they forfeit.
5317:             // (They must place the overflowing scroll before ending their turn; if time runs out, they lose.)
5318:             const hasCascade = typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.hasPendingCascade(activePlayerIndex);
5319:             if (hasCascade) {
5320:                 const forfeiterName = typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function'
5321:                     ? getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex) : `Player ${activePlayerIndex + 1}`;
5322:                 console.log(`⏰ Cascade forfeit: ${forfeiterName} ran out of time with unresolved cascade`);
5323:                 updateStatus(`⏰ ${forfeiterName} ran out of time with an unresolved scroll cascade — forfeiting!`);
5324:                 if (typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
5325:                     broadcastGameAction('cascade-forfeit', { playerIndex: activePlayerIndex });
5326:                 }
5327:                 // Remove the forfeiting player from the game (same as kick path)
5328:                 const { data: forfeitPlayers } = await supabase
5329:                     .from('players')
5330:                     .select('id, username, player_index')
5331:                     .eq('game_id', currentGameId);
5332:                 const forfeitPlayer = forfeitPlayers?.find(p => p.player_index === activePlayerIndex);
5333:                 if (forfeitPlayer) {
5334:                     await supabase.rpc('remove_player', { p_player_id: forfeitPlayer.id });
5335:                 }
5336:                 await hostAdvanceToNextPlayerAndRestartTimer();
5337:                 return;
5338:             }
5339: 
5340:             // NORMAL GAME PHASE: Use existing kick/auto-advance logic
5341:             if (kickOnTurnTimeout) {
5342:                 // Kick active player
5343:                 const { data: allPlayers } = await supabase
5344:                     .from('players')
5345:                     .select('id, username, player_index')
5346:                     .eq('game_id', currentGameId);
5347: 
5348:                 const activePlayer = allPlayers?.find(p => p.player_index === activePlayerIndex);
5349: 
5350:                 if (activePlayer) {
5351:                     const { error: kickErr } = await supabase
5352:                         .rpc('remove_player', { p_player_id: activePlayer.id });
5353: 
5354:                     if (kickErr) {
5355:                         console.error('❌ Failed to kick player (turn timeout):', kickErr);
5356:                         return;
5357:                     }
5358: 
5359:                     updateStatus(`⏰ ${activePlayer.username} was kicked (turn timer expired)`);
5360:                 } else {
5361:                     console.warn('⚠️ Turn timeout expired but active player not found in DB');
5362:                 }
5363:             } else {
5364:                 updateStatus('⏰ Turn timer expired — auto-passing turn.');
5365:             }
5366: 
5367:             // Advance to next available player and restart the timer
5368:             await hostAdvanceToNextPlayerAndRestartTimer();
5369:         }
5370: 
5371:         async function hostAdvanceToNextPlayerAndRestartTimer() {
5372:             // Fetch remaining players and choose the next index based on player_index ordering
5373:             const { data: remainingPlayers, error } = await supabase
5374:                 .from('players')
5375:                 .select('player_index')
5376:                 .eq('game_id', currentGameId)
5377:                 .order('player_index', { ascending: true });
5378: 
5379:             if (error) {
5380:                 console.error('❌ Failed to read players to advance turn:', error);
5381:                 return;
5382:             }
5383: 
5384:             const indices = (remainingPlayers || [])
5385:                 .map(p => p.player_index)
5386:                 .filter(i => i !== null && i !== undefined)
5387:                 .sort((a, b) => a - b);
5388: 
5389:             if (indices.length === 0) return;
5390: 
5391:             // Last player standing — they win
5392:             if (indices.length === 1 && typeof handleGameOver === 'function') {
5393:                 console.log('🏆 Last player standing after kick/forfeit:', indices[0]);
5394:                 await handleGameOver(indices[0], 'last_standing');
5395:                 return;
5396:             }
5397: 
5398:             // Find next index after current; wrap around
5399:             let nextIndex = indices.find(i => i > activePlayerIndex);
5400:             if (nextIndex === undefined) nextIndex = indices[0];
5401: 
5402:             activePlayerIndex = nextIndex;
5403: 
5404:             // Restart timer anchored to host time
5405:             const started = Date.now();
5406:             turnStartedAtMs = started;
5407:             currentTurnNumber++;
5408: 
5409:             // Broadcast turn change with shared turn start timestamp and turn number
5410:             broadcastGameAction('turn-change', {
5411:                 playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
5412:                 turnStartedAt: started,
5413:                 turnNumber: currentTurnNumber
5414:             });
5415: 
5416:             // Update local display as host
5417:             if (isPlacementPhase) {
5418:                 // During placement phase, turn display is handled in the turn-change receiver
5419:             } else {
5420:                 updateTurnDisplay();
5421:             }
5422:         }
5423: 
5424:         // Start turn timer monitoring (host enforcement + local display)
5425:         function startTurnTimerMonitoring() {
5426:             // Stop any existing
5427:             stopTurnTimerMonitoring();
5428: 
5429:             // Ensure we have a baseline turn start
5430:             if (!turnStartedAtMs) turnStartedAtMs = Date.now();
5431: 
5432:             // Host enforces every second
5433:             if (isHost) {
5434:                 turnTimeoutInterval = setInterval(() => {
5435:                     // avoid unhandled promise rejections
5436:                     checkTurnTimeout().catch(err => console.error('Turn timeout check failed:', err));
5437:                 }, 1000);
5438: 
5439:                 // Host also broadcasts periodic sync every 5 seconds
5440:                 turnSyncInterval = setInterval(() => {
5441:                     if (isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
5442:                         broadcastGameAction('turn-sync', {
5443:                             playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
5444:                             turnNumber: currentTurnNumber,
5445:                             turnStartedAt: turnStartedAtMs
5446:                         });
5447:                         console.log(`🔄 Turn sync broadcast: turn ${currentTurnNumber}, player ${activePlayerIndex}`);
5448:                     }
5449:                 }, 5000);
5450: 
5451:                 // Host also broadcasts common area sync every 10 seconds
5452:                 commonAreaSyncInterval = setInterval(() => {
5453:                     if (isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function' && typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined') {
5454:                         // Get current common area state
5455:                         const commonAreaState = {};
5456:                         Object.keys(spellSystem.commonArea).forEach(element => {
5457:                             commonAreaState[element] = spellSystem.commonArea[element];
5458:                         });
5459: 
5460:                         broadcastGameAction('common-area-sync', {
5461:                             commonArea: commonAreaState
5462:                         });
5463:                         console.log(`🔄 Common area sync broadcast:`, commonAreaState);
5464:                     }
5465:                 }, 10000);
5466:             }
5467: 
5468:             // Everyone updates display every second
5469:             startTimerDisplay();
5470:         }
5471: 
5472:         // Stop turn timer monitoring
5473:         function stopTurnTimerMonitoring() {
5474:             if (turnTimeoutInterval) {
5475:                 clearInterval(turnTimeoutInterval);
5476:                 turnTimeoutInterval = null;
5477:             }
5478:             if (turnSyncInterval) {
5479:                 clearInterval(turnSyncInterval);
5480:                 turnSyncInterval = null;
5481:             }
5482:             if (commonAreaSyncInterval) {
5483:                 clearInterval(commonAreaSyncInterval);
5484:                 commonAreaSyncInterval = null;
5485:             }
5486:             stopTimerDisplay();
5487:         }
5488: 
5489:         // Sync current player state (AP and resources) in multiplayer
5490:         function syncPlayerState() {
5491:             if (!isMultiplayer) return;
5492: 
5493:             // Record activity
5494:             recordActivity();
5495: 
5496:             // Use global currentAP/voidAP only when we ARE the active player;
5497:             // otherwise fall back to last-known stored values for that player.
5498:             const isMyTurn = (myPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex);
5499:             const apToSend = isMyTurn ? currentAP : (playerAPs[activePlayerIndex]?.currentAP ?? 5);
5500:             const voidApToSend = isMyTurn ? voidAP : (playerAPs[activePlayerIndex]?.voidAP ?? 0);
5501: 
5502:             // Update local tracking
5503:             if (!playerAPs[activePlayerIndex]) {
5504:                 playerAPs[activePlayerIndex] = { currentAP: 5, voidAP: 0 };
5505:             }
5506:             if (isMyTurn) {
5507:                 playerAPs[activePlayerIndex].currentAP = currentAP;
5508:                 playerAPs[activePlayerIndex].voidAP = voidAP;
5509:             }
5510: 
5511:             // Only broadcast resources when it's our own turn.
5512:             // When it's not our turn, we must not broadcast the other player's
5513:             // resource pool — we may have modified it locally (e.g. during
5514:             // processPsychicPending), and broadcasting those values would cause
5515:             // the active player's client to double-apply pool changes (e.g.
5516:             // Respirate drawing wind stones twice).
5517:             const activeResources = isMyTurn
5518:                 ? (playerPools[activePlayerIndex] || { ...INITIAL_PLAYER_STONES })
5519:                 : null;
5520:             broadcastGameAction('player-state-update', {
5521:                 playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
5522:                 currentAP: apToSend,
5523:                 voidAP: voidApToSend,
5524:                 resources: activeResources
5525:             });
5526:         }
5527: 
5528:         // Show tooltip with player's AP and resources
5529:         function updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex = null) {
5530:             // If no player index specified, use active player
5531:             if (playerIndex === null) {
5532:                 playerIndex = activePlayerIndex;
5533:             }
5534:             
5535:             // Find THIS player's tile
5536:             const playerTile = placedTiles.find(t => t.isPlayerTile && t.playerIndex === playerIndex);
5537:             if (!playerTile) {
5538:                 console.log(`No player tile found for player ${playerIndex}`);
5539:                 return;
5540:             }
5541: 
5542:             const symbolsGroup = playerTile.element.querySelector('.player-tile-element-symbols');
5543:             if (!symbolsGroup) return;
5544: 
5545:             // Clear existing symbols
5546:             symbolsGroup.innerHTML = '';
5547: 
5548:             // Get activated elements for THIS specific player
5549:             const playerScrollData = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
5550:             if (!playerScrollData) return;
5551:             
5552:             const activatedElements = Array.from(playerScrollData.activated);
5553:             
5554:             if (activatedElements.length === 0) return;
5555: 
5556:             // Arrange symbols in a tight pentagon pattern inside the tile's center hex
5557:             // Keep radius well within TILE_SIZE (20) so symbols never bleed outside the tile
5558:             const radius = TILE_SIZE * 0.75; // ~15 units — inside the center hex (r=20)
5559:             const angleStep = (Math.PI * 2) / 5;
5560:             const elementOrder = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
5561: 
5562:             activatedElements.forEach(element => {
5563:                 const index = elementOrder.indexOf(element);
5564:                 const angle = angleStep * index - Math.PI / 2; // Start at top
5565:                 const x = Math.cos(angle) * radius;
5566:                 const y = Math.sin(angle) * radius;
5567: 
5568:                 // Outline ring so the pip is visible against any background
5569:                 const symbolBg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
5570:                 symbolBg.setAttribute('cx', x);
5571:                 symbolBg.setAttribute('cy', y);
5572:                 symbolBg.setAttribute('r', '9');
5573:                 symbolBg.setAttribute('fill', '#000');
5574:                 symbolBg.setAttribute('stroke', STONE_TYPES[element].color);
5575:                 symbolBg.setAttribute('stroke-width', '1.5');
5576:                 symbolsGroup.appendChild(symbolBg);
5577: 
5578:                 // Element image (screen blend so black bg is transparent)
5579:                 const imgEl = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'image');
5580:                 imgEl.setAttribute('href', STONE_TYPES[element].img);
5581:                 imgEl.setAttribute('x', x - 9);
5582:                 imgEl.setAttribute('y', y - 9);
5583:                 imgEl.setAttribute('width', '18');
5584:                 imgEl.setAttribute('height', '18');
5585:                 imgEl.setAttribute('clip-path', `circle(9px at center)`);
5586:                 imgEl.style.mixBlendMode = 'screen';
5587:                 symbolsGroup.appendChild(imgEl);
5588:             });
5589: 
5590:             console.log(`🎨 Updated player ${playerIndex}'s TILE with ${activatedElements.length} element symbol(s): ${activatedElements.join(', ')}`);
5591: 
5592:             // Refresh Players panel win-condition progress
5593:             if (typeof updateOpponentPanel === 'function') updateOpponentPanel();
5594:         }
5595: 
5596:         // Expose on window so scroll-effects.js (outside this IIFE) can call it
5597:         window.updatePlayerElementSymbols = updatePlayerElementSymbols;
5598: 
5599:         function startPlayerDrag(e, options = {}) {
5600:             const takeFlight = !!options.isTakeFlight || ((typeof window !== 'undefined') && window.takeFlightState?.active);
5601:             const playerIndex = (typeof options.playerIndex === 'number') ? options.playerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
5602: 
5603:             // Check if it's this player's turn (unless Take Flight drag)
5604:             if (!takeFlight && !isMyTurn()) {
5605:                 notYourTurn();
5606:                 return;
5607:             }
5608: 
5609:             const draggedPlayer = playerPositions[playerIndex];
5610:             if (!draggedPlayer) {
5611:                 console.warn('startPlayerDrag: player not found', playerIndex);
5612:                 return;
5613:             }
5614: 
5615:             isDraggingPlayer = true;
5616:             playerPath = [{ x: draggedPlayer.x, y: draggedPlayer.y, cost: 0 }];
5617:             lastAttemptedHex = null; // Reset logging state
5618:             draggedPlayer.element.remove();
5619: 
5620:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
5621:             const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
5622:             const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
5623:             const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
5624: 
5625:             ghostPlayer = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
5626:             ghostPlayer.setAttribute('class', 'player stone-ghost');
5627:             ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
5628: 
5629:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
5630:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
5631:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
5632:             circle.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.4);
5633:             circle.setAttribute('class', 'player-marker');
5634: 
5635:             ghostPlayer.appendChild(circle);
5636:             viewport.appendChild(ghostPlayer);
5637: 
5638:             // Create path line (normal movement only)
5639:             if (!takeFlight) {
5640:                 pathLine = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polyline');
5641:                 pathLine.setAttribute('id', 'player-path');
5642:                 pathLine.setAttribute('fill', 'none');
5643:                 pathLine.setAttribute('stroke', '#58a4f4');
5644:                 pathLine.setAttribute('stroke-width', '3');
5645:                 pathLine.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray', '5,5');
5646:                 pathLine.setAttribute('opacity', '0.7');
5647:                 viewport.insertBefore(pathLine, ghostPlayer);
5648:             }
5649:         }
5650: 
5651:         let lastAttemptedHex = null;
5652: 
5653:         // Find if target is reachable through a chain of wind stones/water-with-wind
5654:         function findWindPath(startX, startY, targetX, targetY) {
5655:             // BFS to find path through wind stones
5656:             const queue = [{x: startX, y: startY, path: []}];
5657:             const visited = new Set();
5658:             visited.add(`${startX.toFixed(1)},${startY.toFixed(1)}`);
5659: 
5660:             while (queue.length > 0) {
5661:                 const current = queue.shift();
5662: 
5663:                 // Get all wind stones and water-with-wind adjacent to current position
5664:                 const windStones = getAdjacentWindStones(current.x, current.y);
5665: 
5666:                 // Also check water with chained wind
5667:                 const neighbors = getNeighborStones(current.x, current.y);
5668:                 const waterWithWind = neighbors.filter(n => {
5669:                     if (n.type !== 'water') return false;
5670:                     const chainedAbility = getChainedAbility(n.x, n.y);
5671:                     return chainedAbility === 'wind';
5672:                 });
5673: 
5674:                 const allWindSources = [...windStones, ...waterWithWind];
5675: 
5676:                 for (const windSource of allWindSources) {
5677:                     const key = `${windSource.x.toFixed(1)},${windSource.y.toFixed(1)}`;
5678: 
5679:                     // Skip if nullified by void
5680:                     const hasVoid = hasAdjacentStoneType(windSource.x, windSource.y, 'void');
5681:                     if (hasVoid) continue;
5682: 
5683:                     // Check if target is adjacent to this wind source
5684:                     const windNeighbors = getNeighborHexPositions(windSource.x, windSource.y);
5685:                     const canReachTarget = windNeighbors.some(n =>
5686:                         Math.sqrt(Math.pow(n.x - targetX, 2) + Math.pow(n.y - targetY, 2)) < 5
5687:                     );
5688: 
5689:                     if (canReachTarget) {
5690:                         // Found a path!
5691:                         return [...current.path, windSource];
5692:                     }
5693: 
5694:                     // Continue searching through this wind source
5695:                     if (!visited.has(key)) {
5696:                         visited.add(key);
5697:                         queue.push({
5698:                             x: windSource.x,
5699:                             y: windSource.y,
5700:                             path: [...current.path, windSource]
5701:                         });
5702:                     }
5703:                 }
5704:             }
5705: 
5706:             return null; // No path found
5707:         }
5708: 
5709:         function findGeneralPath(startX, startY, targetX, targetY, maxCost) {
5710:             // A* pathfinding to find cheapest path through any hex
5711:             const openSet = [{x: startX, y: startY, path: [], cost: 0, priority: 0}];
5712:             const visited = new Map();
5713: 
5714:             while (openSet.length > 0) {
5715:                 // Get node with lowest priority (cost + heuristic)
5716:                 openSet.sort((a, b) => a.priority - b.priority);
5717:                 const current = openSet.shift();
5718: 
5719:                 const key = `${current.x.toFixed(1)},${current.y.toFixed(1)}`;
5720: 
5721:                 // Skip if we've visited this with lower cost
5722:                 if (visited.has(key) && visited.get(key) <= current.cost) continue;
5723:                 visited.set(key, current.cost);
5724: 
5725:                 // Check if we reached the target
5726:                 const distToTarget = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(current.x - targetX, 2) + Math.pow(current.y - targetY, 2));
5727:                 if (distToTarget < 5) {
5728:                     return { path: current.path, cost: current.cost };
5729:                 }
5730: 
5731:                 // Explore neighbors
5732:                 const neighbors = getNeighborHexPositions(current.x, current.y);
5733:                 for (const neighbor of neighbors) {
5734:                     const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(neighbor.x, neighbor.y);
5735: 
5736:                     if (moveCheck.canMove) {
5737:                         const newCost = current.cost + moveCheck.cost;
5738: 
5739:                         // Skip if would exceed max cost
5740:                         if (newCost > maxCost) continue;
5741: 
5742:                         const neighborKey = `${neighbor.x.toFixed(1)},${neighbor.y.toFixed(1)}`;
5743: 
5744:                         // Skip if already visited with lower cost
5745:                         if (visited.has(neighborKey) && visited.get(neighborKey) <= newCost) continue;
5746: 
5747:                         // Calculate heuristic (straight-line distance to target)
5748:                         const heuristic = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(neighbor.x - targetX, 2) + Math.pow(neighbor.y - targetY, 2)) / TILE_SIZE;
5749: 
5750:                         openSet.push({
5751:                             x: neighbor.x,
5752:                             y: neighbor.y,
5753:                             path: [...current.path, {x: neighbor.x, y: neighbor.y, cost: moveCheck.cost}],
5754:                             cost: newCost,
5755:                             priority: newCost + heuristic
5756:                         });
5757:                     }
5758:                 }
5759:             }
5760: 
5761:             return null; // No path found
5762:         }
5763: 
5764:         function getAdjacentWindStones(x, y) {
5765:             const neighbors = getNeighborHexPositions(x, y);
5766:             const windStones = [];
5767: 
5768:             neighbors.forEach(neighborPos => {
5769:                 const stone = placedStones.find(s => {
5770:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - neighborPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - neighborPos.y, 2));
5771:                     if (dist >= 5) return false;
5772: 
5773:                     // Check if it's wind or water mimicking wind
5774:                     const effectiveType = getEffectiveStoneType(s);
5775:                     return effectiveType === 'wind';
5776:                 });
5777:                 if (stone) {
5778:                     windStones.push(stone);
5779:                 }
5780:             });
5781: 
5782:             return windStones;
5783:         }
5784: 
5785:         function getAdjacentEarthStones(x, y) {
5786:             const neighbors = getNeighborHexPositions(x, y);
5787:             const earthStones = [];
5788: 
5789:             neighbors.forEach(neighborPos => {
5790:                 const stone = placedStones.find(s => {
5791:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - neighborPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - neighborPos.y, 2));
5792:                     if (dist >= 5) return false;
5793: 
5794:                     // Check if it's earth or water mimicking earth
5795:                     const effectiveType = getEffectiveStoneType(s);
5796:                     return effectiveType === 'earth';
5797:                 });
5798:                 if (stone) {
5799:                     earthStones.push(stone);
5800:                 }
5801:             });
5802: 
5803:             return earthStones;
5804:         }
5805: 
5806:         // Get the chained ability for a water stone by flood-filling through connected water
5807:         function getChainedAbility(x, y) {
5808:             // Only water stones can receive chained abilities
5809:             const stone = placedStones.find(s => {
5810:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - y, 2));
5811:                 return dist < 5;
5812:             });
5813: 
5814:             if (!stone || stone.type !== 'water') {
5815:                 return null; // Not a water stone
5816:             }
5817: 
5818:             // Check if THIS water stone is nullified by void
5819:             const waterNullified = hasAdjacentStoneType(x, y, 'void');
5820:             if (waterNullified) {
5821:                 return null; // Water's chaining ability is nullified by adjacent void
5822:             }
5823: 
5824:             // Flood fill through connected water to find wind/earth sources
5825:             const visited = new Set();
5826:             const queue = [{x, y}];
5827:             visited.add(`${x.toFixed(1)},${y.toFixed(1)}`);
5828: 
5829:             let hasWind = false;
5830:             let hasEarth = false;
5831: 
5832:             while (queue.length > 0) {
5833:                 const current = queue.shift();
5834:                 const neighbors = getNeighborStones(current.x, current.y);
5835: 
5836:                 for (const neighbor of neighbors) {
5837:                     const key = `${neighbor.x.toFixed(1)},${neighbor.y.toFixed(1)}`;
5838: 
5839:                     // Check if this neighbor is a source stone (wind or earth, not nullified by void)
5840:                     if (neighbor.type === 'wind') {
5841:                         const voidNullified = hasAdjacentStoneType(neighbor.x, neighbor.y, 'void');
5842:                         if (!voidNullified) {
5843:                             hasWind = true;
5844:                         }
5845:                     } else if (neighbor.type === 'earth') {
5846:                         const voidNullified = hasAdjacentStoneType(neighbor.x, neighbor.y, 'void');
5847:                         if (!voidNullified) {
5848:                             hasEarth = true;
5849:                         }
5850:                     }
5851: 
5852:                     // If neighbor is water and not visited, add to queue to continue flood fill
5853:                     if (neighbor.type === 'water' && !visited.has(key)) {
5854:                         // Check if this water is nullified by void
5855:                         const neighborWaterNullified = hasAdjacentStoneType(neighbor.x, neighbor.y, 'void');
5856:                         if (!neighborWaterNullified) {
5857:                             visited.add(key);
5858:                             queue.push({x: neighbor.x, y: neighbor.y});
5859:                         }
5860:                     }
5861:                 }
5862:             }
5863: 
5864:             // Wind outranks earth
5865:             if (hasWind) return 'wind';
5866:             if (hasEarth) return 'earth';
5867:             return null; // No chained ability
5868:         }
5869: 
5870:         function updatePlayerPath(x, y) {
5871:             const targetPos = findNearestHexPosition(x, y);
5872:             if (!targetPos.valid) return;
5873: 
5874:             const startPos = playerPath[0];
5875:             if (!startPos) return;
5876: 
5877:             const targetKey = `${Math.round(targetPos.x)},${Math.round(targetPos.y)}`;
5878: 
5879:             // No-op if cursor hasn't moved to a different hex
5880:             if (targetKey === lastAttemptedHex) return;
5881:             lastAttemptedHex = targetKey;
5882: 
5883:             // Cursor on start hex → reset path to just the origin
5884:             if (Math.hypot(targetPos.x - startPos.x, targetPos.y - startPos.y) < 5) {
5885:                 playerPath = [{ x: startPos.x, y: startPos.y, cost: 0 }];
5886:                 _applyPathToLine();
5887:                 updatePathLabels();
5888:                 return;
5889:             }
5890: 
5891:             // Cursor is on an existing path node → backtrack to that point
5892:             for (let i = playerPath.length - 1; i >= 1; i--) {
5893:                 if (Math.hypot(playerPath[i].x - targetPos.x, playerPath[i].y - targetPos.y) < 5) {
5894:                     playerPath = playerPath.slice(0, i + 1);
5895:                     _applyPathToLine();
5896:                     updatePathLabels();
5897:                     return;
5898:                 }
5899:             }
5900: 
5901:             // Cursor is already at the end of the path → nothing to do
5902:             const lastPos = playerPath[playerPath.length - 1];
5903:             if (Math.hypot(lastPos.x - targetPos.x, lastPos.y - targetPos.y) < 5) return;
5904: 
5905:             // Find the shortest affordable path from start to the cursor hex using Dijkstra
5906:             const newPath = _dijkstraPath(startPos, targetPos);
5907:             if (newPath) playerPath = newPath;
5908: 
5909:             _applyPathToLine();
5910:             updatePathLabels();
5911:         }
5912: 
5913:         /**
5914:          * Dijkstra shortest-path from startPos to targetPos across placed hexes.
5915:          * Returns a playerPath array [{x, y, cost}] or null if unreachable / unaffordable.
5916:          */
5917:         function _dijkstraPath(startPos, targetPos) {
5918:             const hexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
5919:             const SNAP_R = TILE_SIZE * 0.6;
5920:             const key = (x, y) => `${Math.round(x)},${Math.round(y)}`;
5921:             const startKey = key(startPos.x, startPos.y);
5922:             const targetKey = key(targetPos.x, targetPos.y);
5923:             const totalAP = getTotalAP();
5924: 
5925:             // Snap a theoretical neighbour position to the nearest actual placed hex
5926:             const snapNeighbor = (nx, ny) => {
5927:                 let best = null, bestD = SNAP_R;
5928:                 for (const h of hexes) {
5929:                     const d = Math.hypot(h.x - nx, h.y - ny);
5930:                     if (d < bestD) { bestD = d; best = h; }
5931:                 }
5932:                 return best;
5933:             };
5934: 
5935:             const dist     = new Map([[startKey, 0]]);
5936:             const prev     = new Map([[startKey, null]]);
5937:             const costMap  = new Map([[startKey, 0]]);
5938:             const posMap   = new Map([[startKey, startPos]]);
5939:             const queue    = [{ cost: 0, key: startKey }];
5940: 
5941:             while (queue.length) {
5942:                 // Simple priority queue — board is small so this is fast enough
5943:                 queue.sort((a, b) => a.cost - b.cost);
5944:                 const curr = queue.shift();
5945:                 if (curr.key === targetKey) break;
5946:                 if (curr.cost > (dist.get(curr.key) ?? Infinity)) continue;
5947: 
5948:                 const currPos = posMap.get(curr.key);
5949:                 for (const nb of getNeighborHexPositions(currPos.x, currPos.y)) {
5950:                     const snapped = snapNeighbor(nb.x, nb.y);
5951:                     if (!snapped) continue;
5952: 
5953:                     const nKey = key(snapped.x, snapped.y);
5954:                     const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(snapped.x, snapped.y);
5955:                     if (!moveCheck.canMove) continue;
5956: 
5957:                     const newDist = curr.cost + moveCheck.cost;
5958:                     if (newDist > totalAP) continue;
5959:                     if (newDist >= (dist.get(nKey) ?? Infinity)) continue;
5960: 
5961:                     dist.set(nKey, newDist);
5962:                     prev.set(nKey, curr.key);
5963:                     costMap.set(nKey, moveCheck.cost);
5964:                     posMap.set(nKey, snapped);
5965:                     queue.push({ cost: newDist, key: nKey });
5966:                 }
5967:             }
5968: 
5969:             if (!dist.has(targetKey)) return null;
5970: 
5971:             // Reconstruct path by following parent pointers
5972:             const path = [];
5973:             let k = targetKey;
5974:             while (k !== null) {
5975:                 const p = posMap.get(k);
5976:                 path.unshift({ x: p.x, y: p.y, cost: costMap.get(k) });
5977:                 k = prev.get(k);
5978:             }
5979:             return path;
5980:         }
5981: 
5982:         /** Sync the SVG polyline to the current playerPath */
5983:         function _applyPathToLine() {
5984:             if (!pathLine) return;
5985:             if (playerPath.length > 1) {
5986:                 pathLine.setAttribute('points', playerPath.map(p => `${p.x},${p.y}`).join(' '));
5987:             } else {
5988:                 pathLine.setAttribute('points', '');
5989:             }
5990:         }
5991: 
5992:         function updatePathLabels() {
5993:             // Remove old labels
5994:             pathCostLabels.forEach(label => label.remove());
5995:             pathCostLabels = [];
5996: 
5997:             if (playerPath.length < 2) return;
5998: 
5999:             // Calculate cumulative costs and remaining AP for each segment
6000:             const steamBuff = getSteamVentsBuff();
6001:             let cumulativeCost = 0;
6002:             let banked = steamBuff ? steamBuff.freeStepBanked : false;
6003: 
6004:             for (let i = 1; i < playerPath.length; i++) {
6005:                 const currentSegment = playerPath[i];
6006:                 const stepCost = currentSegment.cost;
6007:                 if (steamBuff && stepCost > 0 && banked) {
6008:                     banked = false; // free step
6009:                 } else {
6010:                     cumulativeCost += stepCost;
6011:                     if (steamBuff && stepCost > 0) banked = true;
6012:                 }
6013:                 const remainingAP = currentAP - cumulativeCost;
6014: 
6015:                 // Calculate midpoint between this segment and previous
6016:                 const prevSegment = playerPath[i - 1];
6017:                 const midX = (currentSegment.x + prevSegment.x) / 2;
6018:                 const midY = (currentSegment.y + prevSegment.y) / 2;
6019: 
6020:                 // Create label
6021:                 const label = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
6022:                 label.setAttribute('x', midX);
6023:                 label.setAttribute('y', midY - 8); // Offset above the line
6024:                 label.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
6025:                 label.setAttribute('fill', remainingAP >= 0 ? '#2ecc71' : '#e74c3c');
6026:                 label.setAttribute('font-size', '14');
6027:                 label.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
6028:                 label.setAttribute('stroke', '#000');
6029:                 label.setAttribute('stroke-width', '0.5');
6030:                 label.setAttribute('paint-order', 'stroke');
6031:                 label.textContent = remainingAP;
6032: 
6033:                 viewport.appendChild(label);
6034:                 pathCostLabels.push(label);
6035:             }
6036:         }
6037: 
6038:         function getNeighborHexPositions(x, y) {
6039:             const neighbors = [];
6040:             const s = TILE_SIZE;
6041:             const dirs = [
6042:                 { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: 1, r: -1 }, { q: 0, r: -1 },
6043:                 { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: -1, r: 1 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }
6044:             ];
6045: 
6046:             for (const dir of dirs) {
6047:                 const pos = hexToPixel(dir.q, dir.r, s);
6048:                 neighbors.push({ x: x + pos.x, y: y + pos.y });
6049:             }
6050:             return neighbors;
6051:         }
6052: 
6053:         function calculatePathCost() {
6054:             let totalCost = 0;
6055:             const steamBuff = getSteamVentsBuff();
6056:             if (steamBuff) {
6057:                 // Steam Vents: every other AP-costing step is free
6058:                 // Start from the buff's current banked state
6059:                 let banked = steamBuff.freeStepBanked;
6060:                 for (let i = 1; i < playerPath.length; i++) {
6061:                     const stepCost = playerPath[i].cost;
6062:                     if (stepCost > 0 && banked) {
6063:                         // This step is free (banked from previous paid step)
6064:                         banked = false;
6065:                     } else {
6066:                         totalCost += stepCost;
6067:                         if (stepCost > 0) banked = true; // Bank a free step for next
6068:                     }
6069:                 }
6070:             } else {
6071:                 for (let i = 1; i < playerPath.length; i++) {
6072:                     totalCost += playerPath[i].cost;
6073:                 }
6074:             }
6075:             return totalCost;
6076:         }
6077: 
6078:         function getSteamVentsBuff() {
6079:             const buff = spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.steamVents;
6080:             return (buff && buff.playerIndex === activePlayerIndex) ? buff : null;
6081:         }
6082: 
6083:         function hasSteamVentsBuff() {
6084:             return !!getSteamVentsBuff();
6085:         }
6086: 
6087:         // After committing movement, update the Steam Vents banked state
6088:         // so future moves in the same turn remember the alternation
6089:         function commitSteamVentsState(path) {
6090:             const buff = getSteamVentsBuff();
6091:             if (!buff) return;
6092:             let banked = buff.freeStepBanked;
6093:             for (let i = 1; i < path.length; i++) {
6094:                 const stepCost = path[i].cost;
6095:                 if (stepCost > 0 && banked) {
6096:                     banked = false;
6097:                 } else if (stepCost > 0) {
6098:                     banked = true;
6099:                 }
6100:             }
6101:             buff.freeStepBanked = banked;
6102:             console.log(`♨️ Steam Vents: freeStepBanked now = ${banked}`);
6103:         }
6104:         if (typeof window !== 'undefined') window.commitSteamVentsState = commitSteamVentsState;
6105: 
6106:         // Calculate movement cost for tap-to-move (simple BFS pathfinding)
6107:         function calculateTapMoveCost(startPos, endPos) {
6108:             const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
6109:             if (allHexes.length === 0) return -1;
6110: 
6111:             // Find start and end hexes
6112:             let startHex = null, endHex = null;
6113:             allHexes.forEach(hex => {
6114:                 const startDist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hex.x - startPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(hex.y - startPos.y, 2));
6115:                 const endDist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hex.x - endPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(hex.y - endPos.y, 2));
6116:                 if (startDist < 5) startHex = hex;
6117:                 if (endDist < 5) endHex = hex;
6118:             });
6119: 
6120:             if (!startHex || !endHex) return -1;
6121:             if (startHex.key === endHex.key) return 0;
6122: 
6123:             // BFS to find shortest path
6124:             const visited = new Set();
6125:             const steamBuff = getSteamVentsBuff();
6126:             const startBanked = steamBuff ? steamBuff.freeStepBanked : false;
6127:             const queue = [{ hex: startHex, cost: 0, banked: startBanked }];
6128:             visited.add(startHex.key);
6129: 
6130:             while (queue.length > 0) {
6131:                 const { hex, cost, banked } = queue.shift();
6132: 
6133:                 // Find adjacent hexes (within ~35 units - one hex step)
6134:                 const neighbors = allHexes.filter(h => {
6135:                     if (visited.has(h.key)) return false;
6136:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(h.x - hex.x, 2) + Math.pow(h.y - hex.y, 2));
6137:                     return dist > 5 && dist < 40; // Adjacent hex distance
6138:                 });
6139: 
6140:                 for (const neighbor of neighbors) {
6141:                     const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(neighbor.x, neighbor.y, false);
6142:                     if (!moveCheck.canMove) continue;
6143: 
6144:                     let newCost = cost;
6145:                     let newBanked = banked;
6146:                     const stepCost = moveCheck.cost ?? 1;
6147:                     if (steamBuff && stepCost > 0 && newBanked) {
6148:                         newBanked = false; // free step
6149:                     } else {
6150:                         newCost += stepCost;
6151:                         if (steamBuff && stepCost > 0) newBanked = true;
6152:                     }
6153:                     visited.add(neighbor.key);
6154: 
6155:                     if (neighbor.key === endHex.key) {
6156:                         return newCost;
6157:                     }
6158: 
6159:                     queue.push({ hex: neighbor, cost: newCost, banked: newBanked });
6160:                 }
6161:             }
6162: 
6163:             return -1; // No path found
6164:         }
6165: 
6166:         let nextStoneId = 1; // Global counter for unique stone IDs
6167: 
6168:         // Returns a darkened version of a hex color (factor 0–1)
6169:         function darkenHex(hex, factor) {
6170:             const c = hex.replace('#', '');
6171:             const r = Math.round(parseInt(c.slice(0, 2), 16) * factor);
6172:             const g = Math.round(parseInt(c.slice(2, 4), 16) * factor);
6173:             const b = Math.round(parseInt(c.slice(4, 6), 16) * factor);
6174:             return `rgb(${r},${g},${b})`;
6175:         }
6176: 
6177:         function placeStone(x, y, type) {
6178:             const stoneId = nextStoneId++;
6179:             console.log(`   Placing stone: id=${stoneId}, type=${type}, position=(${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)})`);
6180: 
6181:             // Broadcast stone placement to other players
6182:             broadcastGameAction('stone-place', {
6183:                 x: x,
6184:                 y: y,
6185:                 stoneType: type
6186:             });
6187: 
6188:             const stoneGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
6189:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('class', 'stone');
6190:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('data-stone-id', stoneId);
6191:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
6192: 
6193:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
6194:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
6195:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
6196:             circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
6197:             circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
6198:             circle.setAttribute('fill', darkenHex(STONE_TYPES[type].color, 0.55));
6199:             circle.setAttribute('stroke', STONE_TYPES[type].color);
6200:             circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '1.5');
6201: 
6202:             const stoneImg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'image');
6203:             stoneImg.setAttribute('href', STONE_TYPES[type].img);
6204:             stoneImg.setAttribute('x', -STONE_SIZE);
6205:             stoneImg.setAttribute('y', -STONE_SIZE);
6206:             stoneImg.setAttribute('width', STONE_SIZE * 2);
6207:             stoneImg.setAttribute('height', STONE_SIZE * 2);
6208:             // No opacity reduction — symbol renders at full strength
6209: 
6210:             stoneGroup.appendChild(circle);
6211:             stoneGroup.appendChild(stoneImg);
6212: 
6213:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
6214:                 e.stopPropagation();
6215:                 e.preventDefault();
6216:                 if (e.button !== 0) return;
6217: 
6218:                 const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
6219:                     ? myPlayerIndex
6220:                     : activePlayerIndex;
6221:                 const canMoveStone = spellSystem
6222:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects
6223:                     && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove === 'function'
6224:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove(currentPlayerIdx);
6225: 
6226:                 if (canMoveStone) {
6227:                     startStoneDrag(stoneId, e);
6228:                     return;
6229:                 }
6230: 
6231:                 // Stone dragging disabled - stones can only be placed from pool or broken (right-click)
6232:                 updateStatus('Right-click to break this stone (costs AP based on rank)');
6233:             });
6234: 
6235:             // Touch support: long-press to break stone
6236:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
6237:                 e.stopPropagation();
6238:                 e.preventDefault();
6239: 
6240:                 const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
6241:                     ? myPlayerIndex
6242:                     : activePlayerIndex;
6243:                 const canMoveStone = spellSystem
6244:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects
6245:                     && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove === 'function'
6246:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove(currentPlayerIdx);
6247: 
6248:                 if (canMoveStone && e.touches && e.touches.length === 1) {
6249:                     const t = e.touches[0];
6250:                     startStoneDrag(stoneId, {
6251:                         clientX: t.clientX,
6252:                         clientY: t.clientY,
6253:                         button: 0,
6254:                         preventDefault: () => {},
6255:                         stopPropagation: () => {}
6256:                     });
6257:                     return;
6258:                 }
6259: 
6260:                 updateStatus('Long-press to break this stone (costs AP based on rank)');
6261:                 clearTimeout(stoneLongPressTimer);
6262:                 stoneLongPressTimer = setTimeout(() => {
6263:                     attemptBreakStone(stoneId);
6264:                 }, 650);
6265:             }, { passive: false });
6266: 
6267:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
6268:                 clearTimeout(stoneLongPressTimer);
6269:                 stoneLongPressTimer = null;
6270:             });
6271: 
6272:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => {
6273:                 e.stopPropagation();
6274:                 e.preventDefault();
6275:                 attemptBreakStone(stoneId);
6276:             });
6277: 
6278:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
6279:                 e.stopPropagation();
6280:                 
6281:                 // Check if stone is adjacent to player and show break cost
6282:                 const stone = placedStones.find(s => s.id === stoneId);
6283:                 if (stone && playerPosition && isAdjacentToPlayer(stone.x, stone.y)) {
6284:                     const STONE_RANK = { 'void': 1, 'wind': 2, 'fire': 3, 'water': 4, 'earth': 5 };
6285:                     const breakCost = STONE_RANK[stone.type];
6286:                     const canAffordBreak = getTotalAP() >= breakCost;
6287:                     
6288:                     stoneGroup.style.cursor = 'pointer';
6289:                     stoneGroup.style.filter = canAffordBreak ? 'brightness(1.3)' : 'brightness(0.7)';
6290:                     
6291:                     updateStatus(`Right-click to break ${stone.type} stone (${breakCost} AP)${canAffordBreak ? '' : ' - Not enough AP!'}`);
6292:                 }
6293:             });
6294: 
6295:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
6296:                 e.stopPropagation();
6297:                 stoneGroup.style.filter = '';
6298:             });
6299: 
6300:             viewport.appendChild(stoneGroup);
6301: 
6302:             placedStones.push({
6303:                 id: stoneId,
6304:                 x: x,
6305:                 y: y,
6306:                 type: type,
6307:                 element: stoneGroup
6308:             });
6309: 
6310:             // Tutorial hook — fires after stone added to placedStones
6311:             if (window.isTutorialMode && window.TutorialMode?.onStonePlaced) {
6312:                 window.TutorialMode.onStonePlaced(type, x, y);
6313:             }
6314: 
6315:             // Track for Burning Motivation: grant AP per stone placed (until end of turn, stacks)
6316:             if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
6317:                 const buff = spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs?.burningMotivation;
6318:                 if (buff && buff.playerIndex === activePlayerIndex && buff.stacks > 0) {
6319:                     const apGain = buff.stacks * 2;
6320:                     if (apGain > 0 && typeof addAP === 'function') {
6321:                         addAP(apGain);
6322:                         if (typeof updateStatus === 'function') {
6323:                             updateStatus(`Burning Motivation! +${apGain} AP for placing a stone.`);
6324:                         }
6325:                     }
6326:                 }
6327:             }
6328: 
6329:             updateTileClasses();
6330:             processStoneInteractions(x, y, type);
6331: 
6332:             // Re-check all fire stones in case void was moved away
6333:             recheckAllStoneInteractions();
6334: 
6335:             // Update visuals for all water stones (mimicry indicators)
6336:             updateAllWaterStoneVisuals();
6337: 
6338:             // Control the Current: if a water stone was just placed during water-transform mode,
6339:             // refresh highlights so the new stone gets its click handler attached immediately
6340:             if (type === 'water' &&
6341:                 spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.selectionMode?.type === 'water-transform') {
6342:                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.refreshWaterTransformHighlights();
6343:             }
6344: 
6345:             // Update void nullification indicators
6346:             updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals();
6347: 
6348:             return stoneId;
6349:         }
6350: 
6351:         // Place a moved stone without broadcasting or pool changes
6352:         function placeMovedStone(x, y, type, stoneId) {
6353:             const resolvedId = (stoneId != null) ? stoneId : nextStoneId++;
6354:             if (resolvedId >= nextStoneId) nextStoneId = resolvedId + 1;
6355: 
6356:             const stoneGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
6357:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('class', 'stone');
6358:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('data-stone-id', resolvedId);
6359:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
6360: 
6361:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
6362:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
6363:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
6364:             circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
6365:             circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
6366:             circle.setAttribute('fill', darkenHex(STONE_TYPES[type].color, 0.55));
6367:             circle.setAttribute('stroke', STONE_TYPES[type].color);
6368:             circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '1.5');
6369: 
6370:             const stoneImg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'image');
6371:             stoneImg.setAttribute('href', STONE_TYPES[type].img);
6372:             stoneImg.setAttribute('x', -STONE_SIZE);
6373:             stoneImg.setAttribute('y', -STONE_SIZE);
6374:             stoneImg.setAttribute('width', STONE_SIZE * 2);
6375:             stoneImg.setAttribute('height', STONE_SIZE * 2);
6376:             // No opacity reduction — symbol renders at full strength
6377: 
6378:             stoneGroup.appendChild(circle);
6379:             stoneGroup.appendChild(stoneImg);
6380: 
6381:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
6382:                 e.stopPropagation();
6383:                 e.preventDefault();
6384:                 if (e.button !== 0) return;
6385: 
6386:                 const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
6387:                     ? myPlayerIndex
6388:                     : activePlayerIndex;
6389:                 const canMoveStone = spellSystem
6390:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects
6391:                     && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove === 'function'
6392:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove(currentPlayerIdx);
6393: 
6394:                 if (canMoveStone) {
6395:                     startStoneDrag(resolvedId, e);
6396:                     return;
6397:                 }
6398: 
6399:                 updateStatus('Right-click to break this stone (costs AP based on rank)');
6400:             });
6401: 
6402:             // Touch support: long-press to break stone (or drag if Wind II is active)
6403:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
6404:                 e.stopPropagation();
6405:                 e.preventDefault();
6406: 
6407:                 const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
6408:                     ? myPlayerIndex
6409:                     : activePlayerIndex;
6410:                 const canMoveStone = spellSystem
6411:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects
6412:                     && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove === 'function'
6413:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove(currentPlayerIdx);
6414: 
6415:                 if (canMoveStone && e.touches && e.touches.length === 1) {
6416:                     const t = e.touches[0];
6417:                     startStoneDrag(resolvedId, {
6418:                         clientX: t.clientX,
6419:                         clientY: t.clientY,
6420:                         button: 0,
6421:                         preventDefault: () => {},
6422:                         stopPropagation: () => {}
6423:                     });
6424:                     return;
6425:                 }
6426: 
6427:                 updateStatus('Long-press to break this stone (costs AP based on rank)');
6428:                 clearTimeout(stoneLongPressTimer);
6429:                 stoneLongPressTimer = setTimeout(() => {
6430:                     attemptBreakStone(resolvedId);
6431:                 }, 650);
6432:             }, { passive: false });
6433: 
6434:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
6435:                 clearTimeout(stoneLongPressTimer);
6436:                 stoneLongPressTimer = null;
6437:             });
6438: 
6439:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => {
6440:                 e.stopPropagation();
6441:                 e.preventDefault();
6442:                 attemptBreakStone(resolvedId);
6443:             });
6444: 
6445:             viewport.appendChild(stoneGroup);
6446: 
6447:             placedStones.push({
6448:                 id: resolvedId,
6449:                 x: x,
6450:                 y: y,
6451:                 type: type,
6452:                 element: stoneGroup
6453:             });
6454: 
6455:             updateTileClasses();
6456:             processStoneInteractions(x, y, type);
6457:             recheckAllStoneInteractions();
6458:             updateAllWaterStoneVisuals();
6459:             updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals();
6460: 
6461:             return resolvedId;
6462:         }
6463: 
6464:         // Visual-only stone move (called when receiving broadcast from other players)
6465:         function moveStoneVisually(stoneId, x, y, stoneType) {
6466:             const stone = placedStones.find(s => s.id === stoneId);
6467:             if (stone) {
6468:                 stone.x = x;
6469:                 stone.y = y;
6470:                 if (stone.element) {
6471:                     stone.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
6472:                 }
6473:                 updateTileClasses();
6474:                 processStoneInteractions(x, y, stone.type);
6475:                 recheckAllStoneInteractions();
6476:                 updateAllWaterStoneVisuals();
6477:                 updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals();
6478:                 return;
6479:             }
6480: 
6481:             if (stoneType) {
6482:                 placeMovedStone(x, y, stoneType, stoneId);
6483:             } else {
6484:                 console.log(`⚠️ Cannot move stone ${stoneId} - not found`);
6485:             }
6486:         }
6487: 
6488:         // Visual-only stone placement (called when receiving broadcast from other players)
6489:         function placeStoneVisually(x, y, stoneType) {
6490:             // Same logic as placeStone but without broadcasting
6491:             const stoneId = nextStoneId++;
6492:             const stoneGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
6493:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('class', 'stone');
6494:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('data-stone-id', stoneId);
6495:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);

6499:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
6500:             circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
6501:             circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
6502:             circle.setAttribute('fill', darkenHex(STONE_TYPES[stoneType].color, 0.55));
6503:             circle.setAttribute('stroke', STONE_TYPES[stoneType].color);
6504:             circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '1.5');
6505:

6507:             stoneImg.setAttribute('href', STONE_TYPES[stoneType].img);
6508:             stoneImg.setAttribute('x', -STONE_SIZE);
6509:             stoneImg.setAttribute('y', -STONE_SIZE);
6510:             stoneImg.setAttribute('width', STONE_SIZE * 2);
6511:             stoneImg.setAttribute('height', STONE_SIZE * 2);
6512:             // No opacity reduction — symbol renders at full strength
6513: 
6514:             stoneGroup.appendChild(circle);
6515:             stoneGroup.appendChild(stoneImg);
6516: 
6517:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
6518:                 e.stopPropagation();
6519:                 e.preventDefault();
6520:                 if (e.button !== 0) return;
6521: 
6522:                 const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
6523:                     ? myPlayerIndex
6524:                     : activePlayerIndex;

6526:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects
6527:                     && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove === 'function'
6528:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove(currentPlayerIdx);
6529: 
6530:                 if (canMoveStone) {
6531:                     startStoneDrag(stoneId, e);
6532:                     return;
6533:                 }
6534: 
6535:                 updateStatus('Right-click to break this stone (costs AP based on rank)');
6536:             });
6537: 
6538:             // Touch support: long-press to break stone
6539:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
6540:                 e.stopPropagation();
6541:                 e.preventDefault();
6542: 
6543:                 const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
6544:                     ? myPlayerIndex
6545:                     : activePlayerIndex;
6546:                 const canMoveStone = spellSystem
6547:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects
6548:                     && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove === 'function'
6549:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove(currentPlayerIdx);
6550:

6572:                 stoneLongPressTimer = null;
6573:             });

6577:                 e.preventDefault();

6584:                 id: stoneId,
