 242:             // ── Description ──────────────────────────────────────────
 243:             const body = document.createElement('div');
 244:             body.style.cssText = 'padding: 16px 18px 4px;';
 245: 
 246:             const desc = document.createElement('div');
 247:             desc.style.cssText = `
 248:                 font-family: var(--font-terminal);
 249:                 font-size: 17px;
 250:                 color: #cfc9b8;
 251:                 line-height: 1.55;
 252:                 text-align: left;
 253:             `;
 254:             desc.textContent = description;
 255:             body.appendChild(desc);
 256:             box.appendChild(body);
 257: 
 258:             // ── Pattern visual ───────────────────────────────────────
 259:             if (pattern?.patterns && typeof spellSystem?.createPatternVisual === 'function') {
 260:                 const sep = document.createElement('div');
 261:                 sep.style.cssText = `
 262:                     margin: 14px 18px 0;
 263:                     border-top: 1px solid ${elementColor}44;
 264:                     padding-top: 12px;
 265:                 `;
 266:                 const patternLabel = document.createElement('div');
 267:                 patternLabel.style.cssText = `
 268:                     font-family: var(--font-pixel);
 269:                     font-size: 10px;
 270:                     color: ${elementColor};
 271:                     letter-spacing: 2px;
 272:                     text-transform: uppercase;
 273:                     margin-bottom: 10px;
 274:                     text-align: center;
 275:                 `;
 276:                 patternLabel.textContent = 'Stone Pattern';
 277:                 sep.appendChild(patternLabel);
 278: 
 279:                 const patternWrap = document.createElement('div');
 280:                 patternWrap.style.cssText = 'display:flex;justify-content:center;padding-bottom:4px;';
 281:                 const visual = spellSystem.createPatternVisual(pattern, element);
 282:                 // Scale up the pattern SVG slightly for readability
 283:                 visual.style.transform = 'scale(1.3)';
 284:                 visual.style.transformOrigin = 'center top';
 285:                 visual.style.marginBottom = '20px';
 286:                 patternWrap.appendChild(visual);
 287:                 sep.appendChild(patternWrap);
 288:                 box.appendChild(sep);
 289:             }
 290: 
 291:             // ── Close button ─────────────────────────────────────────
 292:             const footer = document.createElement('div');
 293:             footer.style.cssText = 'padding: 14px 18px 16px; text-align: center;';
 294:             const closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
 295:             closeBtn.textContent = 'Close';
 296:             closeBtn.className = 'retro-dlg-btn';
 297:             closeBtn.onclick = () => overlay.remove();
 298:             footer.appendChild(closeBtn);
 299:             box.appendChild(footer);
 300: 
 301:             overlay.appendChild(box);
 302:             document.body.appendChild(overlay);
 303:         }
 304:         // Expose globally so scroll-panels.js can call it
 305:         window.showScrollInfoPopup = showScrollInfoPopup;
 306: 
 307:         // Show details for a common area scroll
 308:         function showCommonAreaScrollDetails(scrollName, scrollInfo, element) {
 309:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
 310:             modal.className = 'scroll-browse-modal';
 311:             modal.innerHTML = `
 312:                 <div class="scroll-browse-content">
 313:                     <div class="scroll-browse-header">
 314:                         <h3>${scrollInfo.name || scrollName}</h3>
 315:                         <button class="scroll-browse-close">&times;</button>
 316:                     </div>
 317:                     <div style="padding: 16px;">
 318:                         <div style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 8px;">
 319:                             <strong>Element:</strong> ${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)}
 320:                         </div>
 321:                         <div style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 8px;">
 322:                             <strong>Level:</strong> ${scrollInfo.level || 'N/A'}
 323:                         </div>
 324:                         <div style="color: var(--text-primary); line-height: 1.5;">
 325:                             ${scrollInfo.description || 'No description available.'}
 326:                         </div>
 327:                         <div id="common-area-detail-pattern" style="margin-top: 12px;"></div>
 328:                     </div>
 329:                     <div class="scroll-browse-footer">
 330:                         <button class="btn-close">Close</button>
 331:                     </div>
 332:                 </div>
 333:             `;
 334: 
 335:             document.body.appendChild(modal);
 336: 
 337:             // Add stone formation / pattern display (match other scrolls)
 338:             const patternContainer = modal.querySelector('#common-area-detail-pattern');
 339:             if (patternContainer && scrollInfo.patterns && typeof spellSystem.createPatternVisual === 'function') {
 340:                 const patternVisual = spellSystem.createPatternVisual(scrollInfo, element);
 341:                 patternContainer.appendChild(patternVisual);
 342:             }
 343: 
 344:             // Close handlers
 345:             modal.querySelector('.scroll-browse-close').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
 346:             modal.querySelector('.btn-close').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
 347:             modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
 348:                 if (e.target === modal) modal.remove();
 349:             });
 350:         }
 351: 
 352:         // Show scroll deck browser modal
 353:         function showScrollDeckBrowser(element) {
 354:             if (!spellSystem || !spellSystem.scrollDecks) return;
 355: 
 356:             const deck = spellSystem.scrollDecks[element];
 357:             if (!deck || deck.length === 0) {
 358:                 updateStatus(`The ${element} scroll deck is empty!`);
 359:                 return;
 360:             }
 361: 
 362:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
 363:             modal.className = 'scroll-browse-modal';
 364:             modal.innerHTML = `
 365:                 <div class="scroll-browse-content">
 366:                     <div class="scroll-browse-header">
 367:                         <h3>${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} Scroll Deck (${deck.length})</h3>
 368:                         <button class="scroll-browse-close">&times;</button>
 369:                     </div>
 370:                     <div class="scroll-browse-list" id="scroll-browse-list">
 371:                         <!-- Scrolls will be added here -->
 372:                     </div>
 373:                     <div class="scroll-browse-footer">
 374:                         <button class="btn-shuffle">Shuffle Deck</button>
 375:                         <button class="btn-close">Close</button>
 376:                     </div>
 377:                 </div>
 378:             `;
 379: 
 380:             const listEl = modal.querySelector('#scroll-browse-list');
 381: 
 382:             // Add each scroll in the deck
 383:             deck.forEach((scrollName, index) => {
 384:                 const scrollInfo = spellSystem.patterns?.[scrollName] || SCROLL_DEFINITIONS?.[scrollName];
 385:                 if (!scrollInfo) return;
 386: 
 387:                 const item = document.createElement('div');
 388:                 item.className = 'scroll-browse-item';
 389:                 item.innerHTML = `
 390:                     <div class="scroll-name">${scrollInfo.name || scrollName}</div>
 391:                     <div class="scroll-desc">${scrollInfo.description || 'No description'}</div>
 392:                     <div class="scroll-level">Level ${scrollInfo.level || '?'} • Position ${index + 1} in deck</div>
 393:                 `;
 394: 
 395:                 // Click to draw this scroll
 396:                 item.addEventListener('click', () => {
 397:                     drawScrollFromDeck(element, scrollName, index);
 398:                     modal.remove();
 399:                 });
 400: 
 401:                 listEl.appendChild(item);
 402:             });
 403: 
 404:             document.body.appendChild(modal);
 405: 
 406:             // Close handlers
 407:             modal.querySelector('.scroll-browse-close').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
 408:             modal.querySelector('.btn-close').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
 409:             modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
 410:                 if (e.target === modal) modal.remove();
 411:             });
 412: 
 413:             // Shuffle handler
 414:             modal.querySelector('.btn-shuffle').addEventListener('click', () => {
 415:                 if (spellSystem.shuffleDeck && spellSystem.scrollDecks[element]) {
 416:                     spellSystem.shuffleDeck(spellSystem.scrollDecks[element]);
 417:                     updateStatus(`${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} scroll deck shuffled!`);
 418:                     modal.remove();
 419:                     // Reopen to show new order
 420:                     showScrollDeckBrowser(element);
 421:                 }
 422:             });
 423:         }
 424: 
 425:         // Draw a specific scroll from a deck (for testing)
 426:         function drawScrollFromDeck(element, scrollName, index) {
 427:             if (!spellSystem || !spellSystem.scrollDecks) return;
 428: 
 429:             const deck = spellSystem.scrollDecks[element];
 430:             if (!deck || index >= deck.length) return;
 431: 
 432:             // Remove scroll from deck at specified index
 433:             deck.splice(index, 1);
 434: 
 435:             // Add to player's hand
 436:             const scrolls = spellSystem.getPlayerScrolls(false);
 437: 
 438:             // Check hand limit
 439:             if (scrolls.hand.size >= 4) {
 440:                 updateStatus(`Your hand is full (4 scrolls max)! Discard or use a scroll first.`);
 441:                 // Put scroll back
 442:                 deck.splice(index, 0, scrollName);
 443:                 return;
 444:             }
 445: 
 446:             scrolls.hand.add(scrollName);
 447:             spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
 448:             updateScrollDeckUI();
 449:             updateHUD();
 450: 
 451:             const scrollInfo = spellSystem.patterns?.[scrollName] || SCROLL_DEFINITIONS?.[scrollName];
 452:             updateStatus(`Drew ${scrollInfo?.name || scrollName} from the ${element} deck!`);
 453: 
 454:             // Shuffle the deck after drawing (as requested)
 455:             if (spellSystem.shuffleDeck) {
 456:                 spellSystem.shuffleDeck(deck);
 457:                 console.log(`📜 ${element} deck shuffled after drawing`);
 458:             }
 459: 
 460:             // Broadcast so other clients update their deck/hand state
 461:             if (isMultiplayer) {
 462:                 broadcastGameAction('scroll-collected', {
 463:                     playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 464:                     scrollName: scrollName,
 465:                     shrineType: element
 466:                 });
 467:                 if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
 468:             }
 469:         }
 470: 
 471:         function updateHUD() {
 472:             // Guard: Don't update if game variables aren't initialized yet
 473:             try {
 474:                 if (typeof currentAP === 'undefined' || typeof voidAP === 'undefined') {
 475:                     return;
 476:                 }
 477:             } catch (e) {
 478:                 return; // Variables not ready yet
 479:             }
 480: 
 481:             // Update AP
 482:             const hudApValue = document.getElementById('hud-ap-value');
 483:             if (hudApValue) hudApValue.textContent = currentAP;
 484:             updateApPips(currentAP);
 485: 
 486:             // Update Void AP display
 487:             const hudVoidAp = document.getElementById('hud-void-ap');
 488:             if (hudVoidAp) {
 489:                 hudVoidAp.textContent = voidAP > 0 ? `+${voidAP}` : '';
 490:             }
 491: 
 492:             // Update scroll counts - only if spellSystem is fully initialized
 493:             try {
 494:                 if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem && spellSystem.handScrolls) {
 495:                     const hudHandCount = document.getElementById('hud-hand-count');
 496:                     const hudActiveCount = document.getElementById('hud-active-count');
 497:                     const hudCommonCount = document.getElementById('hud-common-count');
 498: 
 499:                     if (hudHandCount) hudHandCount.textContent = spellSystem.handScrolls.size || 0;
 500:                     if (hudActiveCount) hudActiveCount.textContent = spellSystem.activeScrolls ? spellSystem.activeScrolls.size : 0;
 501:                     if (hudCommonCount && spellSystem.getCommonAreaScrolls) hudCommonCount.textContent = spellSystem.getCommonAreaScrolls().length;
 502:                 }
 503:             } catch (e) {
 504:                 // spellSystem not ready yet
 505:             }
 506: 
 507:             // Update player name/turn indicator
 508:             try {
 509:                 const hudPlayerName = document.getElementById('hud-player-name');
 510:                 const hudPlayerDot  = document.getElementById('hud-player-dot');
 511:                 const hudPlayer     = hudPlayerName?.closest('.hud-player');
 512:                 if (hudPlayerName && typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') {
 513:                     const isMyTurnNow = typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer
 514:                         && myPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex;
 515:                     if (isMyTurnNow) {
 516:                         hudPlayerName.textContent = 'Your Turn';
 517:                     } else {
 518:                         const name = typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function'
 519:                             ? getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex)
 520:                             : `Player ${activePlayerIndex + 1}`;
 521:                         hudPlayerName.textContent = `${name}'s Turn`;
 522:                     }
 523:                     if (hudPlayer) hudPlayer.classList.toggle('your-turn', isMyTurnNow);
 524:                 }
 525: 
 526:                 // Update player dot color — must reflect the ACTIVE player, not the local player
 527:                 if (hudPlayerDot) {
 528:                     const colorMap = {
 529:                         'purple': '#9458f4',
 530:                         'yellow': '#ffce00',
 531:                         'red': '#ed1b43',
 532:                         'blue': '#5894f4',
 533:                         'green': '#69d83a'
 534:                     };
 535:                     // Prefer the active player's colour from allPlayersData
 536:                     const activePlayerData = typeof allPlayersData !== 'undefined'
 537:                         ? allPlayersData.find(p => p.player_index === activePlayerIndex)
 538:                         : null;
 539:                     const activeColorKey = activePlayerData?.color
 540:                         || (typeof playerColor !== 'undefined' ? playerColor : null);
 541:                     hudPlayerDot.style.background = (activeColorKey && colorMap[activeColorKey])
 542:                         ? colorMap[activeColorKey]
 543:                         : '#d9b08c';
 544:                 }
 545:                 // Update shrine dots for current player
 546:                 if (typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') {
 547:                     updateShrineDots(activePlayerIndex);
 548:                 }
 549:                 // Update dock
 550:                 updateDockPlayers();
 551:             } catch (e) {
 552:                 // Variables not ready yet
 553:             }
 554:         }
 555: 
 556:         function updateDockPlayers() { /* removed — dock player roster was redundant with existing AP/turn displays */ }
 557: 
 558:         function updateShrineDots(playerIndex) {
 559:             try {
 560:                 const scrollData = window.spellSystem?.playerScrolls?.[playerIndex];
 561:                 const activated = scrollData?.activated ?? new Set();
 562:                 ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].forEach(el => {
 563:                     const dot = document.getElementById('shrine-dot-' + el);
 564:                     if (!dot) return;
 565:                     dot.classList.toggle('complete', activated.has(el));
 566:                 });
 567:             } catch (e) { /* spellSystem not ready */ }
 568:         }
 569: 
 570:         function updateApPips(apValue) {
 571:             document.querySelectorAll('.ap-pip').forEach(pip => {
 572:                 const n = parseInt(pip.dataset.pip, 10);
 573:                 pip.classList.toggle('filled', n <= apValue);
 574:             });
 575:         }
 576: 
 577:         function setupStoneDragFromCard(card, element) {
 578:             card.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
 579:                 if (stoneCounts[element] <= 0) {
 580:                     updateStatus(`No ${element} stones available!`);
 581:                     return;
 582:                 }
 583:                 // Start dragging a new stone from the deck
 584:                 startStoneDragFromDeck(e, element);
 585:             });
 586:         }
 587: 
 588:         function startStoneDragFromDeck(e, type) {
 589:             // Check if it's this player's turn and no pending cascade
 590:             if (!canTakeAction()) {
 591:                 notYourTurn();
 592:                 return;
 593:             }
 594: 
 595:             if (stoneCounts[type] <= 0) {
 596:                 updateStatus(`No ${type} stones available!`);
 597:                 return;
 598:             }
 599: 
 600:             e.preventDefault();
 601: 
 602:             // Clean up any pre-existing ghost (prevents orphaned stamps if drag starts mid-drag)
 603:             if (ghostStone) {
 604:                 ghostStone.remove();
 605:                 ghostStone = null;
 606:             }
 607: 
 608:             isDraggingFromDeck = true;
 609:             isDraggingStone = true;
 610:             draggedStoneId = null;
 611:             draggedStoneType = type;
 612: 
 613:             // Create ghost stone at cursor position
 614:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
 615:             const coords = getEventCoords(e);
 616:             const screenX = coords.x - rect.left;
 617:             const screenY = coords.y - rect.top;
 618:             const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
 619: 
 620:             ghostStone = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
 621:             ghostStone.setAttribute('class', 'stone stone-ghost');
 622:             ghostStone.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
 623: 
 624:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
 625:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
 626:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
 627:             circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
 628:             circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
 629:             circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[type].color);
 630: 
 631:             const ghostImg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'image');
 632:             ghostImg.setAttribute('href', STONE_TYPES[type].img);
 633:             ghostImg.setAttribute('x', -STONE_SIZE);
 634:             ghostImg.setAttribute('y', -STONE_SIZE);
 635:             ghostImg.setAttribute('width', STONE_SIZE * 2);
 636:             ghostImg.setAttribute('height', STONE_SIZE * 2);
 637:             ghostImg.style.mixBlendMode = 'screen';
 638: 
 639:             ghostStone.appendChild(circle);
 640:             ghostStone.appendChild(ghostImg);
 641:             viewport.appendChild(ghostStone);
 642:         }
 643: 
 644:         function updateSourceCount(type) {
 645:             document.getElementById(type + '-source').textContent = 'Source: ' + sourcePool[type] + '/' + sourcePoolCapacity[type];
 646:         }
 647: 
 648:         function returnStoneToPool(type) {
 649:             // Return a stone to the SOURCE pool (not player pool)
 650:             // This happens when stones are removed from board or destroyed
 651:             const maxStones = sourcePoolCapacity[type];
 652:             if (sourcePool[type] < maxStones) {
 653:                 sourcePool[type]++;
 654:                 updateSourceCount(type);
 655:                 console.log(`♻️ Returned ${type} stone to source pool (${sourcePool[type]}/${maxStones})`);
 656:             } else {
 657:                 console.log(`⚠️ Cannot return ${type} stone to source pool: already at maximum (${maxStones})`);
 658:             }
 659:         }
 660: 
 661:         let lastStatusMessage = null;
 662:         let _statusFlashTimer = null;
 663:         function updateStatus(msg) {
 664:             if (msg === lastStatusMessage) return;
 665:             lastStatusMessage = msg;
 666:             const el = document.getElementById('status');
 667:             if (!el) return;
 668:             el.textContent = msg;
 669:             // Brief gold flash to draw attention to new messages
 670:             el.style.color = '#d9b08c';
 671:             clearTimeout(_statusFlashTimer);
 672:             _statusFlashTimer = setTimeout(() => { el.style.color = ''; }, 1800);
 673:         }
 674: 
 675:         let endTurnPromptShown = false;
 676:         function resetEndTurnPrompt() {
 677:             endTurnPromptShown = false;
 678:         }
 679: 
 680:         window.showEndTurnPrompt = function () {
 681:             if (endTurnPromptShown) return;
 682:             const endTurnBtn = document.getElementById('end-turn');
 683:             if (!endTurnBtn || endTurnBtn.disabled) return;
 684: 
 685:             endTurnPromptShown = true;
 686: 
 687:             const existing = document.getElementById('end-turn-empty-ap-modal');
 688:             if (existing) existing.remove();
 689: 
 690:             const overlay = document.createElement('div');
 691:             overlay.id = 'end-turn-empty-ap-modal';
 692:             overlay.className = 'retro-dlg-overlay';
 693: 
 694:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
 695:             modal.className = 'retro-dlg-box';
 696: 
 697:             const title = document.createElement('div');
 698:             title.textContent = 'Out of AP';
 699:             title.className = 'retro-dlg-title';
 700:             modal.appendChild(title);
 701: 
 702:             const message = document.createElement('div');
 703:             message.textContent = "You're out of AP. Do you want to end your turn?";
 704:             message.className = 'retro-dlg-line';
 705:             modal.appendChild(message);
 706: 
 707:             const btnRow = document.createElement('div');
 708:             btnRow.className = 'retro-dlg-btns';
 709: 
 710:             const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
 711:             cancelBtn.textContent = 'Keep Playing';
 712:             cancelBtn.className = 'retro-dlg-btn cancel';
 713:             cancelBtn.onclick = () => overlay.remove();
 714: 
 715:             const confirmBtn = document.createElement('button');
 716:             confirmBtn.textContent = 'End Turn';
 717:             confirmBtn.className = 'retro-dlg-btn ok';
 718:             confirmBtn.onclick = () => { overlay.remove(); endTurnBtn.click(); };
 719: 
 720:             btnRow.appendChild(cancelBtn);
 721:             btnRow.appendChild(confirmBtn);
 722:             modal.appendChild(btnRow);
 723: 
 724:             overlay.appendChild(modal);
 725:             document.body.appendChild(overlay);
 726:         };
 727: 
 728:         // Update the opponent panel with current game state
 729:         function updateOpponentPanel() {
 730:             const panel = document.getElementById('opponent-panel');
 731:             const rightPanelEl = document.getElementById('right-panel');
 732:             const cardsContainer = document.getElementById('opponent-cards');
 733:             const newCardsContainer = document.getElementById('new-opponent-cards');
 734:             if (rightPanelEl && rightPanelEl.dataset.opponentPatternsExpanded === undefined) {
 735:                 rightPanelEl.dataset.opponentPatternsExpanded = 'false';
 736:             }
 737: 
 738:             // Only show in multiplayer with more than 1 player
 739:             if (!isMultiplayer || totalPlayers <= 1) {
 740:                 if (panel) panel.classList.remove('visible');
 741:                 return;
 742:             }
 743: 
 744:             if (panel) {
 745:                 panel.classList.add('visible');
 746:             }
 747:             if (cardsContainer) cardsContainer.innerHTML = '';
 748:             if (newCardsContainer) newCardsContainer.innerHTML = '';
 749: 
 750:             // Delegated click handler for scroll card popups — added once per container.
 751:             // innerHTML = '' only clears children, not listeners on the container itself,
 752:             // so we guard with a data flag to avoid stacking listeners on re-calls.
 753:             const attachScrollDelegate = (container) => {
 754:                 if (!container || container.dataset.scrollDelegated) return;
 755:                 container.dataset.scrollDelegated = 'true';
 756:                 container.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
 757:                     const sc = e.target.closest('.opponent-scroll-card[data-scroll-name]');
 758:                     if (!sc) return;
 759:                     const sName = sc.dataset.scrollName;
 760:                     showScrollInfoPopup(sName, spellSystem.patterns[sName], spellSystem.getScrollElement(sName));
 761:                 });
 762:             };
 763:             attachScrollDelegate(cardsContainer);
 764:             attachScrollDelegate(newCardsContainer);
 765: 
 766:             // Build ordered list: self first, then others
 767:             const playerOrder = [];
 768:             playerOrder.push(myPlayerIndex);
 769:             for (let i = 0; i < totalPlayers; i++) {
 770:                 if (i !== myPlayerIndex) playerOrder.push(i);
 771:             }
 772: 
 773:             for (const i of playerOrder) {
 774:                 const isSelf = (i === myPlayerIndex);
 775:                 const playerData = allPlayersData.find(p => p.player_index === i);
 776:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(i);
 777:                 const playerColor = playerData ? PLAYER_COLORS[playerData.color] : '#666';
 778:                 const isActiveTurn = (i === activePlayerIndex);
 779: 
 780:                 // Get player resources
 781:                 const pool = playerPools[i] || { earth: 0, water: 0, fire: 0, wind: 0, void: 0 };
 782:                 const ap = playerAPs[i] || { currentAP: 5, voidAP: 0 };
 783:                 const scrollData = spellSystem.playerScrolls[i] || { hand: new Set(), active: new Set(), activated: new Set() };
 784: 
 785:                 const card = document.createElement('div');
 786:                 card.className = 'opponent-card' + (isActiveTurn ? ' active-turn' : '') + (isSelf ? ' self-card' : '');
 787:                 card.style.borderLeftColor = playerColor;
 788: 
 789:                 // Header with name and AP
 790:                 const header = document.createElement('div');
 791:                 header.className = 'opponent-header';
 792:                 header.innerHTML = `
 793:                     <span class="opponent-name" style="color: ${playerColor};">${playerName}${isSelf ? ' (you)' : ''}</span>
 794:                     <span class="opponent-ap">AP: ${ap.currentAP}${ap.voidAP > 0 ? ` +${ap.voidAP}<img src="images/voidsymbol.png${IMG_V}" class="element-icon-sm" alt="void" style="vertical-align:middle;">` : ''}</span>
 795:                 `;
 796:                 card.appendChild(header);
 797: 
 798:                 // Stones
 799:                 const stonesDiv = document.createElement('div');
 800:                 stonesDiv.className = 'opponent-stones';
 801:                 const stoneElements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
 802:                 let hasStones = false;
 803:                 stoneElements.forEach(element => {
 804:                     if (pool[element] > 0) {
 805:                         hasStones = true;
 806:                         const stoneSpan = document.createElement('span');
 807:                         stoneSpan.className = 'opponent-stone';
 808:                         stoneSpan.style.color = STONE_TYPES[element].color;
 809:                         stoneSpan.innerHTML = `<img src="${STONE_TYPES[element].img}" class="element-icon-sm" alt="${element}"> ${element}: ${pool[element]}/5`;
 810:                         stonesDiv.appendChild(stoneSpan);
 811:                     }
 812:                 });
 813:                 if (!hasStones) {
 814:                     stonesDiv.innerHTML = '<span class="opponent-no-stones">No stones</span>';
 815:                 }
 816:                 card.appendChild(stonesDiv);
 817: 
 818:                 // Win condition progress
 819:                 const activated = scrollData.activated ? scrollData.activated : new Set();
 820:                 const activatedCount = activated.size;
 821:                 const winDiv = document.createElement('div');
 822:                 winDiv.className = 'opponent-win-progress';
 823:                 const activatedSymbols = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].map(el => {
 824:                     const done = activated.has(el);
 825:                     const img = STONE_TYPES[el]?.img || '';
 826:                     return `<img src="${img}" class="element-icon-sm win-pip${done ? ' win-pip-active' : ''}" alt="${el}" title="${el}">`;
 827:                 }).join('');
 828:                 winDiv.innerHTML = `<span class="opponent-win-label">Elements:</span> ${activatedSymbols} <span class="opponent-win-count">${activatedCount}/5</span>`;
 829:                 card.appendChild(winDiv);
 830: 
 831:                 // Scrolls summary (hand count only - hand contents are private)
 832:                 const handSize = scrollData.hand ? scrollData.hand.size : 0;
 833:                 const activeSize = scrollData.active ? scrollData.active.size : 0;
 834: 
 835:                 const scrollsSummary = document.createElement('div');
 836:                 scrollsSummary.className = 'opponent-scrolls-summary';
 837:                 scrollsSummary.textContent = `Hand: ${handSize} scroll${handSize !== 1 ? 's' : ''} (hidden)`;
 838:                 card.appendChild(scrollsSummary);
 839: 
 840:                 // Active scrolls (visible to opponents)
 841:                 if (activeSize > 0) {
 842:                     const activeScrollsDiv = document.createElement('div');
 843:                     activeScrollsDiv.className = 'opponent-active-scrolls';
 844: 
 845:                     const activeTitle = document.createElement('div');
 846:                     activeTitle.className = 'opponent-active-scrolls-title';
 847:                     activeTitle.textContent = `Active Area (${activeSize}):`;
 848:                     activeScrollsDiv.appendChild(activeTitle);
 849: 
 850:                     scrollData.active.forEach(scrollName => {
 851:                         const pattern = spellSystem.patterns[scrollName];
 852:                         const element = spellSystem.getScrollElement(scrollName);
 853:                         const elementColor = element === 'catacomb' ? '#9b59b6' : STONE_TYPES[element]?.color || '#666';
 854:                         const elementIconHTML = `<img src="${STONE_TYPES[element]?.img || ''}" class="element-icon-sm" alt="${element}" style="vertical-align:middle;">`;
 855: 
 856:                         const scrollCard = document.createElement('div');
 857:                         scrollCard.className = 'opponent-scroll-card';
 858:                         scrollCard.style.cursor = 'pointer';
 859:                         scrollCard.title = 'Click to view scroll details';
 860:                         scrollCard.dataset.scrollName = scrollName; // stored for clone re-wiring
 861:                         scrollCard.innerHTML = `
 862:                             <div class="opponent-scroll-name">${pattern ? pattern.name : scrollName}</div>
 863:                             <div class="opponent-scroll-element" style="color: ${elementColor};">
 864:                                 ${elementIconHTML} ${element ? element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1) : 'Unknown'}
 865:                             </div>
 866:                             <div class="opponent-scroll-pattern-wrap"></div>
 867:                         `;
 868:                         const patternWrap = scrollCard.querySelector('.opponent-scroll-pattern-wrap');
 869:                         const showPatterns = (document.getElementById('right-panel')?.dataset.opponentPatternsExpanded === 'true');
 870:                         if (showPatterns && pattern?.patterns && typeof spellSystem.createPatternVisual === 'function' && patternWrap) {
 871:                             const patternVisual = spellSystem.createPatternVisual(pattern, element);
 872:                             patternVisual.classList?.add?.('opponent-scroll-pattern');
 873:                             patternWrap.appendChild(patternVisual);
 874:                         }
 875:                         // Click handled by delegated listener on the container (see attachScrollDelegate above)
 876:                         activeScrollsDiv.appendChild(scrollCard);
 877:                     });
 878: 
 879:                     card.appendChild(activeScrollsDiv);
 880:                 }
 881: 
 882:                 if (cardsContainer) cardsContainer.appendChild(card);
 883:                 // Clone into new UI container — delegation listener on the container
 884:                 // handles clicks so no per-card event wiring is needed on the clone.
 885:                 if (newCardsContainer) newCardsContainer.appendChild(card.cloneNode(true));
 886:             }
 887: 
 888:             // If no opponents to show
 889:             if (cardsContainer && cardsContainer.children.length === 0) {
 890:                 cardsContainer.innerHTML = '<div style="color: #ccc; font-size: 12px; text-align: center;">Waiting for opponents...</div>';
 891:             }
 892:             if (newCardsContainer && newCardsContainer.children.length === 0) {
 893:                 newCardsContainer.innerHTML = '<div style="color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12px; text-align: center; padding: 20px;">Waiting for opponents...</div>';
 894:             }
 895: 
 896:             // Update HUD
 897:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
 898:         }
 899: 
 900:         function clearBoard(skipConfirm = false) {
 901:             if (!skipConfirm && !confirm('Clear all tiles and stones from the board?')) {
 902:                 return;
 903:             }
 904:             
 905:             placedTiles.forEach(tile => tile.element.remove());
 906:             placedStones.forEach(stone => stone.element.remove());
 907:             
 908:             // Clear all player pawns
 909:             playerPositions.forEach(player => {
 910:                 if (player && player.element) player.element.remove();
 911:             });
 912:             
 913:             placedTiles = [];
 914:             placedStones = [];
 915:             playerPositions = [];
 916:             activePlayerIndex = 0;
 917:             // Reset ID counters so each new game starts from 1 (prevents cross-game ID drift).
 918:             // Both clients must reset in sync — clearBoard is called from startMultiplayerGame
 919:             // before any tile/stone placement, so this is safe.
 920:             if (typeof nextTileId !== 'undefined') nextTileId = 1;
 921:             if (typeof nextStoneId !== 'undefined') nextStoneId = 1;
 922:             updateStatus('Board cleared');
 923:         }
 924: 
 925:         // Event Handlers - Tile Deck
 926:         deckTileSvg.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
 927:             if (e.button === 2) {
 928:                 e.preventDefault();
 929:                 isRotatingTile = true;
 930:                 rotateTileStartX = e.clientX;
 931:                 rotateTileStartRotation = currentRotation;
 932:                 return;
 933:             }
 934: 
 935:             isDraggingTile = true;
 936:             draggedTileId = null;
 937:             draggedTileRotation = currentRotation;
 938:             draggedTileFlipped = currentFlipped;
 939:             draggedTileShrineType = null; // Draw from deck
 940:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
 941:             const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
 942:             const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
 943:             const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
 944: 
 945:             ghostTile = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
 946:             ghostTile.setAttribute('class', 'ghost-tile');
 947:             ghostTile.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
 948:             const tile = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, currentRotation, currentFlipped);
 949:             ghostTile.appendChild(tile);
 950:             viewport.appendChild(ghostTile);
 951:         });
 952: 
 953:         deckTileSvg.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => e.preventDefault());
 954: 
 955:         // Event Handlers - Stone Decks
 956:         ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].forEach(type => {
 957:             const deckElement = document.getElementById(type + '-deck');
 958: 
 959:             // Mouse handler
 960:             deckElement.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
 961:                 if (stoneCounts[type] <= 0) return;
 962: 
 963:                 isDraggingStone = true;
 964:                 draggedStoneId = null;
 965:                 draggedStoneType = type;
 966: 
 967:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
 968:                 const coords = getEventCoords(e);
 969:                 const screenX = coords.x - rect.left;
 970:                 const screenY = coords.y - rect.top;
 971:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
 972: 
 973:                 ghostStone = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
 974:                 ghostStone.setAttribute('class', 'stone stone-ghost');
 975:                 ghostStone.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
 976: 
 977:                 const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
 978:                 circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
 979:                 circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
 980:                 circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
 981:                 circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
 982:                 circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[type].color);
 983: 
 984:                 const text = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
 985:                 text.setAttribute('x', 0);
 986:                 text.setAttribute('y', 0);
 987:                 text.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
 988:                 text.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
 989:                 text.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
 990:                 text.setAttribute('font-size', '14');
 991:                 text.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
 992:                 text.textContent = STONE_TYPES[type].symbol;
 993: 
 994:                 ghostStone.appendChild(circle);
 995:                 ghostStone.appendChild(text);
 996:                 viewport.appendChild(ghostStone);
 997:             });
 998: 
 999:             // Touch handler
1000:             deckElement.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
1001:                 if (stoneCounts[type] <= 0) return;
1002:                 e.preventDefault();
1003: 
1004:                 isDraggingStone = true;
1005:                 draggedStoneId = null;
1006:                 draggedStoneType = type;
1007: 
1008:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1009:                 const coords = getEventCoords(e);
1010:                 const screenX = coords.x - rect.left;
1011:                 const screenY = coords.y - rect.top;
1012:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1013: 
1014:                 ghostStone = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
1015:                 ghostStone.setAttribute('class', 'stone stone-ghost');
1016:                 ghostStone.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
1017: 
1018:                 const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
1019:                 circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
1020:                 circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
1021:                 circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
1022:                 circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
1023:                 circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[type].color);
1024: 
1025:                 const text = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
1026:                 text.setAttribute('x', 0);
1027:                 text.setAttribute('y', 0);
1028:                 text.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
1029:                 text.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
1030:                 text.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
1031:                 text.setAttribute('font-size', '14');
1032:                 text.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
1033:                 text.textContent = STONE_TYPES[type].symbol;
1034: 
1035:                 ghostStone.appendChild(circle);
1036:                 ghostStone.appendChild(text);
1037:                 viewport.appendChild(ghostStone);
1038:             }, { passive: false });
1039:         });
1040: 
1041:         // Event Handlers - Board (throttled to animation frames)
1042:         let pendingBoardMove = false;
1043:         let lastBoardMove = null;
1044:         boardSvg.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
1045:             lastBoardMove = { clientX: e.clientX, clientY: e.clientY };
1046:             if (pendingBoardMove) return;
1047:             pendingBoardMove = true;
1048:             requestAnimationFrame(() => {
1049:                 pendingBoardMove = false;
1050:                 if (!lastBoardMove) return;
1051: 
1052:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1053:                 const screenX = lastBoardMove.clientX - rect.left;
1054:                 const screenY = lastBoardMove.clientY - rect.top;
1055:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1056: 
1057:                 if (isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
1058:                     const isPlayerTile = (draggedTileShrineType === 'player');
1059:                     const snapResult = findNearestSnapPoint(world.x, world.y, isPlayerTile);
1060:                     ghostTile.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${snapResult.x}, ${snapResult.y})`);
1061: 
1062:                     if (snapResult.snapped) {
1063:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', snapResult.x);
1064:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', snapResult.y);
1065:                         snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
1066:                     } else {
1067:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1068:                     }
1069:                 } else if (isDraggingStone && ghostStone) {
1070:                     const stonePos = findValidStonePosition(world.x, world.y);
1071:                     ghostStone.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${stonePos.x}, ${stonePos.y})`);
1072: 
1073:                     if (stonePos.valid) {
1074:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', stonePos.x);
1075:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', stonePos.y);
1076:                         snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
1077:                     } else {
1078:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1079:                     }
1080:                 } else if (isDraggingPlayer && ghostPlayer) {
1081:                     const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
1082:                     const playerPos = findNearestHexPosition(world.x, world.y);
1083: 
1084:                     if (tf && tf.active) {
1085:                         if (playerPos.valid) {
1086:                             ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${playerPos.x}, ${playerPos.y})`);
1087:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', playerPos.x);
1088:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', playerPos.y);
1089:                             snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
1090:                         } else {
1091:                             snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1092:                         }
1093:                         tf.hoverPos = playerPos;
1094:                         return;
1095:                     }
1096: 
1097:                     // Prevent the ghost and path preview from moving "through" other players.
1098:                     // If the nearest hex is occupied, clamp the ghost to the last valid path node.
1099:                     if (playerPos.valid && isHexOccupiedByOtherPlayer(playerPos.x, playerPos.y)) {
1100:                         const last = (playerPath && playerPath.length) ? playerPath[playerPath.length - 1] : playerPosition;
1101:                         ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${last.x}, ${last.y})`);
1102:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1103:                         updateStatus('Blocked by another player');
1104:                         return;
1105:                     }
1106: 
1107:                     ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${playerPos.x}, ${playerPos.y})`);
1108: 
1109:                     if (playerPos.valid) {
1110:                         updatePlayerPath(playerPos.x, playerPos.y);
1111: 
1112:                         const totalCost = calculatePathCost();
1113:                         const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(playerPos.x, playerPos.y);
1114: 
1115:                         if (moveCheck.canMove && totalCost <= getTotalAP()) {
1116:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', playerPos.x);
1117:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', playerPos.y);
1118:                             snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
1119:                         } else {
1120:                             snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1121:                         }
1122: 
1123:                         // Update status with path cost
1124:                         updateStatus(`Path cost: ${totalCost} AP (${getTotalAP() - totalCost} remaining)`);
1125:                     } else {
1126:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1127:                     }
1128:                 }
1129:             });
1130:         });
1131: 
1132:         document.addEventListener('mouseup', (e) => {
1133:             if (e.button === 0) leftButtonDown = false;
1134:             if (e.button === 2) rightButtonDown = false;
1135: 
1136:             if (isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
1137:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1138:                 const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
1139:                 const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
1140:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1141: 
1142:                 const isPlayerTile = (draggedTileShrineType === 'player');
1143:                 const snapResult = findNearestSnapPoint(world.x, world.y, isPlayerTile);
1144:                 if (snapResult.snapped) {
1145:                     if (window.shouldDebugLog ? window.shouldDebugLog('placeTile', 500) : true) {
1146:                         console.log(`📍 Placing tile: rotation=${draggedTileRotation}, flipped=${draggedTileFlipped}, shrine=${draggedTileShrineType}`);
1147:                     }
1148:                     const tileId = placeTile(snapResult.x, snapResult.y, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped, draggedTileShrineType, false, false, draggedTileId);
1149:                     console.log(`   Tile placed with ID: ${tileId}`);
1150: 
1151:                     // If this was a player tile from the deck and it was successfully placed
1152:                     if (draggedTileShrineType === 'player' && draggedTileId === null && tileId !== null) {
1153:                         playerTilesAvailable--;
1154:                         const countEl = document.getElementById('new-player-tile-count') || document.getElementById('player-tile-count');
1155:                         if (countEl) countEl.textContent = playerTilesAvailable;
1156: 
1157:                         // Remove the first available player tile from the deck visually
1158:                         if (playerTileElements.length > 0) {
1159:                             const tileToRemove = playerTileElements.shift();
1160:                             tileToRemove.remove();
1161:                         }
1162: 
1163:                         // Broadcast player tile placement in multiplayer
1164:                         if (isMultiplayer) {
1165:                             broadcastGameAction('player-tile-place', {
1166:                                 x: snapResult.x,
1167:                                 y: snapResult.y,
1168:                                 playerIndex: myPlayerIndex,
1169:                                 color: playerColor,
1170:                                 cosmetics: window.cosmeticsSystem?.getEquippedAll() || null
1171:                             });
1172:                         }
1173:                     }
1174: 
1175:                     // TELEKINESIS: track moves
1176:                     const tkState = window.telekinesisState;
1177:                     if (tkState && tkState.active && draggedTileId !== null && draggedTileOriginalPos) {
1178:                         // Broadcast in multiplayer
1179:                         if (isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
1180:                             broadcastGameAction('telekinesis-move', {
1181:                                 tileId: draggedTileId,
1182:                                 newPos: { x: snapResult.x, y: snapResult.y },
1183:                                 oldPos: { x: draggedTileOriginalPos.x, y: draggedTileOriginalPos.y },
1184:                                 movedPlayers: []
1185:                             });
1186:                         }
1187: 
1188:                         tkState.movesLeft--;
1189:                         tkState.movedTiles.push(draggedTileId);
1190:                         console.log(`🔮 Telekinesis: ${tkState.maxMoves - tkState.movesLeft}/${tkState.maxMoves} moves`);
1191: 
1192:                         // Update Done button if present
1193:                         const doneBtn = document.getElementById('telekinesis-done-btn');
1194:                         if (doneBtn) {
1195:                             const movesDone = tkState.maxMoves - tkState.movesLeft;
1196:                             doneBtn.textContent = `Done (${movesDone}/${tkState.maxMoves})`;
1197:                         }
1198: 
1199:                         updateStatus(`Telekinesis: tile moved! (${tkState.maxMoves - tkState.movesLeft}/${tkState.maxMoves})`);
1200: 
1201:                         // Refresh catacomb indicators
1202:                         if (typeof updateCatacombIndicators === 'function') updateCatacombIndicators();
1203: 
1204:                         if (tkState.movesLeft <= 0) {
1205:                             // All moves used — finish telekinesis
1206:                             if (typeof window.finishTelekinesis === 'function') {
1207:                                 window.finishTelekinesis();
1208:                             }
1209:                         }
1210:                     }
1211:                 } else if (draggedTileId !== null && draggedTileOriginalPos) {
1212:                     // If this was a placed tile that couldn't be re-placed, restore it to its original position
1213:                     const tkActive = window.telekinesisState && window.telekinesisState.active;
1214:                     updateStatus(tkActive
1215:                         ? 'Invalid placement! Tiles must touch at least 2 other tiles. Tile snapped back.'
1216:                         : 'Invalid placement! Tile snapped back to original position.');
1217:                     placeTile(draggedTileOriginalPos.x, draggedTileOriginalPos.y, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped, draggedTileShrineType, false, false, draggedTileId);
1218:                 } else if (isPlayerTile) {
1219:                     // Player tile couldn't be placed - show why
1220:                     updateStatus('Player tiles must touch at least 2 unrevealed tiles!');
1221:                 }
1222: 
1223:                 ghostTile.remove();
1224:                 ghostTile = null;
1225:                 isDraggingTile = false;
1226:                 draggedTileId = null;
1227:                 draggedTileOriginalPos = null;
1228:                 snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1229:             } else if (isDraggingStone && ghostStone) {
1230:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1231:                 const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
1232:                 const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
1233:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1234: 
1235:                 // Remove ghost FIRST — prevents orphaned ghost stamps if anything below throws
1236:                 ghostStone.remove();
1237:                 ghostStone = null;
1238:                 isDraggingStone = false;
1239:                 snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1240: 
1241:                 const capturedStoneId = draggedStoneId;
1242:                 const capturedStoneType = draggedStoneType;
1243:                 const capturedOriginalPos = draggedStoneOriginalPos;
1244:                 draggedStoneId = null;
1245:                 draggedStoneType = null;
1246:                 draggedStoneOriginalPos = null;
1247: 
1248:                 const stonePos = findValidStonePosition(world.x, world.y);
1249:                 if (stonePos.valid) {
1250:                     if (capturedStoneId === null) {
1251:                         placeStone(stonePos.x, stonePos.y, capturedStoneType);
1252:                         console.log(`📤 Placing stone from deck: type=${capturedStoneType}, before=${stoneCounts[capturedStoneType]}`);
1253:                         stoneCounts[capturedStoneType]--;
1254:                         console.log(`📤 After decrement: ${capturedStoneType}=${stoneCounts[capturedStoneType]}, playerPool.${capturedStoneType}=${playerPool[capturedStoneType]}`);
1255:                         updateStoneCount(capturedStoneType);
1256: 
1257:                         // Sync resources after placing stone
1258:                         syncPlayerState();
1259:                         updateStatus('Placed ' + capturedStoneType + ' stone');
1260:                     } else {
1261:                         placeMovedStone(stonePos.x, stonePos.y, capturedStoneType, capturedStoneId);
1262:                         if (isMultiplayer) {
1263:                             broadcastGameAction('stone-move', {
1264:                                 stoneId: capturedStoneId,
1265:                                 x: stonePos.x,
1266:                                 y: stonePos.y,
1267:                                 stoneType: capturedStoneType
1268:                             });
1269:                         }
1270:                         updateStatus('Moved ' + capturedStoneType + ' stone');
1271:                     }
1272:                 } else {
1273:                     if (capturedStoneId !== null) {
1274:                         // Was a placed stone, couldn't place back
1275:                         if (capturedOriginalPos) {
1276:                             placeMovedStone(capturedOriginalPos.x, capturedOriginalPos.y, capturedStoneType, capturedStoneId);
1277:                             updateStatus('Invalid placement! Stone returned to original spot.');
1278:                         } else {
1279:                             returnStoneToPool(capturedStoneType);
1280:                         }
1281:                     }
1282:                 }
1283:             } else if (isDraggingPlayer && ghostPlayer) {
1284:                 const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
1285:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1286:                 const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
1287:                 const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
1288:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1289: 
1290:                 const playerPos = findNearestHexPosition(world.x, world.y);
1291:                 const totalCost = calculatePathCost();
1292:                 const startPos = playerPath[0];
1293: 
1294:                 if (tf && tf.active) {
1295:                     const targetIndex = tf.targetPlayerIndex;
1296:                     const destPos = playerPos && playerPos.valid ? { x: playerPos.x, y: playerPos.y } : null;
1297:                     const origin = tf.startPos || startPos;
1298: 
1299:                     const hasStone = destPos && placedStones.some(s => {
1300:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - destPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - destPos.y, 2));
1301:                         return dist < 5;
1302:                     });
1303:                     const hasPlayer = destPos && playerPositions.some((p, idx) => {
1304:                         if (!p) return false;
1305:                         if (idx === targetIndex) return false;
1306:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x - destPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(p.y - destPos.y, 2));
1307:                         return dist < 5;
1308:                     });
1309: 
1310:                     if (!destPos || hasStone || hasPlayer) {
1311:                         if (hasStone) updateStatus('Take Flight: cannot teleport onto a stone.');
1312:                         else if (hasPlayer) updateStatus('Take Flight: another player is in the way.');
1313:                         else updateStatus('Take Flight: invalid destination.');
1314: 
1315:                         if (origin) {
1316:                             if (targetIndex === activePlayerIndex) {
1317:                                 placePlayer(origin.x, origin.y);
1318:                             } else if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
1319:                                 movePlayerVisually(targetIndex, origin.x, origin.y, 0);
1320:                             }
1321:                         }
1322:                     } else {
1323:                         if (targetIndex === activePlayerIndex) {
1324:                             placePlayer(destPos.x, destPos.y);
1325:                         } else if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
1326:                             movePlayerVisually(targetIndex, destPos.x, destPos.y, 0);
1327:                         }
1328: 
1329:                         if (tf.onComplete) {
1330:                             tf.onComplete(destPos.x, destPos.y);
1331:                         }
1332:                     }
1333: 
1334:                     ghostPlayer.remove();
1335:                     ghostPlayer = null;
1336:                     if (pathLine) {
1337:                         pathLine.remove();
1338:                         pathLine = null;
1339:                     }
1340:                     // Clean up path labels
1341:                     pathCostLabels.forEach(label => label.remove());
1342:                     pathCostLabels = [];
1343:                     playerPath = [];
1344:                     isDraggingPlayer = false;
1345:                     snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1346:                 } else if (playerPos.valid && playerPath.length > 1) {
1347: 
1348:                     const finalPos = playerPath[playerPath.length - 1];
1349:                     const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(finalPos.x, finalPos.y, true);
1350: 
1351:                     // Check if there's a stone at the final position that you CAN'T end turn on
1352:                     const stoneAtFinal = placedStones.find(s => {
1353:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - finalPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - finalPos.y, 2));
1354:                         return dist < 5;
1355:                     });
1356: 
1357:                     // Can't end turn on: earth, wind, water, fire
1358:                     // CAN end turn on: void (or empty hex)
1359:                     const cannotEndTurnHere = stoneAtFinal && stoneAtFinal.type !== 'void';
1360: 
1361:                     // Tutorial gate: only allow movement to the designated hex(es)
1362:                     const tutorialBlocked = window.isTutorialMode && window.tutorialAllowedHexes &&
1363:                         ![...window.tutorialAllowedHexes].some(key => {
1364:                             const [ax, ay] = key.split(',').map(Number);
1365:                             return Math.abs(ax - finalPos.x) < 70 && Math.abs(ay - finalPos.y) < 70;
1366:                         });
1367: 
1368:                     if (cannotEndTurnHere) {
1369:                         console.log(`❌ Movement rejected: Cannot end turn on ${stoneAtFinal.type} stone at (${finalPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${finalPos.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1370:                         placePlayer(startPos.x, startPos.y);
1371:                         updateStatus('Cannot end movement on a ' + stoneAtFinal.type + ' stone!');
1372:                     } else if (tutorialBlocked) {
1373:                         placePlayer(startPos.x, startPos.y);
1374:                         if (window.TutorialMode) window.TutorialMode.showMovementHint();
1375:                     } else if (moveCheck.canMove && totalCost <= getTotalAP()) {
1376:                         console.log(`✅ Movement successful: ${playerPath.length - 1} hexes, cost ${totalCost} AP`);
1377:                         // Store the last move for undo
1378:                         lastMove = {
1379:                             prevPos: { x: startPos.x, y: startPos.y },
1380:                             newPos: { x: finalPos.x, y: finalPos.y },
1381:                             apCost: totalCost
1382:                         };
1383:                         placePlayer(finalPos.x, finalPos.y);
1384:                         // Notify tutorial that the player has moved
1385:                         if (window.isTutorialMode && window.TutorialMode?.onPlayerMoved) {
1386:                             window.TutorialMode.onPlayerMoved(finalPos.x, finalPos.y);
1387:                         }
1388:                         // Update Steam Vents alternation state before spending AP
1389:                         if (typeof commitSteamVentsState === 'function') commitSteamVentsState(playerPath);
1390:                         spendAP(totalCost); // Use void AP first, then regular AP
1391: 
1392:                         // Broadcast player movement to other players
1393:                         broadcastGameAction('player-move', {
1394:                             playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1395:                             x: finalPos.x,
1396:                             y: finalPos.y,
1397:                             apSpent: totalCost,
1398:                             cosmetics: window.cosmeticsSystem?.getEquippedAll() || null
1399:                         });
1400: 
1401:                         // Check if player stepped on a hidden tile - reveal it!
1402:                         // Use the ACTUAL player position after placement
1403:                         const actualPlayerPos = { x: playerPosition.x, y: playerPosition.y };
1404:                         if (window.shouldDebugLog ? window.shouldDebugLog('playerLanded', 500) : true) {
1405:                             console.log(`📍 Player landed at (${actualPlayerPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${actualPlayerPos.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1406:                         }
1407:                         console.log(`   finalPos from path: (${finalPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${finalPos.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1408: 
1409:                         // Use getAllHexagonPositions which properly handles trapezoids
1410:                         const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
1411:                         
1412:                         // Find the hex position where the player landed
1413:                         let playerHex = null;
1414:                         let minDist = Infinity;
1415:                         allHexes.forEach(hexPos => {
1416:                             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hexPos.x - actualPlayerPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(hexPos.y - actualPlayerPos.y, 2));
1417:                             if (dist < minDist) {
1418:                                 minDist = dist;
1419:                                 playerHex = hexPos;
1420:                             }
1421:                         });
1422: 
1423:                         if (playerHex && minDist < 5 && playerHex.tiles) {
1424:                             console.log(`   Player is on hex at (${playerHex.x.toFixed(1)}, ${playerHex.y.toFixed(1)}), dist=${minDist.toFixed(2)}`);
1425:                             console.log(`   This hex is contributed to by ${playerHex.tiles.length} tile(s)`);
1426:                             
1427:                             // Find flipped tiles that contribute to this hex position
1428:                             const flippedTiles = playerHex.tiles.filter(t => t.flipped && !t.isPlayerTile);
1429:                             console.log(`   Flipped tiles at this hex:`, flippedTiles.map(t => ({id: t.id, x: t.x, y: t.y, flipped: t.flipped})));
1430: 
1431:                             if (flippedTiles.length > 0) {
1432:                                 // If multiple flipped tiles share this hex, choose the one whose center is closest to player
1433:                                 let tileToReveal = flippedTiles[0];
1434:                                 if (flippedTiles.length > 1) {
1435:                                     let minTileDist = Infinity;
1436:                                     flippedTiles.forEach(tile => {
1437:                                         const tileDist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(tile.x - actualPlayerPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(tile.y - actualPlayerPos.y, 2));
1438:                                         console.log(`     Flipped tile id=${tile.id} at (${tile.x.toFixed(1)}, ${tile.y.toFixed(1)}): dist to center=${tileDist.toFixed(1)}`);
1439:                                         if (tileDist < minTileDist) {
1440:                                             minTileDist = tileDist;
1441:                                             tileToReveal = tile;
1442:                                         }
1443:                                     });
1444:                                     console.log(`   Multiple flipped tiles - choosing closest at (${tileToReveal.x.toFixed(1)}, ${tileToReveal.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1445:                                 }
1446:                                 console.log(`✨ Revealing tile id=${tileToReveal.id} at (${tileToReveal.x.toFixed(1)}, ${tileToReveal.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1447:                                 revealTile(tileToReveal.id);
1448:                             } else {
1449:                                 console.log(`   No flipped tiles at this hex position`);
1450:                                 updateStatus(`Moved ${playerPath.length - 1} hexes (cost: ${totalCost} AP, ${getTotalAP()} AP remaining)`);
1451:                             }
1452:                         } else {
1453:                             console.log(`   ❌ Player not on any valid hex (minDist=${minDist.toFixed(2)})`);
1454:                             updateStatus(`Moved ${playerPath.length - 1} hexes (cost: ${totalCost} AP, ${getTotalAP()} AP remaining)`);
1455:                         }
1456:                     } else if (!moveCheck.canMove) {
1457:                         console.log(`❌ Movement rejected: Path blocked at (${finalPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${finalPos.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1458:                         placePlayer(startPos.x, startPos.y);
1459:                         updateStatus('Cannot move there!');
1460:                     } else {
1461:                         console.log(`❌ Movement rejected: Insufficient AP (need ${totalCost}, have ${getTotalAP()})`);
1462:                         placePlayer(startPos.x, startPos.y);
1463:                         updateStatus(`Not enough AP! (need ${totalCost}, have ${getTotalAP()})`);
1464:                     }
1465:                 } else {
1466:                     placePlayer(startPos.x, startPos.y);
1467:                 }
1468: 
1469:                 ghostPlayer.remove();
1470:                 ghostPlayer = null;
1471:                 if (pathLine) {
1472:                     pathLine.remove();
1473:                     pathLine = null;
1474:                 }
1475:                 // Clean up path labels
1476:                 pathCostLabels.forEach(label => label.remove());
1477:                 pathCostLabels = [];
1478:                 playerPath = [];
1479:                 isDraggingPlayer = false;
1480:                 snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1481:             }
1482: 
1483:             if (isPanning) {
1484:                 isPanning = false;
1485:                 boardSvg.style.cursor = 'grab';
1486:             }
1487:             if (isRotatingBoard) {
1488:                 isRotatingBoard = false;
1489:                 boardSvg.style.cursor = 'grab';
1490:             }
1491:             if (isRotatingTile) {
1492:                 isRotatingTile = false;
1493:             }
1494:         });
1495: 
1496:         // Clean up ghost when mouse leaves the board
1497:         boardSvg.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
1498:             snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1499:         });
1500: 
1501:         // Touch event support for mobile
1502:         
1503:         // Touch handlers extracted for reuse (board + document)
1504:         let touchStartWorldPos = null; // Store world position for tap-to-move
1505: 
1506:         function handleBoardTouchStart(e) {
1507:             touchStartTime = Date.now();
1508:             const coords = getEventCoords(e);
1509:             touchStartPos = { x: coords.x, y: coords.y };
1510: 
1511:             // Store world position for potential tap-to-move
1512:             if (e.touches.length === 1) {
1513:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1514:                 const screenX = coords.x - rect.left;
1515:                 const screenY = coords.y - rect.top;
1516:                 touchStartWorldPos = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1517:             }
1518: 
1519:             // Single-finger pan (only when not interacting with a tile/player/stone)
1520:             if (e.touches.length === 1 && !isDraggingTile && !isDraggingStone && !isDraggingPlayer) {
1521:                 const targetClass = e.target?.getAttribute && e.target.getAttribute('class');
1522:                 const isStone = targetClass && (targetClass.includes('stone') || e.target.closest('.stone'));
1523:                 const isPlayer = targetClass && (targetClass.includes('player') || e.target.closest('.player'));
1524:                 const isTile = e.target && (e.target.closest('.placed-tile') || e.target.closest('.tile'));
1525:                 if (!isStone && !isPlayer && !isTile) {
1526:                     e.preventDefault();
1527:                     isPanning = true;
1528:                     panStartX = coords.x;
1529:                     panStartY = coords.y;
1530:                     lastPanX = viewportX;
1531:                     lastPanY = viewportY;
1532:                     boardSvg.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
1533:                 }
1534:             }
1535: 
1536: 
1537:             if (e.touches.length === 2 && !isDraggingTile && !isDraggingPlayer) {
1538:                 // Two-finger pinch zoom / pan (board)
1539:                 e.preventDefault();
1540:                 isPinching = true;
1541:                 isGestureRotating = false;
1542: 
1543:                 const dx = e.touches[1].clientX - e.touches[0].clientX;
1544:                 const dy = e.touches[1].clientY - e.touches[0].clientY;
1545:                 pinchStartDist = Math.hypot(dx, dy) || 1;
1546:                 pinchStartScale = viewportScale;
1547: 
1548:                 const midX = (e.touches[0].clientX + e.touches[1].clientX) / 2;
1549:                 const midY = (e.touches[0].clientY + e.touches[1].clientY) / 2;
1550:                 pinchStartMid = { x: midX, y: midY };
1551:                 pinchLastMid = { x: midX, y: midY };
1552:             }
1553:         
1554:         }
1555: 
1556:         function handleBoardTouchMove(e) {
1557:             e.preventDefault(); // Prevent scrolling
1558: 
1559:             if (e.touches.length === 2 && isPinching) {
1560:                 // Pinch zoom / pan board
1561:                 const dx = e.touches[1].clientX - e.touches[0].clientX;
1562:                 const dy = e.touches[1].clientY - e.touches[0].clientY;
1563:                 const dist = Math.hypot(dx, dy) || 1;
1564: 
1565:                 // Midpoint pan
1566:                 const midX = (e.touches[0].clientX + e.touches[1].clientX) / 2;
1567:                 const midY = (e.touches[0].clientY + e.touches[1].clientY) / 2;
1568:                 const midDeltaX = midX - pinchLastMid.x;
1569:                 const midDeltaY = midY - pinchLastMid.y;
1570:                 pinchLastMid = { x: midX, y: midY };
1571: 
1572:                 // Apply pan in world space
1573:                 viewportX += midDeltaX / viewportScale;
1574:                 viewportY += midDeltaY / viewportScale;
1575: 
1576:                 // Apply zoom anchored near screen midpoint (approx)
1577:                 let newScale = pinchStartScale * (dist / pinchStartDist);
1578:                 newScale = Math.max(0.25, Math.min(3.0, newScale));
1579: 
1580:                 const centerX = boardSvg.clientWidth / 2;
1581:                 const centerY = boardSvg.clientHeight / 2;
1582: 
1583:                 // Keep pinch midpoint roughly stable during zoom
1584:                 const k = (1 / viewportScale) - (1 / newScale);
1585:                 viewportX += (midX - centerX) * k;
1586:                 viewportY += (midY - centerY) * k;
1587: 
1588:                 viewportScale = newScale;
1589:                 updateViewport();
1590:                 return;
1591:             }
1592: 
1593:             else if (e.touches.length === 1) {
1594:                 // Single touch - pan or drag
1595:                 if (isPanning && !isDraggingTile && !isDraggingStone && !isDraggingPlayer) {
1596:                     const dx = e.touches[0].clientX - panStartX;
1597:                     const dy = e.touches[0].clientY - panStartY;
1598:                     const rad = -viewportRotation * Math.PI / 180;
1599:                     const cos = Math.cos(rad);
1600:                     const sin = Math.sin(rad);
1601:                     const rotatedDx = dx * cos - dy * sin;
1602:                     const rotatedDy = dx * sin + dy * cos;
1603:                     viewportX = lastPanX + rotatedDx;
1604:                     viewportY = lastPanY + rotatedDy;
1605:                     updateViewport();
1606:                     return;
1607:                 }
1608:                 // Single touch - handle drag
1609:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1610:                 const screenX = e.touches[0].clientX - rect.left;
1611:                 const screenY = e.touches[0].clientY - rect.top;
1612:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1613: 
1614:                 if (isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
1615:                     const isPlayerTile = (draggedTileShrineType === 'player');
1616:                     const snapResult = findNearestSnapPoint(world.x, world.y, isPlayerTile);
1617:                     ghostTile.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${snapResult.x}, ${snapResult.y})`);
1618: 
1619:                     if (snapResult.snapped) {
1620:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', snapResult.x);
1621:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', snapResult.y);
1622:                         snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
1623:                     } else {
1624:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1625:                     }
1626:                 } else if (isDraggingStone && ghostStone) {
1627:                     const stonePos = findValidStonePosition(world.x, world.y);
1628:                     ghostStone.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${stonePos.x}, ${stonePos.y})`);
1629: 
1630:                     if (stonePos.valid) {
1631:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', stonePos.x);
1632:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', stonePos.y);
1633:                         snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
1634:                     } else {
1635:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1636:                     }
1637:                 } else if (isDraggingPlayer && ghostPlayer) {
1638:                     const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
1639:                     const playerPos = findNearestHexPosition(world.x, world.y);
1640: 
1641:                     if (tf && tf.active) {
1642:                         if (playerPos.valid) {
1643:                             ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${playerPos.x}, ${playerPos.y})`);
1644:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', playerPos.x);
1645:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', playerPos.y);
1646:                             snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
1647:                         } else {
1648:                             snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1649:                         }
