1650:                         tf.hoverPos = playerPos;
1651:                         return;
1652:                     }
1653: 
1654:                     ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${playerPos.x}, ${playerPos.y})`);
1655: 
1656:                     if (playerPos.valid) {
1657:                         updatePlayerPath(playerPos.x, playerPos.y);
1658: 
1659:                         const totalCost = calculatePathCost();
1660:                         const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(playerPos.x, playerPos.y);
1661: 
1662:                         if (moveCheck.canMove && totalCost <= getTotalAP()) {
1663:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', playerPos.x);
1664:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', playerPos.y);
1665:                             snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
1666:                         } else {
1667:                             snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1668:                         }
1669: 
1670:                         updateStatus(`Path cost: ${totalCost} AP (${getTotalAP() - totalCost} remaining)`);
1671:                     } else {
1672:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1673:                     }
1674:                 }
1675:             }
1676:         
1677:         }
1678: 
1679:         function handleBoardTouchEnd(e) {
1680:             const touchDuration = Date.now() - touchStartTime;
1681:             const coords = e.changedTouches[0];
1682:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1683:             const screenX = coords.clientX - rect.left;
1684:             const screenY = coords.clientY - rect.top;
1685: 
1686:             // Check if this was a tap (short touch without much movement)
1687:             const distMoved = Math.sqrt(
1688:                 Math.pow(coords.clientX - touchStartPos.x, 2) +
1689:                 Math.pow(coords.clientY - touchStartPos.y, 2)
1690:             );
1691:             const isTap = touchDuration < 300 && distMoved < 10;
1692: 
1693:             if (isPanning) {
1694:                 isPanning = false;
1695:                 boardSvg.style.cursor = 'grab';
1696:             }
1697: 
1698:             // TAP-TO-MOVE: If tapped on a valid hex and not doing anything else, move player there
1699:             console.log(`📱 Tap-to-move check: isTap=${isTap}, isDraggingTile=${isDraggingTile}, isDraggingStone=${isDraggingStone}, isDraggingPlayer=${isDraggingPlayer}, ghostTile=${!!ghostTile}, ghostStone=${!!ghostStone}, playerPosition=${!!playerPosition}, canTakeAction=${canTakeAction()}`);
1700:             if (isTap && !isDraggingTile && !isDraggingStone && !isDraggingPlayer && !ghostTile && !ghostStone && playerPosition && canTakeAction()) {
1701:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1702:                 const targetHex = findNearestHexPosition(world.x, world.y);
1703:                 console.log(`📱 Tap target: world=(${world.x.toFixed(1)}, ${world.y.toFixed(1)}), targetHex valid=${targetHex.valid}`);
1704: 
1705:                 if (targetHex.valid) {
1706:                     // Check if we tapped on the player's current position (within small radius)
1707:                     const distFromPlayer = Math.sqrt(
1708:                         Math.pow(targetHex.x - playerPosition.x, 2) +
1709:                         Math.pow(targetHex.y - playerPosition.y, 2)
1710:                     );
1711: 
1712:                     if (distFromPlayer > 5) { // Not tapping on current position
1713:                         // Calculate path cost using simple distance (1 AP per hex)
1714:                         const hexDist = Math.round(distFromPlayer / 17.3); // Approximate hex distance
1715:                         const pathCost = Math.max(1, hexDist);
1716: 
1717:                         // Check if move is valid
1718:                         const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(targetHex.x, targetHex.y, true);
1719: 
1720:                         // Check for stone at destination
1721:                         const stoneAtTarget = placedStones.find(s => {
1722:                             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - targetHex.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - targetHex.y, 2));
1723:                             return dist < 5;
1724:                         });
1725:                         const cannotEndTurnHere = stoneAtTarget && stoneAtTarget.type !== 'void';
1726: 
1727:                         if (cannotEndTurnHere) {
1728:                             updateStatus('Cannot end movement on a ' + stoneAtTarget.type + ' stone!');
1729:                         } else if (!moveCheck.canMove) {
1730:                             updateStatus(moveCheck.reason || 'Cannot move there');
1731:                         } else if (pathCost > getTotalAP()) {
1732:                             updateStatus(`Not enough AP (need ~${pathCost}, have ${getTotalAP()})`);
1733:                         } else {
1734:                             // Calculate actual path cost by building path
1735:                             const startPos = { x: playerPosition.x, y: playerPosition.y };
1736:                             const actualCost = calculateTapMoveCost(startPos, targetHex);
1737: 
1738:                             if (actualCost > 0 && actualCost <= getTotalAP()) {
1739:                                 console.log(`📱 Tap-to-move: from (${startPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${startPos.y.toFixed(1)}) to (${targetHex.x.toFixed(1)}, ${targetHex.y.toFixed(1)}), cost=${actualCost}`);
1740: 
1741:                                 // Store for undo
1742:                                 lastMove = {
1743:                                     prevPos: { x: startPos.x, y: startPos.y },
1744:                                     newPos: { x: targetHex.x, y: targetHex.y },
1745:                                     apCost: actualCost
1746:                                 };
1747: 
1748:                                 placePlayer(targetHex.x, targetHex.y);
1749:                                 spendAP(actualCost);
1750: 
1751:                                 // Broadcast in multiplayer
1752:                                 if (isMultiplayer) {
1753:                                     broadcastGameAction('player-move', {
1754:                                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1755:                                         x: targetHex.x,
1756:                                         y: targetHex.y,
1757:                                         apSpent: actualCost
1758:                                     });
1759:                                 }
1760: 
1761:                                 // Check for hidden tile reveal
1762:                                 const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
1763:                                 let playerHex = null;
1764:                                 let minDist = Infinity;
1765:                                 allHexes.forEach(hexPos => {
1766:                                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hexPos.x - targetHex.x, 2) + Math.pow(hexPos.y - targetHex.y, 2));
1767:                                     if (dist < minDist) {
1768:                                         minDist = dist;
1769:                                         playerHex = hexPos;
1770:                                     }
1771:                                 });
1772: 
1773:                                 if (playerHex && minDist < 5 && playerHex.tiles) {
1774:                                     const flippedTiles = playerHex.tiles.filter(t => t.flipped && !t.isPlayerTile);
1775:                                     flippedTiles.forEach(tileInfo => {
1776:                                         revealTile(tileInfo.id);
1777:                                     });
1778:                                 }
1779: 
1780:                                 updateStatus(`Moved (cost: ${actualCost} AP, ${getTotalAP()} AP remaining)`);
1781:                             } else if (actualCost <= 0) {
1782:                                 updateStatus('No valid path to that hex');
1783:                             } else {
1784:                                 updateStatus(`Not enough AP (need ${actualCost}, have ${getTotalAP()})`);
1785:                             }
1786:                         }
1787:                     }
1788:                 }
1789:             }
1790: 
1791:             if (isTap && isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
1792:                 // Tap to flip
1793:                 draggedTileFlipped = !draggedTileFlipped;
1794: 
1795:                 // Regenerate ghost tile with new flip state
1796:                 const oldTransform = ghostTile.getAttribute('transform');
1797:                 const translateMatch = oldTransform?.match(/translate\(([^,]+),\s*([^)]+)\)/);
1798:                 const currentX = translateMatch ? parseFloat(translateMatch[1]) : 0;
1799:                 const currentY = translateMatch ? parseFloat(translateMatch[2]) : 0;
1800: 
1801:                 viewport.removeChild(ghostTile);
1802:                 ghostTile = createTileGroup(draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped, draggedTileShrineType);
1803:                 ghostTile.classList.add('ghost-tile');
1804:                 ghostTile.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${currentX}, ${currentY})`);
1805:                 viewport.appendChild(ghostTile);
1806:             } else {
1807:                 // Handle drop (same logic as mouseup)
1808:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1809: 
1810:                 if (isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
1811:                     const isPlayerTile = (draggedTileShrineType === 'player');
1812:                     const snapResult = findNearestSnapPoint(world.x, world.y, isPlayerTile);
1813:                     if (snapResult.snapped) {
1814:                         console.log(`Placing tile: rotation=${draggedTileRotation}, flipped=${draggedTileFlipped}, shrine=${draggedTileShrineType}`);
1815:                         const tileId = placeTile(snapResult.x, snapResult.y, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped, draggedTileShrineType, false, false, draggedTileId);
1816: 
1817:                         if (draggedTileShrineType === 'player' && draggedTileId === null && tileId !== null) {
1818:                             playerTilesAvailable--;
1819:                             const countEl = document.getElementById('new-player-tile-count') || document.getElementById('player-tile-count');
1820:                             if (countEl) countEl.textContent = playerTilesAvailable;
1821:                             if (isMobile) document.getElementById('mobile-tile-count').textContent = playerTilesAvailable;
1822: 
1823:                             if (playerTileElements.length > 0) {
1824:                                 const tileToRemove = playerTileElements.shift();
1825:                                 tileToRemove.remove();
1826:                             }
1827: 
1828:                             if (isMultiplayer) {
1829:                                 // Broadcast for other clients to place the player tile visually.
1830:                                 broadcastGameAction('player-tile-place', {
1831:                                     x: snapResult.x,
1832:                                     y: snapResult.y,
1833:                                     playerIndex: myPlayerIndex,
1834:                                     color: playerColor,
1835:                                     cosmetics: window.cosmeticsSystem?.getEquippedAll() || null
1836:                                 });
1837:                             }
1838:                         }
1839: 
1840:                         // TELEKINESIS: track moves and move players with tiles (touch handler)
1841:                         const tkStateTouch = window.telekinesisState;
1842:                         if (tkStateTouch && tkStateTouch.active && draggedTileId !== null && draggedTileOriginalPos) {
1843:                             if (isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
1844:                                 broadcastGameAction('telekinesis-move', {
1845:                                     tileId: draggedTileId,
1846:                                     newPos: { x: snapResult.x, y: snapResult.y },
1847:                                     oldPos: { x: draggedTileOriginalPos.x, y: draggedTileOriginalPos.y },
1848:                                     movedPlayers: []
1849:                                 });
1850:                             }
1851:                             tkStateTouch.movesLeft--;
1852:                             tkStateTouch.movedTiles.push(draggedTileId);
1853:                             const doneBtnT = document.getElementById('telekinesis-done-btn');
1854:                             if (doneBtnT) doneBtnT.textContent = `Done (${tkStateTouch.maxMoves - tkStateTouch.movesLeft}/${tkStateTouch.maxMoves})`;
1855:                             updateStatus(`Telekinesis: tile moved! (${tkStateTouch.maxMoves - tkStateTouch.movesLeft}/${tkStateTouch.maxMoves})`);
1856:                             if (typeof updateCatacombIndicators === 'function') updateCatacombIndicators();
1857:                             if (tkStateTouch.movesLeft <= 0 && typeof window.finishTelekinesis === 'function') {
1858:                                 window.finishTelekinesis();
1859:                             }
1860:                         } else if (draggedTileId !== null) {
1861:                             // Moving already-placed non-player tiles is not synced in multiplayer; revert to avoid desync.
1862:                             if (isMultiplayer && draggedTileOriginalPos) {
1863:                                 updateStatus('Tiles cannot be moved in multiplayer.');
1864:                                 placeTile(draggedTileOriginalPos.x, draggedTileOriginalPos.y, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped, draggedTileShrineType, false, false, draggedTileId);
1865:                             }
1866:                         }
1867:                     } else if (draggedTileOriginalPos && draggedTileId !== null) {
1868:                         const tkActiveTouch = window.telekinesisState && window.telekinesisState.active;
1869:                         updateStatus(tkActiveTouch
1870:                             ? 'Invalid placement! Tiles must touch at least 2 other tiles. Tile snapped back.'
1871:                             : 'Invalid placement! Tile snapped back to original position.');
1872:                         placeTile(draggedTileOriginalPos.x, draggedTileOriginalPos.y, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped, draggedTileShrineType, false, false, draggedTileId);
1873:                     } else if (draggedTileShrineType === 'player') {
1874:                         updateStatus('Player tiles must touch 2+ adjacent unrevealed tiles');
1875:                     }
1876: 
1877:                     viewport.removeChild(ghostTile);
1878:                     ghostTile = null;
1879:                     isDraggingTile = false;
1880:                     draggedTileId = null;
1881:                     draggedTileOriginalPos = null;
1882:                     snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1883:                 } else if (isDraggingStone && ghostStone) {
1884:                     // Remove ghost FIRST — prevents orphaned ghost stamps if anything below throws
1885:                     viewport.removeChild(ghostStone);
1886:                     ghostStone = null;
1887:                     isDraggingStone = false;
1888:                     snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1889: 
1890:                     const capturedStoneId = draggedStoneId;
1891:                     const capturedStoneType = draggedStoneType;
1892:                     draggedStoneId = null;
1893:                     draggedStoneType = null;
1894: 
1895:                     const stonePos = findValidStonePosition(world.x, world.y);
1896:                     if (stonePos.valid) {
1897:                         placeStone(stonePos.x, stonePos.y, capturedStoneType);
1898: 
1899:                         if (capturedStoneId === null) {
1900:                             playerPool[capturedStoneType]--;
1901:                             updateStoneCountDisplay(capturedStoneType);
1902:                             syncPlayerState();
1903:                         }
1904:                         // Note: placeStone already calls broadcastGameAction('stone-place', ...) internally.
1905:                     } else if (capturedStoneId !== null) {
1906:                         playerPool[capturedStoneType]++;
1907:                         updateStoneCountDisplay(capturedStoneType);
1908:                         syncPlayerState();
1909:                     }
1910:                 } else if (isDraggingPlayer && ghostPlayer) {
1911:                     const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
1912:                     const playerPos = findNearestHexPosition(world.x, world.y);
1913:                     const startPos = playerPath[0];
1914:                     let movementSuccessful = false;
1915: 
1916:                     if (tf && tf.active) {
1917:                         const targetIndex = tf.targetPlayerIndex;
1918:                         const destPos = playerPos && playerPos.valid ? { x: playerPos.x, y: playerPos.y } : null;
1919:                         const origin = tf.startPos || startPos;
1920: 
1921:                         const hasStone = destPos && placedStones.some(s => {
1922:                             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - destPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - destPos.y, 2));
1923:                             return dist < 5;
1924:                         });
1925:                         const hasPlayer = destPos && playerPositions.some((p, idx) => {
1926:                             if (!p) return false;
1927:                             if (idx === targetIndex) return false;
1928:                             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x - destPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(p.y - destPos.y, 2));
1929:                             return dist < 5;
1930:                         });
1931: 
1932:                         if (!destPos || hasStone || hasPlayer) {
1933:                             if (hasStone) updateStatus('Take Flight: cannot teleport onto a stone.');
1934:                             else if (hasPlayer) updateStatus('Take Flight: another player is in the way.');
1935:                             else updateStatus('Take Flight: invalid destination.');
1936: 
1937:                             if (origin) {
1938:                                 if (targetIndex === activePlayerIndex) {
1939:                                     placePlayer(origin.x, origin.y);
1940:                                 } else if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
1941:                                     movePlayerVisually(targetIndex, origin.x, origin.y, 0);
1942:                                 }
1943:                             }
1944:                         } else {
1945:                             if (targetIndex === activePlayerIndex) {
1946:                                 placePlayer(destPos.x, destPos.y);
1947:                             } else if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
1948:                                 movePlayerVisually(targetIndex, destPos.x, destPos.y, 0);
1949:                             }
1950: 
1951:                             if (tf.onComplete) {
1952:                                 tf.onComplete(destPos.x, destPos.y);
1953:                             }
1954:                         }
1955:                     } else if (playerPath.length > 1 && playerPos.valid) {
1956:                         const totalCost = calculatePathCost();
1957:                         const finalPos = playerPath[playerPath.length - 1];
1958:                         const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(finalPos.x, finalPos.y, true);
1959: 
1960:                         // Check if there's a stone at the final position that you CAN'T end turn on
1961:                         const stoneAtFinal = placedStones.find(s => {
1962:                             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - finalPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - finalPos.y, 2));
1963:                             return dist < 5;
1964:                         });
1965:                         const cannotEndTurnHere = stoneAtFinal && stoneAtFinal.type !== 'void';
1966: 
1967:                         if (cannotEndTurnHere) {
1968:                             updateStatus('Cannot end movement on a ' + stoneAtFinal.type + ' stone!');
1969:                         } else if (!moveCheck.canMove) {
1970:                             updateStatus(moveCheck.reason || 'Cannot move to this position');
1971:                         } else if (totalCost > getTotalAP()) {
1972:                             updateStatus(`Not enough AP (need ${totalCost}, have ${getTotalAP()})`);
1973:                         } else {
1974:                             // Store the last move for undo
1975:                             lastMove = {
1976:                                 prevPos: { x: startPos.x, y: startPos.y },
1977:                                 newPos: { x: finalPos.x, y: finalPos.y },
1978:                                 apCost: totalCost
1979:                             };
1980:                             placePlayer(finalPos.x, finalPos.y);
1981:                             spendAP(totalCost);
1982:                             movementSuccessful = true;
1983: 
1984:                             // Broadcast player movement to other players
1985:                             if (isMultiplayer) {
1986:                                 broadcastGameAction('player-move', {
1987:                                     playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1988:                                     x: finalPos.x,
1989:                                     y: finalPos.y,
1990:                                     apSpent: totalCost,
1991:                                     cosmetics: window.cosmeticsSystem?.getEquippedAll() || null
1992:                                 });
1993:                             }
1994: 
1995:                             // Check if player stepped on a hidden tile - reveal it!
1996:                             const actualPlayerPos = { x: playerPosition.x, y: playerPosition.y };
1997:                             const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
1998: 
1999:                             let playerHex = null;
2000:                             let minDist = Infinity;
2001:                             allHexes.forEach(hexPos => {
2002:                                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hexPos.x - actualPlayerPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(hexPos.y - actualPlayerPos.y, 2));
2003:                                 if (dist < minDist) {
2004:                                     minDist = dist;
2005:                                     playerHex = hexPos;
2006:                                 }
2007:                             });
2008: 
2009:                             if (playerHex && minDist < 5 && playerHex.tiles) {
2010:                                 const flippedTiles = playerHex.tiles.filter(t => t.flipped && !t.isPlayerTile);
2011:                                 flippedTiles.forEach(tileInfo => {
2012:                                     revealTile(tileInfo.id);
2013:                                 });
2014:                             }
2015:                         }
2016:                     }
2017: 
2018:                     // If movement failed or was cancelled, restore player to start position
2019:                     if (!movementSuccessful && startPos) {
2020:                         placePlayer(startPos.x, startPos.y);
2021:                     }
2022: 
2023:                     if (ghostPlayer) {
2024:                         viewport.removeChild(ghostPlayer);
2025:                         ghostPlayer = null;
2026:                     }
2027:                     clearPlayerPath();
2028:                     isDraggingPlayer = false;
2029:                     snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
2030:                 }
2031:             }
2032: 
2033:             isGestureRotating = false;
2034:             isPinching = false;
2035:             initialTouches = [];
2036:         
2037:         }

2070:             if (e.button === 2) rightButtonDown = true;

2089:                     console.log(`📍 SHIFT+CLICK DETECTED!`);

2097:

2105:                 if (hexPos.valid) {

2107:

2110:                     const matchingHex = allHexes.find(h => {
2111:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(h.x - hexPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(h.y - hexPos.y, 2));
2112:                         return dist < 5;
2113:                     });
2114:                     
2115:                     if (matchingHex && matchingHex.tiles) {
2116:                         console.log(`   This hex is contributed by ${matchingHex.tiles.length} tile(s):`);
2117:                         matchingHex.tiles.forEach((tile, i) => {

2119:                         });
2120:                     }

2127:

2135:                 line1.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');

2137:

2140:                 line2.setAttribute('y1', '-10');
2141:                 line2.setAttribute('x2', '0');
2142:                 line2.setAttribute('y2', '10');
2143:                 line2.setAttribute('stroke', '#ff00ff');
2144:                 line2.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
2145:                 marker.appendChild(line2);
2146:

2149:                 circle.setAttribute('cx', '0');

2161:                 text.setAttribute('fill', '#ff00ff');

2165:                 marker.appendChild(text);
2166:

2168:                 debugMarkers.push(marker);
2169:                 
2170:                 updateStatus(`DEBUG: Pinned (${world.x.toFixed(1)}, ${world.y.toFixed(1)}) - Check console for details`);
2171:                 return; // Don't start panning
2172:             }
2173: 
2174:             // Don't start panning if we're already dragging something
2175:             if (isDraggingTile || isDraggingStone || isDraggingPlayer) return;
2176: 
2177:             const targetClass = e.target.getAttribute('class');
2178:             const isStone = targetClass && (targetClass.includes('stone') || e.target.closest('.stone'));
2179:             const isPlayer = targetClass && (targetClass.includes('player') || e.target.closest('.player'));
2180: 
2181:             if (e.button === 0 && (e.target === boardSvg || e.target === viewport || e.target.tagName === 'polygon') && !isStone && !isPlayer) {
2182:                 e.preventDefault();
2183:                 isPanning = true;
2184:                 panStartX = e.clientX;
2185:                 panStartY = e.clientY;
2186:                 lastPanX = viewportX;
2187:                 lastPanY = viewportY;
2188:                 boardSvg.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
2189:             } else if (e.button === 2 && (e.target === boardSvg || e.target === viewport)) {
2190:                 e.preventDefault();
2191:                 isRotatingBoard = true;
2192:                 rotateStartX = e.clientX;
2193:                 rotateStartRotation = viewportRotation;
2194:                 boardSvg.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
2195:             }
2196:         });

2198:         boardSvg.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => e.preventDefault());
2199: 
2200:         let pendingDocumentMove = false;
2201:         let lastDocumentMove = null;
2202:         document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
2203:             lastDocumentMove = { clientX: e.clientX, clientY: e.clientY };
2204:             if (pendingDocumentMove) return;
2205:             pendingDocumentMove = true;
2206:             requestAnimationFrame(() => {
2207:                 pendingDocumentMove = false;
2208:                 if (!lastDocumentMove) return;
2209: 
2210:                 if (isPanning) {
2211:                     const dx = lastDocumentMove.clientX - panStartX;
2212:                     const dy = lastDocumentMove.clientY - panStartY;
2213:                     const rad = -viewportRotation * Math.PI / 180;
2214:                     const cos = Math.cos(rad);
2215:                     const sin = Math.sin(rad);
2216:                     const rotatedDx = dx * cos - dy * sin;
2217:                     const rotatedDy = dx * sin + dy * cos;
2218:                     viewportX = lastPanX + rotatedDx;
2219:                     viewportY = lastPanY + rotatedDy;
2220:                     updateViewport();
2221:                 } else if (isRotatingBoard) {
2222:                     const dx = lastDocumentMove.clientX - rotateStartX;
2223:                     viewportRotation = rotateStartRotation + (dx / 100) * 90;
2224:                     updateViewport();
2225:                 } else if (isRotatingTile) {
2226:                     const dx = lastDocumentMove.clientX - rotateTileStartX;
2227:                     const steps = Math.round(dx / 60);
2228:                     currentRotation = (rotateTileStartRotation - steps + 6) % 6; // Reversed direction: subtract instead of add
2229:                     drawDeckTile();
2230:                 }
2231:             });
2232:         });
2233: 
2234:         // Debug mode: array to store debug markers
2235:         let debugMarkers = [];

2237:         // Player tile keyboard-placement preview state
2238:         let tilePreviewActive = false;
2239:         let tilePreviewPositions = [];
2240:         let tilePreviewIndex = 0;
2241:         let tilePreviewGhost = null;
2242: 
2243:         function buildValidPlayerTilePositions() {
2244:             const largeHexSize = TILE_SIZE * 4;
2245:             const offsets = [
2246:                 { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 },
2247:                 { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -1 }
2248:             ];
2249:             const valid = [];
2250:             const seen = new Set();
2251:             for (const tile of placedTiles) {
2252:                 const th = pixelToHex(tile.x, tile.y, largeHexSize);
2253:                 for (const off of offsets) {
2254:                     const key = `${th.q + off.q},${th.r + off.r}`;
2255:                     if (seen.has(key)) continue;
2256:                     seen.add(key);
2257:                     const pos = hexToPixel(th.q + off.q, th.r + off.r, largeHexSize);
2258:                     const occupied = placedTiles.some(t =>
2259:                         Math.sqrt(Math.pow(t.x - pos.x, 2) + Math.pow(t.y - pos.y, 2)) < TILE_SIZE
2260:                     );
2261:                     if (!occupied && countTouchingUnrevealedTiles(pos.x, pos.y) >= 2) {
2262:                         valid.push(pos);
2263:                     }
2264:                 }
2265:             }
2266:             // Sort clockwise by angle from board centre so ←/→ feel spatial
2267:             valid.sort((a, b) => Math.atan2(a.y, a.x) - Math.atan2(b.y, b.x));
2268:             return valid;
2269:         }
2270: 
2271:         function showTilePreviewGhost(pos) {
2272:             if (tilePreviewGhost) tilePreviewGhost.remove();
2273:             const g = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
2274:             g.setAttribute('class', 'player-tile-preview');
2275:             g.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${pos.x}, ${pos.y})`);
2276: 
2277:             const tile = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, 0, false);
2278:             g.appendChild(tile);
2279: 
2280:             // Dashed outline ring
2281:             const outline = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
2282:             outline.setAttribute('class', 'preview-outline');
2283:             outline.setAttribute('cx', 0);
2284:             outline.setAttribute('cy', 0);
2285:             outline.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 2);
2286:             g.appendChild(outline);
2287: 
2288:             viewport.appendChild(g);
2289:             tilePreviewGhost = g;
2290:         }
2291: 
2292:         function cancelTilePreview() {
2293:             if (tilePreviewGhost) { tilePreviewGhost.remove(); tilePreviewGhost = null; }
2294:             tilePreviewActive = false;
2295:             tilePreviewPositions = [];
2296:         }
2297: 
2298:         // Player pawn keyboard-movement preview state
2299:         let movePreviewActive = false;
2300:         let movePreviewPositions = [];
2301:         let movePreviewIndex = 0;
2302:         let movePreviewGhost = null;
2303: 
2304:         function buildValidMovePositions() {
2305:             if (!playerPosition) return [];
2306:             const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
2307: 
2308:             return allHexes
2309:                 .filter(h => {
2310:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(h.x - playerPosition.x, 2) + Math.pow(h.y - playerPosition.y, 2));
2311:                     return dist > 5 && dist < 40; // immediately adjacent only
2312:                 })
2313:                 .filter(h => {
2314:                     // Tutorial gate
2315:                     if (window.isTutorialMode && window.tutorialAllowedHexes) {
2316:                         return [...window.tutorialAllowedHexes].some(key => {
2317:                             const [ax, ay] = key.split(',').map(Number);
2318:                             return Math.abs(ax - h.x) < 70 && Math.abs(ay - h.y) < 70;
2319:                         });
2320:                     }
2321:                     return true;
2322:                 })
2323:                 .filter(h => {
2324:                     const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(h.x, h.y, false);
2325:                     if (!moveCheck.canMove) return false;
2326:                     if (moveCheck.cost > getTotalAP()) return false;
2327:                     // Can't end turn on a non-void stone
2328:                     const stone = placedStones.find(s =>
2329:                         Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - h.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - h.y, 2)) < 5
2330:                     );
2331:                     if (stone && stone.type !== 'void') return false;
2332:                     return true;
2333:                 })
2334:                 .sort((a, b) => {
2335:                     const angleA = Math.atan2(a.y - playerPosition.y, a.x - playerPosition.x);
2336:                     const angleB = Math.atan2(b.y - playerPosition.y, b.x - playerPosition.x);
2337:                     return angleA - angleB;
2338:                 });
2339:         }
2340: 
2341:         function showMovePreviewGhost(pos) {
2342:             if (movePreviewGhost) movePreviewGhost.remove();
2343:             const g = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
2344:             g.setAttribute('class', 'move-preview');
2345:             g.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${pos.x}, ${pos.y})`);
2346:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
2347:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
2348:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
2349:             circle.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE - 3);
2350:             g.appendChild(circle);
2351:             viewport.appendChild(g);
2352:             movePreviewGhost = g;
2353:         }
2354: 
2355:         function cancelMovePreview() {
2356:             if (movePreviewGhost) { movePreviewGhost.remove(); movePreviewGhost = null; }
2357:             movePreviewActive = false;
2358:             movePreviewPositions = [];
2359:         }
2360: 
2361:         // Catacomb teleport keyboard-preview state
2362:         let cataPreviewActive = false;
2363:         let cataPreviewDestinations = [];
2364:         let cataPreviewIndex = 0;
2365:         let cataPreviewGhost = null;
2366: 
2367:         function buildCatacombDestinations() {
2368:             if (!playerPosition) return [];
2369:             const currentShrine = findShrineAtPosition(playerPosition.x, playerPosition.y);
2370:             const freedomActive = spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects
2371:                 && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasFreedomActive === 'function'
2372:                 && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasFreedomActive(myPlayerIndex);
2373:             const elementalTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
2374:             const isCatacombLike = (tile) => {
2375:                 if (!tile) return false;
2376:                 if (tile.shrineType === 'catacomb') return true;
2377:                 if (freedomActive && elementalTypes.includes(tile.shrineType)) return true;
2378:                 return false;
2379:             };
2380:             if (!currentShrine || !isCatacombLike(currentShrine)) return [];
2381:             return placedTiles.filter(tile => {
2382:                 if (!isCatacombLike(tile)) return false;
2383:                 if (tile.flipped) return false;
2384:                 if (Math.abs(tile.x - currentShrine.x) <= 5 && Math.abs(tile.y - currentShrine.y) <= 5) return false;
2385:                 const hasStone = placedStones.some(s => Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - tile.y, 2)) < 5);
2386:                 const hasPlayer = playerPositions.some(p => p && Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(p.y - tile.y, 2)) < 5);
2387:                 return !hasStone && !hasPlayer;
2388:             });
2389:         }
2390: 
2391:         function showCataPreviewGhost(shrine) {
2392:             if (cataPreviewGhost) cataPreviewGhost.remove();
2393:             const g = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
2394:             g.setAttribute('class', 'catacomb-preview');
2395:             g.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${shrine.x}, ${shrine.y})`);
2396: 
2397:             const outer = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
2398:             outer.setAttribute('cx', 0);
2399:             outer.setAttribute('cy', 0);
2400:             outer.setAttribute('r', '18');
2401:             outer.setAttribute('fill', '#8b4513');
2402:             outer.setAttribute('stroke', '#fff');
2403:             outer.setAttribute('stroke-width', '3');
2404:             outer.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray', '8 4');
2405:             g.appendChild(outer);
2406: 
2407:             const inner = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
2408:             inner.setAttribute('cx', 0);
2409:             inner.setAttribute('cy', 0);
2410:             inner.setAttribute('r', '6');
2411:             inner.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
2412:             g.appendChild(inner);
2413: 
2414:             viewport.appendChild(g);
2415:             cataPreviewGhost = g;
2416:         }
2417: 
2418:         function cancelCataPreview() {
2419:             if (cataPreviewGhost) { cataPreviewGhost.remove(); cataPreviewGhost = null; }
2420:             cataPreviewActive = false;
2421:             cataPreviewDestinations = [];
2422:         }
2423: 
2424:         function confirmCataTransport() {
2425:             const shrine = cataPreviewDestinations[cataPreviewIndex];
2426:             cancelCataPreview();
2427:             // Re-verify destination is still clear
2428:             const hasStone = placedStones.some(s => Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - shrine.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - shrine.y, 2)) < 5);
2429:             const hasPlayer = playerPositions.some(p => p && Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x - shrine.x, 2) + Math.pow(p.y - shrine.y, 2)) < 5);
2430:             if (hasStone || hasPlayer) {
2431:                 updateStatus('Cannot teleport there — destination is now blocked!');
2432:                 updateCatacombIndicators();
2433:                 return;
2434:             }
2435:             placePlayer(shrine.x, shrine.y);
2436:             updateStatus('Teleported to another catacomb shrine!');
2437:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2438:                 const playerIndex = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null) ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
2439:                 broadcastGameAction('catacomb-teleport', { playerIndex, x: shrine.x, y: shrine.y });
2440:             }
2441:             updateCatacombIndicators();
2442:         }
2443: 
2444:         // Hand / Active / Common keyboard navigation state
2445:         let handNavActive = false;
2446:         let handNavIndex = 0;
2447:         let activeNavActive = false;
2448:         let activeNavIndex = 0;
2449:         let commonNavActive = false;
2450:         let commonNavIndex = 0;
2451: 
2452:         function getHandScrolls()   { return [...(window.spellSystem?.handScrolls   || [])]; }
2453:         function getActiveScrolls() { return [...(window.spellSystem?.activeScrolls || [])]; }
2454:         function getCommonScrolls() {
2455:             return typeof window.spellSystem?.getCommonAreaScrolls === 'function'
2456:                 ? window.spellSystem.getCommonAreaScrolls() : [];
2457:         }
2458: 
2459:         function clearScrollSelection() {
2460:             document.querySelectorAll('.fsp-card-selected').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('fsp-card-selected'));
2461:         }
2462: 
2463:         function highlightScrollCard(panelId, index) {
2464:             clearScrollSelection();
2465:             const body = document.getElementById(`fsp-body-${panelId}`);
2466:             if (!body) return;
2467:             const cards = body.querySelectorAll('.fsp-card');
2468:             if (!cards.length) return;
2469:             const card = cards[index];
2470:             if (card) {
2471:                 card.classList.add('fsp-card-selected');
2472:                 card.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest', inline: 'center' });
2473:             }
2474:         }
2475: 
2476:         function cancelHandNav()   { handNavActive   = false; clearScrollSelection(); }
2477:         function cancelActiveNav() { activeNavActive = false; clearScrollSelection(); }
2478:         function cancelCommonNav() { commonNavActive = false; clearScrollSelection(); }
2479: 
2480:         function enterHandNav() {
2481:             const sps = window.ScrollPanelSystem;
2482:             const scrolls = getHandScrolls();
2483:             if (!scrolls.length) { updateStatus('Hand is empty.'); return; }
2484:             const el = document.getElementById('fsp-hand');
2485:             if (!el || el.style.display === 'none') sps?.openPanel('hand');
2486:             cancelActiveNav(); cancelCommonNav();
2487:             handNavActive = true;
2488:             handNavIndex = 0;
2489:             highlightScrollCard('hand', 0);
2490:             updateStatus(`Hand ${handNavIndex + 1}/${scrolls.length} — ← → pick · Enter=active · Tab=common · Space=cast · Esc cancel`);
2491:         }
2492: 
2493:         function enterActiveNav() {
2494:             const sps = window.ScrollPanelSystem;
2495:             const scrolls = getActiveScrolls();
2496:             if (!scrolls.length) { updateStatus('Active area is empty.'); return; }
2497:             const el = document.getElementById('fsp-active');
2498:             if (!el || el.style.display === 'none') sps?.openPanel('active');
2499:             cancelHandNav(); cancelCommonNav();
2500:             activeNavActive = true;
2501:             activeNavIndex = 0;
2502:             highlightScrollCard('active', 0);
2503:             updateStatus(`Active ${activeNavIndex + 1}/${scrolls.length} — ← → pick · Tab=common · Space=cast · Esc cancel`);
2504:         }
2505: 
2506:         function enterCommonNav() {
2507:             const sps = window.ScrollPanelSystem;
2508:             const scrolls = getCommonScrolls();
2509:             if (!scrolls.length) { updateStatus('Common area is empty.'); return; }
2510:             const el = document.getElementById('fsp-common');
2511:             if (!el || el.style.display === 'none') sps?.openPanel('common');
2512:             cancelHandNav(); cancelActiveNav();
2513:             commonNavActive = true;
2514:             commonNavIndex = 0;
2515:             highlightScrollCard('common', 0);
2516:             updateStatus(`Common ${commonNavIndex + 1}/${scrolls.length} — ← → pick · Space=cast · Esc cancel`);
2517:         }
2518: 
2519:         // Stone placement keyboard-preview state
2520:         // Keys 1-6 map to: earth, water, fire, wind, void, catacomb
2521:         const STONE_KEY_ORDER = ['void', 'wind', 'fire', 'water', 'earth'];
2522:         let stonePreviewActive = false;
2523:         let stonePreviewType = null;
2524:         let stonePreviewPositions = [];
2525:         let stonePreviewIndex = 0;
2526:         let stonePreviewGhost = null;
2527: 
2528:         function buildValidStonePositions(type) {
2529:             const hexPositions = getAllHexagonPositions();
2530:             // Temporarily set draggedStoneType so isInPlacementRange reads the right type
2531:             const prevType = draggedStoneType;
2532:             draggedStoneType = type;
2533: 
2534:             const valid = hexPositions.filter(pos => {
2535:                 const stoneHere = placedStones.some(s =>
2536:                     Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - pos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - pos.y, 2)) < 5
2537:                 );
2538:                 if (stoneHere) return false;
2539: 
2540:                 let playerHere = false;
2541:                 if (playerPosition) {
2542:                     playerHere = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(playerPosition.x - pos.x, 2) + Math.pow(playerPosition.y - pos.y, 2)) < 5;
2543:                 }
2544:                 if (!playerHere && typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined') {
2545:                     playerPositions.forEach(p => {
2546:                         if (p && p.x != null) {
2547:                             if (Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x - pos.x, 2) + Math.pow(p.y - pos.y, 2)) < 5) playerHere = true;
2548:                         }
2549:                     });
2550:                 }
2551:                 if (playerHere) return false;
2552: 
2553:                 if (isPositionOnFlippedTile(pos.x, pos.y, hexPositions)) return false;
2554:                 if (!isInPlacementRange(pos.x, pos.y, type)) return false;
2555:                 return true;
2556:             });
2557: 
2558:             draggedStoneType = prevType;
2559: 
2560:             // Sort by clockwise angle around the player so ←/→ sweeps in a circle
2561:             if (playerPosition) {
2562:                 valid.sort((a, b) => {
2563:                     const angleA = Math.atan2(a.y - playerPosition.y, a.x - playerPosition.x);
2564:                     const angleB = Math.atan2(b.y - playerPosition.y, b.x - playerPosition.x);
2565:                     return angleA - angleB;
2566:                 });
2567:             }
2568:             return valid;
2569:         }
2570: 
2571:         function showStonePreviewGhost(pos, type) {
2572:             if (stonePreviewGhost) stonePreviewGhost.remove();
2573:             const g = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
2574:             g.setAttribute('class', 'stone-preview');
2575:             g.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${pos.x}, ${pos.y})`);
2576: 
2577:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
2578:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
2579:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
2580:             circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
2581:             circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[type].color);
2582:             circle.setAttribute('stroke', '#fff');
2583:             circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
2584:             g.appendChild(circle);
2585: 
2586:             const img = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'image');
2587:             img.setAttribute('href', STONE_TYPES[type].img);
2588:             img.setAttribute('x', -STONE_SIZE);
2589:             img.setAttribute('y', -STONE_SIZE);
2590:             img.setAttribute('width', STONE_SIZE * 2);
2591:             img.setAttribute('height', STONE_SIZE * 2);
2592:             g.appendChild(img);
2593: 
2594:             viewport.appendChild(g);
2595:             stonePreviewGhost = g;
2596:         }
2597: 
2598:         function cancelStonePreview() {
2599:             if (stonePreviewGhost) { stonePreviewGhost.remove(); stonePreviewGhost = null; }
2600:             stonePreviewActive = false;
2601:             stonePreviewType = null;
2602:             stonePreviewPositions = [];
2603:         }
2604: 
2605:         function enterStonePreview(type) {
2606:             cancelTilePreview();
2607:             cancelMovePreview();
2608:             cancelCataPreview();
2609:             const positions = buildValidStonePositions(type);
2610:             if (positions.length === 0) {
2611:                 updateStatus(`No valid positions for ${type} stone!`);
2612:                 return;
2613:             }
2614:             stonePreviewType = type;
2615:             stonePreviewPositions = positions;
2616:             stonePreviewIndex = 0;
2617:             stonePreviewActive = true;
2618:             showStonePreviewGhost(positions[0], type);
2619:             updateStatus(`${type} stone — pos 1 of ${positions.length} — ← → to move, Enter to place, ${STONE_KEY_ORDER.indexOf(type) + 1} or Esc to cancel`);
2620:         }
2621: 
2622:         document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
2623:             // Don't fire game shortcuts while the player is typing in any input / textarea / contenteditable
2624:             const tag = document.activeElement?.tagName;
2625:             if (tag === 'INPUT' || tag === 'TEXTAREA' || document.activeElement?.isContentEditable) return;
2626: 
2627:             // Don't fire game shortcuts until the game board is actually active
2628:             if (!document.getElementById('game-layout')?.classList.contains('active')) return;
2629: 
2630:             console.log(`Key pressed: ${e.key}, isDraggingTile=${isDraggingTile}, ghostTile=${!!ghostTile}, shift=${e.shiftKey}`);
2631:             if (e.key === 'f' || e.key === 'F') {
2632:                 console.log(`F key detected! isDraggingTile=${isDraggingTile}, ghostTile exists=${!!ghostTile}, shift=${e.shiftKey}`);
2633:                 
2634:                 // SHIFT+F: Debug mode - show tile coordinates
2635:                 if (e.shiftKey && isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
2636:                     if (window.shouldDebugLog ? window.shouldDebugLog('tileDragged', 500) : true) {
2637:                         console.log(`📍 DEBUG: Tile being dragged`);
2638:                     }
2639:                     console.log(`   draggedTileId: ${draggedTileId}`);
2640:                     console.log(`   draggedTileShrineType: ${draggedTileShrineType}`);
2641:                     console.log(`   draggedTileFlipped: ${draggedTileFlipped}`);
2642:                     console.log(`   draggedTileRotation: ${draggedTileRotation}`);
2643:                     if (draggedTileOriginalPos) {
2644:                         console.log(`   Original position: (${draggedTileOriginalPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${draggedTileOriginalPos.y.toFixed(1)})`);
2645:                     }
2646:                     
2647:                     // Get current ghost position
2648:                     const transform = ghostTile.getAttribute('transform');
2649:                     console.log(`   Current ghost transform: ${transform}`);
2650:                     
2651:                     updateStatus(`DEBUG: Tile ID=${draggedTileId}, shrine=${draggedTileShrineType}, flipped=${draggedTileFlipped}`);
2652:                 }
2653:                 // Normal F: Flip the tile
2654:                 else if (!e.shiftKey && isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
2655:                     console.log(`Before flip: draggedTileFlipped=${draggedTileFlipped}`);
2656:                     // Flip the tile being dragged
2657:                     draggedTileFlipped = !draggedTileFlipped;
2658:                     console.log(`After flip: draggedTileFlipped=${draggedTileFlipped}`);
2659: 
2660:                     // Update the ghost tile visual
2661:                     ghostTile.innerHTML = '';
2662:                     const tile = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped);
2663:                     ghostTile.appendChild(tile);
2664: 
2665:                     updateStatus(`Tile ${draggedTileFlipped ? 'flipped' : 'unflipped'}`);
2666:                     console.log(`Tile visual updated`);
2667:                 } else {
2668:                     console.log(`Cannot flip - not dragging a tile or no ghost tile`);
2669:                 }
2670:             }
2671: 
2672:             // Q: navigate Hand scrolls
2673:             if ((e.key === 'q' || e.key === 'Q') && !e.ctrlKey && !e.altKey && !e.metaKey) {
2674:                 if (handNavActive) { cancelHandNav(); updateStatus('Hand navigation cancelled.'); }
2675:                 else enterHandNav();
2676:             }
2677: 
2678:             // W: navigate Active scrolls
2679:             if ((e.key === 'w' || e.key === 'W') && !e.ctrlKey && !e.altKey && !e.metaKey) {
2680:                 if (activeNavActive) { cancelActiveNav(); updateStatus('Active navigation cancelled.'); }
2681:                 else enterActiveNav();
2682:             }
2683: 
2684:             // E: navigate Common scrolls
2685:             if ((e.key === 'e' || e.key === 'E') && !e.ctrlKey && !e.altKey && !e.metaKey) {
2686:                 if (commonNavActive) { cancelCommonNav(); updateStatus('Common navigation cancelled.'); }
2687:                 else enterCommonNav();
2688:             }
2689: 
2690:             // Tab: move selected card to Common Area
2691:             if (e.key === 'Tab' && (handNavActive || activeNavActive)) {
2692:                 e.preventDefault();
2693:                 const sp = window.spellSystem;
2694:                 const sps = window.ScrollPanelSystem;
2695:                 if (handNavActive) {
2696:                     const scrolls = getHandScrolls();
2697:                     if (scrolls.length) {
2698:                         const name = scrolls[handNavIndex];
2699:                         cancelHandNav();
2700:                         sp?.discardScroll(name);
2701:                         sps?.refresh();
2702:                         updateStatus(`${name} moved to common area.`);
2703:                     }
2704:                 } else if (activeNavActive) {
2705:                     const scrolls = getActiveScrolls();
2706:                     if (scrolls.length) {
2707:                         const name = scrolls[activeNavIndex];
2708:                         cancelActiveNav();
2709:                         sp?.discardScroll(name);
2710:                         sps?.refresh();
2711:                         updateStatus(`${name} moved to common area.`);
2712:                     }
2713:                 }
2714:             }
2715: 
2716:             // Space: cast selected card (hand or active nav)
2717:             if (e.key === ' ' && (handNavActive || activeNavActive || commonNavActive)) {
2718:                 e.preventDefault();
2719:                 const sp = window.spellSystem;
2720:                 const sps = window.ScrollPanelSystem;
2721:                 let scrolls, idx;
2722:                 if (handNavActive)   { scrolls = getHandScrolls();   idx = handNavIndex; }
2723:                 else if (activeNavActive) { scrolls = getActiveScrolls(); idx = activeNavIndex; }
2724:                 else                 { scrolls = getCommonScrolls();  idx = commonNavIndex; }
2725:                 const name = scrolls[idx];
2726:                 if (name && sp) {
2727:                     if (sp.checkPattern && sp.checkPattern(name)) {
2728:                         cancelHandNav(); cancelActiveNav(); cancelCommonNav();
2729:                         sp.castSpell();
2730:                         sps?.refresh();
2731:                     } else {
2732:                         updateStatus(`Pattern not matched — place the required stones first.`);
2733:                     }
2734:                 }
2735:             }
2736: 
2737:             // H / A / C: toggle Hand / Active / Common scroll panels
2738:             if ((e.key === 'h' || e.key === 'H') && !e.ctrlKey && !e.altKey && !e.metaKey) {
2739:                 const sps = window.ScrollPanelSystem;
2740:                 if (sps) {
2741:                     const el = document.getElementById('fsp-hand');
2742:                     if (el && el.style.display !== 'none') sps.closePanel('hand');
2743:                     else sps.openPanel('hand');
2744:                 }
2745:             }
2746:             if ((e.key === 'a' || e.key === 'A') && !e.ctrlKey && !e.altKey && !e.metaKey) {
2747:                 const sps = window.ScrollPanelSystem;
2748:                 if (sps) {
2749:                     const el = document.getElementById('fsp-active');
2750:                     if (el && el.style.display !== 'none') sps.closePanel('active');
2751:                     else sps.openPanel('active');
2752:                 }
2753:             }
2754:             if ((e.key === 'c' || e.key === 'C') && !e.ctrlKey && !e.altKey && !e.metaKey) {
2755:                 const sps = window.ScrollPanelSystem;
2756:                 if (sps) {
2757:                     const el = document.getElementById('fsp-common');
2758:                     if (el && el.style.display !== 'none') sps.closePanel('common');
2759:                     else sps.openPanel('common');
2760:                 }
2761:             }
2762: 
2763:             // T key: catacomb Teleport preview
2764:             if ((e.key === 't' || e.key === 'T') && !e.ctrlKey && !e.altKey && !e.metaKey) {
2765:                 if (cataPreviewActive) {
2766:                     confirmCataTransport();
2767:                 } else if (canTakeAction() && playerPosition) {
2768:                     const dests = buildCatacombDestinations();
2769:                     if (dests.length === 0) {
2770:                         // Not on a catacomb, or no valid destinations — do nothing silently
2771:                     } else {
2772:                         cancelTilePreview();
2773:                         cancelMovePreview();
2774:                         cancelStonePreview();
2775:                         cataPreviewDestinations = dests;
2776:                         cataPreviewIndex = 0;
2777:                         cataPreviewActive = true;
2778:                         showCataPreviewGhost(dests[0]);
2779:                         updateStatus(`Catacomb teleport — destination 1 of ${dests.length} — ← → to cycle, T to confirm, Esc to cancel`);
2780:                     }
2781:                 }
2782:             }
2783: 
2784:             // Number keys 1-6: stone placement preview
2785:             if (/^[1-5]$/.test(e.key) && !e.ctrlKey && !e.altKey && !e.metaKey) {
2786:                 const type = STONE_KEY_ORDER[parseInt(e.key) - 1];
2787:                 if (canTakeAction() && stoneCounts[type] > 0) {
2788:                     if (stonePreviewActive && stonePreviewType === type) {
2789:                         cancelStonePreview();
2790:                         updateStatus('Stone placement cancelled.');
2791:                     } else {
2792:                         enterStonePreview(type);
2793:                     }
2794:                 }
2795:             }
2796: 
2797:             // Enter: drives tile-placement, movement, stone placement previews, and hand nav
2798:             if (e.key === 'Enter') {
2799:                 // --- Hand nav: move to active ---
2800:                 if (handNavActive) {
2801:                     const sp = window.spellSystem;
2802:                     const sps = window.ScrollPanelSystem;
2803:                     const scrolls = getHandScrolls();
2804:                     if (scrolls.length) {
2805:                         const name = scrolls[handNavIndex];
2806:                         cancelHandNav();
2807:                         sp?.moveToActive(name);
2808:                         sps?.refresh();
2809:                         updateStatus(`${name} moved to active area.`);
2810:                     }
2811:                     return;
2812:                 }
2813: 
2814:                 // --- Stone placement: confirm ---
2815:                 if (stonePreviewActive) {
2816:                     const pos = stonePreviewPositions[stonePreviewIndex];
2817:                     const type = stonePreviewType;
2818:                     cancelStonePreview();
2819:                     placeStone(pos.x, pos.y, type);
2820:                     stoneCounts[type]--;
2821:                     updateStoneCount(type);
2822:                     syncPlayerState();
2823:                     updateStatus(`Placed ${type} stone`);
2824:                     return;
2825:                 }
2826: 
2827:                 // --- Tile placement: confirm ---
2828:                 if (tilePreviewActive) {
2829:                     const pos = tilePreviewPositions[tilePreviewIndex];
2830:                     cancelTilePreview();
2831:                     const tileId = placeTile(pos.x, pos.y, 0, false, 'player', false, false, null);
2832:                     if (tileId !== null) {
2833:                         playerTilesAvailable--;
2834:                         const countEl = document.getElementById('new-player-tile-count') || document.getElementById('player-tile-count');
2835:                         if (countEl) countEl.textContent = playerTilesAvailable;
2836:                         if (playerTileElements.length > 0) playerTileElements.shift().remove();
2837:                         if (isMultiplayer) {
2838:                             broadcastGameAction('player-tile-place', {
2839:                                 x: pos.x, y: pos.y,
2840:                                 playerIndex: myPlayerIndex,
2841:                                 color: playerColor,
2842:                                 cosmetics: window.cosmeticsSystem?.getEquippedAll() || null
2843:                             });
2844:                         }
2845:                         updateStatus('Player tile placed!');
2846:                     }
2847:                     return;
2848:                 }
2849: 
2850:                 // --- Movement: confirm ---
2851:                 if (movePreviewActive) {
2852:                     const target = movePreviewPositions[movePreviewIndex];
2853:                     cancelMovePreview();
2854:                     const startPos = { x: playerPosition.x, y: playerPosition.y };
2855:                     const actualCost = calculateTapMoveCost(startPos, target);
2856:                     if (actualCost >= 0 && actualCost <= getTotalAP()) {
2857:                         lastMove = { prevPos: startPos, newPos: { x: target.x, y: target.y }, apCost: actualCost };
2858:                         placePlayer(target.x, target.y);
2859:                         if (window.isTutorialMode && window.TutorialMode?.onPlayerMoved) {
2860:                             window.TutorialMode.onPlayerMoved(target.x, target.y);
2861:                         }
2862:                         spendAP(actualCost);
2863:                         if (isMultiplayer) {
2864:                             broadcastGameAction('player-move', {
2865:                                 playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
2866:                                 x: target.x, y: target.y,
2867:                                 apSpent: actualCost,
2868:                                 cosmetics: window.cosmeticsSystem?.getEquippedAll() || null
2869:                             });
2870:                         }
2871:                         // Reveal hidden tile if stepped onto one
2872:                         const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
2873:                         let landedHex = null, minD = Infinity;
2874:                         allHexes.forEach(h => {
2875:                             const d = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(h.x - target.x, 2) + Math.pow(h.y - target.y, 2));
2876:                             if (d < minD) { minD = d; landedHex = h; }
2877:                         });
2878:                         if (landedHex && minD < 5 && landedHex.tiles) {
2879:                             landedHex.tiles.filter(t => t.flipped && !t.isPlayerTile).forEach(t => revealTile(t.id));
2880:                         }
2881:                         updateStatus(`Moved (cost: ${actualCost} AP, ${getTotalAP()} AP remaining)`);
2882:                     } else {
2883:                         updateStatus('Could not move there!');
2884:                     }
2885:                     return;
2886:                 }
2887: 
2888:                 // --- Tile placement: enter preview ---
2889:                 if (playerTilesAvailable > 0) {
2890:                     if (isMultiplayer && (!isPlacementPhase || !canPlaceTile())) { notYourTurn(); return; }
2891:                     const positions = buildValidPlayerTilePositions();
2892:                     if (positions.length === 0) { updateStatus('No valid edge positions available for your tile!'); return; }
2893:                     tilePreviewPositions = positions;
2894:                     tilePreviewIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * positions.length);
2895:                     tilePreviewActive = true;
2896:                     showTilePreviewGhost(tilePreviewPositions[tilePreviewIndex]);
2897:                     updateStatus(`Tile position ${tilePreviewIndex + 1} of ${tilePreviewPositions.length} — ← → to move, Enter to confirm, Esc to cancel`);
2898:                     return;
2899:                 }
2900: 
2901:                 // --- Movement: enter preview ---
2902:                 if (canTakeAction() && playerPosition && getTotalAP() > 0 && !isDraggingPlayer && !isDraggingTile) {
2903:                     const positions = buildValidMovePositions();
2904:                     if (positions.length === 0) { updateStatus('No valid moves available!'); return; }
2905:                     movePreviewPositions = positions;
2906:                     movePreviewIndex = 0;
2907:                     movePreviewActive = true;
2908:                     showMovePreviewGhost(movePreviewPositions[0]);
2909:                     const cost = canPlayerMoveToHex(movePreviewPositions[0].x, movePreviewPositions[0].y, false).cost;
2910:                     updateStatus(`Move 1 of ${positions.length} (${cost} AP) — ← → to choose, Enter to confirm, Esc to cancel`);
2911:                 }
2912:             }
2913: 
2914:             // Arrow keys: cycle tile-placement, movement, stone, catacomb, or scroll nav
2915:             if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
2916:                 if (!tilePreviewActive && !movePreviewActive && !stonePreviewActive && !cataPreviewActive && !handNavActive && !activeNavActive && !commonNavActive) return;
2917:                 e.preventDefault();
2918:                 const dir = e.key === 'ArrowRight' ? 1 : -1;
2919:                 if (handNavActive) {
2920:                     const scrolls = getHandScrolls();
2921:                     handNavIndex = (handNavIndex + dir + scrolls.length) % scrolls.length;
2922:                     highlightScrollCard('hand', handNavIndex);
2923:                     updateStatus(`Hand ${handNavIndex + 1}/${scrolls.length} — ← → pick · Enter=active · Tab=common · Space=cast · Esc cancel`);
2924:                 } else if (activeNavActive) {
2925:                     const scrolls = getActiveScrolls();
2926:                     activeNavIndex = (activeNavIndex + dir + scrolls.length) % scrolls.length;
2927:                     highlightScrollCard('active', activeNavIndex);
2928:                     updateStatus(`Active ${activeNavIndex + 1}/${scrolls.length} — ← → pick · Tab=common · Space=cast · Esc cancel`);
2929:                 } else if (commonNavActive) {
2930:                     const scrolls = getCommonScrolls();
2931:                     commonNavIndex = (commonNavIndex + dir + scrolls.length) % scrolls.length;
2932:                     highlightScrollCard('common', commonNavIndex);
2933:                     updateStatus(`Common ${commonNavIndex + 1}/${scrolls.length} — ← → pick · Space=cast · Esc cancel`);
2934:                 } else if (tilePreviewActive) {
2935:                     tilePreviewIndex = (tilePreviewIndex + dir + tilePreviewPositions.length) % tilePreviewPositions.length;
2936:                     showTilePreviewGhost(tilePreviewPositions[tilePreviewIndex]);
2937:                     updateStatus(`Tile position ${tilePreviewIndex + 1} of ${tilePreviewPositions.length} — ← → to move, Enter to confirm, Esc to cancel`);
2938:                 } else if (stonePreviewActive) {
2939:                     stonePreviewIndex = (stonePreviewIndex + dir + stonePreviewPositions.length) % stonePreviewPositions.length;
2940:                     showStonePreviewGhost(stonePreviewPositions[stonePreviewIndex], stonePreviewType);
2941:                     updateStatus(`${stonePreviewType} stone — pos ${stonePreviewIndex + 1} of ${stonePreviewPositions.length} — ← → to move, Enter to place, ${STONE_KEY_ORDER.indexOf(stonePreviewType) + 1} or Esc to cancel`);
2942:                 } else if (cataPreviewActive) {
2943:                     cataPreviewIndex = (cataPreviewIndex + dir + cataPreviewDestinations.length) % cataPreviewDestinations.length;
2944:                     showCataPreviewGhost(cataPreviewDestinations[cataPreviewIndex]);
2945:                     updateStatus(`Catacomb teleport — destination ${cataPreviewIndex + 1} of ${cataPreviewDestinations.length} — ← → to cycle, T to confirm, Esc to cancel`);
2946:                 } else {
2947:                     movePreviewIndex = (movePreviewIndex + dir + movePreviewPositions.length) % movePreviewPositions.length;
2948:                     showMovePreviewGhost(movePreviewPositions[movePreviewIndex]);
2949:                     const cost = canPlayerMoveToHex(movePreviewPositions[movePreviewIndex].x, movePreviewPositions[movePreviewIndex].y, false).cost;
2950:                     updateStatus(`Move ${movePreviewIndex + 1} of ${movePreviewPositions.length} (${cost} AP) — ← → to choose, Enter to confirm, Esc to cancel`);
2951:                 }
2952:             }
2953: 
2954:             // X: end turn
2955:             if ((e.key === 'x' || e.key === 'X') && !e.ctrlKey && !e.altKey && !e.metaKey) {
2956:                 const btn = document.getElementById('end-turn');
2957:                 if (btn && !btn.disabled) btn.click();
2958:             }
2959: 
2960:             // Escape: cancel whichever preview or nav is active
2961:             if (e.key === 'Escape') {
2962:                 if (tilePreviewActive) { cancelTilePreview(); updateStatus('Tile placement cancelled.'); }
2963:                 else if (movePreviewActive) { cancelMovePreview(); updateStatus('Move cancelled.'); }
2964:                 else if (stonePreviewActive) { cancelStonePreview(); updateStatus('Stone placement cancelled.'); }
2965:                 else if (cataPreviewActive) { cancelCataPreview(); updateStatus('Teleport cancelled.'); }
2966:                 else if (handNavActive) { cancelHandNav(); updateStatus('Hand navigation cancelled.'); }
2967:                 else if (activeNavActive) { cancelActiveNav(); updateStatus('Active navigation cancelled.'); }
2968:                 else if (commonNavActive) { cancelCommonNav(); updateStatus('Common navigation cancelled.'); }
2969:             }
2970:         });
2971: 
2972:         boardSvg.addEventListener('wheel', (e) => {
2973:             e.preventDefault();
2974:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
2975:             const mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left;
2976:             const mouseY = e.clientY - rect.top;
2977:             const worldBefore = screenToWorld(mouseX, mouseY);
2978:             const zoomFactor = e.deltaY < 0 ? 1.1 : 0.9;
2979:             viewportScale = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(10, viewportScale * zoomFactor));
2980:             const worldAfter = screenToWorld(mouseX, mouseY);
2981:             viewportX += (worldAfter.x - worldBefore.x) * viewportScale;
2982:             viewportY += (worldAfter.y - worldBefore.y) * viewportScale;
2983:             updateViewport();
2984:         });
2985: 
2986:         let isEndingTurn = false; // Double-click guard for end-turn button
2987: 
2988:         document.getElementById('end-turn').onclick = function() {
2989:             resetEndTurnPrompt();
2990:             // Prevent double-click from advancing turn twice
2991:             if (isEndingTurn) return;
2992: 
2993:             // In multiplayer, only allow ending turn if it's your turn
2994:             if (!canTakeAction()) {
2995:                 notYourTurn();
2996:                 return;
2997:             }
2998: 
2999:             // Block end-turn if the player has an unresolved scroll cascade.
3000:             // They must choose where to place the overflowing scroll before ending.
3001:             const turnPlayerIdx = isMultiplayer ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
3002:             if (spellSystem && spellSystem.hasPendingCascade(turnPlayerIdx)) {
3003:                 updateStatus('Resolve your pending scroll cascade before ending your turn!');
3004:                 spellSystem.showPendingCascadePrompt(turnPlayerIdx);
3005:                 return;
3006:             }

3009:

3030:                 // Clear turn tracking (for Reflect and Burning Motivation)
3031:                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearTurnTracking();
