3033: 
3034:             // End-of-turn overflow: if hand or active scroll count exceeds capacity, show resolve modal first
3035:             const scrolls = spellSystem.getPlayerScrolls(false);
3036:             const handOver = scrolls.hand.size > spellSystem.MAX_HAND_SIZE;
3037:             const activeOver = scrolls.active.size > spellSystem.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE;
3038:             if (handOver || activeOver) {
3039:                 spellSystem.showEndTurnOverflowModal(function doEndTurn() {
3040:                     lastMove = null;
3041:                     if (playerPositions.length > 1) {
3042:                         const COLOR_RANK = {
3043:                             '#9458f4': 1, '#ffce00': 2, '#ed1b43': 3, '#5894f4': 4, '#69d83a': 5
3044:                         };
3045:                         // Guard: skip null/undefined entries (e.g. sparse indices after a player disconnects)
3046:                         const sortedPlayers = playerPositions
3047:                             .map((p, idx) => ({ index: idx, color: p?.color, rank: COLOR_RANK[p?.color] || 999 }))
3048:                             .filter((_, idx) => playerPositions[idx] != null)
3049:                             .sort((a, b) => a.rank - b.rank);
3050:                         if (sortedPlayers.length === 0) {
3051:                             console.warn('⚠️ sortedPlayers is empty — cannot advance turn');
3052:                             isEndingTurn = false;
3053:                             return;
3054:                         }
3055:                         let currentSortedIndex = sortedPlayers.findIndex(p => p.index === activePlayerIndex);
3056:                         if (currentSortedIndex === -1) {
3057:                             console.warn('⚠️ activePlayerIndex', activePlayerIndex, 'not found in sortedPlayers — defaulting to first player');
3058:                             currentSortedIndex = sortedPlayers.length - 1; // will wrap to 0
3059:                         }
3060:                         const nextSortedIndex = (currentSortedIndex + 1) % sortedPlayers.length;
3061:                         activePlayerIndex = sortedPlayers[nextSortedIndex].index;
3062: 
3063:                         // Broadcast turn change FIRST in multiplayer
3064:                         if (isMultiplayer) {
3065:                             const startedAt = Date.now();
3066:                             turnStartedAtMs = startedAt;
3067:                             currentTurnNumber++;
3068:                             broadcastGameAction('turn-change', {
3069:                                 playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
3070:                                 turnStartedAt: startedAt,
3071:                                 turnNumber: currentTurnNumber
3072:                             });
3073:                         }
3074: 
3075:                         // Wandering River ends at the beginning of your next turn: clear when we switch TO that player
3076:                         if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearWanderingRiverForPlayer) {
3077:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearWanderingRiverForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
3078:                         }
3079:                         if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearFreedomForPlayer) {
3080:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearFreedomForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
3081:                         }
3082:                         if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearQuickReflexesForPlayer) {
3083:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearQuickReflexesForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
3084:                         }
3085:                         if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearExcavateForPlayer) {
3086:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearExcavateForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
3087:                         }
3088:                         // Reflect fires first, then Psychic fires after all reflects fully resolve.
3089:                         // Both use sequential onComplete chaining for interactive scrolls.
3090:                         const reflectResult = spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processReflectPending
3091:                             ? spellSystem.scrollEffects.processReflectPending(activePlayerIndex, () => {
3092:                                 // All reflects done — now run Psychic stolen scrolls
3093:                                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processPsychicPending) {
3094:                                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.processPsychicPending(activePlayerIndex);
3095:                                 }
3096:                               })
3097:                             : null;
3098:                         // If no reflects, start Psychic immediately
3099:                         if (reflectResult === null && spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processPsychicPending) {
3100:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.processPsychicPending(activePlayerIndex);
3101:                         }
3102:                         // Excavate teleport: if this player has a pending teleport, trigger it
3103:                         if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processExcavateTeleport) {
3104:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.processExcavateTeleport(activePlayerIndex);
3105:                         }
3106:                         // AP resets at the start of the new player's turn (only for the new active player)
3107:                         if (activePlayerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
3108:                             currentAP = 5;
3109:                             document.getElementById('ap-count').textContent = currentAP;
3110:                             updateApPips(currentAP);
3111:                             refreshVoidAP();
3112:                             syncPlayerState();
3113:                         }
3114: 
3115:                         // Note: reflect-triggered and psychic-triggered broadcasts are both sent
3116:                         // inside processReflectPending/processPsychicPending respectively
3117:                         // (one per scroll, immediately before its interactive selection begins), so
3118:                         // remote clients receive them in order and can queue them sequentially.
3119:                         if (isMultiplayer) {
3120:                             if (Array.isArray(reflectResult) && typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') {
3121:                                 syncPlayerState();
3122:                             }
3123:                         }
3124: 
3125:                         const nextPlayerColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);

3129:                         console.log(`📄 Switched to player ${activePlayerIndex + 1} (${nextPlayerColorName})`);
3130:                     } else {
3131:                         // Single player: AP resets for next turn
3132:                         currentAP = 5;
3133:                         document.getElementById('ap-count').textContent = currentAP;
3134:                         updateApPips(currentAP);
3135:                         refreshVoidAP();

3137:                     }
3138:                     isEndingTurn = false;
3139:                 });
3140:                 return;
3141:             }
3142: 
3143:             // Shrine replenishment already handled above (before clearTurnBuffs, so Mine buff applies)
3144:

3146: 
3147:             // Switch to next player based on color rank
3148:             if (playerPositions.length > 1) {
3149:                 // Color rank order: void(1) -> wind(2) -> fire(3) -> water(4) -> earth(5)
3150:                 const COLOR_RANK = {
3151:                     '#9458f4': 1, // purple/void
3152:                     '#ffce00': 2, // yellow/wind
3153:                     '#ed1b43': 3, // red/fire

3155:                     '#69d83a': 5  // green/earth

3159:                 const sortedPlayers = playerPositions
3160:                     .map((p, idx) => ({ index: idx, color: p?.color, rank: COLOR_RANK[p?.color] || 999 }))
3161:                     .filter((_, idx) => playerPositions[idx] != null)
3162:                     .sort((a, b) => a.rank - b.rank);
3163: 
3164:                 if (sortedPlayers.length === 0) {
3165:                     console.warn('⚠️ sortedPlayers is empty — cannot advance turn (no placed player positions)');

3169:

3171:                 let currentSortedIndex = sortedPlayers.findIndex(p => p.index === activePlayerIndex);

3173:                     console.warn('⚠️ activePlayerIndex', activePlayerIndex, 'not in sortedPlayers — defaulting to first player. Sorted:', sortedPlayers);
3174:                     currentSortedIndex = sortedPlayers.length - 1; // wraps to 0 below
3175:                 }
3176:

3182:                 // updates activePlayerIndex before any follow-up broadcasts arrive

3294: document.getElementById('undo-move').onclick = function() {
3295:             if (!lastMove) {

3303:             // Restore AP
3304:             currentAP += lastMove.apCost;
3305:             document.getElementById('ap-count').textContent = currentAP;
3306: 
3307:             // Refresh void AP display in case void stones changed
3308:             if (typeof refreshVoidAP === 'function') {
3309:                 refreshVoidAP();
3310:             }
3311: 
3312:             updateStatus(`Undid movement. Restored ${lastMove.apCost} AP (now ${currentAP} AP).`);
3313: 
3314:             // Broadcast undo in multiplayer
3315:             if (isMultiplayer) {
3316:                 broadcastGameAction('undo-move', {
3317:                     playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
3318:                     x: lastMove.prevPos.x,
3319:                     y: lastMove.prevPos.y,
3320:                     apRestored: lastMove.apCost
3321:                 });
3322: 
3323:                 // Sync player state so other players see updated AP
3324:                 if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') {
3325:                     syncPlayerState();
3326:                 }
3327:             }
3328: 
3329:             // Clear the undo history (can only undo once)
3330:             lastMove = null;
3331:         };
3332: 
3333:         // scroll-inventory replaced by panel-btn-hand/active/common in scroll-panels.js
3334:         const _legacyScrollBtn = document.getElementById('scroll-inventory');
3335:         if (_legacyScrollBtn) _legacyScrollBtn.onclick = () => spellSystem.showInventory();
3336: 
3337:         document.getElementById('cast-spell').onclick = function() {
3338:             if (!canTakeAction()) {
3339:                 notYourTurn();
3340:                 return;
3341:             }
3342:             spellSystem.castSpell();
3343:         };
3344: 
3345:         document.getElementById('leave-game').onclick = function() {
3346:             leaveGame();
3347:         };
3348: 
3349:         function findShrineAtPosition(x, y) {
3350:             // Check each tile to see if player is on the center hex (shrine location)
3351:             // Skip player tiles - we want the actual shrine tile
3352:             for (const tile of placedTiles) {
3353:                 // Skip player tiles (shrineType === 'player')
3354:                 if (tile.shrineType === 'player') continue;
3355: 
3356:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(tile.x - x, 2) + Math.pow(tile.y - y, 2));
3357:                 // Center hex is at the tile's position (0,0 offset)
3358:                 if (dist < 5) {
3359:                     console.log(`🔍 findShrineAtPosition(${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)}): Found ${tile.shrineType} shrine at tile ${tile.id}`);
3360:                     return tile;
3361:                 }
3362:             }
3363:             console.log(`🔍 findShrineAtPosition(${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)}): No shrine found`);
3364:             return null;
3365:         }
3366: 
3367:         function replenishShrineStones(shrineType) {
3368:             // Stone rank determines replenishment amount
3369:             const STONE_RANK = {
3370:                 'void': 1,
3371:                 'wind': 2,
3372:                 'fire': 3,
3373:                 'water': 4,
3374:                 'earth': 5
3375:             };
3376: 
3377:             let replenishAmount = STONE_RANK[shrineType];
3378: 
3379:             // Mine buff: double output for the buffed shrine type
3380:             const mineBuff = spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.mine;
3381:             if (mineBuff && mineBuff.playerIndex === activePlayerIndex && mineBuff.shrineType === shrineType) {
3382:                 replenishAmount *= 2;
3383:                 console.log(`⛏️ Mine: doubling ${shrineType} shrine output to ${replenishAmount}`);
3384:             }
3385: 
3386:             // Calculate how many stones we can actually transfer
3387:             // Limited by: source pool availability, player pool capacity, and replenish amount
3388:             const availableInSource = sourcePool[shrineType];
3389:             const spaceInPlayer = playerPoolCapacity[shrineType] - playerPool[shrineType];
3390:             const actualReplenished = Math.min(replenishAmount, availableInSource, spaceInPlayer);
3391: 
3392:             if (actualReplenished > 0) {
3393:                 // Transfer from source pool to player pool
3394:                 sourcePool[shrineType] -= actualReplenished;
3395:                 playerPool[shrineType] += actualReplenished;
3396:                 updateStoneCount(shrineType);
3397: 
3398:                 // Sync resources in multiplayer
3399:                 syncPlayerState();
3400: 
3401:                 updateStatus(`Shrine activated! Transferred ${actualReplenished} ${shrineType} stone${actualReplenished > 1 ? 's' : ''} from source to player pool. (Source: ${sourcePool[shrineType]}/${sourcePoolCapacity[shrineType]}, Player: ${playerPool[shrineType]}/${playerPoolCapacity[shrineType]}). AP restored.`);
3402:             } else if (spaceInPlayer === 0) {
3403:                 updateStatus(`Shrine activated but player pool is full! (${playerPool[shrineType]}/${playerPoolCapacity[shrineType]}). AP restored.`);
3404:             } else if (availableInSource === 0) {
3405:                 updateStatus(`Shrine activated but source pool is empty! (${sourcePool[shrineType]}/${sourcePoolCapacity[shrineType]}). AP restored.`);
3406:             }
3407:         }
3408: 
3409:         let activeTeleportIndicators = [];
3410: 
3411:         function updateCatacombIndicators() {
3412:             // Remove existing indicators
3413:             activeTeleportIndicators.forEach(ind => ind.remove());
3414:             activeTeleportIndicators = [];
3415: 
3416:             // Only allow teleport indicators on the active player's turn
3417:             if (typeof canTakeAction === 'function' && !canTakeAction()) return;
3418: 
3419:             // Check if player is on a catacomb shrine
3420:             if (!playerPosition) return;
3421: 
3422:             const currentShrine = findShrineAtPosition(playerPosition.x, playerPosition.y);
3423:             const freedomActive = spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects
3424:                 && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasFreedomActive === 'function'
3425:                 && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasFreedomActive(myPlayerIndex);
3426:             const elementalTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
3427:             const isCatacombLike = (tile) => {
3428:                 if (!tile) return false;
3429:                 if (tile.shrineType === 'catacomb') return true;
3430:                 if (freedomActive && elementalTypes.includes(tile.shrineType)) return true;
3431:                 return false;
3432:             };
3433: 
3434:             if (!currentShrine || !isCatacombLike(currentShrine)) return;
3435: 
3436:             // Find all other REVEALED catacomb shrines (not flipped) WITHOUT stones on them
3437:             const otherCatacombs = placedTiles.filter(tile => {
3438:                 if (!isCatacombLike(tile)) return false;
3439:                 if (tile.flipped) return false; // Only revealed catacombs
3440:                 if (Math.abs(tile.x - currentShrine.x) <= 5 && Math.abs(tile.y - currentShrine.y) <= 5) return false; // Same catacomb
3441:                 
3442:                 // Check if there's a stone at the catacomb center
3443:                 const hasStone = placedStones.some(stone => {
3444:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - tile.y, 2));
3445:                     return dist < 5; // Stone is at the center of this catacomb
3446:                 });
3447: 
3448:                 // Check if another player is standing there
3449:                 const hasPlayer = playerPositions.some(p => {
3450:                     if (!p) return false;
3451:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(p.y - tile.y, 2));
3452:                     return dist < 5;
3453:                 });
3454:                 
3455:                 return !hasStone && !hasPlayer; // Only allow teleport to unoccupied shrines
3456:             });
3457: 
3458:             if (otherCatacombs.length === 0) {
3459:                 const message = currentShrine.shrineType === 'catacomb'
3460:                     ? 'Standing on catacomb shrine, but no valid destinations! (must be revealed and have no stone on center)'
3461:                     : 'Freedom active, but no valid shrine destinations! (must be revealed and have no stone on center)';
3462:                 updateStatus(message);
3463:                 return;
3464:             }
3465: 
3466:             // Create visual indicators for teleport destinations
3467:             otherCatacombs.forEach(shrine => {
3468:                 const indicator = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
3469:                 indicator.setAttribute('cx', shrine.x);
3470:                 indicator.setAttribute('cy', shrine.y);
3471:                 indicator.setAttribute('r', '15');
3472:                 indicator.setAttribute('fill', '#8b4513');
3473:                 indicator.setAttribute('opacity', '0.5');
3474:                 indicator.setAttribute('stroke', '#fff');
3475:                 indicator.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
3476:                 indicator.setAttribute('class', 'teleport-indicator');
3477:                 indicator.style.cursor = 'pointer';
3478:                 indicator.style.animation = 'pulse 1s infinite';
3479: 
3480:                 // Add click handler for teleportation
3481:                 indicator.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
3482:                     e.stopPropagation();
3483:                     e.preventDefault();
3484:                     if (typeof canTakeAction === 'function' && !canTakeAction()) {
3485:                         updateStatus('Not your turn.');
3486:                         return;
3487:                     }
3488: 
3489:                     // Double-check no stone was placed since indicators were created
3490:                     const hasStoneNow = placedStones.some(stone => {
3491:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - shrine.x, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - shrine.y, 2));
3492:                         return dist < 5;
3493:                     });
3494:                     
3495:                     if (hasStoneNow) {
3496:                         updateStatus('Cannot teleport there - a stone is blocking!');
3497:                         updateCatacombIndicators();
3498:                         return;
3499:                     }
3500: 
3501:                     // Double-check no player moved there since indicators were created
3502:                     const hasPlayerNow = playerPositions.some(p => {
3503:                         if (!p) return false;
3504:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x - shrine.x, 2) + Math.pow(p.y - shrine.y, 2));
3505:                         return dist < 5;
3506:                     });
3507: 
3508:                     if (hasPlayerNow) {
3509:                         updateStatus('Cannot teleport there - another player is in the way!');
3510:                         updateCatacombIndicators();
3511:                         return;
3512:                     }
3513: 
3514:                     // Teleport player (no AP cost)
3515:                     placePlayer(shrine.x, shrine.y);
3516:                     updateStatus(`Teleported to another catacomb shrine!`);
3517: 
3518:                     // Broadcast teleport so other clients stay in sync
3519:                     if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
3520:                         const playerIndex = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
3521:                             ? myPlayerIndex
3522:                             : activePlayerIndex;
3523:                         broadcastGameAction('catacomb-teleport', {
3524:                             playerIndex,
3525:                             x: shrine.x,
3526:                             y: shrine.y
3527:                         });
3528:                     }
3529: 
3530:                     // Update indicators for new position
3531:                     updateCatacombIndicators();
3532:                 });
3533: 
3534:                 viewport.appendChild(indicator);
3535:                 activeTeleportIndicators.push(indicator);
3536:             });
3537: 
3538:             const prompt = currentShrine.shrineType === 'catacomb'
3539:                 ? 'Standing on catacomb shrine. Click another revealed catacomb to teleport (free).'
3540:                 : 'Freedom active. Click another revealed shrine to teleport (free).';
3541:             updateStatus(prompt);
3542:         }
3543: 
3544:         // Expose for scroll effects (e.g. Freedom)
3545:         window.updateCatacombIndicators = updateCatacombIndicators;
3546:

3596:             `;

3599:                 const tab = document.createElement('button');
3600:                 tab.dataset.element = el;
3601:                 tab.textContent = el.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + el.slice(1);
3602:                 tab.style.cssText = `
3603:                     font-family: var(--font-pixel); font-size: 9px;
3604:                     padding: 6px 11px; border: 1px solid ${c}44;
3605:                     background: transparent; color: ${c}88; cursor: pointer;
3606:                     border-radius: 3px 3px 0 0; letter-spacing: 1px;
3607:                 `;

3609:                 tabBar.appendChild(tab);
3610:             });

3617:

3622:                 const c = elementColor(el);
3623: 
3624:                 // Update tab button styles
3625:                 tabBar.querySelectorAll('button[data-element]').forEach(btn => {

3629:                     btn.style.color       = active ? bc : `${bc}88`;
3630:                     btn.style.borderColor = active ? bc : `${bc}44`;
3631:                 });
3632:

3634:                 content.innerHTML = '';

3636:

3638:                     content.innerHTML = `<div style="color:#ccc;font-family:var(--font-terminal);padding:20px;text-align:center;">No scrolls found.</div>`;
3639:                     return;
3640:                 }
3641:

3643:                     const pattern = spellSystem?.patterns?.[scrollName];

3650:                         margin-bottom: 8px; cursor: pointer;
3651:                     `;

3662:

3666:

3689: 
3690:         // Generate spiral tile positions starting from center
3691:         // Based on the spiral pattern from the image: 1(center), 2(SE), 3(SW), 4(W), 5(NW), 6(NE), 7(E), then ring 2...
3692:         function generateSpiralPositions(numTiles) {
3693:             const positions = [];
3694:             const largeHexSize = TILE_SIZE * 4; // Grid size for tile snapping
3695: 
3696:             // Predefined spiral path in axial coordinates (q, r)
3697:             // 6 tiles per player (one of each shrine type)
3698:             const spiralPath = [
3699:                 { q: 0, r: 0 },    // 1 - Center
3700:                 { q: 0, r: 1 },    // 2 - SE
3701:                 { q: -1, r: 1 },   // 3 - SW
3702:                 { q: -1, r: 0 },   // 4 - W
3703:                 { q: 0, r: -1 },   // 5 - NW
3704:                 { q: 1, r: -1 },   // 6 - NE (1 player complete - 6 tiles)
3705:                 { q: 1, r: 0 },    // 7 - E
3706:                 { q: 1, r: 1 },    // 8 - SE (ring 2)
3707:                 { q: 0, r: 2 },    // 9
3708:                 { q: -1, r: 2 },   // 10
3709:                 { q: -2, r: 2 },   // 11
3710:                 { q: -2, r: 1 },   // 12 (2 players complete - 12 tiles)
3711:                 { q: -2, r: 0 },   // 13
3712:                 { q: -1, r: -1 },  // 14
3713:                 { q: 0, r: -2 },   // 15
3714:                 { q: 1, r: -2 },   // 16
3715:                 { q: 2, r: -2 },   // 17
3716:                 { q: 2, r: -1 },   // 18 (3 players complete - 18 tiles)
3717:                 { q: 2, r: 0 },    // 19
3718:                 { q: 2, r: 1 },    // 20
3719:                 { q: 1, r: 2 },    // 21 (ring 3)
3720:                 { q: 0, r: 3 },    // 22
3721:                 { q: -1, r: 3 },   // 23
3722:                 { q: -2, r: 3 },   // 24 (4 players complete - 24 tiles)
3723:                 { q: -3, r: 3 },   // 25
3724:                 { q: -3, r: 2 },   // 26
3725:                 { q: -3, r: 1 },   // 27
3726:                 { q: -3, r: 0 },   // 28
3727:                 { q: -2, r: -1 },  // 29
3728:                 { q: -1, r: -2 },  // 30 (5 players complete - 30 tiles)
3729:                 { q: 0, r: -3 },   // 31 (extra positions for future)
3730:                 { q: 1, r: -3 },   // 32
3731:                 { q: 2, r: -3 },   // 33
3732:                 { q: 3, r: -3 },   // 34
3733:                 { q: 3, r: -2 },   // 35
3734:                 { q: 3, r: -1 },   // 36
3735:             ];
3736: 
3737:             // Convert to pixel positions
3738:             for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(numTiles, spiralPath.length); i++) {
3739:                 const pos = hexToPixel(spiralPath[i].q, spiralPath[i].r, largeHexSize);
3740:                 positions.push({ x: pos.x, y: pos.y });
3741:             }
3742: 
3743:             return positions;
3744:         }
3745: 
3746:         // ─── Hidden cheat panel ──────────────────────────────────────────────
3747:         // Activate: click the "AP" label in the HUD 5 times within 3 seconds
3748:         (function initCheatPanel() {
3749:             let clickCount = 0;
3750:             let clickTimer = null;
3751: 
3752:             function openCheatPanel() {
3753:                 const existing = document.getElementById('cheat-panel');
3754:                 if (existing) { existing.remove(); return; }
3755: 
3756:                 const panel = document.createElement('div');
3757:                 panel.id = 'cheat-panel';
3758:                 Object.assign(panel.style, {
3759:                     position: 'fixed',
3760:                     bottom: '60px',
3761:                     right: '16px',
3762:                     background: '#1a1a2e',
3763:                     border: '1px solid #444',
3764:                     borderRadius: '8px',
3765:                     padding: '10px 14px',
3766:                     zIndex: '9999',
3767:                     display: 'flex',
3768:                     flexDirection: 'column',
3769:                     gap: '8px',
3770:                     boxShadow: '0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)',
3771:                     minWidth: '240px',
3772:                     maxWidth: '280px'
3773:                 });
3774: 
3775:                 function makeBtn(label, action) {
3776:                     const btn = document.createElement('button');
3777:                     btn.textContent = label;
3778:                     Object.assign(btn.style, {
3779:                         padding: '6px 10px',
3780:                         background: '#2d2d44',
3781:                         color: '#eee',
3782:                         border: '1px solid #555',
3783:                         borderRadius: '5px',
3784:                         cursor: 'pointer',
3785:                         fontSize: '13px',
3786:                         textAlign: 'left'
3787:                     });
3788:                     btn.onclick = action;
3789:                     return btn;
3790:                 }
3791: 
3792:                 panel.appendChild(makeBtn('Fill Stones', () => {
3793:                     if (typeof window.fillstones === 'function') window.fillstones();
3794:                 }));
3795:                 panel.appendChild(makeBtn('Toggle Deck Browser', () => {
3796:                     if (typeof window.showdeck === 'function') window.showdeck();
3797:                 }));
3798: 
3799:                 // Place Anywhere toggle — uses the same globalPlacement buff as Avalanche,
3800:                 // but with expiresThisTurn:false so it persists until toggled off.
3801:                 const placeAnywhereBtn = makeBtn('Place Anywhere: OFF', () => {
3802:                     if (!spellSystem || !spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
3803:                         updateStatus('spellSystem not ready');
3804:                         return;
3805:                     }
3806:                     const idx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
3807:                         ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
3808:                     const buff = spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.globalPlacement;
3809:                     if (buff && buff.playerIndex === idx && buff.cheatPersist) {
3810:                         // Turn off
3811:                         spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.globalPlacement = null;
3812:                         placeAnywhereBtn.textContent = 'Place Anywhere: OFF';
3813:                         placeAnywhereBtn.style.color = '#eee';
3814:                         updateStatus('Place anywhere: OFF');
3815:                     } else {

3892:                 // Slider helper
3893:                 function makeOverlaySlider(label, min, max, step, key) {
3894:                     const row = document.createElement('div');

3896:                     const lbl = document.createElement('span');

3900:                     slider.type = 'range';
3901:                     slider.min = min; slider.max = max; slider.step = step;
3902:                     slider.style.cssText = 'flex:1;accent-color:#6ef;min-width:0;';

3909:                             window.tileOverlaySettings[selectedEl][key] = v;
3910:                             window.refreshAllTileOverlays?.();
3911:                         }
3912:                     };
3913:                     row.appendChild(lbl); row.appendChild(slider); row.appendChild(val);
3914:                     overlayBody.appendChild(row);
3915:                     return { slider, val };
3916:                 }

4017:                             if (!tileEl) return;
4018:                             e.stopPropagation();
4019:                             e.preventDefault();
4020:                             const tileId = parseInt(tileEl.getAttribute('data-tile-id'));

4035:                             }

4045:                 // ── Sprite Effect Lab ─────────────────────────────────────────
4046:                 (function buildSpriteEffectLab() {
4047:                     const section = document.createElement('div');
4048:                     section.style.cssText = 'border-top:1px solid #444;padding-top:8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;';
4049: 
4050:                     const title = document.createElement('div');
4051:                     title.textContent = '✨ Sprite Effect Lab';
4052:                     title.style.cssText = 'font-size:12px;color:#aaa;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;';
4053:                     let open = false;
4054:                     const body = document.createElement('div');
4055:                     body.style.cssText = 'display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;';
4056:                     title.onclick = () => { open = !open; body.style.display = open ? 'flex' : 'none'; };
4057:                     section.appendChild(title);
4058:                     section.appendChild(body);
4059: 
4060:                     // State
4061:                     let frames = [];
4062:                     let animTimer = null;
4063:                     let currentFrame = 0;
4064:                     let cfg = { fps: 18, hueRotate: 0, brightness: 1, saturation: 1, scale: 1, trigger: 'stone_destroyed', stoneType: 'fire' };
4065: 
4066:                     // Preview canvas
4067:                     const previewWrap = document.createElement('div');
4068:                     previewWrap.style.cssText = 'display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;background:#111;border:1px solid #333;border-radius:4px;height:100px;';
4069:                     const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
4070:                     canvas.width = 80; canvas.height = 80;
4071:                     canvas.style.cssText = 'image-rendering:pixelated;';
4072:                     previewWrap.appendChild(canvas);
4073:                     body.appendChild(previewWrap);
4074:                     const ctx2 = canvas.getContext('2d');
4075: 
4076:                     function drawFrame() {
4077:                         ctx2.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
4078:                         if (!frames.length) return;
4079:                         const img = frames[currentFrame % frames.length];
4080:                         const s = cfg.scale;
4081:                         const w = img.width * s, h = img.height * s;
4082:                         ctx2.save();
4083:                         ctx2.filter = `hue-rotate(${cfg.hueRotate}deg) brightness(${cfg.brightness}) saturate(${cfg.saturation})`;
4084:                         ctx2.drawImage(img, (canvas.width - w) / 2, (canvas.height - h) / 2, w, h);
4085:                         ctx2.restore();
4086:                     }
4087: 
4088:                     function startAnim() {
4089:                         if (animTimer) clearInterval(animTimer);
4090:                         if (!frames.length) return;
4091:                         animTimer = setInterval(() => { currentFrame = (currentFrame + 1) % frames.length; drawFrame(); }, 1000 / cfg.fps);
4092:                     }
4093: 
4094:                     // File upload
4095:                     const uploadRow = document.createElement('div');
4096:                     uploadRow.style.cssText = 'display:flex;gap:4px;align-items:center;';
4097:                     const uploadLabel = document.createElement('span');
4098:                     uploadLabel.textContent = 'Frames:';
4099:                     uploadLabel.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;color:#aaa;width:44px;flex-shrink:0;';
4100:                     const fileInput = document.createElement('input');
4101:                     fileInput.type = 'file';
4102:                     fileInput.multiple = true;
4103:                     fileInput.accept = 'image/png,image/webp';
4104:                     fileInput.style.cssText = 'flex:1;font-size:10px;color:#eee;background:#111;border:1px solid #555;border-radius:4px;padding:2px;cursor:pointer;min-width:0;';
4105:                     const frameCount = document.createElement('span');
4106:                     frameCount.style.cssText = 'font-size:10px;color:#6ef;width:32px;text-align:right;flex-shrink:0;';
4107:                     frameCount.textContent = '0 fr';
4108:                     fileInput.onchange = () => {
4109:                         const files = Array.from(fileInput.files).sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
4110:                         frames = [];
4111:                         currentFrame = 0;
4112:                         let loaded = 0;
4113:                         files.forEach((f, i) => {
4114:                             const img = new Image();
4115:                             img.onload = () => {
4116:                                 frames[i] = img;
4117:                                 loaded++;
4118:                                 if (loaded === files.length) {
4119:                                     frameCount.textContent = `${loaded} fr`;
4120:                                     // Fit first frame in preview
4121:                                     const first = frames[0];
4122:                                     cfg.scale = Math.min(1, 80 / Math.max(first.width, first.height));
4123:                                     scaleSlider.value = cfg.scale.toFixed(2);
4124:                                     scaleVal.textContent = cfg.scale.toFixed(2);
4125:                                     startAnim();
4126:                                 }
4127:                             };
4128:                             img.src = URL.createObjectURL(f);
4129:                         });
4130:                     };
4131:                     uploadRow.appendChild(uploadLabel);
4132:                     uploadRow.appendChild(fileInput);
4133:                     uploadRow.appendChild(frameCount);
4134:                     body.appendChild(uploadRow);
4135: 
4136:                     // Slider helper
4137:                     function makeSlider(label, min, max, step, key, initial, format) {
4138:                         const row = document.createElement('div');
4139:                         row.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;';
4140:                         const lbl = document.createElement('span');
4141:                         lbl.textContent = label;
4142:                         lbl.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;color:#aaa;width:44px;flex-shrink:0;';
4143:                         const sl = document.createElement('input');
4144:                         sl.type = 'range'; sl.min = min; sl.max = max; sl.step = step; sl.value = initial;
4145:                         sl.style.cssText = 'flex:1;accent-color:#f96;min-width:0;';
4146:                         const vl = document.createElement('span');
4147:                         vl.style.cssText = 'font-size:11px;color:#eee;width:40px;text-align:right;flex-shrink:0;';
4148:                         vl.textContent = format(initial);
4149:                         sl.oninput = () => {
4150:                             const v = parseFloat(sl.value);
4151:                             cfg[key] = v;
4152:                             vl.textContent = format(v);
4153:                             if (key === 'fps') startAnim(); else drawFrame();
4154:                         };
4155:                         row.appendChild(lbl); row.appendChild(sl); row.appendChild(vl);
4156:                         body.appendChild(row);
4157:                         return { slider: sl, val: vl };
4158:                     }
4159: 
4160:                     makeSlider('Hue',    0, 360, 1,    'hueRotate',  0,   v => `${Math.round(v)}°`);
4161:                     makeSlider('Bright', 0.1, 3, 0.05, 'brightness', 1,   v => v.toFixed(2));
4162:                     makeSlider('Satur',  0, 3,   0.05, 'saturation', 1,   v => v.toFixed(2));
4163:                     const { slider: scaleSlider, val: scaleVal } = makeSlider('Scale', 0.1, 3, 0.05, 'scale', 1, v => v.toFixed(2));
4164:                     makeSlider('FPS',    1, 60,  1,    'fps',        18,  v => `${Math.round(v)}`);
4165: 
4166:                     // Trigger + stone type
4167:                     function makeSelect(label, key, options) {
4168:                         const row = document.createElement('div');
4169:                         row.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;';
4170:                         const lbl = document.createElement('span');

4179:                             sel.appendChild(opt);

4182:                         row.appendChild(lbl); row.appendChild(sel);
4183:                         body.appendChild(row);
4184:                     }
4185: 
4186:                     makeSelect('Trigger', 'trigger', [
4187:                         ['stone_destroyed', 'Stone destroyed'],
